Matthew1:1 Buku la kubadwa kwa Yesu Khristu, mwana wa Davide, mwana wa Abrahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu anabala Isaki; ndi Isaki anabala Yakobo; ndi Yakobo anabala Yuda ndi abale ake; 
Matthew1:3 ndi Yuda anabala Perezi ndi Zera mwa Tamara; ndi Perezi anabala Hezironi; ndi Hezironi anabala Ramu; 
Matthew1:4 ndi Ramu anabala Aminadabu; ndi Aminadabu anabala Nasoni; ndi Nasoni anabala Salimoni; 
Matthew1:5 ndi Salimoni anabala Bowazi mwa Rahabu; ndi Bowazi anabala Obede mwa Rute; ndi Obede anabala Yese; 
Matthew1:6 ndi Yese anabala Davide mfumuyo. Ndipo Davide anabala Solomoni mwa mkazi wa Uriya; 
Matthew1:7 ndi Solomoni anabala Rehobowamu; ndi Rehobowamu anabala Abiya; ndi Abiya anabala Asa; 
Matthew1:8 ndi Asa anabala Yehosafati; ndi Yehosafati anabala Yoramu; ndi Yoramu anabala Uziya; 
Matthew1:9 ndi Uziya anabala Yotamu; ndi Yotamu anabala Ahazi; ndi Ahazi anabala Hezekiya; 
Matthew1:10 ndi Hezekiya anabala Manase; ndi Manase anabala Amoni; ndi Amoni anabala Yosiya; 
Matthew1:11 ndi Yosiya anabala Yekoniya ndi abale ake pa nthawi yakutengedwa kunka ku Babiloni. 
Matthew1:12 Ndipo pambuyo pake pa kutengedwako ku Babiloni, Yekoniya anabala Sealatiele; ndi Sealatiele anabala Zerubabele;" 
Matthew1:13 ndi Zerubabele anabala Abihudi; ndi Abihudi anabala Eliyakimu; ndi Eliyakimu anabala Azoro; 
Matthew1:14 ndi Azoro anabala Zadoki; ndi Zadoki anabala Akimu; ndi Akimu anabala Eliudi; 
Matthew1:15 ndi Eliudi anabala Eleazara; ndi Eleazara anabala Matani; ndi Matani anabala Yakobo; 
Matthew1:16 ndi Yakobo anabala Yosefe, mwamuna wake wa Maria, amene Yesu, wotchedwa Khristu, anabadwa mwa iye." 
Matthew1:17 Motero mibadwo yonse kuyambira pa Abrahamu kufikira kwa Davide ndiyo mibadwo khumi ndi inai; ndi kuyambira pa Davide kufikira pa kutengedwa kunka ku Babiloni mibadwo khumi ndi inai; ndi kuyambira pa kutengedwa kunka ku Babiloni kufikira kwa Khristu mibadwo khumi ndi inai. 
Matthew1:18 Ndipo kubadwa kwake kwa Yesu Khristu kunali kotere: Amai wake Maria anapalidwa ubwenzi ndi Yosefe, koma asanakomane iwowo, anapezedwa iye ali ndi pakati mwa Mzimu Woyera." 
Matthew1:19 Koma Yosefe, mwamuna wake, anali wolungama, ndiponso sanafune kunyazitsa iye, nayesa m'mtima kumleka iye m'tseri." 
Matthew1:20 Koma pakusinkhasinkha iye zinthu izi, onani, mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera kwa iye m'kulota, nanena, Yosefe, mwana wa Davide, usaope kudzitengera wekha Maria mkazi wako; pakuti icho cholandiridwa mwa iye chili cha Mzimu Woyera." 
Matthew1:21 Ndipo adzabala mwana wamwamuna, ndipo udzamutcha dzina lake Yesu; pakuti Iyeyo adzapulumutsa anthu ake kumachimo ao." 
Matthew1:22 Ndipo zonsezi zinakhala kuti chikachitidwe chonenedwa ndi Ambuye mwa mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Matthew1:23 Onani namwali adzaima, nadzabala mwana wamwamuna, ndipo adzamutcha dzina lake, Imanuele. Ndilo losandulika, Mulungu nafe." 
Matthew1:24 Ndipo Yosefe anauka tulo take, nachita monga anamuuza mngelo wa Ambuye, nadzitengera yekha mkazi wake;" 
Matthew1:25 ndipo sanamdziwe iye kufikira atabala mwana wake; namutcha dzina lake Yesu. 
Matthew2:1 Ndipo pa kubadwa kwake kwa Yesu m'Betelehemu wa Yudeya m'masiku a Herode mfumu, onani, Anzeru a kum'mawa anafika ku Yerusalemu," 
Matthew2:2 nati, Ali kuti amene anabadwa mfumu ya Ayuda? Chifukwa tinaona nyenyezi yake kum'mawa, ndipo tinadzera kudzamlambira Iye." 
Matthew2:3 Ndipo Herode mfumuyo pakumva ichi anavutika, ndi Yerusalemu yense pamodzi naye." 
Matthew2:4 Ndipo pamene anasonkhanitsa ansembe aakulu onse ndi alembi a anthu, anafunsira iwo, Adzabadwira kuti Khristuyo?" 
Matthew2:5 Ndipo anamuuza iye, M'Betelehemu wa Yudeya; chifukwa kunalembedwa kotere ndi mneneri, kuti," 
Matthew2:6 Ndipo iwe Betelehemu, dziko la Yudeya, sukhala konse wamng'onong'ono mwa akulu a Yudeya. Pakuti Wotsogolera adzachokera mwa iwe, amene adzaweta anthu anga Aisraele." 
Matthew2:7 Pomwepo Herode anawaitana Anzeruwo m'tseri, nafunsitsa iwo nthawi yake idaoneka nyenyeziyo." 
Matthew2:8 Nawatumiza ku Betelehemu, nati, Yendani mufunitsitse za kamwanako; ndipo pamene mudzampeza, mundibwezere mau, kuti inenso ndidzadze kudzamlambira Iye." 
Matthew2:9 Ndipo iwo, m'mene anamva mfumu, anamuka; ndipo onani, nyenyezi ija anaiona kum'mawa, inawatsogolera iwo, kufikira inadza niima pamwamba pomwe panali kamwanako." 
Matthew2:10 Ndipo iwo poona nyenyeziyo, anakondwera ndi kukondwera kwakukulu." 
Matthew2:11 Ndipo pofika kunyumba anaona kamwanako ndi Maria amake, ndipo anagwa pansi namgwadira Iye; namasula chuma chao, nampatsa Iye mitulo, ndiyo golide ndi lubani ndi mure." 
Matthew2:12 Ndipo iwo, pochenjezedwa m'kulota kuti asabwerere kwa Herode, anachoka kupita ku dziko lao pa njira ina." 
Matthew2:13 Ndipo pamene iwo anachoka, onani, mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera kwa Yosefe m'kulota, nati, Tauka, nutenge kamwanako ndi amake, nuthawire ku Ejipito, nukakhale kumeneko kufikira ndidzakuuza iwe; pakuti Herode adzafuna kamwana kukaononga Iko." 
Matthew2:14 Ndipo iye ananyamuka natenga kamwana ndi amake usiku, nachoka kupita ku Ejipito;" 
Matthew2:15 nakhalabe kumeneko kufikira atamwalira Herode; kuti chikachitidwe chonenedwa ndi Ambuye mwa mneneri kuti, Ndinaitana Mwana wanga atuluke m'Ejipito." 
Matthew2:16 Pamenepo Herode, poona kuti anampusitsa Anzeruwo, anapsa mtima ndithu, natumiza ena kukaononga tiana tonse ta m'Betelehemu ndi ta m'milaga yake yonse, takufikira zaka ziwiri ndi tating'ono tonse, monga mwa nthawi imeneyo iye anafunsitsa kwa Anzeruwo." 
Matthew2:17 Pomwepo chinachitidwa chonenedwa ndi Yeremiya mneneri, kuti," 
Matthew2:18 Mau anamveka m'Rama, maliro ndi kuchema kwambiri; Rakele wolira ana ake, wosafuna kusangalatsidwa, chifukwa palibe iwo." 
Matthew2:19 Koma pakumwalira Herode, onani, mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera m'kulota kwa Yosefe m'Ejipito," 
Matthew2:20 nati, Tauka, nutenge kamwana ndi amake, nupite kudziko la Israele: chifukwa anafa uja wofuna moyo wake wa kamwanako." 
Matthew2:21 Ndipo anauka iye, natenga kamwana ndi amake, nalowa m'dziko la Israele." 
Matthew2:22 Koma pakumva iye kuti Arkelao anali mfumu ya Yudeya m'malo mwa atate wake Herode, anachita mantha kupita kumeneko; ndipo pamene anachenjezedwa ndi Mulungu m'kulota, anamuka nalowa kudziko la Galileya," 
Matthew2:23 nadza nakhazikika m'mudzi dzina lake Nazarete kuti chikachitidwe chonenedwa ndi aneneri kuti, Adzatchedwa Mnazarayo." 
Matthew3:1 Ndipo masiku aja anadza Yohane Mbatizi, nalalikira m'chipululu cha Yudeya," 
Matthew3:2 nanena, Tembenukani mitima; chifukwa Ufumu wa Kumwamba wayandikira." 
Matthew3:3 Pakuti uyu ndiye ananenayo Yesaya mneneri, kuti, Mau a wofuula m'chipululu, konzani khwalala la Ambuye, lungamitsani njira zake." 
Matthew3:4 Ndipo Yohane yekhayo anali nacho chovala chake cha ubweya wangamira, ndi lamba lachikopa m'chuuno mwake; ndi chakudya chake chinali dzombe ndi uchi wa kuthengo." 
Matthew3:5 Pamenepo panamtulukira iye a ku Yerusalemu, ndi Yudeya lonse, ndi dziko lonse loyandikana ndi Yordani;" 
Matthew3:6 nabatizidwa ndi iye mu mtsinjewo wa Yordani, alikuwulula machimo ao." 
Matthew3:7 Ndipo iye pakuona ambiri a Afarisi ndi a Asaduki akudza ku ubatizo wake, anati kwa iwo, Obadwa a njoka inu, ndani anakulangizani kuthawa mkwiyo ulinkudza?" 
Matthew3:8 Onetsani inu zipatso zakuyenera kutembenuka mtima: 
Matthew3:9 ndipo musamayesa kunena mwa inu nokha, Atate wathu tili naye Abrahamu; pakuti ndinena kwa inu kuti mwa miyala iyi Mulungu akhoza kuukitsira Abrahamu ana." 
Matthew3:10 Ndiponso tsopano lino nkhwangwa yaikidwa pa mizu ya mitengo: chifukwa chake mtengo uliwonse wosabala zipatso zabwino udulidwa nuponyedwa pamoto. 
Matthew3:11 Inetu ndikubatizani inu ndi madzi kuloza ku kutembenuka mtima; koma Iye wakudza pambuyo panga, ali wakundiposa mphamvu, amene sindiyenera kunyamula nsapato zake: Iyeyu adzakubatizani inu ndi Mzimu Woyera ndi moto:" 
Matthew3:12 chouluzira chake chili m'dzanja lake, ndipo adzayeretsa padwale pake; ndipo adzasonkhanitsa tirigu wake m'nkhokwe, koma mankhusu adzatentha ndi moto wosazima." 
Matthew3:13 Pamenepo Yesu anachokera ku Galileya nadza ku Yordani kwa Yohane, kudzabatizidwa ndi iye." 
Matthew3:14 Koma Yohane anati amkanize, nanena, Ndiyenera ine kubatizidwa ndi Inu, ndipo Inu mudza kwa ine kodi?" 
Matthew3:15 Koma Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iye, Balola tsopano: pakuti kuyenera ife kukwaniritsa chilungamo chonse motero. Pamenepo anamlola Iye." 
Matthew3:16 Ndipo Yesu, pamene anabatizidwa, pomwepo anatuluka m'madzi: ndipo onani, miyamba inamtsegukira Iye, ndipo anapenya Mzimu wa Mulungu wakutsika ngati nkhunda nudza nutera pa Iye;" 
Matthew3:17 ndipo onani, mau akuchokera kumiyamba akuti, Uyu ndiye mwana wanga wokondedwa, mwa Iyeyu ndikondwera." 
Matthew4:1 Pamenepo Yesu anatengedwa ndi Mzimu kunka kuchipululu kukayesedwa ndi mdierekezi. 
Matthew4:2 Ndipo pamene Iye analibe kudya masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku, pambuyo pake anamva njala." 
Matthew4:3 Ndipo woyesayo anafika nanena kwa Iye, Ngati muli Mwana wa Mulungu, tauzani kuti miyala iyi isanduke mikate." 
Matthew4:4 Koma Iye anayankha nati, Kwalembedwa, Munthu sadzakhala ndi moyo ndi mkate wokha, koma ndi mau onse akutuluka m'kamwa mwa Mulungu." 
Matthew4:5 Pamenepo mdierekezi anamuka naye kumzinda woyera; namuika Iye pamwamba penipeni pa Kachisi," 
Matthew4:6 nanena naye, Ngati muli Mwana wa Mulungu, mudzigwetse nokha pansi: pakuti kwalembedwa, kuti, Adzalamula angelo ake za iwe, ndipo pa manja ao adzakunyamula iwe, ungagunde konse phazi lako pamwala." 
Matthew4:7 Yesu ananena naye, Ndiponso kwalembedwa, Usamuyese Ambuye Mulungu wako." 
Matthew4:8 Pomwepo mdierekezi anamuka naye kuphiri lalitali, namuonetsa maufumu onse a dziko lapansi, ndi ulemerero wao;" 
Matthew4:9 nati kwa Iye, Zonse ndikupatsani Inu, ngati mudzagwa pansi ndi kundigwadira ine." 
Matthew4:10 Pomwepo Yesu ananena kwa iye, Choka Satana, pakuti kwalembedwa, Ambuye Mulungu wako udzamgwadira, ndipo Iye yekhayekha udzamlambira." 
Matthew4:11 Pomwepo mdierekezi anamsiya Iye, ndipo onani, angelo anadza, namtumikira Iye." 
Matthew4:12 Ndipo pamene Yesu anamva kuti anampereka Yohane, anamuka kulowa ku Galileya;" 
Matthew4:13 ndipo anachoka ku Nazarete nadza nakhalitsa Iye m'Kapernao wa pambali pa nyanja, m'malire a Zebuloni ndi Nafutali:" 
Matthew4:14 kuti chikachitidwe chonenedwa ndi Yesaya mneneri, kuti," 
Matthew4:15 Dziko la Zebuloni ndi dziko la Nafutali, njira ya kunyanja, kutsidya lija la Yordani, Galileya la anthu akunja," 
Matthew4:16 anthu akukhala mumdima adaona kuwala kwakukulu, ndi kwa iwo okhala m'malo a mthunzi wa imfa, kuwala kunatulukira iwo." 
Matthew4:17 Kuyambira pamenepo Yesu anayamba kulalikira, ndi kunena, Tembenukani mitima, pakuti Ufumu wa Kumwamba wayandikira." 
Matthew4:18 Ndipo pamene Yesu analikuyenda m'mbali mwa nyanja ya Galileya, anaona abale awiri, Simoni wonenedwa Petro, ndi Andrea, mbale wake, analikuponya khoka m'nyanja; popeza anali asodzi a nsomba." 
Matthew4:19 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Tiyeni pambuyo panga, ndidzakusandutsani asodzi a anthu." 
Matthew4:20 Ndipo iwo anasiya pomwepo makokawo, namtsata Iye." 
Matthew4:21 Ndipo popitirirapo Iye anaona abale ena awiri, Yakobo mwana wa Zebedeo, ndi Yohane mbale wake, m'ngalawa, pamodzi ndi Zebedeo atate wao, analikusoka makoka ao; ndipo anaitana iwo." 
Matthew4:22 Ndipo anasiya pomwepo ngalawayo ndi atate wao, namtsata Iye." 
Matthew4:23 Ndipo Yesu anayendayenda m'Galileya monse, analikuphunzitsa m'masunagoge mwao, nalalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa Ufumu, nachiritsa nthenda zonse ndi kudwala konse mwa anthu." 
Matthew4:24 Ndipo mbiri yake inabuka ku Siriya konse: ndipo anatengera kwa Iye onse akudwala, ogwidwa ndi nthenda ndi mazunzo a mitundumitundu, ndi ogwidwa ndi ziwanda, ndi akhunyu, ndi amanjenje; ndipo Iye anawachiritsa." 
Matthew4:25 Ndipo inamtsata mipingomipingo ya anthu ochokera ku Galileya, ndi ku Dekapoli ndi ku Yerusalemu, ndi ku Yudeya, ndi ku tsidya lija la Yordani." 
Matthew5:1 Ndipo m'mene Iye anaona makamu, anakwera m'phiri; ndipo m'mene Iye anakhala pansi, anadza kwa Iye ophunzira ake;" 
Matthew5:2 ndipo anatsegula pakamwa, nawaphunzitsa iwo, nati:" 
Matthew5:3 Odala ali osauka mumzimu; chifukwa uli wao Ufumu wa Kumwamba. 
Matthew5:4 Odala ali achisoni; chifukwa adzasangalatsidwa. 
Matthew5:5 Odala ali akufatsa; chifukwa adzalandira dziko lapansi. 
Matthew5:6 Odala ali akumva njala ndi ludzu la chilungamo; chifukwa adzakhuta. 
Matthew5:7 Odala ali akuchitira chifundo; chifukwa adzalandira chifundo. 
Matthew5:8 Odala ali oyera mtima; chifukwa adzaona Mulungu. 
Matthew5:9 Odala ali akuchita mtendere; chifukwa adzatchedwa ana a Mulungu. 
Matthew5:10 Odala ali akuzunzidwa chifukwa cha chilungamo: chifukwa uli wao Ufumu wa Kumwamba. 
Matthew5:11 Odala muli inu m'mene adzanyazitsa inu, nadzazunza inu, nadzakunenerani monama zoipa zilizonse chifukwa cha Ine." 
Matthew5:12 Sekerani, sangalalani: chifukwa mphotho yanu ndi yaikulu m'Mwamba: pakuti potero anazunza aneneri anakhalawo musanabadwe inu." 
Matthew5:13 Inu ndinu mchere wa dziko lapansi; koma mcherewo ngati ukasukuluka, adzaukoleretsa ndi chiyani? Pamenepo sungakwanirenso kanthu konse, koma kuti ukaponyedwe kunja, nupondedwe ndi anthu." 
Matthew5:14 Inu ndinu kuunika kwa dziko lapansi. Mudzi wokhazikika pamwamba pa phiri sungathe kubisika. 
Matthew5:15 Kapena sayatsa nyali, ndi kuivundikira m'mbiya, koma aiika iyo pa choikapo chake; ndipo iunikira onse ali m'nyumbamo." 
Matthew5:16 Chomwecho muwalitse inu kuunika kwanu pamaso pa anthu, kuti pakuona ntchito zanu zabwino, alemekeze Atate wanu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew5:17 Musaganize kuti ndinadza Ine kudzapasula chilamulo kapena aneneri: sindinadza kupasula, koma kukwaniritsa." 
Matthew5:18 Pakuti indetu ndinena kwa inu, Kufikira litapitirira thambo ndi dziko, kalemba kakang'ono kamodzi kapena kansonga kake kamodzi sikadzachokera kuchilamulo, kufikira zitachitidwa zonse." 
Matthew5:19 Chifukwa chake yense wakumasula limodzi la malamulo amenewa ang'onong'ono, nadzaphunzitsa anthu chomwecho, adzatchulidwa wamng'onong'ono mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba; koma yense wakuchita ndi kuphunzitsa awa, iyeyu adzatchulidwa wamkulu mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew5:20 Pakuti ndinena ndi inu, ngati chilungamo chanu sichichuluka choposa cha alembi ndi Afarisi, simudzalowa konse mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew5:21 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa kwa iwo akale, Usaphe; koma yense wakupha adzakhala wopalamula mlandu:" 
Matthew5:22 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, kuti yense wokwiyira mbale wake wopanda chifukwa adzakhala wopalamula mlandu; ndipo amene adzanena ndi mbale wake, Wopanda pake iwe, adzakhala wopalamula mlandu wa akulu: koma amene adzati, Chitsiru iwe: adzakhala wopalamula Gehena wamoto." 
Matthew5:23 Chifukwa chake ngati ulikupereka mtulo wako pa guwa la nsembe, ndipo pomwepo ukakumbukira kuti mbale wako ali ndi kanthu pa iwe," 
Matthew5:24 usiye pomwepo mtulo wako kuguwako, nuchoke, nuyambe kuyanjana ndi mbale wako, ndipo pamenepo idza nupereke mtulo wako." 
Matthew5:25 Fulumira kuyanjana ndi mnzako wamlandu, pamene uli naye panjira; kapena mnzako wamlandu angakupereke iwe kwa woweruza mlandu, ndi woweruzayo angapereke iwe kwa msilikali, nuponyedwe iwe m'nyumba yandende." 
Matthew5:26 Indetu ndinena ndi iwe, sudzatulukamo konse, koma utalipa kakobiri kakumaliza ndiko." 
Matthew5:27 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa, Usachite chigololo;" 
Matthew5:28 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, kuti yense wakuyang'ana mkazi kumkhumba, pamenepo watha kuchita naye chigololo mumtima mwake." 
Matthew5:29 Koma ngati diso lako lamanja likulakwitsa iwe, ulikolowole, nulitaye; pakuti nkwabwino kwa iwe, kuti chimodzi cha ziwalo zako chionongeke, losaponyedwa thupi lako lonse m'Gehena." 
Matthew5:30 Ndipo ngati dzanja lako lamanja likulakwitsa iwe, ulidule, nulitaye; pakuti nkwabwino kwa iwe kuti chimodzi cha ziwalo zako chionongeke, losamuka thupi lako lonse ku Gehena." 
Matthew5:31 Kunanenedwanso, Yense wakuchotsa mkazi wake ampatse iye chilekaniro:" 
Matthew5:32 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, kuti yense wakuchotsa mkazi wake, kosati chifukwa cha chigololo, amchititsa chigololo: ndipo amene adzakwata wochotsedwayo achita chigololo." 
Matthew5:33 Ndiponso, munamva kuti kunanenedwa kwa iwo akale, Usalumbire konama, koma udzapereka kwa Ambuye zolumbira zako:" 
Matthew5:34 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, Musalumbire konse, kapena kutchula Kumwamba, chifukwa kuli chimpando cha Mulungu;" 
Matthew5:35 kapena kutchula dziko lapansi, chifukwa lili popondapo mapazi ake; kapena kutchula Yerusalemu, chifukwa kuli mzinda wa Mfumu yaikulukulu." 
Matthew5:36 Kapena usalumbire kumutu wako, chifukwa sungathe kuliyeretsa mbu kapena kulidetsa bii tsitsi limodzi." 
Matthew5:37 Koma manenedwe anu akhale, Inde, inde; Iai, iai; ndipo choonjezedwa pa izo chichokera kwa woipayo." 
Matthew5:38 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa, Diso kulipa diso, ndi dzino kulipa dzino:" 
Matthew5:39 koma ndinena kwa inu, Musakanize munthu woipa; koma amene adzakupanda iwe pa tsaya lako lamanja, umtembenuzire linanso." 
Matthew5:40 Ndipo kwa iye wofuna kupita nawe kumlandu ndi kutenga malaya ako, umlolezenso chofunda chako." 
Matthew5:41 Ndipo amene akakukakamiza kumperekeza njira imodzi, upite naye ziwiri." 
Matthew5:42 Kwa iye wopempha iwe umpatse, ndipo kwa iye wofuna kukukongola usampotolokere." 
Matthew5:43 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa, Uzikondana ndi mnansi wako, ndi kumuda mdani wako:" 
Matthew5:44 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, Kondanani nao adani anu, ndi kupempherera iwo akuzunza inu;" 
Matthew5:45 kotero kuti mukakhale ana a Atate wanu wa Kumwamba; chifukwa Iye amakwezera dzuwa lake pa oipa ndi pa abwino, namavumbitsira mvula pa olungama ndi pa osalungama." 
Matthew5:46 Chifukwa kuti ngati muwakonda akukondana ndi inu mphotho yanji muli nayo? Kodi angakhale amisonkho sachita chomwecho? 
Matthew5:47 Ndipo ngati mupatsa moni abale anu okhaokha, muchitanji choposa ena? Kodi angakhale anthu akunja sachita chomwecho?" 
Matthew5:48 Chifukwa chake inu mukhale angwiro, monga Atate wanu wa Kumwamba ali wangwiro." 
Matthew6:1 Yang'anirani kuti musachite zolungama zanu pamaso pa anthu kuti muonekere kwa iwo; pakuti ngati mutero mulibe mphotho ndi Atate wanu wa Kumwamba. 
Matthew6:2 Chifukwa chake pamene paliponse upatsa mphatso zachifundo, usamaomba lipenga patsogolo pako, monga amachita onyenga m'masunagoge, ndi m'makwalala, kotero kuti atamandidwe ndi anthu. Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Iwo alandiriratu mphotho zao." 
Matthew6:3 Koma iwe popatsa mphatso zachifundo, dzanja lako lamanzere lisadziwe chimene lichita dzanja lako lamanja;" 
Matthew6:4 kotero kuti mphatso zako zachifundo zikhale zam'tseri; ndipo Atate wako wakuona m'tseri adzakubwezera iwe. 
Matthew6:5 Ndipo pamene mupemphera, musakhale monga onyengawo; chifukwa iwo akonda kuimirira ndi kupemphera m'masunagoge, ndi pa mphambano za makwalala, kuti aonekere kwa anthu. Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Iwo alandiriratu mphotho zao." 
Matthew6:6 Koma iwe popemphera, lowa m'chipinda chako, nutseke chitseko chako, nupemphere Atate wako ali m'tseri, ndipo Atate wako wakuona m'tseri adzakubwezera iwe." 
Matthew6:7 Ndipo popemphera musabwerezebwereze chabe iai, monga amachita anthu akunja, chifukwa ayesa kuti adzamvedwa ndi kulankhulalankhula kwao." 
Matthew6:8 Chifukwa chake inu musafanane nao: pakuti Atate wanu adziwa zomwe muzisowa, inu musanayambe kupempha Iye." 
Matthew6:9 Chifukwa chake pempherani inu chomwechi: Atate wathu wa Kumwamba, Dzina lanu liyeretsedwe." 
Matthew6:10 Ufumu wanu udze. Kufuna kwanu kuchitidwe, monga Kumwamba chomwecho pansi pano." 
Matthew6:11 Mutipatse ife lero chakudya chathu chalero. 
Matthew6:12 Ndipo mutikhululukire mangawa athu, monga ifenso takhululukira amangawa anthu." 
Matthew6:13 Ndipo musatitengere kokatiyesa, koma mutipulumutse kwa woipayo." 
Matthew6:14 Pakuti ngati mukhululukira anthu zolakwa zao adzakhululukira inunso Atate wanu wa Kumwamba. 
Matthew6:15 Koma ngati simukhululukira anthu zolakwa zao, Atate wanunso sadzakhululukira zolakwa zanu." 
Matthew6:16 Ndipo pamene ponse musala kudya, musakhale ndi nkhope yachisoni, ngati onyengawo; pakuti aipitsa nkhope zao, kuti aonekere kwa anthu kuti alimkusala kudya. Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Iwo alandiriratu mphotho zao." 
Matthew6:17 Koma iwe, posala kudya, dzola mutu wako, ndi kusamba nkhope yako:" 
Matthew6:18 kuti usaonekere kwa anthu kuti ulikusala kudya, koma kwa Atate wako ali m'tseri: ndipo Atate wako wakuona m'tseri adzakubwezera iwe." 
Matthew6:19 Musadzikundikire nokha chuma pa dziko lapansi, pamene njenjete ndi dzimbiri ziononga; ndi pamene mbala ziboola ndi kuba:" 
Matthew6:20 koma mudzikundikire nokha chuma m'Mwamba, pamene njenjete kapena dzimbiri siziononga, ndipo mbala siziboola ndi kuba;" 
Matthew6:21 pakuti kumene kuli chuma chako, komwe udzakhala mtima wakonso." 
Matthew6:22 Diso ndilo nyali ya thupi; chifukwa chake ngati diso lako lili la kumodzi, thupi lako lonse lidzakhala lowalitsidwa." 
Matthew6:23 Koma ngati diso lako lili loipa, thupi lako lonse lidzakhala lodetsedwa. Chifukwa chake ngati kuwala kumene kuli mwa inu kuli mdima, mdimawo ndi waukulu ndithu!" 
Matthew6:24 Palibe munthu angathe kukhala kapolo wa ambuye awiri: pakuti pena adzamuda mmodziyo, ndi kukonda winayo; pena adzakangamira kwa mmodzi, nadzanyoza wina. Simungathe kukhala kapolo wa Mulungu ndi wa Chuma." 
Matthew6:25 Chifukwa chake ndinena kwa inu, Musadere nkhawa moyo wanu, chimene mudzadya ndi chimene mudzamwa; kapena thupi lanu, chimene mudzavala. Kodi moyo suli woposa chakudya, ndi thupi loposa chovala?" 
Matthew6:26 Yang'anirani mbalame za kumwamba, kuti sizimafesa ai, kapena sizimatutira m'nkhokwe; ndipo Atate wanu wa Kumwamba azidyetsa. Nanga inu mulibe kusiyana nazo kuziposa kodi?" 
Matthew6:27 Ndipo ndani wa inu ndi kudera nkhawa angathe kuonjezera pa msinkhu wake mkono umodzi? 
Matthew6:28 Ndipo muderanji nkhawa ndi chovala? Tapenyetsani maluwa a kuthengo, makulidwe ao; sagwiritsa ntchito, kapena sapota:" 
Matthew6:29 koma ndinena kwa inu, kuti angakhale Solomoni mu ulemerero wake wonse sanavale monga limodzi la amenewa." 
Matthew6:30 Koma ngati Mulungu aveka chotero udzu wa kuthengo, ukhala lero, ndi mawa uponyedwa pamoto, nanga si inu kopambana ndithu, inu akukhulupirira pang'ono?" 
Matthew6:31 Chifukwa chake musadere nkhawa, ndi kuti, Tidzadya chiyani? Kapena, Tidzamwa chiyani? Kapena, Tidzavala chiyani?" 
Matthew6:32 Pakuti anthu akunja azifunitsa zonse zimenezo; pakuti Atate wanu wa Kumwamba adziwa kuti musowa zonse zimenezo. 
Matthew6:33 Koma muthange mwafuna Ufumu wake ndi chilungamo chake, ndipo zonse zimenezo zidzaonjezedwa kwa inu." 
Matthew6:34 Chifukwa chake musadere nkhawa za mawa; pakuti mawa adzadzidera nkhawa iwo okha. Zikwanire tsiku zovuta zake. 
Matthew7:1 Musaweruze, kuti mungaweruzidwe." 
Matthew7:2 Pakuti ndi kuweruza kumene muweruza nako, inunso mudzaweruzidwa; ndipo ndi muyeso umene muyesa nao, kudzayesedwa kwa inunso." 
Matthew7:3 Ndipo upenya bwanji kachitsotso kali m'diso la mbale wako, koma mtanda uli m'diso la iwe mwini suuganizira?" 
Matthew7:4 Kapena udzati bwanji kwa mbale wako, Tandilola ndichotse kachitsotso m'diso lako; ndipo ona, mtandawo ulimo m'diso lakoli." 
Matthew7:5 Wonyenga iwe! Tayamba kuchotsa m'diso lako mtandawo, ndipo pomwepo udzapenyetsa kuchotsa kachitsotso m'diso la mbale wako." 
Matthew7:6 Musamapatsa chopatulikacho kwa agalu, ndipo musamaponya ngale zanu patsogolo pa nkhumba, kuti zingazipondereze ndi mapazi ao, ndi potembenuka zingang'ambe inu." 
Matthew7:7 Pemphani, ndipo chidzapatsidwa kwa inu; funani, ndipo mudzapeza; gogodani, ndipo chidzatsegulidwa kwa inu;" 
Matthew7:8 pakuti yense wakupempha alandira; ndi wakufunayo apeza; ndi kwa wogogodayo chitsegulidwa. 
Matthew7:9 Kapena munthu ndani wa inu, amene pompempha mwana wake mkate, adzampatsa mwala?" 
Matthew7:10 Kapena pompempha nsomba, adzampatsa iye njoka kodi?" 
Matthew7:11 Chomwecho, ngati inu, muli oipa, mudziwa kupatsa ana anu mphatso zabwino, kopambana kotani nanga Atate wanu wa Kumwamba adzapatsa zinthu zabwino kwa iwo akumpempha Iye?" 
Matthew7:12 Chifukwa chake zinthu zilizonse mukafuna kuti anthu achitire inu, inunso muwachitire iwo zotero; pakuti icho ndicho chilamulo ndi aneneri." 
Matthew7:13 Lowani pa chipata chopapatiza; chifukwa chipata chili chachikulu, ndi njira yakumuka nayo kukuonongeka ili yotakata; ndipo ali ambiri amene alowa pa icho." 
Matthew7:14 Pakuti chipata chili chopapatiza, ndi ichepetsa njirayo yakumuka nayo kumoyo, ndimo akuchipeza chimenecho ali owerengeka." 
Matthew7:15 Yang'anirani mupewe aneneri onyenga, amene adza kwa inu ndi zovala zankhosa, koma m'kati mwao ali mimbulu yolusa." 
Matthew7:16 Mudzawazindikira ndi zipatso zao. Kodi atchera mphesa paminga, kapena nkhuyu pamtula?" 
Matthew7:17 Chomwecho mtengo wabwino uliwonse upatsa zipatso zokoma; koma mtengo wamphuchi upatsa zipatso zoipa. 
Matthew7:18 Sungathe mtengo wabwino kupatsa zipatso zoipa, kapena mtengo wamphuchi kupatsa zipatso zokoma." 
Matthew7:19 Mtengo uliwonse wosapatsa chipatso chokoma, audula, nautaya kumoto." 
Matthew7:20 Inde chomwecho pa zipatso zao mudzawazindikira iwo. 
Matthew7:21 Si yense wakunena kwa Ine, Ambuye, Ambuye, adzalowa mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba; koma wakuchitayo chifuniro cha Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew7:22 Ambiri adzati kwa Ine tsiku lomwelo, Ambuye, Ambuye, kodi sitinanenera mau m'dzina lanu, ndi m'dzina lanunso kutulutsa ziwanda, ndi kuchita m'dzina lanunso zamphamvu zambiri?" 
Matthew7:23 Ndipo pamenepo ndidzafukulira iwo, Sindinakudziwani inu nthawi zonse; chokani kwa Ine, inu akuchita kusaweruzika." 
Matthew7:24 Chifukwa chimenechi yense amene akamva mau anga amenewa, ndi kuwachita, ndidzamfanizira iye ndi munthu wochenjera, amene anamanga nyumba yake pathanthwe;" 
Matthew7:25 ndipo inagwa mvula, nidzala mitsinje, ndipo zinaomba mphepo, zinagunda pa nyumbayo; koma siinagwa; chifukwa inakhazikika pathanthwepo." 
Matthew7:26 Ndipo yense akamva mau anga amenewa, ndi kusawachita, adzafanizidwa ndi munthu wopusa, yemwe anamanga nyumba yake pamchenga;" 
Matthew7:27 ndipo inagwa mvula, nidzala mitsinje, ndipo zinaomba mphepo, zinagunda pa nyumbayo; ndipo inagwa; ndi kugwa kwake kunali kwakukulu." 
Matthew7:28 Ndipo panakhala pamene Yesu anatha mau amenewa, makamu a anthu anazizwa ndi chiphunzitso chake:" 
Matthew7:29 pakuti anawaphunzitsa monga mwini mphamvu, wosanga alembi ao." 
Matthew8:1 Ndipo pakutsika pake paphiripo, inamtsata mipingo yambiri ya anthu." 
Matthew8:2 Ndipo onani, wakhate anadza namgwadira Iye, nanena, Ambuye ngati mufuna mungathe kundikonza." 
Matthew8:3 Ndipo Yesu anatambalitsa dzanja lake, namkhudza iye, nati, Ndifuna; takonzedwa. Ndipo pomwepo khate lake linachoka." 
Matthew8:4 Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Ona, iwe, usauze munthu; koma muka, udzionetse wekha kwa wansembe, nupereke mtulo umene anaulamulira Mose, ukhale mboni kwa iwo." 
Matthew8:5 Ndipo m'mene Iye analowa m'Kapernao anadza kwa Iye kenturiyo, nampemba Iye," 
Matthew8:6 nati, Ambuye, mnyamata wanga ali gone m'nyumba wodwala manjenje, wozunzidwa koopsa." 
Matthew8:7 Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Ndifika Ine, ndidzamchiritsa iye." 
Matthew8:8 Koma kenturiyoyo anavomera nati, Ambuye, sindiyenera kuti mukalowe pansi pa chindwi langa iai; koma mungonena mau, ndipo adzachiritsidwa mnyamata wanga." 
Matthew8:9 Pakuti inenso ndili munthu wakumvera ulamuliro, ndili nao asilikali akundimvera ine: ndipo ndinena kwa uyu, Muka, namuka; ndi kwa wina, Idza, nadza; ndi kwa kapolo wanga, Chita ichi, nachita." 
Matthew8:10 Ndipo pakumva ichi, Yesu anazizwa, nati kwa iwo akumtsata, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, ngakhale mwa Israele, sindinapeza chikhulupiriro chotere." 
Matthew8:11 Ndipo ndinena ndi inu, kuti ambiri a kum'mawa ndi a kumadzulo adzafika, nadzakhala pamodzi ndi Abrahamu, ndi Isaki, ndi Yakobo, mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba;" 
Matthew8:12 koma anawo a Ufumu adzatayidwa kumdima wakunja; komweko kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano. 
Matthew8:13 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa kenturiyoyo, Pita, kukhale kwa iwe monga unakhulupirira. Ndipo anachiritsidwa mnyamatayo nthawi yomweyo." 
Matthew8:14 Ndipo pofika Yesu kunyumba ya Petro, anaona mpongozi wake ali gone, alikudwala malungo." 
Matthew8:15 Ndipo anamkhudza dzanja lake, ndipo malungo anamleka mkaziyo; ndipo anauka, namtumikira Iye." 
Matthew8:16 Ndipo pakudza madzulo, anabwera nao kwa Iye anthu ambiri ogwidwa ndi ziwanda; ndipo Iye anatulutsa mizimuyo ndi mau, nachiritsa akudwala onse;" 
Matthew8:17 kotero kuti chikwaniridwe chonenedwa ndi Yesaya mneneri, kuti, Iye yekha anatenga zofooka zathu, nanyamula nthenda zathu." 
Matthew8:18 Ndipo Yesu, poona makamu ambiri a anthu akumzungulira Iye, analamulira ophunzira amuke kutsidya lina." 
Matthew8:19 Ndipo anadza munthu mlembi, nati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, ndidzakutsatani Inu kulikonse mumukako." 
Matthew8:20 Ndipo Yesu ananena kwa iye, Ankhandwe ali nazo nkhwimba zao, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga zisa zao, koma Mwana wa Munthu alibe potsamira mutu wake." 
Matthew8:21 Ndipo wina wa ophunzira ake anati kwa Iye, Ambuye, mundilole ine nditange ndamuka kuika maliro a atate wanga." 
Matthew8:22 Koma Yesu ananena kwa iye, Tsata Ine, nuleke akufa aike akufa ao." 
Matthew8:23 Ndipo pamene Iye atalowa m'ngalawa, ophunzira ake anamtsata Iye." 
Matthew8:24 Ndipo onani, panauka namondwe wamkulu panyanja, kotero kuti ngalawa inafundidwa ndi mafunde: koma Iye anali m'tulo." 
Matthew8:25 Ndipo iwo anadza, namuutsa Iye, nanena, Ambuye, tipulumutseni, tilikutayika." 
Matthew8:26 Ndipo ananena Iye kwa iwo, Muli amantha bwanji, okhulupirira pang'ono inu? Pomwepo Iye anauka, nadzudzula mphepo ndi nyanja, ndipo panagwa bata lalikulu." 
Matthew8:27 Ndipo anazizwa anthuwo nanena, Ndiye munthu wotani uyu, pakuti ngakhale mphepo ndi nyanja zimvera Iye?" 
Matthew8:28 Ndipo pofika Iye kutsidya lina, kudziko la Agadara, anakomana naye awiri ogwidwa ndi ziwanda, akutuluka kumanda, aukali ndithu, kotero kuti sangathe kupitapo munthu pa njira imeneyo." 
Matthew8:29 Ndipo onani, anafuula nati, Tili nanu chiyani, Inu Mwana wa Mulungu? Mwadza kuno kodi kutizunza ife, nthawi yake siinafike?" 
Matthew8:30 Ndipo panali patali ndi iwo gulu la nkhumba zambiri zilinkudya. 
Matthew8:31 Ndipo mizimuyo inampempha Iye ninena, Ngati mutitulutsa, mutitumize ife tilowe m'gulu la nkhumbazo." 
Matthew8:32 Ndipo anati kwa iyo, Mukani. Ndipo inatuluka, nimuka, kukalowa m'nkhumbazo; ndipo onani, gulu lonse linathamangira kunsi kuphompho m'nyanjamo, ndipo linafa m'madzi." 
Matthew8:33 Koma akuziweta anathawa, namuka kumidzi, nauza zonse, ndi zakuti zao za aziwanda aja." 
Matthew8:34 Ndipo onani, mudzi wonse unatulukira kukakumana naye Yesu, ndipo m'mene anamuona Iye, anampempha kuti achoke m'malire ao." 
Matthew9:1 Ndipo Iye analowa m'ngalawa, naoloka, nadza kumudzi kwao." 
Matthew9:2 Ndipo onani, anabwera naye kwa Iye munthu wamanjenje, wakugona pamphasa: ndipo Yesu pakuona chikhulupiriro chao, anati kwa wodwalayo, Limba mtima, mwana, machimo ako akhululukidwa." 
Matthew9:3 Ndipo onani, ena a alembi ananena mumtima mwao, Uyu achitira Mulungu mwano." 
Matthew9:4 Ndipo Yesu, pozindikira maganizo ao, anati, Chifukwa chanji mulinkuganizira zoipa m'mitima yanu?" 
Matthew9:5 Pakuti chapafupi nchiti, kunena, Machimo ako akhululukidwa; kapena kunena, Tanyamuka. Nuyende?" 
Matthew9:6 Koma kuti mudziwe kuti ali nazo mphamvu Mwana wa Munthu pansi pano za kukhululukira machimo (pomwepo ananena kwa wodwalayo), Tanyamuka, nutenge mphasa yako, numuke kunyumba kwako." 
Matthew9:7 Ndipo ananyamuka, napita kunyumba kwake." 
Matthew9:8 Ndipo m'mene anthu a makamu anachiona, anaopa, nalemekeza Mulungu, wakupatsa anthu mphamvu yotere." 
Matthew9:9 Ndipo Yesu popita, kuchokera kumeneko, anaona munthu, dzina lake Mateyu, alinkukhala polandirira msonkho, nanena kwa iye, Nditsate Ine. Ndipo iye anauka, namtsata." 
Matthew9:10 Ndipo panali pamene Iye analinkukhala pachakudya m'nyumba, onani, amisonkho ndi ochimwa ambiri anadza nakhala pansi pamodzi ndi Yesu ndi ophunzira ake." 
Matthew9:11 Ndipo Afarisi, pakuona ichi, ananena kwa ophunzira ake, Chifukwa ninji Mphunzitsi wanu alinkudya pamodzi ndi amisonkho ndi ochimwa?" 
Matthew9:12 Ndipo m'mene Yesu anamva anati, Olimba safuna sing'anga ai, koma odwala." 
Matthew9:13 Koma mukani muphunzire nchiyani ichi, Ndifuna chifundo, si nsembe ai; pakuti sindinadza kudzaitana olungama, koma ochimwa." 
Matthew9:14 Pomwepo anadza kwa Iye ophunzira ake a Yohane, nati, Chifukwa ninji ife ndi Afarisi tisala kudya kawirikawiri, koma ophunzira anu sasala?" 
Matthew9:15 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Nanga anyamata a nyumba ya ukwati angathe kulira kodi nthawi imene mkwati akhala nao? Koma adzafika masiku, pamene mkwati adzachotsedwa kwa iwo, ndipo pomwepo adzasala kudya." 
Matthew9:16 Ndipo kulibe munthu aphathika chigamba cha nsalu yaiwisi pa chofunda chakale; pakuti chigamba chake chizomoka kuchofundacho, ndipo chichita chiboo chachikulu." 
Matthew9:17 Kapena samathira vinyo watsopano m'matumba akale; akatero, matumba aphulika, ndi vinyo atayika, ndi matumba aonongeka; koma athira vinyo watsopano m'matumba atsopano, ndi zonse ziwiri zisungika." 
Matthew9:18 M'mene Iye analikulankhula nao zinthu zimenezo, onani, anadza munthu mkulu, namgwadira Iye, nanena, Wamwalira tsopanoli mwana wanga wamkazi, komatu mudze muike dzanja lanu pa iye, ndipo adzakhala ndi moyo." 
Matthew9:19 Ndipo Yesu ananyamuka namtsata iye, ndi ophunzira ake omwe." 
Matthew9:20 Ndipo onani, mkazi, anali ndi nthenda yachidwalire zaka khumi ndi ziwiri, anadza pambuyo pake, nakhudza mphonje ya chofunda chake;" 
Matthew9:21 pakuti analikunena mwa iye yekha, Ngati ndingakhudze chofunda chake chokha ndidzachira." 
Matthew9:22 Koma Yesu potembenuka ndi kuona iye anati, Limba mtima, mwana wamkaziwe, chikhulupiriro chako chakuchiritsa. Ndipo mkaziyo anachira kuyambira nthawi yomweyo." 
Matthew9:23 Ndipo Yesu polowa m'nyumba yake ya mkuluyo, ndi poona oimba zitoliro ndi khamu la anthu obuma," 
Matthew9:24 ananena, Tulukani, pakuti kabuthuko sikanafa koma kali m'tulo. Ndipo anamseka Iye pwepwete." 
Matthew9:25 Koma pamene khamulo linatulutsidwa, Iye analowamo, nagwira dzanja lake; ndipo kabuthuko kadauka." 
Matthew9:26 Ndipo mbiri yake imene inabuka m'dziko lonse limenelo. 
Matthew9:27 Ndipo popita Yesu kuchokera kumeneko, anamtsata Iye anthu awiri akhungu, ofuula ndi kuti, Mutichitire ife chifundo, mwana wa Davide." 
Matthew9:28 Ndipo m'mene Iye analowa m'nyumbamo, akhunguwo anadza kwa Iye; ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Mukhulupirira kodi kuti ndikhoza kuchita ichi? Anena kwa Iye, Inde, Ambuye." 
Matthew9:29 Pomwepo anakhudza maso ao, nati, Chichitidwe kwa inu monga chikhulupiriro chanu." 
Matthew9:30 Ndipo maso ao anaphenyuka. Ndipo Yesu anawauzitsa iwo, nanena, Yang'anirani, asadziwe munthu aliyense." 
Matthew9:31 Koma iwo anatulukamo, nabukitsa mbiri yake m'dziko lonselo." 
Matthew9:32 Ndipo pamene iwo analikutuluka, onani, anabwera naye kwa Iye munthu wosalankhula, wogwidwa ndi chiwanda." 
Matthew9:33 Ndipo m'mene chinatulutsidwa chiwandacho, wosalankhulayo analankhula, ndipo makamu a anthu anazizwa, nanena, Kale lonse sichinaoneke chomwecho mwa Israele." 
Matthew9:34 Koma Afarisi analinkunena, Atulutsa ziwanda ndi mphamvu zake za mfumu ya ziwanda." 
Matthew9:35 Ndipo Yesu anayendayenda m'mizinda yonse ndi m'midzi, namaphunzitsa m'masunagoge mwao, nalalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa Ufumuwo, nachiritsa nthenda iliyonse ndi zofooka zonse." 
Matthew9:36 Koma Iye, poona makamuwo, anagwidwa m'mtima ndi chisoni chifukwa cha iwo, popeza anali okambululudwa ndi omwazikana, akunga nkhosa zopanda mbusa." 
Matthew9:37 Pomwepo ananena kwa ophunzira ake, Zotuta zichulukadi koma antchito ali owerengeka." 
Matthew9:38 Chifukwa chake pempherani Mwini zotuta kuti akokose antchito kukututa kwake. 
Matthew10:1 Ndipo pamene Iye anadziitanira ophunzira ake khumi ndi awiri, anapatsa iwo mphamvu pa mizimu yoipa, yakuitulutsa, ndi yakuchiza nthenda iliyonse ndi zofooka zonse." 
Matthew10:2 Ndipo maina ao a atumwiwo khumi ndi awiri ndi awa: woyamba Simoni wotchedwa Petro, ndi Andrea mbale wake; Yakobo mwana wa Zebedeo, ndi Yohane mbale wake;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipo, ndi Bartolomeo; Tomasi, ndi Mateyu wamsonkhoyo; Yakobo mwana wa Alifeyo, ndi Tadeyo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni Mkanani, ndi Yudasi Iskariote amenenso anampereka Iye." 
Matthew10:5 Awa amene, khumi ndi awiriwa, Yesu anawatumiza, nawalangiza ndi kuti, Musapite kunjira ya kwa anthu akunja, ndi m'mudzi wa Asamariya musamalowamo:" 
Matthew10:6 koma makamaka mupite kunkhosa zosokera za banja la Israele. 
Matthew10:7 Ndipo pamene mulikupita lalikani kuti, Ufumu wa Kumwamba wayandikira." 
Matthew10:8 Chiritsani akudwala, ukitsani akufa, konzani akhate, tulutsani ziwanda: munalandira kwaulere, patsani kwaulere." 
Matthew10:9 Musadzitengere ndalama zagolide, kapena zasiliva, kapena zakobiri m'malamba mwanu;" 
Matthew10:10 kapena thumba la kamba la kunjira, kapena malaya awiri, kapena nsapato, kapena ndodo; pakuti wantchito ayenera kulandira zakudya zake." 
Matthew10:11 Ndipo m'mzinda uliwonse, kapena m'mudzi. Mukalowamo, mufunsitse amene ali woyenera momwemo; ndipo bakhalani komweko kufikira mutulukamo." 
Matthew10:12 Ndipo polowa m'nyumba muwalonjere. 
Matthew10:13 Ndipo ngati nyumbayo ili yoyenera, mtendere wanu udze pa iyo, koma ngati siili yoyenera, mtendere wanu ubwerere kwa inu." 
Matthew10:14 Ndipo yemwe sadzakulandirani inu kapena kusamva mau anu, pamene mulikutuluka m'nyumbayo, kapena m'mudzimo, sansani fumbi m'mapazi anu." 
Matthew10:15 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti, tsiku la kuweruza, mlandu wao wa Sodomu ndi Gomora udzachepa ndi wake wa mudzi umenewo." 
Matthew10:16 Taonani, Ine ndikutumizani inu monga nkhosa pakati pa mimbulu; chifukwa chake khalani ochenjera monga njoka, ndi oona mtima monga nkhunda." 
Matthew10:17 Koma chenjerani ndi anthu; pakuti adzakuperekani inu kwa akulu a mlandu, nadzakukwapulani inu m'masunagoge mwao;" 
Matthew10:18 ndiponso adzamuka nanu kwa akazembe ndi mafumu chifukwa cha Ine, kukhala mboni ya kwa iwo, ndi kwa anthu akunja." 
Matthew10:19 Koma pamene paliponse angakuperekeni inu, musamadera nkhawa mudzalankhule bwanji kapena mudzanene chiyani; pakuti chimene mudzachilankhula, chidzapatsidwa kwa inu nthawi yomweyo;" 
Matthew10:20 pakuti wolankhula si ndinu, koma Mzimu wa Atate wanu akulankhula mwa inu." 
Matthew10:21 Ndipo mbale adzapereka mbale wake kuimfa, ndi atate mwana wake: ndipo ana adzatsutsa akuwabala, nadzawafetsa iwo." 
Matthew10:22 Ndipo adzada inu anthu onse chifukwa cha dzina langa; koma iye wakupirira kufikira chimaliziro, iyeyu adzapulumutsidwa." 
Matthew10:23 Koma pamene angakuzunzeni inu m'mudzi uwu, thawirani mwina: indetu ndinena kwa inu, Simudzaitha mizinda ya Israele, kufikira Mwana wa Munthu atadza." 
Matthew10:24 Wophunzira saposa mphunzitsi wake, kapena kapolo saposa mbuye wake." 
Matthew10:25 Kumkwanira wophunzira kuti akhale monga mphunzitsi wake, ndi kapolo monga mbuye. Ngati anamutcha mwini banja Belezebulu, sadzaposa kodi kuwatero apabanja ake?" 
Matthew10:26 Chifukwa chake musaopa iwo; pakuti palibe kanthu kanavundikiridwa, kamene sikadzaululidwa; kapena kanthu kobisika, kamene sikadzadziwika." 
Matthew10:27 Chimene ndikuuzani inu mumdima, tachinenani poyera; ndi chimene muchimva m'khutu, muchilalikire pa machindwi a nyumba." 
Matthew10:28 Ndipo musamaopa amene akupha thupi, koma moyo sangathe kuupha; koma makamaka muope Iye, wokhoza kuononga moyo ndi thupi lomwe m'Gehena." 
Matthew10:29 Kodi mpheta ziwiri sizigulidwa kakobiri? Ndipo imodzi ya izo siigwa pansi popanda Atate wanu: 
Matthew10:30 komatu inu, matsitsi onse a m'mutu mwanu awerengedwa." 
Matthew10:31 Chifukwa chake musamaopa; inu mupambana mpheta zambiri. 
Matthew10:32 Chifukwa chake yense amene adzavomereza Ine pamaso pa anthu, Inenso ndidzamvomereza iye pamaso pa Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew10:33 Koma yense amene adzandikana Ine pamaso pa anthu, Inenso ndidzamkana iye pamaso pa Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew10:34 Musalingalire kuti ndidadzera kuponya mtendere pa dziko lapansi; sindinadzera kuponya mtendere, koma lupanga." 
Matthew10:35 Pakuti ndinadza kusiyanitsa munthu ndi atate wake, ndi mwana wamkazi ndi amake, ndi mkazi wokwatiwa ndi mpongozi wake:" 
Matthew10:36 ndipo apabanja ake a munthu adzakhala adani ake. 
Matthew10:37 Iye wakukonda atate wake, kapena amake koposa Ine, sayenera Ine, ndipo iye wakukonda mwana wake wamwamuna, kapena wamkazi koposa Ine, sayenera Ine." 
Matthew10:38 Ndipo iye amene satenga mtanda wake, natsata pambuyo panga, sayenera Ine." 
Matthew10:39 Iye amene apeza moyo wake, adzautaya; ndi iye amene ataya moyo wake, chifukwa cha Ine, adzaupeza." 
Matthew10:40 Iye wakulandira inu, andilandira Ine, ndi wakundilandira Ine, amlandira Iye amene ananditumiza Ine." 
Matthew10:41 Iye wakulandira mneneri, pa dzina la mneneri, adzalandira mphotho ya mneneri; ndipo wakulandira munthu wolungama, pa dzina la munthu wolungama adzalandira mphotho ya munthu wolungama." 
Matthew10:42 Ndipo amene aliyense adzamwetsa mmodzi wa ang'ono awa chikho chokha cha madzi ozizira, pa dzina la wophunzira, indetu ndinena kwa inu, iye sadzataya mphotho yake." 
Matthew11:1 Ndipo panali, pamene Yesu anatha kuwafotokozera ophunzira ake khumi ndi awiri, Iye anachokera kumeneko kukaphunzitsa ndi kulalikira m'midzi mwao." 
Matthew11:2 Koma Yohane, pakumva m'nyumba yandende ntchito za Khristu, anatumiza ophunzira ake mau," 
Matthew11:3 nati kwa Iye, Inu ndinu wakudza kodi, kapena tiyembekezere wina?" 
Matthew11:4 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nanena nao, Mukani mubwezere mau kwa Yohane zimene muzimva ndi kuziona:" 
Matthew11:5 akhungu alandira kuona kwao, ndi opunduka miyendo ayenda, akhate akonzedwa, ndi ogontha akumva, ndi akufa aukitsidwa, ndi kwa aumphawi ulalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino." 
Matthew11:6 Ndipo wodala iye amene sakhumudwa chifukwa cha Ine. 
Matthew11:7 Ndipo m'mene iwo analikumuka, Yesu anayambonena ndi makamu a anthu za kwa Yohane, Munatuluka kunka kuchipululu kukapenya nji? Bango logwedezeka ndi mphepo kodi?" 
Matthew11:8 Koma munatuluka kukaona chiyani? Munthu wovala zofewa kodi? Onani, akuvala zofewa ali m'nyumba zamafumu." 
Matthew11:9 Koma munatulukiranji? Kukaona mneneri kodi? Indetu, ndinena kwa inu, wakuposa mneneri." 
Matthew11:10 Uyu ndiye amene kunalembedwa za iye, kuti, Onani Ine nditumiza mthenga wanga pa nkhope yanu, amene adzakonza njira yanu m'tsogolo mwanu." 
Matthew11:11 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Sanauke wakubadwa mwa mkazi munthu wamkulu woposa Yohane Mbatizi; koma iye amene ali wochepa mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba amkulira iye." 
Matthew11:12 Ndipo kuyambira masiku a Yohane Mbatizi, kufikira tsopano lino, Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wokakamizidwa, ndipo okakamirawo aukwatula ndi mphamvu." 
Matthew11:13 Pakuti aneneri onse ndi chilamulo chinanenera kufikira pa Yohane. 
Matthew11:14 Ndipo ngati mufuna kulandira, uyu ndiye Eliya amene amati akudza." 
Matthew11:15 Amene ali ndi makutu akumva, amve." 
Matthew11:16 Koma ndidzafanizira ndi chiyani obadwa awa a makono? Ali ofanana ndi ana akukhala m'mabwalo a malonda, amene alikuitana anzao." 
Matthew11:17 Ndi kuti, Tinakulizirani inu zitoliro, ndipo inu simunavina; tinabuma maliro, ndipo inu simunalira." 
Matthew11:18 Pakuti Yohane anadza wosadya, wosamwa, ndipo iwo amati, Ali ndi chiwanda." 
Matthew11:19 Mwana wa Munthu anadza wakudya, ndi wakumwa, ndipo iwo amati, Onani munthu wakudyaidya ndi wakumwaimwa vinyo, bwenzi la amisonkho ndi ochimwa! Ndipo nzeru iyesedwa yolungama ndi ntchito zake." 
Matthew11:20 Pomwepo Iye anayamba kutonza midziyo, m'mene zinachitidwa zambiri za ntchito zamphamvu zake, chifukwa kuti siinatembenuke." 
Matthew11:21 Tsoka kwa iwe, Korazini! Tsoka kwa iwe, Betsaida! Chifukwa ngati zamphamvu zimene zachitidwa mwa inu zikadachitidwa m'Tiro ndi m'Sidoni, akadatembenuka mtima kalekale m'ziguduli ndi m'phulusa." 
Matthew11:22 Komanso ndinena kwa inu kuti tsiku la kuweruza mlandu wao wa Tiro ndi Sidoni udzachepa ndi wanu. 
Matthew11:23 Ndipo iwe, Kapernao, udzakwezedwa kodi kufikira kuthambo? Udzatsika kufikira ku dziko la akufa! Chifukwa ngati zamphamvu zimene zachitidwa mwa iwe zikadachitidwa m'Sodomu, uyo ukadakhala kufikira lero." 
Matthew11:24 Komanso ndinena kwa inu kuti tsiku la kuweruza, mlandu wake wa Sodomu udzachepa ndi wako." 
Matthew11:25 Nyengo imeneyo Yesu anayankha nati, Ndivomerezana ndi Inu, Atate, Mwini Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, kuti munazibisira izo kwa anzeru ndi akudziwitsa, ndipo munaziululira zomwe kwa makanda:" 
Matthew11:26 etu, Atate, chifukwa chotero chinakhala chokondweretsa pamaso panu." 
Matthew11:27 Zinthu zonse zinaperekedwa kwa Ine ndi Atate wanga; ndipo palibe munthu adziwa Mwana yekha, ndi iye amene Mwana afuna kumuululira." 
Matthew11:28 Idzani kuno kwa Ine nonsenu akulema ndi kuthodwa, ndipo Ine ndidzakupumulitsani inu." 
Matthew11:29 Senzani goli langa, ndipo phunzirani kwa Ine; chifukwa ndili wofatsa ndi wodzichepetsa mtima: ndipo mudzapeza mpumulo wa miyoyo yanu." 
Matthew11:30 Pakuti goli langa lili lofewa, ndi katundu wanga ali wopepuka." 
Matthew12:1 Nyengo imeneyo Yesu anapita tsiku la Sabata pakati pa minda ya tirigu; ndipo ophunzira ake anali ndi njala, nayamba kubudula ngala, nadya." 
Matthew12:2 Koma Afarisi, pakuona, anati kwa Iye, Tapenyani, ophunzira anu achita chosaloleka tsiku la Sabata." 
Matthew12:3 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo, Kodi simunawerenga chimene anachichita Davide, pamene anali ndi njala, ndi iwo amene anali naye?" 
Matthew12:4 Kuti analowa m'nyumba ya Mulungu, nadya mikate yoonetsa, imene yosaloleka kudya iye kapena amene anali naye, koma ansembe okhaokha." 
Matthew12:5 Kapena simunawerenga kodi m'chilamulo, kuti tsiku la Sabata ansembe m'Kachisi amaipitsa tsiku la Sabata, nakhala opanda tchimo?" 
Matthew12:6 Koma ndinena kwa inu, kuti wakuposa Kachisiyo ali pompano." 
Matthew12:7 Koma mukadadziwa nchiyani ichi, Ndifuna chifundo, si nsembe ai; simukadaweruza olakwa iwo osachimwa," 
Matthew12:8 pakuti Mwana wa Munthu ali mwini tsiku la Sabata. 
Matthew12:9 Ndipo Iye anachokera pamenepo, nalowa m'sunagoge mwao;" 
Matthew12:10 ndipo onani, munali munthu wa dzanja lopuwala. Ndipo anamfunsitsa Iye, ndi kuti, Nkuloleka kodi kuchiritsa tsiku la Sabata? Kuti ampalamulitse mlandu." 
Matthew12:11 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo, Munthu ndani wa inu, amene ali nayo nkhosa imodzi, ndipo ngati idzagwa m'dzenje tsiku la Sabata, kodi sadzaigwira, ndi kuitulutsa?" 
Matthew12:12 Nanga kuposa kwake kwa munthu ndi nkhosa nkotani! Chifukwa cha ichi nkuloleka kuchita zabwino tsiku la Sabata. 
Matthew12:13 Pomwepo ananena Iye kwa munthuyo, Tansa dzanja lako. Ndipo iye analitansa, ndipo linabwezedwa lamoyo longa linzake." 
Matthew12:14 Ndipo Afarisi anatuluka, nakhala upo womchitira Iye mwa kumuononga." 
Matthew12:15 Koma Yesu m'mene anadziwa, anachokera kumeneko: ndipo anamtsata Iye anthu ambiri; ndipo Iye anawachiritsa iwo onse," 
Matthew12:16 nawalimbitsira mau kuti asamuwulule Iye; 
Matthew12:17 kuti chikachitidwe chonenedwa ndi Yesaya mneneri uja, kuti," 
Matthew12:18 Taona mnyamata wanga, amene ndinamsankha, wokondedwa wanga, amene moyo wanga ukondwera naye; pa Iye ndidzaika Mzimu wanga, ndipo Iye adzalalikira chiweruzo kwa akunja." 
Matthew12:19 Sadzalimbana, sadzafuula; ngakhale mmodzi sadzamva mau ake m'makwalala;" 
Matthew12:20 bango lophwanyika sadzalithyola, ndi nyali yofuka sadzaizima, kufikira Iye adzatumiza chiweruzo chikagonjetse." 
Matthew12:21 Ndipo akunja adzakhulupirira dzina lake. 
Matthew12:22 Pomwepo anabwera naye kwa Iye munthu wogwidwa ndi chiwanda, wakhungu ndi wosalankhula; ndipo Iye anamchiritsa, kotero kuti wosalankhulayo analankhula, napenya." 
Matthew12:23 Ndipo makamu onse a anthu anazizwa, nanena, Uyu si mwana wa Davide kodi?" 
Matthew12:24 Koma Afarisi pakumva, anati, Uyu samatulutsa ziwanda koma ndi mphamvu yake ya Belezebulu, mkulu wa ziwanda." 
Matthew12:25 Ndipo Yesu anadziwa maganizo ao, nati kwa iwo, Ufumu uliwonse wogawanika pa wokha sukhalira kupasuka, ndi mudzi uliwonse kapena banja logawanika pa lokha silidzakhala;" 
Matthew12:26 ndipo ngati Satana amatulutsa Satana, iye agawanika pa yekha; ndipo udzakhala bwanji ufumu wake?" 
Matthew12:27 Ndipo ngati Ine ndimatulutsa ziwanda ndi mphamvu yake ya Belezebulu, ana anu amazitulutsa ndi mphamvu ya yani? Chifukwa chake iwo adzakhala oweruza anu." 
Matthew12:28 Koma ngati Ine ndimatulutsa ziwanda ndi mphamvu yake ya Mzimu wa Mulungu, pomwepo Ufumu wa Mulungu unafika pa inu." 
Matthew12:29 Kapena akhoza bwanji munthu kulowa m'banja la munthu wolimba, ndi kufunkha akatundu ake, ngati iye sayamba kumanga munthu wolimbayo? Ndipo pamenepo adzafunkha za m'banja lake." 
Matthew12:30 Iye wosakhala pamodzi ndi Ine akana Ine, ndi iye wosasonkhanitsa pamodzi ndi Ine amwazamwaza." 
Matthew12:31 Chifukwa chake ndinena kwa inu, Machimo onse, ndi zonena zonse zamwano, zidzakhululukidwa kwa anthu; koma chamwano cha pa Mzimu Woyera sichidzakhululukidwa." 
Matthew12:32 Ndipo amene aliyense anganenere Mwana wa Munthu zoipa, adzakhululukidwa; koma amene aliyense anganenere Mzimu Woyera zoipa sadzakhululukidwa nthawi yino kapena ilinkudzayo." 
Matthew12:33 Ukakoma mtengo, chipatso chake chomwe chikoma; ukaipa mtengo, chipatso chake mtengo udziwika." 
Matthew12:34 Akubadwa inu a njoka, mungathe bwanji kulankhula zabwino, inu akukhala oipa? Pakuti m'kamwa mungolankhula mwa kusefuka kwake kwa mtima." 
Matthew12:35 Munthu wabwino atulutsa zabwino m'chuma chake chabwino, ndi munthu woipa atulutsa zoipa m'chuma chake choipa." 
Matthew12:36 Ndipo ndinena kwa inu, kuti mau onse opanda pake, amene anthu adzalankhula, adzawawerengera mlandu wake tsiku la kuweruza." 
Matthew12:37 Pakuti udzayesedwa wolungama ndi mau ako, ndipo ndi mau ako omwe udzatsutsidwa." 
Matthew12:38 Pomwepo alembi ndi Afarisi ena anayankha Iye nati, Mphunzitsi, tifuna kuona chizindikiro cha Inu." 
Matthew12:39 Koma Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Akubadwa oipa achigololo afunafuna chizindikiro; ndipo sichidzapatsidwa kwa iwo chizindikiro, komatu chizindikiro cha Yona mneneri;" 
Matthew12:40 pakuti monga Yona anali m'mimba mwa chinsomba masiku atatu ndi usiku wake, chomwecho Mwana wa Munthu adzakhala mumtima mwa dziko lapansi masiku atatu ndi usiku wake." 
Matthew12:41 Anthu a ku Ninive adzauka pamlandu pamodzi ndi obadwa amakono, nadzawatsutsa; chifukwa iwo anatembenuka mtima ndi kulalikira kwake kwa Yona; ndipo onani, wakuposa Yona ali pano." 
Matthew12:42 Mfumu yaikazi ya kumwera adzauka pamlandu pamodzi ndi obadwa amakono, nadzawatsutsa; chifukwa iye anachokera kumathero a dziko lapansi kudzamva nzeru ya Solomoni; ndipo onani, wakuposa Solomoni ali pano." 
Matthew12:43 Koma mzimu wonyansa, utatuluka mwa munthu, umapitirira malo opanda madzi kufunafuna mpumulo, osaupeza." 
Matthew12:44 Pomwepo unena, Ndidzabwerera kunka kunyumba kwanga, konkuja ndinatulukako; ndipo pakufikako uipeza yopanda wokhalamo, yosesedwa ndi yokonzedwa." 
Matthew12:45 Pomwepo upita, nutenga pamodzi ndi uwu mizimu ina inzake isanu ndi iwiri yoipa yoposa mwini yekhayo, ndipo ilowa, nikhalamo. Ndipo matsirizidwe ake a munthu uyo akhala oipa oposa mayambidwe ake. Kotero kudzakhalanso kwa obadwa oipa amakono." 
Matthew12:46 Pamene Iye anali chilankhulire ndi makamu, onani, amake ndi abale ake anaima panja, nafuna kulankhula naye." 
Matthew12:47 Ndipo munthu anati kwa Iye, Onani, amai wanu ndi abale anu aima pabwalo, nafuna kulankhula nanu." 
Matthew12:48 Koma Iye anayankha, nati kwa iye wonenayo, Amai wanga ndani, ndipo abale anga ndi ayani?" 
Matthew12:49 Ndipo anatambalitsa dzanja lake pa ophunzira ake, nati, Penyani amai wanga ndi abale anga!" 
Matthew12:50 Pakuti aliyense amene adzachita chifuniro cha Atate wanga wa Kumwamba, yemweyo ndiye mbale wanga, ndi mlongo wanga, ndi amai wanga." 
Matthew13:1 Tsiku lomwelo Yesu anatuluka m'nyumbamo, nakhala pansi m'mbali mwa nyanja." 
Matthew13:2 Ndipo makamu ambiri a anthu anasonkhanira kwa Iye, kotero kuti Iye analowa m'ngalawa, nakhala pansi, ndipo khamu lonse linaima pamtunda." 
Matthew13:3 Ndipo Iye anawauzira zinthu zambiri m'mafanizo, nanena, Onani, wofesa anatuluka kukafesa mbeu." 
Matthew13:4 Ndipo m'kufesa kwake zina zinagwa m'mbali mwa njira, ndipo zinadza mbalame, nizilusira izo." 
Matthew13:5 Koma zina zinagwa pamiyala, pamene panalibe dothi lambiri; ndipo pomwepo zinamera, pakuti sizinakhala nalo dothi lakuya. Ndipo m'mene dzuwa linakwera zinapserera;" 
Matthew13:6 ndipo popeza zinalibe mizu zinafota. 
Matthew13:7 Koma zina zinagwa paminga, ndipo mingayo inayanga, nizitsamwitsa izo." 
Matthew13:8 Koma zina zinagwa pa nthaka yabwino, ndipo zinabala zipatso, zina za makumi khumi, zina za makumi asanu ndi limodzi, zina za makumi atatu." 
Matthew13:9 Amene ali ndi makutu, amve." 
Matthew13:10 Ndipo ophunzirawo anadza, nati kwa Iye, Chifukwa chanji muphiphiritsira iwo m'mafanizo?" 
Matthew13:11 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati, Chifukwa kwapatsidwa kwa inu kudziwa zinsinsi za Ufumu wa Kumwamba, koma sikunapatsidwa kwa iwo." 
Matthew13:12 Pakuti yense amene ali nazo, kudzapatsidwa kwa iye, ndimo adzakhala nazo zochuluka; koma yense amene alibe, chingakhale chomwe ali nacho chidzachotsedwa kwa iye." 
Matthew13:13 Chifukwa chake ndiphiphiritsira iwo m'mafanizo; chifukwa kuti akuona samaona, ndi akumva samamva, kapena samadziwitsa." 
Matthew13:14 Ndipo adzachitidwa kwa iwo mau adanenera Yesaya, amene ati, Pakumva mudzamva, ndipo simudzazindikira konse; pakupenya mudzapenya, ndipo simudzaona konse." 
Matthew13:15 Chifukwa unalemera mtima wa anthu awa, ndipo m'makutu ao anamva mogontha, ndipo maso ao anatsinzina; kuti asaone konse ndi maso, asamve ndi makutu, asazindikire ndi mtima wao, asatembenuke, ndipo ndisawachiritse iwo." 
Matthew13:16 Koma maso anu ali odala, chifukwa apenya; ndi makutu anu chifukwa amva." 
Matthew13:17 Pakuti indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti aneneri ambiri ndi anthu olungama analakalaka kupenya zimene muzona, koma sanazione; ndi kumva zimene muzimva, koma sanazimve." 
Matthew13:18 Ndipo tsono mverani inu fanizolo la wofesa mbeu uja. 
Matthew13:19 Munthu aliyense wakumva mau a Ufumu, osawadziwitsai, woipayo angodza, nakwatula chofesedwacho mumtima mwake. Uyo ndiye wofesedwa m'mbali mwa njira." 
Matthew13:20 Koma iye amene afesedwa pamiyala, uyu ndiye wakumva mau, ndi kuwalandira pomwepo ndi kusekera;" 
Matthew13:21 ndipo alibe mizu mwa iye, koma akhala nthawi yaing'ono; ndipo pakudza nsautso kapena zunzo chifukwa cha mau, iye akhumudwa pomwepo." 
Matthew13:22 Ndipo iye amene afesedwa kuminga, uyu ndiye wakumva mau; ndipo kulabadira kwa dziko lapansi, ndi chinyengo cha chuma chitsamwitsa mau, ndipo akhala wopanda chipatso." 
Matthew13:23 Ndipo iye amene afesedwa pa nthaka yabwino, uyu ndiye wakumva mau nawadziwitsa; amene abaladi zipatso, nazifitsa, ena za makumi khumi, ena za makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ena za makumi atatu." 
Matthew13:24 Fanizo lina Iye anawafotokozera iwo, nanena, Ufumu wa Kumwamba ufanizidwa ndi munthu, amene anafesa mbeu zabwino m'munda mwake;" 
Matthew13:25 koma m'mene anthu analinkugona, mdani wake anadza, nafesa namsongole pakati pa tirigu, nachokapo." 
Matthew13:26 Koma pamene mmera unakula, nubala chipatso, pomwepo anaonekeranso namsongole." 
Matthew13:27 Ndipo anyamata ake a mwini nyumbayo anadza, nati kwa iye, Mbuye, kodi simunafesa mbeu zabwino m'munda mwanu? Nanga wachokera kuti namsongoleyo?" 
Matthew13:28 Ndipo iye ananena kwa iwo, Munthu mdani wanga wachichita ichi. Ndipo anyamata anati kwa iye, Kodi mufuna tsopano kuti timuke, tikamsonkhanitse uyo pamodzi?" 
Matthew13:29 Koma iye anati, Iai, kuti kapena m'mene mukasonkhanitsa namsongoleyo, mungazulenso tirigu pamodzi naye." 
Matthew13:30 Kazilekeni zonse ziwiri, zikulire pamodzi kufikira pakututa; ndimo m'nyengo yakututa ndidzauza akututawo, Muyambe kusonkhanitsa namsongole, mummange uyu mitolo kukamtentha, koma musonkhanitse tirigu m'nkhokwe yanga." 
Matthew13:31 Fanizo lina Iye anawafotokozera iwo, nanena, Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanafana ndi kambeu kampiru, kamene anakatenga munthu, nakafesa pamunda pake;" 
Matthew13:32 kamene kakhaladi kakang'ono koposa mbeu zonse, koma katakula, kali kakakulu kuposa zitsamba zonse, nukhala mtengo, kotero kuti mbalame za mlengalenga zimadza, nizibindikira mu nthambi zake." 
Matthew13:33 Fanizo lina ananena kwa iwo; Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanafana ndi chotupitsa mikate, chimene mkazi anachitenga, nachibisa m'miyeso itatu ya ufa, kufikira wonse unatupa." 
Matthew13:34 Zonsezi Yesu anaziphiphiritsira m'mafanizo kwa makamu a anthu; ndipo kopanda fanizo sanalankhule kanthu kwa iwo; 
Matthew13:35 kuti chikachitidwe chonenedwa ndi mneneri, kuti, Ndidzatsegula pakamwa panga ndi mafanizo; ndidzawulula zinthu zobisika chiyambire kukhazikidwa kwake kwa dziko lapansi." 
Matthew13:36 Pomwepo Iye anasiya makamuwo, nalowa m'nyumba; ndimo ophunzira ake anadza kwa Iye, nanena, Mutitanthauzire fanizo lija la namsongole wa m'munda." 
Matthew13:37 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati, Wofesa mbeu yabwino ndiye Mwana wa Munthu;" 
Matthew13:38 Ndipo munda ndiwo dziko lapansi; ndi mbeu yabwino ndiyo ana a Ufumuwo; ndi namsongole ndiye ana a woipayo; 
Matthew13:39 ndipo mdani amene anamfesa uwu, ndiye mdierekezi: ndi kututa ndicho chimaliziro cha nthawi ya pansi pano; ndi otutawo ndiwo angelo." 
Matthew13:40 Ndipo monga namsongole asonkhanitsidwa pamodzi, natenthedwa pamoto, motero mudzakhala m'chimaliziro cha nthawi ya pansi pano." 
Matthew13:41 Mwana wa Munthu adzatuma angelo ake, ndipo iwo adzasonkhanitsa pamodzi, ndi kuchotsa mu Ufumu wake zokhumudwitsa zonse, ndi anthu akuchita kusaweruzika," 
Matthew13:42 ndipo adzawataya iwo m'ng'anjo yamoto; kumeneko kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano. 
Matthew13:43 Pomwepo olungamawo adzawalitsa monga dzuwa, mu Ufumu wa Atate wao. Amene ali ndi makutu amve." 
Matthew13:44 Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanana ndi chuma chobisika m'munda; chimene munthu anachipeza, nachibisa; ndipo m'kuchikonda kwake achoka, nagulitsa zonse ali nazo, nagula munda umenewu." 
Matthew13:45 Ndiponso Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanana ndi munthu wa malonda, wakufuna ngale zabwino:" 
Matthew13:46 ndipo m'mene anaipeza ngale imodzi ya mtengo wapatali, anapita, nagulitsa zonse anali nazo, naigula imeneyo." 
Matthew13:47 Ndiponso, Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanana ndi khoka loponyedwa m'nyanja, ndi kusonkhanitsa pamodzi za mitundu yonse;" 
Matthew13:48 limene podzala, analivuulira pamtunda; ndipo m'mene anakhala pansi, anazisonkhanitsa zabwino m'zotengera, koma zoipa anazitaya kuthengo." 
Matthew13:49 Padzatero pa chimaliziro cha nthawi ya pansi pano: angelo adzatuluka, nadzawasankhula oipa pakati pa abwino," 
Matthew13:50 nadzawataya m'ng'anjo yamoto; komweko kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano. 
Matthew13:51 Mwamvetsa zonsezi kodi? Iwo anati kwa Iye, Inde." 
Matthew13:52 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Chifukwa chake, mlembi aliyense, wophunzitsidwa mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba, ali wofanana ndi munthu mwini banja, amene atulutsa m'chuma chake zinthu zakale ndi zatsopano." 
Matthew13:53 Ndipo panali, pamene Yesu anatha mafanizo awa, anachokera kumeneko." 
Matthew13:54 Ndipo pofika kudziko la kwao, anaphunzitsa iwo m'sunagoge mwao, kotero kuti anazizwa, nanena, Uyu adazitenga kuti nzeru zimenezi ndi zamphamvu izi?" 
Matthew13:55 Kodi uyu si mwana wa mmisiri wa mitengo? Kodi dzina lake la amake si Maria? Ndi abale ake si Yakobo ndi Yosefe ndi Simoni ndi Yuda? 
Matthew13:56 Ndipo alongo ake sali ndife onsewa? Ndipo Iyeyo adazitenga zinthu zonsezi kuti? 
Matthew13:57 Ndipo iwo anakhumudwa chifukwa cha Iye. Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Mneneri sakhala wopanda ulemu koma kudziko la kwao ndiko, ndi kubanja kwake." 
Matthew13:58 Ndipo Iye, chifukwa cha kusakhulupirira kwao, sanachite kumeneko zamphamvu zambiri." 
Matthew14:1 Nthawi imeneyo Herode mfumu anamva mbiri ya Yesu," 
Matthew14:2 nanena kwa anyamata ake, Uyo ndiye Yohane Mbatizi; anauka kwa akufa; ndipo chifukwa cha ichi zamphamvuzi zilimbalimba mwa iye." 
Matthew14:3 Pakuti Herode adamgwira Yohane, nammanga, namuika m'nyumba yandende chifukwa cha Herodiasi, mkazi wa mbale wake Filipo." 
Matthew14:4 Pakuti Yohane ananena kwa iye, Sikuloledwa kwa iwe kukhala naye." 
Matthew14:5 Ndipo pofuna kumupha iye, anaopa khamu la anthu, popeza anamuyesa iye mneneri." 
Matthew14:6 Koma pakufika tsiku la kubadwa kwake kwa Herode, mwana wamkazi wa Herodiasi anavina pakati pao, namkondweretsa Herode." 
Matthew14:7 Pomwepo iye anamlonjeza chilumbirire, kumpatsa iye chimene chilichonse akapempha." 
Matthew14:8 Ndipo iye, atampangira amake, anati, Ndipatseni ine kuno m'mbale mutu wa Yohane Mbatizi." 
Matthew14:9 Ndipo mfumuyo anagwidwa ndi chisoni; koma chifukwa cha malumbiro ake, ndi cha iwo anali naye pachakudya, analamulira upatsidwe;" 
Matthew14:10 ndipo anatumiza mnyamata, namdula mutu Yohane m'nyumba yandende." 
Matthew14:11 Ndipo anautenga mutu wake m'mbalemo, naupatsa buthulo: ndipo iye anamuka nao kwa amake." 
Matthew14:12 Ndipo ophunzira ake anadza, natola mtembo, nauika; ndipo anadza nauza Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Ndipo Yesu pakumva, anachokera kumeneko m'ngalawa, kunka kumalo achipululu pa yekha; ndipo makamu, pamene anamva, anamtsata Iye mumtunda kuchokera m'midzi." 
Matthew14:14 Ndipo Iye anatuluka, naona khamu lalikulu la anthu, nachitira iwo chifundo, nachiritsa akudwala ao." 
Matthew14:15 Ndipo pamene panali madzulo, ophunzira ake anafika kwa Iye, nanena, Malo ano nga chipululu, ndipo nthawi yapita tsopano; kauzeni makamuwo amuke, apite kumidzi kukadzigulira okha kamba." 
Matthew14:16 Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Iwo alibe chifukwa cha kumukira, apatseni ndinu adye." 
Matthew14:17 Koma iwo ananena kwa Iye, Ife tilibe kanthu pano koma mikate isanu, ndi nsomba ziwiri." 
Matthew14:18 Ndipo Iye anati, Mudze nazo kuno kwa Ine." 
Matthew14:19 Ndipo Iye analamulira makamu a anthu akhale pansi paudzu; ndipo Iye anatenga mikate isanuyo ndi nsomba ziwirizo, ndipo m'mene anayang'ana kumwamba, anadalitsa, nanyema, napatsa mikateyo kwa ophunzira, ndi ophunzira kwa makamuwo." 
Matthew14:20 Ndipo anadya onse, nakhuta; ndipo anatola makombo otsala, nadzala madengu khumi ndi iwiri." 
Matthew14:21 Ndipo anadyawo anali amuna monga zikwi zisanu, kuwaleka akazi ndi ana." 
Matthew14:22 Ndipo pomwepo Iye anafulumiza ophunzira alowe m'ngalawa, ndi kumtsogolera Iye kutsidya lija, kufikira Iye atauza makamu amuke." 
Matthew14:23 Ndipo pamene Iye anawauza makamuwo, anakwera m'phiri pa yekha, kukapemphera: ndipo pamene panali madzulo, Iye anakhala kumeneko yekha." 
Matthew14:24 Koma pomwepo ngalawa idafika pakati pa nyanja, yozunzika ndi mafunde; pakuti mphepo inadza mokomana nao." 
Matthew14:25 Ndipo pa ulonda wachinai wa usiku, Iye anadza kwa iwo, nayenda pamwamba pa nyanja." 
Matthew14:26 Koma m'mene ophunzirawo anamuona Iye, alikuyenda pamadzi, ananthunthumira, nati, Ndi mzukwa! Ndipo anafuula ndi mantha." 
Matthew14:27 Koma pomwepo Yesu analankhula nao, nati, Limbani mtima; ndine; musaope." 
Matthew14:28 Ndipo Petro anamyankha Iye nati, Ambuye, ngati ndinutu, mundiuze ndidze kwa Inu pamadzi." 
Matthew14:29 Ndipo Iye anati, Idza. Ndipo Petro anatsika m'ngalawa, nayenda pamadzi, kufika kwa Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Koma m'mene iye anaiona mphepo, anaopa; ndipo poyamba kumira, anafuula, nati, Ambuye, ndipulumutseni ine!" 
Matthew14:31 Ndipo pomwepo Yesu anatansa dzanja lake, namgwira iye, nanena naye, Iwe wokhulupirira pang'ono, wakayikiranji mtima?" 
Matthew14:32 Ndipo pamene iwo analowa m'ngalawamo, mphepo inaleka." 
Matthew14:33 Ndipo iwo amene anali m'ngalawamo anamgwadira, nanena, Zoonadi, ndinu Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Matthew14:34 Ndipo pamene iwo anaoloka, anafika kumtunda, ku Genesarete." 
Matthew14:35 Ndipo m'mene amuna a pamenepo anamzindikira, anatumiza konse kudziko lonse lozungulira, nadza nao kwa Iye onse akukhala ndi nthenda;" 
Matthew14:36 ndipo anampempha Iye, kuti akhudze yokha mphonje ya chovala chake; ndipo onse amene anamkhudza anachiritsidwa." 
Matthew15:1 Pomwepo anadza kwa Yesu Afarisi ndi alembi, ochokera ku Yerusalemu, nati," 
Matthew15:2 Ophunzira anu alumphiranji miyambo ya makolo? Pakuti sasamba manja pakudya. 
Matthew15:3 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Inunso mulumphiranji lamulo la Mulungu chifukwa cha miyambo yanu?" 
Matthew15:4 Pakuti Mulungu anati, Lemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako; ndipo, Wakunenera atate wake ndi amake zoipa, afe ndithu." 
Matthew15:5 Koma inu munena, Amene aliyense anena kwa atate wake kapena kwa amake, Icho ukanathandizidwa nacho, nchoperekedwa kwa Mulungu;" 
Matthew15:6 iyeyo sadzalemekeza atate wake. Ndipo inu mupeputsa mau a Mulungu chifukwa cha miyambo yanu. 
Matthew15:7 Onyenga inu! Yesaya ananenera bwino za inu, ndi kuti," 
Matthew15:8 Anthu awa andilemekeza Ine ndi milomo yao; koma mtima wao uli kutali ndi Ine. 
Matthew15:9 Koma andilambira Ine kwachabe, ndi kuphunzitsa maphunzitso, malangizo a anthu." 
Matthew15:10 Ndipo Iye anaitana makamuwo nati kwa iwo, Imvani, nimudziwitse;" 
Matthew15:11 si chimene chilowa m'kamwa mwake chiipitsa munthu; koma chimene chituluka m'kamwa mwake, ndicho chiipitsa munthu." 
Matthew15:12 Pomwepo anadza ophunzira, nanena kwa Iye, Mudziwa kodi kuti Afarisi anakhumudwa pakumva chonenacho?" 
Matthew15:13 Koma Iye anayankha nati, Mmera wonse, umene Atate wanga wa Kumwamba sanaubzale, udzazulidwa." 
Matthew15:14 Kawalekeni iwo, ali atsogoleri akhungu. Ndipo ngati wakhungu amtsogolera wakhungu, onse awiri adzagwa m'mbuna." 
Matthew15:15 Ndipo Petro anayankha nati kwa Iye, Mutifotokozere ife fanizoli." 
Matthew15:16 Ndipo Iye anati, Kodi inunso mukhala chipulukirire?" 
Matthew15:17 Simudziwa kodi kuti zonse zakulowa m'kamwa zipita m'mimba, ndipo zitayidwa kuthengo?" 
Matthew15:18 Koma zakutuluka m'kamwa zichokera mumtima; ndizo ziipitsa munthu. 
Matthew15:19 Pakuti mumtima muchokera maganizo oipa, zakupha, zachigololo, zachiwerewere, zakuba, za umboni wonama, zamwano;" 
Matthew15:20 izi ndizo ziipitsa munthu, koma kudya osasamba manja sikuipitsa munthu ai." 
Matthew15:21 Ndipo Yesu anatulukapo napatukira kumbali za Tiro ndi Sidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Ndipo onani, mkazi wa ku Kanani anatuluka m'malire, nafuula, nati, Mundichitire ine chifundo Ambuye, mwana wa Davide; mwana wanga wamkazi wagwidwa koopsa ndi chiwanda." 
Matthew15:23 Koma Iye sanamyankhe mau amodzi. Ndipo ophunzira ake anadza, nampempha, nati, Mumuuze amuke; pakuti afuula pambuyo pathu." 
Matthew15:24 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati, Sindinatumidwa kwa ena koma kwa nkhosa zotayika za banja la Israele." 
Matthew15:25 Koma iye anadza, namgwadira Iye, nanena, Ambuye, ndithangateni ine." 
Matthew15:26 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati, Sichabwino kutenga mkate wa ana, ndi kuuponyera tiagalu." 
Matthew15:27 Koma iye anati, Etu, Ambuye, pakutinso tiagalu timadya nyenyeswa zakugwa pagome pa ambuye ao." 
Matthew15:28 Pomwepo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iye, Mkaziwe, chikhulupiriro chako ndi chachikulu; chikhale kwa iwe monga momwe wafunira. Ndipo mwana wake anachira nthawi yomweyo." 
Matthew15:29 Ndipo Yesu anachoka kumeneko, nadza kunyanja ya Galileya, nakwera m'phiri, nakhala pansi pamenepo." 
Matthew15:30 Ndipo makamu ambiri a anthu anadza kwa Iye, ali nao opunduka miyendo, akhungu, osalankhula, opunduka ziwalo, ndi ena ambiri, nawakhazika pansi pa mapazi ake: ndipo Iye anawachiritsa;" 
Matthew15:31 kotero kuti khamulo linazizwa, pakupenya osalankhula nalankhula, opunduka ziwalo nachira, ndi opunduka miyendo nayenda, ndi akhungu napenya, ndipo iwo analemekeza Mulungu wa Israele." 
Matthew15:32 Ndipo Yesu anaitana ophunzira ake, nati, Mtima wanga uchitira chifundo khamu la anthuwa, pakuti ali chikhalire ndi Ine masiku atatu, ndipo alibe kanthu kakudya, ndipo sindifuna kuwauza iwo amuke osadya, kuti angaziye panjira." 
Matthew15:33 Ndipo ophunzira ananena kwa Iye, Tiione kuti mikate yotere m'chipululu yakukhutitsa unyinji wotere wa anthu?" 
Matthew15:34 Ndipo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Muli nayo mikate ingati? Ndipo iwo anati, Isanu ndi iwiri, ndi tinsomba pang'ono." 
Matthew15:35 Ndipo Iye analamulira anthuwo akhale pansi onse; 
Matthew15:36 natenga mikateyo isanu ndi iwiri ndi nsombazo; nayamika Mulungu, nanyema, napatsa kwa ophunzira, ndi ophunzira kwa anthu." 
Matthew15:37 Ndipo onsewa anadya, nakhuta: ndipo anatola makombo otsala madengu asanu ndi awiri odzala." 
Matthew15:38 Ndipo anadyawo anali amuna zikwi zinai kuwaleka akazi ndi ana. 
Matthew15:39 Ndipo m'mene Iye anauza makamuwo amuke, analowa m'ngalawa, nafika m'malire a Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Ndipo Afarisi ndi Asaduki anadza, namuyesa, namfunsa Iye awaonetse chizindikiro cha Kumwamba." 
Matthew16:2 Koma Iye anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Madzulo munena, Kudzakhala ngwee; popeza thambo lili lacheza." 
Matthew16:3 Ndipo m'mawa, Lero nkwa mphepo: popeza thambo lili la cheza chodera. Mudziwa kuzindikira za pa nkhope ya thambo; koma zizindikiro za nyengo yino, simungathe kuzindikira." 
Matthew16:4 Obadwa oipa ndi achigololo afunafuna chizindikiro; ndipo sadzalandira chizindikiro china, koma chizindikiro cha Yona. Ndipo Iye anawasiya, nachokapo." 
Matthew16:5 Ndipo ophunzira anadza kutsidya linalo, naiwala kutenga mikate." 
Matthew16:6 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Yang'anirani mupewe chotupitsa mkate cha Afarisi ndi Asaduki." 
Matthew16:7 Ndipo iwo anafunsana wina ndi mnzake, nati, Sitinatenga mikate." 
Matthew16:8 Koma Yesu, m'mene anadziwa, anati, Ha, inu okhulupirira pang'ono, mufunsana chifukwa ninji wina ndi mnzake, kuti simunatenga mikate?" 
Matthew16:9 Kodi chikhalire simudziwa, ndipo simukumbukira mikate isanu ija ya anthu aja zikwi zisanu, ndi madengu angati munawatola?" 
Matthew16:10 Penanso mikate isanu ndi iwiri ija ya anthu zikwi zinai, ndi madengu angati munawatola?" 
Matthew16:11 Bwanji nanga simudziwa kuti sindinanena kwa inu za mikate? Koma pewani chotupitsa cha Afarisi ndi Asaduki. 
Matthew16:12 Pomwepo anadziwitsa kuti sanawauze kupeza chotupitsa cha mikate, koma chiphunzitso cha Afarisi ndi Asaduki." 
Matthew16:13 Ndipo Yesu, pamene anadza ku dziko la ku Kesareya-Filipi, anafunsa ophunzira ake, kuti, Anthu anena kuti Mwana wa Munthu ndiye yani?" 
Matthew16:14 Ndipo iwo anati, Ena ati, Yohane Mbatizi; koma ena, Eliya; ndipo enanso Yeremiya, kapena mmodzi wa aneneri." 
Matthew16:15 Iye ananena kwa iwo, Koma inu mutani kuti Ine ndine yani?" 
Matthew16:16 Ndipo Simoni Petro anayankha nati, Inu ndinu Khristu, Mwana wa Mulungu wamoyo." 
Matthew16:17 Ndipo Yesu anayankha iye, nati, Ndiwe wodala, Simoni Bara-Yona: pakuti thupi ndi mwazi sizinakuululira ichi, koma Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew16:18 Ndiponso Ine ndinena kwa iwe, kuti iwe ndiwe Petro, ndipo pa thanthwe ili ndidzakhazika Mpingo wanga; ndipo makomo a dziko la akufa sadzagonjetsa uwo." 
Matthew16:19 Ndidzakupatsa mafungulo a Ufumu wa Kumwamba; ndipo chimene ukamanga pa dziko lapansi chidzakhala chomangidwa Kumwamba: ndipo chimene ukachimasula pa dziko lapansi, chidzakhala chomasulidwa Kumwamba." 
Matthew16:20 Pamenepo analamulira ophunzira kuti asauze munthu kuti Iye ndiye Khristu. 
Matthew16:21 Kuyambira pamenepo Yesu anayamba kuwalangiza ophunzira ake, kuti kuyenera Iye amuke ku Yerusalemu, kukazunzidwa zambiri ndi akulu, ndi ansembe aakulu, ndi alembi; ndi kukaphedwa, ndi tsiku lachitatu kuuka kwa akufa." 
Matthew16:22 Ndipo Petro anamtenga Iye, nayamba kumdzudzula, kuti, Dzichitireni chifundo, Ambuye; sichidzatero kwa Inu ai." 
Matthew16:23 Koma Iye anapotoloka, nati kwa Petro, Pita kumbuyo kwanga, Satana iwe; ndiwe chondikhumudwitsa Ine; chifukwa sumasamalira za Mulungu, koma za anthu." 
Matthew16:24 Pomwepo Yesu anati kwa ophunzira ake, Ngati munthu afuna kudza pambuyo panga, adzikane yekha, natenge mtanda wake, nanditsate Ine." 
Matthew16:25 Pakuti iye amene afuna kupulumutsa moyo wake adzautaya: koma iye amene ataya moyo wake chifukwa cha Ine, adzaupeza." 
Matthew16:26 Pakuti munthu adzapindulanji, akalandira dziko lonse, nataya moyo wake? Kapena munthu adzaperekanji chosintha ndi moyo wake?" 
Matthew16:27 Pakuti Mwana wa Munthu adzabwera mu ulemerero wa Atate wake, pamodzi ndi angelo ake; ndipo pomwepo Iye adzabwezera kwa anthu onse monga machitidwe ao." 
Matthew16:28 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti alipo ena a iwo aima pano sadzalawa ndithu imfa, kufikira adzaona Mwana wa Munthu atadza mu ufumu wake." 
Matthew17:1 Ndipo atapita masiku asanu ndi limodzi, Yesu anatenga Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane mbale wake, napita nao pa okha pa phiri lalitali;" 
Matthew17:2 ndipo Iye anasandulika pamaso pao; ndipo nkhope yake inawala monga dzuwa, ndi zovala zake zinakhala zoyera mbu monga kuwala." 
Matthew17:3 Ndipo onani, Mose ndi Eliya anaonekera kwa iwo, alinkulankhula ndi Iye." 
Matthew17:4 Ndipo Petro anayankha, nati kwa Yesu, Ambuye, kuli bwino kuti ife tikhale pano; ngati mulola ndidzamanga pano misasa itatu; umodzi wa Inu, ndi wina wa Mose, ndi wina wa Eliya." 
Matthew17:5 Akali chilankhulire, onani, mtambo wowala unawaphimba iwo: ndipo onani, mau ali kunena mumtambo, Uyu ndiye Mwana wanga wokondedwa, mwa iyeyu ndikondwera, mverani Iye." 
Matthew17:6 Ndipo pamene ophunzira anamva, anagwa nkhope zao pansi, naopa kwakukulu." 
Matthew17:7 Ndipo Yesu anadza, nawakhudza nati, Ukani, musaopa." 
Matthew17:8 Ndipo iwo, pokweza maso ao sanaone munthu, koma Yesu yekha." 
Matthew17:9 Ndipo pamene anali kutsika paphiri, Yesu anawalamula iwo kuti, Musakauze munthu choonekacho, kufikira Mwana wa Munthu adadzauka kwa akufa." 
Matthew17:10 Ndipo ophunzira ake anamfunsa, nanena, Ndipo bwanji alembi amanena kuti Eliya ndiye atsogole kudza?" 
Matthew17:11 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati, Eliya akudzatu, nadzabwezera zinthu zonse;" 
Matthew17:12 koma ndinena kwa inu, kuti Eliya anadza kale, ndipo iwo sanamdziwe iye, koma anamchitira zonse zimene anazifuna iwo. Ndipo chonchonso Mwana wa Munthu adzazunzidwa ndi iwo." 
Matthew17:13 Pomwepo ophunzira anazindikira kuti analankhula nao za Yohane Mbatizi. 
Matthew17:14 Ndipo pamene iwo anadza kukhamu la anthu, kunafika kwa Iye munthu, namgwadira Iye, nati," 
Matthew17:15 Ambuye, chitirani mwana wanga chifundo; chifukwa adwala nkhunyu, kuzunzika koipa: pakuti amagwa kawirikawiri pamoto, ndi kawirikawiri m'madzi." 
Matthew17:16 Ndipo ndinadza naye kwa ophunzira anu, koma iwo sanathe kumchiritsa." 
Matthew17:17 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati, Ha, obadwa osakhulupirira ndi amphulupulu, ndidzakhala ndi inu nthawi yanji? Ndidzalekerera inu nthawi yanji? Mudze naye kwa Ine kuno." 
Matthew17:18 Ndipo Yesu anamdzudzula; ndipo chiwanda chinatuluka mwa iye; ndipo mnyamatayo anachira kuyambira nthawi yomweyo. 
Matthew17:19 Pamenepo ophunzira anadza kwa Yesu, ali pa yekha, nati, Nanga ife sitinakhoza bwanji kuchitulutsa?" 
Matthew17:20 Ndipo Iye ananena kwa iwo, Chifukwa chikhulupiriro chanu nchaching'ono: pakuti indetu ndinena kwa inu, Mukakhala nacho chikhulupiriro monga kambeu kampiru, mudzati ndi phiri ili, Senderapo umuke kuja; ndipo lidzasendera; ndipo palibe kanthu kadzakukanikani." 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Ndipo m'mene anali kutsotsa m'Galileya, Yesu ananena nao, Mwana wa Munthu adzaperekedwa m'manja a anthu;" 
Matthew17:23 ndipo adzamupha Iye, ndipo Iye adzauka tsiku lachitatu. Ndipo iwo anali ndi chisoni chachikulu." 
Matthew17:24 Ndipo pofika ku Kapernao amene aja akulandira ndalama za ku Kachisi anadza kwa Petro nati, Kodi Mphunzitsi wanu sapereka rupiyalo?" 
Matthew17:25 Iye anavomera, Apereka. Ndipo polowa iye m'nyumba, Yesu anatsogola kunena naye, nati, Simoni, uganiza bwanji? Mafumu a dziko lapansi alandira msonkho kwa yani? Kwa ana ao kodi, kapena kwa akunja?" 
Matthew17:26 Ndipo m'mene iye anati, Kwa akunja, Yesu ananena kwa iye, Chifukwa chake anawo ali aufulu." 
Matthew17:27 Koma kuti ife tisawakhumudwitse, pita iwe kunyanja, ukaponye mbedza, nuitole nsomba yoyamba kuwedza; ndipo ukaikanula pakamwa pake udzapezamo rupiya; tatenga limeneli, nuwapatse ilo pamtu pa iwe ndi Ine." 
Matthew18:1 Nthawi yomweyo ophunzira anadza kwa Yesu, nanena, Ndani kodi ali wopambana mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba?" 
Matthew18:2 Ndipo pamene Yesu anaitana kamwana, anakaimitsa pakati pao," 
Matthew18:3 nati, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Ngati simutembenuka, nimukhala monga tianato, simudzalowa konse mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew18:4 Chifukwa chake yense amene adzichepetsa yekha monga kamwana aka, yemweyo ali wopambana mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew18:5 Ndipo amene adzalandira kamwana kamodzi kotereka chifukwa cha dzina langa, alandira Ine;" 
Matthew18:6 koma yense amene adzakhumudwitsa kamodzi ka tiana iti, takukhulupirira Ine, kumuyenera iye kuti mphero yaikulu ikolowekedwe m'khosi mwake, namizidwe poya pa nyanja." 
Matthew18:7 Tsoka lili ndi dziko lapansi chifukwa cha zokhumudwitsa! Pakuti sikutheka kuti zokhumudwitsa zileke kudza, koma tsoka lili ndi munthu amene chokhumudwitsacho chidza ndi iye." 
Matthew18:8 Ndipo ngati dzanja lako, kapena phazi lako likukhumudwitsa iwe, ulidule, nulitaye; nkwabwino, kuti ulowe m'moyo wopunduka dzanja kapena phazi, koposa kuponyedwa m'moto wa nthawi zonse, uli ndi manja awiri kapena mapazi awiri." 
Matthew18:9 Ndipo ngati diso lako likukhumudwitsa, ulikolowole, nulitaye: nkwabwino kuti ulowe m'moyo ndi diso limodzi koposa kuponyedwa m'Gehena wamoto, uli ndi maso awiri." 
Matthew18:10 Yang'anirani kuti musanyoze mmodzi wa ang'ono awa; pakuti ndinena kwa inu, kuti angelo ao apenya chipenyere nkhope ya Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 Nanga muyesa bwanji? Ngati munthu ali nazo nkhosa makumi khumi, ndipo ikasokera imodzi ya izo, kodi saleka zija makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu zisanu ndi zinai, napita kumapiri, kukafuna yosokerayo?" 
Matthew18:13 Ndimo akaipeza, indedi ndinena kwa inu, akondwera nayo koposa ndi makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu zisanu ndi zinai zosasokera." 
Matthew18:14 Chomwecho sichili chifuniro cha Atate wanu wa Kumwamba kuti mmodzi wa ang'ono awa atayike. 
Matthew18:15 Ndipo ngati mbale wako akuchimwira iwe, pita, numlangize pa nokha iwe ndi iye; ngati akumvera iwe, wambweza mbale wako." 
Matthew18:16 Koma ngati samvera, onjeza kutenga ndi iwe wina mmodzi kapena awiri, kuti atsimikizidwe mau onse pakamwa pa mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu." 
Matthew18:17 Ndipo ngati iye samvera iwo, uuze Mpingo; ndipo ngati iye samveranso Mpingowo, akhale kwa iwe monga wakunja ndi wamsonkho." 
Matthew18:18 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Zilizonse mukazimanga pa dziko lapansi zidzakhala zomangidwa Kumwamba: ndipo zilizonse mukazimasula pa dziko lapansi, zidzakhala zomasulidwa Kumwamba." 
Matthew18:19 Ndiponso ndinena kwa inu kuti ngati awiri a inu avomerezana pansi pano chinthu chilichonse akachipempha, Atate wanga wa Kumwamba adzawachitira." 
Matthew18:20 Pakuti kumene kuli awiri kapena atatu asonkhanira m'dzina langa, ndili komweko pakati pao." 
Matthew18:21 Pamenepo Petro anadza, nati kwa Iye, Ambuye, mbale wanga adzandilakwira kangati, ndipo ine ndidzamkhululukira iye? Kufikira kasanu ndi kawiri kodi?" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu ananena kwa iye, Sindinena kwa iwe kufikira kasanu ndi kawiri, koma kufikira makumi asanu ndi awiri kubwerezedwa kasanu ndi kawiri." 
Matthew18:23 Chifukwa chake Ufumu wa Kumwamba ufanizidwa ndi munthu, mfumu, amene anafuna kuwerengera nao akapolo ake." 
Matthew18:24 Ndipo pamene anayamba kuwerengera, anadza kwa iye ndi wina wamangawa wa ndalama za matalente zikwi khumi." 
Matthew18:25 Koma popeza iye anasowa kanthu kombwezera, mbuye wake analamulira kuti iye agulitsidwe, ndi mkazi wake ndi ana ake omwe, ndi zonse ali nazo, kuti akabwezedwe mangawawo." 
Matthew18:26 Chifukwa chake kapoloyo anagwada pansi, nampembedzera, nati, Mbuye, bakandiyembekezani ine, ndipo zonse ndidzazibwezera kwa inu." 
Matthew18:27 Ndipo mbuye wa kapoloyo anagwidwa ndi chisoni mumtima, nammasula iye, namkhululukira ngongole." 
Matthew18:28 Koma kapolo uyu, potuluka anapeza wina wa akapolo anzake yemwe anamkongola iye marupiya atheka makumi khumi, namgwira, namkanyanga pakhosi, nati, Bwezera chija unachikongola." 
Matthew18:29 Pamenepo kapolo mnzakeyu anagwada pansi, nampempha iye, nati, Bakandiyembekeza ine, ndipo ndidzakubwezera." 
Matthew18:30 Ndipo iye sanafune; koma anamuka, namponya iye m'nyumba yandende, kufikira abwezere ngongole." 
Matthew18:31 Chifukwa chake m'mene akapolo anzake anaona zochitidwazo, anagwidwa chisoni chachikulu, nadza, nalongosolera mbuye wao zonse zimene zinachitidwa." 
Matthew18:32 Pomwepo mbuye wake anamuitana iye, nanena naye, Kapolo iwe woipa, ndinakukhululukira iwe mangawa onse aja momwe muja unandipempha ine;" 
Matthew18:33 kodi iwenso sukadamchitira kapolo mnzako chisoni, monga inenso ndinakuchitira iwe chisoni?" 
Matthew18:34 Ndipo mbuye wake anakwiya, nampereka kwa azunzi, kufikira akambwezere iye mangawa onse."
