Matthew18:35 Chomwechonso Atate wanga a Kumwamba adzachitira inu, ngati inu simukhululukira yense mbale wake ndi mitima yanu." 
Matthew19:1 Ndipo panali pamene Yesu anatha mau amenewa, anachokera ku Galileya, nadza ku malire a Yudeya, a ku tsidya lija la Yordani." 
Matthew19:2 Ndipo makamu akulu a anthu anamtsata; ndipo Iye anawachiritsa kumeneko. 
Matthew19:3 Ndipo Afarisi anadza kwa Iye, namuyesa, nanena, Kodi nkuloledwa kuti munthu achotse mkazi wake pa chifukwa chilichonse?" 
Matthew19:4 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati, Kodi simunawerenga kuti Iye amene adalenga anthu pachiyambi, anawalenga iwo mwamuna ndi mkazi," 
Matthew19:5 nati, Chifukwa cha ichi mwamuna adzasiya atate wake ndi amake, nadzaphatikizana ndi mkazi wake, ndipo awiriwo adzakhala thupi limodzi?" 
Matthew19:6 Chotero kuti salinso awiri koma thupi limodzi. Chifukwa chake ichi chimene Mulungu anachimanga pamodzi, munthu asachilekanitse." 
Matthew19:7 Iwo ananena kwa Iye, Nanga chifukwa ninji Mose analamula kupatsa kalata wa chilekaniro, ndi kumchotsa?" 
Matthew19:8 Iye ananena kwa iwo, Chifukwa cha kuuma mtima kwanu, Mose anakulolezani kuchotsa akazi anu; koma pachiyambi sikunakhala chomwecho." 
Matthew19:9 Ndipo Ine ndinena kwa inu, Amene aliyense akachotsa mkazi wake, kosakhala chifukwa cha chigololo, nadzakwatira wina, achita chigololo: ndipo iye amene akwatira wochotsedwayo, achita chigololo." 
Matthew19:10 Ophunzira ananena kwa Iye, Ngati mlandu wa munthu ndi mkazi wake uli wotere, sikuli kwabwino kukwatira." 
Matthew19:11 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo, Onse sangathe kulandira chonena ichi, koma kwa iwo omwe chapatsidwa." 
Matthew19:12 Pakuti pali osabala, amene anabadwa otero m'mimba ya amao: ndipo pali osabala anawafula anthu; ndipo pali osabala amene anadzifula okha, chifukwa cha Ufumu wa Kumwamba. Amene angathe kulandira ichi achilandire." 
Matthew19:13 Pamenepo anadza nato tiana kwa Iye, kuti Iye aike manja ake pa ito, ndi kupemphera: koma ophunzirawo anawadzudzula." 
Matthew19:14 Koma Yesu anati, Tilekeni tiana, musatikanize kudza kwa Ine: chifukwa Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wa totere." 
Matthew19:15 Ndipo Iye anaika manja ake pa ito, nachokapo." 
Matthew19:16 Ndipo onani, munthu anadza kwa Iye, nati, Mphunzitsi, chabwino nchiti ndichichite, kuti ndikhale nao moyo wosatha?" 
Matthew19:17 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iye, Undifunsiranji za chinthu chabwino? Alipo Mmodzi ndiye wabwino: koma ngati ufuna kulowa m'moyo, sunga malamulo." 
Matthew19:18 Iye ananena kwa Iye, Otani? Ndipo Yesu anati, Usaphe, Usachite chigololo, Usabe, Usachite umboni wonama," 
Matthew19:19 Lemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako, ndipo, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda iwe mwini." 
Matthew19:20 Mnyamatayo ananena kwa Iye, Zonsezi ndinazisunga, ndisowanso chiyani?" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu ananena naye, Ngati ufuna kukhala wangwiro, pita, kagulitse zomwe uli nazo, nupatse aumphawi, ndipo udzakhala ndi chuma Kumwamba; ndipo ukadze kuno, unditsate." 
Matthew19:22 Koma mnyamatayo m'mene anamva chonenacho, anamuka wachisoni; pakuti anali nacho chuma chambiri." 
Matthew19:23 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa ophunzira ake, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti munthu mwini chuma adzalowa movutika mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew19:24 Ndiponso ndinena kwa inu, Nkwapafupi kuti ngamira ipyole diso la singano, koposa mwini chuma kulowa Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew19:25 Ndipo ophunzira, pamene anamva, anazizwa kwambiri, nanena, Ngati nkutero angapulumuke ndani?" 
Matthew19:26 Ndipo Yesu anawayang'ana, nati kwa iwo, Ichi sichitheka ndi anthu, koma zinthu zonse zitheka ndi Mulungu." 
Matthew19:27 Pomwepo Petro anayankha, nati kwa Iye, onani, ife tinasiya zonse ndi kutsata Inu; nanga tsono tidzakhala ndi chiyani?" 
Matthew19:28 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti inu amene munanditsata Ine, m'kubadwanso, pamene Mwana wa Munthu adzakhala pa chimpando cha ulemerero wake, inunso, mudzakhala pa mipando khumi ndi iwiri, kuweruza mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israele." 
Matthew19:29 Ndipo onse amene adasiya nyumba, kapena abale, kapena alongo, kapena atate, kapena amai, kapena ana, kapena minda, chifukwa cha dzina langa, adzalandira zobwezeredwa zambirimbiri, nadzalowa moyo wosatha." 
Matthew19:30 Koma ambiri oyamba adzakhala akuthungo, ndi akuthungo adzakhala oyamba." 
Matthew20:1 Pakuti Ufumu wa Kumwamba ufanana ndi munthu mwini banja, amene anatuluka mamawa kukalembera antchito a m'munda wake wampesa." 
Matthew20:2 Ndipo pamene adapangana ndi antchito, pa rupiya latheka limodzi tsiku limodzi, anawatumiza kumunda wake." 
Matthew20:3 Ndipo anatuluka dzuwa litakwera, naona ena ataima chabe pabwalo;" 
Matthew20:4 ndipo kwa iwo anati, Pitani inunso kumunda, ndipo ndidzakupatsani chimene chili choyenera. Ndipo iwo anapita." 
Matthew20:5 Ndiponso anatuluka usana, ndimonso popendeka dzuwa, nachita chimodzimodzi." 
Matthew20:6 Ndipo poyandikira madzulo anatuluka, napeza ena ataima; nanena kwa iwo, Mwaimiranji kuno dzuwa lonse chabe?" 
Matthew20:7 Iwo ananena kwa iye, Chifukwa palibe munthu anatilemba. Iye anati kwa iwo, Pitani inunso kumundawo wampesa." 
Matthew20:8 Ndipo pamadzulo, mwini munda anati kwa kapitao wake, Kaitane antchito, nuwapatse iwo kulipira kwao, uyambe kwa omalizira kufikira kwa oyamba." 
Matthew20:9 Ndipo pamene iwo olembedwa poyandikira madzulo anadza, analandira munthu aliyense rupiya latheka limodzi." 
Matthew20:10 Ndipo m'mene oyamba anadza, analingalira kuti adzalandira kopambana, ndipo iwonso analandira onse rupiya latheka." 
Matthew20:11 Koma m'mene iwo analilandira, anaderera kwa mwini banja," 
Matthew20:12 nati, Omalizira awa anagwira ntchito mphindi yaing'ono, ndipo munawalinganiza ndi ife amene tinapirira kuwawa kwa dzuwa ndi kutentha kwake." 
Matthew20:13 Koma iye anayankha, nati kwa mmodzi wa iwo, Mnzanga, sindikunyenga iwe; kodi iwe sunapangana ndi ine pa rupiya latheka limodzi?" 
Matthew20:14 Tenga lako, numuke; pakuti ine ndifuna kupatsa kwa uyu womalizira monga kwa iwe." 
Matthew20:15 Sikuloleka kwa ine kodi kuchita chimene ndifuna ndi zanga? Kapena diso lako laipa kodi chifukwa ine ndili wabwino? 
Matthew20:16 Chomwecho omalizira adzakhala oyamba, ndipo oyamba adzakhala omalizira." 
Matthew20:17 Ndipo pamene Yesu analikukwera ku Yerusalemu, anatenga ophunzira khumi ndi awiri napita nao pa okha, ndipo panjira anati kwa iwo," 
Matthew20:18 Onani, tikwera ku Yerusalemu; ndipo Mwana wa Munthu adzaperekedwa kwa ansembe aakulu ndi alembi, ndipo iwo adzamweruza kuti ayenera imfa," 
Matthew20:19 nadzampereka kwa anthu akunja kuti amnyoze ndi kumkwapula, ndi kumpachika; ndipo Iye adzaukitsidwa tsiku lachitatu." 
Matthew20:20 Pomwepo anadza kwa Iye amake a ana a Zebedeo ndi ana ake omwe, namgwadira, ndi kumpempha kanthu." 
Matthew20:21 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iye, Ufuna chiyani? Iye ananena, Lamulirani kuti ana anga awiri amenewa adzakhale, wina ku dzanja lanu lamanja, ndi wina kulamanzere, mu ufumu wanu." 
Matthew20:22 Koma Yesu anayankha nati, Inu simudziwa chimene mupempha. Kodi mukhoza kumwera chikho nditi ndidzamwere Ine? Iwo ananena kwa Iye, Ife tikhoza." 
Matthew20:23 Iye ananena kwa iwo, Chikho changa mudzamweradi; koma kukhala kudzanja lamanja kwanga ndi kulamanzere, sikuli kwanga kupatsa, koma kuli kwa iwo omwe kwakonzedweratu ndi Atate wanga." 
Matthew20:24 Ndipo m'mene khumiwo anamva, anapsa mtima ndi abale awiriwo." 
Matthew20:25 Koma Yesu anawaitana, nati, Mudziwa kuti mafumu a anthu amadziyesa okha ambuye ao, ndipo akulu ao amachita ufumu pa iwo." 
Matthew20:26 Sikudzakhala chomwecho kwa inu ai; koma amene aliyense akafuna kukhala wamkulu mwa inu, adzakhala mtumiki wanu;" 
Matthew20:27 ndipo amene aliyense akafuna kukhala woyamba mwa inu, adzakhala kapolo wanu:" 
Matthew20:28 monga Mwana wa Munthu sanadze kutumikiridwa koma kutumikira, ndi kupereka moyo wake dipo la anthu ambiri." 
Matthew20:29 Ndipo pamene iwo analikutuluka m'Yeriko, khamu lalikulu la anthu linamtsata Iye." 
Matthew20:30 Ndipo onani, anthu akhungu awiri anakhala m'mphepete mwa njira; m'mene iwo anamva kuti Yesu analikupitirirapo, anafuula nati, Mutichitire ife chifundo, Inu Mwana wa Davide." 
Matthew20:31 Ndipo khamulo linawaletsa, kuti atonthole: koma anakuwitsa, nanena, Ambuye, mutichitire chifundo, Inu Mwana wa Davide." 
Matthew20:32 Ndipo Yesu anaima, nawaitana, nati, Mufuna kuti ndikuchitireni chiyani?" 
Matthew20:33 Ananena kwa Iye, Ambuye, kuti maso athu apenye." 
Matthew20:34 Ndipo Yesu anagwidwa ndi chifundo, nakhudza maso ao; ndipo pomwepo anapenyanso, namtsata Iye." 
Matthew21:1 Ndipo pamene iwo anayandikira ku Yerusalemu, nafika ku Betefage, kuphiri la Azitona, pamenepo Yesu anatumiza ophunzira awiri," 
Matthew21:2 nanena kwa iwo, Mukani kumudzi wopenyana ndi inu, ndipo pomwepo mudzapeza bulu womangidwa, ndi mwana wake pamodzi naye, masulani iwo, mudze nao kwa Ine." 
Matthew21:3 Ndipo munthu akanena kanthu ndi inu, mudzati, Ambuye asowa iwo, ndipo pomwepo adzawatumiza." 
Matthew21:4 Ndipo ichi chinatero, kuti chikachitidwe chonenedwa ndi mneneri kuti," 
Matthew21:5 Tauzani mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, Taona, mfumu yako idza kwa iwe, wofatsa ndi wokwera pa bulu, ndi pa kabulu, mwana wa nyama yonyamula katundu." 
Matthew21:6 Ndipo ophunzirawo anamuka, nachita monga Yesu anawauza;" 
Matthew21:7 nabwera ndi bulu ndi mwana wake, naika pa iwo zovala zao, nakhala Iye pamenepo." 
Matthew21:8 Ndipo ambirimbiri a mpingowo anayala zovala zao panjira; ndipo ena anadula nthambi za mitengo, naziyala m'njiramo." 
Matthew21:9 Ndipo mipingo yakumtsogolera ndi yakumtsatira, inafuula, kuti, Hosana kwa Mwana wa Davide! Wolemekezeka ndiye wakudza m'dzina la Ambuye! Hosana m'Kumwambamwamba!" 
Matthew21:10 Ndipo m'mene adalowa m'Yerusalemu mudzi wonse unasokonezeka, nanena, Ndani uyu?" 
Matthew21:11 Ndipo makamu a anthu anati, Uyu ndi mneneri Yesu wa ku Nazarete wa ku Galileya." 
Matthew21:12 Ndipo Yesu analowa ku Kachisi wa Mulungu natulutsira kunja onse akugulitsa ndi kugula malonda, nagubuduza magome a osintha ndalama, ndi mipando ya ogulitsa nkhunda;" 
Matthew21:13 nanena kwa iwo, Chalembedwa, Nyumba yanga idzanenedwa nyumba yakupemphera; koma inu mwaiyesa phanga la achifwamba." 
Matthew21:14 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye ku Kachisiko akhungu ndi opunduka miyendo, nachiritsidwa." 
Matthew21:15 Koma ansembe aakulu ndi alembi, m'mene anaona zozizwitsa zomwe Iye anazichita, ndi ana alinkufuula ku Kachisiko kuti, Hosana kwa Mwana wa Davide, anapsa mtima," 
Matthew21:16 nanena kwa Iye, Mulinkumva kodi chimene alikunena awa? Ndipo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Inde: simunawerenga kodi, M'kamwa mwa makanda ndi oyamwa munafotokozera zolemekeza?" 
Matthew21:17 Ndipo Iye anawasiya, natuluka m'mzinda, napita ku Betaniya, nagona kumeneko." 
Matthew21:18 Ndipo mamawa, m'mene Iye analinkunkanso kumzinda, anamva njala." 
Matthew21:19 Ndipo pakuona mkuyu umodzi panjira, anafika pamenepo, napeza palibe kanthu koma masamba okhaokha; nati Iye kwa uwo, Sudzabalanso chipatso kunthawi zonse. Ndipo pomwepo mkuyuwo unafota." 
Matthew21:20 Ndipo ophunzira poona ichi anazizwa, nati, Mkuyuwo unafota bwanji msanga?" 
Matthew21:21 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Indedi ndinena kwa inu, Ngati mukhala nacho chikhulupiriro, osakayikakayika, mudzachita si ichi cha pa mkuyu chokha, koma ngati mudzati ngakhale kuphiri ili, Tanyamulidwa, nuponyedwe m'nyanja, chidzachitidwa." 
Matthew21:22 Ndipo zinthu zilizonse mukazifunsa m'kupemphera ndi kukhulupirira, mudzazilandira." 
Matthew21:23 Ndipo m'mene Iye analowa m'Kachisi, ansembe aakulu ndi akulu a anthu anadza kwa Iye analikuphunzitsa, nanena, Muchita izi ndi ulamuliro wotani? Ndipo ndani anakupatsani ulamuliro wotere?" 
Matthew21:24 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Inenso ndikufunsani mau amodzi, amene ngati mundiuza, Inenso ndikuuzani ndi ulamuliro wotani ndizichita izi:" 
Matthew21:25 Ubatizo wa Yohane, uchokera kuti? Kumwamba kodi kapena kwa anthu? Koma iwo anafunsana wina ndi mnzake, kuti, Tikati, Kumwamba, Iye adzati kwa ife, Munalekeranji kumvera iye?" 
Matthew21:26 Koma tikati, Kwa anthu, tiopa khamulo la anthu; pakuti onse amuyesa Yohane mneneri." 
Matthew21:27 Ndipo anamyankha Yesu, nati, Sitidziwa ife. Iyenso ananena nao, Inenso sindikuuzani ndi ulamuliro wotani ndizichita izi." 
Matthew21:28 Nanga mutani? Munthu anali nao ana awiri; nadza iye kwa woyamba nati, Mwanawe, kagwire lero ntchito kumunda wampesa." 
Matthew21:29 Koma iye anakana, nati, Sindifuna ine; koma pambuyo pake analapa mtima napita." 
Matthew21:30 Ndipo anadza kwa winayo, natero momwemo. Ndipo iye anavomera, nati, Ndipita mbuye; koma sanapite." 
Matthew21:31 Ndani wa awiriwo anachita chifuniro cha atate wake? Iwo ananena, Woyambayo. Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti amisonkho ndi akazi achiwerewere amatsogolera inu, kulowa mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew21:32 Popeza Yohane anadza kwa inu m'njira ya chilungamo, ndipo simunamvera iye; koma amisonkho ndi akazi achiwerewere anammvera iye; ndipo inu, m'mene munachiona, simunalapa pambuyo pake, kuti mumvere iye." 
Matthew21:33 Mverani fanizo lina: Panali munthu, mwini banja, amene analima munda wamphesa, nauzunguniza linga, nakumba umo moponderamo mphesa, namanga nsanja, naukongoletsa kwa olima munda, namuka kwina." 
Matthew21:34 Ndipo pamene nyengo ya zipatso inayandikira, anatumiza akapolo ake kwa olima mundawo, kukalandira zipatso zake." 
Matthew21:35 Ndipo olimawo anatenga akapolo ake, nampanda mmodzi, wina namupha, wina namponya miyala." 
Matthew21:36 Anatumizanso akapolo ena, akuchuluka oposa akuyambawa; ndipo anawachitira iwo momwemo." 
Matthew21:37 Koma pambuyo pake anatumiza kwa iwo mwana wake, nati, Adzachitira mwana wanga ulemu." 
Matthew21:38 Koma olimawo m'mene anaona mwanayo, ananena wina ndi mnzake, Uyo ndiye wolowa; tiyeni, timuphe, ndipo ife tidzatenga cholowa chake." 
Matthew21:39 Ndipo anamtenga iye, namponya kunja kwa munda, namupha." 
Matthew21:40 Tsono atabwera mwini munda, adzachitira olimawo chiyani?" 
Matthew21:41 Iwo ananena kwa Iye, Adzaononga koipa oipawo, nadzapereka mundawo kwa olima ena, amene adzambwezera iye zipatso pa nyengo zake." 
Matthew21:42 Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Kodi simunawerenga konse m'malembo, Mwala umene anaukana omanga nyumba womwewu unakhala mutu wa pangodya: Ichi chinachokera kwa Ambuye, ndipo chili chozizwitsa m'maso mwathu?" 
Matthew21:43 Chifukwa chake ndinena kwa inu, Ufumu wa Mulungu udzachotsedwa kwa inu, nudzapatsidwa kwa anthu akupatsa zipatso zake." 
Matthew21:44 Ndipo iye wakugwa pa mwala uwu adzaphwanyika; koma pa iye amene udzamgwera, udzampera iye." 
Matthew21:45 Ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi, pakumva mafanizo ake, anazindikira kuti alikunena za iwo." 
Matthew21:46 Ndipo pamene anafuna kumgwira, anaopa makamu a anthu, chifukwa anamuyesa mneneri." 
Matthew22:1 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nalankhulanso kwa iwo m'mafanizo, nati," 
Matthew22:2 Ufumu wa Kumwamba ufanafana ndi munthu, mfumu, amene anakonzera mwana wake phwando la ukwati," 
Matthew22:3 natumiza akapolo ake kukaitana oitanidwa kuukwati umene; ndipo iwo sanafune kudza. 
Matthew22:4 Pomwepo anatumizanso akapolo ena, nanena, Uzani oitanidwawo, Onani, ndakonza phwando langa; ng'ombe zanga, ndi zonona ndinazipha, ndi zinthu zonse zapsa: idzani kuukwati." 
Matthew22:5 Koma iwo ananyalanyaza, nachoka, wina kumunda wake, wina kumalonda ake:" 
Matthew22:6 ndipo otsala anagwira akapolo ake, nawachitira chipongwe, nawapha." 
Matthew22:7 Koma mfumu inakwiya; nituma asilikali ake napululutsa ambanda aja, nitentha mudzi wao." 
Matthew22:8 Pomwepo inanena kwa akapolo ake, Za ukwati tsopano zapsa, koma oitanidwawo sanayenera." 
Matthew22:9 Chifukwa chake pitani inu kumphambano za njira, ndipo amene aliyense mukampeze, itanani kuukwatiku." 
Matthew22:10 Ndipo akapolo ao anatulukira kunjira, nasonkhanitsa onse amene anawapeza, ngakhale oipa, ngakhale abwino; ndipo ukwatiwo unadzala ndi okhala pachakudya." 
Matthew22:11 Koma mfumuyo m'mene inadza kuwaona akudyawo, anapenya momwemo munthu wosavala chovala cha ukwati;" 
Matthew22:12 nanena kwa iye, Mnzangawe, unalowa muno bwanji wosakhala nacho chovala cha ukwati? Ndipo iye analibe mau." 
Matthew22:13 Pomwepo mfumu inati kwa atumiki, Mumange iye manja ndi miyendo, mumponye kumdima wakunja; komweko kudzali kulira ndi kukukuta mano." 
Matthew22:14 Pakuti oitanidwa ndiwo ambiri, koma osankhidwa ndiwo owerengeka." 
Matthew22:15 Pomwepo Afarisi anamuka, nakhala upo wakumkola Iye m'kulankhula kwake." 
Matthew22:16 Ndipo anatumiza kwa Iye ophunzira ao, pamodzi ndi Aherode, amene ananena, Mphunzitsi, tidziwa kuti muli woona, ndipo muphunzitsa njira ya Mulungu moona ndithu, ndipo simusamala munthu aliyense; pakuti simuyang'anira pa nkhope ya anthu." 
Matthew22:17 Chifukwa chake mutiuze ife, muganiza chiyani? Kuloledwa kodi kupatsa msonkho kwa Kaisara, kapena iai?" 
Matthew22:18 Koma Yesu anadziwa kuipa kwao, nati, Mundiyeseranji Ine, onyenga inu?" 
Matthew22:19 Tandionetsani Ine ndalama yamsonkho. Ndipo iwo anadza nalo kwa Iye rupiya latheka. 
Matthew22:20 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Ncha yani chithunzithunzi ichi, ndi kulemba kwake?" 
Matthew22:21 Nanena iwo, Cha Kaisara. Pomwepo Iye anati kwa iwo, Chifukwa chake patsani kwa Kaisara zake za Kaisara, ndi kwa Mulungu zake za Mulungu." 
Matthew22:22 Ndipo pamene iwo anamva, anazizwa, namsiya Iye, nachokapo." 
Matthew22:23 Tsiku lomwelo anadza kwa Iye Asaduki, amene amanena kuti palibe kuuka kwa akufa; namfunsa Iye," 
Matthew22:24 nanena, Mphunzitsi, Mose anati, Ngati munthu akafa wopanda mwana, mphwake adzakwatira mkazi wake, nadzamuukitsira mbale wake mbeu." 
Matthew22:25 Tsono panali ndi ife abale asanu ndi awiri; ndipo wakuyamba anakwatira, namwalira wopanda mbeu, nasiyira mphwake mkazi wake;" 
Matthew22:26 chimodzimodzi wachiwiri, ndi wachitatu, kufikira wachisanu ndi chiwiri." 
Matthew22:27 Ndipo pomalizira anamwaliranso mkaziyo. 
Matthew22:28 Chifukwa chake m'kuuka kwa akufa, iye adzakhala mkazi wa yani wa asanu ndi awiriwo? Pakuti onse anakhala naye." 
Matthew22:29 Koma Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Mungolakwa osadziwa malembo, kapena mphamvu za Mulungu." 
Matthew22:30 Pakuti m'kuuka kwa akufa sakwatira, kapena kukwatiwa, koma akhala ngati angelo a Kumwamba." 
Matthew22:31 Koma za kuuka kwa akufa, simunawerenga kodi chomwe chinanenedwa kwa inu ndi Mulungu, kuti," 
Matthew22:32 Ine ndili Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi Mulungu wa Isaki, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo? Sali Mulungu wa akufa koma wa amoyo." 
Matthew22:33 Ndipo pamene makamu a anthu anamva, anazizwa ndi chiphunzitso chake." 
Matthew22:34 Koma Afarisi, pakumva kuti Iye anatontholetsa Asaduki, anasonkhana." 
Matthew22:35 Ndipo mmodzi wa iwo, mphunzitsi wa chilamulo, anamfunsa ndi kumuyesa Iye, nati," 
Matthew22:36 Mphunzitsi, lamulo lalikulu ndi liti la m'chilamulo?" 
Matthew22:37 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Uzikonda Ambuye Mulungu wako ndi mtima wako wonse, ndi moyo wako wonse, ndi nzeru zako zonse." 
Matthew22:38 Ili ndilo lamulo lalikulu ndi loyamba. 
Matthew22:39 Ndipo lachiwiri lolingana nalo ndili, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda iwe mwini." 
Matthew22:40 Pa malamulo awa awiri mpokolowekapo chilamulo chonse ndi aneneri. 
Matthew22:41 Ndipo pamene Afarisi anasonkhana, Yesu anawafunsa," 
Matthew22:42 nati, Muganiza bwanji za Khristu? Ali mwana wa yani? Iwo ananena kwa Iye, Wa Davide." 
Matthew22:43 Iye anati kwa iwo, Ndipo Davide mu Mzimu amtchula Iye bwanji Ambuye, nanena," 
Matthew22:44 Ambuye ananena kwa Ambuye wanga, ukhale pa dzanja lamanja langa, kufikira Ine ndidzaika adani ako pansi pa mapazi ako." 
Matthew22:45 Chifukwa chake ngati Davide amtchula Iye Ambuye, ali mwana wake bwanji? Ndipo panalibe mmodzi anatha kumyankha mau." 
Matthew22:46 Ndipo sanalimbike mtima munthu aliyense kumfunsa kanthu kuyambira tsiku lomwelo. 
Matthew23:1 Pomwepo Yesu analankhula ndi makamu a anthu ndi ophunzira ake," 
Matthew23:2 nanena, Alembi ndi Afarisi akhala pa mpando wa Mose;" 
Matthew23:3 chifukwa chake zinthu zilizonse zimene iwo akauza inu, chitani nimusunge; koma musatsanza ntchito zao; pakuti iwo amalankhula, koma samachita." 
Matthew23:4 Inde, amanga akatundu olemera ndi osautsa ponyamula, nawasenza pa mapewa a anthu; koma iwo eni okha safuna kuwasuntha amenewo ndi chala chao." 
Matthew23:5 Koma amachita ntchito zao zonse kuti aonekere kwa anthu; pakuti akulitsa chitando chake cha njirisi zao, nakulitsa mphonje," 
Matthew23:6 nakonda malo a ulemu pamaphwando, ndi mipando ya ulemu m'masunagoge," 
Matthew23:7 ndi kulonjeredwa m'misika, ndi kutchedwa ndi anthu, Rabi." 
Matthew23:8 Koma inu musatchedwa Rabi; pakuti Mphunzitsi wanu ali mmodzi, ndipo inu nonse muli abale." 
Matthew23:9 Ndipo inu musatchule wina atate wanu pansi pano, pakuti alipo mmodzi ndiye Atate wanu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew23:10 Ndipo musatchedwa atsogoleri, pakuti alipo mmodzi Mtsogoleri wanu, ndiye Khristu." 
Matthew23:11 Koma wamkulu wopambana wa inu adzakhala mtumiki wanu. 
Matthew23:12 Ndipo amene aliyense akadzikuza yekha adzachepetsedwa; koma amene adzichepetsa mwini yekha adzakulitsidwa. 
Matthew23:13 Koma tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! Chifukwa mutsekera anthu Ufumu wa Kumwamba pamaso pao; pakuti inu nokha simulowamo, ndipo muwaletsa amene alikulowa, kuti asalowemo." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 Tsoka inu alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! Chifukwa mupitapita kunyanja ndi kumtunda kuyesa munthu mmodzi mtembenuki; ndipo m'mene akhala wotere, mumsandutsa mwana wa Gehena woposa inu kawiri." 
Matthew23:16 Tsoka inu, atsogoleri akhungu, amene munena, Amene aliyense akalumbira kutchula Kachisi, palibe kanthu; koma amene akalumbira kutchula golide wa Kachisi, wadzimangirira." 
Matthew23:17 Inu opusa, ndi akhungu: pakuti choposa nchiti, golide kodi, kapena Kachisi amene ayeretsa golideyo?" 
Matthew23:18 Ndiponso, Amene aliyense akalumbira kutchula guwa la nsembe, palibe kanthu; koma amene akalumbira kutchula mtulo wa pamwamba pake wadzimangirira." 
Matthew23:19 Inu akhungu, pakuti choposa nchiti, mtulo kodi, kapena guwa la nsembe limene liyeretsa mtulowo?" 
Matthew23:20 Chifukwa chake wakulumbira kutchula guwa la nsembe, alumbira limenelo ndi zonse za pamwamba pake." 
Matthew23:21 Ndipo wakulumbira kutchula Kachisi, alumbira ameneyo ndi Iye wakukhala momwemo." 
Matthew23:22 Ndipo wakulumbira kutchula Kumwamba, alumbira chimpando cha Mulungu, ndi Iye wakukhala pomwepo." 
Matthew23:23 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! Chifukwa mupereka limodzi la magawo khumi la timbeu tonunkhira, ndi katsabola, ndi la chitowe, nimusiya zolemera za chilamulo, ndizo kuweruza kolungama, ndi kuchitira chifundo, ndi chikhulupiriro; koma zijazo munayenera kuzichita, osasiya izi zomwe." 
Matthew23:24 Atsogoleri akhungu inu, akukuntha udzudzu, koma mumeza ngamira." 
Matthew23:25 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! Chifukwa mutsuka kunja kwake kwa chikho ndi mbale, koma m'katimo iwo adzala ndi kulanda ndi kusadziletsa." 
Matthew23:26 Mfarisi iwe wakhungu, yambotsuka m'kati mwa chikho ndi mbale, kuti kunja kwake kukhalenso koyera." 
Matthew23:27 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! Chifukwa mufanafana ndi manda opaka njereza, amene aonekera okoma kunja kwake, koma adzala m'katimo ndi mafupa a anthu akufa ndi zonyansa zonse." 
Matthew23:28 Chomwecho inunso muonekera olungama pamaso pa anthu, koma m'kati muli odzala ndi chinyengo ndi kusaweruzika." 
Matthew23:29 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! Chifukwa mumanga nyumba za pa manda a aneneri, ndipo mukonza manda a anthu olungama," 
Matthew23:30 ndi kuti, Ife tikadakhala m'masiku a makolo anthu, sitikadakhala oyanjana nao pa mwazi wa aneneri." 
Matthew23:31 Pomwepo mutsimikiza nokha, kuti muli ana a iwo amene anapha aneneri." 
Matthew23:32 Dzazani inu muyeso wa makolo anu. 
Matthew23:33 Njoka inu, obadwa inu a mamba, mudzatha bwanji kuthawa kulanga kwake kwa Gehena?" 
Matthew23:34 Chifukwa cha icho, onani, ndituma kwa inu aneneri ndi anzeru ndi alembi; ena a iwo mudzawapha, mudzawapachika; ndi ena a iwo mudzawakwapula m'masunagoge mwanu, ndi kuwazunza, kuchokera kumudzi umodzi, kufikira kumudzi wina;" 
Matthew23:35 kotero kuti udzafika pa inu mwazi wonse wotayidwa pa dziko lapansi, kuyambira kumwazi wa Abele wolungamayo, kufikira kumwazi wa Zekariya mwana wa Barakiya, amene munamupha pakati pa Kachisi ndi guwa la nsembe." 
Matthew23:36 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Zinthu zonse izi zidzafika pa mbadwo uwu wamakono." 
Matthew23:37 Ha, Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu, amene umapha aneneri, ndi kuwaponya miyala iwo otumidwa kwa iwe! Ine ndinafuna kangati kusonkhanitsa pamodzi ana ako, inde monga thadzi lisonkhanitsa anapiye ake m'mapiko ake, koma inu simunafuna ai!" 
Matthew23:38 Onani, nyumba yanu yasiyidwa kwa inu yabwinja." 
Matthew23:39 Pakuti ndinena kwa inu, Simudzandionanso Ine, kuyambira tsopano, kufikira mudzanena, Wolemekezedwa Iye amene akudza m'dzina la Ambuye." 
Matthew24:1 Ndipo Yesu anatuluka ku Kachisi; ndipo ophunzira ake anadza kudzamuonetsa chimangidwe cha Kachisiyo. 
Matthew24:2 Koma Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Simuona izi zonse kodi? Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Sipadzakhala pano mwala umodzi pa unzake, umene sudzagwetsedwa." 
Matthew24:3 Ndipo pamene Iye analikukhala pansi pa phiri la Azitona, ophunzira anadza kwa Iye pa yekha, nanena, Mutiuze ife zija zidzaoneka liti? Ndipo chizindikiro cha kufika kwanu nchiyani, ndi cha mathedwe a nthawi ya pansi pano?" 
Matthew24:4 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Yang'anirani, asasokeretse inu munthu." 
Matthew24:5 Pakuti ambiri adzafika m'dzina langa, nadzanena, Ine ndine Khristu, nadzasokeretsa anthu ambiri." 
Matthew24:6 Koma inu mudzayamba kumva za nkhondo, ndi mbiri za nkhondo; onani, musadere nkhawa; pakuti kuyenera kuti izi zioneke; koma chitsiriziro sichinafike." 
Matthew24:7 Pakuti mtundu umodzi wa anthu udzaukirana ndi mtundu wina, ndi ufumu ndi ufumu wina; ndipo kudzakhala njala ndi zivomezi m'malo akutiakuti." 
Matthew24:8 Koma ndizo zonsezi zowawa zoyamba. 
Matthew24:9 Pamenepo adzakuperekani kunsautso, nadzakuphani; ndipo anthu a mitundu yonse adzadana nanu, chifukwa cha dzina langa." 
Matthew24:10 Ndipo pomwepo ambiri adzakhumudwa, nadzaperekana wina ndi mnzake, nadzadana wina ndi mnzake." 
Matthew24:11 Ndipo aneneri onama ambiri adzauka, nadzasokeretsa anthu ambiri." 
Matthew24:12 Ndipo chifukwa cha kuchuluka kwa kusaweruzika, chikondano cha anthu aunyinji chidzazilala." 
Matthew24:13 Koma iye wakulimbika chilimbikire kufikira kuchimaliziro, yemweyo adzapulumuka." 
Matthew24:14 Ndipo Uthenga uwu Wabwino wa Ufumu udzalalikidwa pa dziko lonse lapansi, ukhale mboni kwa anthu a mitundu yonse; ndipo pomwepo chidzafika chimaliziro." 
Matthew24:15 Chifukwa chake m'mene mukadzaona chonyansa cha kupululutsa, chimene chidanenedwa ndi Daniele mneneri, chitaima m'malo oyera (iye amene awerenga m'kalata azindikire)" 
Matthew24:16 pomwepo iwo ali m'Yudeya athawire kumapiri: 
Matthew24:17 iye ali pamwamba pa chindwi, asatsikire kunyamula za m'nyumba mwake;" 
Matthew24:18 ndi iye wa m'munda asabwere kutenga chofunda chake. 
Matthew24:19 Koma tsoka ali nalo iwo akukhala ndi pakati, ndi akuyamwitsa ana m'masiku awo!" 
Matthew24:20 Ndipo pempherani kuti kuthawa kwanu kusakhale pa nyengo yachisanu, kapena pa Sabata;" 
Matthew24:21 pakuti pomwepo padzakhala masauko akulu, monga sipadakhale otero kuyambira chiyambi cha dziko, kufikira tsopano, inde ndipo sipadzakhalanso." 
Matthew24:22 Ndipo akadaleka kufupikitsidwa masiku awo, sakadapulumuka munthu aliyense: koma chifukwa cha osankhidwawo masiku awo adzafupikitsidwa." 
Matthew24:23 Pomwepo munthu akanena kwa inu, Onani, Khristu ali kuno, kapena uko musamvomereze;" 
Matthew24:24 chifukwa Akhristu onama adzauka, ndi aneneri onama nadzaonetsa zizindikiro zazikulu ndi zozizwa: kotero kuti akanyenge, ngati nkotheka, osankhidwa omwe. Onani ndakuuziranitu pasadafike." 
Matthew24:25 Chifukwa chake akanena kwa inu, Onani, Iye ali m'chipululu; musamukeko." 
Matthew24:26 Onani, ali m'zipinda; musavomereze." 
Matthew24:27 Pakuti monga mphezi idzera kum'mawa, nionekera kufikira kumadzulo; kotero kudzakhalanso kufika kwake kwa Mwana wa Munthu." 
Matthew24:28 Kumene kulikonse uli mtembo, miimba idzasonkhanira konko." 
Matthew24:29 Koma pomwepo, atapita masauko a masiku awo, dzuwa lidzadetsedwa, ndi mwezi sudzaonetsa kuwala kwake, ndi nyenyezi zidzagwa kuchokera kumwamba, ndi mphamvu za kumwamba zidzagwedezeka:" 
Matthew24:30 ndipo pomwepo padzaoneka m'thambo chizindikiro cha Mwana wa Munthu; ndipo mitundu yonse ya pa dziko lapansi idzadziguguda pachifuwa, nidzapenya Mwana wa Munthu alinkudza pa mitambo ya kumwamba, ndi mphamvu ndi ulemerero waukulu." 
Matthew24:31 Ndipo Iye adzatumiza angelo ake ndi kulira kwakukulu kwa lipenga, ndipo iwo adzasonkhanitsa osankhidwa ake kumphepo zinai, kuyambira malekezero a thambo kufikira malekezero ake ena." 
Matthew24:32 Koma phunzirani ndi mkuyu fanizo lake; pamene tsopano nthambi yake ili yanthete, niphuka masamba ake, muzindikira kuti dzinja liyandikira;" 
Matthew24:33 chomwechonso inu, pamene mudzaona zimenezo, zindikirani kuti Iye ali pafupi, inde pakhomo." 
Matthew24:34 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, mbadwo uwu sudzatha kuchoka, kufikira zinthu zonsezi zidzachitidwa." 
Matthew24:35 Thambo ndi dziko lapansi zidzachoka, koma mau anga sadzachoka ai." 
Matthew24:36 Koma za tsiku ili ndi nthawi yake sadziwa munthu aliyense, angakhale angelo a Kumwamba, kapena Mwana, koma Atate yekha." 
Matthew24:37 Ndipo monga masiku a Nowa, kotero kudzakhala kufika kwake kwa Mwana wa Munthu." 
Matthew24:38 Pakuti monga m'masiku aja, chisanafike chigumula, anthu analinkudya ndi kumwa, analikukwatira ndi kukwatiwa, kufikira tsiku limene Nowa analowa m'chingalawa," 
Matthew24:39 Ndipo iwo sanadziwe kanthu, kufikira kumene chigumula chinadza, chinapululutsa iwo onse, kotero kudzakhala kufika kwake kwa Mwana wa Munthu." 
Matthew24:40 Pomwepo adzakhala awiri m'munda; mmodzi adzatengedwa, ndi wina adzasiyidwa:" 
Matthew24:41 awiri adzakhala opera pamphero; mmodzi adzatengedwa, ndi wina adzasiyidwa." 
Matthew24:42 Chifukwa chake dikirani, pakuti simudziwa tsiku lake lakufika Ambuye wanu." 
Matthew24:43 Koma dziwani ichi, kuti mwini nyumba akadadziwa nthawi yiti mbala ikudza, iye akadadikira, ndipo sakadalola kuti nyumba yake ibooledwe." 
Matthew24:44 Chifukwa chake khalani inunso okonzekeratu; chifukwa munthawi m'mene simuganizira, Mwana wa Munthu adzadza." 
Matthew24:45 Ndani kodi ali kapolo wokhulupirika ndi wanzeru, amene mbuye wake anamkhazika woyang'anira banja lake, kuwapatsa zakudya pa nthawi yake?" 
Matthew24:46 Wodala kapolo amene mbuye wake, pakufika, adzampeza iye alikuchita chotero." 
Matthew24:47 Indetu, ndinena kwa inu, kuti adzamkhazika iye woyang'anira zinthu zake zonse." 
Matthew24:48 Koma kapolo woipa akanena mumtima mwake, Mbuye wanga wachedwa;" 
Matthew24:49 nadzayamba kupanda akapolo anzake, nadya ndi kumwa pamodzi ndi oledzera;" 
Matthew24:50 mbuye wa kapoloyo adzafika tsiku losamuyembekeza iye, ndi nthawi yosadziwa iye," 
Matthew24:51 nadzamdula, nadzaika pokhala pake ndi anthu onyenga; pomwepo padzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano." 
Matthew25:1 Pomwepo Ufumu wa Kumwamba udzafanizidwa ndi anamwali khumi, amene anatenga nyali zao, natuluka kukakomana ndi mkwati." 
Matthew25:2 Ndipo asanu a iwo anali opusa, ndi asanu anali ochenjera." 
Matthew25:3 Pakuti opusawo, m'mene anatenga nyali zao, sanadzitengeranso mafuta;" 
Matthew25:4 koma anzeruwo anatenga mafuta m'nsupa zao, pamodzi ndi nyali zao." 
Matthew25:5 Ndipo pamene mkwati anachedwa, onsewo anaodzera, nagona tulo." 
Matthew25:6 Koma pakati pa usiku panali kufuula, Onani, mkwati! Tulukani kukakomana naye." 
Matthew25:7 Pomwepo anauka anamwali onse amenewo, nakonza nyali zao." 
Matthew25:8 Ndipo opusa anati kwa ochenjera, Tipatseniko ena a mafuta anu; chifukwa nyali zathu zilikuzima." 
Matthew25:9 Koma ochenjera anayankha nati, Kapena sangakwanire ife ndi inu; koma makamaka mukani kwa ogulitsa malonda, mukadzigulire inu nokha." 
Matthew25:10 Ndipo pamene iwo analikumuka kukagula, mkwati anafika; ndipo okonzekawo analowa naye pamodzi muukwati; ndipo anatseka pakhomo." 
Matthew25:11 Koma pambuyo pake anadzanso anamwali enawo, nati, Mbuye, Mbuye, mutitsegulire ife." 
Matthew25:12 Koma iye anayankha nati, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, sindikudziwani." 
Matthew25:13 Chifukwa chake dikirani, pakuti simudziwa tsiku lake, kapena nthawi yake." 
Matthew25:14 Pakuti monga munthu, wakunka ulendo, aitana akapolo ake, napereka kwa iwo chuma chake." 
Matthew25:15 Ndipo mmodzi anampatsa ndalama za matalente zisanu, ndi wina ziwiri, ndi wina imodzi; kwa iwo onse monga nzeru zao; namuka iye." 
Matthew25:16 Pomwepo uyo amene analandira matalente asanu, anapita kugula nazo malonda, napindulapo matalente ena asanu." 
Matthew25:17 Chimodzimodzi uyo wa awiriwo, anapindulapo ena awiri." 
Matthew25:18 Koma uyo amene analandira imodziyo anamuka, nakumba pansi, naibisa talente ya mbuye wake." 
Matthew25:19 Ndipo itapita nthawi yaikulu, anabwera mbuye wa akapolo awo, nawerengera nao pamodzi." 
Matthew25:20 Ndipo uyo amene adalandira matalente asanu anadza, ali nawo matalente ena asanu, nanena, Mbuye, munandipatsa matalente asanu, onani ndapindulapo matalente ena asanu." 
Matthew25:21 Mbuye wake anati kwa iye, Chabwino, kapolo iwe wabwino ndi wokhulupirika; unali wokhulupirika pa zinthu zazing'ono, ndidzakhazika iwe pa zinthu zambiri; lowa iwe m'chikondwerero cha mbuye wako." 
Matthew25:22 Ndipo wa matalente awiriwo anadzanso, nati, Mbuye, munandipatsa ine matalente awiri; onani, ndapindulapo matalente ena awiri." 
Matthew25:23 Mbuye wake anati kwa iye, Chabwino, kapolo iwe wabwino ndi wokhulupirika; unali wokhulupirika pa zinthu zazing'ono, ndidzakhazika iwe pa zinthu zambiri; lowa iwe m'chikondwerero cha mbuye wako." 
Matthew25:24 Ndipo uyonso amene analandira talente imodzi, anadza, nati, Mbuye, ndinakudziwani inu kuti ndinu munthu wouma mtima, wakututa kumene simunafesa, ndi wakusonkhanitsa kumene simunawaza;" 
Matthew25:25 ndinaopa ine, ndinapita, ndinabisa pansi talente yanu: onani, siyi talente yanuyo." 
Matthew25:26 Koma mbuye wake anayankha, nati kwa iye, Kapolo iwe woipa ndi waulesi, unadziwa kuti ndimatuta kumene sindinafesa, ndi kusonkhanitsa kumene sindinawaza;" 
Matthew25:27 chifukwa chake ukadapereka ndalama zanga kwa okongola ndalama, ndipo ine pobwera ndikadatenga zanga ndi phindu lake." 
Matthew25:28 Chifukwa chake chotsani kwa iye ndalamayo, muipatse kwa amene ali nazo ndalama khumi." 
Matthew25:29 Pakuti kwa yense amene ali nazo, kudzapatsidwa, ndipo iye adzakhala nazo zochuluka: koma kwa iye amene alibe, kudzachotsedwa, chingakhale chimene anali nacho." 
Matthew25:30 Ndipo ponyani kapoloyo wopanda pake kumdima wakunja; kumene kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano. 
Matthew25:31 Koma pamene Mwana wa Munthu adzadza mu ulemerero wake, ndi angelo onse pamodzi naye, pomwepo Iye adzakhala pa chimpando cha kuwala kwake:" 
Matthew25:32 ndipo adzasonkhanidwa pamaso pake anthu a mitundu yonse; ndipo Iye adzalekanitsa iwo wina ndi mnzake, monga mbusa alekanitsa nkhosa ndi mbuzi;" 
Matthew25:33 nadzakhalitsa nkhosa kudzanja lake lamanja, koma mbuzi kulamanzere." 
Matthew25:34 Pomwepo Mfumuyo idzanena kwa iwo a kudzanja lake lamanja, Idzani kuno inu odalitsika a Atate wanga, lowani mu Ufumu wokonzedwera kwa inu pa chikhazikiro chake cha dziko lapansi:" 
Matthew25:35 pakuti ndinali ndi njala, ndipo munandipatsa Ine kudya; ndinali ndi ludzu, ndipo munandimwetsa Ine; ndinali mlendo, ndipo munachereza Ine;" 
Matthew25:36 wamaliseche Ine, ndipo munandiveka; ndinadwala, ndipo munadza kucheza ndi Ine; ndinali m'nyumba yandende, ndipo munadza kwa Ine." 
Matthew25:37 Pomwepo olungama adzamyankha Iye kuti, Ambuye, tinakuonani Inu liti wanjala, ndi kukudyetsani? Kapena waludzu, ndi kukumwetsani?" 
Matthew25:38 Ndipo tinaona Inu liti mlendo, ndi kukucherezani? Kapena wamaliseche, ndi kukuvekani?" 
Matthew25:39 Ndipo tinakuonani Inu liti wodwala, kapena m'nyumba yandende, ndipo tinadza kwa Inu?" 
Matthew25:40 Ndipo Mfumuyo idzayankha nidzati kwa iwo, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Chifukwa munachitira ichi mmodzi wa abale anga, ngakhale ang'onong'ono awa, munandichitira ichi Ine." 
Matthew25:41 Pomwepo Iye adzanena kwa iwo a kudzanja lamanzere, Chokani kwa Ine otembereredwa inu, kumoto wa nthawi zonse wokolezedwera mdierekezi ndi angelo ake:" 
Matthew25:42 pakuti ndinali ndi njala, ndipo simunandipatsa Ine kudya: ndinali ndi ludzu, ndipo simunandimwetsa Ine:" 
Matthew25:43 ndinali mlendo, ndipo simunandilandira Ine; wamaliseche ndipo simunandiveka Ine; wodwala, ndi m'nyumba yandende, ndipo simunadza kundiona Ine." 
Matthew25:44 Pomwepo iwonso adzayankha kuti, Ambuye, tinakuonani liti wanjala, kapena waludzu, kapena mlendo, kapena wamaliseche, kapena m'nyumba yandende, ndipo ife sitinakutumikirani Inu?" 
Matthew25:45 Pomwepo Iye adzayankha iwo kuti, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Chifukwa munalibe kuchitira ichi mmodzi wa awa ang'onong'ono, munalibe kundichitira ichi Ine." 
Matthew25:46 Ndipo amenewa adzachoka kunka ku chilango cha nthawi zonse; koma olungama kumoyo wa nthawi zonse. 
Matthew26:1 Ndipo panali pamene Yesu anatha mau onse amenewa, anati kwa ophunzira ake," 
Matthew26:2 Mudziwa kuti akapita masiku awiri, Paska afika, ndipo Mwana wa Munthu adzaperekedwa kupachikidwa pamtanda." 
Matthew26:3 Pomwepo anasonkhana ansembe aakulu, ndi akulu a anthu, kubwalo la mkulu wa ansembe, dzina lake Kayafa;" 
Matthew26:4 nakhala upo wakuti amgwire Yesu ndi chinyengo, namuphe." 
Matthew26:5 Koma ananena iwo, pa nthawi la chikondwerero iai, kuti pasakhale phokoso la anthu." 
Matthew26:6 Ndipo pamene Yesu anali m'Betaniya, m'nyumba ya Simoni wakhate," 
Matthew26:7 anadza kwa Iye mkazi, anali nayo nsupa ya alabastero ndi mafuta onunkhira bwino a mtengo wapatali, nawatsanulira pamutu pake, m'mene Iye analikukhala pachakudya." 
Matthew26:8 Koma m'mene ophunzira anaona, anada mtima, nanena, Chifukwa ninji kuononga kumeneku?" 
Matthew26:9 Pakuti mafuta awa akadagulitsa ndalama zambiri, ndi kuzipatsa anthu aumphawi." 
Matthew26:10 Koma Yesu podziwa, anati kwa iwo, Mumvutiranji mkaziyu? Popeza andichitira Ine ntchito yabwino." 
Matthew26:11 Pakuti nthawi zonse muli nao aumphawi pamodzi nanu; koma simuli ndi Ine nthawi zonse. 
Matthew26:12 Pakuti mkaziyo, m'mene anathira mafuta awa pathupi panga, wandichitiratu ichi pa kuikidwa kwanga." 
Matthew26:13 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kumene kulikonse Uthenga uwu Wabwino udzalalikidwa m'dziko lonse lapansi, ichi chimene mkaziyo anachitachi chidzakambidwanso chikumbukiro chake." 
Matthew26:14 Pomwepo mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, dzina lake Yudasi Iskariote, anamuka kwa ansembe aakulu," 
Matthew26:15 nati, Mufuna kundipatsa chiyani, ndipo ine ndidzampereka Iye kwa inu? Ndipo iwo anamwerengera iye ndalama zasiliva makumi atatu." 
Matthew26:16 Ndipo kuyambira pamenepo iye anafunafuna nthawi yabwino yakuti ampereke Iye. 
Matthew26:17 Ndipo tsiku loyamba la mkate wopanda chotupitsa, ophunzira anadza kwa Yesu, nati, Mufuna tikakonzere kuti Paska, kuti mukadye?" 
Matthew26:18 Nati Iye, Mukani kumzinda kwa munthu wangana, mukati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi anena, Nthawi yanga yayandikira; ndidzadya Paska kwanu pamodzi ndi ophunzira anga." 
Matthew26:19 Ndipo ophunzira anachita monga Yesu anawauza, nakonza Paska." 
Matthew26:20 Ndipo pakufika madzulo, Iye analinkukhala pachakudya pamodzi ndi ophunzira khumi ndi awiri;" 
Matthew26:21 ndipo m'mene analinkudya, Iye anati, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, mmodzi wa inu adzandipereka Ine." 
Matthew26:22 Ndipo iwo anagwidwa ndi chisoni chachikulu, nayamba kunena kwa Iye mmodzimmodzi, Kodi ndine, Ambuye?" 
Matthew26:23 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati, Iye amene asunsa pamodzi ndi Ine dzanja lake m'mbale, yemweyu adzandipereka Ine." 
Matthew26:24 Mwana wa Munthu achokatu, monga kunalembedwa za Iye; koma tsoka ali nalo munthu amene Mwana wa Munthu aperekedwa ndi iye! Kukadakhala bwino kwa munthuyo ngati sakadabadwa." 
Matthew26:25 Ndipo Yudasi, womperekayo anayankha nati, Kodi ndine, Rabi? Iye ananena kwa iye, Iwe watero." 
Matthew26:26 Ndipo pamene iwo analinkudya, Yesu anatenga mkate, nadalitsa, naunyema; ndipo m'mene anapatsa kwa ophunzira, anati, Tengani, idyani; ichi ndi thupi langa." 
Matthew26:27 Ndipo pamene anatenga chikho, anayamika, napatsa iwo, nanena, Mumwere ichi inu nonse," 
Matthew26:28 pakuti ichi ndi mwazi wanga wa pangano wothiridwa chifukwa cha anthu ambiri ku kuchotsa machimo. 
Matthew26:29 Ndipo ndinena kwa inu, sindidzamwanso chipatso ichi champesa, kufikira tsiku limene ndidzamwa chatsopano, pamodzi ndi inu, mu Ufumu wa Atate wanga." 
Matthew26:30 Ndipo pamene anaimba nyimbo, anatuluka kunka kuphiri la Azitona." 
Matthew26:31 Pamenepo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Inu nonse mudzakhumudwa chifukwa cha Ine usiku uno; pakuti kwalembedwa, Ndidzakantha mbusa, ndipo zidzabalalika nkhosa za gulu." 
Matthew26:32 Koma nditauka ndidzatsogolera inu ku Galileya. 
Matthew26:33 Koma Petro ananena kwa Iye, Ngakhale onse adzakhumudwa chifukwa cha Inu, ine sindidzakhumudwa nthawi zonse." 
Matthew26:34 Yesu anati kwa iye, Indetu ndinena kwa iwe, kuti usiku uno, tambala asanalire, udzandikana Ine katatu." 
Matthew26:35 Petro ananena kwa Iye, Ngakhale ine ndikafa ndi Inu, sindidzakukanani Inu iai. Anateronso ophunzira onse." 
Matthew26:36 Pomwepo Yesu anadza ndi iwo kumalo otchedwa Getsemani, nanena kwa ophunzira ake, Bakhalani inu pompano, ndipite uko ndikapemphere." 
Matthew26:37 Ndipo anatenga Petro ndi ana awiri a Zebedeo pamodzi naye, nayamba kugwidwa ndi chisoni ndi kuthedwa nzeru." 
Matthew26:38 Pamenepo ananena kwa iwo, Moyo wanga uli wozingidwa ndi chisoni cha kufika nacho kuimfa; khalani pano muchezere pamodzi ndi Ine." 
Matthew26:39 Ndipo anamuka patsogolo pang'ono, nagwa nkhope yake pansi, napemphera, nati, Atate ngati nkutheka, chikho ichi chindipitirire Ine; koma si monga ndifuna Ine, koma Inu." 
Matthew26:40 Ndipo anadza kwa ophunzira, nawapeza iwo ali m'tulo, nanena kwa Petro, Nkutero kodi? Simukhoza kuchezera ndi Ine mphindi imodzi?" 
Matthew26:41 Chezerani ndi kupemphera, kuti mungalowe m'kuyesedwa: mzimutu uli wakufuna, koma thupi lili lolefuka." 
Matthew26:42 Anamukanso kachiwiri, napemphera, nati, Atate wanga, ngati ichi sichingandipitirire, koma ndimwere ichi, kufuna kwanu kuchitidwe." 
Matthew26:43 Ndipo anabweranso, nawapeza iwo ali m'tulo, pakuti zikope zao zinalemera ndi tulo." 
Matthew26:44 Ndipo anawasiyanso, napemphera kachitatu, nateronso mau omwewo." 
Matthew26:45 Pomwepo anadza kwa ophunzira, nanena kwa iwo, Gonani nthawi yatsalayi, mupumule; onani, nthawi yafika, ndipo Mwana wa Munthu aperekedwa m'manja a ochimwa." 
Matthew26:46 Ukani, timuke; taonani, iye wakundipereka wayandikira." 
Matthew26:47 Ndipo Iye ali chilankhulire, onani, Yudasi, mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, anadza, ndi pamodzi ndi iye khamu lalikulu la anthu, ndi malupanga ndi mikunkhu, kuchokera kwa ansembe aakulu ndi akulu a anthu." 
Matthew26:48 Koma wompereka Iye anawapatsa chizindikiro, nanena, Iye amene ndidzampsompsona ndiyeyo, mumgwire Iye." 
Matthew26:49 Ndipo pomwepo anadza kwa Yesu, nati, Tikuoneni, Rabi; nampsompsonetsa." 
Matthew26:50 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Mnzanga, wafikiranji iwe? Pomwepo iwo anadza, namthira Yesu manja, namgwira Iye." 
Matthew26:51 Ndipo onani, mmodzi wa iwo anali pamodzi ndi Yesu, anatansa dzanja lake, nasolola lupanga lake, nakantha kapolo wa mkulu wa ansembe, nadula khutu lake." 
Matthew26:52 Pomwepo Yesu ananena kwa iye, Tabweza lupanga lako m'chimakemo, pakuti onse akugwira lupanga adzaonongeka ndi lupanga." 
Matthew26:53 Kapena uganiza kuti sindingathe kupemphera Atate wanga, ndipo Iye adzanditumizira tsopano lino mabungwe a angelo oposa khumi ndi awiri?" 
Matthew26:54 Koma pakutero malembo adzakwaniridwa bwanji, pakuti kuyenera chomwecho?" 
Matthew26:55 Nthawi yomweyo Yesu anati kwa makamuwo a anthu, Kodi munatulukira kundigwira Ine ndi malupanga ndi mikunkhu, ngati wachifwamba? Tsiku ndi tsiku ndimakhala m'Kachisi kuphunzitsa, ndipo simunandigwira." 
Matthew26:56 Koma izi zonse zinachitidwa, kuti zolembedwa za aneneri zikwaniridwe. Pomwepo ophunzira onse anamsiya Iye, nathawa." 
Matthew26:57 Ndipo iwo akugwira Yesu ananka naye kwa Kayafa, mkulu wa ansembe, kumene adasonkhana alembi ndi akulu omwe." 
Matthew26:58 Koma Petro anamtsata kutali, kufikira kubwalo la mkulu wa ansembe, nalowamo, nakhala pansi ndi anyamata, kuti aone chimaliziro." 
Matthew26:59 Ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi akulu a milandu onse anafunafuna umboni wonama wakutsutsa Yesu, kuti amuphe Iye;" 
Matthew26:60 koma sanaupeze zingakhale mboni zonama zambiri zinadza. Koma pambuyo pake anadza awiri," 
Matthew26:61 nati, Uyu ananena kuti, Ndikhoza kupasula Kachisi wa Mulunguyu, ndi kummanganso masiku atatu." 
Matthew26:62 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe anaimirira, nati kwa Iye, Suvomera kanthu kodi? Nchiyani ichi chimene awa akunenera Iwe?" 
Matthew26:63 Koma Yesu anangokhala chete. Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe ananena kwa Iye, Ndikulumbiritsa Iwe pa Mulungu wamoyo, kuti utiuze ife ngati Iwe ndiwe Khristu, Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Matthew26:64 Yesu anati kwa iye, Mwatero, koma ndinenanso kwa inu, Kuyambira tsopano mudzaona Mwana wa Munthu ali kukhala kudzanja lamanja la mphamvu, ndi kufika pa mitambo ya kumwamba." 
Matthew26:65 Pomwepo mkulu wa ansembe anang'amba zovala zake, nati, Achitira Mulungu mwano; tifuniranji mboni zina? Onani, tsopano mwamva mwanowo;" 
Matthew26:66 muganiza bwanji? Iwo anayankha nati, Ali woyenera kumupha." 
Matthew26:67 Pomwepo iwo anathira malovu pankhope pake, nambwanyula Iye; ndipo ena anampanda khofu," 
Matthew26:68 nati, Utilote ife, Khristu Iwe; wakumenya Iwe ndani?" 
Matthew26:69 Ndipo Petro adakhala pabwalo: ndipo mdzakazi anadza kwa iye, nanena, Iwenso unali ndi Yesu wa ku Galileya." 
Matthew26:70 Koma iye anakana pamaso pa anthu onse, kuti, Chimene unena sindichidziwa." 
Matthew26:71 Ndipo pamene iye anatuluka kunka kuchipata, mkazi wina anamuona, nati kwa iwo a pomwepo, Uyonso anali ndi Yesu Mnazarayo." 
Matthew26:72 Ndipo anakananso ndi chilumbiro, kuti, Sindidziwa munthuyo." 
Matthew26:73 Ndipo popita nthawi yaing'ono, iwo akuimapo anadza, nati kwa Petro, Zoonadi, iwenso uli wa iwo; pakuti malankhulidwe ako akuzindikiritsa iwe." 
Matthew26:74 Pamenepo iye anayamba kutemberera ndi kulumbira, kuti, Sindidziwa munthuyo. Ndipo pompo tambala analira." 
Matthew26:75 Ndipo Petro anakumbukira mau amene Yesu adati, Asanalire tambala udzandikana katatu. Ndipo anatulukira kunja, nalira ndi kuwawa mtima." 
Matthew27:1 Ndipo pakudza mamawa, ansembe aakulu ndi akulu a anthu onse anakhala upo wakumchitira Yesu, kuti amuphe;" 
Matthew27:2 ndipo anammanga Iye, namuka naye, nampereka Iye kwa Pilato kazembeyo." 
Matthew27:3 Pamenepo Yudasi yemwe anampereka Iye, poona kuti Iye anatsutsidwa kuti afe, analapa, nabweza ndalama zija zasiliva makumi atatu kwa ansembe aakulu ndi akulu," 
Matthew27:4 nanena, Ndinachita koipa ine, pakupereka mwazi wosalakwa. Koma iwo anati, Tili nacho chiyani ife? Udzionere wekha." 
Matthew27:5 Ndipo iye anataya pansi ndalamazo pa Kachisi, nachokapo, nadzipachika yekha pakhosi." 
Matthew27:6 Ndipo ansembe aakulu anatenga ndalamazo, nati, Sikuloledwa kuziika m'chosonkhera ndalama za Mulungu, chifukwa ndizo mtengo wa mwazi." 
Matthew27:7 Koma anapangana, nazigula munda wa woumba mbiya, ukhale manda a alendo." 
Matthew27:8 Chifukwa chake munda umenewu anautcha, Munda-wa-mwazi, kufikira lero lino." 
Matthew27:9 Pamenepo chinakwaniridwa chonenedwa ndi Yeremiya mneneri, ndi kuti, Ndipo iwo anatenga ndalamazo zasiliva makumi atatu, mtengo wa uja wowerengedwa mtengo wake, amene iwo a ana a Israele anawerenga mtengo wake;" 
Matthew27:10 ndipo anazipereka kugula munda wa woumba mbiya, monga anandilamulira ine Ambuye." 
Matthew27:11 Ndipo Yesu anaimirira pamaso pa kazembe, ndipo kazembeyo anamfunsa Iye kuti, Kodi Iwe ndiwe mfumu ya Ayuda? Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Mwatero." 
Matthew27:12 Ndipo pakumnenera Iye ansembe aakulu ndi akulu, Iye sanayankhe kanthu." 
Matthew27:13 Pomwepo Pilato ananena kwa Iye, Sukumva kodi zinthu zambiri zotere akunenera Iwe?" 
Matthew27:14 Ndipo sanayankhe Iye, ngakhale mau amodzi, kotero kuti kazembe anazizwa ndithu." 
Matthew27:15 Ndipo pa chikondwerero kazembe adazolowera kumasulira anthu mmodzi wandende, amene iwo anafuna." 
Matthew27:16 Ndipo pa nthawi yomweyo anali ndi wandende wodziwika, dzina lake Barabasi." 
Matthew27:17 Chifukwa chake pamene anasonkhana, Pilato ananena kwa iwo, Mufuna kuti ndikumasulireni yani? Barabasi kodi, kapena Yesu, wotchedwa Khristu?" 
Matthew27:18 Pakuti anadziwa kuti anampereka Iye mwanjiru. 
Matthew27:19 Ndipo pamene Pilato analikukhala pa mpando wakuweruza, mkazi wake anatumiza mau kwa iye, kunena, Musachite kanthu ndi munthu wolungamayo; pakuti lero m'kulota ine ndasauka kwambiri chifukwa cha Iye." 
Matthew27:20 Koma ansembe aakulu ndi akulu anapangira anthu kuti apemphe Barabasi, koma kuti aononge Yesu." 
Matthew27:21 Koma kazembe anati kwa iwo, Mufuna kuti ndikumasulireni uti wa awa awiri? Ndipo iwo anati, Barabasi." 
Matthew27:22 Pilato ananena kwa iwo, Nanga ndidzachita chiyani ndi Yesu, wotchedwa Khristu? Onse anati, Apachikidwe pamtanda." 
Matthew27:23 Ndipo iye anati, Chifukwa ninji? Anachita choipa chotani? Koma iwo anafuulitsa kopambana, Apachikidwe pamtanda." 
Matthew27:24 Koma Pilato poona kuti sanafitse, koma kuti linapambana phokoso, anatenga madzi, nasamba manja pamaso pa khamulo, nati, Ine ndilibe kuchimwira mwazi wa munthu uyu wolungama, mudzionere nokha." 
Matthew27:25 Ndipo anthu onse anavomereza, ndi kuti, Mwazi wake uli pa ife ndi pa ana athu." 
Matthew27:26 Pomwepo iye anamasulira iwo Barabasi, koma anakwapula Yesu, nampereka Iye kuti akampachike pamtanda." 
Matthew27:27 Pomwepo asilikali a kazembe anamuka naye Yesu kubwalo la milandu, nasonkhanitsa kwa Iye khamu lao lonse." 
Matthew27:28 Ndipo anavula malaya ake, namveka malaya ofiira achifumu." 
Matthew27:29 Ndipo analuka korona waminga, namveka pamutu pake, namgwiritsa bango m'dzanja lamanja lake; ndipo anagwada pansi pamaso pake, namchitira chipongwe, nati, Tikuoneni, mfumu ya Ayuda!" 
Matthew27:30 Namthira malovu, natenga bango, nampanda Iye pamutu." 
Matthew27:31 Ndipo pamene anatha kumchitira Iye chipongwe, anavula malaya aja, namveka Iye malaya ake, natsogoza Iye kukampachika pamtanda." 
Matthew27:32 Ndipo pakutuluka pao anapeza munthu wa ku Kirene, dzina lake Simoni, namkakamiza iye kuti anyamule mtanda wake." 
Matthew27:33 Ndipo pamene anadza kumalo dzina lake Gologota, ndiko kunena kuti, Malo a Bade," 
Matthew27:34 anamwetsa Iye vinyo wosanganiza ndi ndulu; ndipo Iye, m'mene analawa, sanafune kumwa." 
Matthew27:35 Ndipo pamene anampachika Iye, anagawana zovala zake ndi kulota maere:" 
Matthew27:36 nakhala iwo pansi, namdikira kumeneko." 
Matthew27:37 Ndipo anaika pamwamba pamutu pake mlandu wake wolembedwa: UYU NDI YESU MFUMU YA AYUDA. 
Matthew27:38 Pamenepo anapachika pamodzi ndi Iye achifwamba awiri, mmodzi kudzanja lamanja, ndi wina kulamanzere." 
Matthew27:39 Ndipo anthu akupitirirapo anamchitira mwano Iye ndi kupukusa mitu yao," 
Matthew27:40 nati, Nanga Iwe, wopasula Kachisi, ndi kummanganso masiku atatu, tadzipulumutsa wekha; ngati uli Mwana wa Mulungu, tatsika pamtandapo." 
Matthew27:41 Chomwechonso ansembe aakulu, pamodzi ndi alembi ndi akulu anamchitira chipongwe, nati," 
Matthew27:42 Anapulumutsa ena, sangathe kudzipulumutsa yekha. Ndiye mfumu ya Aisraele; atsike tsopano pamtandapo, ndipo tidzamkhulupirira Iye." 
Matthew27:43 Amakhulupirira Mulungu; Iye ampulumutse tsopano, ngati amfuna; pakuti anati, Ine ndine Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Matthew27:44 Ndiponso achifwambawo opachikidwa pamodzi ndi Iye, anamlalatira Iye mau amodzimodzi." 
Matthew27:45 Ndipo ora lachisanu ndi chimodzi panali mdima pa dziko lonse, kufikira ora lachisanu ndi chinai." 
Matthew27:46 Ndipo poyandikira ora lachisanu ndi chinai, Yesu anafuula ndi mau akulu, kunena, Eli, Eli, lama sabakitani? ndiko kunena kuti, Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga, mwandisiyiranji Ine?" 
Matthew27:47 Ndipo ena a iwo akuimirira komweko, pamene anamva, ananena, Uyo aitana Eliya." 
Matthew27:48 Ndipo pomwepa mmodzi wa iwo anathamanga, natenga chinkhupule, nachidzaza ndi vinyo wosasa, nachiika pabango, namwetsa Iye." 
Matthew27:49 Koma ena anati, Taleka, tione ngati Eliya adzafika kudzampulumutsa." 
Matthew27:50 Ndipo Yesu, pamene anafuula ndi mau akulu, anapereka mzimu wake." 
Matthew27:51 Ndipo onani, chinsalu chotchinga cha m'Kachisi chinang'ambika pakati, kuchokera kumwamba kufikira pansi; ndipo dziko linagwedezeka, ndi miyala inang'ambika;" 
Matthew27:52 ndi manda anatseguka, ndi mitembo yambiri ya anthu oyera mtima, akugona kale, inauka;" 
Matthew27:53 ndipo anatuluka m'manda mwao pambuyo pa kuuka kwake, nalowa m'mzinda woyera, naonekera kwa anthu ambiri." 
Matthew27:54 Ndipo anali naye akudikira Yesu, anaona chivomezi, ndi zinthu zimene zinachitidwa, anaopa kwambiri, nanena, Indedi Uyu ndiye Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Matthew27:55 Ndipo anali pomwepo akazi ambiri, akuyang'anira patali, omwe anatsata Yesu kuchokera ku Galileya, namatumikira Iye;" 
Matthew27:56 mwa iwo amene munali Maria wa Magadala, ndi Maria amake wa Yakobo, ndi wa Yosefe, ndi amake wa ana a Zebedeo." 
Matthew27:57 Ndipo pamene panali madzulo, anadza munthu wachuma wa ku Arimatea, dzina lake Yosefe, amene analinso wophunzira wa Yesu;" 
Matthew27:58 yemweyo anapita kwa Pilato, napempha mtembo wa Yesu. Pomwepo Pilato analamula kuti uperekedwe." 
Matthew27:59 Ndipo Yosefe anatenga mtembo, naukulunga m'nsalu yabafuta yoyeretsa," 
Matthew27:60 nauika m'manda ake atsopano, osemedwa m'mwala, nakunkhunizira mwala waukulu pakhomo pa manda, nachokapo." 
Matthew27:61 Ndipo Maria wa Magadala anali pamenepo, ndi Maria winayo, anakhala pansi popenyana ndi mandawo." 
Matthew27:62 Ndipo m'mawa mwake, ndilo dzuwa lotsatana ndi tsiku lokonzera, ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi anasonkhanira kwa Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 nanena, Mfumu, takumbukira ife kuti wonyenga uja anati, pamene anali ndi moyo, Ndidzauka pofika masiku atatu." 
Matthew27:64 Chifukwa chake mulamule kuti asindikize pamandapo, kufikira tsiku lachitatulo, kuti kapena ophunzira ake angadze, nadzamuba Iye, nadzanena kwa anthu, kuti Iye anauka kwa akufa: ndipo chinyengo chomaliza chidzaposa choyambacho." 
Matthew27:65 Pilato anati kwa iwo, Tengani alonda; mukani, kasungeni monga mudziwa." 
Matthew27:66 Ndipo iwo anamuka, nasunga manda, nasindikizapo chizindikiro pamwalapo, iwo pamodzi ndi alondawo." 
Matthew28:1 Ndipo popita tsiku la Sabata, mbandakucha, tsiku lakuyamba la sabata, anadza Maria wa Magadala, ndi Maria winayo, kudzaona manda." 
Matthew28:2 Ndipo onani, panali chivomezi chachikulu; pakuti mngelo wa Ambuye anatsika Kumwamba, nafika kukunkhuniza mwalawo, nakhala pamwamba pake." 
Matthew28:3 Kuonekera kwake kunali ngati mphezi, ndi chovala chake choyeretsa ngati matalala;" 
Matthew28:4 ndipo ndi kuopsa kwake alondawo ananthunthumira, nakhala ngati anthu akufa." 
Matthew28:5 Koma mngelo anayankha, nati kwa akaziwo, Musaope inu; pakuti ndidziwa inu mulikufuna Yesu, amene anapachikidwa." 
Matthew28:6 Iye mulibe muno iai; pakuti anauka, monga ananena. Idzani muno mudzaone malo m'mene anagonamo Ambuye." 
Matthew28:7 Ndipo pitani msanga, muuze ophunzira ake, kuti, Wauka kwa akufa; ndipo onani, akutsogolerani ku Galileya; mudzamuona Iye komweko; onani, ndakuuzani inu." 
Matthew28:8 Ndipo iwo anachoka msanga kumanda, ndi mantha ndi kukondwera kwakukulu, nathamanga kukauza ophunzira ake." 
Matthew28:9 Ndipo onani, Yesu anakomana nao, nanena, Tikuoneni. Ndipo iwo anadza, namgwira Iye mapazi ake, namgwadira." 
Matthew28:10 Pomwepo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Musaope; pitani, kauzeni abale anga kuti amuke ku Galileya, ndipo adzandiona Ine kumeneko." 
Matthew28:11 Ndipo pamene iwo analikupita, onani, ena a alonda anafika kumzinda, nauza ansembe aakulu zonse zimene zinachitidwa." 
Matthew28:12 Ndipo pamene anasonkhana pamodzi ndi akulu, anakhala upo, napatsa asilikaliwo ndalama zambiri," 
Matthew28:13 nati, Kazinenani, kuti ophunzira ake anadza usiku, namuba Uja m'mene ife tinali m'tulo." 
Matthew28:14 Ndipo ngati ichi chidzamveka kwa kazembe, ife tidzamgwetsa mtima, ndipo tidzakukhalitsani opanda nkhawa." 
Matthew28:15 Ndipo iwo analandira ndalamazo, nachita monga anawalangiza: ndipo mbiri iyo inabuka mwa Ayuda, kufikira lero lomwe." 
Matthew28:16 Koma ophunzira khumi ndi mmodziwo anamuka ku Galileya, kuphiri kumene Yesu anawapangira." 
Matthew28:17 Ndipo pamene anamuona Iye, anamlambira; koma ena anakayika." 
Matthew28:18 Ndipo Yesu anadza nalankhula nao, nanena, Mphamvu zonse zapatsidwa kwa Ine Kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi." 
Matthew28:19 Chifukwa chake mukani, phunzitsani anthu a mitundu yonse, ndi kuwabatiza iwo m'dzina la Atate, ndi la Mwana, ndi la Mzimu Woyera:" 
Matthew28:20 ndi kuwaphunzitsa, asunge zinthu zonse zimene ndinakulamulani inu; ndipo onani, Ine ndili pamodzi ndi inu masiku onse, kufikira chimaliziro cha nthawi ya pansi pano." 
Mark1:1 Chiyambi chake cha Uthenga Wabwino wa Yesu Khristu, Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Mark1:2 Monga mwalembedwa m'Yesaya mneneri, Ona, ndituma mthenga wanga patsogolo pa nkhope yanu, amene adzakonza njira yanu." 
Mark1:3 Mau a wofuula m'chipululu, konzani khwalala la Ambuye, lungamitsani njira zake." 
Mark1:4 Yohane anadza nabatiza m'chipululu, nalalikira ubatizo wa kutembenuka mtima wakuloza ku chikhululukiro cha machimo." 
Mark1:5 Ndipo anatuluka a ku dziko lonse la Yudeya, ndi a ku Yerusalemu onse; nadza kwa iye nabatizidwa ndi iye mumtsinje Yordani, powulula machimo ao." 
Mark1:6 Ndipo Yohane anavala ubweya wa ngamira, ndi lamba lachikopa m'chuuno mwake, nadya dzombe ndi uchi wa kuthengo." 
Mark1:7 Ndipo analalikira, kuti, Wondipambana ine mphamvu akudza pambuyo panga, sindiyenera kuwerama kumasula lamba la nsapato zake ine." 
Mark1:8 Ndakubatizani inu ndi madzi; koma Iye adzakubatizani ndi Mzimu Woyera. 
Mark1:9 Ndipo kunali masiku omwewo, Yesu anadza kuchokera ku Nazarete wa ku Galileya, nabatizidwa ndi Yohane m'Yordani." 
Mark1:10 Ndipo pomwepo, alimkukwera potuluka m'madzi, anaona Iye thambo litang'ambika, ndi Mzimu alikutsikira pa Iye monga nkhunda:" 
Mark1:11 ndipo mau anatuluka m'thambo, Mwana wanga wokondedwa ndiwe, mwa Iwe ndikondwera bwino." 
Mark1:12 Ndipo pomwepo Mzimu anamkakamiza kunka kuchipululu. 
Mark1:13 Ndipo anakhala m'chipululu masiku makumi anai woyesedwa ndi Satana; nakhala ndi zilombo, ndipo angelo anamtumikira." 
Mark1:14 Ndipo ataperekedwa Yohane, Yesu anadza ku Galileya, nalalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu," 
Mark1:15 nanena, Nthawi yakwanira, ndipo Ufumu wa Mulungu wayandikira; tembenukani mtima, khulupirirani Uthenga Wabwino." 
Mark1:16 Ndipo pakuyenda m'mbali mwa nyanja ya Galileya, anaona Simoni ndi Andrea, mbale wake wa Simoni, alinkuponya khoka m'nyanja; pakuti anali asodzi." 
Mark1:17 Ndipo Yesu ananena nao, Idzani pambuyo panga, ndipo ndidzakusandutsani inu asodzi a anthu." 
Mark1:18 Ndipo pomwepo anasiya makoka ao, namtsata Iye." 
Mark1:19 Ndipo atapita patsogolo pang'ono, anaona Yakobo, mwana wa Zebedeo, ndi Yohane mbale wake, iwonso anali m'chombo nakonza makoka ao." 
Mark1:20 Ndipo pomwepo anawaitana: ndipo anasiya atate wao Zebedeo m'chombomo pamodzi ndi antchito olembedwa, namtsata." 
Mark1:21 Ndipo iwo analowa m'Kapernao; ndipo pomwepo pa tsiku la Sabata iye analowa m'sunagoge naphunzitsa. 
Mark1:22 Ndipo anazizwa ndi chiphunzitso chake; pakuti anaphunzitsa monga mwini mphamvu, si monga alembi." 
Mark1:23 Ndipo pomwepo panali munthu m'sunagoge mwao ali ndi mzimu wonyansa; ndipo anafuula iye. 
Mark1:24 Kuti, Tili ndi chiyani ife ndi Inu Yesu wa ku Nazarete? Kodi mwadza kudzationonga ife: Ndikudziwani, ndinu Woyerayo wa Mulungu." 
Mark1:25 Ndipo Yesu anaudzudzula, kuti, Khala uli chete, nutuluke mwa iye." 
Mark1:26 Ndipo mzimu wonyansa, pomng'amba, ndi kufuula ndi mau akulu, unatuluka mwa iye." 
Mark1:27 Ndipo anazizwa onse, kotero kuti anafunsana mwa iwo okha, kuti, Ichi nchiyani? Chiphunzitso chatsopano! Ndi mphamvu alamula ingakhale mizimu yonyansa, ndipo imvera Iye." 
Mark1:28 Ndipo mbiri yake inabuka pompaja kudziko lonse la Galileya lozungulirapo. 
Mark1:29 Ndipo pomwepo, potuluka m'sunagoge, iwo analowa m'nyumba ya Simoni ndi Andrea pamodzi ndi Yakobo ndi Yohane." 
Mark1:30 Ndipo mpongozi wake wa Simoni anali gone wodwala malungo; ndipo pomwepo anamuuza za iye: 
Mark1:31 ndipo anadza namgwira dzanja, namuutsa; ndipo malungo anamleka, ndipo anawatumikira iwo." 
Mark1:32 Ndipo madzulo, litalowa dzuwa, anadza nao kwa Iye onse akudwala, ndi akugwidwa ndi ziwanda." 
Mark1:33 Ndipo mudzi wonse unasonkhana pakhomo. 
Mark1:34 Ndipo anachiritsa anthu ambiri akudwala nthenda za mitundumitundu, natulutsa ziwanda zambiri; ndipo sanalole ziwandazo zilankhule, chifukwa zinamdziwa Iye." 
Mark1:35 Ndipo m'mawa mwake anauka usikusiku, natuluka namuka kuchipululu, napemphera kumeneko." 
Mark1:36 Ndipo Simoni ndi anzake anali naye anamtsata," 
Mark1:37 nampeza, nanena naye, Akufunani Inu anthu onse." 
Mark1:38 Ndipo ananena nao, Tiyeni kwina, kumidzi ili pafupi apa, kuti ndilalikire komwekonso; pakuti ndadzera ntchito imene." 
Mark1:39 Ndipo analowa m'masunagoge mwao m'Galileya monse, nalalikira, natulutsa ziwanda." 
Mark1:40 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye wodwala khate, nampempha Iye, namgwadira, ndi kunena ndi Iye, Ngati mufuna mukhoza kundikonza." 
Mark1:41 Ndipo Yesu anagwidwa chifundo, natansa dzanja namkhudza iye, nanena naye, Ndifuna; khala wokonzedwa." 
Mark1:42 Ndipo pomwepo khate linamchoka, ndipo anakonzedwa." 
Mark1:43 Ndipo anamuuzitsa, namtulutsa pomwepo," 
Mark1:44 nanena naye, Ona, usati unene kanthu kwa munthu aliyense: koma muka, ukadzionetse kwa wansembe, nupereke pa makonzedwe ako zimene adalamulira Mose, zikhale mboni kwa iwo." 
Mark1:45 Koma iye anatuluka nayamba kulalikira ndithu, ndi kubukitsa mauwo, kotero kuti Yesu sanadziwa kulowanso poyera m'mudzi, koma anakhala padera m'mapululu; ndipo anadza kwa Iye anthu a kumalo onse." 
Mark2:1 Ndipo polowanso Iye m'Kapernao atapita masiku ena, kunamveka kuti ali m'nyumba." 
Mark2:2 Ndipo ambiri anaunjikana, kotero kuti anasowa malo, ngakhale pakhomo pomwe; ndipo analankhula nao mau." 
Mark2:3 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye otenga munthu wodwala manjenje, wonyamulidwa ndi anthu anai." 
Mark2:4 Ndipo pamene sanakhoze kufika kuli Iye, chifukwa cha khamu la anthu, anasasula chindwi pokhala Iye; ndipo pamene anatha kuliboola, anatsitsa mphasa m'mene alinkugonamo wodwala manjenjeyo." 
Mark2:5 Ndipo Yesu pakuona chikhulupiriro chao ananena ndi wodwala manjenje, Mwana, machimo ako akhululukidwa." 
Mark2:6 Koma anakhalapo ena a alembi akuganizira mumtima mwao," 
Mark2:7 Munthu amene atero bwanji? Achita mwano; akhoza ndani kukhululukira machimo, koma mmodzi, ndiye Mulungu?" 
Mark2:8 Ndipo pomwepo Yesu pozindikira mumtima mwake kuti alikuganizira chomwecho mwa iwo okha, ananena nao, Muganiza bwanji zinthu izi m'mitima yanu?" 
Mark2:9 Chapafupi nchiti, kuuza wodwala manjenje kuti, Machimo ako akhululukidwa; kapena kuti, Nyamuka, senza mphasa yako, nuyende?" 
Mark2:10 Koma kuti mudziwe kuti Mwana wa Munthu ali mwini ulamuliro wakukhululukira machimo pa dziko lapansi (ananena ndi wodwala manjenje)," 
Mark2:11 Ndikuuza iwe, Nyamuka, senza mphasa yako, numuke kwanu." 
Mark2:12 Ndipo ananyamuka iye pomwepo, nasenza mphasa, natuluka pamaso pa iwo onse; kotero kuti anadabwa onse, nalemekeza Mulungu, nanena kuti, Zotere sitinaziona ndi kale lonse." 
Mark2:13 Ndipo anatulukanso kunka m'mbali mwa nyanja; ndipo linadza kwa Iye khamu lonse la anthu, ndipo anawaphunzitsa." 
Mark2:14 Ndipo pakumuka, naona Levi mwana wa Alifeyo alikukhala polandirira msonkho, ndipo ananena naye, Tsata Ine." 
Mark2:15 Ndipo ananyamuka namtsata Iye. Ndipo kunali kuti anakhala pakudya m'nyumba mwake, ndipo amisonkho ndi ochimwa ambiri anakhala pansi pamodzi ndi Yesu ndi ophunzira ake, pakuti anali ambiri, ndipo anamtsata Iye." 
Mark2:16 Ndipo alembi a kwa Afarisi, pakuona kuti alinkudya nao ochimwa ndi amisonkho, ananena ndi ophunzira ake, Uyu akudya ndi kumwa nao amisonkho ndi ochimwa." 
Mark2:17 Ndipo pamene Yesu anamva ichi, ananena nao, Akulimba safuna sing'anga, koma odwala ndiwo; sindinadza kudzaitana olungama, koma ochimwa." 
Mark2:18 Ndipo ophunzira a Yohane ndi Afarisi analinkusala kudya; ndipo anadza, nanena ndi Iye, Bwanji asala kudya ophunzira a Yohane, ndi ophunzira a Afarisi, koma ophunzira anu sasala kudya?" 
Mark2:19 Ndipo Yesu ananena nao, Kodi akhoza kusala kudya anyamata a ukwati pamene mkwati ali pamodzi nao? Pokhala ali naye mkwati pamodzi ndi iwo sakhoza kusala." 
Mark2:20 Koma adzadza masiku, pamene mkwati adzachotsedwa kwa iwo, ndipo pamenepo adzasala kudya tsiku lomwelo." 
Mark2:21 Palibe munthu asokerera chigamba cha nsalu yaiwisi pa chofunda chakale; pena chimene choti chidzakonza chizomolapo, chatsopanocho chizomoka pa chakalecho, ndipo chiboo chikulapo." 
Mark2:22 Ndipo palibe munthu amatsanulira vinyo watsopano m'matumba akale: pena vinyo adzaphulitsa matumba, ndipo aonongeka vinyo, ndi matumba omwe: koma vinyo watsopano amatsanulira m'matumba atsopano." 
Mark2:23 Ndipo kunali kuti anapita Iye pakati pa minda tsiku la Sabata; ndipo ophunzira ake poyenda anayamba kubudula ngala za dzinthu. 
Mark2:24 Ndipo Afarisi ananena ndi Iye, Taona, achitiranji chosaloleka kuchitika tsiku la Sabata?" 
Mark2:25 Ndipo ananena nao, Simunawerenga konse chimene anachichita Davide, pamene adasowa, namva njala, iye ndi iwo amene anali pamodzi naye?" 
Mark2:26 Kuti analowa m'nyumba ya Mulungu masiku a Abiyatara, mkulu wa ansembe, ndipo anadya mikate yoonetsera, yosaloleka kudya ena, koma ansembe okha, ndipo anawapatsanso iwo amene anali naye?" 
Mark2:27 Ndipo ananena nao, Sabata linaikidwa chifukwa cha munthu, si munthu chifukwa cha Sabata;" 
Mark2:28 motero Mwana wa Munthu ali mwini tsiku la Sabata lomwe. 
Mark3:1 Ndipo analowanso m'sunagoge; ndipo munali munthu m'menemo ali ndi dzanja lake lopuwala. 
Mark3:2 Ndipo anamuyang'anira Iye, ngati adzamchiritsa tsiku la Sabata; kuti ammange mlandu." 
Mark3:3 Ndipo ananena ndi munthu ali ndi dzanja lopuwala, Taimirira pakati." 
Mark3:4 Ndipo ananena kwa iwo, Kodi nkuloledwa tsiku la Sabata kuchita zabwino, kapena zoipa? Kupulumutsa moyo kapena kupha? Koma anakhala chete." 
Mark3:5 Ndipo m'mene anawaunguza ndi mkwiyo, ndi kumva chisoni chifukwa cha kuuma kwa mitima yao, ananena kwa munthuyo, Tambasula dzanja lako. Ndipo analitambasula; ndipo linachira dzanja lake." 
Mark3:6 Ndipo Afarisi anatuluka, ndipo pomwepo anamkhalira upo ndi Aherode, wakumuononga Iye." 
Mark3:7 Ndipo Yesu anachokako pamodzi ndi ophunzira ake nanka kunyanja: ndipo linamtsata khamu lalikulu la a ku Galileya, ndi a ku Yudeya," 
Mark3:8 ndi a ku Yerusalemu, ndi a ku Idumeya, ndi a ku tsidya lina la Yordani, ndi a kufupi ku Tiro ndi Sidoni, khamu lalikulu, pakumva zazikuluzo anazichita, linadza kwa Iye." 
Mark3:9 Ndipo anati kwa ophunzira ake, kuti kangalawa kamlinde Iye, chifukwa cha khamulo, kuti angamkanikize Iye," 
Mark3:10 pakuti adawachiritsa ambiri; kotero kuti onse akukhala nazo zowawa anakanikiza Iye, kuti akamkhudze." 
Mark3:11 Ndipo mizimu yonyansa, m'mene inamuona Iye, inamgwadira, nifuula, niti, Inu ndinu Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Mark3:12 Ndipo anailimbitsira mau kuti isamuulule Iye. 
Mark3:13 Ndipo anakwera m'phiri, nadziitanira iwo amene anawafuna Iye mwini; ndipo anadza kwa Iye." 
Mark3:14 Ndipo anaika khumi ndi awiri, kuti akhale ndi Iye, ndi kuti akawatume kulalikira," 
Mark3:15 ndi kuti akhale nao ulamuliro wakutulutsa ziwanda. 
Mark3:16 Ndipo Simoni anamutcha Petro; 
Mark3:17 ndi Yakobo mwana wa Zebedeo, ndi Yohane mbale wake wa Yakobo, iwo anawatcha Boaneje, ndiko kuti, Ana a bingu;" 
Mark3:18 ndi Andrea, ndi Filipo, ndi Bartolomeo, ndi Mateyu, ndi Tomasi, ndi Yakobo mwana wa Alifeyo, ndi Tadeyo, ndi Simoni Mkanani," 
Mark3:19 ndi Yudasi Iskariote, ndiye amene anampereka Iye." 
Mark3:20 Ndipo anthu ambiri anasonkhananso, kotero kuti sanathe iwo konse kudya." 
Mark3:21 Ndipo pamene abale ake anamva, anadza kudzamgwira Iye; pakuti anati adayaluka." 
Mark3:22 Ndipo alembi amene adatsika ku Yerusalemu ananena kuti, Ali naye Belezebulu, ndipo, Ndi mkulu wao wa ziwanda atulutsa ziwanda." 
Mark3:23 Ndipo m'mene adawaitana iwo, ananena nao m'mafanizo, Satana angathe bwanji kutulutsa Satana?" 
Mark3:24 Ndipo ufumu ukagawanika pa uwu wokha, sukhoza kukhazikika." 
Mark3:25 Ndipo nyumba ikagawanika pa iyo yokha, sikhoza kukhazikika nyumbayo," 
Mark3:26 Ndipo Satana akadziukira mwini yekha, nagawanika, sakhoza kukhazikika, koma atsirizika." 
Mark3:27 Komatu palibe munthu akhoza kulowa m'nyumba ya mwini mphamvu, ndi kufunkha akatundu ake, koma athange wamanga mwini mphamvuyo; ndipo pamenepo adzafunkha za m'nyumba mwake." 
Mark3:28 Indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Adzakhululukidwa machimo onse a ana a anthu, ndi zamwano zilizonse adzachita mwano nazo;" 
Mark3:29 koma aliyense adzachitira Mzimu Woyera mwano alibe kukhululukidwa nthawi yonse, koma anapalamuladi tchimo losatha;" 
Mark3:30 pakuti adanena, Ali ndi mzimu wonyansa." 
Mark3:31 Ndipo anadza amake ndi abale ake; naima kunja, namtumira uthenga kumuitana." 
Mark3:32 Ndipo anthu ambiri anakhala pansi pomzinga; nanena kwa Iye, Onani, amanu ndi abale anu ali kunja akufunani Inu." 
Mark3:33 Ndipo anawayankha nanena, Amai wanga ndi abale anga ndani?" 
Mark3:34 Ndipo anawaunguzaunguza iwo akumzingawo, nanena, Taonani, amai wanga ndi abale anga." 
Mark3:35 Pakuti aliyense achita chifuniro cha Mulungu, yemweyo ndiye mbale wanga, ndi mlongo, ndi amai." 
Mark4:1 Ndipo anayambanso kuphunzitsa pambali pa nyanja. Ndipo anasonkhana kwa Iye khamu lalikulukulu, kotero kuti analowa Iye mungalawa, nakhala m'nyanja; ndipo khamu lonse linakhala pamtunda m'mbali mwa nyanja." 
Mark4:2 Ndipo anawaphunzitsa zinthu zambiri m'mafanizo, nanena nao m'chiphunzitso chake," 
Mark4:3 Mverani: taonani, wofesa anatuluka kukafesa;" 
Mark4:4 ndipo kunali, m'kufesa kwake, zina zinagwa m'mbali mwa njira, ndi mbalame zinadza ndi kuzitha kudya." 
Mark4:5 Ndipo zina zinagwa pa nthaka yathanthwe, pamene panalibe nthaka yambiri; ndipo pomwepo zinamera, chifukwa zinalibe nthaka yakuya;" 
Mark4:6 ndipo litakwera dzuwa zinapserera; ndipo popeza zinalibe mizu zinakhwinyata. 
Mark4:7 Ndipo zina zinagwa paminga, ndipo minga inakula, nizitsamwitsa, ndipo sizinabala zipatso." 
Mark4:8 Ndipo zina zinagwa m'nthaka yabwino, ndipo zinapatsa zipatso, ndi kukula ndi kuchuluka; ndipo zinabala kupindula makumi atatu, ndi makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ndi makumi khumi." 
Mark4:9 Ndipo ananena, Amene ali nao makutu akumva amve." 
Mark4:10 Ndipo pamene anakhala pa yekha, iwo amene anali pafupi ndi Iye pamodzi ndi khumi ndi awiriwo anamfunsa za mafanizo." 
Mark4:11 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Kwa inu kwapatsidwa chinsinsi cha Ufumu wa Mulungu; koma kwa iwo ali kunja zonse zichitidwa m'mafanizo;" 
Mark4:12 kuti kupenya apenye, koma asazindikire; ndipo kumva amve, koma asadziwitse; kuti pena angatembenuke, ndi kukhululukidwa." 
Mark4:13 Ndipo ananena nao, Simudziwa kodi fanizo ili? Mukazindikira bwanji mafanizo onse?" 
Mark4:14 Wofesa afesa mau. 
Mark4:15 Ndipo iwo ndiwo a m'mbali mwa njira mofesedwamo mau; ndipo pamene anamva, pomwepo akudza Satana nachotsa mau ofesedwa mwa iwo." 
Mark4:16 Ndipo momwemonso iwo ndiwo amene afesedwa pathanthwe, atamva mau, awalandira pomwepo ndi kusekera;" 
Mark4:17 ndipo alibe mizu mwa iwo okha, koma akhala kanthawi; pamenepo pakudza masautso kapena mazunzo chifukwa cha mau, pomwepo akhumudwa." 
Mark4:18 Ndipo ena ndiwo akufesedwa kuminga; iwo ndiwo amene adamva mau," 
Mark4:19 ndipo malabadiro a dziko lapansi, ndi chinyengo cha chuma, ndi kulakalaka kwa zinthu zina, zilowamo, zitsamwitsa mau, ndipo akhala opanda chipatso." 
Mark4:20 Ndipo iwo ofesedwa pa nthaka yabwino ndiwo oterewa akumva mau, nawalandira, nabala zipatso zakupindula makumi atatu, ndi makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ndi makumi khumi." 
Mark4:21 Ndipo ananena ndi iwo, Kodi atenga nyali kuti akaivundikire mbiya, kapena akaiike pansi pa kama, osati kuti akaiike pa choikapo chake?" 
Mark4:22 Pakuti kulibe kanthu kobisika, koma kuti kaonetsedwe; kapena kulibe kanthu kanakhala kam'tseri, koma kuti kakaululidwe." 
Mark4:23 Ngati munthu ali nao makutu akumva, amve." 
Mark4:24 Ndipo ananena nao, Yang'anirani chimene mukumva; ndi muyeso umene muyesera nao udzayesedwa kwa inu; ndipo kudzaonjezedwa kwa inu." 
Mark4:25 Pakuti kwa iye amene ali nako kanthu, kadzapatsidwa; ndipo kwa iye amene alibe kanthu, kadzachotsedwa ngakhale kanthu kalikonse ali nako." 
Mark4:26 Ndipo ananena, Ufumu wa Mulungu uli wotero, monga ngati munthu akataya mbeu panthaka;" 
Mark4:27 nakagona ndi kuuka, usiku ndi usana, ndipo mbeu zikamera, ndi kukula, iye sadziwa umo zichitira." 
Mark4:28 Nthaka ibala zipatso zake yokha; uyamba mmera, zitsata ngala, pamenepo maso okhwima m'ngalamo." 
Mark4:29 Pakutcha zipatso, pamenepo atenga chisenga, pakuti nthawi yakumweta yafika." 
Mark4:30 Ndipo ananena, Tidzafaniziranji Ufumu wa Mulungu? Kapena tidzaulinganiza ndi fanizo lotani?" 
Mark4:31 Ngati mbeu yampiru, imene ikafesedwa panthaka, ingakhale ichepa ndi mbeu zonse za padziko," 
Mark4:32 koma pamene ifesedwa, imera nikula koposa zitsamba zonse, nichita nthambi zazikulu; kotero kuti mbalame za m'mlengalenga zikhoza kubindikira mumthunzi mwake." 
Mark4:33 Ndipo ndi mafanizo otere ambiri analankhula nao mau, monga anakhoza kumva;" 
Mark4:34 ndipo sanalankhule nao wopanda fanizo: koma m'tseri anatanthauzira zonse kwa ophunzira ake. 
Mark4:35 Ndipo dzuwa lomwelo, pofika madzulo, ananena kwa iwo, Tiolokere tsidya lina." 
Mark4:36 Ndipo posiya khamulo anamtenga apite nao, monga momwe anali, mungalawa. Ndipo panali ngalawa zina pamodzi ndi Iye." 
Mark4:37 Ndipo panauka namondwe wamkulu wa mphepo, ndi mafunde anagavira mungalawa, motero kuti ngalawa inayamba kudzala." 
Mark4:38 Ndipo Iye mwini anali kutsigiro, nagona tulo pamtsamiro; ndipo anamuutsa Iye nanena kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, kodi simusamala kuti titayika ife?" 
Mark4:39 Ndipo anauka, nadzudzula mphepo, nati kwa nyanja, kuti, Tonthola, khala bata. Ndipo mphepo inaleka, ndipo kunagwa bata lalikulu." 
Mark4:40 Ndipo ananena nao, Muchitiranji mantha? Kufikira tsopano mulibe chikhulupiriro kodi?" 
Mark4:41 Ndipo iwo anachita mantha akulu, nanenana wina ndi mnzake, Uyu ndani nanga, kuti ingakhale mphepo ndi nyanja zimvera Iye?" 
Mark5:1 Ndipo anafika tsidya lina la nyanja, kudziko la Agerasa." 
Mark5:2 Ndipo pamene adatuluka mungalawa, pomwepo anakomana naye munthu wotuluka kumanda wa mzimu wonyansa," 
Mark5:3 amene anayesa nyumba yake kumanda; ndipo palibe munthu anakhoza kummanganso, inde ngakhale ndi unyolo;" 
Mark5:4 pakuti ankamangidwa kawirikawiri ndi matangadza ndi maunyolo, ndipo anamwetula maunyolo, naduladula matangadza; ndipo palibe munthu anali ndi mphamvu yakumfuya." 
Mark5:5 Ndipo masiku onse, usiku ndi usana, anakhala m'manda ndi m'mapiri, nafuula, nadzitematema ndi miyala." 
Mark5:6 Ndipo pakuona Yesu kutali, anathamanga, namgwadira Iye;" 
Mark5:7 ndipo anafuula ndi mau olimba, nanena, Ndili ndi chiyani ine ndi Inu, Yesu Mwana wa Mulungu Wamkulukulu? Ndikulumbirirani pa Mulungu, msandizunze." 
Mark5:8 Pakuti ananena kwa iye, Tuluka iwe, mzimu wonyansa, kwa munthuyu." 
Mark5:9 Ndipo anamfunsa, Dzina lako ndani? Ndipo ananena kwa Iye, Dzina langa ndine Legio; chifukwa tili ambiri." 
Mark5:10 Ndipo anampempha Iye kwambiri kuti asaitulutsire kunja kwake kwa dziko. 
Mark5:11 Ndipo panali pamenepo gulu lalikulu la nkhumba zilinkudya kuphiri. 
Mark5:12 Ndipo inampempha Iye, kuti, Titumizeni ife mu nkhumbazo, kuti tilowe mu izo." 
Mark5:13 Ndipo anailola. Ndipo mizimu yonyansa inatuluka, nilowa mu nkhumba; ndipo gulu linatsika liwiro potsetsereka ndi kulowa m'nyanja, ndizo ngati zikwi ziwiri; ndipo zinatsamwa m'nyanja." 
Mark5:14 Ndipo akuziweta anathawa, nauza m'mudzi, ndi kuminda. Ndipo anadza kudzaona chochitikacho." 
Mark5:15 Ndipo anadza kwa Yesu, napenya wogwidwa ziwandayo alikukhala pansi, wovala ndi wa nzeru zake zabwino, ndiye amene anali ndi legio; ndipo anaopa iwo." 
Mark5:16 Ndipo adapenyawo adawafotokozera umo anachitira ndi wogwidwa ziwandayo, ndi za nkhumbazo." 
Mark5:17 Ndipo anayamba kumpempha Iye kuti achoke m'malire ao. 
Mark5:18 Ndipo m'mene Iye analikulowa mungalawa, anampempha waziwanda uja kuti akhale ndi Iye." 
Mark5:19 Ndipo sanamlole, koma ananena naye, Muka kwanu kwa abale ako, nuwauze zinthu zazikulu anakuchitira Ambuye, ndi kuti anakuchitira chifundo." 
Mark5:20 Ndipo anamuka nayamba kulalikira ku Dekapoli zinthu zazikulu Yesu adamchitira iye; ndipo anthu onse anazizwa. 
Mark5:21 Ndipo pamene Yesu anaolokanso mungalawa tsidya lina, khamu lalikulu linasonkhana kwa Iye; ndipo Iye anali pambali pa nyanja." 
Mark5:22 Ndipo anadzako mmodzi wa akulu a sunagoge, dzina lake Yairo; ndipo pakuona Iye, anagwada pa mapazi ake, nampempha kwambiri," 
Mark5:23 nanena, kuti, Kamwana kanga kabuthu kalinkutsirizika; ndikupemphani Inu mufikeko, muike manja anu pa iko, kuti kapulumuke, ndi kukhala ndi moyo." 
Mark5:24 Ndipo ananka naye pamodzi; ndipo khamu lalikulu linamtsata Iye, ndi kumkanikiza Iye." 
Mark5:25 Ndipo munthu wamkazi amene anali ndi nthenda yachidwalire zaka khumi ndi ziwiri," 
Mark5:26 ndipo anamva zowawa zambiri ndi asing'anga ambiri, nalipira zonse anali nazo osachira pang'ono ponse, koma makamaka nthenda yake idakula," 
Mark5:27 m'mene iye anamva mbiri yake ya Yesu, anadza m'khamu kumbuyo kwake, nakhudza chovala chake." 
Mark5:28 Pakuti ananena iye, Ngati ndikakhudza ngakhale zovala zake ndidzapulumutsidwa." 
Mark5:29 Ndipo pomwepo kasupe wa nthenda yake adaphwa; ndipo anazindikira m'thupi kuti anachiritsidwa chivutiko chake. 
Mark5:30 Ndipo pomwepo Yesu, pamene anazindikira mwa Iye yekha kuti mphamvu idatuluka mwa Iye, anapotoloka m'khamu, nanena, Ndani anakhudza zovala zanga?" 
Mark5:31 Ndipo ophunzira ake ananena kwa Iye, Muona kuti khamu lilikukanikiza Inu, ndipo munena kodi, Wandikhudza ndani?" 
Mark5:32 Ndipo Iye anaunguzaunguza kumuona iye amene adachita ichi. 
Mark5:33 Koma mkaziyo anachita mantha, ndi kunthunthumira, podziwa chimene anamchitira iye, nadza, namgwadira, namuuza choona chonse." 
Mark5:34 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Mwana wamkaziwe, chikhulupiriro chako chakupulumutsa; muka mumtendere, nukhale wochira chivutiko chako." 
Mark5:35 M'mene iye ali chilankhulire, anafika a kunyumba ya mkulu wa sunagoge, nanena, kuti, Mwana wako wafa; uvutiranjinso Mphunzitsi?" 
Mark5:36 Koma Yesu wosasamala mau olankhulidwawo, ananena kwa mkulu wa sunagoge, Usaope, khulupirira kokha." 
Mark5:37 Ndipo sanalole munthu yense kutsagana naye, koma Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane mbale wake wa Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Ndipo anafika kunyumba kwake kwa mkulu wa sunagoge; ndipo anaona chipiringu, ndi ochita maliro, ndi akukuwa ambiri." 
Mark5:39 Ndipo m'mene atalowa, ananena nao, Mubuma ndi kulira bwanji? Mwana sanafe, koma ali m'tulo." 
Mark5:40 Ndipo anamseka Iye pwepwete. Koma Iye anawatulutsa onse, natenga atate wa mwana, ndi amake, ndi ajawo anali naye, nalowa m'mene munali mwanayo." 
Mark5:41 Ndipo anagwira dzanja lake la mwana, nanena kwa iye, Talita koumi, ndiko kunena posandulika, Buthu, ndinena ndi iwe, Uka." 
Mark5:42 Ndipo pomwepo buthulo linauka, niliyenda; pakuti linali la zaka khumi ndi ziwiri. Ndipo anadabwa pomwepo ndi kudabwa kwakukulu." 
Mark5:43 Ndipo anawalamulira kwambiri kuti asadziwe ichi munthu mmodzi, nawauza kuti ampatse iye kudya." 
Mark6:1 Ndipo Iye anatuluka kumeneko; nafika kudziko la kwao; ndipo ophunzira ake anamtsata. 
Mark6:2 Ndipo pofika tsiku la Sabata, anayamba kuphunzitsa m'sunagoge; ndipo ambiri anamva Iye, nazizwa, nanena, Uyu adazitenga kuti izi? Nzeru yopatsidwa kwa munthuyu njotani, ndi zamphamvu zotere zochitidwa ndi manja ake?" 
Mark6:3 Si mmisiri wa mitengo uyu, mwana wa Maria, mbale wao wa Yakobo, ndi Yose, ndi Yudasi, ndi Simoni? Ndipo alongo ake sali nafe pano kodi? Ndipo anakhumudwa ndi Iye." 
Mark6:4 Ndipo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Mneneri sakhala wopanda ulemu, koma m'dziko la kwao ndimo, ndi pakati pa abale ake, ndi m'nyumba yake." 
Mark6:5 Ndipo kumeneko sanakhoze Iye kuchita zamphamvu konse, koma kuti anaika manja ake pa anthu odwala owerengeka, nawachiritsa." 
Mark6:6 Ndipo anazizwa chifukwa cha kusakhulupirira kwao. Ndipo anayendayenda m'midzi yozungulirapo, naphunzitsa." 
Mark6:7 Ndipo anadziitanira khumi ndi awiriwo, nayamba kuwatumiza iwo awiriawiri; nawapatsa mphamvu pa mizimu yonyansa;" 
Mark6:8 ndipo anawauza kuti asatenge kanthu ka paulendo, koma ndodo yokha; asatenge mkate, kapena thumba, kapena ndalama m'lamba lao;"
