Mark6:9 koma avale nsapato; ndipo anati, Musavale malaya awiri." 
Mark6:10 Ndipo ananena nao, Kumene kulikonse mukalowa m'nyumba, khalani komweko kufikira mukachokako." 
Mark6:11 Ndipo pamalo ponse sakulandirani, kapena kumvera inu, pakuchoka kumeneko, sansani fumbi lili kumapazi anu, likhale mboni ya kwa iwo." 
Mark6:12 Ndipo anatuluka nalalikira kuti anthu atembenuke mitima. 
Mark6:13 Ndipo anatulutsa ziwanda zambiri, nadzoza mafuta anthu ambiri akudwala, nawachiritsa." 
Mark6:14 Ndipo mfumu Herode anamva izi; pakuti dzina lake lidamveka; ndipo ananena, kuti, Yohane Mbatizi wauka kwa akufa, ndipo chifukwa chake mphamvu izi zichitachita mwa Iye." 
Mark6:15 Koma ena ananena, kuti, Ndiye Eliya. Anati enanso, Ndiye mneneri, monga ngati mmodzi wa aneneriwo." 
Mark6:16 Koma Herode pamene anamva, ananena, Yohane amene ndamdula mutu, wauka iyeyo." 
Mark6:17 Pakuti Herode, mwini yekha, adatuma anthu namgwira Yohane, nammanga m'nyumba yandende, chifukwa cha Herodiasi, mkazi wa Filipo mbale wake; chifukwa adamkwatira iye." 
Mark6:18 Pakuti Yohane adanena kwa Herode, Si kuloledwa kwa inu kukhala naye mkazi wa mbale wanu." 
Mark6:19 Ndipo Herodiasi anamuda, nafuna kumupha; koma sanakhoze;" 
Mark6:20 pakuti Herode anaopa Yohane, podziwa kuti ali munthu wolungama ndi woyera mtima, ndipo anamsunga iye. Ndipo pamene anamva iye anathedwa nzeru, nakondwa kumva iye." 
Mark6:21 Ndipo pamene panafika tsiku loyenera, tsiku la kubadwa kwake kwa Herode, iye anawakonzera phwando akulu ake ndi akazembe ake ndi anthu omveka a ku Galileya;" 
Mark6:22 ndipo pamene mwana wamkazi wa Herodiasi analowa yekha navina, anakondwetsa Herode ndi iwo akukhala naye pachakudya; ndipo mfumuyo inati kwa buthulo, Tapempha kwa ine chilichonse uchifuna, ndidzakupatsa iwe." 
Mark6:23 Ndipo anamlumbirira iye, kuti, Chilichonse ukandipempha ndidzakupatsa, kungakhale kukugawira ufumu wanga." 
Mark6:24 Ndipo anatuluka, nati kwa amake, Ndidzapempha chiyani? Ndipo iye anati, Mutu wake wa Yohane Mbatizi." 
Mark6:25 Ndipo pomwepo analowa m'mangum'mangu kwa mfumu, napempha kuti, Ndifuna kuti mundipatse tsopano apa, mutu wake wa Yohane Mbatizi mumbale." 
Mark6:26 Ndipo mfumu inamva chisoni chachikulu; koma chifukwa cha malumbiro ake, ndi cha iwo akukhala pachakudya, sanafune kumkaniza." 
Mark6:27 Ndipo pomwepo mfumu inatuma mnyamata, namlamulira akatenge mutu wake; ndipo iye anamuka namdula mutu m'nyumba yandende;" 
Mark6:28 natengera mutu wake mumbale, naupereka kwa buthulo; ndipo buthu linaupereka kwa amake." 
Mark6:29 Ndipo m'mene ophunzira ake anamva, anadza nanyamula mtembo wake nauika m'manda." 
Mark6:30 Ndipo atumwi anasonkhana kwa Yesu; namuuza zilizonse adazichita, ndi zonse adaziphunzitsa." 
Mark6:31 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, idzani inu nokha padera ku malo achipululu, mupumule kamphindi. Pakuti akudza ndi akuchoka anali piringupiringu, ndipo analibe nthawi yokwanira kudya." 
Mark6:32 Ndipo anachokera m'ngalawa kunka kumalo achipululu padera. 
Mark6:33 Ndipo anthu anawaona alikumuka, ndipo ambiri anawazindikira, nathamangira limodzi kumeneko pamtunda, ochokera m'midzi monse, nawapitirira." 
Mark6:34 Ndipo anatuluka Iye, naona khamu lalikulu la anthu, nagwidwa chifundo ndi iwo, chifukwa anali ngati nkhosa zopanda mbusa; ndipo anayamba kuwaphunzitsa zinthu zambiri." 
Mark6:35 Ndipo pamene dzuwa lidapendeka ndithu, anadza kwa Iye ophunzira ake, nanena, Malo ano nga chipululu, ndi dzuwa lapendeka ndithu;" 
Mark6:36 muwauze kuti amuke, alowe kumilaga ndi kumidzi yozungulira, akadzigulire okha kanthu kakudya." 
Mark6:37 Koma Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Apatseni kudya ndinu. Ndipo iwo ananena naye, Kodi tikapita ife ndi kugula mikate ya pa marupiya atheka mazana awiri, ndi kuwapatsa kudya?" 
Mark6:38 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, kuti, Muli nayo mikate ingati? Pitani, mukaone. Ndipo m'mene anadziwa ananena, Isanu, ndi nsomba ziwiri." 
Mark6:39 Ndipo anawalamulira kuti akhalitse pansi onse magulumagulu pamsipu. 
Mark6:40 Ndipo anakhala pansi mabungwemabungwe a makumi khumi, ndi a makumi asanu." 
Mark6:41 Ndipo Iye anatenga mikate isanuyo ndi nsomba ziwirizo nayang'ana kumwamba, nadalitsa, nagawa mikate; napatsa kwa ophunzira kuti apereke kwa iwo; ndi nsomba ziwiri anagawira onsewo." 
Mark6:42 Ndipo anadya iwo onse, nakhuta." 
Mark6:43 Ndipo anatola makombo, madengu khumi ndi iwiri, ndiponso za nsomba." 
Mark6:44 Ndipo amene anadya mikate iyo anali amuna zikwi zisanu. 
Mark6:45 Ndipo pomwepo Iye anakakamiza ophunzira ake alowe m'ngalawa, ndi kumtsogolera kutsidya lija ku Betsaida, m'mene Iye yekha alimkuuza khamulo kuti amuke." 
Mark6:46 Ndipo atalawirana nao, anachoka Iye, nalowa m'phiri kukapemphera." 
Mark6:47 Ndipo pofika madzulo ngalawa inali pakati pa nyanja, ndi Iye yekha pamtunda." 
Mark6:48 Ndipo pakuwaona ali kuvutidwa ndi kupalasa, pakuti mphepo inadza nikomana nao, pa ulonda wachinai wa usiku Iye anadza kwa iwo, alikuyenda pamwamba pa nyanja; nati awapitirire;" 
Mark6:49 koma iwo, pamene anamuona alikuyenda panyanja, anayesa kuti ndi mzukwa, nafuula:" 
Mark6:50 pakuti iwo onse anamuona Iye, nanthunthumira. Koma pomwepo anawalankhula nanena nao, Limbani mtima; ndinetu, musaope." 
Mark6:51 Ndipo Iye anakwera, nalowa kwa iwo m'ngalawa, ndipo mphepo inaleka; ndipo anadabwa kwakukulu mwa iwo okha;" 
Mark6:52 pakuti sanazindikire za mikateyo, koma mitima yao inauma." 
Mark6:53 Ndipo ataoloka iwo, anafika pamtunda ku Genesarete, nakocheza padooko." 
Mark6:54 Ndipo pamene anatuluka m'ngalawa anamzindikira pomwepo," 
Mark6:55 nathamangira dziko lonselo nayamba kunyamula anthu odwala pa mphasa zao, kufika nao kumene anamva kuti analiko Iye." 
Mark6:56 Ndipo kumene konse adalowa Iye m'midzi, kapena m'mizinda, kapena m'milaga, anthu anagoneka odwala pamisika, nampempha Iye kuti akakhudze ngakhale mphonje yokha ya chovala chake; ndipo onse amene anamkhudza anachiritsidwa." 
Mark7:1 Ndipo anasonkhana kwa Iye Afarisi, ndi alembi ena, akuchokera ku Yerusalemu," 
Mark7:2 ndipo anaona kuti ophunzira ake ena anadya mkate ndi m'manja mwakuda, ndiwo osasamba." 
Mark7:3 Pakuti Afarisi, ndi Ayuda onse sakudya osasamba m'manja ao, kuti asungire mwambo wa akulu;" 
Mark7:4 ndipo pakuchoka kumsika, sakudya osasamba m'thupi; ndipo zilipo zinthu zina zambiri anazilandira kuzisunga, ndizo matsukidwe a zikho, ndi miphika, ndi zotengera zamkuwa." 
Mark7:5 Ndipo Afarisi ndi alembi anamfunsa Iye, kuti, Bwanji ophunzira anu satsata mwambo wa akulu, koma akudya mkate wao ndi m'manja mwakuda?" 
Mark7:6 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Yesaya ananenera bwino za inu onyenga, monga mwalembedwa, Anthu awa andilemekeza Ine ndi milomo yao, koma mtima wao ukhala kutali ndi Ine." 
Mark7:7 Koma andilambira Iye kwachabe, ndi kuphunzitsa maphunzitso, malangizo a anthu." 
Mark7:8 Musiya lamulo la Mulungu, nimusunga mwambo wa anthu." 
Mark7:9 Ndipo ananena nao, Bwino mukaniza lamulo la Mulungu, kuti musunge mwambo wanu." 
Mark7:10 Pakuti Mose anati, Lemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako; ndipo iye wakunenera zoipa atate wake kapena amai wake, afe ndithu;" 
Mark7:11 koma inu munena, Munthu akati kwa atate wake, kapena amai wake, Korban, ndiko kuti Mtulo, chimene ukadathandizidwa nacho ndi ine," 
Mark7:12 simulolanso kumchitira kanthu atate wake kapena amai wake; 
Mark7:13 muyesa achabe mau a Mulungu mwa mwambo wanu, umene munaupereka: ndi zinthu zotere zambiri muzichita." 
Mark7:14 Ndipo anadziitaniranso khamu la anthu, nanena nao, Mverani Ine nonsenu, ndipo dziwitsani:" 
Mark7:15 kulibe kanthu kunja kwa munthu kukalowa mwa iye, kangathe kumdetsa: koma zinthu zakutuluka mwa munthu, ndizo zakumdetsa munthu." 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Ndipo m'mene Iye adalowa m'nyumba kusiyana ndi khamulo, ophunzira ake anamfunsa Iye fanizolo." 
Mark7:18 Ndipo ananena nao, Mutero inunso opanda nzeru kodi? Kodi simuzindikira kuti kanthu kalikonse kochokera kunja kukalowa mwa munthu, sikangathe kumdetsa iye;" 
Mark7:19 chifukwa sikalowa mumtima mwake, koma m'mimba mwake, ndipo katulukira kuthengo? Ndipo potero anayeretsa zakudya zonse." 
Mark7:20 Ndipo anati, Chotuluka mwa munthu ndicho chidetsa munthu." 
Mark7:21 Pakuti m'kati mwake mwa mitima ya anthu, mutuluka maganizo oipa, zachiwerewere," 
Mark7:22 zakuba, zakupha, zachigololo, masiriro, zoipa, chinyengo, chinyanso, diso loipa, mwano, kudzikuza, kupusa:" 
Mark7:23 zoipa izi zonse zituluka m'kati, nizidetsa munthu." 
Mark7:24 Ndipo Iye anauka nachoka kumeneko, nanka ku maiko a ku Tiro ndi Sidoni. Ndipo analowa m'nyumba, nafuna kuti asadziwe anthu; ndipo sanakhoze kubisika." 
Mark7:25 Koma pomwepo mkazi, kabuthu kake kanali ndi mzimu wonyansa, pamene anamva za Iye, anadza, nagwa pa mapazi ake." 
Mark7:26 Koma mkaziyo anali Mgriki, mtundu wake Msiro-Fenisiya. Ndipo anampempha Iye kuti atulutse chiwanda m'mwana wake." 
Mark7:27 Ndipo ananena naye, Baleka, athange akhuta ana; pakuti si kwabwino kuti titenge mkate wa ana, ndi kuutayira tiagalu." 
Mark7:28 Koma iye anavomera nanena ndi Iye, Ine Ambuye; tingakhale tiagalu ta pansi pa gome tikudyako nyenyeswa za ana." 
Mark7:29 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Chifukwa cha mau amene, muka; chiwanda chatuluka m'mwana wako wamkazi." 
Mark7:30 Ndipo anachoka kunka kunyumba kwake, napeza mwana atamgoneka pakama, ndi chiwanda chitatuluka." 
Mark7:31 Ndipo anatulukanso m'maiko a ku Tiro, nadzera pakati pa Sidoni, kufikira ku nyanja ya Galileya, ndi kupyola pakati pa maiko a ku Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Ndipo anadza naye kwa Iye munthu wogontha, ndi wachibwibwi; ndipo anampempha Iye kuti aike dzanja pa iye." 
Mark7:33 Ndipo anampatula pa khamu la anthu pa yekha, nalonga zala zake m'makutu mwake, nalavula malovu, nakhudza lilime lake:" 
Mark7:34 nagadamira kumwamba, nausa moyo, nanena naye, Efata, ndiko, Tatseguka." 
Mark7:35 Ndipo makutu ake anatsegula, ndi chomangira lilime lake chinamasulidwa, ndipo analankhula chilunjikire." 
Mark7:36 Ndipo anawalamulira kuti asauze munthu aliyense; koma monga momwe Iye anawalamulitsa momwenso makamaka analalikira kopambana. 
Mark7:37 Ndipo anadabwa kwakukulukulu, nanena, Wachita Iye zonse bwino; angakhale ogontha awamvetsa, ndi osalankhula awalankhulitsa." 
Mark8:1 Masiku ajawo pakukhalanso khamu lalikulu la anthu, ndipo analibe kanthu kakudya, Iye anadziitanira ophunzira ake, nanena nao," 
Mark8:2 Ndimva nalo chifundo khamulo, chifukwa ali ndi Ine chikhalire masiku atatu, ndipo alibe kanthu kakudya:" 
Mark8:3 ndipo ngati ndiwauza iwo amuke kwao osadya kanthu, adzakomoka panjira; ndipo ena a iwo achokera kutali." 
Mark8:4 Ndipo ophunzira ake anamyankha Iye, kuti, Munthu adzatha kutenga kuti mikate yakukhutitsa anthu awa m'chipululu muno?" 
Mark8:5 Ndipo anawafunsa, Muli nayo mikate ingati? Ndipo anati, Isanu ndi iwiri." 
Mark8:6 Ndipo analamulira anthu a khamulo akhale pansi; natenga mikate isanu ndi iwiriyo, nayamika, nanyema, napatsa ophunzira ake, kuti apereke kwa iwo; ndipo anapereka kwa khamulo." 
Mark8:7 Ndipo anali nato tinsomba towerengeka; ndipo Iye anatidalitsa, nati atipereke itonso." 
Mark8:8 Ndipo anadya nakhuta; ndipo anatola makombo madengu asanu ndi awiri. 
Mark8:9 Ndipo iwo anali ngati zikwi zinai; ndipo Iye analawirana nao. 
Mark8:10 Ndipo pomwepo analowa m'ngalawa ndi ophunzira ake, nafika ku mbali ya ku Dalamanuta." 
Mark8:11 Ndipo Afarisi anatuluka, nayamba kufunsana naye, ndi kufuna kwa Iye chizindikiro chochokera Kumwamba, namuyesa Iye." 
Mark8:12 Ndipo anausitsa moyo m'mzimu wake, nanena, Anthu a mbadwo uno afunafuna chizindikiro bwanji? Indetu ndinena kwa inu, ngati chizindikiro chidzapatsidwa kwa mbadwo uno!" 
Mark8:13 Ndipo anawasiya iwo, nalowanso m'ngalawa, nachoka kunka ku tsidya lija." 
Mark8:14 Ndipo ophunzira adaiwala kutenga mikate, ndipo analibe mkate m'ngalawa koma umodzi wokha." 
Mark8:15 Ndipo Iye anawalamula, nanena, Yang'anirani, penyani kuti mupewe chotupitsa mkate cha Afarisi, ndi chotupitsa mkate cha Herode." 
Mark8:16 Ndipo anatsutsana wina ndi mnzake, nanena kuti, Tilibe mikate." 
Mark8:17 Ndipo Yesu pamene anazindikira, ananena nao, Bwanji mutsutsana chifukwa mulibe mkate? Kodi kufikira tsopano simuzindikira, nisimudziwitsa? Kodi muli nayo mitima yanu youma?" 
Mark8:18 Pokhala nao maso simupenya kodi? Ndi pokhala nao makutu simukumva kodi? Ndipo simukumbukira kodi? 
Mark8:19 Pamene ndinawagawira anthu zikwi zisanu mikate isanu ija, munatola madengu angati odzala ndi makombo? Ananena naye, Khumi ndi iwiri." 
Mark8:20 Ndipo mikate isanu ndi iwiri kwa anthu zikwi zinai, munatola madengu angati odzala ndi makombo? Ndipo ananena naye, Asanu ndi awiri." 
Mark8:21 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Simudziwitsa ngakhale tsopano kodi?" 
Mark8:22 Ndipo anadza ku Betsaida. Ndipo anadza naye kwa Iye munthu wakhungu, nampempha Iye kuti amkhudze." 
Mark8:23 Ndipo anamgwira dzanja munthu wakhunguyo, natulukira naye kunja kwa mudzi; ndipo atamthira malovu m'maso mwake, naika manja pa iye, anamfunsa, Uona kanthu kodi?" 
Mark8:24 Ndipo anakweza maso, nanena, Ndiona anthu; pakuti ndiwapenya ayendayenda ngati mitengo." 
Mark8:25 Pamenepo anaikanso manja m'maso mwake; ndipo anapenyetsa, nachiritsidwa, naona zonse mbee." 
Mark8:26 Ndipo anamtumiza amuke kwao, nanena, Usalowe konse m'mudzi." 
Mark8:27 Ndipo anatuluka Yesu, ndi ophunzira ake, nalowa kumidzi ya ku Kesareya-Filipi; ndipo panjira anafunsa ophunzira ake, nanena nao, Kodi anthu ananena kuti Ine ndine yani?" 
Mark8:28 Ndipo ananena, nati, Yohane Mbatizi; ndi ena, Eliya; koma ena, Mmodzi wa aneneri." 
Mark8:29 Ndipo Iye anawafunsa, Koma inu munena kuti ndine yani? Petro anayankha nanena naye, Ndinu Khristu." 
Mark8:30 Ndipo anawauzitsa iwo kuti asanene kwa munthu mmodzi za Iye. 
Mark8:31 Ndipo anayamba kuwaphunzitsa, kuti kuyenera kuti Mwana wa Munthu akamve zowawa zambiri, nakakanidwe ndi akulu ndi ansembe aakulu, ndi alembi, nakaphedwe, ndipo mkucha wake akauke." 
Mark8:32 Ndipo mauwo ananena poyera. Ndipo Petro anamtenga Iye, nayamba kumdzudzula." 
Mark8:33 Koma Iye anapotoloka, napenya ophunzira ake, namdzudzula Petro, nanena, Choka, pita kumbuyo kwanga, Satana iwe; popeza susamalira zinthu za Mulungu, koma za anthu." 
Mark8:34 Ndipo anadziitanira khamulo la anthu pamodzi ndi ophunzira ake, nati kwa iwo, Ngati munthu afuna kudza pambuyo panga, adzikanize yekha, nanyamule mtanda wake, nanditsate Ine." 
Mark8:35 Pakuti yense wakufuna kupulumutsa moyo wake adzautaya; ndipo yense wakutaya moyo wake chifukwa cha Ine, ndi chifukwa cha Uthenga Wabwino, adzaupulumutsa." 
Mark8:36 Pakuti munthu apindulanji akadzilemezera dziko lonse, natayapo moyo wake?" 
Mark8:37 Pakuti munthu akapereka chiyani chosintha nacho moyo wake? 
Mark8:38 Pakuti yense wakuchita manyazi chifukwa cha Ine, ndi cha mau anga mu mbadwo uno wachigololo ndi wochimwa, Mwana wa Munthu adzachitanso manyazi chifukwa cha iyeyu, pamene Iye adzafika nao angelo ake oyera, mu ulemerero wa Atate wake." 
Mark9:1 Ndipo ananena nao, Ndithu ndinena ndi inu kuti, Alipo ena akuimirira pano, amene sadzalawa imfa konse, kufikira akaona Ufumu wa Mulungu utadza ndi mphamvu." 
Mark9:2 Ndipo atapita masiku asanu ndi limodzi, Yesu anatenga Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane, nakwera nao pa phiri lalitali padera pa okha; ndipo anasandulika pamaso pao:" 
Mark9:3 ndipo zovala zake zinakhala zonyezimira, zoyera mbu; monga ngati muomba wotsuka nsalu pa dziko lapansi sangathe kuziyeretsai." 
Mark9:4 Ndipo anaonekera kwa iwo Eliya ndi Mose, alikulankhulana ndi Yesu." 
Mark9:5 Ndipo Petro anayankha, nanena ndi Yesu, Rabi, kutikomera ife kukhala pano; ndipo timange misasa itatu; umodzi wa inu, ndi wina wa Mose, ndi wina wa Eliya." 
Mark9:6 Pakuti sanadziwe chimene adzayankha; chifukwa anachita mantha ndithu. 
Mark9:7 Ndipo panadza mtambo wakuwaphimba iwo; ndipo mau munatuluka m'mtambomo, kuti, Uyu ndiye Mwana wanga wokondedwa; mverani Iye." 
Mark9:8 Ndipo dzidzidzi pounguzaunguza, sanapenye munthu wina yense, koma Yesu yekha, ndi iwo eni." 
Mark9:9 Ndipo pakutsika iwo paphiri, Iye anawalamula kuti asauze munthu zinthu zimene adaziona, koma pamene Mwana wa Munthu akadzauka kwa akufa." 
Mark9:10 Ndipo anasunga mauwo, nafunsana mwa iwo okha, kuti, Kuuka kwa akufa nchiyani?" 
Mark9:11 Ndipo anamfunsa Iye, nanena, Nanga alembi anena kuti adzayamba kufika Eliya?" 
Mark9:12 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Eliya ayamba kudza ndithu, nadzakonza zinthu zonse; ndipo kwalembedwa bwanji za Mwana wa Munthu, kuti ayenera kumva zowawa zambiri ndi kuyesedwa chabe?" 
Mark9:13 Koma ndinena ndi inu kuti anafikadi Eliya, ndipo anamchitiranso zilizonse iwo anazifuna, monga kwalembedwa za iye." 
Mark9:14 Ndipo pamene anadza kwa ophunzira, anaona khamu lalikulu la anthu ozungulira iwo, ndi alembi alikufunsana nao." 
Mark9:15 Ndipo pomwepo anthu onse a khamulo, pakumuona Iye, anazizwa kwambiri, namthamangira Iye, namlonjera." 
Mark9:16 Ndipo anawafunsa iwo, Mufunsana nao chiyani?" 
Mark9:17 Ndipo wina wa m'khamulo anamyankha Iye, kuti, Mphunzitsi, ndadza naye kwa Inu mwana wanga, ali nao mzimu wosalankhula;" 
Mark9:18 ndipo ponse pamene umgwira, umgwetsa; ndipo achita thovu, nakukuta mano, nanyololoka; ndipo ndinalankhula nao ophunzira anu kuti autulutse; koma sanakhoze." 
Mark9:19 Ndipo Iye anawayankha nanena, Mbadwo wosakhulupirira inu, ndidzakhala ndi inu kufikira liti? Ndidzakulekererani nthawi yanji? Mudze naye kwa Ine." 
Mark9:20 Ndipo anadza naye kwa Iye; ndipo pakumuona, pomwepo mzimuwo unamng'amba koopsa; ndipo anagwa pansi navimvinika ndi kuchita thovu." 
Mark9:21 Ndipo Iye anafunsa atate wake, kuti, Chimenechi chinayamba kumgwira liti? Ndipo anati, Chidamyamba akali mwana." 
Mark9:22 Ndipo kawirikawiri ukamtaya kumoto ndi kumadzi, kumuononga; koma ngati mukhoza kuchita kanthu mtithandize, ndi kutichitira chifundo." 
Mark9:23 Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Ngati mukhoza! Zinthu zonse zitheka ndi iye wakukhulupirira." 
Mark9:24 Pomwepo atate wa mwana anafuula, nanena, Ndikhulupirira; thandizani kusakhulupirira kwanga." 
Mark9:25 Ndipo pamene Yesu anaona kuti khamu la anthu lilikuthamangira pamodzi, anadzudzula mzimu woipawo, nanena ndi uwo, Mzimu wosalankhula ndi wogontha iwe, Ine ndikulamula iwe, tuluka mwa iye, ndipo usalowenso mwa iye." 
Mark9:26 Ndipo pamene unafuula, numng'ambitsa, unatuluka; ndipo mwana anakhala ngati wakufa; kotero kuti ambiri ananena, Wamwalira." 
Mark9:27 Koma Yesu anamgwira dzanja lake, namnyamutsa; ndipo anaimirira." 
Mark9:28 Ndipo pamene Iye adalowa m'nyumba, ophunzira ake anamfunsa m'tseri, kuti, Nanga bwanji sitinakhoza ife kuutulutsa?" 
Mark9:29 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Mtundu uwu sukhoza kutuluka ndi kanthu kena konse, koma ndi kupemphera." 
Mark9:30 Ndipo anachoka iwo kumeneko, napyola pakati pa Galileya; ndipo Iye sanafune kuti munthu adziwe." 
Mark9:31 Pakuti anaphunzitsa ophunzira ake, nanena nao, kuti, Mwana wa Munthu aperekedwa m'manja anthu, ndipo adzamupha Iye; ndipo ataphedwa, adzauka pofika masiku atatu." 
Mark9:32 Koma iwo sanazindikire mauwo, naopa kumfunsa." 
Mark9:33 Ndipo iwo anadza ku Kapernao; ndipo pamene anakhala m'nyumba, Iye anawafunsa, Munalikutsutsana ninji panjira?" 
Mark9:34 Koma iwo anakhala chete; pakuti anatsutsana wina ndi mnzake panjira, kuti, wamkulu ndani?" 
Mark9:35 Ndipo m'mene anakhala pansi anaitana khumi ndi awiriwo; nanena nao, Ngati munthu afuna kukhala woyamba, akhale wakuthungo wa onse, ndi mtumiki wa onse." 
Mark9:36 Ndipo anatenga kamwana, nakaika pakati pao, nakayangata, nanena nao," 
Mark9:37 Munthu aliyense adzalandira kamodzi ka tiana totere chifukwa cha dzina langa, alandira Ine; ndipo yense amene akalandira Ine, salandira Ine, koma Iye amene anandituma Ine." 
Mark9:38 Yohane anati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, tinaona munthu alikutulutsa ziwanda m'dzina lanu; ndipo tinamletsa, chifukwa sanalikutsata ife." 
Mark9:39 Koma Yesu anati, Musamamletsa iye; pakuti palibe munthu adzachita champhamvu m'dzina langa, nadzakhoza msanga kundinenera Ine zoipa." 
Mark9:40 Pakuti iye wosatsutsana ndi ife athandizana nafe. 
Mark9:41 Pakuti munthu aliyense adzakumwetsani inu chikho cha madzi m'dzina langa chifukwa muli ake a Khristu, indetu ndinena ndi inu, kuti iye sadzataya konse mphotho yake." 
Mark9:42 Ndipo yense amene adzalakwitsa kamodzi ka tiana timeneto takukhulupirira Ine, kuli kwabwino kwa iye makamaka kuti mwala waukulu wamphero ukolowekedwe m'khosi mwake, naponyedwe iye m'nyanja." 
Mark9:43 Ndipo ngati dzanja lako likulakwitsa iwe, ulidule: nkwabwino kwa iwe kulowa m'moyo wopunduka dzanja, koposa kukhala ndi manja ako awiri ndi kulowa m'Gehena, m'moto wosazima." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Ndipo ngati phazi lako likulakwitsa, ulidule; kulowa iwe m'moyo wopunduka mwendo, kuli kwabwino koposa ndi kukhala ndi mapazi ako awiri ndi kuponyedwa m'Gehena." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Ndipo ngati diso lako likulakwitsa ulikolowole; kulowa iwe m'Ufumu wa Mulungu ndi diso limodzi kuli kwabwino koposa ndi kukhala ndi maso awiri ndi kuponyedwa m'Gehena; 
Mark9:48 kumeneko mphutsi yao siikufa, ndi moto suzimidwa." 
Mark9:49 Pakuti onse adzathiridwa mchere wamoto. 
Mark9:50 Mchere uli wabwino; koma ngati mchere unasukuluka, mudzaukoleretsa ndi chiyani? Khalani nao mchere mwa inu nokha, ndipo khalani ndi mtendere wina ndi mnzake." 
Mark10:1 Ndipo ananyamuka Iye kumeneko, nadza ku maiko a ku Yudeya ndi ku tsidya lija la Yordani; ndipo anasonkhananso kwa Iye makamu a anthu; ndipo monga anazolowera, anawaphunzitsanso." 
Mark10:2 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye Afarisi, namfunsa Iye ngati kuloledwa kuti munthu achotse mkazi wake, namuyesa Iye." 
Mark10:3 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi Mose anakulamulani chiyani?" 
Mark10:4 Ndipo anati, Mose analola kulembera kalata wakulekanira, ndi kumchotsa." 
Mark10:5 Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Chifukwa cha kuuma kwa mitima yanu anakulemberani lamulo ili." 
Mark10:6 Koma kuyambira pa chiyambi cha malengedwe anawapanga mwamuna ndi mkazi. 
Mark10:7 Chifukwa chake mwamuna adzasiya atate wake ndi amai wake, ndipo adzaphatikizana ndi mkazi wake;" 
Mark10:8 ndipo awiriwa adzakhala thupi limodzi: kotero kuti salinso awiri, koma thupi limodzi." 
Mark10:9 Chifukwa chake chimene Mulungu anachimanga pamodzi, asachilekanitse munthu." 
Mark10:10 Ndipo m'nyumba ophunzira anamfunsanso za chinthu ichi. 
Mark10:11 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Munthu aliyense akachotsa mkazi wake, nakakwatira wina, achita chigololo kulakwira mkaziyo;" 
Mark10:12 ndipo ngati mkazi akachotsa mwamuna wake, nakwatiwa ndi wina, achita chigololo iyeyu." 
Mark10:13 Ndipo analinkudza nato kwa Iye tiana, kuti akatikhudze; ndipo ophunzirawo anawadzudzula." 
Mark10:14 Koma pamene Yesu anaona anakwiya, ndipo anati kwa iwo, Lolani tiana tidze kwa Ine; musatiletse: pakuti Ufumu wa Mulungu uli wa totere." 
Mark10:15 Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Munthu aliyense wosalandira Ufumu wa Mulungu ngati kamwana, sadzalowamo konse." 
Mark10:16 Ndipo Iye anatiyangata, natidalitsa, ndi kuika manja ake pa ito." 
Mark10:17 Ndipo pamene Iye anatuluka kutsata njira, anamthamangira munthu, namgwadira Iye, namfunsa, Mphunzitsi wabwino, ndidzachita chiyani kuti ndilandire moyo wosatha?" 
Mark10:18 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Unditcha Ine wabwino bwanji? Palibe wabwino koma mmodzi, ndiye Mulungu." 
Mark10:19 Udziwa malamulo: Usaphe, Usachite chigololo, Usabe, Usachite umboni wakunama, Usanyenge, Lemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako." 
Mark10:20 Ndipo iye anati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, zonsezi ndinazisunga kuyambira ndili mwana." 
Mark10:21 Ndipo Yesu anamyang'ana, namkonda, nati kwa iye, Chinthu chimodzi chikusowa: pita, gulitsa zonse uli nazo, nuzipereke kwa anthu aumphawi, ndipo chuma udzakhala nacho m'mwamba; ndipo ukadze kuno, unditsate Ine." 
Mark10:22 Koma nkhope yake inagwa pa mau awa, ndipo anachoka iye wachisoni; pakuti anali mwini chuma chambiri." 
Mark10:23 Ndipo Yesu anaunguzaunguza, nanena ndi ophunzira ake, Okhala nacho chuma adzalowa mu Ufumu wa Mulungu ndi kuvuta nanga!" 
Mark10:24 Ndipo ophunzirawo anazizwa ndithu ndi mau ake. Koma Yesu anayankhanso nanena nao, Ananu, nkovuta ndithu kwa iwo akutama chuma kulowa mu Ufumu wa Mulungu!" 
Mark10:25 Nkwa pafupi kuti ngamira ipyole diso la singano kuposa kuti mwini chuma alowe mu Ufumu wa Mulungu. 
Mark10:26 Ndipo anadabwa, nanena kwa Iye, Ndipo angathe kupulumuka ndani?" 
Mark10:27 Yesu anawayang'ana iwo nati, Sikutheka ndi anthu, koma kutheka ndi Mulungu; pakuti zinthu zonse zitheka ndi Mulungu." 
Mark10:28 Petro anayamba kunena naye, Onani, ife tinasiya zonse, ndipo tinakutsatani Inu." 
Mark10:29 Yesu anati, Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Palibe munthu anasiya nyumba, kapena abale, kapena alongo, kapena amai, kapena atate, kapena ana, kapena minda, chifukwa cha Ine, ndi chifukwa cha Uthenga Wabwinowo," 
Mark10:30 amene sadzalandira makumi khumi tsopano nthawi yino, nyumba, ndi abale, ndi alongo, ndi amai, ndi ana, ndi minda, pamodzi ndi mazunzo; ndipo nthawi ilinkudza, moyo wosatha." 
Mark10:31 Koma ambiri akuyamba adzakhala akuthungo, ndi akuthungo adzakhala oyamba." 
Mark10:32 Ndipo iwo anali m'njira alinkukwera kunka ku Yerusalemu; ndipo Yesu analikuwatsogolera; ndipo iwo anazizwa; ndipo akumtsatawo anachita mantha. Ndipo Iye anatenganso khumi ndi awiriwo, nayamba kuwauza zinthu zimene zidzamfikira Iye," 
Mark10:33 nati, Taonani, tikwera ku Yerusalemu; ndipo Mwana wa Munthu adzaperekedwa kwa ansembe aakulu ndi alembi; ndipo iwo adzamweruza kuti ayenera imfa, nadzampereka Iye kwa anthu a mitundu;" 
Mark10:34 ndipo adzamnyoza Iye, nadzamthira malovu, nadzamkwapula Iye, nadzamupha; ndipo pofika masiku atatu adzauka." 
Mark10:35 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye Yakobo ndi Yohane, ana a Zebedeo, nanena naye, Mphunzitsi, tifuna kuti mudzatichitire chimene chilichonse tidzapempha kwa Inu." 
Mark10:36 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Mufuna kuti ndidzakuchitireni inu chiyani?" 
Mark10:37 Ndipo iwo anati kwa Iye, Mutipatse ife kuti tikhale mmodzi kudzanja lanu lamanja, ndi wina kulamanzere, m'ulemerero wanu." 
Mark10:38 Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Simudziwa chimene muchipempha. Mukhoza kodi kumwera chikho chimene ndimwera Ine? Kapena kubatizidwa ndi ubatizo umene ndibatizidwa nao Ine?" 
Mark10:39 Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Tikhoza. Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Chikho chimene ndimwera Ine mudzamwera; ndipo ubatizo umene ndibatizidwa nao Ine, mudzabatizidwa nao;" 
Mark10:40 koma kukhala kudzanja langa lamanja, kapena lamanzere sikuli kwanga kupatsa; koma kuli kwa iwo amene adawakonzeratu." 
Mark10:41 Ndipo pamene khumiwo anamva, anayamba kupsa mtima chifukwa cha Yakobo ndi Yohane." 
Mark10:42 Ndipo Yesu anawaitana, nanena nao, Mudziwa kuti iwo amene ayesedwa ambuye a mitundu ya anthu amachita ufumu pa iwo; ndipo akulu ao amachita ulamuliro pa iwo." 
Mark10:43 Koma mwa inu sikutero ai; koma amene aliyense afuna kukhala wamkulu mwa inu adzakhala mtumiki wanu; 
Mark10:44 ndipo amene aliyense afuna kukhala woyamba mwa inu adzakhala kapolo wa onse. 
Mark10:45 Pakuti ndithu, Mwana wa Munthu sanadze kutumikiridwa, koma kutumikira, ndi kupereka moyo wake dipo la kwa anthu ambiri." 
Mark10:46 Ndipo iwo anafika ku Yeriko; ndipo m'mene Iye analikutuluka m'Yeriko, ndi ophunzira ake, ndi khamu lalikulu la anthu, mwana wa Timeo, Baratimeo, wopempha wakhungu, analikukhala pansi m'mbali mwa njira." 
Mark10:47 Ndipo pamene anamva kuti ndi Yesu wa ku Nazarete, anayamba kufuula, ndi kunena, Yesu, Inu Mwana wa Davide, mundichitire ine chifundo." 
Mark10:48 Ndipo ambiri anamulamula kuti atonthole: koma makamaka anafuulitsa kuti, Inu mwana wa Davide, mundichitire chifundo." 
Mark10:49 Ndipo Yesu anaima, nati, Mwitaneni. Ndipo anaitana wakhunguyo, nanena naye, Limba mtima; nyamuka, akuitana." 
Mark10:50 Ndipo iye anataya chofunda chake, nazunzuka, nadza kwa Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Ndipo Yesu anamyankha, nati, Ufuna kuti ndikuchitire chiyani? Ndipo wakhunguyo anati kwa Iye, Raboni, ndilandire kuona kwanga." 
Mark10:52 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Muka; chikhulupiriro chako chakupulumutsa iwe. Ndipo pomwepo anapenyanso; namtsata Iye panjira." 
Mark11:1 Ndipo pamene iwo anayandikira ku Yerusalemu, ku Betefage ndi Betaniya, pa phiri la Azitona, anatuma awiri a ophunzira ake," 
Mark11:2 nanena nao, Mukani, lowani m'mudzi wapandunji ndi inu; ndipo pomwepo pakulowamo mudzapeza mwana wa bulu womangidwa, amene palibe munthu anakhalapo kale lonse; mmasuleni, ndipo mubwere naye." 
Mark11:3 Ndipo munthu akati kwa inu, Mutero bwanji? Katini, Ambuye amfuna iye; ndipo pomwepo adzamtumiza kuno." 
Mark11:4 Ndipo anachoka, napeza mwana wa bulu womangidwa pakhomo, pabwalo m'khwalala, nammasula iye." 
Mark11:5 Ndipo ena akuima kumeneko ananena nao, Muchita chiyani ndi kumasula mwana wa bulu?" 
Mark11:6 Ndipo anati kwa iwo monga momwe ananena Yesu: ndipo anawalola iwo apite naye. 
Mark11:7 Ndipo anabwera naye mwana wa bulu kwa Yesu, naika zovala zao pa iye, ndipo Iye anakhala pamenepo." 
Mark11:8 Ndimo ambiri anayala zovala zao panjira; ndi ena zitsamba, anazidula m'minda." 
Mark11:9 Ndipo akutsogolera, ndi iwo akutsata, anafuula, Hosana; Wolemekezeka Iye wakudza m'dzina la Ambuye:" 
Mark11:10 Wolemekezeka Ufumu ulinkudza, wa atate wathu Davide; Hosana m'Kumwambamwamba." 
Mark11:11 Ndipo Iye analowa m'Yerusalemu, m'Kachisi; ndipo m'mene anaunguza zinthu zonse, popeza ndi madzulo, anatuluka kupita ku Betaniya pamodzi ndi khumi ndi awiriwo." 
Mark11:12 Ndipo m'mawa mwake, atatuluka ku Betaniya, Iye anamva njala." 
Mark11:13 Ndipo anaona mkuyu kutali, uli ndi masamba; ndipo anadza Iye, kuti kapena akapezapo kanthu: ndipo m'mene anafikako anapeza palibe kanthu koma masamba okha; pakuti siinali nyengo yake ya nkhuyu." 
Mark11:14 Ndipo anayankha nanena ndi uwo, Munthu sadzadyanso zipatso zako nthawi zonse. Ndipo ophunzira ake anamva." 
Mark11:15 Ndipo anafika iwo ku Yerusalemu; ndipo Iye analowa m'Kachisi, nayamba kutulutsa akugulitsa ndi akugula malonda m'Kachisimo, nagubuduza magome a osinthana ndalama, ndi mipando ya ogulitsa nkhunda;" 
Mark11:16 ndipo sanalole munthu aliyense kunyamula chotengera kupyola pakati pa Kachisi. 
Mark11:17 Ndipo anaphunzitsa, nanena nao, Sichilembedwa kodi, Nyumba yanga idzatchedwa nyumba yakupempheramo anthu a mitundu yonse? Koma inu mwaiyesa phanga la achifwamba." 
Mark11:18 Ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi alembi anamva, nafunafuna momuonongera Iye; pakuti anamuopa, chifukwa khamu lonse la anthu linazizwa ndi chiphunzitso chake." 
Mark11:19 Ndipo masiku onse madzulo anatuluka Iye m'mudzi. 
Mark11:20 Ndipo m'mene anapitapo m'mawa mwake, anaona kuti mkuyu uja unafota, kuyambira kumizu." 
Mark11:21 Ndipo Petro anakumbukira, nanena naye, Rabi, onani, wafota mkuyuwo munautemberera." 
Mark11:22 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nanena nao, Khulupirirani Mulungu." 
Mark11:23 Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, kuti, Munthu aliyense akanena ndi phiri ili, Tanyamulidwa, nuponyedwe m'nyanja; wosakayika mumtima mwake, koma adzakhulupirira kuti chimene achinena chichitidwa, adzakhala nacho." 
Mark11:24 Chifukwa chake ndinena ndi inu, Zinthu zilizonse mukazipemphera ndi kuzipempha, khulupirirani kuti mwazilandira, ndipo mudzakhala nazo." 
Mark11:25 Ndipo pamene muimirira ndi kupemphera, khululukirani, ngati munthu wakulakwirani kanthu; kuti Atate wanunso ali Kumwamba akhululukire inu zolakwa zanu." 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Ndipo iwo anadzanso ku Yerusalemu; ndipo m'mene Iye anali kuyenda m'Kachisi, anafika kwa Iye ansembe aakulu, ndi alembi ndi akulu;" 
Mark11:28 nanena naye, Izi muzichita ndi ulamuliro wotani? Kapena anakupatsani ndani ulamuliro uwu wakuchita izi?" 
Mark11:29 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Ndikufunsani mau amodzi, mundiyankhe Ine, ndipo ndidzakuuzani ulamuliro umene ndichita nao zinthu zimenezi." 
Mark11:30 Ubatizo wa Yohane uchokera Kumwamba kodi, kapena kwa anthu? Mundiyankhe." 
Mark11:31 Ndipo anatsutsana mwa iwo okha, nanena, Tikati, Kumwamba; adzanena Iye, Ndipo simunakhulupirira iye bwanji?" 
Mark11:32 Koma tikati, Kwa anthu, anaopa anthuwo; pakuti onse anamuyesa Yohane mneneri ndithu." 
Mark11:33 Ndipo iwo anamyankha Yesu, ananena nao, Inenso sindikuuzani ulamuliro umene ndichita nao zinthu zimenezi." 
Mark12:1 Ndipo Iye anayamba kulankhula nao m'mafanizo. Munthu analima munda wamphesa, nauzunguniza ndi linga, nakumba moponderamo mphesa, namanga nsanja, naukongoletsa kwa olima munda, namuka kwina." 
Mark12:2 Ndipo m'nyengo yake anatuma kapolo kwa olimawo, kuti alandireko kwa olimawo zipatso za m'munda wamphesa." 
Mark12:3 Ndipo iwo anamtenga iye, nampanda, namchotsa wopanda kanthu." 
Mark12:4 Ndipo anatumanso kapolo wina kwa iwo; ndipo ameneyu anamlasa mutu, namchitira zomchititsa manyazi." 
Mark12:5 Ndipo anatuma wina; iyeyu anamupha; ndi ena ambiri; ena anawapanda, ndi ena anawapha." 
Mark12:6 Anamtsalira mmodzi, ndiye mwana wake wokondedwa; potsiriza anamtuma iye kwa iwo, nanena, Adzamchitira ulemu mwana wanga." 
Mark12:7 Koma olima ajawo, ananena mwa iwo okha, Ameneyu ndiye wolowa nyumba; tiyeni timuphe iye, ndipo mundawu udzakhala wathu." 
Mark12:8 Ndipo anamtenga, namupha iye, namtaya kunja kwa munda." 
Mark12:9 Pamenepo mwini munda adzachita chiyani? Adzafika, nadzaononga olimawo, nadzapereka mundawo kwa ena." 
Mark12:10 Kodi simunawerenga ngakhale lembo ili, Mwala umene anaukana omanga nyumba, womwewu unayesedwa mutu wa pangodya:" 
Mark12:11 Ichi chinachokera kwa Ambuye, ndipo chili chozizwitsa m'maso mwathu?" 
Mark12:12 Ndipo anayesa kumgwira Iye; koma anaopa khamu la anthu, pakuti anazindikira kuti Iye anakamba fanizo ili kuwatsutsa iwo; ndipo anamsiya Iye, nachoka." 
Mark12:13 Ndipo anatuma kwa Iye ena a Afarisi ndi a Aherode, kuti akamkole Iye m'kulankhula kwake." 
Mark12:14 Ndipo pamene anafika, ananena naye, Mphunzitsi, tidziwa kuti muli woona, ndipo simusamala munthu; pakuti simuyang'ana nkhope ya anthu, koma muphunzitsa njira ya Mulungu moona: Nkuloleka kodi kupereka msonkho kwa Kaisara, kapena iai?" 
Mark12:15 Kodi tipereke kapena tisapereke? Koma Iye anadziwa chinyengo chao, nati kwa iwo, Mundiyeseranji? Nditengereni rupiya latheka, kuti ndilione. Ndipo analitenga." 
Mark12:16 Ndipo ananena nao, Chithunzithunzi ichi, ndi chilembo chake zili za yani? Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Za Kaisara," 
Mark12:17 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Perekani zake za Kaisara kwa Kaisara, ndi zake za Mulungu kwa Mulungu. Ndipo anazizwa naye kwambiri." 
Mark12:18 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye Asaduki, amene amanena kuti palibe kuuka kwa akufa; ndipo anamfunsa Iye, nanena," 
Mark12:19 Mphunzitsi, Mose anatilembera, kuti, Akafa mbale wake wa munthu, nasiya mkazi, wosasiya mwana, mbale wake atenge mkazi wake, namuukitsire mbale wakeyo mbeu." 
Mark12:20 Analipo abale asanu ndi awiri; woyamba anakwatira mkazi, nafa, wosasiya mbeu;" 
Mark12:21 ndipo wachiwiri anamkwatira, nafa, wosasiya mbeu; ndipo wachitatunso anatero momwemo;" 
Mark12:22 ndipo asanu ndi awiriwo analibe kusiya mbeu. Potsiriza pake pa onse mkazinso anafa. 
Mark12:23 Pakuuka adzakhala mkazi wa yani wa iwowa? Pakuti asanu ndi awiriwo adamuyesa mkazi wao. 
Mark12:24 Yesu ananena nao, Simusochera nanga mwa ichi, popeza mulibe kudziwa malembo, kapena mphamvu yake ya Mulungu?" 
Mark12:25 Pakuti pamene adzauka kwa akufa, sakwatira, kapena sakwatiwa; koma akhala ngati angelo a Kumwamba. Koma za akufa, kuti akaukitsidwa;" 
Mark12:26 simunawerenga m'buku la Mose kodi, za chitsambacho, kuti Mulungu anati kwa iye, nanena, Ine Ndine Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi Mulungu wa Isaki, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo?" 
Mark12:27 Sali Mulungu wa akufa, koma wa amoyo: musochera inu ndithu." 
Mark12:28 Ndipo anadza mmodzi wa alembi, namva iwo alikufunsana pamodzi, ndipo pakudziwa kuti anawayankha bwino, anamfunsa Iye, Lamulo la m'tsogolo la onse ndi liti?" 
Mark12:29 Yesu anayankha, kuti, La m'tsogolo ndili, Mvera, Israele; Ambuye Mulungu wathu, Ambuye ndiye mmodzi;" 
Mark12:30 ndipo uzikonda Ambuye Mulungu wako ndi mtima wako wonse, ndi moyo wako wonse, ndi nzeru zako zonse, ndi mphamvu yako yonse." 
Mark12:31 Lachiwiri ndi ili, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda mwini. Palibe lamulo lina lakuposa awa." 
Mark12:32 Ndipo mlembiyo anati kwa Iye, Chabwino, Mphunzitsi, mwanena zoona kuti ndiye mmodzi; ndipo palibe wina, koma Iye:" 
Mark12:33 ndipo, kumkonda Iye ndi mtima wonse, ndi nzeru yonse, ndi mphamvu yonse, ndi kukonda mnzake monga adzikonda mwini, ndiko kuposa nsembe zopsereza zamphumphu zonse, ndi nsembe zophedwa." 
Mark12:34 Ndipo pakuona kuti anayankha ndi nzeru, Yesu anati kwa iye, Suli kutali ndi Ufumu wa Mulungu. Ndipo palibe munthu analimbanso mtima kumfunsa Iye kanthu." 
Mark12:35 Ndipo Yesu pamene anaphunzitsa m'Kachisi, anayankha, nanena, Bwanji alembi anena kuti Khristu ndiye mwana wa Davide?" 
Mark12:36 Davide mwini yekha anati mwa Mzimu Woyera, Ambuye anati kwa Ambuye wanga, Khala kudzanja langa lamanja, kufikira ndiwaika adani ako popondapo mapazi ako." 
Mark12:37 Davide mwini yekha amtchula Iye Ambuye; ndipo ali mwana wake bwanji? Ndipo anthu a makamuwo anakondwa kumva Iye. 
Mark12:38 Ndipo m'chiphunzitso chake ananena, Yang'anirani mupewe alembi, akufuna kuyendayenda ovala miinjiro, ndi kulonjeredwa pamisika," 
Mark12:39 ndi kukhala nayo mipando yaulemu m'sunagoge, ndi malo aulemu pamaphwando:" 
Mark12:40 amenewo alusira nyumba za akazi amasiye, napemphera monyenga mau ambiri; amenewa adzalandira kulanga koposa." 
Mark12:41 Ndipo Iye anakhala pansi pandunji pa mosungiramo ndalama, napenya kuti khamu la anthu alikuponya ndalama mosungiramo; ndipo eni chuma ambiri anaponyamo zambiri." 
Mark12:42 Ndipo anadza mkazi wamasiye waumphawi, ndipo iye anaponyamo tindalama tiwiri tating'ono tokwanira kakobiri kamodzi." 
Mark12:43 Ndipo anaitana ophunzira ake, nati kwa iwo, Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Mkazi wamasiye amene waumphawi anaponya zambiri koposa onse akuponya mosungiramo:" 
Mark12:44 pakuti anaponyamo onse mwa zochuluka zao; koma iye anaponya mwa kusowa kwake zonse anali nazo, inde moyo wake wonse." 
Mark13:1 Ndipo pamene analikutuluka Iye m'Kachisi, mmodzi wa ophunzira ake ananena kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, onani, miyala yotere ndi nyumba yotere." 
Mark13:2 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Kodi waona nyumba izi zazikulu? Sudzasiyidwa pano mwala umodzi pamwamba pa unzake, umene sudzagwetsedwa." 
Mark13:3 Ndipo pamene anakhala Iye pa phiri la Azitona, popenyana ndi Kachisi, anamfunsa Iye m'tseri Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane, ndi Andrea, kuti," 
Mark13:4 Tiuzeni, zinthu izi zidzachitika liti? Ndi chotani chizindikiro chake chakuti zili pafupi pa kumalizidwa zinthu izi zonse?" 
Mark13:5 Ndipo Yesu anayamba kunena nao, Yang'anirani kuti munthu asakusocheretseni." 
Mark13:6 Ambiri adzafika m'dzina langa, nadzanena, Ine ndine Iye; nadzasocheretsa ambiri." 
Mark13:7 Ndipo m'mene mudzamva za nkhondo ndi mbiri zake za nkhondo, musamadera nkhawa: ziyenera kuchitika izi; koma sichinafike chimaliziro." 
Mark13:8 Pakuti mtundu wa anthu udzayambana ndi mtundu wina, ndipo ufumu ndi ufumu unzake: padzakhala zivomezi m'malo m'malo; padzakhala njala; izi ndi zoyambira za zowawa." 
Mark13:9 Koma inu mudziyang'anire inu nokha; pakuti adzakuperekani inu kwa akulu a milandu; ndipo adzakukwapulani m'masunagoge; ndipo pamaso pa akazembe ndi mafumu mudzaimirira chifukwa cha Ine, kukhale umboni kwa iwo." 
Mark13:10 Ndipo Uthenga Wabwino uyenera uyambe kulalikidwa kwa anthu a mitundu yonse. 
Mark13:11 Ndipo pamene adzapita nanu kumlandu, nadzakuperekani, musade nkhawa usanayambe mlandu ndi chimene mudzalankhula; koma chimene chidzapatsidwa kwa inu m'mphindi yomweyo, muchilankhule; pakuti olankhula si ndinu, koma Mzimu Woyera." 
Mark13:12 Ndipo mbale adzapereka mbale wake kuti amuphe, ndi atate mwana wake; ndi ana adzayambana ndi akuwabala, nadzawaphetsa." 
Mark13:13 Ndipo adzada inu anthu onse chifukwa cha dzina langa: koma iye wakupirira kufikira chimaliziro, yemweyo adzapulumutsidwa." 
Mark13:14 Ndipo pamene mukaona chonyansa cha kupululutsa chilikuima pomwe sichiyenera (wakuwerenga azindikire), pamenepo a m'Yudeya athawire kumapiri:" 
Mark13:15 ndi iye amene ali pamwamba pa chindwi asatsike, kapena asalowe kukatulutsa kanthu m'nyumba mwake;" 
Mark13:16 ndi iye amene ali kumunda asabwere kudzatenga malaya ake. 
Mark13:17 Koma tsoka iwo akukhala ndi pakati, ndi akuyamwitsa ana masiku awo!" 
Mark13:18 Ndipo pempherani kuti kusakhale m'nyengo yachisanu. 
Mark13:19 Pakuti masiku aja padzakhala chisautso, chonga sichinakhala chinzake kuyambira chiyambi cha chilengedwe chimene Mulungu anachilenga ndi kufikira tsopano, ndipo sichidzakhalanso, nthawi zonse." 
Mark13:20 Ndipo Ambuye akadapanda kufupikitsa masikuwo, sakadapulumuka munthu mmodzi yense; koma chifukwa cha osankhidwa amene anawasankha, anafupikitsa masikuwo." 
Mark13:21 Ndipo pamenepo wina akati kwa inu, Onani Khristu ali pano; kapena, Onani, uko; musavomereze;" 
Mark13:22 pakuti adzauka Akhristu onyenga ndi aneneri onyenga, ndipo adzachita zizindikiro ndi zozizwitsa, kuti akasocheretse, ngati nkutheka, osankhidwa omwe." 
Mark13:23 Koma yang'anirani; onani ndakuuziranitu zinthu zonse, zisanafike." 
Mark13:24 Koma m'masikuwo, chitatha chisautso chimenecho, dzuwa lidzadetsedwa, ndi mwezi sudzapatsa kuunika kwake," 
Mark13:25 ndi nyenyezi zidzagwa kuchokera m'mwamba ndi mphamvu zili m'mwamba zidzagwedezeka. 
Mark13:26 Ndipo pamenepo adzaona Mwana wa Munthu alinkudza m'mitambo ndi mphamvu yaikulu, ndi ulemerero." 
Mark13:27 Ndipo pamenepo adzatuma angelo, nadzasonkhanitsa osankhidwa ake ochokera kumphepo zinai, kuyambira ku malekezero ake a dziko lapansi, ndi kufikira ku malekezero a thambo." 
Mark13:28 Ndipo phunzirani ndi mkuyu fanizo lake; pamene pafika kuti nthambi yake ikhala yanthete, ndipo anaphuka masamba ake, muzindikira kuti layandikira dzinja;" 
Mark13:29 chomwecho inunso, pamene muona zinthu izi zilikuchitika, zindikirani kuti ali pafupi pakhomo." 
Mark13:30 Indetu ndinena ndi inu, Mbadwo uno sudzapita kufikira zinthu izi zonse zitachitika." 
Mark13:31 Thambo ndi dziko lapansi zidzapita; koma mau anga sadzapita. 
Mark13:32 Koma za tsiku ilo, kapena nthawi yake sadziwa munthu, angakhale angelo m'Mwamba, angakhale Mwana, koma Atate ndiye." 
Mark13:33 Yang'anirani, dikirani, pempherani: pakuti simudziwa nthawi yake." 
Mark13:34 Monga ngati munthu wa paulendo, adachoka kunyumba kwake, nawapatsa akapolo ake ulamuliro, kwa munthu aliyense ntchito yake, nalamula wapakhomo adikire." 
Mark13:35 Chifukwa chake dikirani; pakuti simudziwa inu nthawi yake yakubwera mwini nyumba, kapena madzulo, kapena pakati pausiku, kapena pakulira tambala, kapena mamawa;" 
Mark13:36 kuti angabwere balamanthu nakakupezani muli m'tulo. 
Mark13:37 Ndipo chimene ndinena ndi inu ndinena kwa onse, Dikirani." 
Mark14:1 Ndipo popita masiku awiri kuli phwando la Paska ndi mikate yopanda chotupitsa; ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi alembi anafunafuna momchitira chiwembu, ndi kumupha:" 
Mark14:2 pakuti anati, Pachikondwerero ai, kuti pangakhale phokoso la anthu." 
Mark14:3 Ndipo pakukhala Iye ku Betaniya m'nyumba ya Simoni wakhate, m'mene anaseama kudya, anadzapo mkazi ali nayo nsupa ya alabastero ya mafuta onunkhira bwino a narido weniweni a mtengo wapatali; naswa nsupayo, nawatsanulira pamutu pake." 
Mark14:4 Koma anakhalako ena anavutika mtima mwa iwo okha, ndi kuti, Mafutawo atayidwa chifukwa ninji?" 
Mark14:5 Pakuti mafuta amene akadagula marupiya atheka mazana atatu ndi mphamvu zake, ndi kupatsa aumphawi. Ndipo anadandaulira mkaziyo." 
Mark14:6 Koma Yesu anati, Mlekeni, mumvutiranji? Wandichitira Ine ntchito yabwino." 
Mark14:7 Pakuti muli nao aumphawi pamodzi ndi inu masiku onse, ndipo paliponse pamene mukafuna mukhoza kuwachitira zabwino; koma Ine simuli nane masiku onse." 
Mark14:8 Iye wachita chimene wakhoza; anandidzozeratu thupi langa ku kuikidwa m'manda. 
Mark14:9 Ndipo ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Ponse pamene padzalalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino kudziko lonse lapansi, ichinso chimene anachita mkazi uyu chidzanenedwa, chikhale chonkumbukira nacho." 
Mark14:10 Ndipo Yudasi Iskariote, ndiye mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, anachoka napita kwa ansembe aakulu, kuti akampereke Iye kwa iwo." 
Mark14:11 Ndipo pamene iwo anamva, anasekera, nalonjezana naye kuti adzampatsa ndalama. Ndipo iye anafunafuna pompereka Iye bwino." 
Mark14:12 Ndipo tsiku loyamba la mikate yopanda chotupitsa, pamene amapha Paska, ophunzira ananena naye, Mufuna tinke kuti, tikakonze mkadyereko Paska?" 
Mark14:13 Ndipo anatuma awiri a ophunzira ake, nanena nao, Lowani m'mzinda, ndipo adzakomana nanu munthu wakusenza mtsuko wa madzi; mumtsate iye;" 
Mark14:14 ndipo kumene akalowako iye, munene naye mwini nyumba, Mphunzitsi anena, Chilikuti chipinda cha alendo changa, m'menemo ndikadye Paska ndi ophunzira anga?" 
Mark14:15 Ndipo iye yekha adzakusonyezani chipinda chapamwamba chachikulu choyalamo ndi chokonzedwa; ndipo m'menemo mutikonzere. 
Mark14:16 Ndipo ophunzira anatuluka, nafika m'mzinda, napeza monga anati kwa iwo; ndipo anakonza Paska." 
Mark14:17 Ndipo pofika madzulo anadza Iye pamodzi ndi khumi ndi awiriwo. 
Mark14:18 Ndipo pamene anaseama iwo kudya, Yesu anati, Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Mmodzi wa inu adzandipereka Ine, ndiye wakudya ndi Ine pamodzi." 
Mark14:19 Anayamba iwo kukhala ndi chisoni, ndi kunena naye mmodzimmodzi, kuti, Ndine kodi?" 
Mark14:20 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, ndiye wakusunsa pamodzi ndi Ine m'mbale." 
Mark14:21 Pakuti Mwana wa Munthu amukadi, monga kwalembedwa za Iye; koma tsoka munthuyo amene apereka Mwana wa Munthu! Kukadakhala bwino kwa munthu ameneyo ngati sakadabadwa iye." 
Mark14:22 Ndipo pamene iwo analikudya, Iye anatenga mkate, ndipo pamene anadalitsa, ananyema, napereka kwa iwo, kuti, Tengani; thupi langa ndi ili." 
Mark14:23 Ndipo anatenga chikho, ndipo pamene adayamika, anapereka kwa iwo; ndipo iwo onse anamweramo." 
Mark14:24 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Ichi ndi mwazi wanga wa chipangano, wothiridwa chifukwa cha anthu ambiri." 
Mark14:25 Ndipo ndinena nanu, Sindidzamwanso chipatso cha mpesa, kufikira tsiku lijalo, limene ndidzamwa icho chatsopano mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Mark14:26 Ndipo ataimba nyimbo, anatuluka, namuka kuphiri la Azitona." 
Mark14:27 Ndipo Yesu ananena nao, Mudzakhumudwa nonsenu; pakuti kwalembedwa, Ndidzakantha mbusa, ndi nkhosa zidzamwazika." 
Mark14:28 Komatu nditadzauka ndidzatsogolera inu ku Galileya. 
Mark14:29 Koma Petro ananena naye, Angakhale adzakhumudwa onse, komatu ine iai." 
Mark14:30 Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Ndithu ndinena ndi iwe, kuti lero, usiku uno, tambala asanalire kawiri, udzandikana Ine katatu." 
Mark14:31 Koma iye analimbitsa mau chilimbitsire, kuti, Ngakhale ndidzafa nanu, sindidzakana Inu. Ndipo onsewo anatero." 
Mark14:32 Ndipo iwo anadza kumalo dzina lake Getsemani; ndipo ananena kwa ophunzira ake, Bakhalani pano, kufikira ndikapemphera." 
Mark14:33 Ndipo anatenga pamodzi ndi Iye Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane, nayamba kudabwa kwambiri, ndi kusauka mtima ndithu." 
Mark14:34 Ndipo ananena nao, Moyo wanga uli wa chisoni chambiri, kufikira imfa. Bakhalani pano, nimundikire." 
Mark14:35 Ndipo Iye anapita m'tsogolo pang'ono, nagwa pansi, napemphera kuti ngati nkutheka nthawi imene impitirire." 
Mark14:36 Ndipo ananena, Abba, Atate, zinthu zonse zitheka ndi Inu; mundichotsere chikho ichi; komatu si chimene ndifuna Ine, koma chimene mufuna Inu." 
Mark14:37 Ndipo anadza nawapeza iwo ali m'tulo, nanena ndi Petro, Simoni, ugona kodi? Unalibe mphamvu yakudikira ora limodzi kodi?" 
Mark14:38 Dikirani, pempherani, kuti mungalowe m'kuyesedwa; mzimutu uli wakufuna, koma thupi lili lolefuka." 
Mark14:39 Ndipo anachokanso, napemphera, nanena mau omwewo." 
Mark14:40 Ndipo anadzanso nawapeza ali m'tulo, pakuti maso ao analemeradi; ndipo sanadziwe chomyankha Iye." 
Mark14:41 Ndipo anadza kachitatu, nanena nao, Gonani tsopano, nimupumule; chakwanira; yafika nthawi; onani Mwana wa Munthu aperekedwa m'manja a anthu ochimwa." 
Mark14:42 Ukani, tizimuka; onani wakundiperekayo ali pafupi." 
Mark14:43 Ndipo pomwepo, Iye ali chilankhulire, anadza Yudasi, mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, ndipo pamodzi naye khamu la anthu, ali nao malupanga ndi mikunkhu, ochokera kwa ansembe aakulu ndi alembi ndi akulu." 
Mark14:44 Ndipo wakumpereka Iye anawapatsa chizindikiro, nanena, Iye amene ndidzampsompsona, ndiyetu; mgwireni munke naye chisungire." 
Mark14:45 Ndipo atafika, pomwepo anadza kwa Iye, nanena, Rabi; nampsompsonetsa." 
Mark14:46 Ndipo anamthira manja, namgwira." 
Mark14:47 Koma mmodzi wina wa iwo akuimirirapo, anasolola lupanga lake, nakantha kapolo wake wa mkulu wa ansembe, namdula khutu lake." 
Mark14:48 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi mwatuluka ndi malupanga ndi mikunkhu kundigwira Ine monga wachifwamba?" 
Mark14:49 Masiku onse ndinali nanu m'Kachisi ndilikuphunzitsa, ndipo simunandigwira Ine; koma ichi chachitika kuti malembo akwanitsidwe." 
Mark14:50 Ndipo iwo onse anamsiya Iye, nathawa." 
Mark14:51 Ndipo mnyamata wina anamtsata Iye, atafundira pathupi bafuta yekha; ndipo anamgwira;" 
Mark14:52 koma iye anasiya bafutayo, nathawa wamaliseche." 
Mark14:53 Ndipo ananka naye Yesu kwa mkulu wa ansembe; ndipo anasonkhana kwa iye ansembe aakulu onse ndi akulu a anthu, ndi alembi." 
Mark14:54 Ndipo Petro adamtsata Iye kutali, kufikira kulowa m'bwalo la mkulu wa ansembe; ndipo anali kukhala pansi pamodzi ndi anyamata, ndi kuotha moto." 
Mark14:55 Ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi akulu a milandu onse anafunafuna umboni wakutsutsa nao Yesu kuti amuphe Iye; koma sanaupeze. 
Mark14:56 Pakuti ambiri anamchitira umboni wonama, ndipo umboni wao sunalingana." 
Mark14:57 Ndipo ananyamukapo ena, namchitira umboni wakunama, nanena kuti," 
Mark14:58 Ife tinamva Iye alikunena, kuti, Ine ndidzaononga Kachisi uyu wopangidwa ndi manja, ndi masiku atatu ndidzamanga wina wosapangidwa ndi manja." 
Mark14:59 Ndipo ngakhale momwemo umboni wao sunalingana. 
Mark14:60 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe ananyamuka pakati, namfunsa Yesu, nanena, Suyankha kanthu kodi? Nchiyani ichi chimene awa alikuchitira mboni?" 
Mark14:61 Koma anakhala chete, osayankha kanthu. Mkulu wa ansembe anamfunsanso, nanena naye, Kodi Iwe ndiwe Khristu, Mwana wake wa Wolemekezeka?" 
Mark14:62 Ndipo Yesu anati, Ndine amene; ndipo mudzaona Mwana wa Munthu alikukhala kudzanja lamanja la mphamvu, ndi kudza ndi mitambo ya kumwamba." 
Mark14:63 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe anang'amba malaya ake, nanena, Tifuniranjinso mboni zina?" 
Mark14:64 Mwamva mwano wake; muyesa bwanji? Ndipo onse anamtsutsa Iye kuti ayenera kufa. 
Mark14:65 Ndipo ena anayamba kumthira malovu Iye, ndi kuphimba nkhope yake, ndi kumbwanyula, ndi kunena naye, Lota; ndipo anyamatawo anampanda Iye khofu." 
Mark14:66 Ndipo pamene Petro anali pansi m'bwalo, anadzapo mmodzi wa adzakazi a mkulu wa ansembe;" 
Mark14:67 ndipo anaona Petro alikuotha moto, namyang'ana iye, nanena, Iwenso unali naye Mnazarene, Yesu." 
Mark14:68 Koma anakana, nanena, Sindidziwa kapena kumvetsa chimene uchinena iwe; ndipo anatuluka kunka kuchipata; ndipo tambala analira." 
Mark14:69 Ndipo anamuona mdzakaziyo, nayambanso kunena ndi iwo akuimirirapo, Uyu ngwa awo." 
Mark14:70 Koma anakananso. Ndipo patapita kamphindi, akuimirirapo ananenanso ndi Petro, Zedi uli wa awo; pakutinso uli Mgalileya." 
Mark14:71 Koma iye anayamba kutemberera, ndi kulumbira, Sindimdziwa munthuyu mulikunena." 
Mark14:72 Ndipo pomwepo tambala analira kachiwiri. Ndipo Petro anakumbukira umo Yesu anati kwa iye, kuti, Tambala asanalire kawiri udzandikana katatu. Ndipo pakuganizira ichi analira misozi." 
Mark15:1 Ndipo pomwepo mamawa anakhala upo ansembe aakulu, ndi akulu a anthu, ndi alembi, ndi akulu a milandu onse, namanga Yesu, namtenga, nampereka kwa Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Ndipo Pilato anamfunsa Iye, Kodi ndiwe mfumu ya Ayuda? Ndipo anayankha, nanena naye, Mwatero." 
Mark15:3 Ndipo ansembe aakulu anamnenera Iye zinthu zambiri. 
Mark15:4 Ndipo Pilato anamfunsanso, nanena, Suyankha kanthu kodi? Taona, akunenera Iwe zinthu zambiri zotere." 
Mark15:5 Koma Yesu sanayankhenso kanthu; kotero kuti Pilato anazizwa. 
Mark15:6 Ndipo ankawamasulira pachikondwerero wandende mmodzi, amene iwo anampempha." 
Mark15:7 Ndipo analipo wina dzina lake Barabasi, wamangidwa pamodzi ndi opanduka, amene anapha munthu mumphandumo." 
Mark15:8 Ndipo khamu la anthu anabwera nayamba kupempha kuti achite monga anali kuwachitira nthawi zonse. 
Mark15:9 Ndipo Pilato anawayankha, nanena nao, Kodi mufuna kuti ndikumasulireni mfumu ya Ayuda?" 
Mark15:10 Pakuti anazindikira kuti ansembe aakulu anampereka Iye mwanjiru. 
Mark15:11 Koma ansembe aakulu anasonkhezera khamulo, kuti makamaka awamasulire Barabasi." 
Mark15:12 Ndipo Pilato anawayankhanso, nati kwa iwo, Pamenepo ndidzachita chiyani ndi Iye amene mumtchula mfumu ya Ayuda?" 
Mark15:13 Ndipo anafuulanso, Mpachikeni pamtanda." 
Mark15:14 Ndipo Pilato ananena nao, Pakuti Iye anachita choipa chotani? Koma iwo anafuulitsatu, Mpachikeni Iye." 
Mark15:15 Ndipo Pilato pofuna kuwakhazika mtima anthuwo, anawamasulira Barabasi, napereka Yesu, atamkwapula, akampachike pamtanda." 
Mark15:16 Ndipo asilikali anachoka naye nalowa m'bwalo, ndilo Pretorio; nasonkhanitsa gulu lao lonse." 
Mark15:17 Ndipo anamveka Iye chibakuwa, naluka korona waminga, namveka pa Iye;" 
Mark15:18 Ndipo anayamba kumlankhula Iye, kuti, Tikuoneni, mfumu ya Ayuda!" 
Mark15:19 Ndipo anampanda Iye pamutu pake ndi bango, namthira malovu, nampindira maondo, namlambira." 
Mark15:20 Ndipo atatha kumnyoza anamvula chibakuwacho namveka Iye zovala zake. Ndipo anatuluka naye kuti akampachike Iye pamtanda. 
Mark15:21 Ndipo anakakamiza wina wopitirirapo, Simoni wa ku Kirene, alikuchokera kuminda, atate wao wa Aleksandro ndi Rufu, kuti anyamule mtanda wake." 
Mark15:22 Ndipo anamtenga kunka naye kumalo Gologota, ndiwo, osandulika, Malo a Bade." 
Mark15:23 Ndipo anampatsa vinyo wosanganiza ndi mure; koma Iye sanamlandire. 
Mark15:24 Ndipo anampachika Iye, nagawana zovala zake mwa iwo okha, ndi kuchita maere pa izo, kuti adziwe yense adzatenga chiyani." 
Mark15:25 Ndipo panali ora lachitatu, ndipo anampachika Iye." 
Mark15:26 Ndipo lembo la mlandu wake linalembedwa pamwamba, MFUMU YA AYUDA." 
Mark15:27 Ndipo anapachika pamodzi ndi Iye achifwamba awiri; mmodzi kudzanja lake lamanja ndi wina kulamanzere. 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Ndipo iwo akupitirirapo anamchitira mwano, napukusa mitu yao, nanena, Ha! Iwe wakupasula Kachisi, ndi kummanga masiku atatu," 
Mark15:30 udzipulumutse mwini, nutsike pamtanda." 
Mark15:31 Moteronso ansembe aakulu anamtonza mwa iwo okha pamodzi ndi alembi, nanena, Anapulumutsa ena; sakhoza kudzipulumutsa yekha." 
Mark15:32 Atsike tsopano pamtanda, Khristu mfumu ya Israele, kuti tione, ndi kukhulupirira. Ndipo iwo akupachikidwa naye anamlalatira." 
Mark15:33 Ndipo pofika ora lachisanu ndi chimodzi, panali mdima pa dziko lonse, kufikira ora lachisanu ndi chinai." 
Mark15:34 Ndipo pa ora lachisanu ndi chinai Yesu anafuula ndi mau okweza, Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakitani? ndiko kusandulika, Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga mwandisiyiranji Ine?" 
Mark15:35 Ndipo ena akuimirirapo, pakumva, ananena, Taonani, aitana Eliya." 
Mark15:36 Ndipo anathamanga wina, nadzaza chinkhupule ndi vinyo wosasa, nachiika pabango, namwetsa Iye, nanena, Lekani; tione ngati Eliya adza kudzamtsitsa." 
Mark15:37 Ndipo Yesu anatulutsa mau okweza, napereka mzimu wake." 
Mark15:38 Ndipo chinsalu chotchinga cha m'Kachisi chinang'ambika pakati, kuyambira kumwamba kufikira pansi." 
Mark15:39 Ndipo pamene kenturiyo, woimirirapo popenyana ndi Iye, anaona kuti anapereka mzimu kotero, anati, Zoonadi, munthu uyu anali Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Mark15:40 Ndipo analinso kumeneko akazi akuyang'anira kutali; mwa iwo anali Maria wa Magadala, ndi Maria amake wa Yakobo wamng'ono ndi wa Yosefe, ndi Salome;" 
Mark15:41 amene anamtsata Iye, pamene anali m'Galileya, namtumikira; ndi akazi ena ambiri, amene anakwera kudza ndi Iye ku Yerusalemu." 
Mark15:42 Ndipo atafika tsono madzulo, popeza mpa tsiku lokonzekera, ndilo la pambuyo pa Sabata," 
Mark15:43 anadzapo Yosefe wa ku Arimatea, mkulu wa milandu womveka, amene yekha analikuyembekezera Ufumu wa Mulungu; nalimba mtima nalowa kwa Pilato, napempha mtembo wake wa Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Ndipo Pilato anazizwa ngati adamwaliradi; naitana kenturiyo, namfunsa ngati adamwalira kale." 
Mark15:45 Ndipo pamene anachidziwa ndi kenturiyo, anamninkha Yosefe mtembowo." 
Mark15:46 Ndipo anagula bafuta, namtsitsa Iye, namkulunga m'bafutamo, namuika m'manda osemedwa m'thanthwe; nakunkhunizira mwala pakhomo la manda." 
Mark15:47 Ndipo Maria wa Magadala ndi Maria amake wa Yosefe anapenya pomwe anaikidwapo. 
Mark16:1 Ndipo litapita Sabata, Maria wa Magadala, ndi Maria amake wa Yakobo, ndi Salome, anagula zonunkhira, kuti akadze kumdzoza Iye." 
Mark16:2 Ndipo anadza kumanda mamawa tsiku loyamba la Sabata, litatuluka dzuwa." 
Mark16:3 Ndipo analikunena mwa okha, Adzatikunkhunizira ndani mwalawo, pakhomo la manda?" 
Mark16:4 Ndipo pamene anakweza maso anaona kuti mwala wakunkhunizidwa, pakuti unali waukulu ndithu." 
Mark16:5 Ndipo pamene analowa m'manda, anaona mnyamata alikukhala kumbali ya kudzanja lamanja, wovala mwinjiro woyera; ndipo iwo anadabwa." 
Mark16:6 Ndipo iye ananena nao, Musadabwe: mulikufuna Yesu Mnazarene amene anapachikidwa; anauka; sali pano; taonani, mbuto m'mene anaikamo Iye!" 
Mark16:7 Koma mukani, uzani ophunzira ake, ndi Petro, kuti akutsogolerani inu ku Galileya; kumeneko mudzamuona Iye, monga ananena ndi inu." 
Mark16:8 Ndipo anatuluka iwo, nathawa kumanda; pakuti kunthunthumira ndi kudabwa kwakukulu kudawagwira; ndipo sanauze kanthu kwa munthu aliyense; pakuti anachita mantha." 
Mark16:9 Ndipo pamene Iye adauka mamawa tsiku loyamba la sabata, anayamba kuonekera kwa Maria wa Magadala, amene Iye adamtulutsira ziwanda zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Mark16:10 Iyeyu anapita kuwauza iwo amene ankakhala naye, ali ndi chisoni ndi kulira misozi." 
Mark16:11 Ndipo iwowo, pamene anamva kuti ali moyo, ndi kuti adapenyeka kwa iye, sanamvere." 
Mark16:12 Ndipo zitatha izi, anaonekanso Iye m'maonekedwe ena kwa awiri a iwo alikuyenda kupita kumilaga." 
Mark16:13 Ndipo iwowa anachoka nawauza otsala; koma iwo omwe sanawavomereze. 
Mark16:14 Ndipo chitatha icho anaonekera kwa khumi ndi mmodzi iwo okha, alikuseama pachakudya; ndipo anawadzudzula chifukwa cha kusavomereza kwao ndi kuuma mtima, popeza sanavomereza iwo amene adamuona, atauka Iye." 
Mark16:15 Ndipo ananena nao, Mukani kudziko lonse lapansi, lalikirani Uthenga Wabwino kwa olengedwa onse." 
Mark16:16 Amene akhulupirira nabatizidwa, adzapulumutsidwa; koma amene sakhulupirira adzalangidwa." 
Mark16:17 Ndipo zizindikiro izi zidzawatsata iwo akukhulupirira: m'dzina langa adzatulutsa ziwanda; adzalankhula ndi malankhulidwe atsopano; 
Mark16:18 adzatola njoka, ndipo ngakhale akamwa kanthu kakufa nako, sikadzawapweteka; adzaika manja ao pa odwala, ndipo adzachira." 
Mark16:19 Pamenepo Ambuye Yesu, atatha kulankhula nao, analandiridwa Kumwamba, nakhala pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu." 
Mark16:20 Ndipo iwowa anatuluka, nalalikira ponseponse, ndipo Ambuye anachita nao pamodzi, natsimikiza mau ndi zizindikiro zakutsatapo. Amen." 
Luke1:1 Popeza ambiri anayesa kulongosola nkhani ya zinthu zinachitika pakati pa ife," 
Luke1:2 monga anazipereka kwa ife iwo amene anakhala mboni ndi atumiki a mau," 
Luke1:3 kuyambira pachiyambi, ndinayesa nkokoma inenso, amene ndinalondalonda mosamalitsa zinthu zonse kuyambira pachiyambi, kulembera kwa iwe tsatanetsatane, Teofilo wabwinotu iwe;" 
Luke1:4 kuti udziwitse zoona zake za mau amene unaphunzira. 
Luke1:5 Masiku a Herode, mfumu ya Yudeya, kunali munthu wansembe, dzina lake Zekariya, wa gulu la ansembe la Abiya; ndi mkazi wake wa ana akazi a fuko la Aroni, dzina lake Elizabeti." 
Luke1:6 Ndipo onse awiri anali olungama mtima pamaso pa Mulungu, namayendabe m'malamulo onse ndi zoikika za Ambuye osachimwa." 
Luke1:7 Ndipo analibe mwana, popeza Elizabeti anali wouma, ndipo onse awiri anakalamba." 
Luke1:8 Ndipo panali, pakuchita iye ntchito yakupereka nsembe m'dongosolo la gulu lake, pamaso pa Mulungu," 
Luke1:9 monga mwa machitidwe a kupereka nsembe, adamgwera maere akufukiza zonunkhira polowa iye m'Kachisi wa Ambuye." 
Luke1:10 Ndipo khamu lonse la anthu linalikupemphera kunja nthawi ya zonunkhira. 
Luke1:11 Ndipo anamuonekera iye mngelo wa Ambuye, naimirira kudzanja lamanja la guwa la nsembe la zonunkhira." 
Luke1:12 Ndipo Zekariya anadabwa pamene anamuona, ndipo mantha anamgwira." 
Luke1:13 Koma mngelo anati kwa iye, Usaope Zekariya, chifukwa kuti lamveka pemphero lako, ndipo mkazi wako Elizabeti adzakubalira mwana wamwamuna, ndipo udzamutcha dzina lake Yohane." 
Luke1:14 Ndipo udzakhala nako kukondwera ndi msangalalo; ndipo anthu ambiri adzakondwera pa kubadwa kwake. 
Luke1:15 Pakuti iye adzakhala wamkulu pamaso pa Ambuye, ndipo sadzamwa konse vinyo kapena kachasu; nadzadzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, kuyambira asanabadwe." 
Luke1:16 Ndipo iye adzatembenuzira ana a Israele ambiri kwa Ambuye Mulungu wao. 
Luke1:17 Ndipo adzamtsogolera Iye, ndi mzimu ndi mphamvu ya Eliya, kutembenuzira mitima ya atate kwa ana ao, ndi osamvera kuti atsate nzeru ya olungama mtima; kukonzeratu Ambuye anthu okonzeka." 
Luke1:18 Ndipo Zekariya anati kwa mngelo, Ndidzadziwitsa ichi ndi chiyani? Pakuti ndine nkhalamba, ndipo zaka zake za mkazi wanga zachuluka." 
Luke1:19 Ndipo mngelo anayankha, nati kwa iye, Ine ndine Gabriele, woimirira pamaso pa Mulungu; ndipo ndinatumidwa kwa iwe kudzalankhula nawe, ndi kuuza iwe uthenga uwu wabwino." 
Luke1:20 Ndipo taona, udzakhala wotonthola ndi wosakhoza kulankhula, kufikira tsiku limene zidzachitika izi, popeza kuti sunakhulupirira mau anga, amene adzakwanitsidwa pa nyengo yake." 
Luke1:21 Ndipo anthu analikulindira Zekariya, nazizwa ndi kuchedwa kwake m'Kachisimo." 
Luke1:22 Koma m'mene iye anatulukamo, sanatha kulankhula nao; ndipo anazindikira kuti iye adaona masomphenya m'Kachisimo. Ndipo iye analinkukodola iwo, nakhalabe wosalankhula." 
Luke1:23 Ndipo kunali, pamene masiku a utumiki wake anamalizidwa, anamuka kunyumba kwake." 
Luke1:24 Ndipo atatha masiku awa, Elizabeti mkazi wake anaima; nadzibisa miyezi isanu, nati," 
Luke1:25 Ambuye wandichitira chotero m'masiku omwe Iye anandipenyera, kuchotsa manyazi anga pakati pa anthu." 
Luke1:26 Ndipo mwezi wachisanu ndi chimodzi mngelo Gabriele anatumidwa ndi Mulungu kunka kumudzi wa ku Galileya dzina lake Nazarete," 
Luke1:27 kwa namwali wopalidwa ubwenzi ndi mwamuna, dzina lake Yosefe, wa fuko la Davide; ndipo dzina lake la namwaliyo ndilo Maria." 
Luke1:28 Ndipo pakulowa mngelo anati kwa iye, Tikuoneni, wochitidwa chisomo, Ambuye ali ndi iwe." 
Luke1:29 Koma iye ananthunthumira ndi mau awa, nasinkhasinkha kulonjera uku nkutani." 
Luke1:30 Ndipo mngelo anati kwa iye, Usaope, Maria; pakuti wapeza chisomo ndi Mulungu." 
Luke1:31 Ndipo taona, udzakhala ndi pakati, nudzabala mwana wamwamuna, nudzamutcha dzina lake Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Iye adzakhala wamkulu, nadzatchedwa Mwana wa Wamkulukulu: ndipo Ambuye Mulungu adzampatsa Iye mpando wachifumu wa Davide atate wake:" 
Luke1:33 ndipo Iye adzachita ufumu pa banja la Yakobo kunthawi zonse; ndipo ufumu wake sudzatha. 
Luke1:34 Koma Maria anati kwa mngelo, Ichi chidzachitika bwanji, popeza ine sindidziwa mwamuna?" 
Luke1:35 Ndipo mngelo anayankha, nati kwa iye, Mzimu Woyera adzafika pa iwe, ndi mphamvu ya Wamkulukulu idzakuphimba iwe: chifukwa chakenso Choyeracho chikadzabadwa, chidzatchedwa Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Luke1:36 Ndipo taona, Elizabeti mbale wako, iyenso ali ndi pakati pa mwana wamwamuna m'ukalamba wake; ndipo mwezi uno uli wachisanu ndi chimodzi wa iye amene ananenedwa wouma." 
Luke1:37 Chifukwa palibe mau amodzi akuchokera kwa Mulungu adzakhala opanda mphamvu. 
Luke1:38 Ndipo Maria anati, Onani, mdzakazi wa Ambuye; kukhale kwa ine monga mwa mau anu. Ndipo mngelo anachoka kwa iye." 
Luke1:39 Ndipo Maria ananyamuka masiku amenewa, namuka ndi changu kudziko la mapiri kumudzi wa Yuda;" 
Luke1:40 nalowa m'nyumba ya Zekariya, nalonjera Elizabeti." 
Luke1:41 Ndipo panali pamene Elizabeti anamva kulonjera kwake kwa Maria, mwana wosabadwayo anatsalima m'mimba mwake; ndipo Elizabeti anadzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera;" 
Luke1:42 nakweza mau ndi mfuu waukulu, nati, Wodalitsika iwe mwa akazi, ndipo chodalitsika chipatso cha mimba yako." 
Luke1:43 Ndipo ichi chichokera kuti kudza kwa ine, kuti adze kwa ine amake wa Ambuye wanga?" 
Luke1:44 Pakuti ona, pamene mau a moni wako analowa m'makutu anga, mwana anatsalima ndi msangalalo m'mimba mwanga." 
Luke1:45 Ndipo wodala ali iye amene anakhulupirira; chifukwa zidzachitidwa zinthu zimene Ambuye analankhula naye. 
Luke1:46 Ndipo Maria anati, Moyo wanga ulemekeza Ambuye," 
Luke1:47 ndipo mzimu wanga wakondwera mwa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wanga," 
Luke1:48 chifukwa Iye anayang'anira umphawi wa mdzakazi wake; pakuti taonani, kuyambira tsopano, anthu a mibadwo yonse adzanditchula ine wodala." 
Luke1:49 Chifukwa Iye Wamphamvuyo anandichitira ine zazikulu; ndipo dzina lake lili loyera. 
Luke1:50 Ndipo chifundo chake chifikira anthu a mibadwomibadwo pa iwo amene amuopa Iye. 
Luke1:51 Iye anachita zamphamvu ndi mkono wake; Iye anabalalitsa odzitama ndi mlingaliro wa mtima wao. 
Luke1:52 Iye anatsitsa mafumu pa mipando yao yachifumu, ndipo anakweza aumphawi." 
Luke1:53 Anawakhutitsa anjala ndi zinthu zabwino, ndipo eni chuma anawachotsa opanda kanthu." 
Luke1:54 Anathangatira Israele mnyamata wake, kuti akakumbukire chifundo," 
Luke1:55 (Monga analankhula kwa makolo athu) kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbeu yake kunthawi yonse. 
Luke1:56 Ndipo Maria anakhala ndi iye ngati miyezi itatu, nabweranso kunyumba kwake." 
Luke1:57 Ndipo inakwanira nthawi ya Elizabeti, ya kubala kwake, ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna." 
Luke1:58 Ndipo anansi ake ndi abale ake anamva kuti Ambuye anakulitsa chifundo chake pa iye; nakondwera naye pamodzi. 
Luke1:59 Ndipo panali tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu iwo anadza kudzadula kamwanako; ndipo akati amutche dzina la atate wake Zekariya. 
Luke1:60 Ndipo amake anayankha, kuti, Iai; koma adzatchedwa Yohane." 
Luke1:61 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye, Palibe wina wa abale ako amene atchedwa dzina ili." 
Luke1:62 Ndipo anakodola atate wake, afuna amutche dzina liti?" 
Luke1:63 Ndipo iye anafunsa cholemberapo, nalemba, kuti, Dzina lake ndi Yohane. Ndipo anazizwa onse." 
Luke1:64 Ndipo pomwepo panatseguka pakamwa pake, ndi lilime lake linamasuka, ndipo iye analankhula, nalemekeza Mulungu." 
Luke1:65 Ndipo panagwa mantha pa iwo onse akukhala oyandikana nao; ndipo analankhulalankhula nkhani izi zonse m'dziko lonse la mapiri a Yudeya. 
Luke1:66 Ndipo onse amene anazimva anazisunga m'mtima mwao, nanena, Nanga mwana uyu adzakhala wotani? Pakuti dzanja la Ambuye linakhala pamodzi ndi iye." 
Luke1:67 Ndipo atate wake Zekariya anadzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, nanenera za Mulungu, nati," 
Luke1:68 Wolemekezeka Ambuye, Mulungu wa Israele; chifukwa Iye anayang'ana, nachitira anthu ake chiombolo." 
Luke1:69 Ndipo Iye anatikwezera ife nyanga ya chipulumutso, mwa fuko la Davide mwana wake." 
Luke1:70 Monga Iye analankhula ndi m'kamwa mwa aneneri ake oyera mtima, akale lomwe," 
Luke1:71 chipulumutso cha adani athu, ndi pa dzanja la anthu onse amene atida ife." 
Luke1:72 Kuchitira atate athu chifundo, ndi kukumbukira pangano lake lopatulika;" 
Luke1:73 chilumbiro chimene Iye anachilumbira kwa Abrahamu atate wathu. 
Luke1:74 Kutipatsa ife kuti titalanditsidwa kudzanja la adani athu, tidzamtumikira Iye, opanda mantha," 
Luke1:75 m'chiyero ndi chilungamo pamaso pake, masiku athu onse." 
Luke1:76 Eya, ndipo iwetu kamwanawe, udzanenedwa mneneri wa Wamkulukulu; pakuti udzatsogolera Ambuye, kukonza njira zake." 
Luke1:77 Kuwapatsa anthu ake adziwitse chipulumutso, ndi makhululukidwe a machimo ao," 
Luke1:78 chifukwa cha mtima wachifundo wa Mulungu wathu. M'menemo mbandakucha wa kumwamba udzatichezera ife. 
Luke1:79 Kuwalitsira iwo okhala mumdima ndi mthunzi wa imfa; kulunjikitsa mapazi athu mu njira ya mtendere. 
Luke1:80 Ndipo mwanayo anakula, nalimbika mu mzimu wake, ndipo iye anali m'mapululu, kufikira masiku akudzionetsa yekha kwa Israele." 
Luke2:1 Ndipo kunali masiku aja, kuti lamulo linatuluka kwa Kaisara Augusto kuti dziko lonse lokhalamo anthu lilembedwe;" 
Luke2:2 ndiko kulembera koyamba pokhala Kwirinio kazembe wa Siriya. 
Luke2:3 Ndipo onse anamuka kulembedwa, munthu aliyense kumudzi wake." 
Luke2:4 Ndipo Yosefe yemwe anakwera kuchokera ku Galileya, kumudzi wa Nazarete, kunka ku Yudeya, kumudzi wa Davide, dzina lake Betelehemu, chifukwa iye anali wa banja ndi fuko lake la Davide;" 
Luke2:5 kukalembedwa iye mwini pamodzi ndi Maria, wopalidwa naye ubwenzi; ndi uyu anali ndi pakati." 
Luke2:6 Ndipo panali pokhala iwo komweko, masiku ake a kubala anakwanira." 
Luke2:7 Ndipo iye anabala mwana wake wamwamuna woyamba; namkulunga Iye m'nsalu, namgoneka modyera ng'ombe, chifukwa kuti anasowa malo m'nyumba ya alendo." 
Luke2:8 Ndipo panali abusa m'dziko lomwelo, okhala kubusa ndi kuyang'anira zoweta zao usiku." 
Luke2:9 Ndipo mngelo wa Ambuye anaimirira pa awo, ndi kuwala kwa Ambuye kunawaunikira kozungulira: ndipo anaopa ndi mantha akulu." 
Luke2:10 Ndipo mngelo anati kwa iwo, Musaope; pakuti onani, ndikuuzani inu uthenga wabwino wa chikondwero chachikulu, chimene chidzakhala kwa anthu onse;" 
Luke2:11 pakuti wakubadwirani inu lero, m'mudzi wa Davide, Mpulumutsi, amene ali Khristu Ambuye." 
Luke2:12 Ndipo ichi ndi chizindikiro kwa inu: Mudzapeza mwana wakhanda wokuta ndi nsalu atagona modyera. 
Luke2:13 Ndipo dzidzidzi panali pamodzi ndi mngeloyo ambirimbiri a gulu la Kumwamba, natamanda Mulungu, nanena," 
Luke2:14 Ulemerero ukhale kwa Mulungu Kumwambamwamba, ndi mtendere pansi pano mwa anthu amene akondwera nao." 
Luke2:15 Ndipo panali, pamene angelo anachokera kwa iwo kunka Kumwamba, abusa anati wina ndi mnzake, Tipitiretu ku Betelehemu, tikaone chinthu ichi chidachitika, chimene Ambuye anatidziwitsira ife." 
Luke2:16 Ndipo iwo anadza ndi changu, napeza Maria, ndi Yosefe, ndi mwana wakhanda atagona modyera." 
Luke2:17 Ndipo iwo, m'mene anaona, anadziwitsa anthu za mau analankhulidwa kwa iwo a mwana uyu." 
Luke2:18 Ndipo anthu onse amene anamva anazizwa ndi zinthu abusa adalankhula nao. 
Luke2:19 Koma Maria anasunga mau awa onse, nawalingalira mumtima mwake." 
Luke2:20 Ndipo abusawo anabwera, nalemekeza ndi kutamanda Mulungu pa zinthu zonse anazimva, naziona, monga kunalankhulidwa kwa iwo." 
Luke2:21 Ndipo pamene panakwanira masiku asanu ndi atatu akumdula Iye, anamutcha dzina lake Yesu, limene anatchula mngeloyo asanalandiridwe Iye m'mimba." 
Luke2:22 Ndipo pamene anakwanira masiku a kukonza kwao, monga mwa chilamulo cha Mose, iwo anakwera naye kunka ku Yerusalemu, kukamsonyeza Iye kwa Ambuye," 
Luke2:23 (monga mwalembedwa m'chilamulo cha Ambuye, kuti mwamuna aliyense wotsegula pa mimba ya amake adzanenedwa wopatulika wa kwa Ambuye)" 
Luke2:24 ndi kukapereka nsembe monga mwanenedwa m'chilamulo cha Ambuye, njiwa ziwiri, kapena maunda awiri." 
Luke2:25 Ndipo onani, m'Yerusalemu munali munthu, dzina lake Simeoni; ndipo munthu uyu, wolungama mtima ndi wopemphera, analikulindira matonthozedwe a Israele; ndipo Mzimu Woyera anali pa iye." 
Luke2:26 Ndipo anamuululira Mzimu Woyera kuti sadzaona imfa, kufikira adzaona Khristu wake wa Ambuye." 
Luke2:27 Ndipo iye analowa ku Kachisi ndi Mzimu: ndipo pamene atate ndi amake analowa ndi kamwanako Yesu, kudzamchitira Iye mwambo wa chilamulo," 
Luke2:28 pomwepo iye anamlandira Iye m'manja mwake, nalemekeza Mulungu, nati," 
Luke2:29 Tsopano, Ambuye, monga mwa mau anu aja, lolani ine, kapolo wanu, ndichoke mumtendere;" 
Luke2:30 chifukwa maso anga adaona chipulumutso chanu," 
Luke2:31 chimene munakonza pamaso pa anthu onse," 
Luke2:32 kuunika kukhale chivumbulutso cha kwa anthu a mitundu, ndi ulemerero wa anthu anu Israele." 
Luke2:33 Ndipo atate ndi amake anali kuzizwa ndi zinthu zolankhulidwa za Iye. 
Luke2:34 Ndipo Simeoni anawadalitsa, nati kwa Maria amake, Taona, Uyu waikidwa akhale kugwa ndi kunyamuka kwa anthu ambiri mwa Israele; ndipo akhale chizindikiro chakutsutsana nacho;" 
Luke2:35 eya, ndipo lupanga lidzakupyoza iwe moyo wako; kuti maganizo a m'mitima yambiri akaululidwe." 
Luke2:36 Ndipo panali Anna, mneneri wamkazi, mwana wa Fanuwele, wa fuko la Asere; amene anali wokalamba ndithu, nakhala ndi mwamuna wake, kuyambira pa unamwali wake," 
Luke2:37 zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndipo anali wamasiye wa kufikira zaka zake makumi asanu ndi atatu mphambu zinai, amene sankachoka ku Kachisi, wotumikira Mulungu ndi kusala kudya ndi kupemphera usiku ndi usana." 
Luke2:38 Ndipo iye anafikako pa nthawi yomweyo, navomerezanso kutama Mulungu, nalankhula za Iye kwa anthu onse akuyembekeza chiombolo cha Yerusalemu." 
Luke2:39 Ndipo pamene iwo anatha zonse monga mwa chilamulo cha Ambuye, anabwera ku Galileya, kumudzi kwao, ku Nazarete." 
Luke2:40 Ndipo mwanayo anakula nalimbika, nalikudzala ndi nzeru; ndi chisomo cha Mulungu chinali pa Iye." 
Luke2:41 Ndipo atate wake ndi amake akamuka chaka ndi chaka ku Yerusalemu ku Paska. 
Luke2:42 Ndipo pamene Iye anakhala ndi zaka zake khumi ndi ziwiri, anakwera iwo monga machitidwe a chikondwerero;" 
Luke2:43 ndipo pakumaliza masiku ake, pakubwera iwo, mnyamatayo Yesu anatsala m'mbuyo ku Yerusalemu. Ndipo atate ndi amake sanadziwe;" 
Luke2:44 koma iwo anayesa kuti Iye ali m'chipiringu cha ulendo, nayenda ulendo wa tsiku limodzi; ndipo anayamba kumfunafuna Iye mwa abale ao ndi mwa anansi ao;" 
Luke2:45 ndipo pamene sanampeze, anabwera ku Yerusalemu, namfunafuna Iye." 
Luke2:46 Ndipo pakupita masiku atatu, anampeza Iye m'Kachisi, analikukhala pakati pa aphunzitsi, namva iwo, nawafunsanso mafunso." 
Luke2:47 Ndipo onse amene anamva Iye anadabwa ndi chidziwitso chake, ndi mayankho ake." 
Luke2:48 Ndipo m'mene anamuona Iye, anadabwa; ndipo amake anati kwa Iye, Mwanawe, wachitiranji ife chotero; taona, atate wako ndi ine tinalikufunafuna Iwe ndi kuda nkhawa." 
Luke2:49 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Kuli bwanji kuti munalikundifunafuna Ine? Simunadziwa kodi kuti kundiyenera Ine ndikhale m'zake za Atate wanga?" 
Luke2:50 Ndipo sanadziwitse mau amene Iye analankhula nao. 
Luke2:51 Ndipo anatsika nao pamodzi nadza ku Nazarete; nawamvera iwo: ndipo amake anasunga zinthu izi zonse mumtima mwake. 
Luke2:52 Ndipo Yesu anakulabe m'nzeru ndi mumsinkhu, ndi m'chisomo cha pa Mulungu ndi cha pa anthu." 
Luke3:1 Ndipo pa chaka chakhumi ndi chisanu cha ufumu wa Tiberio Kaisara, pokhala Pontio Pilato kazembe wa Yudeya, ndi Herode chiwanga cha Galileya, ndi Filipo mbale wake chiwanga cha dziko la Itureya ndi la Trakoniti, ndi Lisaniasi chiwanga cha Abilene;" 
Luke3:2 pa ukulu wansembe wao wa Anasi ndi Kayafa, panadza mau a Mulungu kwa Yohane mwana wa Zekariya m'chipululu." 
Luke3:3 Ndipo iye anadza kudziko lonse la m'mbali mwa Yordani, nalalikira ubatizo wa kulapa mtima kuloza ku chikhululukiro cha machimo;" 
Luke3:4 monga mwalembedwa m'buku la Yesaya mneneri, kuti, Mau a wofuula m'chipululu, konzani khwalala la Ambuye, lungamitsani njira zake." 
Luke3:5 Chigwa chilichonse chidzadzazidwa, ndipo phiri lililonse ndi mtunda uliwonse zidzachepsedwa; ndipo zokhota zidzakhala zolungama, ndipo njira za zigoloondo zidzakhala zosalala;" 
Luke3:6 ndipo anthu onse adzaona chipulumutso cha Mulungu. 
Luke3:7 Chifukwa chake iye ananena kwa makamuwo a anthu amene anatulukira kukabatizidwa ndi iye, Obadwa a njoka inu, anakulangizani inu ndani kuthawa mkwiyo ulinkudza?" 
Luke3:8 Chifukwa chake balani zipatso zakuyenera kulapa mtima, ndipo musayambe kunena mwa inu nokha, Atate wathu tili naye ndiye Abrahamu: pakuti ndinena kwa inu, kuti ali ndi mphamvu Mulungu, mwa miyala iyi, kuukitsira Abrahamu ana." 
Luke3:9 Ndiponso tsopano lino nkhwangwa yaikidwa pa mizu ya mitengo; chotero mtengo uliwonse wosabala chipatso chabwino udulidwa, nuponyedwa pamoto." 
Luke3:10 Ndipo anthu a makamu anamfunsa iye, nanena, Ndipo tsono tizichita chiyani?" 
Luke3:11 Koma iye anayankha nanena kwa iwo, Iye amene ali nao malaya awiri apatse kwa iye amene alibe; ndi iye amene ali nazo zakudya achite chomwecho." 
Luke3:12 Ndipo amisonkho omwe anadza kudzabatizidwa, nati kwa iye, Mphunzitsi, ife tizichita chiyani?" 
Luke3:13 Koma iye anati kwa iwo, Musakapambe kanthu konse kakuposa chimene anakulamulirani." 
Luke3:14 Ndipo asilikali omwe anamfunsa iye, nati, Nanga ife tizichita chiyani? Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Musaopse, musanamize munthu aliyense; khalani okhuta ndi kulipira kwanu." 
Luke3:15 Ndipo pamene anthu anali kuyembekezera, ndipo onse anaganizaganiza m'mitima yao za Yohane, ngati kapena iye ali Khristu;" 
Luke3:16 Yohane anayankha, nanena kwa onse, Inetu ndikubatizani inu ndi madzi; koma wakundiposa ine mphamvu alinkudza, amene sindiyenera kumasula lamba la nsapato zake; Iyeyu adzakubatizani inu ndi Mzimu Woyera ndi moto:" 
Luke3:17 amene chouluzira chake chili m'dzanja lake, kuti ayeretse padwale pake, ndi kusonkhanitsa tirigu m'nkhokwe yake; koma mankhusu adzatentha m'moto wosazima." 
Luke3:18 Choteretu iye anauza anthu Uthenga Wabwino ndi kuwadandaulira zinthu zina zambiri. 
Luke3:19 Koma Herode mfumu ija, m'mene Yohane anamdzudzula chifukwa cha Herodiasi, mkazi wa mbale wake, ndi cha zinthu zonse zoipa Herode anazichita," 
Luke3:20 anaonjeza pa zonsezi ichinso, kuti anatsekera Yohane m'nyumba yandende." 
Luke3:21 Pamene anthu onse anabatizidwa, Yesu nayenso anabatizidwa. Iye anali kupemphera, ndipo kuthambo kunatseguka," 
Luke3:22 ndipo Mzimu Woyera anatsika ndi maonekedwe a thupi lake ngati nkhunda, nadza pa Iye; ndipo munatuluka mau m'thambo, kuti, Iwe ndiwe Mwana wanga wokondedwa, mwa Iwe ndikondwera." 
Luke3:23 Ndipo Yesuyo, pamene anayamba ntchito yake, anali monga wa zaka makumi atatu, ndiye (monga anthu adamuyesa) mwana wa Yosefe, mwana wa Eli," 
Luke3:24 mwana wa Matati, mwana wa Levi, mwana wa Meliki, mwana wa Yanai, mwana wa Yosefe," 
Luke3:25 mwana wa Matatiasi, mwana wa Amosi, mwana wa Nahumu, mwana wa Hesili, mwana wa Nagai," 
Luke3:26 mwana wa Mahati, mwana wa Matatiasi, mwana wa Semeini, mwana wa Yoseke, mwana wa Yoda," 
Luke3:27 mwana wa Yohanani, mwana wa Resa, mwana wa Zerubabele, mwana wa Sealatiele, mwana wa Neri," 
Luke3:28 mwana wa Meliki, mwana wa Adi, mwana wa Kosamu, mwana wa Elimadama, mwana wa Eri," 
Luke3:29 mwana wa Yose, mwana wa Eliyezere, mwana wa Yorimu, mwana wa Matati, mwana wa Levi," 
Luke3:30 mwana wa Simeoni, mwana wa Yudasi, mwana wa Yosefe, mwana wa Yonamu, mwana wa Eliyakimu," 
Luke3:31 mwana wa Melea, mwana wa Mena, mwana wa Matata, mwana wa Natamu, mwana wa Davide," 
Luke3:32 mwana wa Yese, mwana wa Obede, mwana wa Bowazi, mwana wa Salimoni, mwana wa Nasoni," 
Luke3:33 mwana wa Aminadabu, mwana wa Admini, mwana wa Arini, mwana wa Hezironi, mwana wa Perezi, mwana wa Yuda," 
Luke3:34 mwana wa Yakobo, mwana wa Isaki, mwana wa Abrahamu, mwana wa Tera, mwana wa Nahori," 
Luke3:35 mwana wa Serugi, mwana wa Reu, mwana wa Pelegi, mwana wa Eberi, mwana wa Sela," 
Luke3:36 mwana wa Kainani, mwana wa Arifaksadi, mwana wa Semu, mwana wa Nowa, mwana wa Lameki," 
Luke3:37 mwana wa Metusela, mwana wa Enoki, mwana wa Yaredi, mwana wa Mahalalele, mwana wa Kainani," 
Luke3:38 mwana wa Enosi, mwana wa Seti, mwana wa Adamu, mwana wa Mulungu." 
Luke4:1 Ndipo Yesu, wodzala ndi Mzimu Woyera, anabwera kuchokera ku Yordani, natsogozedwa ndi Mzimu kunka kuchipululu" 
Luke4:2 kukayesedwa ndi mdierekezi masiku makumi anai. Ndipo Iye sanadye kanthu masiku awo; ndipo pamene anatha anamva njala. 
Luke4:3 Ndipo mdierekezi anati kwa Iye, Ngati muli Mwana wa Mulungu, uzani mwala uwu usanduke mkate." 
Luke4:4 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Kwalembedwa, kuti, Munthu sadzakhala ndi moyo ndi mkate wokha." 
Luke4:5 Ndipo m'mene anamtsogolera anakwera naye, namuonetsa Iye maufumu onse a dziko lokhalamo anthu, m'kamphindi kakang'ono." 
Luke4:6 Ndipo mdierekezi anati kwa Iye, Ine ndidzapatsa Inu ulamuliro wonse umenewu ndi ulemerero wao: chifukwa unaperekedwa kwa ine; ndipo ndiupatsa kwa iye amene ndifuna." 
Luke4:7 Chifukwa chake ngati Inu mudzagwadira pamaso panga, wonsewo udzakhala wanu." 
Luke4:8 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iye, Kwalembedwa, kuti, Ambuye Mulungu wako uzimgwadira, ndipo Iye yekhayekha uzimtumikira." 
Luke4:9 Ndipo anamtsogolera Iye ku Yerusalemu, namuika Iye pamwamba penipeni pa Kachisiyo, nati kwa Iye, Ngati muli Mwana wa Mulungu, tadzigwetsani nokha pansi;" 
Luke4:10 pakuti kwalembedwa kuti, Adzalamula angelo ake za iwe, kuti akutchinjirize." 
Luke4:11 Ndipo, Pa manja ao adzakunyamula iwe, kuti ungagunde konse phazi lako pamwala." 
Luke4:12 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iye, Kwanenedwa, Usamuyese Ambuye Mulungu wako." 
Luke4:13 Ndipo mdierekezi, m'mene adamaliza mayesero onse, analekana naye kufikira nthawi ina." 
Luke4:14 Ndipo Yesu anabwera ndi mphamvu ya Mzimu ku Galileya; ndipo mbiri yake ya Iye inabuka ku dziko lonse loyandikira. 
Luke4:15 Ndipo Iye anaphunzitsa m'masunagoge mwao, nalemekezedwa ndi anthu onse."
