Luke4:16 Ndipo anadza ku Nazarete, kumene analeredwa; ndipo tsiku la Sabata analowa m'sunagoge, monga anazolowera, naimiriramo kuwerenga m'kalata." 
Luke4:17 Ndipo anapereka kwa Iye buku la Yesaya mneneri. Ndipo m'mene Iye adafunyulula bukulo, anapeza pomwe panalembedwa," 
Luke4:18 Mzimu wa Ambuye uli pa Ine, chifukwa chake Iye anandidzoza Ine ndiuze anthu osauka Uthenga Wabwino: anandituma Ine kulalikira am'nsinga mamasulidwe, ndi akhungu kuti apenyanso, kutulutsa ndi ufulu ophwanyika," 
Luke4:19 kulalikira chaka chosankhika cha Ambuye. 
Luke4:20 Ndipo m'mene Iye anapinda bukulo, nalipereka kwa mnyamata, anakhala pansi; ndipo maso ao a anthu onse m'sunagogemo anamyang'anitsa Iye." 
Luke4:21 Ndipo anayamba kunena kwa iwo, kuti, Lero lembo ili lakwanitsidwa m'makutu anu." 
Luke4:22 Ndipo onse anamchitira Iye umboni nazizwa ndi mau a chisomo akutuluka m'kamwa mwake; nanena, Kodi uyu si mwana wa Yosefe?" 
Luke4:23 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Kwenikweni mudzati kwa Ine nkhani iyi, Sing'anga iwe, tadzichiritsa wekha: zonse zija tazimva zinachitidwa ku Kapernao, muzichitenso zomwezo kwanu kuno." 
Luke4:24 Ndipo Iye anati, Indetu, ndinena kwa inu, kuti, Palibe mneneri alandirika kudziko la kwao." 
Luke4:25 Koma zoonadi ndinena kwa inu, kuti, Munali akazi amasiye ambiri m'Israele masiku ake a Eliya, pamene kunatsekedwa kumwamba zaka zitatu ndi miyezi isanu ndi umodzi, pamene panakhala njala yaikulu pa dziko lonselo;" 
Luke4:26 ndipo Eliya sanatumidwa kwa mmodzi wa iwo, koma ku Sarepta wa ku Sidoni, kwa mkazi wamasiye." 
Luke4:27 Ndipo munali akhate ambiri m'Israele masiku a Elisa mneneri; ndipo palibe mmodzi wa iwo anakonzedwa, koma Naamani yekha wa ku Siriya." 
Luke4:28 Ndipo onse a m'sunagogemo anadzala ndi mkwiyo pakumva izi; 
Luke4:29 nanyamuka namtulutsira Iye kunja kwa mudziwo, nanka naye pamutu pa phiri pamene panamangidwa mudzi wao, kuti akamponye Iye pansi." 
Luke4:30 Koma Iye anapyola pakati pao, nachokapo." 
Luke4:31 Ndipo Iye anatsika nadza ku Kapernao, ndiwo mudzi wa ku Galileya. Ndipo analikuwaphunzitsa iwo pa Sabata; ndipo anadabwa ndi chiphunzitso chake;" 
Luke4:32 chifukwa mau ake anali ndi ulamuliro. 
Luke4:33 Ndipo munali m'sunagoge munthu, wokhala nacho chiwanda chonyansa; nafuula ndi mau olimba, kuti," 
Luke4:34 Ha! Tili ndi chiyani ndi Inu, Yesu wa ku Nazarete? Kodi munadza kutiononga ife? Ndikudziwani Inu muli yani, ndinu Woyera wake wa Mulungu." 
Luke4:35 Ndipo Yesu anamdzudzula iye, nanena, Tonthola, nutuluke mwa iye. Ndipo chiwandacho m'mene chinamgwetsa iye pakati, chinatuluka mwa iye chosamphweteka konse." 
Luke4:36 Ndipo anthu onse anadabwa, nalankhulana wina ndi mnzake, nanena, Mau amenewa ali otani? Chifukwa ndi ulamuliro ndi mphamvu angolamulira mizimu yonyansa, ndipo ingotuluka." 
Luke4:37 Ndipo mbiri yake ya Iye inafalikira kumalo onse a dziko loyandikira. 
Luke4:38 Ndipo Iye ananyamuka kuchokera m'sunagoge, nalowa m'nyumba ya Simoni. Koma momwemo munali mpongozi wake wa Simoni, anagwidwa ndi nthenda yolimba yamalungo; ndipo anampempha Yesu za iye." 
Luke4:39 Ndipo Iye anaimirira, naweramira pa iye, nadzudzula nthendayo; ndipo inamleka iye: ndipo anauka msangatu, nawatumikira." 
Luke4:40 Ndipo pakulowa dzuwa anthu onse amene anali nao odwala ndi nthenda za mitundumitundu, anadza nao kwa Iye; ndipo Iye anaika manja ake pa munthu aliyense wa iwo, nawachiritsa." 
Luke4:41 Ndi ziwanda zomwe zinatuluka mwa ambiri, ndi kufuula, kuti, Inu ndinu Mwana wa Mulungu. Ndipo Iye anazidzudzula, wosazilola kulankhula, chifukwa zinamdziwa kuti Iye ndiye Khristu." 
Luke4:42 Ndipo kutacha anatuluka Iye nanka kumalo achipululu; ndi makamu a anthu analikumfunafuna Iye, nadza nafika kwa Iye, nayesa kumletsa Iye, kuti asawachokere." 
Luke4:43 Koma anati kwa iwo, Kundiyenera Ine ndilalikire Uthenga Wabwino wa Ufumu wa Mulungu kumidzi yinanso: chifukwa ndinatumidwa kudzatero." 
Luke4:44 Ndipo Iye analikulalikira m'masunagoge a ku Yudeya. 
Luke5:1 Ndipo panali, pakumkanikiza khamu la anthu, kudzamva mau a Mulungu, Iye analikuimirira m'mbali mwa nyanja ya Genesarete;" 
Luke5:2 ndipo anaona ngalawa ziwiri zinakhala m'mbali mwa nyanja; koma asodzi a nsomba adatuluka m'menemo, nalikutsuka makoka ao." 
Luke5:3 Ndipo Iye analowa m'ngalawa imodzi, ndiyo yake ya Simoni, nampempha iye akankhe pang'ono. Ndipo anakhala pansi m'menemo, naphunzitsa m'ngalawa makamuwo a anthu." 
Luke5:4 Ndipo pamene Iye analeka kulankhula, anati kwa Simoni, Kankhira kwa kuya, nimuponye makoka anu kukasodza." 
Luke5:5 Ndipo Simoni anayankha, nati, Ambuye, tinagwiritsa ntchito usiku wonse osakola kanthu, koma pa mau anu ndidzaponya makoka." 
Luke5:6 Ndipo pamene anachita ichi, anazinga unyinji waukulu wa nsomba; ndipo makoka ao analinkung'ambika;" 
Luke5:7 ndipo anakodola anzao a m'ngalawa yinayo, adze awathangate. Ndipo anadza, nadzaza ngalawa zonse ziwiri, motero kuti zinalinkumira." 
Luke5:8 Koma Simoni Petro, pamene anaona, anagwa pansi pa mabondo ake a Yesu, nanena, Muchoke kwa ine, Ambuye, chifukwa ndine munthu wochimwa." 
Luke5:9 Pakuti chizizwo chidagwira iye, ndi onse amene anali naye, pa kusodzako kwa nsomba zimene anazikola;" 
Luke5:10 ndipo chimodzimodzinso Yakobo ndi Yohane, ana a Zebedeo, amene anali anzake a Simoni. Ndipo Yesu anati kwa Simoni, Usaope, kuyambira tsopano udzakhala msodzi wa anthu." 
Luke5:11 Ndipo m'mene iwo anakocheza ngalawa zao pamtunda, anasiya zonse, namtsata Iye." 
Luke5:12 Ndipo panali, pamene Iye anali m'mudzi wina, taona, munthu wodzala ndi khate; ndipo pamene anaona Yesu, anagwa nkhope yake pansi, nampempha Iye, nanena, Ambuye, ngati mufuna mungathe kundikonza." 
Luke5:13 Ndipo Iye anatambalitsa dzanja lake, namkhudza, nanena, Ndifuna, takonzeka. Ndipo pomwepo khate linachoka kwa iye." 
Luke5:14 Ndipo Iye anamuuzitsa, kuti asanene kwa munthu aliyense; koma uchoke, nudzionetse wekha kwa wansembe, nupereke nsembe ya pa chikonzedwe chako, monga adalamulira Mose, kukhale umboni kwa iwo." 
Luke5:15 Koma makamaka mbiri yake ya Iye inabuka: ndipo mipingo yambiri ya anthu inasonkhana kudzamvera, ndi kudzachiritsidwa nthenda zao." 
Luke5:16 Koma Iye anazemba, nanka m'mapululu, nakapemphera." 
Luke5:17 Ndipo panali tsiku limodzi la masiku awo, Iye analikuphunzitsa; ndipo analikukhalapo Afarisi ndi aphunzitsi a malamulo, amene anachokera kumidzi yonse ya ku Galileya, ndi Yudeya ndi Yerusalemu: ndipo mphamvu ya Ambuye inali ndi Iye yakuwachiritsa." 
Luke5:18 Ndipo onani, anthu alikunyamulira pakama munthu wamanjenje; nafunafuna kulowa naye, ndi kumuika pamaso pa Iye." 
Luke5:19 Ndipo posapeza polowa naye, chifukwa cha unyinji wa anthu, anakwera pamwamba pa chindwi, namtsitsira iye poboola pa chindwi ndi kama wake, namfikitsa pakati pomwe pamaso pa Yesu." 
Luke5:20 Ndipo Iye, pakuona chikhulupiriro chao, anati, Munthu iwe, machimo ako akhululukidwa." 
Luke5:21 Ndipo alembi ndi Afarisi anayamba kuyesayesa mumtima mwao, kuti, Ndani Uyu alankhula zomchitira Mulungu mwano? Ndani angathe kukhululukira machimo, koma Mulungu yekha?" 
Luke5:22 Koma Yesu anadziwa zoyesayesa zao, nayankha, nati kwa iwo, Muyesayesa bwanji m'mitima yanu?" 
Luke5:23 Chapafupi nchiti, kunena, Akhululukidwa kwa iwe machimo ako; kapena kunena, Tauka, nuyende?" 
Luke5:24 Koma kuti mudziwe kuti Mwana wa Munthu ali nayo mphamvu pa dziko lapansi yakukhululukira machimo, (anati Iye kwa wamanjenjeyo), Ndinena kwa iwe, Tauka, nusenze kama wako, numuke kunyumba kwako." 
Luke5:25 Ndipo pomwepo anaimirira pamaso pao, nasenza chimene adagonapo, nachokapo, kunka kunyumba kwake, wakulemekeza Mulungu." 
Luke5:26 Ndipo chizizwo chinagwira anthu onse ndipo analemekeza Mulungu; nadzazidwa ndi mantha, nanena kuti, Lero taona zodabwitsa." 
Luke5:27 Ndipo zitatha izi Iye anatuluka, naona munthu wamsonkho, dzina lake Levi, alikukhala polandirira msonkho, nati kwa iye, Unditsate Ine." 
Luke5:28 Ndipo iye anasiya zonse, nanyamuka, namtsata Iye." 
Luke5:29 Ndipo Levi anamkonzera Iye phwando lalikulu kunyumba kwake; ndipo panali khamu lalikulu la amisonkho, ndi enanso amene analikuseama pachakudya pamodzi nao." 
Luke5:30 Ndipo Afarisi ndi alembi ao anang'ung'udza kwa ophunzira ake, nanena, kuti, Bwanji inu mukudya ndi kumwa pamodzi ndi anthu amisonkho ndi ochimwa?" 
Luke5:31 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Amene ali olimba safuna sing'anga; koma akudwala ndiwo." 
Luke5:32 Sindinadza Ine kuitana olungama, koma ochimwa kuti atembenuke mtima." 
Luke5:33 Ndipo iwo anati kwa Iye, Ophunzira a Yohane amasala kudya kawirikawiri, ndi kuchita mapemphero; chimodzimodzinso iwo a Afarisi; koma anu amangokudya ndi kumwa." 
Luke5:34 Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Kodi mungathe kuletsa anyamata a ukwati asadye, pamene mkwati ali nao pamodzi?" 
Luke5:35 Koma masiku adzafika; ndipo pamene mkwati adzachotsedwa kwa iwo, pamenepo adzasala kudya masiku omwewo." 
Luke5:36 Ndipo Iye ananenanso fanizo kwa iwo, kuti, Palibe munthu ang'amba chigamba cha malaya atsopano, nachiphatika pa malaya akale; chifukwa ngati atero, angong'ambitsa atsopanowo, ndi chigamba cha atsopanowo sichidzayenerana ndi akalewo." 
Luke5:37 Ndipo palibe munthu atsanulira vinyo watsopano m'matumba akale; chifukwa ngati atero, vinyo watsopanoyo adzaphulitsa matumba, ndipo ameneyo adzatayika, ndi matumba adzaonongeka." 
Luke5:38 Koma kuyenera kutsanulira vinyo watsopano m'matumba atsopano. 
Luke5:39 Ndipo palibe munthu atamwa vinyo wakale afuna watsopano; pakuti anena, Wakale ali wokoma." 
Luke6:1 Ndipo kunali tsiku la Sabata, Iye analinkupita pakati pa minda ya tirigu; ndipo ophunzira ake analinkubudula ngala za tirigu, nazifikisa m'manja mwao, nadya." 
Luke6:2 Koma Afarisi ena anati, Muchitiranji chosaloledwa kuchitika tsiku la Sabata?" 
Luke6:3 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi simunawerenganso ngakhale chimene anachita Davide, pamene paja anamva njala, iye ndi iwo anali naye pamodzi;" 
Luke6:4 kuti analowa m'nyumba ya Mulungu, natenga mikate yoonetsera, nadya, napatsanso iwo anali naye pamodzi; imeneyi yosaloledwa kudya ena koma ansembe okha?" 
Luke6:5 Ndipo Iye ananena kwa iwo, kuti, Mwana wa Munthu ali Mbuye wa tsiku la Sabata." 
Luke6:6 Ndipo kunali tsiku lina la Sabata, Iye analowa m'sunagoge, naphunzitsa. Ndipo munali munthu momwemo, ndipo dzanja lake lamanja linali lopuwala." 
Luke6:7 Ndipo alembi ndi Afarisi analikumzonda Iye, ngati adzachiritsa tsiku la Sabata; kuti akapeze chomneneza Iye." 
Luke6:8 Koma Iye anadziwa maganizo ao; nati kwa munthuyo wa dzanja lake lopuwala, Nyamuka, nuimirire pakatipo." 
Luke6:9 Ndipo Iye ananyamuka, naimirira. Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Ndikufunsani inu, Kodi nkulola tsiku la Sabata, kuchita zabwino, kapena kuchita zoipa? Kupulumutsa moyo, kapena kuuononga?" 
Luke6:10 Ndipo pamene anaunguzaunguza pa iwo onse, anati kwa iye, Tansa dzanja lako. Ndipo iye anatero, ndi dzanja lake linabwerera momwe." 
Luke6:11 Koma iwowo anagwidwa misala; nalankhulana wina ndi mnzake kuti amchitire Yesu chiyani. 
Luke6:12 Ndipo kunali masiku awa, Iye anatuluka nanka kuphiri kukapemphera; nachezera usiku wonse m'kupemphera kwa Mulungu." 
Luke6:13 Ndipo kutacha, anaitana ophunzira ake; nasankha mwa iwo khumi ndi awiri, amene anawatchanso dzina lao atumwi:" 
Luke6:14 Simoni, amene anamutchanso Petro, ndi Andrea mbale wake, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane, ndi Filipo, ndi Bartolomeo," 
Luke6:15 ndi Mateyu, ndi Tomasi, ndi Yakobo mwana wa Alifeyo, ndi Simoni wotchedwa Zelote," 
Luke6:16 ndi Yudasi mwana wa Yakobo, ndi Yudasi Iskariote, amene anali wompereka Iye." 
Luke6:17 Ndipo Iye anatsika nao, naima pachidikha, ndi khamu lalikulu la ophunzira ake, ndi unyinji waukulu wa anthu a ku Yudeya lonse ndi Yerusalemu, ndi a ku mbali ya nyanja ya ku Tiro ndi Sidoni, amene anadza kudzamva Iye ndi kudzachiritsidwa nthenda zao;" 
Luke6:18 ndipo ovutidwa ndi mizimu yonyansa anachiritsidwa," 
Luke6:19 ndi khamu lonse lija linafuna kumkhudza Iye; chifukwa munatuluka mphamvu mwa Iye, nichiritsa onsewa." 
Luke6:20 Ndipo Iye anakweza maso ake kwa ophunzira ake, nanena, Odala osauka inu; chifukwa uli wanu ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke6:21 Odala inu akumva njala tsopano; chifukwa mudzakhuta. Odala inu akulira tsopano; chifukwa mudzaseka. 
Luke6:22 Odala inu, pamene anthu adzada inu, nadzapatula inu, nadzatonza inu, nadzalitaya dzina lanu monga loipa, chifukwa cha Mwana wa Munthu." 
Luke6:23 Kondwerani tsiku lomweli, tumphani ndi chimwemwe; pakuti onani, mphotho zanu nzazikulu Kumwamba; pakuti makolo ao anawachitira aneneri zonga zomwezo." 
Luke6:24 Koma tsoka inu eni chuma! Chifukwa mwalandira chisangalatso chanu. 
Luke6:25 Tsoka inu okhuta tsopano! Chifukwa mudzamva njala. Tsoka inu, akuseka tsopano! Chifukwa mudzachita maliro ndi kulira misozi." 
Luke6:26 Tsoka inu, pamene anthu onse adzanenera inu zabwino! Pakuti makolo ao anawatero momwemo aneneri onama." 
Luke6:27 Koma ndinena kwa inu akumva, Kondanani nao adani anu; chitirani zabwino iwo akuda inu," 
Luke6:28 dalitsani iwo akutemberera inu, pemphererani iwo akuchitira inu chipongwe." 
Luke6:29 Iye amene akupanda iwe pa tsaya limodzi umpatsenso linzake; ndi iye amene alanda chofunda chako, usamkanize malaya ako." 
Luke6:30 Munthu aliyense akakupempha kanthu, umpatse; ndi iye amene alanda zako, usazipemphanso." 
Luke6:31 Ndipo monga mufuna inu kuti anthu adzakuchitirani inu, muwachitire iwo motero inu momwe." 
Luke6:32 Ndipo ngati muwakonda iwo akukondana ndinu, mudzalandira chiyamiko chotani? Pakuti ochimwa omwe akonda iwo akukondana nao." 
Luke6:33 Ndipo ngati muwachitira zabwino iwo amene akuchitirani inu zabwino, mudzalandira chiyamiko chotani? Pakuti anthu ochimwa omwe amachita chomwecho." 
Luke6:34 Ndipo ngati mukongoletsa kanthu kwa iwo amene muyembekeza kulandiranso, mudzalandira chiyamiko chotani? Pakuti inde anthu ochimwa amakongoletsa kwa ochimwa anzao, kuti alandirenso momwemo." 
Luke6:35 Koma takondanani nao adani anu, ndi kuwachitira zabwino, ndipo kongoletsani osayembekeza kanthu konse, ndipo mphotho yanu idzakhala yaikulu, ndipo inu mudzakhala ana a Wamkulukuluyo; chifukwa Iye achitira zokoma anthu osayamika ndi oipa." 
Luke6:36 Khalani inu achifundo monga Atate wanu ali wachifundo. Ndipo musamaweruza, ndipo simudzaweruzidwa." 
Luke6:37 Ndipo musawatsutsa, ndipo simudzamatsutsidwa. Khululukani, ndipo mudzakhululukidwa." 
Luke6:38 Patsani, ndipo kudzapatsidwa kwa inu; muyeso wabwino, wotsendereka, wokuchumuka, wosefukira, anthu adzakupatsani m'manja mwanu. Pakuti kudzayesedwa kwa inu ndi muyeso womwewo muyesa nao inu." 
Luke6:39 Ndipo Iye ananenanso nao fanizo, Kodi munthu wakhungu angathe kutsogolera mnzake wakhungu? Kodi sadzagwa onse awiri m'mbuna?" 
Luke6:40 Wophunzira saposa mphunzitsi wake; koma yense, m'mene atakonzedwa mtima, adzafanana ndi mphunzitsi wake." 
Luke6:41 Ndipo uyang'aniranji kachitsotso kali m'diso la mbale wako, koma mtanda wa m'diso la iwe mwini suuzindikira?" 
Luke6:42 Kapena ungathe bwanji kunena kwa mbale wako, Mbale iwe, leka ndichotse kachitsotso kali m'diso lako, wosayang'anira iwe mwini mtanda uli m'diso lako? Wonyenga iwe! Thanga wachotsa mtandawo m'diso lako, ndipo pomwepo udzayang'anitsa bwino kuchotsa kachitsotso ka m'diso la mbale wako." 
Luke6:43 Pakuti palibe mtengo wabwino wakupatsa zipatso zovunda; kapenanso mtengo woipa wakupatsa zipatso zabwino. 
Luke6:44 Pakuti mtengo uliwonse uzindikirika ndi chipatso chake. Pakuti anthu samatchera nkhuyu paminga, kapena pamtungwi samatchera mphesa." 
Luke6:45 Munthu wabwino atulutsa zabwino m'chuma chokoma cha mtima wake; ndi munthu woipa atulutsa zoipa m'choipa chake: pakuti m'kamwa mwake mungolankhula mwa kuchuluka kwa mtima wake. 
Luke6:46 Ndipo munditchuliranji Ine, Ambuye, Ambuye, ndi kusachita zimene ndizinena?" 
Luke6:47 Munthu aliyense wakudza kwa Ine, ndi kumva mau anga, ndi kuwachita, ndidzakusonyezani amene afanana naye." 
Luke6:48 Iye afanafana ndi munthu wakumanga nyumba, amene anakumba pansi ndithu, namanga maziko a nyumbayo pathanthwe; ndipo pamene panadza chigumula, mtsinje unagunda pa nyumbayo, ndipo sunakhoza kuigwedeza; chifukwa idamangika bwino." 
Luke6:49 Koma iye amene akumva, ndi kusachita, afanafana ndi munthu wakumanga nyumba pa nthaka yopanda maziko; pa imeneyo unagunda mtsinje, ndipo inagwa pomwepo; ndipo kugumuka kwake kwa nyumbayo kunali kwakukulu." 
Luke7:1 Pamene Yesu adamaliza mau ake onse m'makutu a anthu, analowa m'Kapernao." 
Luke7:2 Ndipo kapolo wa kenturiyo, wokondedwa naye, anadwala, nafuna kutsirizika." 
Luke7:3 Ndipo pamene iye anamva za Yesu, anatuma kwa Iye akulu a Ayuda, namfunsa Iye kuti adze kupulumutsa kapolo wake." 
Luke7:4 Ndipo iwo, pakufika kwa Yesu, anampempha Iye koumirira, nati, Ayenera iye kuti mumchitire ichi;" 
Luke7:5 pakuti akonda mtundu wathu, ndipo anatimangira ife sunagoge." 
Luke7:6 Ndipo Yesu anapita nao. Ndipo pakufika Iye tsono pafupi panyumba yake, kenturiyo anatuma kwa Iye abwenzi ake, kunena naye, Ambuye, musadzivute; pakuti sindiyenera ine kuti mudzalowe pansi pa chindwi langa;" 
Luke7:7 chifukwa chake ine sindinadziyesera ndekha woyenera kudza kwa Inu: koma nenani mau, ndipo mnyamata wanga adzachiritsidwa." 
Luke7:8 Pakuti inenso ndili munthu wakumvera akulu anga, ndili nao asilikali akumvera ine: ndipo ndinena kwa uyu, Muka, namuka; ndi kwa wina, Idza, nadza; ndipo kwa kapolo wanga Tachita ichi, nachita." 
Luke7:9 Koma Yesu pakumva zimenezo anazizwa naye, napotolokera kwa anthu a mpingo wakumtsata Iye, nati, Ndinena kwa inu, sindinapeza, ngakhale mwa Israele, chikhulupiriro chachikulu chotere." 
Luke7:10 Ndipo pakubwera kunyumba otumidwawo, anapeza kapoloyo wachira ndithu." 
Luke7:11 Ndipo kunali, katapita kamphindi, Iye anapita kumudzi, dzina lake Naini; ndipo ophunzira ake ndi mpingo waukulu wa anthu anapita naye." 
Luke7:12 Ndipo pamene anayandikira kuchipata cha mudziwo, onani, anthu analikunyamula munthu wakufa, mwana wamwamuna mmodzi yekha, amake ndiye mkazi wamasiye; ndipo anthu ambiri akumudzi anali pamodzi naye." 
Luke7:13 Ndipo pamene Ambuye anamuona, anagwidwa ndi chifundo chifukwa cha iye, nanena naye, Usalire." 
Luke7:14 Ndipo anayandikira, nakhudza chithatha; ndipo akumnyamulawo anaima. Ndipo Iye anati, Mnyamata iwe, ndinena ndi iwe, Tauka." 
Luke7:15 Ndipo wakufayo anakhala tsonga, nayamba kulankhula. Ndipo anampereka kwa amake." 
Luke7:16 Ndipo mantha anagwira onsewo: ndipo analemekeza Mulungu, nanena kuti, Mneneri wamkulu wauka mwa ife; ndipo Mulungu wadzacheza ndi anthu ake." 
Luke7:17 Ndipo mbiri yake imeneyo inabuka ku Yudeya lonse, ndi ku dziko lonse loyandikira." 
Luke7:18 Ndipo ophunzira a Yohane anamuuza iye zonsezi. 
Luke7:19 Ndipo Yohane anaitana awiri a ophunzira ake, nawatuma kwa Ambuye, nanena, Kodi ndinu wakudzayo, kapena tiyang'anire wina?" 
Luke7:20 Ndipo pakufika kwa Iye anthu awo, anati, Yohane Mbatizi watituma ife kwa Inu, kuti, Kodi ndinu wakudzayo, kapena tiyang'anire wina?" 
Luke7:21 Nthawi yomweyo Iye anachiritsa anthu ambiri nthenda zao, ndi zovuta, ndi ziwanda; napenyetsanso anthu akhungu ambiri." 
Luke7:22 Ndipo anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Mukani, muuze Yohane zimene mwaziona, nimwazimva; anthu akhungu alandira kuona kwao, opunduka miyendo ayenda, akhate akonzedwa, ogontha akumva, akufa aukitsidwa, kwa aumphawi ulalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino." 
Luke7:23 Ndipo wodala iye amene sakhumudwa chifukwa cha Ine. 
Luke7:24 Ndipo atachoka amithenga ake a Yohane, Iye anayamba kunena za Yohane kwa anthu a makamu aja, nati, Munatuluka kunka kuchipululu kukapenya chiyani? Bango logwedezeka ndi mphepo kodi?" 
Luke7:25 Koma munatuluka kukaona chiyani? Munthu wovala zovala zofewa kodi? Onani, iwo akuvala zolemera, ndi akukhala odyerera, ali m'nyumba za mafumu." 
Luke7:26 Koma munatuluka kukaona chiyani? Mneneri kodi? Etu, ndinena kwa inu, ndipo wakuposa mneneri." 
Luke7:27 Uyu ndi iye amene kunalembedwa za iye, Ona, ndituma Ine mthenga wanga akutsogolere, amene adzakukonzera njira yako pamaso pako." 
Luke7:28 Ndinena kwa inu, kuti, Mwa akubadwa ndi akazi palibe mmodzi wamkulu woposa Yohane; koma iye amene ali wamng'ono mu Ufumu wa Mulungu amposa iye." 
Luke7:29 Ndipo anthu onse ndi amisonkho omwe, pakumva, anavomereza kuti Mulungu ali wolungama, popeza anabatizidwa iwo ndi ubatizo wa Yohane." 
Luke7:30 Koma Afarisi ndi achilamulo anakaniza uphungu wa Mulungu kwa iwo okha, popeza sanabatizidwe ndi iye." 
Luke7:31 Ndipo, ndidzafanizira ndi chiyani anthu a mbadwo uno? Ndipo afanana ndi chiyani?" 
Luke7:32 Angofanana ndi ana akukhala pamsika, ndi kuitanizana wina ndi mnzake, ndi kunena, Ife tinakulizirani chitoliro, ndipo inu simunavina ai; tinabuma maliro, ndimo simunalira ai." 
Luke7:33 Pakuti Yohane Mbatizi wafika wosadya mkate ndi wosamwa vinyo; ndipo munena, Ali ndi chiwanda." 
Luke7:34 Mwana wa Munthu wafika wakudya ndi wakumwa; ndipo munena, Onani, munthu wosusuka ndi wakumwaimwa vinyo, bwenzi la amisonkho ndi anthu ochimwa!" 
Luke7:35 Ndipo nzeru iyesedwa yolungama ndi ana ake onse. 
Luke7:36 Ndipo mmodzi wa Afarisi anamuitana Iye kuti akadye naye. Ndipo analowa m'nyumba ya Mfarisi, naseama pachakudya." 
Luke7:37 Ndipo onani, mkazi wochimwa, amene anali m'mudzimo; ndipo pakudziwa kuti Yesu analikuseama pachakudya m'nyumba ya Mfarisi, anatenga nsupa ya alabastero ya mafuta onunkhira bwino," 
Luke7:38 naimirira kumbuyo, pa mapazi ake, nalira, nayamba kukhathamiza mapazi ake ndi misozi, nawapukuta ndi tsitsi la mutu wake, nampsompsonetsa mapazi ake, nawadzoza ndi mafuta onunkhira bwino." 
Luke7:39 Koma Mfarisi, amene adamuitana Iye, pakuona, ananena mwa yekha, nati, Akadakhala mneneri uyu akadazindikira ali yani, ndi wotani mkaziyo womkhudza Iye, chifukwa ali wochimwa." 
Luke7:40 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Simoni, ndili ndi kanthu kakunena kwa iwe. Ndipo iye anavomera, Mphunzitsi, nenani." 
Luke7:41 Munthu wokongoletsa ndalama anali nao amangawa awiri; mmodziyo anali ndi mangawa ake a marupiya mazana asanu, koma mnzake makumi asanu." 
Luke7:42 Popeza analibe chobwezera iwo, anawakhululukira onse awiri. Chotero, ndani wa iwo adzaposa kumkonda?" 
Luke7:43 Simoni anayankha, nati, Ndiyesa kuti, iye amene anamkhululukira zoposa." 
Luke7:44 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Waweruza bwino. Ndipo m'mene Iye anacheukira kwa mkaziyo, anati kwa Simoni, Upenya mkazi ameneyu kodi? Ndinalowa m'nyumba yako, sunandipatsa madzi akusambitsa mapazi anga; koma uyu anakonkha mapazi anga ndi misozi, nawapukuta ndi tsitsi lake." 
Luke7:45 Sunandipatsa mpsompsono wa chibwenzi; koma uyu sanaleke kupsompsonetsa mapazi anga, chilowere muno Ine." 
Luke7:46 Sunandidzoza mutu wanga ndi mafuta; koma uyu anadzoza mapazi anga ndi mafuta onunkhira bwino. 
Luke7:47 Chifukwa chake, ndinena kwa iwe, Machimo ake, ndiwo ambiri, akhululukidwa; chifukwa anakonda kwambiri; koma munthu amene anamkhululukira pang'ono, iye akonda pang'ono." 
Luke7:48 Ndipo anati kwa mkazi, Machimo ako akhululukidwa." 
Luke7:49 Ndipo iwo akuseama naye pachakudya anayamba kunena mwa okha, Uyu ndani amene akhululukiranso machimo?" 
Luke7:50 Ndipo Iye anati kwa mkaziyo, Chikhulupiriro chako chakupulumutsa iwe; muka ndi mtendere." 
Luke8:1 Ndipo kunali, katapita kamphindi anayendayenda kumizinda ndi kumidzi, kulalikira ndi kuwauza Uthenga Wabwino wa Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndi pamodzi naye khumi ndi awiriwo," 
Luke8:2 ndi akazi ena amene anachiritsidwa ziwanda ndi nthenda zao, ndiwo, Maria wonenedwa Magadala, amene ziwanda zisanu ndi ziwiri zinatuluka mwa iye," 
Luke8:3 ndi Yohana, mkazi wake wa Kuza kapitao wa Herode, ndi Suzana, ndi ena ambiri, amene anawatumikira ndi chuma chao." 
Luke8:4 Ndipo pamene khamu lalikulu la anthu linasonkhana, ndi anthu a kumidzi yonse anafika kwa Iye, anati mwa fanizo:" 
Luke8:5 Anatuluka wofesa kukafesa mbeu zake; ndipo m'kufesa kwake zina zinagwa m'mbali mwa njira; ndipo zinapondedwa, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga zinatha kuzidya." 
Luke8:6 Ndipo zina zinagwa pathanthwe; ndipo pakumera zinatofa msanga, chifukwa zinalibe mnyontho." 
Luke8:7 Ndipo zina zinagwa pakati pa minga; ndi mingayo inaphuka pamodzi nazo, nizitsamwitsa." 
Luke8:8 Ndipo zina zinagwa pa nthaka yokoma, ndipo zinamera, ndi kupatsa zipatso zamakumikhumi. Pakunena Iye izi anafuula, Iye amene ali ndi makutu akumva amve." 
Luke8:9 Ndipo ophunzira ake anamfunsa Iye, kuti, Fanizo ili lili lotani?" 
Luke8:10 Ndipo Iye anati, Kwapatsidwa kwa inu kuzindikira zinsinsi za Ufumu wa Mulungu; koma kwa ena otsala ndinena nao mwa mafanizo; kuti pakuona sangaone, ndi pakumva sangadziwitse." 
Luke8:11 Koma fanizoli litere: Mbeuzo ndizo mau a Mulungu. 
Luke8:12 Ndipo za m'mbali mwa njira ndiwo anthu amene adamva; pamenepo akudza mdierekezi, nachotsa mau m'mitima yao, kuti angakhulupirire ndi kupulumuka." 
Luke8:13 Ndipo za pathanthwe ndiwo amene, pakumva, alandira mau ndi kukondwera; koma alibe mizu; akhulupirira kanthawi, ndipo pa nthawi ya mayesedwe angopatuka." 
Luke8:14 Ndipo zija zinagwa kumingazi, ndiwo amene adamva, ndipo m'kupita kwao atsamwitsidwa ndi nkhawa, ndi chuma, ndi zokondweretsa za moyo, ndipo sakhwimitsa zipatso zamphumphu." 
Luke8:15 Ndipo zija za m'nthaka yokoma, ndiwo amene anamva mau nawasunga mu mtima woona ndi wabwino, nabala zipatso ndi kupirira." 
Luke8:16 Ndipo palibe munthu atayatsa nyali, aivundikira ndi chotengera, kapena kuiika pansi pa kama; koma aiika pa choikapo, kuti iwo akulowamo aone kuunikaku." 
Luke8:17 Pakuti palibe chinthu chobisika, chimene sichidzakhala choonekera; kapena chinsinsi chimene sichidzadziwika ndi kuvumbuluka." 
Luke8:18 Chifukwa chake yang'anirani mamvedwe anu; pakuti kudzapatsidwa kwa iye amene ali nacho; ndipo kwa iye amene alibe chidzachotsedwa, chingakhale chija aoneka ngati ali nacho." 
Luke8:19 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye amake ndi abale ake, ndipo sanakhoze kumfika, chifukwa cha khamu la anthu." 
Luke8:20 Ndipo anamuuza Iye, kuti, Amai wanu ndi abale anu alinkuima kunja, nafuna kuona Inu." 
Luke8:21 Koma Iye anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Amai wanga ndi abale anga ndiwo amene akumva mau a Mulungu, nawachita." 
Luke8:22 Ndipo panali limodzi la masiku aja, Iye analowa m'ngalawa, ndi ophunzira ake; nati kwa iwo, Tiolokere kutsidya lija la nyanja; ndipo anakankhiramo." 
Luke8:23 Ndipo m'mene iwo anali kupita pamadzi, Iye anagona tulo. Ndipo panyanja panatsikira namondwe wa mphepo; ndipo podzala ndi madzi, analimkuopsedwa." 
Luke8:24 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye, namuutsa, nanena, Ambuye, Ambuye, titayika. Ndipo anauka, nadzudzula mphepo ndi mafunde ake a madzi; pomwepo zinaleka, ndipo panagwa bata." 
Luke8:25 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Chikhulupiriro chanu chili kuti? Ndipo m'kuchita mantha anazizwa iwo, nanena wina ndi mnzake, Uyu ndani nanga, kuti angolamula mphepo ndi madzi, ndipo zimvera Iye?" 
Luke8:26 Ndipo iwo anakocheza kudooko ku dziko la Agerasa, ndilo lopenyana ndi Galileya." 
Luke8:27 Ndipo atatuluka pamtunda Iye, anakomana naye mwamuna wa kumudzi, amene anali nazo ziwanda; ndipo masiku ambiri sanavale chovala, nisanakhala m'nyumba, koma m'manda." 
Luke8:28 Ndipo pakuona Yesu, iye anafuula, nagwa pansi pamaso pake, nati ndi mau akulu, Ndili nacho chiyani ndi Inu, Yesu Mwana wa Mulungu Wamkulukulu? Ndikupemphani Inu musandizunze." 
Luke8:29 Pakuti Iye adalamula mzimu wonyansa utuluke mwa munthuyo. Pakuti nthawi zambiri unamgwira; ndipo anthu anammanga ndi maunyolo ndi matangadza kumsungira; ndipo anamwetula zomangirazo, nathawitsidwa ndi chiwandacho kumapululu." 
Luke8:30 Ndipo Yesu anamfunsa iye, kuti, Dzina lako ndiwe yani? Ndipo anati, Legio, chifukwa ziwanda zambiri zidalowa mwa iye." 
Luke8:31 Ndipo zinampempha Iye, kuti asazilamulire zichoke kulowa ku chiphompho chakuya." 
Luke8:32 Ndipo panali pamenepo gulu la nkhumba zambiri zilinkudya m'phiri. Ndipo zinampempha Iye kuti azilole zilowe mu izo. Ndipo anazilola. 
Luke8:33 Ndipo ziwandazo zinatuluka mwa munthu nizilowa mu nkhumba: ndipo gululo linatsika liwiro potsetsereka ndi kulowa m'nyanjamo, nilitsamwa." 
Luke8:34 Ndipo akuwetawo m'mene anaona chimene chinachitika, anathawa, nauza akumudzi ndi kumilaga yake." 
Luke8:35 Ndipo iwo anatuluka kukaona chimene chinachitika; ndipo anadza kwa Yesu, nampeza munthuyo, amene ziwanda zinatuluka mwa iye, alikukhala pansi kumapazi ake a Yesu wovala ndi wa nzeru zake; ndipo iwo anaopa." 
Luke8:36 Ndipo amene anaona anawauza iwo machiritsidwe ake a wogwidwa chiwandayo. 
Luke8:37 Ndipo anthu aunyinji onse a dziko la Agerasa loyandikira anamfunsa Iye achoke kwa iwo; chifukwa anagwidwa ndi mantha akulu. Ndipo Iye analowa m'ngalawa, nabwerera." 
Luke8:38 Ndipo munthuyo amene ziwanda zinatuluka mwa iye anampempha Iye akhale ndi Iye; koma anamuuza apite, nanena," 
Luke8:39 Pita kunyumba kwako, nufotokozere zazikuluzo anakuchitira iwe Mulungu. Ndipo iye anachoka, nalalikira kumudzi wonse zazikuluzo Yesu anamchitira iye." 
Luke8:40 Ndipo pakubwera Yesu, khamu la anthu linamlandira Iye; pakuti onse analikumlindira Iye." 
Luke8:41 Ndipo onani, panadza munthu dzina lake Yairo, ndipo iye ndiye mkulu wa sunagoge; ndipo anagwa pamapazi ake a Yesu, nampempha Iye adze kunyumba kwake;" 
Luke8:42 chifukwa anali naye mwana wamkazi mmodzi yekha, wa zaka zake ngati khumi ndi ziwiri, ndipo analinkumwalira iye. Koma pakupita Iye anthu a mipingo anakanikizana naye." 
Luke8:43 Ndipo mkazi, anali ndi nthenda yachidwalire zaka khumi ndi ziwiri, amene adasudzula asing'anga za moyo wake zonse, ndipo sanathe kuchiritsidwa ndi mmodzi yense," 
Luke8:44 anadza pambuyo pake, nakhudza mphonje ya chovala chake; ndipo pomwepo nthenda yake inaleka." 
Luke8:45 Ndipo Yesu anati, Wandikhudza Ine ndani? Koma pamene onse anakana, Petro ndi iwo akukhala naye anati, Ambuye, anthu aunyinji alikukankhana pa Inu ndi kukanikizana." 
Luke8:46 Koma Yesu anati, Wina wandikhudza Ine; pakuti ndazindikira Ine kuti mphamvu yatuluka mwa Ine." 
Luke8:47 Ndipo mkaziyo pakuona kuti sanabisike, anadza ndi kunthunthumira, nagwa pamaso pake, nafotokoza pamaso pa anthu onsewo chifukwa chake cha kumkhudza Iye, ndi kuti anachiritsidwa pomwepo." 
Luke8:48 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iyeyu, Mwana wanga, chikhulupiriro chako chakupulumutsa iwe; muka ndi mtendere." 
Luke8:49 M'mene Iye anali chilankhulire, anadza wina wochokera kwa mkulu wa sunagoge, nanena, Mwana wako wafa; usamvute Mphunzitsi." 
Luke8:50 Koma Yesu anamva, namyankha, kuti, Usaope; khulupirira kokha, ndipo iye adzapulumutsidwa." 
Luke8:51 Ndipo pakufika Iye kunyumbako, sanaloleze wina kulowa naye pamodzi, koma Petro, ndi Yohane, ndi Yakobo, ndi atate wa mwanayo, ndi amake." 
Luke8:52 Ndipo anthu onse analikumlirira iye ndi kudziguguda pachifuwa. Koma Iye anati, Musalire; pakuti iye sanafe, koma wagona tulo." 
Luke8:53 Ndipo anamseka Iye pwepwete podziwa kuti anafa. 
Luke8:54 Ndipo Iye anamgwira dzanja lake, naitana, nati, Buthu, tauka." 
Luke8:55 Ndipo mzimu wake unabwera, ndipo anauka pomwepo; ndipo Iye anawauza kuti ampatse kanthu ka kudya." 
Luke8:56 Ndipo atate wake ndi amake anadabwa; ndipo analamulira iwo asauze munthu aliyense chimene chinachitika. 
Luke9:1 Ndipo Iye anaitana pamodzi khumi ndi awiriwo nawapatsa mphamvu ndi ulamuliro pa ziwanda zonse, ndi zakuchiritsa nthenda." 
Luke9:2 Ndipo anawatuma kukalalikira Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndi kuchiritsa anthu odwala." 
Luke9:3 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Musanyamule kanthu ka paulendo, kapena ndodo, kapena thumba, kapena mkate, kapena ndalama; ndipo musakhale nao malaya awiri." 
Luke9:4 Ndipo m'nyumba iliyonse mukalowemo, khalani komweko, ndipo muzikachokera kumeneko." 
Luke9:5 Ndipo onse amene sakakulandireni inu, m'mene mutuluka m'mudzi womwewo, sansani fumbi la pa mapazi anu, likhale mboni ya paiwo." 
Luke9:6 Ndipo iwo anatuluka, napita m'midzi yonse, ndi kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino, ndi kuchiritsa ponse." 
Luke9:7 Ndipo Herode chiwangacho anamva mbiri yake ya zonse zinachitika; ndipo inamthetsa nzeru, chifukwa ananena anthu ena, kuti Yohane anauka kwa akufa;" 
Luke9:8 koma ena, kuti Eliya anaoneka; ndipo ena, kuti mneneri wina wa akale aja anauka." 
Luke9:9 Ndipo Herode anati, Yohane ndinamdula mutu ine; koma uyu ndani ndikumva zotere za iye? Ndipo anafunafuna kumuona Iye." 
Luke9:10 Ndipo atabwera atumwi, anamfotokozera Iye zonse anazichita. Ndipo Iye anawatenga, napatuka nao pa okha kunka kumudzi dzina lake Betsaida." 
Luke9:11 Koma unyinji wa anthu, pamene anadziwa, anamtsata Iye; ndipo Iye anawalandira, nalankhula nao za Ufumu wa Mulungu, nachiritsa amene anasowa kuchiritsidwa." 
Luke9:12 Koma dzuwa lidapendeka; ndipo khumi ndi awiriwo anadza, nati kwa Iye, Tauzani makamu a anthu amuke, kuti apite kumidzi yoyandikira ndi kumilaga, kukafuna pogona, ndi kupeza zakudya; chifukwa tili kumalo achipululu kuno." 
Luke9:13 Koma anati kwa iwo, Muwapatse kudya ndinu. Koma anati, Ife tilibe mikate, koma isanu yokha, ndi nsomba ziwiri zokha; kapena timuke ife kukagulira anthu awa onse zakudya." 
Luke9:14 Pakuti anali amuna ngati zikwi zisanu. Koma Iye anati kwa ophunzira ake, Khalitsani iwo pansi magulumagulu, ngati makumi asanuasanu." 
Luke9:15 Ndipo anatero, nawakhalitsa pansi onsewo." 
Luke9:16 Ndipo Iye, m'mene anatenga mikate isanu ija ndi nsomba ziwiri anayang'ana kumwamba, nazidalitsa, nanyema, napatsa ophunzira apereke kwa anthuwo." 
Luke9:17 Ndipo anadya, nakhuta onsewo; natola makombo, madengu khumi ndi awiri." 
Luke9:18 Ndipo kunali, pamene Iye anali kupemphera padera, ophunzira anali naye; ndipo anawafunsa iwo, kuti, Makamuwo a anthu anena kuti Ine ndine yani?" 
Luke9:19 Ndipo anayankha nati, Yohane Mbatizi; koma ena, Eliya; ndi ena, kuti anauka mmodzi wa aneneri akale." 
Luke9:20 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Koma inu munena kuti Ine ndine yani? Ndipo anayankha Petro, nati, Khristu wa Mulungu." 
Luke9:21 Ndipo Iye anawauzitsa iwo, nalamulira kuti asanene ichi kwa munthu aliyense;" 
Luke9:22 nati, Kuyenera kuti Mwana wa Munthu amve zowawa zambiri, ndi kukanidwa ndi akulu, ndi ansembe aakulu, ndi alembi, ndi kuphedwa, ndi kuuka tsiku lachitatu." 
Luke9:23 Ndipo Iye ananena kwa onse, Ngati munthu afuna kudza pambuyo panga, adzikanize yekha, nanyamule mtanda wake tsiku ndi tsiku, nanditsate Ine." 
Luke9:24 Pakuti amene aliyense akafuna kupulumutsa moyo wake, iye adzautaya; koma amene aliyense akataya moyo wake chifukwa cha Ine, iye adzaupulumutsa uwu." 
Luke9:25 Pakuti munthu apindulanji, akadzilemezera dziko lonse lapansi nadzitayapo, kapena kulipapo moyo wake?" 
Luke9:26 Pakuti amene aliyense adzachita manyazi chifukwa cha Ine ndi mau anga, Mwana wa Munthu adzachita manyazi chifukwa cha iye, pamene adzafika ndi ulemerero wake ndi wa Atate, ndi wa angelo oyera." 
Luke9:27 Koma Ine ndinena ndi inu zoonadi, Kuli ena a iwo akuimirira pano, amene sadzalawatu imfa, kufikira kuti adzaona Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke9:28 Ndipo pamene padatha ngati masiku asanu ndi atatu atanena mau amenewa, Iye anatenga Petro ndi Yohane ndi Yakobo apite naye, nakwera m'phiri kukapemphera." 
Luke9:29 Ndipo m'kupemphera kwake, maonekedwe a nkhope yake anasandulika, ndi chovala chake chinayera ndi kunyezimira." 
Luke9:30 Ndipo onani, analikulankhulana naye amuna awiri, ndiwo Mose ndi Eliya;" 
Luke9:31 amene anaonekera m'ulemerero, nanena za kumuka kwake kumene Iye ati adzatsiriza ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:32 Koma Petro ndi iwo anali naye analemedwa ndi tulo; koma m'mene anayera m'maso ndithu, anaona ulemerero wake, ndi amuna awiriwo akuimirira ndi Iye." 
Luke9:33 Ndipo panali polekana iwo aja ndi Iye, Petro anati kwa Yesu, Ambuye, nkwabwino kuti tili pano; ndipo timange misasa itatu, umodzi wa Inu, ndi wina wa Mose, ndi wina wa Eliya; wosadziwa iye chimene alikunena." 
Luke9:34 Ndipo akadalankhula izi, unadza mtambo, nuwaphimba iwo; ndipo anaopa pakulowa iwo mumtambo." 
Luke9:35 Ndipo munatuluka mau mumtambo, nanena, Uyu ndiye Mwana wanga, wosankhidwayo; mverani Iye." 
Luke9:36 Ndipo pakutero mauwo, Yesu anapezedwa ali yekha. Ndipo iwo anakhala chete, ndipo sanauze munthu aliyense masiku aja kanthu konse ka izo anaziona." 
Luke9:37 Ndipo panali, m'mawa mwake, atatsika m'phiri, khamu lalikulu la anthu linakomana naye." 
Luke9:38 Ndipo onani, anafuula munthu wa m'khamulo, nanena, nati, Mphunzitsi, ndikupemphani, yang'anirani mwana wanga; chifukwa ndiye mmodzi yekha wa ine:" 
Luke9:39 ndipo onani, umamgwira iye mzimu, nafuula modzidzimuka; ndipo umamng'amba iye ndi kumchititsa thovu pakamwa, nuchoka pa iye mwa unyenzi, numgola iye." 
Luke9:40 Ndipo ndinapempha ophunzira anu kuti autulutse; koma sanathe. 
Luke9:41 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati, Ha! Obadwa inu osakhulupirira ndi amphulupulu, ndidzakhala ndi inu nthawi yanji, ndi kulekerera inu? Idza naye kuno mwana wako." 
Luke9:42 Ndipo akadadza iye, chiwandacho chinamgwetsa, ndi kumng'ambitsa. Koma Yesu anadzudzula mzimu wonyansawo, nachiritsa mnyamata, nambwezera iye kwa atate wake." 
Luke9:43 Ndipo onse anadabwa pa ukulu wake wa Mulungu. Koma pamene onse analikuzizwa ndi zonse anazichita, Iye anati kwa ophunzira ake," 
Luke9:44 Alowe mau amenewa m'makutu anu; pakuti Mwana wa Munthu adzaperekedwa m'manja a anthu. 
Luke9:45 Koma iwo sanadziwitse mau awa, ndipo anabisidwa kwa iwo, kuti asawadziwe; ndipo anaopa kumfunsa za mau awa." 
Luke9:46 Ndipo anayamba kutsutsana kuti wamkulu mwa iwo ndani. 
Luke9:47 Koma Yesu pakuona kutsutsana kwa mitima yao, anatenga kamwana, nakaimika pambali pake, nati kwa iwo," 
Luke9:48 Amene aliyense akalandire kamwana aka m'dzina langa alandira Ine; ndipo amene andilandira Ine alandira Iye amene anandituma Ine; pakuti iye wakukhala wamng'onong'ono wa inu nonse, yemweyu ndiye wamkulu." 
Luke9:49 Ndipo Yohane anayankha nati, Ambuye, tinaona wina alikutulutsa ziwanda m'dzina lanu; ndipo tinamletsa, chifukwa satsatana nafe." 
Luke9:50 Koma Yesu anati kwa iye, Musamletse, pakuti iye amene satsutsana nanu athandizana nanu." 
Luke9:51 Ndipo panali, pamene anayamba kukwanira masiku akuti alandiridwe Iye kumwamba, Yesu anatsimikiza kuloza nkhope yake kunka ku Yerusalemu," 
Luke9:52 natumiza amithenga patsogolo pake; ndipo ananka, nalowa m'mudzi wa Asamariya, kukamkonzera Iye malo." 
Luke9:53 Ndipo iwo sanamlandire Iye, chifukwa nkhope yake inali yoloza kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:54 Ndipo pamene ophunzira ake Yakobo ndi Yohane anaona, anati, Ambuye, Kodi mufuna kuti ife tiuze moto utsike kumwamba ndi kuwanyeketsa iwo?" 
Luke9:55 Koma Iye anapotoloka nawadzudzula. 
Luke9:56 Ndipo anapita kumudzi kwina. 
Luke9:57 Ndipo m'mene iwo analikuyenda m'njira, munthu anati kwa Iye, Ine ndidzakutsatani kumene kulikonse mukapitako." 
Luke9:58 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Nkhandwe zili nazo nkhwimba, ndi mbalame za kumwamba zisa, koma Mwana wa Munthu alibe potsamira mutu." 
Luke9:59 Ndipo anati kwa munthu wina, Unditsate Ine. Koma iye anati, Mundilole ine, Ambuye, ndithange ndamuka kuika maliro a atate wanga." 
Luke9:60 Koma anati kwa iye, Leka akufa aike akufa a eni okha; koma muka iwe nubukitse mbiri yake ya Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke9:61 Ndipo winanso anati, Ambuye ndidzakutsatani Inu; koma muthange mwandilola kulawirana nao a kunyumba kwanga." 
Luke9:62 Koma Yesu anati kwa iye, Palibe munthu wakugwira chikhasu, nayang'ana za kumbuyo, ayenera Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke10:1 Zitapita izi Ambuye anaika ena makumi asanu ndi awiri, nawatuma iwo awiriawiri pamaso pake kumudzi uliwonse, ndi malo ali onse kumene ati afikeko mwini." 
Luke10:2 Ndipo ananena kwa iwo, Dzinthu dzichuluka, koma antchito achepa; potero pemphani Mwini dzinthu, kuti akankhe antchito kukututa kwake." 
Luke10:3 Mukani; taonani, Ine ndituma inu ngati anaankhosa pakati pa mimbulu." 
Luke10:4 Musanyamule thumba la ndalama kapena thumba la kamba, kapena nsapato; nimusalonjere munthu panjira." 
Luke10:5 Ndipo m'nyumba iliyonse mukalowamo muthange mwanena, Mtendere ukhale pa nyumba iyi." 
Luke10:6 Ndipo mukakhala mwana wa mtendere m'menemo, mtendere wanu udzapumula pa iye; koma ngati mulibe, udzabwerera kwa inu." 
Luke10:7 Ndipo m'nyumba momwemo khalani, ndi kudya ndi kumwa za kwao; pakuti wantchito ayenera mphotho yake; musachokachoka m'nyumba." 
Luke10:8 Ndipo m'mudzi uliwonse mukalowamo, ndipo alandira inu, idyani zomwezi akupatsani;" 
Luke10:9 ndipo chiritsani odwala ali momwemo nimunene nao, Ufumu wa Mulungu wayandikira kwa inu. Koma kumudzi uliwonse mukalowako," 
Luke10:10 ndipo salandira inu, m'mene mwatuluka kumakwalala ake nenani," 
Luke10:11 Lingakhale fumbi lochokera kumudzi kwanu, lomamatika kumapazi athu, tilisansira pa inu; koma zindikirani ichi, kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu wayandikira." 
Luke10:12 Ndinena ndi inu kuti tsiku lijalo ku Sodomu kudzapiririka kuposa mudzi umenewo. 
Luke10:13 Tsoka iwe, Korazini! Tsoka iwe Betsaida! Chifukwa kuti zikadachitika m'Tiro ndi Sidoni zamphamvuzi zidachitika mwa inu, akadalapa kale lomwe ndi kukhala pansi ovala chiguduli ndi phulusa." 
Luke10:14 Koma ku Tiro ndi Sidoni kudzapiririka m'chiweruziro, koposa inu." 
Luke10:15 Ndipo iwe, Kapernao, kodi udzakwezedwa kufikira Kumwamba? Udzatsitsidwa kufikira ku dziko la akufa." 
Luke10:16 Iye wakumvera inu, andimvera Ine; ndipo iye wakukana inu, andikana Ine; ndipo iye wakukana Ine amkana Iye amene anandituma Ine." 
Luke10:17 Ndipo makumi asanu ndi awiri aja anabwera mokondwera, nanena, Ambuye, zingakhale ziwanda zinatigonjera ife m'dzina lanu." 
Luke10:18 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndinaona Satana alinkugwa ngati mphezi wochokera kumwamba." 
Luke10:19 Taonani, ndakupatsani ulamuliro wakuponda pa njoka ndi zinkhanira, ndi pa mphamvu iliyonse ya mdaniyo; ndipo kulibe kanthu kadzakuipsani konse." 
Luke10:20 Koma musakondwera nako kuti mizimu idakugonjerani, koma kondwerani kuti maina anu alembedwa m'Mwamba." 
Luke10:21 Nthawi yomweyo Iye anakondwera ndi Mzimu Woyera, nati, Ndikuvomerezani Inu, Atate, Ambuye wa kumwamba ndi wa dziko, kuti izi munazibisira anzeru ndi ozindikira, ndipo munaziululira ana amakanda; indedi, Atate, pakuti kotero kudakondweretsa pamaso panu." 
Luke10:22 Zonse zaperekedwa kwa Ine ndi Atate wanga; ndipo palibe munthu azindikira Mwana ali yani, koma Atate; ndipo Atate ali yani, koma Mwana, ndi iye amene Mwana afuna kumuululira Iye." 
Luke10:23 Ndipo m'mene anapotolokera kwa ophunzira ake, ali pa okha, anati, Odala masowo akuona zimene muona." 
Luke10:24 Pakuti ndinena ndi inu kuti aneneri ndi mafumu ambiri anafuna kuona zimene inu muziona, koma sanazione; ndi kumva zimene mukumva, koma sanazimve." 
Luke10:25 Ndipo taonani, wachilamulo wina anaimirira namuyesa Iye, nanena, Mphunzitsi, ndidzalowa moyo wosatha ndi kuchita chiyani?" 
Luke10:26 Ndipo anati kwa iye, M'chilamulo mulembedwa chiyani? Uwerenga bwanji?" 
Luke10:27 Ndipo iye anayankha nati, Uzikonda Ambuye Mulungu wako ndi mtima wako wonse, ndi moyo wako wonse, ndi mphamvu yako yonse, ndi nzeru zako zonse, ndi mnansi wako monga iwe mwini." 
Luke10:28 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Wayankha bwino; chita ichi, ndipo udzakhala ndi moyo." 
Luke10:29 Koma iye, pofuna kudziyesa yekha wolungama, anati kwa Yesu, Ndipo mnansi wanga ndani?" 
Luke10:30 Ndipo Yesu anamlanda mau, nati, Munthu wina anatsika kuchokera ku Yerusalemu kunka ku Yeriko; ndipo anagwa m'manja a achifwamba amene anamvula zovala, namkwapula, nachoka atamsiya wofuna kufa." 
Luke10:31 Ndipo kudangotero kuti wansembe wina anatsika njirayo, ndipo pakumuona iye anapita mbali ina." 
Luke10:32 Momwemonso Mlevi, pofika pamenepo, ndi kumuona, anapita mbali ina." 
Luke10:33 Koma Msamariya wina ali pa ulendo wake anadza pali iye; ndipo pakumuona, anagwidwa chifundo," 
Luke10:34 nadza kwa iye, namanga mabala ake, nathirapo mafuta ndi vinyo; ndipo anamuika iye pa nyama yake ya iye yekha, nadza naye kunyumba ya alendo, namsungira." 
Luke10:35 Ndipo m'mawa mwake anatulutsa marupiya atheka awiri napatsa mwini nyumba ya alendo, nati, Msungire iye, ndipo chilichonse umpatsa koposa, ine, pobwera, ndidzakubwezera iwe." 
Luke10:36 Uti wa awa atatu, uyesa iwe, anakhala mnansi wa iye uja adagwa m'manja a achifwamba?" 
Luke10:37 Ndipo anati, Iye wakumchitira chifundo. Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Pita nuchite iwe momwemo." 
Luke10:38 Ndipo pakupita paulendo pao Iye analowa m'mudzi wina; ndipo mkazi wina dzina lake Marita anamlandira Iye kunyumba kwake. 
Luke10:39 Ndipo anali ndi mbale wake wotchedwa Maria, ndiye wakukhala pa mapazi a Ambuye, namva mau ake." 
Luke10:40 Koma Marita anatekeseka ndi kutumikira kwambiri; ndipo anadzako nati, Ambuye, kodi simusamala kuti mbale wanga anandisiya nditumikire ndekha? Mumuuze tsono kuti andithandize." 
Luke10:41 Koma Ambuye anayankha nati kwa iye, Marita, Marita, uda nkhawa nuvutika ndi zinthu zambiri;" 
Luke10:42 koma chisoweka chinthu chimodzi, pakuti Maria anasankha dera lokoma limene silidzachotsedwa kwa iye." 
Luke11:1 Ndipo kunali, pakukhala Iye pamalo pena ndi kupemphera, m'mene analeka, wina wa ophunzira ake anati kwa Iye, Ambuye, tiphunzitseni ife kupemphera, monganso Yohane anaphunzitsa ophunzira ake." 
Luke11:2 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, M'mene mupemphera nenani, Atate, Dzina lanu liyeretsedwa; Ufumu wanu udze;" 
Luke11:3 tipatseni ife tsiku ndi tsiku chakudya cha patsiku. 
Luke11:4 Ndipo mutikhululukire ife machimo athu; pakuti ifenso tikhululukira munthu yense wa mangawa athu. Ndipo musatitengere ife kokatiyesa. 
Luke11:5 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndani wa inu adzakhala ndi bwenzi lake, nadzapita kwa iye pakati pa usiku, nadzati kwa iye, Bwenzi, ndibwereke mikate itatu;" 
Luke11:6 popeza wandidzera ndipo ndilibe chompatsa; 
Luke11:7 ndipo iyeyu wa m'katimo poyankha akati, Usandivuta; pakhomo mpotseka tsopano, ndipo ana anga ali nane pamodzi pogona; sindikhoza kuuka ndi kukupatsa?" 
Luke11:8 Ndinena ndi inu, ngakhale sadzauka ndi kumpatsa, chifukwa ali bwenzi lake, koma chifukwa cha liuma lake adzauka nadzampatsa iye zilizonse azisowa." 
Luke11:9 Ndipo Ine ndinena ndi inu, Pemphani, ndipo adzakupatsani; funani, ndipo mudzapeza; gogodani ndipo adzakutsegulirani." 
Luke11:10 Pakuti yense wakupempha alandira; ndi wofuna apeza; ndi iye amene agogoda adzamtsegulira. 
Luke11:11 Ndipo ndani wa inu ali atate, mwana wake akadzampempha mkate, adzampatsa mwala? Kapena nsomba, nadzamninkha njoka m'malo mwa nsomba?" 
Luke11:12 Kapena akadzampempha dzira kodi adzampatsa chinkhanira? 
Luke11:13 Potero, ngati inu, okhala oipa, mudziwa kupatsa ana anu mphatso zabwino, koposa kotani nanga Atate wanu wa Kumwamba adzapatsa Mzimu Woyera kwa iwo akumpempha Iye?" 
Luke11:14 Ndipo analikutulutsa chiwanda chosalankhula. Ndipo kunali, chitatuluka chiwanda, wosalankhulayo analankhula; ndipo makamu a anthu anazizwa." 
Luke11:15 Koma ena mwa iwo anati, Ndi Belezebulu mkulu wa ziwanda amatulutsa ziwanda." 
Luke11:16 Koma ena anamuyesa, nafuna kwa Iye chizindikiro chochokera Kumwamba." 
Luke11:17 Koma Iye, podziwa zolingirira zao, anati kwa iwo, Ufumu uliwonse wogawanika m'kati mwake upasuka; ndipo nyumba ikagawanika m'kati mwake igwa." 
Luke11:18 Ndiponso ngati Satana agawanika kudzitsutsa mwini, udzaimika bwanji ufumu wake? Popeza munena kuti nditulutsa ziwanda ndi Belezebulu." 
Luke11:19 Koma ngati Ine ndimatulutsa ziwanda ndi Belezebulu, ana anu azitulutsa ndi yani? Mwa ichi iwo adzakhala oweruza anu." 
Luke11:20 Koma ngati Ine nditulutsa ziwanda ndi chala cha Mulungu, pamenepo Ufumu wa Mulungu wafikira inu." 
Luke11:21 Pamene paliponse mwini mphamvu alonda pabwalo pake zinthu zake zili mumtendere; 
Luke11:22 koma pamene paliponse amdzera wakumposa mphamvu, nakamlaka, amchotsera zida zake zonse zimene anazitama, nagawa zofunkha zake." 
Luke11:23 Iye wosavomerezana ndi Ine atsutsana ndi Ine; ndipo iye wosasonkhanitsa pamodzi ndi Ine amwaza. 
Luke11:24 Pamene paliponse mzimu wonyansa ukatuluka mwa munthu, upyola malo opanda madzi nufunafuna mpumulo; ndipo posaupeza unena, Ndidzabwera kunyumba kwanga kumene ndinatulukako;" 
Luke11:25 ndipo pofika, uipeza yosesa ndi yokonzeka." 
Luke11:26 Pomwepo upita nutenga mizimu ina isanu ndi iwiri yoipa yoposa ndi uwu mwini; ndipo ilowa nikhalira komweko; ndipo makhalidwe otsiriza a munthu uyu aipa koposa oyambawo. 
Luke11:27 Ndipo kunali, pakunena izi Iye, mkazi wina mwa khamu la anthu anakweza mau, nati kwa Iye, Yodala mimba imene idakubalani, ndi mawere amene munayamwa." 
Luke11:28 Koma Iye anati, Inde, koma odala iwo akumva mau a Mulungu, nawasunga." 
Luke11:29 Ndipo pakusonkhana pamodzi makamu a anthu, anayamba kunena, Mbadwo uno ndi mbadwo woipa; ufuna chizindikiro, ndipo chizindikiro sichidzapatsidwa kwa uwu koma chizindikiro cha Yona." 
Luke11:30 Pakuti monga ngati Yona anali chizindikiro kwa Aninive, chotero adzakhalanso Mwana wa Munthu kwa mbadwo uno." 
Luke11:31 Mfumu yaikazi ya kumwera idzaimirira pa mlandu wotsiriza pamodzi ndi amuna a mbadwo uno, nadzawatsutsa; pakuti anadza kuchokera kumalekezero a dziko kudzamva nzeru za Solomoni; ndipo onani, woposa Solomoni ali pano." 
Luke11:32 Amuna a ku Ninive adzaimirira pa mlandu wotsiriza pamodzi ndi anthu a mbadwo uno, nadzawatsutsa; pakuti iwo analapa pa kulalikira kwa Yona; ndipo onani, wakuposa Yona ali pano." 
Luke11:33 Palibe munthu, atayatsa nyali, aiika m'chipinda chapansi, kapena pansi pa mbiya, koma pa choikapo chake, kuti iwo akulowamo aone kuunika." 
Luke11:34 Nyali ya thupi ndiyo diso lako; pamene paliponse diso lako lili langwiro thupi lako lonse liunikidwanso monsemo; koma likakhala loipa, thupi lako lomwe lili la mdima wokhawokha." 
Luke11:35 Potero yang'anira kuunika kuli mwa iwe kungakhale mdima. 
Luke11:36 Pamenepo, ngati thupi lako lonse liunikidwa losakhala nalo dera lake lamdima, lidzakhala lounikidwa monsemo, ngati pamene nyali ndi kuwala kwake ikuunikira iwe." 
Luke11:37 Ndipo pakulankhula Iye, anamuitana Mfarisi kuti adye naye; ndipo analowa naseama kudya." 
Luke11:38 Ndipo anazizwa Mfarisiyo, pakuona kuti anayamba chakudya asanasambe." 
Luke11:39 Koma Ambuye anati kwa iye, Tsopano inu Afarisi muyeretsa kunja kwake kwa chikho ndi mbale, koma m'kati mwanu mudzala zolanda ndi zoipa." 
Luke11:40 Opusa inu, kodi Iye wopanga kunja kwake sanapangenso m'kati mwake?" 
Luke11:41 Koma patsani mphatso yachifundo za m'katimo; ndipo onani, zonse zili zoyera kwa inu." 
Luke11:42 Koma tsoka inu, Afarisi! Chifukwa mupereka limodzi la magawo khumi la timbeu tonunkhira, ndi timbeu tokometsa chakudya ndi ndiwo zonse, ndipo mumaleka chiweruzo ndi chikondi cha Mulungu; mwenzi mutachita izi, ndi kusasiya zinazo." 
Luke11:43 Tsoka inu, Afarisi! Chifukwa mukonda mipando yaulemu m'masunagoge, ndi kupatsidwa moni m'misika." 
Luke11:44 Tsoka inu! Chifukwa muli ngati manda osaoneka, ndipo anthu akuyendayenda pamwamba pao sadziwa." 
Luke11:45 Ndipo mmodzi wa achilamulo anayankha, nanena kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, ndi kunena izi, mutitonza ifenso." 
Luke11:46 Ndipo anati, Tsoka inunso, achilamulo inu! Chifukwa musenzetsa anthu akatundu osautsa ponyamula, ndipo inu nomwe simukhudza akatunduwo ndi chala chanu chimodzi." 
Luke11:47 Tsoka inu! Chifukwa mumanga za pa manda a aneneri, ndipo makolo anu anawapha." 
Luke11:48 Chomwecho muli mboni, ndipo muvomera ntchito za makolo anu; chifukwa iwotu anawapha, koma inu muwamangira iwo zapamanda." 
Luke11:49 Mwa ichinso nzeru ya Mulungu inati, Ndidzatumiza kwa iwo aneneri ndi atumwi; ndipo ena a iwo adzawapha, nadzawazunza;" 
Luke11:50 kuti mwazi wa aneneri onse, wakhetsedwa kuyambira kukhazika kwa dziko lapansi, ukafunidwe kwa anthu a mbadwo uno;" 
Luke11:51 kuyambira mwazi wa Abele kufikira mwazi wa Zekariya, amene anamphera pakati pa guwa la nsembe ndi nyumba ya Kachisi. Indetu, ndinena kwa inu udzafunidwa kwa anthu a mbadwo uno." 
Luke11:52 Tsoka inu, achilamulo! Chifukwa munachotsa chifungulo cha nzeru; inu simunalowamo nokha, ndipo munawaletsa iwo analinkulowa." 
Luke11:53 Ndipo pamene Iye anatuluka m'menemo, alembi ndi Afarisi anayamba kumuumiriza Iye kolimba, ndi kumtompha Iye ndi zinthu zambiri;" 
Luke11:54 namlindira akakole kanthu kotuluka m'kamwa mwake. 
Luke12:1 Pomwepo pamene anthu a zikwizikwi a khamu anasonkhana pamodzi, kotero kuti anapondana, Iye anayamba kunena kwa ophunzira ake poyamba, Tachenjerani nokha ndi chotupitsa mikate cha Afarisi, chimene chili chinyengo." 
Luke12:2 Koma kulibe kanthu kovundikiridwa kamene sikadzaululidwa; ndi kobisika kamene sikadzadziwika. 
Luke12:3 Chifukwa chake zonse zimene mwazinena mumdima zidzamveka poyera; ndipo chimene mwalankhula m'khutu, m'zipinda za m'kati chidzalalikidwa pa machindwi a nyumba." 
Luke12:4 Ndipo ndinena kwa inu, abwenzi anga, Musaope iwo akupha thupi, ndipo akatha ichi alibe kanthu kena angathe kuchita." 
Luke12:5 Koma ndidzakulangizani amene muzimuopa; taopani Iye amene atatha kupha ali ndi mphamvu yakutaya ku Gehena, inde, ndinena ndinu opani ameneyo." 
Luke12:6 Kodi mpheta zisanu sizigulidwa timakobiri tiwiri? Ndipo palibe imodzi ya izo iiwalika pamaso pa Mulungu; 
Luke12:7 komatu ngakhale matsitsi onse a pamutu panu awerengedwa. Musaopa, muposa mtengo wake wa mpheta zambiri." 
Luke12:8 Ndipo ndinena kwa inu, Amene aliyense akavomereza Ine pamaso pa anthu, inde, Mwana wa Munthu adzamvomereza iye pamaso pa angelo a Mulungu;" 
Luke12:9 Koma iye wondikana Ine pamaso pa anthu, iye adzakanidwa pamaso pa angelo a Mulungu." 
Luke12:10 Ndipo amene aliyense adzanenera Mwana wa Munthu zoipa adzakhululukidwa; koma amene anenera Mzimu Woyera zamwano sadzakhululukidwa. 
Luke12:11 Ndipo pamene paliponse adzamuka nanu kumlandu wa m'sunagoge ndi kwa akulu, ndi aulamuliro, musade nkhawa ndi kuti mukadzikanira bwanji, ndipo ndi mau otani, kapena mukanena chiyani;" 
Luke12:12 pakuti Mzimu Woyera adzaphunzitsa inu nthawi yomweyo zimene muyenera kuzinena. 
Luke12:13 Ndipo munthu wa m'khamulo anati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, uzani mbale wanga agawane ndi ine chuma chamasiye." 
Luke12:14 Koma anati kwa iye, Munthu iwe, ndani anandiika Ine ndikhale woweruza, kapena wakugawira inu?" 
Luke12:15 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Yang'anirani, mudzisungire kupewa msiriro uliwonse; chifukwa moyo wake wa munthu sulingana ndi kuchuluka kwa zinthu zake ali nazo." 
Luke12:16 Ndipo Iye ananena nao fanizo, kuti, Munda wake wa munthu mwini chuma unapatsa bwino." 
Luke12:17 Ndipo anaganizaganiza mwa yekha nanena, Ndidzatani ine, popeza ndilibe mosungiramo zipatso zanga?" 
Luke12:18 Ndipo anati Ndidzatere: ndidzapasula nkhokwe zanga, ndi kumanganso zazikulu, ndipo ndidzasungiramo dzinthu zanga zonse, ndi chuma changa." 
Luke12:19 Ndipo ndidzati kwa moyo wanga, Moyo iwe, uli nacho chuma chambiri chosungika kufikira zaka zambiri; tapumulatu, nudye, numwe, nukondwere." 
Luke12:20 Koma Mulungu anati kwa iye, Wopusa iwe, usiku womwe uno udzafunidwa moyo wako; ndipo zinthu zimene unazikonza zidzakhala za yani?" 
Luke12:21 Atero iye wakudziunjikira chuma mwini yekha wosakhala nacho chuma cha kwa Mulungu. 
Luke12:22 Ndipo Iye anati kwa ophunzira ake, Chifukwa chake ndinena ndinu, Musade nkhawa ndi moyo wanu, chimene mudzadya; kapena ndi thupi lanu, chimene mudzavala." 
Luke12:23 Pakuti moyo uli woposa chakudya, ndi thupi liposa chovala." 
Luke12:24 Lingirirani makungubwi, kuti samafesai, kapena kutemai; alibe nyumba yosungiramo, kapena nkhokwe; ndipo Mulungu awadyetsa; nanga inu simuziposa mbalame kwambiri!" 
Luke12:25 Ndipo ndani wa inu, ndi kuda nkhawa angathe kuonjeza mkono pa msinkhu wake?" 
Luke12:26 Kotero ngati simungathe ngakhale chaching'onong'ono, muderanji nkhawa chifukwa cha zina zija?" 
Luke12:27 Lingalirani maluwa, makulidwe ao; sagwiritsa ntchito ndi kusapota; koma ndinena kwa inu, Ngakhale Solomoni, mu ulemerero wake wonse sanavale ngati limodzi la awa." 
Luke12:28 Koma ngati Mulungu aveka kotere udzu wa kuthengo ukhala lero, ndipo mawa uponyedwa pamoto; nanga inu sadzakuninkhani koposa, inu okhulupirira pang'ono?" 
Luke12:29 Ndipo inu musafunefune chimene mudzadya, ndi chimene mudzamwa; ndipo musakayike mtima." 
Luke12:30 Pakuti izi zonse mitundu ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi amazifunafuna; koma Atate wanu adziwa kuti musowa zimenezi. 
Luke12:31 Komatu tafunafunani Ufumu wake, ndipo izi adzakuonjezerani." 
Luke12:32 Musaopa, kagulu ka nkhosa inu; chifukwa Atate wanu akonda kukupatsani Ufumu." 
Luke12:33 Gulitsani zinthu muli nazo, nimupatse mphatso zachifundo; mudzikonzere matumba a ndalama amene sakutha, chuma chosatha m'Mwamba, kumene mbala siziyandikira, ndipo njenjete siziononga." 
Luke12:34 Pakuti kumene kuli chuma chanu, komweko kudzakhalanso mtima wanu." 
Luke12:35 Khalani odzimangira m'chuuno, ndipo nyali zanu zikhale zoyaka;" 
Luke12:36 ndipo inu nokha khalani ofanana ndi anthu oyembekezera mbuye wao, pamene ati abwera kuchokera kuukwati; kuti pakudza iye, nakagogoda, akamtsegulire pomwepo." 
Luke12:37 Odala akapolowo amene mbuye wao, pakudza iye, adzawapeza odikira; indetu ndinena ndinu, kuti iye adzadzimangira m'chuuno, nadzawakhalitsa pansi kudya, nadzafika, nadzawatumikira." 
Luke12:38 Ndipo akadza ulonda wachiwiri, kapena wachitatu, nakawapeza atero, odala amenewa." 
Luke12:39 Koma zindikirani ichi, kuti mwini nyumba akadadziwa nthawi yake yakudza mbala, akadadikira, ndipo sakadalola nyumba yake ibooledwe." 
Luke12:40 Khalani okonzeka inunso; chifukwa nthawi imene simulingirira, Mwana wa Munthu akudza." 
Luke12:41 Ndipo Petro anati, Ambuye, kodi fanizo ili mwalinena kwa ife, kapena kwa onse?" 
Luke12:42 Ndipo Ambuye anati, Ndani tsono ali mdindo wokhulupirika ndi wanzeru, amene mbuye wake adzamuika kapitao wa pa banja lake, kuwapatsa iwo phoso lao pa nthawi yake?" 
Luke12:43 Wodala kapoloyo amene mbuye wake pakufika, adzampeza alikuchita chotero." 
Luke12:44 Ndinena ndinu zoona, kuti adzamuika iye kapitao wa pa zonse ali nazo." 
Luke12:45 Koma kapolo uyo akanena mumtima mwake, Mbuye wanga azengereza kudza; ndimo akayamba kupanda anyamata ndi adzakazi ndi kudya ndi kumwa, ndi kuledzera;" 
Luke12:46 mbuye wa kapolo uyo adzafika tsiku lakuti samuyembekezera, ndi nthawi yakuti saidziwa, nadzamdula iye pakati nadzamuika dera lake pamodzi ndi anthu osakhulupirira." 
Luke12:47 Ndipo kapolo uyo, wodziwa chifuniro cha mbuye wake, ndipo sanakonza, ndi kusachita zonga za chifuniro chakecho, adzakwapulidwa mikwapulo yambiri." 
Luke12:48 Koma iye amene sanachidziwe, ndipo anazichita zoyenera mikwapulo, adzakwapulidwa pang'ono. Ndipo kwa munthu aliyense adampatsa zambiri, kwa iye adzafuna zambiri; ndipo amene anamuikizira zambiri, adzamuuza abwezere zoposa." 
Luke12:49 Ine ndinadzera kuponya moto pa dziko lapansi; ndipo ndifunanji ngati unatha kuyatsidwa? 
Luke12:50 Koma ndili ndi ubatizo ndikabatizidwe nao; ndipo ndikanikizidwa Ine kufikira ukatsirizidwa! 
Luke12:51 Kodi muyesa kuti ndinadzera kudzapatsa mtendere pa dziko lapansi? Ndinena kwa inu, Iaitu, komatu kutsutsana;" 
Luke12:52 pakuti kuyambira tsopano adzakhala m'nyumba imodzi anthu asanu, atatu adzatsutsana ndi awiri, ndi awiri adzatsutsana ndi atatu." 
Luke12:53 Adzatsutsana atate ndi mwana wake, ndi mwana ndi atate wake; amake adzatsutsana ndi mwana wamkazi, ndi mwana wamkazi ndi amake, mpongozi adzatsutsana ndi mkazi wa mwana wake, ndi mkaziyo ndi mpongozi wake." 
Luke12:54 Koma Iye ananenanso kwa makamu a anthu, Pamene paliponse muona mtambo wokwera kumadzulo, pomwepo munena, kuti, Ikudza mvula; ndipo itero." 
Luke12:55 Ndipo pamene mphepo ya kumwera iomba, munena, kuti, Kudzakhala kutenthatu; ndipo kuterodi." 
Luke12:56 Onyenga inu, mudziwa kuzindikira nkhope yake ya dziko lapansi ndi ya thambo; koma simudziwa bwanji kuzindikira nyengo yino?" 
Luke12:57 Ndipo inunso, pa nokha mulekeranji kuweruza kolungama?" 
Luke12:58 Pakuti pamene ulikupita naye mnzako wa mlandu kwa oweruza, fulumira panjira kutha naye mlandu, kuti angakokere iwe kwa oweruza, ndipo oweruzayo angapereke iwe kwa msilikali, ndi msilikali angaponye iwe m'nyumba yandende." 
Luke12:59 Ine ndinena kwa iwe, Sudzatulukamo konse kufikira utalipira kakobiri kukumaliza." 
Luke13:1 Ndipo anakhalako nthawi yomweyo, anthu ena amene anamuuza Iye za Agalileya, amene Pilato anasanganiza mwazi wao ndi nsembe zao." 
Luke13:2 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi muyesa kuti Agalileya aja anali anthu akuchimwa koposa Agalileya onse, chifukwa anamva zowawa izi?" 
Luke13:3 Ndinena kwa inu, Iaitu; koma ngati inu simutembenuka mtima, mudzaonongeka nonse momwemo." 
Luke13:4 Kapena iwo aja khumi ndi asanu ndi atatu, amene nsanja yaitali ya m'Siloamu inawagwera, ndi kuwapha; kodi muyesa kuti iwo anali olakwa koposa anthu onse akukhala m'Yerusalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Ndinena kwa inu, Iaitu; koma ngati simutembenuka mtima, mudzaonongeka nonse chimodzimodzi." 
Luke13:6 Ndipo Iye ananena fanizo ili: Munthu wina anali ndi mkuyu wooka m'munda wake wamphesa. Ndipo anadza nafuna chipatso pa uwu, koma anapeza palibe." 
Luke13:7 Ndipo anati kwa wosungira munda wamphesa, Taona, zaka zapita zitatu ndimadza ine kudzafuna chipatso pa mkuyu uwu, ndipo ndimapeza palibe: taulikha; uyeseranjinso nthaka yopanda pake?" 
Luke13:8 Ndipo iye anayankha nanena naye, Mbuye, baulekani ngakhale chaka chino chomwe, kufikira ndidzaukumbira kwete, ndithirepo ndowe;" 
Luke13:9 ndipo ngati udzabala chipatso kuyambira pamenepo, chabwino; koma ngati iai, mudzaulikhatu." 
Luke13:10 Ndipo analikuphunzitsa m'sunagoge mwina, tsiku la Sabata." 
Luke13:11 Ndipo mkazi anali nao mzimu wakumdwalitsa zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu; nakhala wopeteka, ndimo analibe mphamvu konse yakuweramuka." 
Luke13:12 Ndipo Yesu m'mene anamuona, anamuitana, nanena naye, Mkaziwe, wamasulidwa kudwala kwako." 
Luke13:13 Ndipo anaika manja ake pa iye; ndipo pomwepo anaongoledwa, nalemekeza Mulungu." 
Luke13:14 Ndipo mkulu wa sunagoge anavutika mtima, chifukwa Yesu anachiritsa tsiku la Sabata, nayankha, nanena kwa khamulo, Alipo masiku asanu ndi limodzi, m'menemo anthu ayenera kugwira ntchito, chifukwa chake idzani kudzachiritsidwa momwemo, koma tsiku la Sabata ai." 
Luke13:15 Koma Ambuye anamyankha iye, nati, Onyenga inu, kodi munthu aliyense wa inu samaimasula ng'ombe yake, kapena bulu wake ku chodyeramo, tsiku la Sabata, kupita nayo kukaimwetsa madzi?" 
Luke13:16 Ndipo mkazi uyu, ndiye mwana wa Abrahamu, amene Satana anammanga, onani, zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu, nanga si kuyenera kodi, kuti amasulidwe nsinga yake imeneyi tsiku la Sabata?" 
Luke13:17 Ndipo pamene Iye anatero, onse aja akutsutsana naye ananyazitsidwa; ndipo anthu onse a m'khamu anakondwera ndi zinthu zonse za ulemererozo zinachitidwa ndi Iye." 
Luke13:18 Pamenepo ananena, Ufumu wa Mulungu ufanana ndi chiyani? Ndipo ndidzaufanizira ndi chiyani?" 
Luke13:19 Ufanana ndi kambeu kampiru, kamene munthu anatenga, nakaponya m'munda wakewake, ndipo kanamera, kanakula mtengo; ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga zinabindikira mu nthambi zake." 
Luke13:20 Ndiponso anati, Ndidzafanizira Ufumu wa Mulungu ndi chiyani?" 
Luke13:21 Ufanana ndi chotupitsa mikate, chimene mkazi anatenga, nachibisa mu miyeso itatu ya ufa, kufikira unatupo wonsewo." 
Luke13:22 Ndipo Iye anapita pakati pa mizinda ndi midzi, naphunzitsa, nayenda ulendo kunkabe ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke13:23 Ndipo munthu anati kwa Iye, Ambuye, akupulumutsidwa ndiwo owerengeka kodi? Koma Iye anati kwa iwo," 
Luke13:24 Yesetsani kulowa pa khomo lopapatiza; chifukwa anthu ambiri, ndikuuzani, adzafunafuna kulowamo, koma sadzakhoza." 
Luke13:25 Pamene atauka mwini nyumba natseka pakhomo, ndipo inu mudzayamba kuima pabwalo, ndi kugogoda pachitseko, ndi kunena, Ambuye titsegulireni ife; ndipo Iye adzayankha nadzati ndi inu, Sindidziwa inu kumene muchokerako;" 
Luke13:26 pomwepo mudzayamba kunena, Ife tinadya ndi kumwa pamaso panu, ndipo munaphunzitsa m'makwalala a kwathu;" 
Luke13:27 ndipo Iye adzati, Ndinena kwa inu, sindidziwa kumene muchokera inu; chokani pa Ine, nonse akuchita chosalungama." 
Luke13:28 Kudzakhala komweko kulira ndi kukukuta mano, pamene mudzaona Abrahamu, ndi Isaki, ndi Yakobo, ndi aneneri onse, mu Ufumu wa Mulungu, koma inu nokha mutulutsidwa kunja." 
Luke13:29 Ndipo anthu adzachokera kum'mawa, ndi kumadzulo, ndi kumpoto, ndi kumwera, nadzakhala pansi mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke13:30 Ndipo onani, alipo akuthungo amene adzakhala oyamba, ndipo alipo oyamba adzakhala akuthungo." 
Luke13:31 Nthawi yomweyo anadzapo Afarisi ena, nanena kwa Iye, Tulukani, chokani kuno; chifukwa Herode afuna kupha Inu." 
Luke13:32 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Pitani kauzeni nkhandweyo, Taonani, nditulutsa ziwanda, nditsiriza machiritso lero ndi mawa, ndipo mkucha nditsirizidwa." 
Luke13:33 Komatu ndiyenera ndipite ulendo wanga lero ndi mawa ndi mkucha, chifukwa sikuloleka kuti mneneri aonongeke kunja kwake kwa Yerusalemu." 
Luke13:34 Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu, iwe wakupha aneneri, ndi wakuponya miyala iwo atumidwa kwa iwe! Ha! Kawirikawiri ndinafuna kusonkhanitsa ana ako, monga ngati thadzi ndi anapiye ake m'mapiko ake, ndipo simunafunai!" 
Luke13:35 Onani nyumba yanu isiyidwa kwa inu yabwinja; ndipo ndinena kwa inu kuti, Simudzandiona Ine, kufikira mudzati, Wolemekezeka Iye amene akudza m'dzina la Ambuye." 
Luke14:1 Ndipo panali pamene Iye analowa m'nyumba ya mmodzi wa akulu a Afarisi tsiku la Sabata, kukadya, iwo analikumzonda Iye." 
Luke14:2 Ndipo onani, panali pamaso pake munthu wambulu." 
Luke14:3 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa achilamulo ndi Afarisi, nanena, Kodi nkuloledwa tsiku la Sabata kuchiritsa, kapena iai?" 
Luke14:4 Koma iwo anakhala chete. Ndipo anamtenga namchiritsa, namuuza apite." 
Luke14:5 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndani wa inu bulu wake kapena ng'ombe yake itagwa m'chitsime, ndipo sadzaitulutsa pomwepo tsiku la Sabata kodi?" 
Luke14:6 Ndipo iwo sanathe kumbwezera mau pa zinthu izi. 
Luke14:7 Ndipo Iye ananena fanizo kwa oitanidwa, popenya kuti amadzisankhira mipando yaulemu, nanena kwa iwo," 
Luke14:8 Pamene paliponse waitanidwa iwe ndi munthu ku chakudya cha ukwati, usaseama pa mpando waulemu; kuti kapena wina waulemu wakuposa iwe akaitanidwe ndi iye," 
Luke14:9 ndipo pakufika iye amene adaitana iwe ndi uyu, adzati kwa iwe, Mpatse uyu malo; ndipo pomwepo udzayamba manyazi kukhala pa mpando wa kuthungo." 
Luke14:10 Koma pamene paliponse waitanidwa iwe, pita nukhale pansi pa malo a kuthungo; kotero kuti pamene akadza iye anakuitana iwe, akanena ndi iwe, Bwenzi langa, sendera, kwera kuno; pomwepo udzakhala ndi ulemerero pamaso pa onse akuseama pachakudya pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Luke14:11 Chifukwa munthu aliyense wakudzikuza adzachepetsedwa; ndipo wakudzichepetsa adzakulitsidwa. 
Luke14:12 Ndipo ananenanso kwa iye amene adamuitana, Pamene ukonza chakudya cha pausana kapena cha madzulo, usaitane abwenzi ako, kapena abale ako, kapena a fuko lako, kapena anansi ako eni chuma; kuti kapena iwonso angabwereze kuitana iwe, ndipo udzakhala nayo mphotho." 
Luke14:13 Koma pamene ukonza phwando uitane aumphawi, opunduka, otsimphina, akhungu;" 
Luke14:14 ndipo udzakhala wodala; chifukwa iwo alibe chakubwezera iwe mphotho; pakuti idzabwezedwa mphotho pa kuuka kwa olungama. 
Luke14:15 Ndipo pamene wina wa iwo akuseama pachakudya pamodzi ndi Iye anamva izi, anati kwa Iye, Wodala iye amene adzadya mkate mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke14:16 Koma anati kwa iye, Munthu wina anakonza phwando lalikulu; naitana anthu ambiri;" 
Luke14:17 ndipo anatumiza kapolo wake pa nthawi ya phwando kukanena kwa oitanidwawo, Idzani, chifukwa zonse zakonzeka tsopano." 
Luke14:18 Ndipo onse ndi mtima umodzi anayamba kuwiringula. Woyamba anati kwa iye, Ine ndagula munda, ndipo ndiyenera ndituluke kukauona; ndikupempha undilole ine ndisafika." 
Luke14:19 Ndipo anati wina, Ine ndagula ng'ombe za magoli asanu, ndipo ndinka kukaziyesa; ndikupempha undilole ine ndisafika." 
Luke14:20 Ndipo anati wina, Ine ndakwatira mkazi, ndipo chifukwa chake sindingathe kudza." 
Luke14:21 Ndipo kapoloyo pakubwera anauza mbuye wake zinthu izi. Pamenepo mwini nyumba anakwiya, nati kwa kapolo wake, Tuluka msanga, pita kumakwalala ndi kunjira za mudzi, nubwere nao muno aumphawi ndi opunduka ndi akhungu ndi otsimphina." 
Luke14:22 Ndipo kapoloyo anati, Ambuye, chimene munachilamulira chachitika, ndipo malo atsalapo." 
Luke14:23 Ndipo mbuye ananena kwa kapoloyo, Tuluka, nupite kumiseu ndi njira za kuminda, nuwaumirize anthu alowe, kuti nyumba yanga idzale." 
Luke14:24 Pakuti ndinena kwa inu, kuti kulibe mmodzi wa amuna oitanidwa aja adzalawa phwando langa." 
Luke14:25 Ndipo mipingo yambiri ya anthu inamuka naye; ndipo Iye anapotoloka, nati kwa iwo," 
Luke14:26 Munthu akadza kwa Ine, wosada atate wake ndi amake, ndi mkazi wake, ndi ana, ndi abale, ndi alongo ake, inde ndi moyo wake womwe wa iye mwini, sakhoza kukhala wophunzira wanga." 
Luke14:27 Ndipo amene aliyense sasenza mtanda wake wa mwini yekha, ndi kudza pambuyo panga, sakhoza kukhala wophunzira wanga." 
Luke14:28 Pakuti ndani wa inu amene akafuna kumanga nsanja yaitali, sathanga wakhala pansi, nawerengera mtengo wake, aone ngati ali nazo zakuimaliza?" 
Luke14:29 Kuti kungachitike, pamene atakhazika pansi miyala ya kumaziko ake, osakhoza kuimaliza anthu onse akuyang'ana adzayamba kumseka iye," 
Luke14:30 ndi kunena kuti, Munthu uyu anayamba kumanga, koma sanathe kumaliza." 
Luke14:31 Kapena mfumu yanji pakupita kukomana ndi nkhondo ya mfumu inzake, sathanga wakhala pansi, nafunsana ndi akulu ngati akhoza ndi asilikali ake zikwi khumi kulimbana naye wina uja alikudza kukomana naye ndi asilikali zikwi makumi awiri?" 
Luke14:32 Koma ngati sakhoza, atumiza akazembe, pokhala winayo ali kutalitali, nafunsa za mtendere." 
Luke14:33 Chifukwa chake tsono, yense wa inu amene sakaniza zonse ali nazo, sakhoza kukhala wophunzira wanga." 
Luke14:34 Kotero mchere uli wokoma; koma ngati mchere utasukuluka adzaukoleretsa ndi chiyani? 
Luke14:35 Suyenera kuuthira pamunda kapena padzala, autaya kunja. Amene ali nao makutu akumva amve." 
Luke15:1 Koma amisonkho onse ndi anthu ochimwa analikumyandikira kudzamva Iye. 
Luke15:2 Ndipo Afarisi ndi alembi anadandaula nati, Uyu alandira anthu ochimwa, nadya nao." 
Luke15:3 Koma anati kwa iwo fanizo ili, nanena," 
Luke15:4 Munthu ndani wa inu ali nazo nkhosa makumikhumi, ndipo pakutayika imodzi ya izo, sasiya nanga m'chipululu zinazo makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu zisanu ndi zinai, nalondola yotayikayo kufikira aipeza?" 
Luke15:5 Ndipo pamene adaipeza, aisenza pa mapewa ake wokondwera." 
Luke15:6 Ndipo pakufika kunyumba kwake amema abwenzi ake ndi anansi ake, nanena nao, Kondwerani ndi ine, chifukwa ndinapeza nkhosa yanga yotayikayo." 
Luke15:7 Ndinena kwa inu, kotero kudzakhala chimwemwe Kumwamba chifukwa cha wochimwa mmodzi wotembenuka mtima, koposa anthu olungama makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu asanu ndi anai, amene alibe kusowa kutembenuka mtima." 
Luke15:8 Kapena mkazi wanji ali nazo ndalama zasiliva khumi, ngati itayika imodzi, sayatsa nyali, nasesa m'nyumba yake, nafunafuna chisamalire kufikira akaipeza?" 
Luke15:9 Ndipo m'mene aipeza amema abwenzi ake ndi anansi ake, nanena, Kondwerani ndi ine, chifukwa ndinapeza ndalama ndidatayayo." 
Luke15:10 Chomwecho, ndinena kwa inu, kuli chimwemwe pamaso pa angelo a Mulungu chifukwa cha munthu wochimwa mmodzi amene atembenuka mtima." 
Luke15:11 Ndipo Iye anati, Munthu wina anali ndi ana amuna awiri;" 
Luke15:12 ndipo wamng'onoyo anati kwa atate wake, Atate, ndigawirenitu zanga za pa chuma chanu. Ndipo iye anawagawira za moyo wake." 
Luke15:13 Ndipo pakupita masiku owerengeka mwana wamng'onoyo anasonkhanitsa zonse, napita ulendo wake kudziko lakutali; ndipo komweko anamwaza chuma chake ndi makhalidwe a chitayiko." 
Luke15:14 Ndipo pamene anatha zake zonse, panakhala njala yaikulu m'dziko muja, ndipo iye anayamba kusowa." 
Luke15:15 Ndipo anamuka nadziphatikiza kwa mfumu imodzi ya dziko lija; ndipo uyu anamtumiza kubusa kwake kukaweta nkhumba. 
Luke15:16 Ndipo analakalaka kukhutitsa mimba yake ndi makoko amene nkhumba zimadya, ndipo palibe munthu anamninkha kanthu." 
Luke15:17 Koma m'mene anakumbukira mumtima, anati, Antchito olipidwa ambiri a atate wanga ali nacho chakudya chochuluka, ndipo ine ndionongeke kuno ndi njala?" 
Luke15:18 Ndidzanyamuka ndipite kwa atate wanga, ndipo ndidzanena naye, Atate, ndinachimwira Kumwamba ndi pamaso panu;" 
Luke15:19 sindiyeneranso konse kutchulidwa mwana wanu; mundiyese ine ngati mmodzi wa antchito anu. 
Luke15:20 Ndipo iye ananyamuka, nadza kwa atate wake. Koma pakudza iye kutali atate wake anamuona, nagwidwa chifundo, nathamanga, namkupatira pakhosi pake, nampsompsonetsa." 
Luke15:21 Ndipo mwanayo anati kwa iye, Atate ndinachimwira Kumwamba ndi pamaso panu, sindiyeneranso konse kutchulidwa mwana wanu." 
Luke15:22 Koma atateyo ananena kwa akapolo ake, Tulutsani msanga mwinjiro wokometsetsa, nimumveke; ndipo mpatseni mphete kudzanja lake ndi nsapato kumapazi ake;" 
Luke15:23 ndipo idzani naye mwanawang'ombe wonenepa, mumuphe, ndipo tidye, tisekere;" 
Luke15:24 chifukwa mwana wanga uyu anali wakufa, ndipo akhalanso wamoyo; anali wotayika, ndipo wapezedwa. Ndipo anayamba kusekera." 
Luke15:25 Koma mwana wake wamkulu anali kumunda. Ndipo pakubwera iye ndi kuyandikira kunyumba, anamva kuimba ndi kuvina." 
Luke15:26 Ndipo anaitana mmodzi wa anyamata, namfunsa, Zinthu izi nzotani?" 
Luke15:27 Ndipo uyu anati kwa iye, Mng'ono wako wafika; ndipo atate wako anapha mwanawang'ombe wonenepa, chifukwa anamlandira iye wamoyo." 
Luke15:28 Koma anakwiya, ndipo sanafune kulowamo. Ndipo atate wake anatuluka namdandaulira." 
Luke15:29 Koma anayankha nati kwa atate wake, Onani, ine ndinakhala kapolo wanu zaka zambiri zotere, ndipo sindinalakwira lamulo lanu nthawi iliyonse; ndipo simunandipatsa ine kamodzi konse mwanawambuzi, kuti ndisekere ndi abwenzi anga." 
Luke15:30 Koma pamene anadza mwana wanu uyu, wakutha zamoyo zanu ndi akazi achiwerewere, munamphera iye mwanawang'ombe wonenepa." 
Luke15:31 Koma iye ananena naye, Mwana wanga, iwe uli ndine nthawi zonse, ndipo zanga zonse zili zako." 
Luke15:32 Koma kudayenera kuti tisangalale ndi kukondwerera: chifukwa mng'ono wako uyu anali wakufa ndipo ali ndi moyo; anatayika, ndipo wapezeka." 
Luke16:1 Ndipo Iye ananenanso kwa ophunzira ake, Panali munthu mwini chuma, anali ndi kapitao wake; ndipo ameneyu ananenezedwa kwa iye kuti alikumwaza chuma chake." 
Luke16:2 Ndipo anamuitana, nati kwa iye, Ichi ndi chiyani ndikumva za iwe? Undiwerengere za ukapitao wako; pakuti sungathe kukhalabe kapitao." 
Luke16:3 Ndipo kapitao uyu anati mumtima mwake, Ndidzachita chiyani, chifukwa mbuye wanga andichotsera ukapitao? Kulima ndilibe mphamvu, kupemphapempha kundichititsa manyazi." 
Luke16:4 Ndidziwa chimene ndidzachita, kotero kuti pamene ananditulutsa muukapitao, anthu akandilandire kunyumba kwao." 
Luke16:5 Ndipo anadziitanira mmodzi ndi mmodzi amangawa onse a mbuye wake, nanena kwa woyamba, Unakongola chiyani kwa mbuye wanga?" 
Luke16:6 Ndipo anati, Mitsuko ya mafuta zana. Ndipo iye ananena naye, Tenga kalata wako, nukhale pansi msanga, nulembere, Makumi asanu." 
Luke16:7 Pomwepo anati kwa wina, Ndipo iwe uli nao mangawa otani? Ndipo uyu anati, Madengu a tirigu zana. Iye ananena naye, Tenga kalata wako nulembere makumi asanu ndi atatu." 
Luke16:8 Ndipo mbuye wake anatama kapitao wonyengayo, kuti anachita mwanzeru; chifukwa ana a nthawi ya pansi pano ali anzeru m'mbadwo wao koposa ana a kuunika." 
Luke16:9 Ndipo Ine ndinena kwa inu, Mudziyesere nokha abwenzi ndi chuma chosalungama; kuti pamene chikakusowani, iwo akalandire inu m'mahema osatha." 
Luke16:10 Iye amene akhulupirika m'chaching'onong'ono alinso wokhulupirika m'chachikulu; ndipo iye amene ali wosalungama m'chachikulu. 
Luke16:11 Chifukwa chake ngati simunakhala okhulupirika m'chuma cha chosalungama, adzakhulupirira inu ndani ndi chuma choona?" 
Luke16:12 Ndipo ngati simunakhala okhulupirika ndi zake za wina, adzakupatsani inu ndani za inu eni?" 
Luke16:13 Palibe mnyamata wa m'nyumba akhoza kukhala kapolo wa ambuye awiri; pakuti kapena adzamuda wina, nadzakonda winayo; kapena adzatsata wina, nadzapeputsa winayo. Simungathe kukhala kapolo wa Mulungu ndi wa Chuma." 
Luke16:14 Koma Afarisi, ndiwo okonda ndalama, anamva izi zonse; ndipo anamseka." 
Luke16:15 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Inu ndinu odziyesera nokha olungama pamaso pa anthu; koma Mulungu azindikira mitima yanu; chifukwa ichi chimene chikuzika mwa anthu chili chonyansa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Luke16:16 Chilamulo ndi aneneri analipo kufikira pa Yohane; kuyambira pamenepo ulalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino wa Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndipo munthu aliyense akangamira kulowamo." 
Luke16:17 Kuti kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zichoke nkwapafupi, koma kuti kalembo kakang'ono kachilamulo kagwe nkwapatali." 
Luke16:18 Yense wakusudzula mkazi wake, nakwatira wina, achita chigololo; ndipo iye amene akwatira wosudzulidwayo, achita chigololo." 
Luke16:19 Ndipo panali munthu mwini chuma amavala chibakuwa ndi nsalu yabafuta, nasekera, nadyerera masiku onse;" 
Luke16:20 ndipo wopemphapempha wina, dzina lake Lazaro, adaikidwa pakhomo pake wodzala ndi zilonda," 
Luke16:21 ndipo anafuna kukhuta ndi zakugwa pa gome la mwini chumayo; komatu agalunso anadza nanyambita zilonda zake. 
Luke16:22 Ndipo kunali kuti wopemphayo adafa, ndi kuti anatengedwa iye ndi angelo kunka kuchifuwa cha Abrahamu; ndipo mwini chumayo adafanso, naikidwa m'manda." 
Luke16:23 Ndipo m'dziko la akufa anakweza maso ake, pokhala nao mazunzo, naona Abrahamu patali, ndi Lazaro m'chifuwa mwake." 
Luke16:24 Ndipo anakweza mau nati, Atate Abrahamu, mundichitire chifundo, mutume Lazaro, kuti aviike nsonga ya chala chake m'madzi, naziziritse lilime langa; pakuti ndizunzidwadi m'lawi ili la moto." 
Luke16:25 Koma Abrahamu anati, Mwana, kumbukira kuti unalandira zokoma zako pakukhala m'moyo iwe, momwemonso Lazaro zoipa; ndipo tsopano iye asangalatsidwa pano, koma iwe uzunzidwadi." 
Luke16:26 Ndipo pamwamba pa izi, pakati pa ife ndi inu pakhazikika phompho lalikulu, kotero kuti iwo akufuna kuoloka kuchokera kuno kunka kwa inu sangathe, kapena kuchokera kwanuko kuyambuka kudza kwa ife, sangathenso." 
Luke16:27 Koma anati, Pamenepo ndikupemphani, Atate, kuti mumtume kunyumba ya atate wanga;" 
Luke16:28 pakuti ndili nao abale asanu; awachitire umboni iwo kuti iwonso angadze kumalo ano a mazunzo. 
Luke16:29 Koma Abrahamu anati, Ali ndi Mose ndi aneneri; amvere iwo." 
Luke16:30 Koma anati, Iai, Atate Abrahamu, komatu ngati wina akapita kwa iwo wochokera kwa kufa adzasandulika mtima." 
Luke16:31 Koma anati kwa iye, Ngati samvera Mose ndi aneneri, sadzakopeka mtima ngakhale wina akauka kwa akufa." 
Luke17:1 Ndipo anati kwa ophunzira ake, Sikutheka kuti zolakwitsa zisadze; koma tsoka iye amene adza nazo." 
Luke17:2 Kukolowekedwa mwala wamphero m'khosi mwake ndi kuponyedwa iye m'nyanja nkwapafupi, koma kulakwitsa mmodzi wa ang'ono awa nkwapatali." 
Luke17:3 Kadzichenjerani nokha; akachimwa mbale wako umdzudzule, akalapa, umkhululukire." 
Luke17:4 Ndipo akakuchimwira kasanu ndi kawiri pa tsiku lake, nakakutembenukira kasanu ndi kawiri ndi kunena, Ndalapa ine; uzimkhululukira." 
Luke17:5 Ndipo atumwi anati kwa Ambuye, Mutionjezere chikhulupiriro." 
Luke17:6 Koma Ambuye anati, Mukakhala nacho chikhulupiriro ngati kambeu kampiru, mukanena kwa mtengo uwu wamkuyu, Uzulidwe, nuokedwe m'nyanja; ndipo ukadamvera inu." 
Luke17:7 Koma ndani mwa inu ali naye kapolo wolima, kapena woweta nkhosa, amene pobwera iye kuchokera kumunda adzanena kwa iye, Lowa tsopano, khala pansi kudya;" 
Luke17:8 wosanena naye makamaka, Undikonzere chakudya ine, nudzimangire, nunditumikire kufikira ndadya ndi kumwa; ndipo nditatha ine udzadya nudzamwa iwe?" 
Luke17:9 Kodi ayamika kapoloyo chifukwa anachita zolamulidwa? 
Luke17:10 Chotero inunso m'mene mutachita zonse anakulamulirani, nenani, Ife ndife akapolo opanda pake, tangochita zimene tayenera kuzichita." 
Luke17:11 Ndipo kunali, pakumuka ku Yerusalemu Iye analikupita pakati pa Samariya ndi Galileya." 
Luke17:12 Ndipo m'mene analowa Iye m'mudzi wina, anakomana naye amuna khumi akhate, amene anaima kutali;" 
Luke17:13 ndipo iwo anakweza mau, nanena, Yesu, Mbuye, mutichitire chifundo." 
Luke17:14 Ndipo pakuwaona anati kwa iwo, Pitani, kadzionetseni nokha kwa ansembe. Ndipo kunali, m'kumuka kwao, anakonzedwa." 
Luke17:15 Ndipo mmodzi wa iwo, pakuona kuti anachiritsidwa, anabwerera m'mbuyo, nalemekeza Mulungu ndi mau akulu;" 
Luke17:16 ndipo anagwa nkhope yake pansi kumapazi ake, namyamika Iye; ndipo anali Msamariya ameneyo." 
Luke17:17 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati, Kodi sanakonzedwe khumi? Koma ali kuti asanu ndi anai aja?" 
Luke17:18 Akubwera kulemekeza Mulungu sanapezeka mmodzi kodi, koma mlendo uyu?" 
Luke17:19 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Nyamuka, nupite; chikhulupiriro chako chakupulumutsa iwe." 
Luke17:20 Ndipo pamene Afarisi anamfunsa Iye, kuti, Ufumu wa Mulungu ukudza liti, anawayankha, nati, Ufumu wa Mulungu sukudza ndi maonekedwe;" 
Luke17:21 ndipo sadzanena, Taonani uwu, kapena uwo! Pakuti, taonani, Ufumu wa Mulungu uli m'kati mwa inu." 
Luke17:22 Ndipo anati kwa ophunzira ake, Adzadza masiku, amene mudzakhumba kuona limodzi la masiku a Mwana wa Munthu, koma simudzaliona." 
Luke17:23 Ndipo adzanena ndi inu, Taonani ilo! Taonani ili? Musachoka kapena kuwatsata;"
