Luke17:24 pakuti monga mphezi ing'anipa kuchokera kwina pansi pa thambo, niunikira kufikira kwina pansi pa thambo, kotero adzakhala Mwana wa Munthu m'tsiku lake." 
Luke17:25 Koma ayenera athange wamva zowawa zambiri nakanidwe ndi mbadwo uno. 
Luke17:26 Ndipo monga kunakhala masiku a Nowa, momwemo kudzakhalanso masiku a Mwana wa Munthu." 
Luke17:27 Anadya, anamwa, anakwatira, anakwatiwa, kufikira tsiku lija Nowa analowa m'chingalawa, ndipo chinadza chigumula, nichiwaononga onsewo." 
Luke17:28 Monga momwenso kunakhala masiku a Loti; anadya, anamwa, anagula, anagulitsa, anabzala, anamanga nyumba;" 
Luke17:29 koma tsiku limene Loti anatuluka m'Sodomu udavumba moto ndi sulufure zochokera kumwamba, ndipo zinawaononga onsewo;" 
Luke17:30 momwemo kudzakhala tsiku lakuvumbuluka Mwana wa Munthu. 
Luke17:31 Tsikulo iye amene adzakhala pamwamba pa chindwi, ndi akatundu ake m'nyumba, asatsike kuwatenga; ndipo iye amene ali m'munda modzimodzi asabwere ku zake za m'mbuyo." 
Luke17:32 Kumbukirani mkazi wa Loti. 
Luke17:33 Iye aliyense akafuna kusunga moyo wake adzautaya, koma iye aliyense akautaya, adzausunga." 
Luke17:34 Ndinena ndi inu, usiku womwewo adzakhala awiri pa kama mmodzi; mmodzi adzatengedwa, ndi wina adzasiyidwa." 
Luke17:35 Padzakhala akazi awiri akupera pamodzi, mmodzi adzatengedwa, ndi wina adzasiyidwa." 
Luke17:36  
Luke17:37 Ndipo anayankha nanena kwa Iye, Kuti, Ambuye? Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Pamene pali mtembo, pomweponso miimba idzasonkhanidwa." 
Luke18:1 Ndipo anawanenera fanizo lakuti ayenera iwo kupemphera nthawi zonse, osafooka mtima;" 
Luke18:2 nanena, M'mudzi mwakuti munali woweruza wosaopa Mulungu, ndi wosasamala munthu." 
Luke18:3 Ndipo m'mudzimo munali mkazi wamasiye; ndipo anadza kwa iye nanena, Mundiweruzire mlandu pa wotsutsana nane." 
Luke18:4 Ndipo sanafune nthawi; koma bwinobwino anati mwa yekha, Ndingakhale sindiopa Mulungu kapena kusamala munthu;" 
Luke18:5 koma chifukwa cha kundivuta ine mkazi wamasiye amene ndidzamweruzira mlandu, kuti angandilemetse ndi kudzaidza kwake." 
Luke18:6 Ndipo Ambuye anati, Tamverani chonena woweruza wosalungama." 
Luke18:7 Ndipo kodi Mulungu sadzachitira chilungamo osankhidwa ake akumuitana usana ndi usiku, popeza aleza nao mtima?" 
Luke18:8 Ndinena ndi inu, adzawachitira chilungamo posachedwa. Koma Mwana wa Munthu pakudza Iye, adzapeza chikhulupiriro pa dziko lapansi kodi?" 
Luke18:9 Ndipo anatinso kwa ena amene anadzikhulupirira mwa iwo okha kuti ali olungama, napeputsa onse ena, fanizo ili," 
Luke18:10 Anthu awiri anakwera kunka ku Kachisi kukapemphera; winayo Mfarisi ndi mnzake wamsonkho. 
Luke18:11 Mfarisiyo anaimirira napemphera izi mwa yekha, Mulungu, ndikuyamikani kuti sindili monga anthu onse ena, opambapamba, osalungama, achigololo, kapenanso monga wamsonkho uyu;" 
Luke18:12 ndisala chakudya kawiri sabata limodzi; ndipereka limodzi la magawo khumi la zonse ndili nazo. 
Luke18:13 Koma wamsonkhoyo alikuima patali sanafune kungakhale kukweza maso kumwamba, komatu anadziguguda pachifuwa pake nanena, Mulungu, mundichitire chifundo, ine wochimwa." 
Luke18:14 Ndinena ndi inu, anatsikira kunyumba kwake woyesedwa wolungama uyutu, wosati uja ai; pakuti yense wakudzikuza yekha adzachepetsedwa; koma wodzichepetsa yekha adzakulitsidwa." 
Luke18:15 Ndipo anadza nao kwa Iye ana amakanda kuti awakhudze; koma pamene ophunzira anaona anawadzudzula. 
Luke18:16 Koma Yesu anawaitana, nanena, Lolani ana adze kwa Ine, ndipo musawaletse; pakuti Ufumu wa Mulungu uli wa otere." 
Luke18:17 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Aliyense wosalandira Ufumu wa Mulungu ngati mwana, sadzalowamo ndithu." 
Luke18:18 Ndipo mkulu wina anamfunsa Iye, nanena, Mphunzitsi wabwino, ndizichita chiyani, kuti ndilowe moyo wosatha?" 
Luke18:19 Koma Yesu anati kwa iye, Unditcha Ine wabwino bwanji? Palibe wabwino, koma mmodzi, ndiye Mulungu." 
Luke18:20 Udziwa malamulo. Usachite chigololo, Usaphe, Usabe, Usachite umboni wonama, Lemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako." 
Luke18:21 Koma anati, Izi zonse ndazisunga kuyambira ubwana wanga." 
Luke18:22 Koma m'mene Yesu anamva, anati kwa iye, Usowa chinthu chimodzi: gulitsa zilizonse uli nazo, nugawire osauka; ndipo udzakhala nacho chuma chenicheni m'Mwamba; ndipo ukadze kuno, unditsate Ine." 
Luke18:23 Koma pakumva izi anagwidwa nacho chisoni chambiri; pakuti anali mwini chuma chambiri. 
Luke18:24 Ndipo Yesu pomuona iye anati, Ha! Nkuvutika nanga kwa anthu eni chuma kulowa Ufumu wa Mulungu!" 
Luke18:25 Pakuti nkwapafupi kwa ngamira ipyole diso la singano koma kwa munthu mwini chuma, kulowa Ufumu wa Mulungu nkwapatali." 
Luke18:26 Koma akumvawo anati, Tsono ndani angathe kupulumutsidwa?" 
Luke18:27 Koma Iye anati, Zinthu zosatheka ndi anthu zitheka ndi Mulungu." 
Luke18:28 Ndipo Petro anati, Taonani ife tasiya zathu za ife eni, ndipo takutsatani Inu." 
Luke18:29 Koma anati kwa iwo, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Palibe munthu wasiya nyumba, kapena mkazi, kapena abale, kapena akum'bala, kapena ana, chifukwa cha Ufumu wa Mulungu," 
Luke18:30 koma adzalandira zobwezedwa koposatu m'nthawi yino; ndipo m'nthawi ilinkudza moyo wosatha. 
Luke18:31 Ndipo anadzitengera khumi ndi awiriwo, nati kwa iwo, Taonani, tikwera kunka ku Yerusalemu, ndipo zidzakwaniritsidwa kwa Mwana wa Munthu zonse zolembedwa ndi aneneri." 
Luke18:32 Pakuti adzampereka kwa amitundu, nadzamseka, nadzamchitira chipongwe, nadzamthira malovu; ndipo atamkwapula adzamupha Iye;" 
Luke18:33 ndipo tsiku lachitatu adzauka. 
Luke18:34 Ndipo sanadziwitse kanthu ka izi; ndi mau awa adawabisikira, ndipo sanazindikire zonenedwazo." 
Luke18:35 Ndipo kunali, pamene anayandikira ku Yeriko, msaona wina anakhala m'mbali mwa njira, napemphapempha;" 
Luke18:36 ndipo pakumva khamu la anthu alinkupita, anafunsa, Ichi nchiyani?" 
Luke18:37 Ndipo anamuuza iye, kuti, Yesu Mnazarayo alinkupita." 
Luke18:38 Ndipo anafuula, nanena, Yesu, Mwana wa Davide, mundichitire chifundo." 
Luke18:39 Ndipo iwo akutsogolera anamdzudzula iye, kuti akhale chete; koma iye anafuulitsa chifuulire, Mwana wa Davide, mundichitire chifundo." 
Luke18:40 Ndipo Yesu anaima, nalamulira kuti abwere naye kwa Iye; ndipo m'mene adafika pafupi, anamfunsa iye," 
Luke18:41 Ufuna ndikuchitire chiyani? Ndipo anati, Ambuye, kuti ndipenyenso." 
Luke18:42 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Penyanso: chikhulupiriro chako chakupulumutsa iwe." 
Luke18:43 Ndipo pomwepo anapenyanso, namtsata Iye, ndi kulemekeza Mulungu: ndipo anthu onse pakuona, anachitira Mulungu mayamiko." 
Luke19:1 Ndipo analowa, napyola pa Yeriko." 
Luke19:2 Ndipo taonani, mwamuna wotchedwa dzina lake Zakeyo; ndipo iye anali mkulu wa amisonkho, nali wachuma." 
Luke19:3 Ndipo anafuna kuona Yesu ndiye uti, ndipo sanathe, chifukwa cha khamulo, pakuti anali wamfupi msinkhu." 
Luke19:4 Ndipo anathamanga, natsogola, nakwera mumkuyu kukamuona Iye; pakuti anati apite njira yomweyi." 
Luke19:5 Ndipo m'mene anadza pamalopo Yesu anakweza maso nati kwa iye, Zakeyo, fulumira, nutsike; pakuti lero ndiyenera kukhala m'nyumba mwako." 
Luke19:6 Ndipo anafulumira, natsika, namlandira Iye wokondwera." 
Luke19:7 Ndipo m'mene anachiona anadandaula onse, nanena, Analowa amchereze munthu ali wochimwa." 
Luke19:8 Ndipo Zakeyo anaimirira nati kwa Ambuye, Taonani, Ambuye, gawo limodzi la zanga zonse zogawika pakati ndipatsa osauka; ndipo ngati ndalanda kanthu kwa munthu monyenga, ndimbwezera kanai." 
Luke19:9 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Lero chipulumutso chagwera nyumba iyi, popeza iyenso ndiye mwana wa Abrahamu." 
Luke19:10 Pakuti Mwana wa Munthu anadza kufunafuna ndi kupulumutsa chotayikacho. 
Luke19:11 Ndipo pakumva izi iwo, Iye anaonjeza nanena fanizo, chifukwa anali Iye pafupi pa Yerusalemu, ndipo iwo anayesa kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu ukuti uonekere pomwepo." 
Luke19:12 Pamenepo anati, Munthu wa fuko lomveka ananka kudziko lakutali, kudzilandirira yekha ufumu, ndi kubwerako." 
Luke19:13 Ndipo anaitana akapolo ake khumi, nawapatsa iwo ndalama khumi za mina, nati kwaiwo, Chita nazoni malonda kufikira ndibweranso." 
Luke19:14 Koma mfulu za pamudzi pake zinamuda, nizituma akazembe amtsate m'mbuyo ndi kunena, Ife sitifuna munthuyo akhale mfumu yathu." 
Luke19:15 Ndipo kunali, pakubwera iye, atalandira ufumuwo, anati aitanidwe kwa iye akapolo aja, amene adawapatsa ndalamazo, kuti adziwe umo anapindulira pochita malonda." 
Luke19:16 Ndipo anafika woyamba, nanena, Mbuye, mina yanu inachita nionjeza mina khumi." 
Luke19:17 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Chabwino, kapolo wabwino iwe; popeza unakhala wokhulupirika m'chaching'onong'ono, khala nao ulamuliro pa midzi khumi." 
Luke19:18 Ndipo anadza wachiwiri, nanena, Mbuye, mina yanu yapindula mina zisanu." 
Luke19:19 Ndipo anati kwa iyenso, Khala iwenso woweruza midzi isanu." 
Luke19:20 Ndipo wina anadza, nanena, Mbuye, taonani, siyi mina yanu, ndaisunga m'kansalu;" 
Luke19:21 pakuti ndinakuopani, popeza inu ndinu munthu wouma mtima: munyamula chimene simunachiika pansi, mututa chimene simunachifesa." 
Luke19:22 Ananena kwa iye, Pakamwa pako ndikuweruza, kapolo woipa iwe. Unadziwa kuti ine ndine munthu wouma mtima, wonyamula chimene sindinachiika, ndi wotuta chimene sindinachifesa;" 
Luke19:23 ndipo sunapereka bwanji ndalama yanga pokongoletsa, ndipo ine pakudza ndikadaitenga ndi phindu lake?" 
Luke19:24 Ndipo anati kwa iwo akuimirirapo, Mchotsereni minayo, nimuipatse kwa iye wakukhala nazo mina khumi." 
Luke19:25 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Mbuye, ali nazo mina khumi." 
Luke19:26 Ndinena ndi inu, kuti kwa yense wakukhala nacho kudzapatsidwa; koma kwa iye amene alibe kanthu, chingakhale chimene ali nacho chidzachotsedwa." 
Luke19:27 Koma adani anga aja osafuna kuti ndidzakhala mfumu yao, bwerani nao kuno, nimuwaphe pamaso panga." 
Luke19:28 Ndipo m'mene adanena izi anawatsogolera nakwera ku Yerusalemu. 
Luke19:29 Ndipo kunali, m'mene anayandikira ku Betefage ndi Betaniya, pa phiri lotchedwa la Azitona, anatuma awiri a ophunzira," 
Luke19:30 nati, Mukani kumudzi uli pandunji panu; m'menemo, polowa, mudzapeza mwana wa bulu womangidwa, pamenepo palibe munthu anakwerapo nthawi iliyonse; mummasule iye nimumtenge." 
Luke19:31 Ndipo munthu akati kwa inu, Mummasuliranji? Mudzatero naye, Ambuye amfuna iye." 
Luke19:32 Ndipo anachoka otumidwawo, napeza monga adanena kwa iwo." 
Luke19:33 Ndipo pamene anamasula mwana wa bulu, eni ake anati kwa iwo, Mumasuliranji mwana wa bulu?" 
Luke19:34 Ndipo anati, Ambuye amfuna iye." 
Luke19:35 Ndipo anadza naye kwa Yesu; ndipo anayalika zovala zao pa mwana wa buluyo, nakwezapo Yesu." 
Luke19:36 Ndipo pakupita Iye, anayala zovala zao m'njira." 
Luke19:37 Ndipo pakuyandikira Iye tsono potsetsereka pake pa phiri la Azitona, unyinji wonse wa ophunzira anayamba kukondwera ndi kuyamika Mulungu ndi mau akulu, chifukwa cha ntchito zonse zamphamvu anaziona;" 
Luke19:38 nanena, Wolemekezeka Mfumuyo ikudza m'dzina la Ambuye; mtendere m'Mwamba, ndi ulemerero m'Mwambamwamba." 
Luke19:39 Ndipo Afarisi ena a m'khamu la anthu anati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, dzudzulani ophunzira anu." 
Luke19:40 Ndipo anayankha nati, Ndinena ndi inu, ngati awa khala chete miyala idzafuula." 
Luke19:41 Ndipo m'mene anayandikira, anaona mudziwo naulirira," 
Luke19:42 nanena, Ukadazindikira tsiku ili, inde iwetu zinthu za mtendere! Koma tsopano zibisika pamaso pako." 
Luke19:43 Pakuti masiku adzakudzera, ndipo adani ako adzakuzingira linga, nadzakuzungulira iwe kwete, nadzakutsekereza ponsepo;" 
Luke19:44 ndipo adzakupasula iwe, ndi ana ako mwa iwe; ndipo sadzasiya mwa iwe mwala wina pa mwala unzake; popeza sunazindikira nyengo ya mayang'aniridwe ako." 
Luke19:45 Ndipo analowa m'Kachisi, nayamba kutulutsa iwo akugulitsa malonda, nanena nao," 
Luke19:46 Kwalembedwa, Ndipo nyumba yanga idzakhala nyumba yakupemphera; koma inu mwaiyesa phanga la achifwamba." 
Luke19:47 Ndipo analikuphunzitsa m'Kachisi tsiku ndi tsiku. Koma ansembe aakulu, ndi alembi ndi akulu a anthu anafunafuna kumuononga Iye;" 
Luke19:48 ndipo sanapeze chimene akachita; pakuti anthu onse anamlendewera Iye kuti amve. 
Luke20:1 Ndipo kunali lina la masiku ao m'mene Iye analikuphunzitsa anthu m'Kachisi, ndi kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino, adamdzera ansembe aakulu ndi alembi pamodzi ndi akulu;" 
Luke20:2 ndipo anati, nanena naye, Mutiuze muchita izi ndi ulamuliro wotani? Kapena ndani iye amene anakupatsani ulamuliro umene?" 
Luke20:3 Ndipo anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Ndidzakufunsani mau Inenso; mundiuze:" 
Luke20:4 Ubatizo wa Yohane unachokera Kumwamba kodi, kapena kwa anthu?" 
Luke20:5 Ndipo anatsutsana mwa okha, nanena, Ngati tinena uchokera Kumwamba; adzati, Simunamkhulupirira chifukwa ninji?" 
Luke20:6 Ndiponso, tikanena, Uchokera kwa anthu; anthu onse adzatiponya miyala: pakuti akopeka mtima, kuti Yohane ali mneneri." 
Luke20:7 Ndipo anayankha kuti sadziwa kumene uchokera. 
Luke20:8 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo Ndingakhale Inenso sindikuuzani ulamuliro umene ndichita nao zinthu izi. 
Luke20:9 Ndipo Iye anayamba kunena kwa anthu fanizo ili: Munthu analima munda wamphesa, naukongoletsa kwa olima munda, nanka kudziko lina, nagonerako nthawi yaikulu." 
Luke20:10 Ndipo pa nyengo ya zipatso anatumiza kapolo wake kwa olima mundawo, kuti ampatseko chipatso cha mundawo; koma olimawo anampanda, nambweza wopanda kanthu." 
Luke20:11 Ndipo anatumizanso kapolo wina; ndipo iyenso anampanda, namchitira chipongwe, nambweza, wopanda kanthu." 
Luke20:12 Ndipo anatumizanso wina wachitatu; ndipo iyenso anamlasa, namtaya kunja." 
Luke20:13 Ndipo mwini mundawo anati, Ndidzachita chiyani? Ndidzatuma mwana wanga amene ndikondana naye; kapena akamchitira iye ulemu." 
Luke20:14 Koma olimawo, pamene anamuona, anauzana wina ndi mnzake, nati, Uyu ndiye wolowa nyumba; tiyeni timuphe, kuti cholowa chake chikhale chathu." 
Luke20:15 Ndipo anamponya kunja kwa mundawo, namupha. Pamenepo mwini munda wamphesawo adzawachitira chiyani?" 
Luke20:16 Iye adzafika nadzaononga olima munda aja, nadzapatsa munda kwa ena. Ndipo pamene iwo anamva, anati, Musatero iai!" 
Luke20:17 Koma Iye anawapenyetsa iwo, nati, Nchiyani ichi chinalembedwa, Mwala umene anaukana omanga nyumba, womwewu unakhala mutu wa pangodya." 
Luke20:18 Munthu yense wakugwa pa mwala uwu, adzaphwanyika; koma iye amene udzamgwera, udzamupha." 
Luke20:19 Ndipo alembi ndi ansembe aakulu anafunafuna kumgwira ndi manja nthawi yomweyo; ndipo anaopa anthu; pakuti anazindikira kuti ananenera pa iwo fanizo ili. 
Luke20:20 Ndipo anamyang'anira, natumiza ozonda, amene anadzionetsera ngati olungama mtima, kuti akamkole pa mau ake, kotero kuti akampereke Iye ku ukulu ndi ulamuliro wa kazembe." 
Luke20:21 Ndipo anamfunsa Iye, nanena, Mphunzitsi, ife tidziwa kuti munena ndi kuphunzitsa kolunjika, ndi kusasamalira nkhope ya munthu, koma muphunzitsa njira ya Mulungu koonadi;" 
Luke20:22 kodi kuloledwa kupereka msonkho kwa Kaisara, kapena iai?" 
Luke20:23 Koma Iye anazindikira chinyengo chao, nati kwa iwo," 
Luke20:24 Tandionetsani Ine rupiya latheka. Chithunzithunzi ndi cholemba chake ncha yani? Anati iwo, Cha Kaisara." 
Luke20:25 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Chifukwa chake perekani kwa Kaisara zake za Kaisara, ndi kwa Mulungu zake za Mulungu." 
Luke20:26 Ndipo sanakhoze kugwira mauwo pamaso pa anthu; ndipo anazizwa ndi kuyankha kwake, nakhala chete." 
Luke20:27 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye Asaduki ena, amene amanena kuti palibe kuuka kwa akufa; ndipo anamfunsa Iye," 
Luke20:28 nanena, Mphunzitsi, Mose anatilembera ife, kuti mbale wake wa munthu akafa, wokhala ndi mkazi, ndipo alibe mwana iye, mbale wake adzakwatira mkaziyo, nadzamuukitsira mbale wake mbeu." 
Luke20:29 Tsono panali abale asanu ndi awiri; ndipo woyamba anakwatira mkazi, nafa wopanda mwana;" 
Luke20:30 ndipo wachiwiri," 
Luke20:31 ndi wachitatu anamtenga mkaziyo; ndipo choteronso asanu ndi awiri onse, sanasiye mwana, namwalira." 
Luke20:32 Pomalizira anamwaliranso mkaziyo. 
Luke20:33 Potero m'kuuka iye adzakhala mkazi wa yani wa iwo? Pakuti asanu ndi awiriwo adamkwatira iye. 
Luke20:34 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Ana a dziko lapansi akwatira nakwatiwa:" 
Luke20:35 koma iwo akuyesedwa oyenera kufikira dziko lijalo, ndi kuuka kwa akufa, sakwatira kapena kukwatiwa." 
Luke20:36 Pakuti sangathe kufanso nthawi zonse; pakuti afanafana ndi angelo; ndipo ali ana a Mulungu, popeza akhala ana a kuuka kwa akufa." 
Luke20:37 Koma za kuti anthu akufa auka, anasonyeza ngakhale Mose, pa Chitsamba chija, pamene iye amtchulira Ambuye, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi Mulungu wa Isaki, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Luke20:38 Ndipo Iye sakhala Mulungu wa akufa, koma wa amoyo: pakuti anthu onse akhala ndi moyo kwa Iye." 
Luke20:39 Ndipo alembi ena anayankha nati, Mphunzitsi, mwanena bwino." 
Luke20:40 Pakuti sanalimbenso mtima kumfunsa Iye kanthu kena. 
Luke20:41 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo, Amanena bwanji kuti Khristuyo ndiye mwana wa Davide?" 
Luke20:42 Pakuti Davide yekha anena m'buku la Masalmo, Ambuye ananena kwa Ambuye wanga, ukhale pa dzanja langa lamanja," 
Luke20:43 kufikira Ine ndikaika adani ako pansi pa mapazi ako. 
Luke20:44 Chotero Davide anamtchula Iye Ambuye, ndipo nanga ali mwana wake bwanji?" 
Luke20:45 Ndipo pamene anthu onse analinkumva Iye, anati kwa ophunzira," 
Luke20:46 Chenjerani nao alembi, amene afuna kuyendayenda ovala miinjiro, nakonda kupatsidwa moni m'misika, ndi mipando yaulemu m'sunagoge, ndi malo aulemu pamaphwando;" 
Luke20:47 amene aononga nyumba za akazi amasiye, ndipo monyenga achita mapemphero atali; amenewo adzalandira kulanga koposa." 
Luke21:1 Ndipo Yesu anakweza maso, naona anthu eni chuma alikuika zopereka zao mosungiramo ndalama." 
Luke21:2 Ndipo anaona mkazi wina wamasiye waumphawi alikuika momwemo timakobiri tiwiri. 
Luke21:3 Ndipo Iye anati, Zoonadi ndinena kwa inu, wamasiye uyu waumphawi anaikamo koposa onse;" 
Luke21:4 pakuti onse amenewa anaika mwa unyinji wao pa zoperekazo; koma iye mwa kusowa kwake anaikamo za moyo wake, zonse anali nazo." 
Luke21:5 Ndipo pamene ena analikunena za Kachisiyo, kuti anakonzeka ndi miyala yokoma ndi zopereka, anati Iye," 
Luke21:6 Zinthu izi muziona, adzafika masiku, pamenepo sudzasiyidwa pano mwala pa mwala unzake, umene sudzagwetsedwa." 
Luke21:7 Ndipo iwo anamfunsa Iye, nati, Mphunzitsi, nanga zinthu izi zidzaoneka liti? Ndipo chizindikiro ndi chiyani pamene izi ziti zichitike?" 
Luke21:8 Ndipo Iye anati, Yang'anirani musasocheretsedwe; pakuti ambiri adzadza m'dzina langa, nadzanena, Ndine amene; ndipo, Nthawi yayandikira; musawatsate pambuyo pao." 
Luke21:9 Ndipo pamene mudzamva za nkhondo ndi mapanduko, musaopsedwa; pakuti ziyenera izi ziyambe kuchitika; koma mathedwe sakhala pomwepo." 
Luke21:10 Pamenepo ananena nao, Mtundu wa anthu udzaukira pa mtundu wina, ndipo ufumu pa ufumu wina:" 
Luke21:11 ndipo kudzakhala zivomezi zazikulu, ndi njala ndi miliri m'malo akutiakuti, ndipo kudzakhala zoopsa ndi zizindikiro zazikulu zakumwamba." 
Luke21:12 Koma zisanachitike izi, anthu adzakuthirani manja, nadzakuzunzani, nadzapereka inu ku masunagoge ndi ndende, nadzamuka nanu kwa mafumu ndi akazembe, chifukwa cha dzina langa." 
Luke21:13 Kudzakhala kwa inu ngati umboni. 
Luke21:14 Chifukwa chake tsimikizani mumtima mwanu, kuti usanafike mlandu musalingirire chimene mudzayankha." 
Luke21:15 Pakuti Ine ndidzakupatsani inu kamwa ndi nzeru, zimene adani anu onse sadzatha kuzikana kapena kuzitsutsa." 
Luke21:16 Koma mudzaperekedwa ngakhale ndi akukubalani, ndi abale, ndi a fuko lanu, ndi abwenzi anu; ndipo ena a inu adzakuphani." 
Luke21:17 Ndipo anthu onse adzadana ndi inu chifukwa cha dzina langa. 
Luke21:18 Ndipo silidzaonongeka tsitsi limodzi la pamutu panu. 
Luke21:19 Mudzakhala nao moyo wanu m'chipiriro. 
Luke21:20 Koma pamene paliponse mudzaona Yerusalemu atazingidwa ndi magulu a ankhondo, zindikirani pamenepo kuti chipulumutso chake chayandikira." 
Luke21:21 Pamenepo iwo ali m'Yudeya athawire kumapiri, ndi iwo ali m'kati mwa uwo atuluke, ndi iwo ali kumilaga asalowemo." 
Luke21:22 Chifukwa amenewa ndi masiku akubwezera, kuti zonse zidalembedwa zichitike." 
Luke21:23 Koma tsoka iwo akukhala ndi pakati, ndi iwo akuyamwitsa ana masiku awo! Pakuti padzakhala chisauko chachikulu padziko, ndi mkwiyo pa anthu awa." 
Luke21:24 Ndipo adzagwa ndi lupanga lakuthwa, nadzagwidwa ndende kunka kumitundu yonse ya anthu; ndipo mapazi a anthu akunja adzapondereza Yerusalemu kufikira kuti nthawi zao za anthu akunja zakwanira." 
Luke21:25 Ndipo kudzakhala zizindikiro pa dzuwa ndi mwezi ndi nyenyezi; ndi pa dziko lapansi chisauko cha mitundu ya anthu, alikuthedwa nzeru pa mkukumo wake wa nyanja ndi mafunde ake;" 
Luke21:26 anthu akukomoka ndi mantha, ndi kuyembekezera zinthu zilinkudza kudziko lapansi; pakuti mphamvu zakumwamba zidzagwedezeka." 
Luke21:27 Ndipo pamenepo adzaona Mwana wa Munthu alinkudza mu mtambo ndi mphamvu ndi ulemerero waukulu. 
Luke21:28 Koma poyamba kuchitika izi weramukani, tukulani mitu yanu; chifukwa chiomboledwe chanu chayandikira." 
Luke21:29 Ndipo ananena nao fanizo; Onani mkuyu, ndi mitengo yonse:" 
Luke21:30 pamene iphukira, muipenya nimuzindikira pa nokha kuti dzinja lili pafupi pomwepo." 
Luke21:31 Inde chotero inunso, pakuona zinthu izi zilikuchitika, zindikirani kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu uli pafupi." 
Luke21:32 Indetu ndinena ndinu, Mbadwo uno sudzapitirira, kufikira zonse zitachitika." 
Luke21:33 Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zidzapita; koma mau anga sadzapita. 
Luke21:34 Koma mudziyang'anire nokha, kuti kapena mitima yanu ingalemetsedwe ndi madyaidya ndi kuledzera, ndi zosamalira za moyo uno, ndi kuti tsiku ilo lingafikire inu modzidzimutsa ngati msampha;" 
Luke21:35 pakuti lidzatero ndi kufikira anthu onse akukhala pankhope pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Luke21:36 Koma inu dikirani nyengo zonse, ndi kupemphera, kuti mukalimbike kupulumuka zonse zimene zidzachitika, ndi kuimirira pamaso pa Mwana wa Munthu." 
Luke21:37 Ndipo usana uliwonse Iye analikuphunzitsa m'Kachisi; ndi usiku uliwonse anatuluka, nagona pa phiri lotchedwa la Azitona." 
Luke21:38 Ndipo anthu onse analawira mamawa kudza kwa Iye ku Kachisi kudzamvera Iye. 
Luke22:1 Ndipo phwando la mikate yopanda chotupitsa linayandikira, ndilo lotchedwa Paska." 
Luke22:2 Ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi alembi anafunafuna maphedwe ake pakuti anaopa anthuwo. 
Luke22:3 Ndipo Satana analowa mwa Yudasi wonenedwa Iskariote, amene anawerengedwa mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo." 
Luke22:4 Ndipo iye anachoka, nalankhulana ndi ansembe aakulu ndi akazembe mompereka Iye kwa iwo." 
Luke22:5 Ndipo anakondwera, napangana naye kumpatsa ndalama." 
Luke22:6 Ndipo iye anavomera, nafunafuna nthawi yabwino yakumpereka Iye kwa iwo, pakalibe khamu la anthu." 
Luke22:7 Ndipo tsiku la mikate yopanda chotupitsa linafika, limene inayenera kuphedwa nsembe ya Paska." 
Luke22:8 Ndipo Iye anatumiza Petro ndi Yohane, nati, Pitani mutikonzere ife Paska, kuti tidye." 
Luke22:9 Ndipo iwo ananena naye, Mufuna tikakonzere kuti?" 
Luke22:10 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Onani, mutalowa m'mudzi, adzakomana ndinu munthu alikusenza mtsuko wa madzi; mumtsate ameneyo kunyumba kumene akalowako iye." 
Luke22:11 Ndipo mukanene kwa mwini nyumbayo, Mphunzitsi anena nawe, Chipinda cha alendo chili kuti, m'mene ndikadye Paska pamodzi ndi ophunzira anga?" 
Luke22:12 Ndipo iyeyo adzakuonetsani chipinda chachikulu chapamwamba, chokonzeka; mukakonzere kumeneko." 
Luke22:13 Ndipo anapita iwo, napeza monga adatero nao; ndipo anakonza Paska." 
Luke22:14 Ndipo itadza nthawi yake, Iye anakhala pachakudya, ndi ophunzira pamodzi ndi Iye." 
Luke22:15 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndinalakalaka ndithu kudya Paska uwu pamodzi ndinu, ndisanayambe kusautsidwa;" 
Luke22:16 pakuti ndinena ndi inu, sindidzadya kufikira udzakwaniridwa mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke22:17 Ndipo analandira chikho, ndipo pamene adayamika, anati, Landirani ichi, muchigawane mwa inu nokha;" 
Luke22:18 pakuti ndinena kwa inu, kuyambira tsopano Ine sindidzamwako chipatso cha mpesa, kufikira Ufumu wa Mulungu udzafika." 
Luke22:19 Ndipo m'mene adatenga mkate, nayamika, anaunyema, nawapatsa, nanena, Ichi ndi thupi langa lopatsidwa chifukwa cha inu; chitani ichi chikumbukiro changa." 
Luke22:20 Ndipo choteronso chikho, atatha mgonero, nanena, Chikho ichi ndi pangano latsopano m'mwazi wanga wothiridwa chifukwa cha inu." 
Luke22:21 Koma onani, dzanja lake la iye amene adzandipereka ali pagome pano pamodzi ndi Ine." 
Luke22:22 Pakuti Mwana wa Munthu amukatu, monga kunaikidwiratu; koma tsoka munthuyo amene ampereka!" 
Luke22:23 Ndipo anayamba kufunsana mwa iwo okha, ndiye yani mwa iwo amene adzachita ichi." 
Luke22:24 Ndipo kunakhala kutsutsana mwa iwo, ndani wa iwo ayesedwe wamkulu." 
Luke22:25 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mafumu a anthu a mitundu awachitira ufumu; ndipo iwo amene awachitira ulamuliro anenedwa, Ochitira zabwino." 
Luke22:26 Koma sipadzatero ndi inu; komatu iye ali wamkulu mwa inu, akhale ngati wamng'ono; ndi iye ali woyamba, akhale ngati wotumikira." 
Luke22:27 Pakuti wamkulu ndani, iye wakuseama pachakudya kapena wakutumikirapo? Si ndiye wakuseama pachakudya kodi? Koma Ine ndili pakati pa inu monga ngati wotumikira." 
Luke22:28 Koma inu ndinu amene munakhala ndi Ine chikhalire m'mayesero anga; 
Luke22:29 ndipo Ine ndikuikirani ufumu, monganso Atate wanga anandiikira Ine, kuti mukadye ndi kumwa kugome kwanga mu Ufumu wanga;" 
Luke22:30 ndipo mudzakhala pa mipando yachifumu ndi kuweruza mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israele. 
Luke22:31 Simoni, Simoni, taona, Satana anafunsa akutengeni kuti akupeteni ngati tirigu;" 
Luke22:32 koma ndinakupempherera kuti chikhulupiriro chako chingazime; ndipo iwe, pamene watembenuka ukhazikitse abale ako." 
Luke22:33 Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Ambuye, ndilipo ndikapite ndi Inu kundende ndi kuimfa." 
Luke22:34 Ndipo Iye anati, Ndikuuza iwe, Petro, sadzalira tambala lero lino kufikira udzakana katatu kuti sundidziwa Ine." 
Luke22:35 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Pamene ndinakutumizani opanda thumba la ndalama, ndi thumba la kamba, ndi nsapato, munasowa kanthu kodi? Anati iwo, Iai." 
Luke22:36 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Koma tsopano, iye amene ali ndi thumba la ndalama, alitenge, ndi thumba la kamba lomwe; ndipo amene alibe, agulitse chofunda chake, nagule lupanga." 
Luke22:37 Pakuti ndinena ndi inu, chimene chidalembedwa chiyenera kukwanitsidwa mwa Ine, Ndipo anawerengedwa ndi anthu opanda lamulo; pakuti izi za kwa Ine zili nacho chimaliziro." 
Luke22:38 Ndipo iwo anati, Ambuye, taonani, malupanga awiri siwa. Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Chakwanira." 
Luke22:39 Ndipo Iye anatuluka, napita monga ankachitira, kuphiri la Azitona; ndi ophunzira anamtsata Iye." 
Luke22:40 Ndipo pofika pomwepo, anati kwa iwo, Pempherani kuti mungalowe m'kuyesedwa." 
Luke22:41 Ndipo anapatukana nao kutalika kwake ngati kuponya mwala, nagwada pansi napemphera," 
Luke22:42 nati, Atate, mukafuna Inu, chotsani chikho ichi pa Ine; koma si kufuna kwanga ai, komatu kwanu kuchitike." 
Luke22:43 Ndipo anamuonekera Iye mngelo wa Kumwamba namlimbitsa Iye. 
Luke22:44 Ndipo pokhala Iye m'chipsinjo mtima anapemphera kolimba koposa ndithu: ndi thukuta lake linakhala ngati madontho akulu a mwazi alinkugwa pansi. 
Luke22:45 Ndipo pamene ananyamuka pakupemphera anadza kwa ophunzira, nawapeza ali m'tulo ndi chisoni," 
Luke22:46 ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mugoneranji? Ukani, pempherani kuti mungalowe m'kuyesedwa." 
Luke22:47 Pamene Iye anali chilankhulire, taonani, khamu la anthu, ndipo iye wotchedwa Yudasi, mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, anawatsogolera; nayandikira Yesu kumpsompsona Iye." 
Luke22:48 Koma Yesu anati kwa iye, Yudasi, ulikupereka Mwana wa Munthu ndi chimpsompsono kodi?" 
Luke22:49 Ndipo m'mene iwo akumzinga Iye anaona chimene chiti chichitike, anati, Ambuye, tidzakantha ndi lupanga kodi?" 
Luke22:50 Ndipo wina wa iwo anakantha kapolo wa mkulu wa ansembe, namdula khutu lake lamanja." 
Luke22:51 Koma Yesu anayankha nati, Lolani kufikira kumene. Ndipo anakhudza khutu lake, namchiritsa." 
Luke22:52 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa ansembe aakulu ndi akapitao a Kachisi, ndi akulu, amene anadza kumgwira Iye, Munatuluka ndi malupanga ndi mikunkhu kodi monga ngati kugwira wachifwamba?" 
Luke22:53 Masiku onse, pamene ndinali ndi inu m'Kachisi, simunatansa manja anu kundigwira: koma nyengo yino ndi yanu, ndipo ulamuliro wa mdima ndi wanu." 
Luke22:54 Ndipo pamenepo anamgwira Iye, napita naye, nalowa m'nyumba ya mkulu wa ansembe. Koma Petro anatsata kutali." 
Luke22:55 Ndipo pamene adasonkha moto m'kati mwa bwalo, nakhala pansi pamodzi, Petro anakhala pakati pao." 
Luke22:56 Ndipo mdzakazi anamuona iye alikukhala m'kuwala kwake kwa moto, nampenyetsa iye, nati, Munthu uyunso anali naye." 
Luke22:57 Koma anakana, nati, Mkaziwe, sindimdziwa Iye." 
Luke22:58 Ndipo popita kamphindi, anamuona wina, nati, Iwenso uli mmodzi wa awo. Koma Petro anati, Munthu iwe, sindine." 
Luke22:59 Ndipo patapita ngati ora limodzi, wina ananenetsa, kuti, Zoonadi, munthu uyunso anali naye, pakuti ndiye Mgalileya" 
Luke22:60 Koma Petro anati, Munthu iwe, sindidziwa chimene uchinena. Ndipo pomwepo, iye ali chilankhulire, tambala analira." 
Luke22:61 Ndipo Ambuye anapotoloka, nayang'ana Petro. Ndipo Petro anakumbukira mau a Ambuye, kuti anati kwa iye, Asanalire tambala lero lino, udzandikana Ine katatu." 
Luke22:62 Ndipo anatuluka, nalira misozi ndi kuwawa mtima." 
Luke22:63 Ndipo amuna amene analikusunga Yesu anamnyoza Iye, nampanda." 
Luke22:64 Ndipo anamkulunga Iye m'maso, namfunsa, nati, Talota; anakupanda Iwe ndani?" 
Luke22:65 Ndipo zambiri zina anamnenera Iye, namchitira mwano." 
Luke22:66 Ndipo pamene kunacha, bungwe la akulu a anthu linasonkhana, ndiwo ansembe aakulu ndi alembi; ndipo anapita naye kubwalo lao," 
Luke22:67 nanena, Ngati uli Khristu, utiuze. Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndikakuuzani, simudzavomereza;" 
Luke22:68 ndipo ndikakufunsani kanthu, simudzayankha." 
Luke22:69 Koma kuyambira tsopano Mwana wa Munthu adzakhala pa dzanja lamanja la mphamvu ya Mulungu. 
Luke22:70 Ndipo onse anati, Umo mtero, muli Mwana wa Mulungu kodi? Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Munena kuti ndine." 
Luke22:71 Ndipo iwo anati, Tifuniranjinso mboni? Pakuti ife tokha tinamva m'kamwa mwa Iye mwini." 
Luke23:1 Ndipo khamu lonselo linanyamuka kupita naye kwa Pilato. 
Luke23:2 Ndipo anayamba kumnenera Iye, kuti, Tinapeza munthu uyu alikupandutsa anthu a mtundu wathu, ndi kuwaletsa kupereka msonkho kwa Kaisara, nadzinenera kuti Iye yekha ndiye Khristu mfumu." 
Luke23:3 Ndipo Pilato anamfunsa Iye, nanena, Kodi ndiwe mfumu ya Ayuda? Ndipo Iye anamyankha nati, Mwatero." 
Luke23:4 Ndipo Pilato anati kwa ansembe aakulu ndi makamu a anthu, Ndilibe kupeza chifukwa cha mlandu ndi munthu uyu." 
Luke23:5 Koma iwo anapunda kunena kuti, Amautsa anthuwo, naphunzitsa m'Yudeya lonse, kuyambira ku Galileya ndi kufikira kuno komwe." 
Luke23:6 Koma pamene Pilato anamva, anafunsa ngati munthuyu ali Mgalileya." 
Luke23:7 Ndipo m'mene anadziwa kuti ali wa m'ulamuliro wake wa Herode, anamtumiza Iye kwa Herode, amene anali iye mwini ku Yerusalemu masiku awa." 
Luke23:8 Ndipo Herode, pamene anaona Yesu, anakondwa ndithu; pakuti anayamba kale kufuna kumpenya Iye, chifukwa anamva za Iye; nayembekeza kuona chizindikiro china chochitidwa ndi Iye." 
Luke23:9 Ndipo anamfunsa Iye mau ambiri; koma Iye sanamyankhe kanthu. 
Luke23:10 Ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi alembi anaimirira, namnenera Iye kolimba." 
Luke23:11 Ndipo Herode ndi asilikali ake anampeputsa Iye, namnyoza, namveka Iye chofunda chonyezimira, nambwezera kwa Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Ndipo Herode ndi Pilato anachitana chibwenzi tsiku lomwelo; pakuti kale anadana. 
Luke23:13 Ndipo Pilato anaitana ansembe aakulu, ndi akulu, ndi anthu, asonkhane," 
Luke23:14 nati kwa iwo, Munadza kwa ine ndi munthu uyu ngati munthu wakupandutsa anthu: ndipo taonani, Ine ndinamfunsa za mlanduwu pamaso panu, ndipo sindinapeza pa munthuyu chifukwa cha zinthu zimene mumnenera;" 
Luke23:15 inde, ngakhale Herode yemwe; pakuti iye anambwezera Iye kwa ife; ndipo taonani, sanachite Iye kanthu kakuyenera kufa." 
Luke23:16 Chifukwa chake ndidzamkwapula ndi kummasula Iye. 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Koma iwo onse pamodzi anafuula, nati, Chotsani munthu uyu, mutimasulire Barabasi;" 
Luke23:19 ndiye munthu anaponyedwa m'ndende chifukwa cha mpanduko m'mudzi ndi cha kupha munthu. 
Luke23:20 Ndipo Pilato analankhulanso nao, nafuna kumasula Yesu;" 
Luke23:21 koma iwo anafuula, nanena, Mpachikeni, mpachikeni pamtanda." 
Luke23:22 Ndipo anati kwa iwo nthawi yachitatu, Nanga munthuyu anachita choipa chiyani? Sindinapeza chifukwa cha kufera Iye; chotero ndidzamkwapula Iye ndi kummasula." 
Luke23:23 Koma anakakamiza ndi mau okweza, napempha kuti Iye apachikidwe. Ndipo mau ao analakika." 
Luke23:24 Ndipo Pilato anaweruza kuti chimene alikufunsa chichitidwe. 
Luke23:25 Ndipo anawamasulira amene adaponyedwa m'ndende chifukwa cha mpanduko ndi kupha munthu, amene iwo anampempha; koma anapereka Yesu mwa chifuniro chao." 
Luke23:26 Ndipo popita naye, anagwira munthu, Simoni wa ku Kirene, alikuchokera kuminda, namsenza iye mtanda aunyamule pambuyo pake pa Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Ndipo unamtsata unyinji waukulu wa anthu, ndi wa akazi amene anadziguguda pachifuwa, namlirira Iye." 
Luke23:28 Koma Yesu anawapotolokera nati, Ana akazi inu a Yerusalemu, musandilirire Ine, koma mudzilirire nokha ndi ana anu." 
Luke23:29 Chifukwa taonani masiku alinkudza, pamene adzati, Odala ali ouma ndi mimba yosabala, ndi mawere osayamwitsa." 
Luke23:30 Pomwepo adzayamba kunena kwa mapiri, Igwani pa ife; ndi kwa zitunda, Bisani ife." 
Luke23:31 Pakuti ngati azichitira izi mtengo wauwisi, nanga kudzatani ndi wouma?" 
Luke23:32 Ndipo analinso awiri ena, ndiwo ochita zoipa, anatengedwa pamodzi ndi Iye kuti aphedwe." 
Luke23:33 Ndipo pamene anafika kumalo dzina lake Bade, anampachika Iye pamtanda pomwepo, ndi ochita zoipa omwe, mmodzi kudzanja lamanja ndi wina kulamanzere." 
Luke23:34 Ndipo Yesu ananena, Atate, muwakhululukire iwo, pakuti sadziwa chimene achita. Ndipo anagawana zovala zake, poyesa maere." 
Luke23:35 Ndipo anthu anaima alikupenya. Ndi akulunso anamlalatira Iye, nanena, Anapulumutsa ena; adzipulumutse yekha ngati iye ndiye Khristu wa Mulungu, wosankhidwa wake." 
Luke23:36 Ndipo asilikalinso anamnyoza, nadza kwa Iye, nampatsa vinyo wosasa," 
Luke23:37 nanena, Ngati Iwe ndiwe mfumu ya Ayuda, udzipulumutse wekha." 
Luke23:38 Ndipo kunalinso lembo pamwamba pake, ndilo: UYU NDIYE MFUMU YA AYUDA." 
Luke23:39 Ndipo mmodzi wa ochita zoipa anapachikidwawo anamchitira Iye mwano nanena, Kodi suli Khristu Iwe? Udzipulumutse wekha ndi ife." 
Luke23:40 Koma winayo anayankha, namdzudzula iye, nati, Kodi suopa Mulungu, poona uli m'kulangika komweku?" 
Luke23:41 Ndipo ifetu kuyenera; pakuti tilikulandira zoyenera zimene tinazichita: koma munthu uyu sanachite kanthu kolakwa. 
Luke23:42 Ndipo ananena, Yesu, ndikumbukireni m'mene mulowa Ufumu wanu." 
Luke23:43 Ndipo Iye ananena naye, Indetu, ndinena ndi iwe, Lero lino udzakhala ndine m'Paradaiso." 
Luke23:44 Ndipo ora lake pamenepo linali ngati lachisanu ndi chimodzi. Ndipo panali mdima pa dziko lonse kufikira ora lachisanu ndi chinai, ndipo dzuwa linada." 
Luke23:45 Ndipo nsalu yotchinga ya m'Kachisi inang'ambika pakati. 
Luke23:46 Ndipo pamene Yesu anafuula ndi mau akulu, anati, Atate, m'manja mwanu ndipereka mzimu wanga. Ndipo pakutero anapereka mzimu wake." 
Luke23:47 Ndipo pamene kenturiyo anaona chinachitikacho, analemekeza Mulungu, nanena, Zoonadi munthu uyu anali wolungama." 
Luke23:48 Ndipo makamu onse osonkhana kudzapenya ichi, pamene anaona zinachitikazo, anapita kwao ndi kudziguguda pachifuwa." 
Luke23:49 Ndipo omdziwa Iye onse, ndi akazi amene adamtsata kuchokera ku Galileya, anaima kutali, naona zinthu izi." 
Luke23:50 Ndipo taonani, munthu dzina lake Yosefe, ndiye mkulu wa milandu, munthu wabwino ndi wolungama" 
Luke23:51 (amene sanavomereze kuweruza kwao ndi ntchito yao) wa ku Arimatea, mudzi wa Ayuda, ndiye woyembekezera Ufumu wa Mulungu," 
Luke23:52 yemweyo anapita kwa Pilato napempha mtembo wake wa Yesu. 
Luke23:53 Ndipo anautsitsa, naukulunga m'nsalu yabafuta, nauika m'manda osemedwa m'mwala, m'menemo sanaike munthu ndi kale lonse." 
Luke23:54 Ndipo panali tsiku lokonzera, ndi Sabata linayandikira." 
Luke23:55 Ndipo akazi, amene anachokera naye ku Galileya, anatsata m'mbuyo, naona manda, ndi maikidwe a mtembo wake." 
Luke23:56 Ndipo anapita kwao, nakonza zonunkhira ndi mafuta abwino. Ndipo pa Sabata anapumula monga mwa lamulo." 
Luke24:1 Koma tsiku loyamba la sabata, mbandakucha, anadza kumanda atatenga zonunkhira adazikonza." 
Luke24:2 Ndipo anapeza mwala unakunkhunizidwa kuuchotsa pamanda. 
Luke24:3 Ndipo m'mene analowa sanapeze mtembo wa Ambuye Yesu. 
Luke24:4 Ndipo kunali, m'mene anathedwa nzeru nacho, taonani amuna awiri anaimirira pafupi pao atavala zonyezimira;" 
Luke24:5 ndipo m'mene anakhala ndi mantha naweramira pansi nkhope zao, anati kwa iwo, Mufuniranji wamoyo pa akufa?" 
Luke24:6 Palibe kuno Iye, komatu anauka; kumbukirani muja adalankhula nanu, pamene analinso m'Galileya," 
Luke24:7 ndi kunena, kuti, Mwana wa Munthu ayenera kuperekedwa m'manja a anthu ochimwa, ndi kupachikidwa pamtanda, ndi kuuka tsiku lachitatu." 
Luke24:8 Ndipo anakumbukira mau ake," 
Luke24:9 nabwera kuchokera kumanda, nafotokozera zonse khumi ndi mmodziwo, ndi otsala onse omwe." 
Luke24:10 Koma panali Maria wa Magadala, ndi Yohana, ndi Maria amake wa Yakobo, ndi akazi ena pamodzi nao amene ananena izi kwa atumwiwo." 
Luke24:11 Ndipo mau awa anaoneka pamaso pao ngati nkhani zachabe, ndipo sanamvere akaziwo." 
Luke24:12 Koma Petro ananyamuka nathamangira kumanda, ndipo powerama anaona nsalu zoyera pa zokha; ndipo anachoka nanka kwao, nazizwa ndi chija chidachitikacho." 
Luke24:13 Ndipo taonani, awiri a mwa iwo analikupita tsiku lomwelo kumudzi dzina lake Emausi, wosiyana ndi Yerusalemu mastadiya makumi asanu ndi limodzi." 
Luke24:14 Ndipo iwowa anakambirana nkhani za izi zonse zidachitika. 
Luke24:15 Ndipo kunali m'kukambirana kwao ndi kufunsana, Yesu mwini anayandikira, natsagana nao." 
Luke24:16 Koma maso ao anagwidwa kuti asamzindikire Iye. 
Luke24:17 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mau awa ndi otani mulandizanawo poyendayenda? Ndipo anaima ndi nkhope zao zachisoni." 
Luke24:18 Ndipo mmodzi wa iwo, dzina lake Kleopa, anayankha nati kwa Iye, Kodi iwe wekha ndiwe mlendo m'Yerusalemu ndi wosazindikira zidachitikazi masiku omwe ano?" 
Luke24:19 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Zinthu zanji? Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Izi za Yesu Mnazarene, ndiye munthu mneneri wamphamvu m'ntchito, ndi m'mau, pamaso pa Mulungu ndi anthu onse;" 
Luke24:20 ndi kuti ansembe aakulu ndi akulu athu anampereka Iye ku chiweruziro cha imfa, nampachika Iye pamtanda." 
Luke24:21 Ndipo tinayembekeza ife kuti Iye ndiye wakudzayo kudzaombola Israele. Komatunso, pamodzi ndi izi zonse lero ndilo tsiku lachitatu kuyambira zidachitika izi." 
Luke24:22 Komatu akazi enanso a mwa ife anatidabwitsa, ndiwo amene analawirira kumanda;" 
Luke24:23 ndipo m'mene sanapeze mtembo wake, anadza, nanena kuti adaona m'masomphenya angelo, amene ananena kuti ali ndi moyo Iye." 
Luke24:24 Ndipo ena a iwo anali nafe anachoka kunka kumanda, napeza monga momwe akazi adanena; koma Iyeyo sanamuone." 
Luke24:25 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Opusa inu, ndi ozengereza mtima kusakhulupirira zonse adazilankhula aneneri!" 
Luke24:26 Kodi sanayenera Khristu kumva zowawa izi, ndi kulowa ulemerero wake?" 
Luke24:27 Ndipo anayamba kwa Mose, ndi kwa aneneri onse nawatanthauzira iwo m'malembo onse zinthu za Iye yekha." 
Luke24:28 Ndipo anayandikira kumudzi umene analikupitako; ndipo anachita ngati anafuna kupitirira. 
Luke24:29 Ndipo anamuumiriza Iye, nati, Khalani ndi ife; pakuti kuli madzulo, ndipo dzuwa lapendekatu. Ndipo analowa kukhala nao." 
Luke24:30 Ndipo kunali m'mene Iye anaseama nao pachakudya, anatenga mkate, naudalitsa, naunyema, napatsa iwo." 
Luke24:31 Ndipo maso ao anatseguka, ndipo anamzindikira Iye; ndipo anawakanganukira Iye, nawachokera." 
Luke24:32 Ndipo anati wina kwa mnzake, Mtima wathu sunali wotentha m'kati mwathu nanga m'mene analankhula nafe m'njira, m'mene anatitsegulira malembo?" 
Luke24:33 Ndipo ananyamuka nthawi yomweyo nabwera ku Yerusalemu, napeza khumi ndi mmodziwo, ndi iwo anali nao atasonkhana pamodzi," 
Luke24:34 nanena, Ambuye anauka ndithu, naonekera kwa Simoni." 
Luke24:35 Ndipo iwo anawafotokozera za m'njira, ndi umo anadziwika nao m'kunyema kwa mkate." 
Luke24:36 Ndipo pakulankhula izi iwowa, Iye anaimirira pakati pao; nanena nao, Mtendere ukhale nanu." 
Luke24:37 Koma anaopsedwa ndi kuchita mantha, nayesa alikuona mzimu." 
Luke24:38 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mukhala bwanji ovutika? Ndipo matsutsano amauka bwanji m'mtima mwanu?" 
Luke24:39 Penyani manja anga ndi mapazi anga, kuti Ine ndine mwini: ndikhudzeni, ndipo penyani; pakuti mzimu ulibe mnofu ndi mafupa, monga muona ndili nazo Ine." 
Luke24:40 Ndipo m'mene ananena ichi, anawaonetsera iwo manja ake ndi mapazi ake." 
Luke24:41 Koma pokhala iwo chikhalire osakhulupirira chifukwa cha chimwemwe, nalikuzizwa, anati kwa iwo, Muli nako kanthu kakudya kuno?" 
Luke24:42 Ndipo anampatsa Iye chidutsu cha nsomba yokazinga. 
Luke24:43 Ndipo anachitenga, nachidya pamaso pao." 
Luke24:44 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Awa ndi mauwo ndinalankhula nanu, paja ndinakhala ndi inu, kuti ziyenera kukwanitsidwa zonse zolembedwa za Ine m'chilamulo cha Mose, ndi aneneri, ndi Masalmo." 
Luke24:45 Ndipo anawatsegulira mitima yao, kuti adziwitse malembo;" 
Luke24:46 ndipo anati kwa iwo, Kotero kwalembedwa, kuti Khristu amve zowawa, nauke kwa akufa tsiku lachitatu;" 
Luke24:47 ndi kuti kulalikidwe m'dzina lake kulapa ndi kukhululukidwa kwa machimo kwa mitundu yonse, kuyambira ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke24:48 Inu ndinu mboni za izi. 
Luke24:49 Ndipo onani, Ine nditumiza pa inu lonjezano la Atate wanga; koma khalani inu m'mudzi muno, kufikira mwavekedwa ndi mphamvu yochokera Kumwamba." 
Luke24:50 Ndipo anatuluka nao kufikira ku Betaniya; nakweza manja ake, nawadalitsa." 
Luke24:51 Ndipo kunali, pakuwadalitsa Iye analekana nao, natengedwa kunka Kumwamba." 
Luke24:52 Ndipo anamlambira Iye, nabwera ku Yerusalemu ndi chimwemwe chachikulu;" 
Luke24:53 ndipo anakhala chikhalire m'Kachisi, nalikuyamika Mulungu. Amen." 
John1:1 Pachiyambi panali Mau, ndipo Mau anali kwa Mulungu, ndipo Mau ndiye Mulungu." 
John1:2 Awa anali pachiyambi kwa Mulungu. 
John1:3 Zonse zinalengedwa ndi Iye; ndipo kopanda Iye sikunalengedwa kanthu kalikonse kolengedwa. 
John1:4 Mwa Iye munali moyo; ndi moyowu unali kuunika kwa anthu. 
John1:5 Ndipo kuunikaku kunawala mumdima; ndi mdimawu sunakuzindikira. 
John1:6 Kunali munthu, wotumidwa ndi Mulungu, dzina lake ndiye Yohane." 
John1:7 Iyeyu anadza mwa umboni kudzachita umboni za kuunikaku, kuti onse akakhulupirire mwa iye." 
John1:8 Iye sindiye kuunikaku, koma anatumidwa kukachita umboni wa kuunikaku." 
John1:9 Uku ndiko kuunika kwenikweni, kumene kuunikira anthu onse akulowa m'dziko lapansi." 
John1:10 Anali m'dziko lapansi, ndi dziko linalengedwa ndi Iye, koma dziko silinamzindikira Iye." 
John1:11 Anadza kwa zake za Iye yekha, ndipo ake a mwini yekha sanamlandire Iye." 
John1:12 Koma onse amene anamlandira Iye, kwa iwo anapatsa mphamvu yakukhala ana a Mulungu, kwa iwotu, akukhulupirira dzina lake;" 
John1:13 amene sanabadwe ndi mwazi, kapena ndi chifuniro cha thupi, kapena ndi chifuniro cha munthu, koma cha Mulungu." 
John1:14 Ndipo Mau anasandulika thupi, nakhazikika pakati pa ife, ndipo tinaona ulemerero wake, ulemerero wonga wa wobadwa yekha wa Atate, wodzala ndi chisomo ndi choonadi." 
John1:15 Yohane achita umboni za Iye, nafuula nati, Uyu ndiye amene ndinanena za Iye, Wakudzayo pambuyo panga analipo ndisanabadwe ine; chifukwa anakhala woyamba wa ine." 
John1:16 Chifukwa mwa kudzala kwake tinalandira ife tonse, chisomo chosinthana ndi chisomo." 
John1:17 Chifukwa chilamulo chinapatsidwa mwa Mose; chisomo ndi choonadi zinadza mwa Yesu Khristu. 
John1:18 Kulibe munthu anaona Mulungu nthawi zonse; Mwana wobadwa yekha wakukhala pa chifuwa cha Atate, Iyeyu anafotokozera." 
John1:19 Ndipo umene ndiwo umboni wa Yohane, pamene Ayuda anatuma kwa iye ansembe ndi Alevi a ku Yerusalemu akamfunse iye, Ndiwe yani?" 
John1:20 Ndipo anavomera, wosakana; nalola kuti, Sindine Khristu." 
John1:21 Ndipo anamfunsa iye, Nanga bwanji? Ndiwe Eliya kodi? Nanena iye, Sindine iye. Ndiwe Mneneriyo kodi? Nayankha, Iai." 
John1:22 Chifukwa chake anati kwa iye, Ndiwe yani? Kuti tibwezere mau kwa iwo anatituma ife. Unena chiyani za iwe wekha?" 
John1:23 Anati, Ndine mau a wofuula m'chipululu, Lungamitsani njira ya Mbuye, monga anati Yesaya mneneriyo." 
John1:24 Ndipo otumidwawo anali a kwa Afarisi. 
John1:25 Ndipo anamfunsa iye, nati kwa iye, Koma ubatiza bwanji, ngati suli Khristu, kapena Eliya, kapena Mneneriyo?" 
John1:26 Yohane anawayankha, nati, Ine ndibatiza ndi madzi; pakati pa inu paimirira amene simumdziwa," 
John1:27 ndiye wakudza pambuyo panga, amene sindiyenera kummasulira lamba la nsapato yake." 
John1:28 Zinthu izi zinachitika m'Betaniya tsidya lija la Yordani, pomwe analikubatiza Yohane." 
John1:29 M'mawa mwake anaona Yesu alinkudza kwa iye, nanena, Onani Mwanawankhosa wa Mulungu amene achotsa tchimo lake la dziko lapansi!" 
John1:30 Ndiye amene ndinati za Iye, Pambuyo panga palinkudza munthu amene analipo ndisanabadwe ine; pakuti anali woyamba wa ine." 
John1:31 Ndipo sindinamdziwa Iye; koma kuti aonetsedwe kwa Israele, chifukwa cha ichi ndinadza ine kudzabatiza ndi madzi." 
John1:32 Ndipo Yohane anachita umboni, nati, Ndinaona Mzimu alikutsika kuchokera Kumwamba monga nkhunda; nakhalabe pa Iye." 
John1:33 Ndipo sindinamdziwa Iye, koma wonditumayo kudzabatiza ndi madzi, Iyeyu ananena ndi ine, Amene udzaona Mzimu atsikira, nakhala pa Iye, yemweyu ndiye wakubatiza ndi Mzimu Woyera." 
John1:34 Ndipo ndaona ine, ndipo ndachita umboni kuti Mwana wa Mulungu ndi Yemweyu." 
John1:35 M'mawa mwakenso analikuimirira Yohane ndi awiri a ophunzira ake; 
John1:36 ndipo poyang'ana Yesu alikuyenda, anati, Onani Mwanawankhosa wa Mulungu!" 
John1:37 Ndipo ophunzira awiriwo anamva iye alinkulankhula, natsata Yesu." 
John1:38 Koma Yesu anacheuka, napenya iwo alikumtsata, nanena nao, Mufuna chiyani? Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Rabi (ndiko kunena posandulika, Mphunzitsi), mukhala kuti?" 
John1:39 Nanena nao, Tiyeni, mukaone. Pamenepo anadza naona kumene anakhala; nakhala ndi Iye tsiku lomwelo; panali monga ora lakhumi." 
John1:40 Andrea mbale wake wa Simoni Petro anali mmodzi wa awiriwo, anamva Yohane, namtsata Iye." 
John1:41 Anayamba iye kupeza mbale wake yekha Simoni, nanena naye, Tapeza ife Mesiya (ndiko kusandulika Khristu)." 
John1:42 Anadza naye kwa Yesu. M'mene anamyang'ana iye, anati, Uli Simoni mwana wa Yohane; udzatchedwa Kefa (ndiko kusandulika Petro)." 
John1:43 M'mawa mwake anafuna kutuluka kunka ku Galileya, napeza Filipo. Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Tsata Ine." 
John1:44 Koma Filipo anali wa ku Betsaida, mudzi wa Andrea ndi Petro." 
John1:45 Filipo anapeza Natanaele, nanena naye, Iye amene Mose analembera za Iye m'chilamulo, ndi aneneri, tampeza, ndiye Yesu mwana wa Yosefe wa ku Nazarete." 
John1:46 Natanaele anati kwa iye, Ku Nazarete nkutha kuchokera kanthu kabwino kodi? Filipo ananena naye, Tiye ukaone." 
John1:47 Yesu anaona Natanaele alinkudza kwa Iye, nanena za iye, Onani, Mwisraele ndithu, mwa iye mulibe chinyengo!" 
John1:48 Natanaele ananena naye, Munandidziwira kuti? Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Asanakuitane Filipo, pokhala iwe pansi pa mkuyu paja, ndinakuona iwe." 
John1:49 Natanaele anayankha Iye, Rabi, Inu ndinu Mwana wa Mulungu, ndinu mfumu ya Israele." 
John1:50 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Chifukwa ndinati kwa iwe kuti ndinakuona pansi pa mkuyu ukhulupirira kodi? Udzaona zoposa izi." 
John1:51 Ndipo ananena naye, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Mudzaona thambo lotseguka, ndi angelo a Mulungu akwera natsikira pa Mwana wa Munthu." 
John2:1 Ndipo tsiku lachitatu panali ukwati m'Kana wa m'Galileya; ndipo amake wa Yesu anali komweko. 
John2:2 Ndipo Yesu yemwe ndi ophunzira ake anaitanidwa kuukwatiwo. 
John2:3 Ndipo pakutha vinyo, amake wa Yesu ananena naye, Alibe vinyo." 
John2:4 Yesu nanena naye, Mkazi, ndili ndi chiyani ndi inu? Nthawi yanga siinafike." 
John2:5 Amake ananena kwa atumiki, Chimene chilichonse akanena kwa inu, chitani." 
John2:6 Ndipo panali pamenepo mitsuko yamiyala isanu ndi umodzi yoikidwako monga mwa mayeretsedwe a Ayuda, yonse ya miyeso iwiri kapena itatu." 
John2:7 Yesu ananena nao, Dzazani mitsukoyo ndi madzi. Naidzaza, ndendende." 
John2:8 Ndipo ananena nao, Tungani tsopano, mupite nao kwa mkulu wa phwando. Ndipo anapita nao." 
John2:9 Koma pamene mkuluyo analawa madzi osanduka vinyowo, ndipo sanadziwe kumene anachokera (koma atumiki amene adatunga madzi anadziwa), mkuluyo anaitana mkwati," 
John2:10 nanena naye, Munthu aliyense amayamba kuika vinyo wokoma; ndipo anthu atamwatu, pamenepo wina wosakoma; koma iwe wasunga vinyo wokoma kufikira tsopano lino." 
John2:11 Chiyambi ichi cha zizindikiro zake Yesu anachita m'Kana wa m'Galileya naonetsera ulemerero wake; ndipo ophunzira ake anakhulupirira Iye. 
John2:12 Zitapita izi anatsikira ku Kapernao, Iye ndi amake, ndi abale ake, ndi ophunzira ake; nakhala komweko masiku owerengeka." 
John2:13 Ndipo Paska wa Ayuda unayandikira, ndipo Yesu anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
John2:14 Ndipo anapeza m'Kachisi iwo akugulitsa ng'ombe ndi nkhosa ndi nkhunda, ndi akusinthana ndalama alikukhala pansi." 
John2:15 Ndipo pamene adapanga mkwapulo wazingwe, anatulutsa onse m'Kachisimo, ndi nkhosa ndi ng'ombe; nakhuthula ndalama za osinthanawo, nagubuduza magome;" 
John2:16 nati kwa iwo akugulitsa nkhunda, Chotsani izi muno; musamayesa nyumba ya Atate wanga nyumba ya malonda." 
John2:17 Ophunzira ake anakumbukira kuti kunalembedwa, Changu cha pa nyumba yanu chandidya ine." 
John2:18 Chifukwa chake Ayuda anayankha nati kwa Iye, Mutionetsera ife chizindikiro chanji, pakuti muchita izi?" 
John2:19 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Pasulani Kachisi uyu, ndipo masiku atatu ndidzamuutsa." 
John2:20 Pamenepo Ayuda anati, Zaka makumi anai ndi zisanu ndi chimodzi analimkumanga Kachisiyu, kodi inu mudzamuutsa masiku atatu?" 
John2:21 Koma Iye analikunena za Kachisi wa thupi lake. 
John2:22 Chifukwa chake atauka kwa akufa, ophunzira ake anakumbukira kuti ananena ichi; ndipo anakhulupirira cholemba, ndi mau amene Yesu ananena." 
John2:23 Koma pamene anali m'Yerusalemu pa Paska pachikondwerero, ambiri anakhulupirira dzina lake, pakuona zizindikiro zake zimene anachitazi." 
John2:24 Koma Yesu sanakhulupirire iwo kuti akhale nao, chifukwa Iye anadziwa anthu onse," 
John2:25 ndipo sanasowe wina achite umboni za munthu; pakuti anadziwa Iye yekha chimene chinali mwa munthu. 
John3:1 Koma panali munthu wa Afarisi, dzina lake Nikodemo, mkulu wa Ayuda." 
John3:2 Iyeyu anadza kwa Yesu usiku, nati kwa Iye, Rabi, tidziwa kuti Inu ndinu mphunzitsi wochokera kwa Mulungu; pakuti palibe munthu akhoza kuchita zizindikiro zimene Inu muchita, ngati Mulungu sakhala naye." 
John3:3 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi iwe, Ngati munthu sabadwa mwatsopano, sakhoza kuona Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
John3:4 Nikodemo ananena kwa Iye, Munthu akhoza bwanji kubadwa atakalamba? Kodi akhoza kulowanso m'mimba ya amake ndi kubadwa?" 
John3:5 Yesu anayankha, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi iwe, Ngati munthu sabadwa mwa madzi ndi Mzimu, sakhoza kulowa ufumu wa Mulungu." 
John3:6 Chobadwa m'thupi chikhala thupi, ndipo chobadwa mwa Mzimu, chikhala mzimu." 
John3:7 Usadabwe chifukwa ndinati kwa iwe, Uyenera kubadwa mwatsopano." 
John3:8 Mphepo iomba pomwe ifuna, ndipo ukumva mau ake, koma sudziwa kumene ichokera, ndi kumene imuka; chotero aliyense wobadwa mwa Mzimu." 
John3:9 Nikodemo anayankha nati kwa Iye, Izi zingatheke bwanji?" 
John3:10 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Kodi uli mphunzitsi wa Israele, ndipo sudziwa izi?" 
John3:11 Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa iwe, Tilankhula chimene tichidziwa, ndipo tichita umboni za chimene tachiona; ndipo umboni wathu simuulandira." 
John3:12 Ngati ndakuuzani za pansi pano, ndipo simukhulupirira, mudzakhulupirira bwanji, ngati ndikuuzani za Kumwamba?" 
John3:13 Ndipo kulibe munthu anakwera Kumwamba, koma Iye wotsikayo kuchokera Kumwamba, ndiye Mwana wa Munthu, wokhala m'Mwambayo." 
John3:14 Ndipo monga Mose anakweza njoka m'chipululu, chotero Mwana wa Munthu ayenera kukwezedwa;" 
John3:15 kuti yense wakukhulupirira akhale nao moyo wosatha mwa Iye. 
John3:16 Pakuti Mulungu anakonda dziko lapansi kotero, kuti anapatsa Mwana wake wobadwa yekha, kuti yense wakhulupirira Iye asatayike, koma akhale nao moyo wosatha." 
John3:17 Pakuti Mulungu sanatume Mwana wake kudziko lapansi, kuti akaweruze dziko lapansi, koma kuti dziko lapansi likapulumutsidwe ndi Iye." 
John3:18 Wokhulupirira Iye saweruzidwa; wosakhulupirira waweruzidwa ngakhale tsopano, chifukwa sanakhulupirire dzina la Mwana wobadwa yekha wa Mulungu." 
John3:19 Koma chiweruziro ndi ichi, kuti kuunika kunadza kudziko lapansi, ndipo anthu anakonda mdima koposa kuunika; pakuti ntchito zao zinali zoipa." 
John3:20 Pakuti yense wakuchita zoipa adana nako kuunika, ndipo sakudza kwa kuunika, kuti zingatsutsidwe ntchito zake." 
John3:21 Koma wochita choonadi adza kukuunika, kuti ntchito zake zionekere kuti zinachitidwa mwa Mulungu." 
John3:22 Zitapita izi anadza Yesu ndi ophunzira ake kudziko la Yudeya; ndipo pamenepo anatsotsa nao pamodzi, nabatiza." 
John3:23 Ndipo Yohane analinkubatiza m'Ainoni pafupi pa Salimu, chifukwa panali madzi ambiri pamenepo; ndipo analinkufikako anthu, nalinkubatizidwa." 
John3:24 Pakuti Yohane sanaikidwe m'ndende. 
John3:25 Pamenepo padauka kufunsana mwa ophunzira ake a Yohane ndi Myuda za mayeretsedwe. 
John3:26 Ndipo anadza kwa Yohane, nati kwa iye, Rabi, Iye amene anali ndi inu tsidya lija la Yordani, amene munamchitira umboni, taonani yemweyu abatiza, ndipo anthu onse alinkudza kwa Iye." 
John3:27 Yohane anayankha nati, Munthu sakhoza kulandira kanthu, ngati sikapatsidwa kwa iye kuchokera Kumwamba." 
John3:28 Inu nokha mundichitira umboni, kuti ndinati, Sindine Khristu, koma kuti ndili wotumidwa m'tsogolo mwake mwa Iye." 
John3:29 Iye amene ali naye mkwatibwi ali mkwati, koma mnzake wa mkwatiyo, wakuimirira ndi kumvera iye, akondwera kwakukulu chifukwa cha mau a mkwatiyo; chifukwa chake chimwemwe changa chimene chakwanira." 
John3:30 Iyeyo ayenera kukula koma ine ndichepe. 
John3:31 Iye wochokera Kumwamba ali woposa onse; iye amene ali wa dziko lapansi ali wa dziko lapansi, nalankhula za dziko lapansi: Iye wochokera Kumwamba ali woposa onse." 
John3:32 Chimene anachiona nachimva, achita umboni wa ichi chomwe; ndipo kulibe munthu alandira umboni wake." 
John3:33 Iye amene analandira umboni wake anaikapo chizindikiro chake kuti Mulungu ali woona. 
John3:34 Pakuti Iye amene Mulungu anamtuma alankhula mau a Mulungu; pakuti sapatsa Mzimu ndi muyeso. 
John3:35 Atate akonda Mwana, nampatsa zinthu zonse m'dzanja lake." 
John3:36 Iye amene akhulupirira Mwanayo ali nao moyo wosatha; koma iye amene sakhulupirira Mwanayo sadzaona moyo, koma mkwiyo wa Mulungu ukhala pa iye." 
John4:1 Chifukwa chake pamene Ambuye anadziwa kuti Afarisi adamva kuti Yesu anayesa anthu ophunzira, nawabatiza koposa Yohane" 
John4:2 (angakhale Yesu sanabatize yekha koma ophunzira ake)," 
John4:3 anachokera ku Yudeya, namukanso ku Galileya." 
John4:4 Ndipo anayenera kupita pakati pa Samariya. 
John4:5 Chifukwa chake anadza kumudzi wa Samariya, dzina lake Sikari, pafupi pa kadziko kamene Yakobo adapatsa mwana wake Yosefe;" 
John4:6 ndipo pamenepo panali chitsime cha Yakobo. Ndipo Yesu, popeza analema ndi ulendo wake, motero anakhala ndi ulendo wake, motero anakhala pachitsime." 
John4:7 Kunali ngati ora lachisanu ndi chimodzi. Kunadza mkazi wotuluka m'Samariya kudzatunga madzi. Yesu ananena naye, Undipatse Ine ndimwe." 
John4:8 Pakuti ophunzira ake adachoka kunka kumudzi kuti akagule chakudya. 
John4:9 Pamenepo mkazi wa m'Samariya ananena ndi Iye, Bwanji Inu, muli Myuda, mupempha kwa ine kumwa, ndine mkazi Msamariya? (Pakuti Ayuda sayenderana nao Asamariya)." 
John4:10 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Ukadadziwa mtulo wa Mulungu, ndi Iye amene alinkunena ndi iwe, Undipatse Ine ndimwe; ukadapempha Iye, ndipo akadakupatsa madzi amoyo." 
John4:11 Mkaziyo ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, mulibe chotungira madzi, ndi chitsime chili chakuya; ndipo mwatenga kuti madzi amoyo?" 
John4:12 Kodi muli wamkulu ndi atate wathu Yakobo amene anatipatsa ife chitsimechi, namwamo iye yekha, ndi ana ake, ndi zoweta zake?" 
John4:13 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Yense wakumwako madzi awa adzamvanso ludzu;" 
John4:14 koma iye wakumwa madzi amene Ine ndidzampatsa sadzamva ludzu nthawi zonse; koma madzi amene Ine ndidzampatsa adzakhala mwa iye kasupe wa madzi otumphukira kumoyo wosatha. 
John4:15 Mkaziyo ananena kwa Iye, Ambuye, ndipatseni madzi amene, kuti ndisamve ludzu, kapena ndisadze kuno kudzatunga." 
John4:16 Yesu ananena kwa iye, Muka, kamuitane mwamuna wako, nudze kuno." 
John4:17 Mkazi anayankha nati kwa Iye, Ndilibe mwamuna. Yesu ananena naye, Wanena bwino, kuti mwamuna ndilibe;" 
John4:18 pakuti wakhala nao amuna asanu; ndipo iye amene ukhala naye tsopano sali mwamuna wako; ichi wanena zoona. 
John4:19 Mkazi ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, ndizindikira kuti muli Mneneri." 
John4:20 Makolo athu analambira m'phiri ili; ndipo inu munena, kuti m'Yerusalemu muli malo oyenera kulambiramo anthu." 
John4:21 Yesu ananena naye, Tamvera Ine, mkazi iwe, kuti ikudza nthawi, imene simudzalambira Atate kapena m'phiri ili, kapena m'Yerusalemu." 
John4:22 Inu mulambira chimene simuchidziwa; ife tilambira chimene tichidziwa; pakuti chipulumutso chichokera kwa Ayuda. 
John4:23 Koma ikudza nthawi, ndipo tsopano ilipo, imene olambira oona adzalambira Atate mumzimu ndi m'choonadi; pakuti Atate afuna otere akhale olambira ake." 
John4:24 Mulungu ndiye mzimu; ndipo omlambira Iye ayenera kumlambira mumzimu ndi m'choonadi. 
John4:25 Mkazi ananena ndi Iye, Ndidziwa kuti Mesiya adza (wotchedwa Khristu): akadzadza Iyeyu, adzatiuza zonse." 
John4:26 Yesu ananena naye, Ine wakulankhula nawe ndine amene." 
John4:27 Ndipo pamenepo anadza ophunzira ake; nazizwa kuti analinkulankhula ndi mkazi; koma panalibe wina anati, Mufuna chiyani? Kapena, mulankhula naye chiyani?" 
John4:28 Pamenepo mkazi anasiya mtsuko wake, namuka kumudzi, nanena ndi anthu," 
John4:29 Tiyeni, mukaone munthu, amene anandiuza zinthu zilizonse ndinazichita: ameneyu sali Khristu nanga?" 
John4:30 Anatuluka iwo m'mudzi ndipo analinkudza kwa Iye. 
John4:31 Pa mphindikati iyi ophunzira ake anampempha Iye, ndi kunena, Rabi, idyani." 
John4:32 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo, Ine ndili nacho chakudya chimene inu simuchidziwa." 
John4:33 Chifukwa chake ophunzira ananena wina ndi mnzake, Kodi pali wina anamtengera Iye kanthu kakudya?" 
John4:34 Yesu ananena nao, Chakudya changa ndicho kuti ndichite chifuniro cha Iye amene anandituma Ine, ndi kutsiriza ntchito yake." 
John4:35 Kodi simunena inu, kuti, Yatsala miyezi inai, ndipo kudza kumweta? Onani ndinena kwa inu, Kwezani maso anu, nimuyang'ane m'minda, kuti mwayera kale kufikira kumweta." 
John4:36 Wakumweta alandira kulipira, nasonkhanitsira chobala kumoyo wosatha; kuti wofesayo akakondwere pamodzi ndi womwetayo." 
John4:37 Pakuti m'menemo chonenacho chili choona, Wofesa ndi wina, womweta ndi winanso." 
John4:38 Ine ndinatuma inu kukamweta chimene simunagwirirapo ntchito: ena anagwira ntchito, ndipo inu mwalowa ntchito yao." 
John4:39 Ndipo m'mudzi muja anthu Asamariya ambiri anamkhulupirira Iye chifukwa cha mau a mkazi, wochita umboniyo, kuti, Anandiuza ine zinthu zilizonse ndinazichita." 
John4:40 Chifukwa chake pamene Asamariya anadza kwa Iye, anamfunsa akhale nao; ndipo anakhala komweko masiku awiri." 
John4:41 Ndipo ambiri oposa anakhulupirira chifukwa cha mau ake; 
John4:42 ndipo ananena kwa mkazi, kuti, Tsopano sitikhulupirira chifukwa cha kulankhula kwako: pakuti tamva tokha, ndipo tidziwa kuti Mpulumutsi wa dziko lapansi ndi Iyeyu ndithu." 
John4:43 Koma atapita masiku awiriwo anachoka komweko kunka ku Galileya. 
John4:44 Pakuti Yesu mwini anachita umboni kuti, Mneneri alibe ulemu m'dziko la kwao." 
John4:45 Chifukwa chake pamene anadza ku Galileya, Agalileya anamlandira Iye, atakaona zonse zimene anazichita m'Yerusalemu pachikondwerero; pakuti iwonso ananka kuchikondwerero." 
John4:46 Chifukwa chake Yesu anadzanso ku Kana wa m'Galileya, kumene anasandutsa madzi vinyo. Ndipo kunali mkulu wina wa mfumu, mwana wake anadwala m'Kapernao." 
John4:47 Iyeyu, pamene anamva kuti Yesu wachokera ku Yudeya nafika ku Galileya, ananka kwa Iye, nampempha kuti atsike kukachiritsa mwana wake; pakuti anali pafupi imfa." 
John4:48 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa iye, Ngati simuona zizindikiro ndi zozizwa, simudzakhulupirira." 
John4:49 Mkuluyo ananena kwa Iye, Ambuye, tsikani asanafe mwana wanga." 
John4:50 Yesu ananena naye, Muka, mwana wako ali ndi moyo. Munthuyo anakhulupirira mau amene Yesu anatero naye, namuka." 
John4:51 Ndipo m'mene analikutsika, akapolo ake anakomana naye, nanena, kuti, Mwana wanu ali ndi moyo." 
John4:52 Chifukwa chake anawafunsa ora lake anayamba kuchiralo. Pamenepo anati kwa iye, kuti, Dzulo, ora lachisanu ndi chiwiri malungo anamsiya." 
John4:53 Chifukwa chake atateyo anadziwa kuti ndi ora lomwelo limene Yesu anati kwa iye, Mwana wako ali ndi moyo; ndipo anakhulupirira iye yekha ndi a pa banja lake onse." 
John4:54 Ichi ndi chizindikiro chachiwiri Yesu anachita, atachokera ku Yudeya, ndi kulowa m'Galileya." 
John5:1 Zitapita izi panali chikondwerero cha Ayuda; ndipo Yesu anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu. 
John5:2 Koma pali thamanda m'Yerusalemu pa Chipata cha Nkhosa, lotchedwa m'Chihebri Betesida, lili ndi makonde asanu." 
John5:3 M'menemo munagona khamu lalikulu la anthu odwala, akhungu, opunduka miyendo, opuwala." 
John5:4  
John5:5 Koma panali munthu wina apo, ali m'kudwala kwake zaka makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi zitatu." 
John5:6 Yesu, pakuona ameneyo alikugona, ndipo anadziwa kuti anatero nthawi yaikulu pamenepo, ananena naye, Ufuna kuchiritsidwa kodi?" 
John5:7 Wodwalayo anayankha, Ambuye, ndilibe wondiviika ine m'thamanda, paliponse madzi avundulidwa; koma m'mene ndilinkudza ine, wina atsika ndisanatsike ine." 
John5:8 Yesu ananena naye, Tauka, yalula mphasa yako, nuyende." 
John5:9 Ndipo pomwepo munthuyu anachira, nayalula mphasa yake, nayenda. Koma tsiku lomwelo linali la Sabata." 
John5:10 Chifukwa chake Ayuda ananena kwa wochiritsidwayo, Ndi Sabata, ndipo sikuloledwa kwa iwe kuyalula mphasa yako." 
John5:11 Koma iyeyu anayankha iwo, Iye amene anandichiritsa, yemweyu anati kwa ine, Yalula mphasa yako, nuyende." 
John5:12 Anamfunsa, Munthuyo ndani wonena ndi iwe, Yalula mphasa yako, nuyende?" 
John5:13 Koma wochiritsidwayo sanadziwe kuti anali ndani; pakuti Yesu anachoka kachetechete, popeza panali anthu aunyinji m'malo muja." 
John5:14 Zitapita izi Yesu anampeza m'Kachisi, nati kwa iye, Taona, wachiritsidwa; usachimwenso, kuti chingakugwere choipa choposa." 
John5:15 Munthuyo anachoka, nauza Ayuda, kuti ndiye Yesu amene adamchiritsa." 
John5:16 Ndipo chifukwa cha ichi Ayuda analondalonda Yesu, popeza anachita izo tsiku la Sabata." 
John5:17 Koma Yesu anayankha iwo, Atate wanga amagwira ntchito kufikira tsopano, Inenso ndigwira ntchito." 
John5:18 Chifukwa cha ichi Ayuda anaonjeza kufuna kumupha, si chifukwa cha kuswa tsiku la Sabata kokha, komatu amatchanso Mulungu Atate wake wa Iye yekha; nadziyesera wolingana ndi Mulungu." 
John5:19 Pamenepo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Indetu, indetu ndinena kwa inu, sakhoza Mwana kuchita kanthu pa yekha, koma chimene aona Atate achichita, ndicho. Pakuti zimene Iye azichita, zomwezo Mwananso azichita momwemo." 
John5:20 Pakuti Atate akonda Mwana, namuonetsa zonse azichita yekha: ndipo adzamuonetsa ntchito zoposa izi, kuti mukazizwe." 
John5:21 Pakuti monga Atate aukitsa akufa, nawapatsa moyo, momwemonso Mwana apatsa moyo iwo amene Iye afuna." 
John5:22 Pakuti Atate saweruza munthu aliyense, koma anapereka kuweruza konse kwa Mwana;" 
John5:23 kuti onse akalemekeze Mwana, monga alemekeza Atate. Wosalemekeza Mwana salemekeza Atate amene anamtuma Iye." 
John5:24 Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, kuti iye wakumva mau anga, ndi kukhulupirira Iye amene anandituma Ine, ali nao moyo wosatha, ndipo salowa m'kuweruza, koma wachokera kuimfa, nalowa m'moyo." 
John5:25 Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, kuti ikudza nthawi, ndipo ilipo tsopano, imene akufa adzamva mau a Mulungu; ndipo iwo akumva adzakhala ndi moyo." 
John5:26 Pakuti monga Atate ali ndi moyo mwa Iye yekha, momwemonso anapatsa kwa Mwana kukhala ndi moyo mwa Iye yekha;" 
John5:27 ndipo anampatsa Iye mphamvu ya kuchita mlandu, pakuti ali Mwana wa Munthu." 
John5:28 Musazizwe ndi ichi, kuti ikudza nthawi, imene onse ali m'manda adzamva mau ake," 
John5:29 nadzatulukira, amene adachita zabwino, kukuuka kwa moyo; koma amene adachita zoipa kukuuka kwa kuweruza." 
John5:30 Sindikhoza kuchita kanthu kwa Ine ndekha; monga momwe ndimva ndiweruza; ndipo maweruzidwe anga ali olungama; chifukwa kuti sinditsata chifuniro changa, koma chifuniro cha Iye wondituma Ine." 
John5:31 Ngati ndichita umboni wa Ine ndekha, umboni wanga suli woona." 
John5:32 Wochita umboni wa Ine ndi wina; ndipo ndidziwa kuti umboni umene Iye andichitire Ine uli woona. 
John5:33 Inu munatuma kwa Yohane, ndipo iye anachitira umboni choonadi." 
John5:34 Ndipo Ine sindilandira umboni kwa munthu: koma ndinena izi, kuti inu mukapulumutsidwe." 
John5:35 Iyeyo anali nyali yoyaka ndi yowala; ndipo inu munafuna kukondwera m'kuunika kwake kanthawi. 
John5:36 Koma Ine ndili nao umboni woposa wa Yohane; pakuti ntchito zimene Atate anandipatsa ndizitsirize, ntchito zomwezo ndizichita zindichitira umboni, kuti Atate anandituma Ine." 
John5:37 Ndipo Atate wonditumayo, Iyeyu wandichitira Ine umboni. Simunamva mau ake konse, kapena maonekedwe ake simunaona." 
John5:38 Ndipo mulibe mau ake okhala mwa inu; chifukwa kuti amene Iyeyu anatuma, inu simumkhulupirira ameneyo." 
John5:39 Musanthula m'malembo, popeza muyesa kuti momwemo muli nao moyo wosatha; ndipo akundichitira Ine umboni ndi iwo omwewo;" 
John5:40 ndipo simufuna kudza kwa Ine, kuti mukhale nao moyo." 
John5:41 Ulemu sindiulandira kwa anthu. 
John5:42 Koma ndikudziwani inu, kuti mulibe chikondi cha Mulungu mwa inu nokha." 
John5:43 Ndadza Ine m'dzina la Atate wanga, ndipo simundilandira Ine; akadza wina m'dzina lake la iye mwini, iyeyu mudzamlandira." 
John5:44 Mungathe inu bwanji kukhulupirira, popeza mulandira ulemu wina kwa mnzake ndipo ulemu wakuchokera kwa Mulungu yekha simuufuna?" 
John5:45 Musayesa kuti Ine ndidzakunenezani inu kwa Atate; pali wakukunenezani, ndiye Mose, amene inu mumtama." 
John5:46 Pakuti mukadakhulupirira Mose, mukadakhulupirira Ine; pakuti iyeyu analembera za Ine." 
John5:47 Koma ngati simukhulupirira malembo a iyeyu, mudzakhulupirira bwanji mau anga?" 
John6:1 Zitapita izi anachoka Yesu kunka kutsidya lija la nyanja ya Galileya, ndiyo ya Tiberiasi." 
John6:2 Ndipo khamu lalikulu la anthu linamtsata Iye, chifukwa anaona zizindikiro zimene anachita pa odwala." 
John6:3 Koma Yesu anakwera kuphiri, nakhala pansi komweko pamodzi ndi ophunzira ake." 
John6:4 Ndipo Paska, chikondwerero cha Ayuda, anayandikira." 
John6:5 Pamenepo Yesu, pokweza maso ake, ndi kuona kuti khamu lalikulu lilinkudza kwa Iye, ananena kwa Filipo, Tidzagula kuti mikate kuti adye awa?" 
John6:6 Koma ananena ichi kuti amuyese; pakuti anadziwa yekha chimene adzachita. 
John6:7 Filipo anayankha Iye, Mikate ya marupiya atheka mazana awiri siikwanira iwo, kuti yense atenge pang'ono." 
John6:8 Mmodzi wa ophunzira ake, Andrea, mbale wake wa Simoni Petro, ananena ndi Iye," 
John6:9 Pali mnyamata pano, amene ali nayo mikate isanu yabarele, ndi tinsomba tiwiri; koma nanga izi zifikira bwanji ambiri otere?" 
John6:10 Nati Yesu, Akhalitseni anthu pansi. Ndipo panali udzu wambiri pamalopo. Pamenepo amunawo anakhala pansi, kuwerenga kwao monga zikwi zisanu." 
John6:11 Pomwepo Yesu anatenga mikateyo; ndipo pamene adayamika, anagawira iwo akukhala pansi; momwemonso ndi tinsomba, monga momwe iwo anafuna." 
John6:12 Ndipo pamene adakhuta, Iye ananena kwa ophunzira ake, Sonkhanitsani makombo kuti kasatayike kanthu." 
John6:13 Pomwepo anasonkhanitsa, nadzaza madengu khumi ndi awiri ndi makombo a mikate isanuyo yabarele, amene anatsalira anadyawo." 
John6:14 Chifukwa chake, anthu, poona chizindikiro chimene anachita, ananena, kuti, Ameneyo ndiye mneneri ndithu wakudzayo m'dziko lapansi." 
John6:15 Pamenepo Yesu, pozindikira kuti alikufuna kudza kudzamgwira Iye, kuti amlonge ufumu, anachokanso kunka kuphiri pa yekha." 
John6:16 Koma pofika madzulo, ophunzira ake anatsikira kunyanja;" 
John6:17 ndipo pamene adalowa m'ngalawa, analikuoloka nyanja kunka ku Kapernao. Ndipo kutada pamenepo, koma Yesu asanadze kwa iwo." 
John6:18 Ndipo nyanja inalikuuka chifukwa cha mphepo yaikulu yakuombako. 
John6:19 Ndipo pamene adapalasa monga mastadiya makumi awiri ndi asanu kapena makumi atatu, anaona Yesu alikuyenda panyanja, ndi kuyandikira ngalawa; ndipo anachita mantha." 
John6:20 Koma Iye ananena nao, Ndine; musaope." 
John6:21 Pamenepo analola kumlandira m'ngalawa; ndipo pomwepo ngalawayo inafika kumtunda kumene analikunkako. 
John6:22 M'mawa mwake khamu la anthu limene linaima tsidya lija la nyanja linaona kuti palibe ngalawa ina koma imodzi, ndi kuti Yesu sanalowe pamodzi ndi ophunzira ake m'ngalawamo, koma ophunzira ake adachoka pa okha;" 
John6:23 koma zinachokera ngalawa zina ku Tiberiasi, pafupi pa malo pomwe adadyapo mkate m'mene Ambuye Yesu adayamika;" 
John6:24 chifukwa chake pamene khamu la anthu linaona kuti palibe Yesu, ndi ophunzira ake palibe, iwo okha analowa m'ngalawazo nadza ku Kapernao, alikufuna Yesu." 
John6:25 Ndipo pamene anampeza Iye tsidya lina la nyanja, anati kwa Iye, Rabi, munadza kuno liti?" 
John6:26 Yesu anayankha iwo nati, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Mundifuna Ine, si chifukwa munaona zizindikiro, koma chifukwa munadya mkate, nimunakhuta." 
John6:27 Gwirani ntchito si chifukwa cha chakudya chimene chitsalira kumoyo wosatha, chimene Mwana wa Munthu adzakupatsani inu; pakuti ameneyo Atate, ndiye Mulungu, adamlembera chizindikiro." 
John6:28 Pamenepo anati kwa Iye, Tichite chiyani, kuti tichite ntchito za Mulungu?" 
John6:29 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Ntchito ya Mulungu ndi iyi, kuti mukhulupirire Iye amene Iyeyo anamtuma." 
John6:30 Chifukwa chake anati kwa Iye, Ndipo muchita chizindikiro chanji, kuti tione ndi kukhulupirira Inu? Muchita chiyani?" 
John6:31 Atate athu anadya mana m'chipululu; monga kwalembedwa, Mkate wochokera m'mwamba anawapatsa iwo kudya." 
John6:32 Chifukwa chake Yesu anati kwa iwo, Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, Si Mose amene anakupatsani inu mkate wa Kumwamba; koma Atate wanga akupatsani inu mkate woona wa Kumwamba." 
John6:33 Pakuti mkate wa Mulungu ndiye wakutsika kuchokera Kumwamba ndi kupatsa moyo kwa dziko lapansi. 
John6:34 Pamenepo anati kwa Iye, Ambuye, tipatseni ife mkate umene nthawi zonse." 
John6:35 Yesu anati kwa iwo, Ine ndine mkate wamoyo; iye amene adza kwa Ine sadzamva njala, ndi iye amene akhulupirira Ine sadzamva ludzu nthawi zonse." 
John6:36 Koma ndinati kwa inu, kuti mungakhale mwandiona, simukhulupirira." 
John6:37 Chinthu chonse chimene anandipatsa Ine Atate chidzadza kwa Ine; ndipo wakudza kwa Ine sindidzamtaya iye kunja. 
John6:38 Pakuti ndinatsika Kumwamba, si kuti ndichite chifuniro changa, koma chifuniro cha Iye amene anandituma Ine." 
John6:39 Koma chifuniro cha Iye amene anandituma Ine ndi ichi, kuti za ichi chonse Iye anandipatsa Ine ndisatayeko kanthu, koma ndichiukitse tsiku lomaliza." 
John6:40 Pakuti chifuniro cha Atate wanga ndi ichi, kuti yense wakuyang'ana Mwana, ndi kukhulupirira Iye, akhale nao moyo wosatha; ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa iye tsiku lomaliza." 
John6:41 Chifukwa chake Ayuda anang'ung'udza za Iye, chifukwa anati, Ine ndine mkate wotsika Kumwamba." 
John6:42 Ndipo iwo ananena, Si Yesu uyu, mwana wa Yosefe, atate wake ndi amai wake tiwadziwa? Anena bwanji tsopano, kuti, Ndinatsika Kumwamba?" 
John6:43 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Musang'ung'udze wina ndi mnzake." 
John6:44 Kulibe mmodzi akhoza kudza kwa Ine koma ngati Atate wondituma Ine amkoka iye; ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa iye tsiku lomaliza. 
John6:45 Chalembedwa mwa aneneri, Ndipo adzakhala onse ophunzitsidwa ndi Mulungu. Yense amene adamva kwa Atate, naphunzira, adza kwa Ine." 
John6:46 Sikuti munthu wina waona Atate, koma Iye amene ali wochokera kwa Mulungu, ameneyo waona Atate." 
John6:47 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Iye wokhulupirira ali nao moyo wosatha." 
John6:48 Ine ndine mkate wamoyo. 
John6:49 Makolo anu adadya m'chipululu, ndipo adamwalira." 
John6:50 Mkate wotsika Kumwamba ndi uwu, kuti munthu akadyeko ndi kusamwalira." 
John6:51 Mkate wamoyo wotsika Kumwamba Ndine amene. Ngati munthu wina akadyako mkate umene, adzakhala ndi moyo kosatha. Inde, ndipo mkate umene ndidzapatsa Ine, ndiwo thupi langa, ukhale moyo wa dziko lapansi." 
John6:52 Pamenepo Ayuda anatetana wina ndi mnzake ndi kunena, Akhoza bwanji ameneyu kutipatsa ife kudya thupi lake?" 
John6:53 Chifukwa chake Yesu anati kwa iwo, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Ngati simukudya thupi la Mwana wa Munthu ndi kumwa mwazi wake, mulibe moyo mwa inu nokha." 
John6:54 Iye wakudya thupi langa ndi kumwa mwazi wanga ali nao moyo wosatha; ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa iye tsiku lomaliza. 
John6:55 Pakuti thupi langa ndi chakudya ndithu, ndi mwazi wanga ndi chakumwa ndithu." 
John6:56 Iye wakudya thupi langa ndi kumwa mwazi wanga akhala mwa Ine ndi Ine mwa iye. 
John6:57 Monga Atate wamoyo anandituma Ine, ndipo Inenso ndili ndi moyo chifukwa cha Atate; momwemo wondidya Ine, iyeyu adzakhala ndi moyo chifukwa cha Ine." 
John6:58 Mkate wotsika Kumwamba ndi umenewu: si monga makolowo, anadya namwalira; iye wakudya mkate umene adzakhala ndi moyo nthawi zonse." 
John6:59 Izi ananena m'sunagoge, pakuphunzitsa m'Kapernao." 
John6:60 Pamenepo ambiri a ophunzira ake, pakumva izi, anati, Mau awa ndi osautsa; akhoza kumva awa ndani?" 
John6:61 Koma Yesu podziwa mwa yekha kuti ophunzira ake alikung'ung'udza chifukwa cha ichi, anati kwa iwo, Ichi mukhumudwa nacho?" 
John6:62 Nanga bwanji ngati mukaona Mwana wa Munthu alikukwera kumene anali kale lomwe? 
John6:63 Wopatsa moyo ndi mzimu; thupi silithandiza konse. Mau amene ndalankhula ndi inu ndiwo mzimu, ndi moyo." 
John6:64 Koma pali ena mwa inu amene sakhulupirira. Pakuti Yesu anadziwa poyamba amene ali osakhulupirira, ndi amene adzampereka." 
John6:65 Ndipo ananena, Chifukwa cha ichi ndinati kwa inu, kuti palibe munthu angathe kudza kwa Ine, koma ngati kupatsidwa kwa iye ndi Atate." 
John6:66 Pa ichi ambiri a ophunzira ake anabwerera m'mbuyo, ndipo sanayendeyendenso ndi Iye." 
John6:67 Chifukwa chake Yesu anati kwa khumi ndi awiriwo, Nanga inunso mufuna kuchoka?" 
John6:68 Simoni Petro anamyankha Iye, Ambuye, tidzamuka kwa yani? Inu muli nao mau a moyo wosatha." 
John6:69 Ndipo ife tikhulupirira, ndipo tidziwa kuti Inu ndinu Woyera wa Mulungu." 
John6:70 Yesu anayankha iwo, Kodi sindinakusankhani khumi ndi awiri, ndipo mwa inu mmodzi ali mdierekezi?" 
John6:71 Koma adanena za Yudasi, mwana wa Simoni Iskariote, pakuti iye ndiye amene akampereka Iye, ali mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiri." 
John7:1 Ndipo zitapita izi Yesu anayendayenda m'Galileya; pakuti sanafune kuyendayenda m'Yudeya, chifukwa Ayuda anafuna kumupha Iye." 
John7:2 Koma chikondwerero cha Ayuda cha Misasa, linayandikira." 
John7:3 Chifukwa chake abale ake anati kwa Iye, Chokani pano, mumuke ku Yudeya, kuti ophunzira anunso akapenye ntchito zanu zimene muchita." 
John7:4 Pakuti palibe munthu achita kanthu mobisika, nafuna yekha kukhala poyera. Ngati muchita izi, dzionetsereni eni nokha kwa dziko lapansi." 
John7:5 Pakuti angakhale abale ake sanakhulupirira Iye. 
John7:6 Chifukwa chake Yesu ananena nao, Nthawi yanga siinafike; koma nthawi yanu yakonzeka masiku onse." 
John7:7 Dziko lapansi silingathe kudana ndi inu; koma Ine lindida popeza Ine ndilichitira umboni, kuti ntchito zake zili zoipa." 
John7:8 Kwerani inu kunka kuphwando; sindikwera Ine kuphwando ili tsopano apa; pakuti nthawi yanga siinakwanire. 
John7:9 Ndipo m'mene adanena nao zimenezi anakhalabe m'Galileya. 
John7:10 Koma pamene abale ake adakwera kunka kuchikondwerero, pomwepo Iyenso anakwera, si poonekera, koma monga mobisalika." 
John7:11 Pomwepo Ayuda analikumfuna Iye pachikondwerero, nanena, Ali kuti uja?" 
John7:12 Ndipo kunali kung'ung'udza kwambiri za Iye m'makamu a anthu; ena ananena, kuti, Ali wabwino; koma ena ananena, Iai, koma asocheretsa khamu la anthuwo." 
John7:13 Chinkana anatero panalibe munthu analankhula za Iye poyera, chifukwa cha kuopa Ayuda." 
John7:14 Koma pamene padafika pakati pa chikondwerero, Yesu anakwera nalowa m'Kachisi, naphunzitsa." 
John7:15 Chifukwa chake Ayuda anazizwa, nanena, Ameneyu adziwa bwanji zolemba, wosaphunzira?" 
John7:16 Pamenepo Yesu anayankha iwo, nati, Chiphunzitso changa sichili changa, koma cha Iye amene anandituma Ine." 
John7:17 Ngati munthu aliyense afuna kuchita chifuniro chake, adzazindikira za chiphunzitsocho, ngati chichokera kwa Mulungu, kapena ndilankhula zochokera kwa Ine ndekha." 
John7:18 Iye wolankhula zochokera kwa iye yekha afuna ulemu wa mwini yekha. Iye wakufuna ulemu wa Iye amene anamtuma, yemweyu ali woona, ndipo mwa Iye mulibe chosalungama." 
John7:19 Si Mose kodi anakupatsani inu chilamulo, ndipo kulibe mmodzi mwa inu achita chilamulo? Mufuna kundipha chifukwa ninji?" 
John7:20 Khamu la anthu linayankha, Muli ndi chiwanda: afuna ndani kukuphani Inu?" 
John7:21 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Ndinachita ntchito imodzi, ndipo muzizwa monse." 
John7:22 Chifukwa cha ichi Mose anakupatsani inu mdulidwe (si kuti uchokera kwa Mose, koma kwa makolo); ndipo mudula munthu tsiku la Sabata." 
John7:23 Ngati munthu alandira mdulidwe tsiku la Sabata, kuti chilamulo cha Mose chingapasulidwe; kodi mundikwiyira Ine, chifukwa ndamchiritsadi munthu tsiku la Sabata?" 
John7:24 Musaweruze monga maonekedwe, koma weruzani chiweruziro cholungama." 
John7:25 Pamenepo ena a iwo a ku Yerusalemu ananena, Kodi suyu amene afuna kumupha?" 
John7:26 Ndipo taona amalankhula poyera, ndipo sanena kanthu kwa Iye. Kapena kodi akulu adziwa ndithu kuti ndiye Khristu ameneyo?" 
John7:27 Koma ameneyo tidziwa uko achokera: koma Khristu pamene akadzadza, palibe mmodzi adzadziwa uko achokera." 
John7:28 Pamenepo Yesu anafuula m'Kachisi, alikuphunzitsa ndi kunena, Mundidziwa Ine, ndiponso mudziwa uko ndichokera; ndipo sindinadza Ine ndekha, koma Iye wondituma Ine amene inu simumdziwa, ali woona." 
John7:29 Ine ndimdziwa Iye; chifukwa ndili wochokera kwa Iye, nandituma Ine Iyeyu." 
John7:30 Pamenepo anafuna kumgwira Iye; koma palibe wina anamgwira kumanja, chifukwa nthawi yake siinafike." 
John7:31 Koma ambiri a m'khamu la anthu anakhulupirira Iye; ndipo ananena, Pamene Khristu akadza kodi adzachita zizindikiro zambiri zoposa zimene adazichita ameneyo?" 
John7:32 Afarisi anamva khamu la anthu ling'ung'udza zimenezi za Iye; ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi anatuma anyamata kuti akamgwire Iye. 
John7:33 Pamenepo Yesu anati, Katsala kanthawi ndili ndi inu, ndipo ndimuka kwa Iye wondituma Ine." 
John7:34 Mudzafunafuna Ine, osandipeza; ndipo pomwe ndili Ine, inu simungathe kudzapo." 
John7:35 Chifukwa chake Ayuda anati mwa iwo okha, Adzanka kuti uyu kuti ife sitikampeza Iye? Kodi adzamuka kwa Agriki obalalikawo, ndi kuphunzitsa Agriki?" 
John7:36 Mau awa amene ananena ndi chiyani, Mudzandifunafuna osandipeza Ine: ndipo pomwe ndili Ine, inu simungathe kudzapo?" 
John7:37 Koma tsiku lomaliza, lalikululo la chikondwerero, Yesu anaimirira nafuula, ndi kunena, Ngati pali munthu akumva ludzu, adze kwa Ine, namwe." 
John7:38 Iye wokhulupirira Ine, monga chilembo chinati, Mitsinje ya madzi amoyo idzayenda, kutuluka m'kati mwake." 
John7:39 Koma ichi anati za Mzimu, amene iwo akukhulupirira Iye anati adzalandire; pakuti Mzimu panalibe pamenepo, chifukwa Yesu sanalemekezedwe panthawi pomwepo." 
John7:40 Pamenepo ena a khamulo pakumva mau awa, ananena, Mneneriyo ndi uyu ndithu." 
John7:41 Ena ananena, Uyu ndi Khristu. Koma ena ananena, Kodi Khristu adza kutuluka m'Galileya?" 
John7:42 Kodi sichinati chilembo kuti Khristu adza kutuluka mwa mbeu ya Davide, ndi kuchokera ku Betelehemu, kumudzi kumene kunali Davide?" 
John7:43 Kudakhala tsono kusiyana m'khamulo chifukwa cha Iye. 
John7:44 Koma ena mwa iwo anafuna kumgwira Iye; koma palibe munthu anamgwira kumanja. 
John7:45 Pamenepo anyamatawo anadza kwa ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi; ndipo iwowa anati kwa iwo, Simunamtenga Iye bwanji?"
