John7:46 Anyamatawo anayankha, Nthawi yonse palibe munthu analankhula chotero." 
John7:47 Pamenepo Afarisi anayankha iwo, Kodi mwasokeretsedwa inunso?" 
John7:48 Kodi wina wa akulu anakhulupirira Iye, kapena wa Afarisi?" 
John7:49 Koma khamu ili losadziwa chilamulo, likhala lotembereredwa." 
John7:50 Nikodemo ananena kwa iwo, amene uja adadza kwa Iye kale, ali mmodzi wa iwo," 
John7:51 Kodi chilamulo chathu chiweruza munthu, osayamba kumva iye, ndi kuzindikira chimene achita?" 
John7:52 Anayankha nati kwa iye, Kodi iwenso uli wotuluka m'Galileya? Santhula, nuone kuti m'Galileya sanauke mneneri." 
John7:53 Ndipo anamuka munthu yense kunyumba yake. 
John8:1 Koma Yesu anamuka kuphiri la Azitona. 
John8:2 Koma mamawa anadzanso ku Kachisi, ndipo anthu onse anadza kwa Iye; ndipo m'mene anakhala pansi anawaphunzitsa." 
John8:3 Koma alembi ndi Afarisi anabwera naye kwa Iye mkazi wogwidwa m'chigololo, ndipo pamene anamuimika iye pakati," 
John8:4 ananena kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, mkazi uyu wagwidwa alimkuchita chigololo." 
John8:5 Koma m'chilamulo Mose anatilamula, tiwaponye miyala otere. Chifukwa chake Inu munena chiyani za iye?" 
John8:6 Koma ichi ananena kuti amuyese Iye, kuti akhale nacho chomneneza Iye. Koma Yesu, m'mene adawerama pansi analemba pansi ndi chala chake." 
John8:7 Koma pamene anakhalakhala alikumfunsabe Iye, anaweramuka, nati kwa iwo, Amene mwa inu ali wopanda tchimo, ayambe kumponya mwala." 
John8:8 Ndipo m'mene adaweramanso analemba ndi chala chake pansi. 
John8:9 Koma iwo, m'mene anatulukamo amodziamodzi, kuyambira akulu, kufikira otsiriza; ndipo Yesu anatsala yekha, ndi mkazi, alikuima pakati." 
John8:10 Koma Yesu pamene adaweramuka, anati kwa iye, Mkazi iwe, ali kuti ajawa? Palibe munthu anakutsutsa kodi?" 
John8:11 Koma iye anati, Palibe, Ambuye. Ndipo Yesu anati, Inenso sindikutsutsa iwe; pita; kuyambira tsopano usachimwenso." 
John8:12 Pamenepo Yesu analankhulanso nao, nanena, Ine ndine kuunika kwa dziko lapansi; iye wonditsata Ine sadzayenda mumdima, koma adzakhala nako kuunika kwa moyo." 
John8:13 Chifukwa chake Afarisi anati kwa Iye, Muchita umboni wa Inu nokha; umboni wanu suli woona." 
John8:14 Anayankha Yesu nati kwa iwo, Ndingakhale ndichita umboni wa Ine ndekha umboni wanga uli woona; chifukwa ndidziwa kumene ndinachokera ndi kumene ndimukako; koma inu simudziwa kumene ndichokera, ndi kumene ndimukako." 
John8:15 Inu muweruza monga mwa thupi; Ine sindiweruza munthu. 
John8:16 Ndipo ngati ndiweruza Ine, chiweruziro changa chili choona; pakuti sindili pa ndekha, koma Ine ndi Atate amene anandituma Ine." 
John8:17 Inde kudalembedwa m'chilamulo chanu kuti umboni wa anthu awiri uli woona. 
John8:18 Ine ndine wakuchita umboni wa Ine ndekha, ndipo Atate amene anandituma Ine achita umboni wa Ine." 
John8:19 Chifukwa chake ananena ndi Iye, Ali kuti Atate wanu? Yesu anayankha, Simudziwa kapena Ine, kapena Atate wanga; mukadadziwa Ine, mukadadziwanso Atate wanga." 
John8:20 Mau awa analankhula m'nyumba yosungiramo chuma cha Mulungu pophunzitsa m'Kachisi; ndipo palibe munthu anamgwira Iye, pakuti nthawi yake siinafike." 
John8:21 Pamenepo anatinso kwa iwo; Ndimuka Ine, ndipo mudzandifuna, ndipo m'tchimo lanu mudzafa: kumene ndimukako Ine, simudziwa kudza inu." 
John8:22 Chifukwa chake Ayuda anenana, Kodi adzadzipha yekha, pakuti ananena, Kumene ndimukako Ine, simudziwa inu kudza?" 
John8:23 Ndipo ananena nao, Inu ndinu ochokera pansi; Ine ndine wochokera Kumwamba; inu ndinu a dziko lino lapansi; sindili Ine wa dziko lino lapansi." 
John8:24 Chifukwa chake ndinati kwa inu, kuti mudzafa m'machimo kwa inu, kuti mudzafa m'machimo anu, pakuti ngati simukhulupirira kuti Ine ndine, mudzafa m'machimo anu." 
John8:25 Pamenepo ananena kwa Iye, Ndinu yani? Yesu anati kwa iwo, Chimene chomwe ndidalankhulanso ndi inu kuyambira pachiyambi." 
John8:26 Ndili nazo zambiri zakulankhula ndi zakuweruza za inu; koma wondituma Ine ali woona; ndipo zimene ndazimva kwa Iye, zomwezo ndilankhula kwa dziko lapansi." 
John8:27 Sanazindikira iwo kuti analikunena nao za Atate. 
John8:28 Chifukwa chake Yesu anati, Pamene mutadzamkweza Mwana wa Munthu, pomwepo mudzazindikira kuti Ine ndine, ndipo sindichita kanthu kwa Ine ndekha, koma monga anandiphunzitsa Atate, ndilankhula izi." 
John8:29 Ndipo wondituma Ine ali ndi Ine; sanandisiye Iye pa ndekha; chifukwa ndichita Ine zimene zimkondweretsa Iye nthawi zonse. 
John8:30 Pakulankhula Iye zimenezi ambiri anakhulupirira Iye. 
John8:31 Chifukwa chake Yesu ananena kwa Ayuda aja adakhulupirira Iye, Ngati mukhala inu m'mau anga, muli ophunzira anga ndithu;" 
John8:32 ndipo mudzazindikira choonadi, ndipo choonadi chidzakumasulani." 
John8:33 Anamyankha iye, Tili mbeu ya Abrahamu, ndipo sitinakhala akapolo a munthu nthawi iliyonse; munena bwanji, Mudzayesedwa afulu?" 
John8:34 Yesu anayankha iwo, nati, Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu kuti yense wakuchita tchimo ali kapolo wa chimolo." 
John8:35 Koma kapolo sakhala m'nyumba nthawi yonse; mwana ndiye akhala nthawi yonse. 
John8:36 Chifukwa chake ngati Mwana adzakuyesani inu aufulu, mudzakhala mfulu ndithu." 
John8:37 Ndidziwa kuti muli mbeu ya Abrahamu; koma mufuna kundipha Ine, chifukwa mau anga alibe malo mwa inu." 
John8:38 Zimene ndinaona Ine kwa Atate, ndilankhula; ndipo inunso muchita chimene mudamva kwa atate wanu." 
John8:39 Anayankha nati kwa iye, Atate wathu ndiye Abrahamu. Yesu ananena nao, Ngati muli ana a Abrahamu, mukadachita ntchito za Abrahamu." 
John8:40 Koma tsopano mufuna kundipha Ine, ndine munthu amene ndinalankhula ndi inu choonadi, chimene ndinamva kwa Mulungu; ichi Abrahamu sanachite." 
John8:41 Inu muchita ntchito za atate wanu. Anati kwa Iye, Sitinabadwa ife m'chigololo; tili naye Atate mmodzi ndiye Mulungu." 
John8:42 Yesu anati kwa iwo, Mulungu akadakhala Atate wanu, mukadakonda Ine; pakuti Ine ndinatuluka, ndi kuchokera kwa Mulungu; pakuti sindinadza kwa Ine ndekha, koma Iyeyu anandituma Ine." 
John8:43 Simuzindikira malankhulidwe anga chifukwa ninji? Chifukwa simungathe kumva mau anga. 
John8:44 Inu muli ochokera mwa atate wanu mdierekezi, ndipo zolakalaka zake za atate wanu mufuna kuchita. Iyeyu anali wambanda kuyambira pachiyambi, ndipo sanaime m'choonadi, pakuti mwa iye mulibe choonadi. Pamene alankhula bodza, alankhula za mwini wake; pakuti ali wabodza, ndi atate wake wa bodza." 
John8:45 Koma Ine, chifukwa ndinena choonadi, simukhulupirira Ine." 
John8:46 Ndani mwa inu anditsutsa Ine za tchimo? Ngati ndinena choonadi, simundikhulupirira Ine chifukwa ninji?" 
John8:47 Iye wochokera kwa Mulungu amva zonena za Mulungu; inu simumva chifukwa chakuti simuli a kwa Mulungu. 
John8:48 Ayuda anayankha nati kwa Iye, Kodi sitinenetsa kuti Inu ndinu Msamariya, ndipo muli ndi chiwanda?" 
John8:49 Yesu anayankha, Ndilibe chiwanda Ine; koma ndilemekeza Atate wanga, ndipo inu mundipeputsa." 
John8:50 Koma Ine sinditsata ulemerero wanga; alipo woutsata ndi wakuweruza. 
John8:51 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Munthu akasunga mau anga, sadzaona imfa nthawi yonse." 
John8:52 Ayuda anati kwa Iye, Tsopano tazindikira kuti muli ndi chiwanda. Abrahamu anamwalira, ndi aneneri; ndipo Inu munena, Munthu akasunga mau anga, sadzalawa imfa kunthawi yonse." 
John8:53 Kodi Inu ndinu wamkulu ndi atate wathu Abrahamu, amene anamwalira? Ndipo aneneri anamwalira: mudziyesera nokha muli yani?" 
John8:54 Yesu anayankha, Ngati Ine ndidzilemekeza ndekha, ulemerero wanga uli chabe; Atate wanga ndiye wondilemekeza Ine; amene munena za Iye, kuti ndiye Mulungu wanu;" 
John8:55 ndipo inu simunamdziwa Iye; koma Ine ndimdziwa Iye; ndipo ngati ndinena kuti sindimdziwa Iye, ndidzakhala wonama chimodzimodzi inu; koma ndimdziwa Iye, ndipo ndisunga mau ake." 
John8:56 Atate wanu Abrahamu anakondwera kuona tsiku langa; ndipo anaona nasangalala. 
John8:57 Ayuda pamenepo anati kwa Iye, Simunafikire zaka makumi asanu, ndipo munaona Abrahamu kodi?" 
John8:58 Yesu anati kwa iwo, Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, asanayambe kukhala Abrahamu ndipo Ine ndilipo." 
John8:59 Pamenepo anatola miyala kuti amponye Iye; koma Yesu anabisala, natuluka m'Kachisi." 
John9:1 Ndipo popita, anaona munthu ali wosaona chibadwire." 
John9:2 Ndipo ophunzira ake anamfunsa Iye, nanena, Rabi, anachimwa ndani, ameneyo, kapena atate wake ndi amake, kuti anabadwa wosaona?" 
John9:3 Yesu anayankha, Sanachimwe ameneyo, kapena atate wake ndi amake; koma kuti ntchito za Mulungu zikaonetsedwe mwa iye." 
John9:4 Tiyenera kugwira ntchito za Iye wondituma Ine, pokhala pali msana; ukudza usiku pamene palibe munthu angakhoze kugwira ntchito." 
John9:5 Pakukhala Ine m'dziko lapansi, ndili kuunika kwa dziko lapansi." 
John9:6 Pamene ananena izi, analavula pansi, nakanda thope ndi malovuwo, napaka thopelo m'maso," 
John9:7 nati kwa iye, Muka, kasambe m'thamanda la Siloamu (ndilo losandulika, Wotumidwa). Pamenepo anachoka, nasamba, nabwera alikuona." 
John9:8 Chifukwa chake anzake ndi iwo adamuona kale, kuti anali wopemphapempha, ananena, Kodi si uyu uja wokhala ndi kupemphapempha?" 
John9:9 Ena ananena, kuti, Ndiyeyu; ena ananena, Iai, koma afanana naye. Iyeyu anati, Ndine amene." 
John9:10 Pamenepo anenana ndi iye, Nanga maso ako anatseguka bwanji?" 
John9:11 Iyeyu anayankha, Munthuyo wotchedwa Yesu anakanda thope, napaka m'maso mwanga, nati, kwa ine, Muka ku Siloamu kasambe; chifukwa chake ndinachoka, ndipo m'mene ndinasamba ndinapenya." 
John9:12 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ali kuti Iyeyo? Anena, Sindidziwa ine." 
John9:13 Anapita naye amene anali wosaona kale kwa Afarisi. 
John9:14 Koma tsikulo ndi la Sabata limene Yesu anakanda thope, namtsegulira iye maso ake." 
John9:15 Pamenepo ndipo Afarisi anamfunsanso, umo anapenyera. Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Anapaka thope m'maso mwanga, ndinasamba, ndipo ndipenya." 
John9:16 Ena pamenepo mwa Afarisi ananena, Munthu uyu sachokera kwa Mulungu, chifukwa sasunga Sabata. Koma ena ananena, Munthu ali wochimwa akhoza bwanji kuchita zizindikiro zotere? Ndipo panali kutsutsana mwa iwo." 
John9:17 Pamenepo ananenanso kwa wosaonayo, Iwe unenanji za Iye, popeza anakutsegulira maso ako? Koma iye anati, Ali Mneneri." 
John9:18 Chifukwa chake Ayuda sanakhulupirire za iye, kuti anali wosaona, napenya, kufikira kumene adaitana atate wake ndi amake a iye wopenya;" 
John9:19 nawafunsa iwo, nanena, Kodi uyu ndi mwana wanu, amene inu munena kuti anabadwa wosaona?" 
John9:20 Ndipo apenya bwanji tsopano? Atate wake ndi amake anayankha nati, Tidziwa kuti uyu ndi mwana wathu, ndi kuti anabadwa wosaona;" 
John9:21 koma sitidziwa uno apenyera tsopano; kapena sitimdziwa mene anamtsegulira pamaso pake; mumfunse iye; ali wamsinkhu; adzalankhula mwini za iye yekha. 
John9:22 Izi ananena atate wake ndi amake, chifukwa anaopa Ayuda; pakuti Ayuda adapangana kale, kuti ngati munthu aliyense adzamvomereza Iye kuti ndiye Khristu, akhale woletsedwa m'sunagoge." 
John9:23 Chifukwa cha ichi atate wake ndi amake anati, Ali wamsinkhu; mumfunse iye." 
John9:24 Pamenepo anamuitana kachiwiri munthuyo amene anali wosaona, nati kwa iye, Lemekeza Mulungu; tidziwa kuti munthuyo ali wochimwa." 
John9:25 Pamenepo iyeyu anayankha, Ngati ali wochimwa, sindidziwa; chinthu chimodzi ndichidziwa, pokhala ndinali wosaona, tsopano ndipenya." 
John9:26 Chifukwa chake anati kwa iye, Anakuchitira iwe chiyani? Anakutsegulira iwe maso bwanji?" 
John9:27 Iye anayankha iwo, Ndinakuuzani kale, ndipo simunamva; mufuna kumvanso bwanji? Kodi inunso mufuna kukhala ophunzira ake?" 
John9:28 Ndipo anamlalatira iye, nati, Ndiwe wophunzira wa Iyeyu, ife ndife ophunzira a Iyeyu, ife ndife ophunzira a Mose." 
John9:29 Tidziwa ife kuti Mulungu analankhula ndi Mose; koma sitidziwa kumene achokera ameneyo. 
John9:30 Munthuyu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Pakuti chozizwa chili m'menemo, kuti inu simudziwa kumene achokera, ndipo ananditsegulira maso anga." 
John9:31 Tidziwa kuti Mulungu samvera ochimwa. Koma ngati munthu aliyense akhala wopembedza Mulungu nachita chifuniro chake, amvera ameneyo." 
John9:32 Kuyambira pachiyambi sikunamveka kuti wina anatsegulira maso munthu wosaona chibadwire. 
John9:33 Ngati uyu sanachokera kwa Mulungu, sakadakhoza kuchita kanthu." 
John9:34 Anayankha nati kwa iye, Wabadwa iwe konse m'zoipa, ndipo iwe utiphunzitse ife kodi? Ndipo anamtaya kunja." 
John9:35 Yesu anamva kuti adamtaya kunja; ndipo pakumpeza iye, anati, Kodi ukhulupirira Mwana wa Munthu?" 
John9:36 Iyeyu anayankha nati, Ndipo ndani Iye, Ambuye, kuti ndimkhulupirire Iye?" 
John9:37 Yesu anati kwa iye, Wamuona Iye, ndiponso wakulankhula ndi iwe ndi Iyeyo." 
John9:38 Koma iye anati, Ndikhulupirira, Ambuye; ndipo anamgwadira Iye." 
John9:39 Ndipo Yesu anati, Kudzaweruza ndadza Ine kudziko lino lapansi, kuti iwo osapenya apenye; ndi kuti iwo akupenya akhale osaona." 
John9:40 Ndipo Afarisi ena akukhala ndi Iye anamva izi, nati kwa Iye, Kodi ifenso ndife osaona?" 
John9:41 Yesu anati kwa iwo, Mukadakhala osaona simukadakhala nalo tchimo; koma tsopano munena, kuti, Tipenya: tchimo lanu likhala." 
John10:1 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Iye wosalowa m'khola la nkhosa pakhomo, koma akwerera kwina, iyeyu ndiye wakuba ndi wolanda." 
John10:2 Koma iye wakulowera pakhomo, ndiye mbusa wa nkhosa." 
John10:3 Iyeyu, wapakhomo amtsegulira ndi nkhosa zimva mau ake; ndipo aitana nkhosa za iye yekha maina ao, nazitsogolera kunja." 
John10:4 Pamene adatulutsa zonse nkhosa zimtsata iye; chifukwa zidziwa mau ake. 
John10:5 Koma mlendo sizidzamtsata, koma zidzamthawa; chifukwa sizidziwa mau a alendo." 
John10:6 Fanizo ili Yesu ananena kwa iwo; koma sanazindikira zimene Yesu analikulankhula nao. 
John10:7 Chifukwa chake Yesu ananenanso nao, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Ine ndine khomo la nkhosa." 
John10:8 Onse amene anadza m'tsogolo mwa Ine ali akuba, ndi olanda: koma nkhosa sizinamva iwo." 
John10:9 Ine ndine khomo; ngati wina alowa ndi Ine, adzapulumutsidwa, nadzalowa, nadzatuluka, nadzapeza busa." 
John10:10 Siikudza mbala, koma kuti ikabe, ndi kupha, ndi kuononga. Ndadza Ine kuti akhale ndi moyo, ndi kukhala nao wochuluka." 
John10:11 Ine ndine Mbusa Wabwino; mbusa wabwino ataya moyo wake chifukwa cha nkhosa. 
John10:12 Wolipidwa amene sakhala mbusa, amene nkhosa sizili zake za yekha, aona mmbulu ulinkudza, nasiya nkhosazo, nathawa; ndipo mmbulu uzikwatula, nuzibalalitsa;" 
John10:13 chifukwa ali wolipidwa, ndipo sasamala nkhosa." 
John10:14 Ine ndiye Mbusa Wabwino; ndipo ndizindikira zanga, ndi zanga zindizindikira Ine," 
John10:15 monga Atate andidziwa Ine, ndi Ine ndimdziwa Atate; ndipo nditaya moyo wanga chifukwa cha nkhosa." 
John10:16 Ndipo nkhosa zina ndili nazo, zimene sizili za khola ili; izinso ndiyenera kuzitenga, ndipo zidzamva mau anga; ndipo zidzakhala gulu limodzi, mbusa mmodzi." 
John10:17 Chifukwa cha ichi Atate andikonda Ine, chifukwa nditaya Ine moyo wanga, kuti ndikautengenso." 
John10:18 Palibe wina andichotsera uwu, koma ndiutaya Ine ndekha. Ndili nayo mphamvu yakuutaya, ndi mphamvu ndili nayo yakuutenganso; lamulo ili ndinalandira kwa Atate wanga." 
John10:19 Panakhalanso kutsutsana pakati pa Ayuda chifukwa cha mau awa. 
John10:20 Koma ambiri mwa iwo ananena, Ali ndi chiwanda, nachita misala; mukumva Iye bwanji?" 
John10:21 Ena ananena, Mau awa sali a munthu wogwidwa chiwanda. Kodi chiwanda chikhoza kumtsegulira maso wosaona?" 
John10:22 Koma kunali phwando la kukonzetsanso m'Yerusalemu; nyengoyo ndi yachisanu. 
John10:23 Ndipo Yesu analikuyendayenda m'Kachisi m'khonde la Solomoni. 
John10:24 Pamenepo Ayuda anamzungulira Iye, nanena ndi Iye, Kufikira liti musinkhitsasinkhitsa moyo wathu? Ngati Inu ndinu Khristu, tiuzeni momveka." 
John10:25 Yesu anayankha iwo, Ndakuuzani, ndipo simukhulupirira. Ntchitozi ndidzichita Ine m'dzina la Atate wanga, zimenezi zindichitira umboni." 
John10:26 Koma inu simukhulupirira, chifukwa simuli a mwa nkhosa zanga." 
John10:27 Nkhosa zanga zimva mau anga, ndipo Ine ndizizindikira, ndipo zinditsata Ine." 
John10:28 Ndipo Ine ndizipatsa moyo wosatha; ndipo sizidzaonongeka kunthawi yonse, ndipo palibe munthu adzazikwatula m'dzanja langa." 
John10:29 Atate wanga, amene anandipatsa izo, ali wamkulu ndi onse; ndipo palibe wina ngathe kuzikwatula m'dzanja la Atate." 
John10:30 Ine ndi Atate ndife amodzi. 
John10:31 Ayuda anatolanso miyala kuti amponye Iye. 
John10:32 Yesu anayankha iwo, Ndakuonetsani inu ntchito zabwino zambiri za kwa Atate; chifukwa cha ntchito yiti ya izo mundiponya miyala?" 
John10:33 Ayuda anamyankha Iye, Chifukwa cha ntchito yabwino sitikuponyani miyala, koma chifukwa cha mwano; ndi kuti Inu, muli munthu, mudziyesera nokha Mulungu." 
John10:34 Yesu anayankha iwo, Kodi sikulembedwa m'chilamulo chanu, Ndinati Ine, Muli milungu?" 
John10:35 Ngati anawatcha milungu iwo amene mau a Mulungu anawadzera (ndipo cholemba sichingathe kuthyoka)," 
John10:36 kodi inu munena za Iye, amene Atate anampatula namtuma kudziko lapansi, Uchita mwano; chifukwa ndinati, Ndili Mwana wa Mulungu?" 
John10:37 Ngati sindichita ntchito za Atate wanga, musakhulupirira Ine." 
John10:38 Koma ngati ndichita, mungakhale simukhulupirira Ine, khulupirirani ntchitozo; kuti mukadziwe ndi kuzindikira kuti Atate ali mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa Atate." 
John10:39 Anafunanso kumgwira Iye; ndipo anapulumuka m'dzanja lao. 
John10:40 Ndipo anachoka kunkanso tsidya lija la Yordani, kumalo kumene kunali Yohane analikubatiza poyamba paja; ndipo anakhala komweko." 
John10:41 Ndipo ambiri anadza kwa Iye; nanena kuti, Sanachita chizindikiro Yohane; koma zinthu zilizonse Yohane ananena za Iye zinali zoona." 
John10:42 Ndipo ambiri anakhulupirira Iye komweko. 
John11:1 Koma panali munthu wodwala, Lazaro wa ku Betaniya, wa m'mudzi wa Maria ndi mbale wake Marita." 
John11:2 Koma ndiye Maria uja anadzoza Ambuye ndi mafuta onunkhira bwino, napukuta mapazi ake ndi tsitsi lake, amene mlongo wake Lazaro anadwala." 
John11:3 Pamenepo alongo ake anatumiza kwa Iye, nanena, Ambuye, onani, amene mumkonda adwala." 
John11:4 Koma Yesu pamene anamva, anati, Kudwala kumene sikuli kwa imfa, koma chifukwa cha ulemerero wa Mulungu, kuti Mwana wa Mulungu alemekezedwe nako." 
John11:5 Koma Yesu anakonda Marita, ndi mbale wake, ndi Lazaro." 
John11:6 Chifukwa chake pamene anamva kuti anadwala, anakhala pamenepo pa malo pomwepo masiku awiri." 
John11:7 Ndipo pambuyo pake ananena kwa ophunzira ake, Tiyeni tipitenso ku Yudeya." 
John11:8 Ophunzira ananena ndi Iye, Rabi, Ayuda analikufuna kukuponyani miyala tsopano apa; ndipo munkanso komweko kodi?" 
John11:9 Yesu anayankha, Kodi sikuli maora khumi ndi awiri usana? Ngati munthu ayenda usana sakhumudwa, chifukwa apenya kuunika kwa dziko lino lapansi." 
John11:10 Koma ngati munthu ayenda usiku, akhumudwa, chifukwa mulibe kuunika mwa iye." 
John11:11 Izi anati, ndipo zitatha izi ananena nao, Lazaro bwenzi lathu ali m'tulo; koma ndimuka kukamuukitsa iye tulo take." 
John11:12 Chifukwa chake ophunzira ake anati kwa Iye, Ambuye, ngati ali m'tulo adzachira." 
John11:13 Koma Yesu adanena za imfa yake; koma iwowa anayesa kuti ananena za mpumulo wa tulo. 
John11:14 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa iwo momveka, Lazaro wamwalira." 
John11:15 Ndipo ndikondwera chifukwa cha inu kuti kunalibe Ine komweko, chakuti mukakhulupirire; koma tiyeni, tipite kwa iye." 
John11:16 Pamenepo Tomasi, wotchedwa Didimo, anati kwa ophunzira anzake, Tipite ifenso kuti tikafere naye pamodzi." 
John11:17 Ndipo pamene Yesu anadza, anapeza kuti pamenepo atakhala m'manda masiku anai." 
John11:18 Koma Betaniya anali pafupi pa Yerusalemu, nthawi yake yonga ya mastadiya khumi ndi asanu;" 
John11:19 koma ambiri a mwa Ayuda adadza kwa Marita ndi Maria, kudzawatonthoza mtima pa mlongo wao." 
John11:20 Pamenepo Marita, pakumva kuti Yesu alinkudza, anamuka kukakomana ndi Iye; koma Maria anakhalabe m'nyumba." 
John11:21 Ndipo Marita anati kwa Yesu, Ambuye, mukadakhala kuno mlongo wanga sakadafa." 
John11:22 Koma ngakhale tsopano ndidziwa kuti zinthu zilizonse mukapempha Mulungu, adzakupatsani Mulungu." 
John11:23 Yesu ananena naye, Mlongo wako adzauka." 
John11:24 Marita ananena ndi Iye, Ndidziwa kuti adzauka m'kuuka tsiku lomaliza." 
John11:25 Yesu anati kwa iye, Ine ndine kuuka ndi moyo: wokhulupirira Ine, angakhale amwalira, adzakhala ndi moyo;" 
John11:26 ndipo yense wakukhala ndi moyo, nakhulupirira Ine, sadzamwalira nthawi yonse. Kodi ukhulupirira ichi?" 
John11:27 Ananena ndi Iye, Inde Ambuye; ndakhulupirira ine kuti Inu ndinu Khristu, Mwana wa Mulungu, wakudza m'dziko lapansi." 
John11:28 Ndipo m'mene anati ichi anachoka naitana Maria mbale wake m'tseri, ndi kuti, Wafika Mphunzitsi, akuitana iwe." 
John11:29 Koma iyeyo, pakumva, ananyamuka msanga, nadza kwa Iye." 
John11:30 (Koma Yesu sanafike kumudzi, koma anali pamalo pomwe Marita adakomana ndi Iye.)" 
John11:31 Pamenepo Ayuda okhala naye m'nyumba, ndi kumtonthoza iye, pakuona Maria ananyamuka msanga, natuluka, namtsata iye, ndi kuyesa kuti amuka kumanda kukalira komweko." 
John11:32 Pomwepo Maria, pofika pamene panali Yesu, m'mene anamuona Iye, anagwa pa mapazi ake, nanena ndi Iye, Ambuye, mukadakhala kuno Inu, mlongo wanga sakadamwalira." 
John11:33 Pamenepo Yesu, pakumuona iye alikulira, ndi Ayuda akumperekeza iye alikulira, anadzuma mumzimu, navutika mwini," 
John11:34 nati, Mwamuika iye kuti? Ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, tiyeni mukaone." 
John11:35 Yesu analira. 
John11:36 Chifukwa chake Ayuda ananena, Taonani, anamkondadi!" 
John11:37 Koma ena mwa iwo anati, Kodi uyu wotsegulira maso wosaona uja, sanakhoza kodi kuchita kuti sakadafa ameneyunso?" 
John11:38 Pamenepo Yesu, ndi kudzumanso mwa Iye yekha anadza kumanda. Koma panali phanga, ndipo mwala unaikidwa pamenepo." 
John11:39 Yesu ananena, Chotsani mwala. Marita, mlongo wake wa womwalirayo, ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, adayamba kununkha: pakuti wagona masiku anai." 
John11:40 Yesu ananena naye, Kodi sindinati kwa iwe, kuti, ngati ukhulupirira, udzaona ulemerero wa Mulungu?" 
John11:41 Pomwepo anachotsa mwala. Koma Yesu anakweza maso ake kupenya kumwamba nati, Atate, ndiyamika Inu kuti munamva Ine." 
John11:42 Koma ndadziwa Ine kuti mumandimva Ine nthawi zonse; koma chifukwa cha khamu la anthu alikuimirira pozungulira ndinanena ichi, kuti akhulupirire kuti Inu munandituma Ine." 
John11:43 Ndipo m'mene adanena izi, anafuula ndi mau akulu, Lazaro, tuluka." 
John11:44 Ndipo womwalirayo anatuluka womangidwa miyendo ndi manja ndi nsalu za kumanda; ndi nkhope yake inazingidwa ndi mlezo. Yesu ananena nao, Mmasuleni iye, ndipo mlekeni amuke." 
John11:45 Chifukwa chake ambiri a mwa Ayuda amene anadza kwa Maria, m'mene anaona chimene anachita, anakhulupirira Iye." 
John11:46 Koma ena a mwa iwo anamuka kwa Afarisi, nawauza zimene Yesu adazichita." 
John11:47 Pamenepo ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi anasonkhanitsa akulu, nanena, Titani ife? Chifukwa munthu uyu achita zizindikiro zambiri." 
John11:48 Ngati timleka Iye kotero, onse adzakhulupirira Iye; ndipo adzadza Aroma nadzachotsa malo athu ndi mtundu wathu." 
John11:49 Koma wina mmodzi wa mwa iwo, Kayafa, wokhala mkulu wa ansembe chaka chomwecho anati kwa iwo, Simudziwa kanthu konse inu," 
John11:50 kapena simuganiza kuti nkokoma kwa inu kuti munthu mmodzi afere anthu, ndi kuti mtundu wonse usaonongeke." 
John11:51 Koma ichi sananena kwa iye yekha; koma pokhala mkulu wa ansembe chaka chomwecho ananenera kuti Yesu akadzafera mtunduwo; 
John11:52 ndipo si chifukwa cha mtunduwo wokha ai, koma kuti akasonkhanitse pamodzi ana a Mulungu akubalalikawo." 
John11:53 Chifukwa chake, kuyambira tsiku lomwelo anapangana kuti amuphe Iye." 
John11:54 Chifukwa chake Yesu sanayandeyendanso poonekera mwa Ayuda, koma anachokapo kunka kudziko loyandikira chipululu, kumudzi dzina lake Efuremu; nakhala komweko pamodzi ndi ophunzira ake." 
John11:55 Koma Paska wa Ayuda anali pafupi; ndipo ambiri anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu kuchoka ku milaga, usanafike Paska, kukadziyeretsa iwo okha." 
John11:56 Pamenepo analikumfuna Yesu, nanena wina ndi mnzake poimirira iwo m'Kachisi, Muyesa bwanji inu, sadzadza kuchikondwerero kodi?" 
John11:57 Koma ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi adalamula kuti, munthu wina akadziwa pokhala Iye, aulule, kuti akamgwire Iye." 
John12:1 Pomwepo anatsala masiku asanu ndi limodzi asanafike Paska, Yesu anadza ku Betaniya kumene kunali Lazaro, amene Yesu adamuukitsa kwa akufa." 
John12:2 Ndipo anamkonzera Iye chakudya komweko; ndipo Marita anatumikira; koma Lazaro anali mmodzi wa iwo akuseama pachakudya pamodzi ndi Iye. 
John12:3 Pamenepo Maria m'mene adatenga muyeso umodzi wa mafuta onunkhira bwino a narido weniweni a mtengo wake wapatali, anadzoza mapazi a Yesu, napukuta mapazi ake ndi tsitsi lake; ndipo nyumba inadzazidwa ndi mnunkho wake wa mafutawo." 
John12:4 Koma Yudasi Iskariote, mmodzi wa ophunzira ake, amene adzampereka Iye, ananena," 
John12:5 Nanga mafuta onunkhira awa sanagulitsidwa chifukwa ninji ndi marupiya atheka mazana atatu, ndi kupatsidwa kwa osauka?" 
John12:6 Koma ananena ichi si chifukwa analikusamalira osauka, koma chifukwa anali mbala, ndipo pokhala nalo thumba, amaba zoikidwamo." 
John12:7 Pamenepo Yesu anati, Mleke iye, pakuti anachisungira ichi tsiku la kuikidwa kwanga." 
John12:8 Pakuti osauka muli nao pamodzi ndi Ine nthawi zonse; koma simuli ndi Inu nthawi zonse. 
John12:9 Pamenepo khamu lalikulu la Ayuda linadziwa kuti ali pomwepo; ndipo anadza, si chifukwa cha Yesu yekha, koma kuti adzaone Lazaro, amene adamuukitsa kwa akufa." 
John12:10 Koma ansembe aakulu anapangana kuti akaphe Lazaronso; 
John12:11 pakuti ambiri a Ayuda anachoka chifukwa cha iye, nakhulupirira Yesu." 
John12:12 M'mawa mwake khamu lalikulu la anthu amene adadza kuchikondwerero, pakumva kuti Yesu alinkudza ku Yerusalemu," 
John12:13 anatenga makwata a kanjedza, natuluka kukakomana ndi Iye, nafuula, Hosana; wolemekezeka Iye wakudza m'dzina la Ambuye, ndiye mfumu ya Israele." 
John12:14 Koma Yesu, m'mene adapeza kabulu anakhala pamenepo; monga mulembedwa:" 
John12:15 Usaope, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; taona mfumu yako idza wokhala pa mwana wa bulu." 
John12:16 Izi sanazidziwa ophunzira ake poyamba; koma pamene Yesu analemekezedwa, pamenepo anakumbukira kuti izi zinalembedwa za Iye, ndi kuti adamchitira Iye izi." 
John12:17 Pamenepo khamulo limene linali pamodzi ndi Iye, m'mene anaitana Lazaro kutuluka kumanda, namuukitsa kwa akufa, anachita umboni." 
John12:18 Chifukwa cha ichinso khamulo linadza kudzakomana ndi Iye, chifukwa anamva kuti Iye adachita chizindikiro ichi." 
John12:19 Chifukwa chake Afarisi ananena wina ndi mnzake, Muona kuti simupindula kanthu konse; onani dziko litsata pambuyo pake pa Iye." 
John12:20 Koma panali Agriki ena mwa iwo akukwera kunka kukalambira pachikondwerero. 
John12:21 Ndipo iwo anadza kwa Filipo wa ku Betsaida wa m'Galileya, namfunsa iye, ndi kuti, Mbuye, tifuna kuona Yesu." 
John12:22 Filipo anadza nanena kwa Andrea; nadza Andrea ndi Filipo, nanena ndi Yesu." 
John12:23 Koma Yesu anayankha iwo, nati, Yafika nthawi, kuti Mwana wa Munthu alemekezedwe." 
John12:24 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Ngati mbeu ya tirigu siigwa m'nthaka, nifa, ikhala pa yokha iyo; koma ngati ifa, ibala chipatso chambiri." 
John12:25 Iye wokonda moyo wake adzautaya; ndipo wodana ndi moyo wake m'dziko lino lapansi adzausungira kumoyo wosatha. 
John12:26 Ngati wina anditumikira Ine, anditsate; ndipo kumene kuli Ine, komwekonso kudzakhala mtumiki wanga. Ngati wina anditumikira Ine, Atate adzamchitira ulemu iyeyu." 
John12:27 Moyo wanga wavutika tsopano; ndipo ndidzanena chiyani? Atate, ndipulumutseni Ine kunthawi iyi. Koma chifukwa cha ichi ndinadzera nthawi iyi." 
John12:28 Atate, lemekezani dzina lanu. Pomwepo adadza mau ochokera Kumwamba, Ndalilemekeza, ndipo ndidzalilemekezanso." 
John12:29 Chifukwa chake khamu la anthu akuimirirako, ndi kuwamva ananena kuti kwagunda. Ena ananena, Mngelo walankhula ndi Iye." 
John12:30 Yesu anayankha nati, Mau awa sanafika chifukwa cha Ine, koma cha inu." 
John12:31 Tsopano pali kuweruza kwa dziko ili lapansi; mkulu wa dziko ili lapansi adzatayidwa kunja tsopano. 
John12:32 Ndipo Ine, m'mene ndikakwezedwa kudziko, ndidzakoka anthu onse kwa Ine ndekha." 
John12:33 Koma ananena ichi ndi kuzindikiritsa imfa yanji akuti adzafa nayo. 
John12:34 Pamenepo khamulo linayankha Iye, Tidamva ife m'chilamulo kuti Khristu akhala kunthawi yonse; ndipo Inu munena bwanji, kuti Mwana wa Munthu ayenera kukwezedwa? Mwana wa Munthu amene ndani?" 
John12:35 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Katsala kanthawi kakang'ono ndipo kuunika kuli mwa inu. Yendani pokhala muli nako kuunika, kuti mdima sungakupezeni; ndipo woyenda mumdima sadziwa kumene amukako." 
John12:36 Pokhala muli nako kuunika, khulupirirani kuunikako, kuti mukakhale ana a kuunikako. Izi Yesu analankhula, nachoka nawabisalira." 
John12:37 Koma angakhale adachita zizindikiro zambiri zotere pamaso pao iwo sanakhulupirira Iye; 
John12:38 kuti mau a Yesaya mneneri akakwaniridwe, amene anati, Ambuye, wakhulupirira ndani kulalikira kwathu? Ndipo mkono wa Ambuye wavumbulutsidwa kwa yani?" 
John12:39 Chifukwa cha ichi sanathe kukhulupirira, pakuti Yesaya anatinso," 
John12:40 Wadetsa maso ao, naumitsa mtima wao; kuti angaone ndi maso, angazindikire ndi mtima, nangatembenuke, ndipo ndingawachiritse." 
John12:41 Izi anati Yesaya, chifukwa anaona ulemerero wake; nalankhula za Iye." 
John12:42 Kungakhale kotero, ambiri a mwa akulu anakhulupirira Iye; koma chifukwa cha Afarisi sanavomereza, kuti angaletsedwe m'sunagoge," 
John12:43 pakuti anakonda ulemerero wa anthu koposa ulemerero wa Mulungu. 
John12:44 Koma Yesu anafuula nati, Iye wokhulupirira Ine, sakhulupirira Ine, koma Iye wondituma Ine." 
John12:45 Ndipo wondiona Ine aona amene anandituma Ine. 
John12:46 Ndadza Ine kuunika kudziko lapansi, kuti yense wokhulupirira Ine asakhale mumdima." 
John12:47 Ndipo ngati wina akumva mau anga, ndi kusawasunga, Ine sindimweruza; pakuti sindinadza kudzaweruza dziko lapansi, koma kuti ndipulumutse dziko lapansi." 
John12:48 Iye amene akaniza Ine, ndi kusalandira mau anga, ali naye womweruza iye, mau amene ndalankhula, iwowa adzamweruza tsiku lomaliza." 
John12:49 Pakuti sindinalankhula mwa Ine ndekha; koma Atate wondituma Ine, yemweyu anandipatsa Ine lamulo, limene ndikanene, ndi limene ndikalankhule." 
John12:50 Ndipo ndidziwa kuti lamulo lake lili moyo wosatha; chifukwa chake zimene ndilankhula, monga momwe Atate wanena ndi Ine, momwemo ndilankhula." 
John13:1 Koma pasanafike chikondwerero la Paska, Yesu, podziwa kuti nthawi yake idadza yakuchoka kutuluka m'dziko lino lapansi, kunka kwa Atate, m'mene anakonda ake a Iye yekha a m'dziko lapansi, anawakonda kufikira chimaliziro." 
John13:2 Ndipo pokhala pamgonero, mdierekezi adatha kuika mu mtima wake wa Yudasi mwana wa Simoni Iskariote, kuti akampereke Iye," 
John13:3 Yesu, podziwa kuti Atate adampatsa Iye zonse m'manja mwake, ndi kuti anachokera kwa Mulungu, namuka kwa Mulungu," 
John13:4 ananyamuka pamgonero, navula malaya ake; ndipo m'mene adatenga chopukutira, anadzimanga m'chuuno." 
John13:5 Pomwepo anathira madzi m'nsambidwe, nayamba kusambitsa mapazi a ophunzira ake, ndi kuwapukuta ndi chopukutira, chimene anadzimanga nacho." 
John13:6 Anadza pomwepo kwa Simoni Petro. Iyeyu ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, kodi Inu mundisambitsa ine mapazi?" 
John13:7 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Chimene ndichita Ine suchidziwa tsopano; koma udzadziwa m'tsogolo mwake." 
John13:8 Petro ananena ndi Iye, Simudzasambitsa mapazi anga kunthawi yonse. Yesu anamyankha iye, Ngati sindikusambitsa iwe ulibe cholandira pamodzi ndi Ine." 
John13:9 Simoni Petro ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, si mapazi anga okha, komanso manja ndi mutu." 
John13:10 Yesu ananena naye, Amene anatha kusamba alibe kusowa koma kusamba mapazi, koma ayera monse: ndipo inu ndinu oyera, koma si nonse ai." 
John13:11 Pakuti anadziwa amene adzampereka Iye; chifukwa cha ichi anati, Simuli oyera nonse." 
John13:12 Pamenepo, atatha Iye kusambitsa mapazi ao, ndi kutenga malaya ake, anaseamanso, nati kwa iwo, Nanga chimene ndakuchitirani inu, muchizindikira kodi?" 
John13:13 Inu munditcha Ine Mphunzitsi, ndi Ambuye: ndipo munena bwino; pakuti ndine amene." 
John13:14 Chifukwa chake, ngati Ine Ambuye ndi Mphunzitsi, ndasambitsa mapazi anu, inunso muyenera kusambitsana mapazi wina ndi mnzake." 
John13:15 Pakuti ndakupatsani inu chitsanzo, kuti, monga Ine ndakuchitirani inu, inunso muchite." 
John13:16 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Kapolo sali wamkulu ndi mbuye wake; kapena mtumwi sali wamkulu ndi womtuma iye." 
John13:17 Ngati mudziwa izi, odala inu ngati muzichita." 
John13:18 Sindinena za inu nonse; ndidziwa amene ndawasankha: koma kuti cholemba chikwaniridwe, Iye wakudya mkate wanga anatsalimira pa Ine chidendene chake." 
John13:19 Kuyambira tsopano ndinena kwa inu, chisadachitike, kuti pamene chitachitika, mukakhulupirire kuti ndine amene." 
John13:20 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Iye wolandira amene aliyense ndimtuma, andilandira Ine; koma wolandira Ine alandira wondituma Ine." 
John13:21 Yesu m'mene adanena izi, anavutika mumzimu, nachita umboni, nati, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, kuti mmodzi wa inu adzandipereka Ine." 
John13:22 Ophunzira analikupenyana wina kwa mnzake, ndi kusinkhasinkha kuti ananena za yani." 
John13:23 Koma mmodzi wa ophunzira ake, amene Yesu anamkonda, analikutsamira pa chifuwa cha Yesu." 
John13:24 Pamenepo Simoni Petro anamkodola nanena naye, Utiuze ndiye yani amene anena za iye." 
John13:25 Iyeyu potsamira pomwepo, pa chifukwa cha Yesu, anena ndi Iye, Ambuye, ndiye yani?" 
John13:26 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, Ndi iyeyu, amene Ine ndidzamsunsira nthongo ndi kumpatsa. Pamenepo, m'mene anasunsa nthongo anaitenga naipatsa Yudasi mwana wa Simoni Iskariote." 
John13:27 Ndipo pambuyo pake pa nthongoyo, Satana analowa mwa iyeyu. Pamenepo Yesu ananena naye, Chimene uchita, chita msanga." 
John13:28 Koma palibe mmodzi wa iwo akuseamako anadziwa chimene anafuna, poti atere naye." 
John13:29 Pakuti popeza Yudasi anali nalo thumba, ena analikuyesa kuti Yesu ananena kwa iye, Gula zimene zitisowa pachikondwerero; kapena, kuti apatse kanthu kwa aumphawi." 
John13:30 Pamenepo iyeyo m'mene adalandira nthongo, anatuluka pomwepo. Koma kunali usiku." 
John13:31 Tsono m'mene adatuluka, Yesu ananena, Tsopano walemekezeka Mwana wa Munthu, ndipo Mulungu walemekezedwa mwa Iye;" 
John13:32 ndipo Mulungu adzamlemekeza Iye mwa Iye yekha, adzamlemekeza Iye tsopano apa." 
John13:33 Tiana, katsala kanthawi ndikhala ndi inu. Mudzandifunafuna Ine; ndipo monga ndinanena kwa Ayuda, kuti kumene ndinkako Ine, inu simungathe kudza, momwemo ndinena kwa inu tsopano." 
John13:34 Ndikupatsani inu lamulo latsopano, kuti mukondane wina ndi mnzake; monga ndakonda inu, kuti inunso mukondane wina ndi mnzake." 
John13:35 Mwa ichi adzazindikira onse kuti muli ophunzira anga, ngati muli nacho chikondano wina ndi mnzake." 
John13:36 Simoni Petro anena ndi Iye, Ambuye, mumuka kuti? Yesu anayankha, Kumene ndimukako sungathe kunditsata Ine tsopano; koma, udzanditsata bwino lomwe." 
John13:37 Petro ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, sindingathe kukutsatani Inu tsopano chifukwa ninji? Ndidzataya moyo wanga chifukwa cha Inu." 
John13:38 Yesu anayankha, Moyo wako kodi udzautaya chifukwa cha Ine? Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa iwe, Asanalire tambala udzandikana Ine katatu." 
John14:1 Mtima wanu usavutike; mukhulupirira Mulungu, khulupirirani Inenso." 
John14:2 M'nyumba ya Atate wanga alimo malo okhalamo ambiri. Ngati sikudali kutero, ndikadakuuzani inu; pakuti ndipita kukukonzerani inu malo." 
John14:3 Ndipo ngati ndipita kukakonzera inu malo, ndidzabweranso, ndipo ndidzalandira inu kwa Ine ndekha; kuti kumene kuli Ineko, mukakhale inunso." 
John14:4 Ndipo kumene ndinkako Ine, mudziwa njira yake." 
John14:5 Tomasi ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, sitidziwa kumene munkako; tidziwa njira bwanji?" 
John14:6 Yesu ananena naye, Ine ndine njira, ndi choonadi, ndi moyo. Palibe munthu adza kwa Atate, koma mwa Ine." 
John14:7 Mukadazindikira Ine mukadadziwa Atate wanganso; kuyambira tsopano mumzindikira Iye, ndipo mwamuona Iye." 
John14:8 Filipo ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, tionetsereni ife Atate, ndipo chitikwanira." 
John14:9 Yesu ananena naye, Kodi ndili ndi inu nthawi yaikulu yotere, ndipo sunandizindikira, Filipo? Iye amene wandiona Ine waona Atate; unena iwe bwanji, Mutionetsere Atate?" 
John14:10 Sukhulupirira kodi kuti ndili Ine mwa Atate, ndi Atate ali mwa Ine? Mau amene ndinena Ine kwa inu sindilankhula kwa Ine ndekha; koma Atate wokhala mwa Ine achita ntchito zake." 
John14:11 Khulupirirani Ine, kuti Ine ndili mwa Atate ndi Atate ali mwa Ine; koma ngati si chomwecho, khulupirirani Ine chifukwa cha ntchito zomwe." 
John14:12 Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, Wokhulupirira Ine, ntchito zimene ndichita Ine adzazichitanso iyeyu; ndipo adzachita zoposa izi; chifukwa ndipita Ine kwa Atate." 
John14:13 Ndipo chimene chilichonse mukafunse m'dzina langa, ndidzachichita, kuti Atate akalemekezedwe mwa Mwana." 
John14:14 Ngati mudzapempha kanthu m'dzina langa, ndidzachita." 
John14:15 Ngati mukonda Ine, sungani malamulo anga." 
John14:16 Ndipo Ine ndidzapempha Atate, ndipo adzakupatsani inu Nkhoswe ina, kuti akhale ndi inu kunthawi yonse," 
John14:17 ndiye Mzimu wa choonadi; amene dziko lapansi silingathe kumlandira, pakuti silimuona Iye, kapena kumzindikira Iye. Inu mumzindikira Iye; chifukwa akhala ndi inu nadzakhala mwa inu." 
John14:18 Sindidzakusiyani inu mukhale ana amasiye; ndidza kwa inu. 
John14:19 Katsala kanthawi, ndipo dziko lapansi silindionanso Ine; koma inu mundiona; popeza Ine ndili ndi moyo inunso mudzakhala ndi moyo." 
John14:20 Tsiku lomwelo mudzazindikira kuti ndili Ine mwa Atate wanga, ndi inu mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa inu." 
John14:21 Iye wakukhala nao malamulo anga, ndi kuwasunga, iyeyu ndiye wondikonda Ine; koma wondikonda Ine adzakondedwa ndi Atate wanga, ndipo Ine ndidzamkonda, ndipo ndidzadzionetsa ndekha kwa iye." 
John14:22 Yudasi, si Iskariote, ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, chachitika chiyani kuti muziti mudzionetsa nokha kwa ife, koma si kwa dziko lapansi?" 
John14:23 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Ngati wina akonda Ine, adzasunga mau anga; ndipo Atate wanga adzamkonda, ndipo tidzadza kwa iye, ndipo tidzayesa kwa iye mokhalamo." 
John14:24 Wosandikonda Ine sasunga mau anga; ndipo mau amene mumva sali mau anga, koma a Atate wondituma Ine." 
John14:25 Izi ndalankhula nanu, pakukhala ndi inu." 
John14:26 Koma Nkhosweyo, Mzimu Woyera, amene Atate adzamtuma m'dzina langa, Iyeyo adzaphunzitsa inu zonse, nadzakumbutsa inu zinthu zonse zimene ndinanena kwa inu." 
John14:27 Mtendere ndikusiyirani inu, mtendere wanga ndikupatsani; Ine sindikupatsani inu monga dziko lapansi lipatsa. Mtima wanu usavutike, kapena usachite mantha." 
John14:28 Mwamva kuti Ine ndinanena kwa inu, Ndimuka, ndipo ndidza kwa inu. Mukadandikonda Ine, mukadakondwera kuti ndipita kwa Atate; pakuti Atate ali wamkulu ndi Ine." 
John14:29 Ndipo tsopano ndakuuzani chisanachitike, kuti pamene chitachitika mukakhulupirire." 
John14:30 Sindidzalankhulanso zambiri ndi inu, pakuti mkulu wa dziko lapansi adza; ndipo alibe kanthu mwa Ine;" 
John14:31 koma kuti dziko lapansi lizindikire kuti ndikonda Atate, ndi kuti ndichita monga momwe Atate wandilamula. Nyamukani, tizimuka kuchokera kuno." 
John15:1 Ine ndine mpesa weniweni, ndipo Atate wanga ndiye wam'munda." 
John15:2 Nthambi iliyonse ya mwa Ine yosabala chipatso, aichotsa; ndi iliyonse yakubala chipatso, aisadza, kuti ikabale chipatso chochuluka." 
John15:3 Mwakhala okonzeka tsopano inu chifukwa cha mau amene ndalankhula ndi inu. 
John15:4 Khalani mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa inu. Monga nthambi siingathe kubala chipatso pa yokha, ngati siikhala mwampesa; motere mulibe inunso ngati simukhala mwa Ine." 
John15:5 Ine ndine mpesa, inu ndinu nthambi zake: wakukhala mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa iye, ameneyo abala chipatso chambiri; pakuti kopanda Ine simungathe kuchita kanthu." 
John15:6 Ngati wina sakhala mwa Ine, watayika kunja monga nthambi, nafota; ndipo azisonkhanitsa nazitaya kumoto, nazitentha." 
John15:7 Ngati mukhala mwa Ine, ndi mau anga akhala mwa inu, pemphani chilichonse chimene muchifuna ndipo chidzachitika kwa inu." 
John15:8 Mwa ichi alemekezedwa Atate wanga, kuti mubale chipatso chambiri; ndipo mudzakhala ophunzira anga." 
John15:9 Monga momwe Atate wandikonda Ine, Inenso ndakonda inu; khalani m'chikondi changa." 
John15:10 Ngati musunga malamulo anga mudzakhala m'chikondi changa; monga Iye ndasunga malamulo a Atate wanga, ndipo ndikhala m'chikondi chake." 
John15:11 Izi ndalankhula ndi inu, kuti chimwemwe changa chikhale mwa inu, ndi kuti chimwemwe chanu chidzale." 
John15:12 Lamulo langa ndi ili, kuti mukondane wina ndi mnzake, monga ndakonda inu." 
John15:13 Palibe munthu ali nacho chikondi choposa ichi, chakuti munthu ataya moyo wake chifukwa cha abwenzi ake." 
John15:14 Muli abwenzi anga inu, ngati muzichita zimene ndikulamulani inu." 
John15:15 Sinditchanso inu akapolo; chifukwa kapolo sadziwa chimene mbuye wake achita; koma ndatcha inu abwenzi; chifukwa zonse zimene ndazimva kwa Atate wanga ndakudziwitsani. 
John15:16 Inu simunandisankha Ine, koma Ine ndinakusankhani inu, ndipo ndinakuikani, kuti mukamuke inu ndi kubala chipatso, ndi kuti chipatso chanu chikhale; kuti chimene chilichonse mukapempha Atate m'dzina langa akakupatseni inu." 
John15:17 Zinthu izi ndilamula inu, kuti mukondane wina ndi mnzake." 
John15:18 Ngati dziko lapansi lida inu, mudziwa kuti lidada Ine lisanayambe kuda inu." 
John15:19 Mukadakhala a dziko lapansi, dziko lapansi likadakonda zake za lokha; koma popeza simuli a dziko lapansi, koma Ine ndinakusankhani inu mwa dziko lapansi, chifukwa cha ichi likudani inu." 
John15:20 Kumbukirani mau amene Ine ndinanena kwa inu, Kapolo sali wamkulu ndi mbuye wake. Ngati anandilondalonda Ine, adzakulondalondani inunso; ngati anasunga mau anga, adzasunga anunso." 
John15:21 Koma izi zonse adzakuchitirani chifukwa cha dzina langa, chifukwa sadziwa wondituma Ine." 
John15:22 Sindikadadza ndi kulankhula nao sakadakhala nalo tchimo; koma tsopano alibe chowiringula pa machimo ao. 
John15:23 Iye wondida Ine, adanso Atate wanga." 
John15:24 Sindikadachita mwa iwo ntchito zosachita wina, sakadakhala nalo tchimo; koma tsopano anaona, nada Ine ndi Atate wanganso." 
John15:25 Koma chitero, kuti mau olembedwa m'chilamulo chao akwaniridwe, kuti, Anandida Ine kopanda chifukwa." 
John15:26 Koma pamene wafika Nkhoswe, amene Ine ndidzamtuma kwa inu kuchokera kwa Atate, ndiye Mzimu wa choonadi, amene atuluka kwa Atate, Iyeyu adzandichitira Ine umboni." 
John15:27 Ndipo inunso muchita umboni, pakuti muli ndi Ine kuyambira chiyambi." 
John16:1 Izi ndalankhula ndi inu kuti mungakhumudwitsidwe. 
John16:2 Adzakutulutsani m'masunagoge, koma ikudza nthawi imene yense wakupha inu adzayesa kuti atumikira Mulungu." 
John16:3 Ndipo izi adzachita, chifukwa sanadziwa Atate, kapena Ine." 
John16:4 Koma zinthu izi ndalankhula ndi inu kuti ikadza nthawi yao, mukakumbukire kuti ndinakuuzani. Koma izi sindinanena kwa inu kuyambira pachiyambi, chifukwa ndinali pamodzi ndi inu." 
John16:5 Koma tsopano ndimuka kwa Iye wondituma Ine; ndipo palibe wina mwa inu andifunsa Ine, Munka kuti?" 
John16:6 Koma chifukwa ndalankhula izi ndi inu chisoni chadzala mumtima mwanu. 
John16:7 Koma ndinena Ine choonadi ndi inu; kuyenera kwa inu kuti ndichoke Ine; pakuti ngati sindichoka, Nkhosweyo sadzadza kwa inu; koma ngati ndipita ndidzamtuma Iye kwa inu." 
John16:8 Ndipo atadza Iyeyo, adzatsutsa dziko lapansi za machimo, ndi za chilungamo, ndi za chiweruziro;" 
John16:9 za machimo, chifukwa sakhulupirira Ine;" 
John16:10 za chilungamo, chifukwa ndinka kwa Atate, ndipo simundionanso;" 
John16:11 za chiweruzo, chifukwa mkulu wa dziko ili lapansi waweruzidwa." 
John16:12 Ndili nazo zambirinso zakunena kwa inu, koma simungathe kuzisenza tsopano lino." 
John16:13 Koma atadza Iyeyo, Mzimu wa choonadi, adzatsogolera inu m'choonadi chonse; pakuti sadzalankhula za Iye mwini; koma zinthu zilizonse adzazimva, adzazilankhula; ndipo zinthu zilinkudza adzakulalikirani." 
John16:14 Iyeyo adzalemekeza Ine; chifukwa adzatenga za mwa Ine, nadzalalikira kwa inu." 
John16:15 Zinthu zilizonse Atate ali nazo ndi zanga; chifukwa chake ndinati, kuti atenga za mwa Ine, nadzalalikira kwa inu." 
John16:16 Katsala kanthawi, ndipo simundionanso Ine, ndipo kanthawinso, ndipo mudzandiona Ine." 
John16:17 Mwa ophunzira ake tsono anati wina ndi mnzake, Ichi nchiyani chimene anena ndi ife, Kanthawi ndipo simundiona; ndiponso kanthawi, ndipo mudzandiona; ndipo, chifukwa ndimuka kwa Atate?" 
John16:18 Chifukwa chake ananena. Ichi nchiyani chimene anena, Kanthawi? Sitidziwa chimene alankhula." 
John16:19 Yesu anazindikira kuti analikufuna kumfunsa Iye, ndipo anati kwa iwo, Kodi mulikufunsana wina ndi mnzake za ichi, kuti ndinati, Kanthawi ndipo simundiona Ine, ndiponso kanthawi nimudzandiona Ine?" 
John16:20 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, kuti mudzalira ndi kubuma maliro inu, koma dziko lapansi lidzakondwera; mudzachita chisoni inu, koma chisoni chanu chidzasandulika chimwemwe." 
John16:21 Mkazi pamene akuti abale ali nacho chisoni, chifukwa yafika nthawi yake; koma pamene wabala mwana, sakumbukiranso kusaukako, chifukwa cha chimwemwe kuti wabadwa munthu kudziko lapansi." 
John16:22 Ndipo inu tsono muli nacho chisoni tsopano lino, koma ndidzakuonaninso, ndipo mtima wanu udzakondwera, ndipo palibe wina adzachotsa kwa inu chimwemwe chanu." 
John16:23 Ndipo tsiku limenelo simudzandifunsa kanthu. Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, Ngati mudzapempha Atate kanthu, adzakupatsani inu m'dzina langa." 
John16:24 Kufikira tsopano simunapempha kanthu m'dzina langa; pemphani, ndipo mudzalandira, kuti chimwemwe chanu chikwaniridwe." 
John16:25 Zinthu izi ndalankhula ndi inu m'mafanizo; ikudza nthawi imene sindidzalankhula ndi inu m'mafanizo, koma ndidzakulalikirani inu m'mafanizo, koma ndidzakulalikirani inu momveka za Atate." 
John16:26 Tsiku limenelo mudzapempha m'dzina langa; ndipo sindinena kwa inu kuti Ine ndidzafunsira inu kwa Atate; 
John16:27 pakuti Atate yekha akonda inu, chifukwa inu mwandikonda Ine, ndi kukhulupirira kuti Ine ndinatuluka kwa Atate." 
John16:28 Ndinatuluka mwa Atate, ndipo ndadza kudziko lapansi: ndilisiyanso dziko lapansi, ndipo ndipita kwa Atate." 
John16:29 Ophunzira ake ananena, Onani, tsopano mulankhula zomveka, ndipo mulibe kunena chiphiphiritso." 
John16:30 Tsopano tidziwa kuti mudziwa zonse, ndipo mulibe kusowa kuti wina akafunse Inu; mwa ichi tikhulupirira kuti munatuluka kwa Mulungu." 
John16:31 Yesu anayankha iwo, Kodi mukhulupirira tsopano?" 
John16:32 Onani ikudza nthawi, ndipo yafika, imene mudzabalalitsidwa, yense ku zake za yekha, ndipo mudzandisiya Ine pa ndekha. Ndipo sindikhala pa ndekha, chifukwa Atate ali pamodzi ndi Ine," 
John16:33 Zinthu izi ndalankhula ndi inu, kuti mwa Ine mukakhale nao mtendere. M'dziko lapansi mudzakhala nacho chivuto, koma limbikani mtima; ndalingonjetsa dziko lapansi Ine." 
John17:1 Zinthu izi analankhula Yesu; ndipo m'mene anakweza maso ake Kumwamba, anati, Atate, yafika nthawi; lemekezani Mwana wanu, kuti Mwana wanu akulemekezeni Inu;" 
John17:2 monga mwampatsa Iye ulamuliro pa thupi lililonse, kuti onse amene mwampatsa Iye, awapatse iwo moyo wosatha." 
John17:3 Koma moyo wosatha ndi uwu, kuti akadziwe Inu Mulungu woona yekha, ndi Yesu Khristu amene munamtuma." 
John17:4 Ine ndalemekeza Inu pa dziko lapansi, m'mene ndinatsiriza ntchito imene munandipatsa ndichite." 
John17:5 Ndipo tsopano, Atate Inu, lemekezani Ine ndi Inu nokha ndi ulemerero umene ndinali nao ndi Inu lisanakhale dziko lapansi." 
John17:6 Ndalionetsera dzina lanu kwa anthu amene mwandipatsa Ine m'dziko lapansi; anali anu, ndipo mwandipatsa Ine iwo; ndipo adasunga mau anu." 
John17:7 Azindikira tsopano kuti zinthu zilizonse zimene mwandipatsa Ine zichokera kwa Inu; 
John17:8 chifukwa mau amene munandipatsa Ine ndinapatsa iwo; ndipo analandira, nazindikira koona kuti ndinatuluka kwa Inu, ndipo anakhulupirira kuti Inu munandituma Ine." 
John17:9 Ine ndiwapempherera iwo; sindipempherera dziko lapansi, koma iwo amene mwandipatsa Ine," 
John17:10 chifukwa ali anu: ndipo zanga zonse zili zanu, ndi zanu zili zanga; ndipo ndilemekezedwa mwa iwo." 
John17:11 Sindikhalanso m'dziko lapansi, koma iwo ali m'dziko lapansi, ndipo Ine ndidza kwa Inu. Atate Woyera, sungani awa m'dzina lanu amene mwandipatsa Ine, kuti akhale mmodzi, monga Ife." 
John17:12 Pamene ndinakhala nao, Ine ndinalikuwasunga iwo m'dzina lanu amene mwandipatsa Ine; ndipo ndinawasunga, ndipo sanatayika mmodzi yense wa iwo, koma mwana wa chitayiko, kuti lembo likwaniridwe." 
John17:13 Koma tsopano ndidza kwa Inu; ndipo izi ndilankhula m'dziko lapansi, kuti akhale nacho chimwemwe changa chokwaniridwa mwa iwo okha." 
John17:14 Ine ndawapatsa iwo mau anu; ndipo dziko lapansi, linadana nao, chifukwa sakhala a dziko lapansi, monga Ine sindikhala wa dziko lapansi." 
John17:15 Sindipempha kuti muwachotse iwo m'dziko lapansi, koma kuti muwasunge iwo kuletsa woipayo." 
John17:16 Siali a dziko lapansi monga Ine sindili wa dziko lapansi. 
John17:17 Patulani iwo m'choonadi; mau anu ndi choonadi. 
John17:18 Monga momwe munandituma Ine kudziko lapansi, Inenso ndinatuma iwo kudziko lapansi." 
John17:19 Ndipo chifukwa cha iwo Ine ndidzipatula ndekha kuti iwonso akhale opatulidwa m'choonadi. 
John17:20 Koma sindipempherera iwo okha, komanso iwo akukhulupirira Ine chifukwa cha mau ao;" 
John17:21 kuti onse akakhale amodzi, monga Inu Atate mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa Inu, kuti iwonso akakhale mwa Ife: kuti dziko lapansi likakhulupirire kuti Inu munandituma Ine." 
John17:22 Ndipo ulemerero umene mwandipatsa Ine ndapatsa iwo; kuti akhale amodzi, monga Ife tili mmodzi;" 
John17:23 Ine mwa iwo, ndi Inu mwa Ine, kuti akhale angwiro mwa mmodzi; kuti dziko lapansi lizindikire kuti Inu munandituma Ine, nimunawakonda iwo, monga momwe munakonda Ine." 
John17:24 Atate, amene mwandipatsa Ine, ndifuna kuti, kumene ndili Ine, iwonso akhale pamodzi ndi Ine; kuti ayang'anire ulemerero wanga, umene mwandipatsa Ine; pakuti munandikonda Ine lisanakhazikike dziko lapansi." 
John17:25 Atate wolungama, dziko lapansi silinadziwa Inu, koma Ine ndinadziwa Inu; ndipo iwo anazindikira kuti munandituma Ine;" 
John17:26 ndipo ndinazindikiritsa iwo dzina lanu, ndipo ndidzalizindikiritsa; kuti chikondi chimene munandikonda nacho chikhale mwa iwo, ndi Ine mwa iwo." 
John18:1 M'mene Yesu adanena izi, anatuluka ndi ophunzira ake, kunka tsidya lija la mtsinje wa Kidroni, kumene kunali munda, umene analowamo Iye ndi ophunzira ake." 
John18:2 Koma Yudasinso amene akampereka Iye, anadziwa malowa; chifukwa Yesu akamkako kawirikawiri ndi ophunzira ake." 
John18:3 Pamenepo Yudasi, m'mene adatenga gulu la asilikali ndi anyamata, kwa ansembe aakulu ndi Afarisi, anadza komweko ndi nyali ndi miuni ndi zida." 
John18:4 Pamenepo Yesu, podziwa zonse zilinkudza pa Iye, anatuluka, nati kwa iwo, Mufuna yani?" 
John18:5 Anayankha Iye, Yesu Mnazarayo. Yesu ananena nao, Ndine. Koma Yudasi yemwe, wompereka Iye, anaima nao pamodzi." 
John18:6 Ndipo m'mene anati kwa iwo, Ndine, anabwerera m'mbuyo, nagwa pansi." 
John18:7 Pamenepo anawafunsanso, Mufuna yani? Koma iwo anati, Yesu Mnazarayo." 
John18:8 Yesu anayankha, Nati, Ndine; chifukwa chake ngati mufuna Ine, lekani awa amuke;" 
John18:9 kuti akwaniridwe mau amene ati, Mwa iwo amene mwandipatsa Ine, sindinataya mmodzi." 
John18:10 Pamenepo Simoni Petro pokhala nalo lupanga, analisolola nakantha kapolo wa mkulu wa ansembe, namsenga khutu lake lamanja. Koma dzina lake la kapoloyo ndiye Malkusi." 
John18:11 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa Petro, Longa lupanga m'chimake chake; chikho chimene Atate wandipatsa Ine sindimwere ichi kodi?" 
John18:12 Ndipo khamulo ndi kapitao wamkulu, ndi anyamata a Ayuda anagwira Yesu nammanga Iye," 
John18:13 nayamba kupita naye kwa Anasi; pakuti anali mpongozi wa Kayafa, amene anali mkulu wa ansembe chaka chomwecho." 
John18:14 Koma Kayafa anali uja wakulangiza Ayuda, kuti kuyenera munthu mmodzi afere anthu." 
John18:15 Koma Simoni Petro ndi wophunzira wina anatsata Yesu. Koma wophunzira ameneyo anali wodziwika kwa mkulu wa ansembe, nalowa pamodzi ndi Yesu, m'bwalo la mkulu wa ansembe;" 
John18:16 koma Petro anaima kukhomo kunja. Chifukwa chake wophunzira winayo amene anadziwika kwa mkulu wa ansembe, anatuluka nalankhula ndi wapakhomo, nalowetsa Petro." 
John18:17 Pamenepo mdzakazi wapakhomoyo ananena kwa Petro, Kodi suli iwenso wa ophunzira a munthu uyu? Iyeyu ananena, Sindine." 
John18:18 Koma akapolo anyamata analikuimirirako, atasonkha moto wamakala; pakuti kunali kuzizira; ndipo analikuotha moto; koma Petronso anali nao alikuimirira ndi kuotha moto." 
John18:19 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe anafunsa Yesu za ophunzira ake, ndi chiphunzitso chake." 
John18:20 Yesu anayankha iye, Ine ndalankhula zomveka kwa dziko lapansi; ndinaphunzitsa Ine nthawi zonse m'sunagoge ndi m'Kachisi, kumene amasonkhana Ayuda onse; ndipo mobisika sindinalankhula kanthu." 
John18:21 Undifunsiranji Ine? Funsa iwo amene adamva chimene ndinalankhula nao; taona, amenewo adziwa chimene ndinanena Ine." 
John18:22 Koma m'mene Iye adanena izi, mmodzi wa anyamata akuimirirako anapanda Yesu khofu, ndi kuti, Kodi uyankha mkulu wa ansembe chomwecho?" 
John18:23 Yesu anayankha iye, Ngati ndalankhula choipa, chita umboni wa choipacho, koma ngati bwino, undipandiranji?" 
John18:24 Koma Anasi adamtumiza Iye womangidwa kwa Kayafa mkulu wa ansembe. 
John18:25 Koma Simoni Petro analikuimirira ndi kuotha moto. Pomwepo anati kwa iye, Suli iwenso wa ophunzira ake kodi? Iyeyu anakana, nati, Sindine." 
John18:26 Mmodzi wa akapolo a mkulu wa ansembe ndiye mbale wake uja amene Petro anamdula khutu, ananena, Ine sindinakuona iwe kodi m'munda pamodzi ndi Iye?" 
John18:27 Pamenepo Petro anakananso; ndipo pomwepo analira tambala. 
John18:28 Pamenepo anamtenga Yesu kuchokera kwa Kayafa kupita ku Pretorio; koma munali mamawa; ndipo iwo sanalowa ku Pretorio, kuti angadetsedwe, koma kuti akadye Paska." 
John18:29 Chifukwa chake Pilato anatulukira kunja kwa iwo, nati, Chifukwa chanji mwadza nacho cha munthu uyu?" 
John18:30 Anayankha nati kwa iye, Akadakhala wosachita zoipa uyu sitikadampereka Iye kwa inu." 
John18:31 Ndipo Pilato anati kwa iwo, Mumtenge Iye inu, ndi kumweruza Iye monga mwa chilamulo chanu. Ayuda anati kwa iye, Tilibe ulamuliro wakupha munthu aliyense;" 
John18:32 kuti mau a Yesu akwaniridwe, amene ananena akuzindikiritsa imfa imene akuti adzafa nayo." 
John18:33 Chifukwa chake Pilato analowanso m'Pretorio, naitana Yesu, nati kwa Iye, Iwe ndiwe mfumu ya Ayuda kodi?" 
John18:34 Yesu anayankha, Kodi munena ichi mwa inu nokha, kapena ena anakuuzani za Ine?" 
John18:35 Pilato anayankha, Ndili ine Myuda kodi? Mtundu wako ndi ansembe aakulu anakupereka kwa ine; wachita chiyani?" 
John18:36 Yesu anayankha, Ufumu wanga suli wa dziko lino lapansi; ufumu wanga ukadakhala wa dziko lino lapansi, anyamata anga akadalimbika nkhondo, kuti ndisaperekedwe kwa Ayuda; koma tsopano ufumu wanga suli wochokera konkuno." 
John18:37 Pamenepo Pilato anati kwa Iye, Nanga kodi ndiwe Mfumu? Yesu anayankha, Munena kuti ndine Mfumu. Ndinabadwira ichi Ine, ndipo ndinadzera ichi kudza kudziko lapansi, kuti ndikachite umboni ndi choonadi. Yense wakukhala mwa choonadi amva mau anga." 
John18:38 Pilato ananena kwa Iye, Choonadi nchiyani? Ndipo pamene adanena ichi, anatulukiranso kwa Ayudawo, nanena nao, Ine sindipeza konse chifukwa mwa Iye." 
John18:39 Koma muli nao makhalidwe, akuti ndimamasulira inu mmodzi pa Paska; kodi mufuna tsono kuti ndimasulire inu mfumu ya Ayuda?" 
John18:40 Pomwepo anafuulanso, nanena, Si uyu, koma Barabasi. Koma Barabasi anali wachifwamba." 
John19:1 Pamenepo tsono Pilato anatenga Yesu, namkwapula." 
John19:2 Ndipo asilikali, m'mene analuka korona waminga anamveka pamutu pake, namfunda Iye malaya achibakuwa;" 
John19:3 nadza kwa Iye, nanena, Tikuoneni, mfumu ya Ayuda! Nampanda khofu." 
John19:4 Ndipo Pilato anatulukanso kunja, nanena nao, Taonani, ndidza naye kwa inu kunja kuti mudziwe kuti sindipeza mwa Iye chifukwa chilichonse." 
John19:5 Pamenepo Yesu anatuluka kunja, atavala korona waminga, ndi malaya achibakuwa. Ndipo ananena nao, Taonani munthuyu!" 
John19:6 Ndipo pamene ansembe aakulu ndi anyamata anamuona Iye, anafuula nanena, Mpachikeni, mpachikeni. Pilato ananenana nao, Mtengeni Iye inu nimumpachike; pakuti ine sindipeza chifukwa mwa Iye." 
John19:7 Ayuda anamyankha iye, Tili nacho chilamulo ife, ndipo monga mwa chilamulocho ayenera kufa, chifukwa anadziyesera Mwana wa Mulungu." 
John19:8 Ndipo pamene Pilato anamva mau awa, anaopa koposa." 
John19:9 Ndipo analowanso ku Pretorio, nanena kwa Yesu, Muchoka kuti? Koma Yesu sanamyankha kanthu." 
John19:10 Chifukwa chake Pilato ananena kwa Iye, Simulankhula ndi ine kodi? Simudziwa kodi kuti ulamuliro ndili nao wakukumasulani, ndipo ndili nao ulamuliro wakukupachikani?" 
John19:11 Yesu anamyankha iye, Simukadakhala nao ulamuliro uliwonse pa Ine, ngati sukadapatsidwa kwa inu kuchokera Kumwamba; chifukwa cha ichi iye wondipereka Ine kwa inu ali nalo tchimo loposa." 
John19:12 Pa ichi Pilato anafuna kumasula Iye; koma Ayuda anafuula, ndi kunena, Ngati mumasula ameneyo, simuli bwenzi la Kaisara; yense wodziyesera yekha mfumu atsutsana naye Kaisara." 
John19:13 Pamenepo Pilato, m'mene adamva mau awa, anatuluka ndi Yesu, nakhala pansi pa mpando woweruzira kumalo dzina lake, Bwalo lamiyala, koma m'Chihebri, Gabata." 
John19:14 Koma linali tsiku lokonza Paska; panali monga ora lachisanu ndi chimodzi. Ndipo ananena kwa Ayuda, Taonani, mfumu yanu!" 
John19:15 Pamenepo anafuula iwowa, Chotsani, Chotsani, mpachikeni Iye! Pilato ananena nao, Ndipachike mfumu yanu kodi? Ansembe aakulu anayankha, Tilibe mfumu koma Kaisara." 
John19:16 Ndipo pamenepo anampereka Iye kwa iwo kuti ampachike. Pamenepo anatenga Yesu; 
John19:17 ndipo anasenza mtanda yekha, natuluka kunka kumalo otchedwa Malo a Bade, amene atchedwa m'Chihebri, Gologota:" 
John19:18 kumene anampachika Iye; ndipo pamodzi ndi Iye awiri ena, chakuno ndi chauko, koma Yesu pakati." 
John19:19 Koma Pilato analemba lembo, naliika pamtanda. Koma panalembedwa, YESU MNAZARAYO, MFUMU YA AYUDA." 
John19:20 Ndipo lembo ilo analiwerenga ambiri a Ayuda; chifukwa malo amene Yesu anapachikidwapo anali pafupi pa mudziwo; ndipo linalembedwa m'Chihebri, ndi m'Chilatini, ndi m'Chigriki." 
John19:21 Pamenepo ansembe aakulu a Ayuda, ananena kwa Pilato, Musalembe, Mfumu ya Ayuda; koma kuti Iyeyu anati, Ndili mfumu ya Ayuda." 
John19:22 Pilato anayankha, Chimene ndalemba, ndalemba." 
John19:23 Pamenepo asilikali, m'mene adapachika Yesu, anatenga zovala zake, anadula panai, natenga wina china, wina china, ndiponso malaya; koma malaya anaombedwa monsemo kuyambira pamwamba pake, analibe msoko." 
John19:24 Chifukwa chake anati wina kwa mnzake, Tisang'ambe awa, koma tichite maere, awa akhale a yani; kuti lembo likwaniridwe limene linena, Anagawana zovala zanga mwa iwo okha, ndi pa malaya anga anachitira maere. Ndipo asilikali anachita izi." 
John19:25 Koma pamtanda wa Yesu anaimirira amake, ndi mbale wa amake, Maria, mkazi wa Kleopa, ndi Maria wa Magadala." 
John19:26 Pamenepo Yesu pakuona amake, ndi wophunzira amene anamkonda, alikuimirirako, ananena kwa amake, Mkazi, taonani, mwana wanu!" 
John19:27 Pamene ananena kwa wophunzirayo, Taona, amai wako. Ndipo kuyambira ora lomweli wophunzirayo ananka naye kwao." 
John19:28 Chitapita ichi Yesu, podziwa kuti zonse zidatha pomwepo kuti lembo likwaniridwe, ananena, Ndimva ludzu." 
John19:29 Kunaikidwako chotengera chodzala ndi vinyo wosasayo pa phesi la hisope, nachifikitsa kukamwa kwake." 
John19:30 Pamene Yesu tsono adalandira vinyo wosasayo anati, Kwatha; ndipo anawerama mutu, napereka mzimu." 
John19:31 Pomwepo Ayuda, popeza panali tsiku lokonzera, kuti mitembo ingatsale pamtanda tsiku la Sabata, pakuti tsiku lomwelo la Sabata linali lalikulu, anapempha Pilato kuti miyendo yao ithyoledwe, ndipo achotsedwe." 
John19:32 Chifukwa chake anadza asilikali nathyola miyendo ya woyambayo, ndi ya winayo wopachikidwa pamodzi ndi Iye;" 
John19:33 koma pofika kwa Yesu, m'mene anamuona Iye, kuti wafa kale, sanathyola miyendo yake;" 
John19:34 koma mmodzi wa asilikali anamgwaza ndi nthungo m'nthiti yake, ndipo panatuluka pomwepo mwazi ndi madzi." 
John19:35 Ndipo iye amene anaona, wachita umboni, ndi umboni wake uli woona; ndipo iyeyu adziwa kuti anena zoona, kuti inunso mukakhulupirire." 
John19:36 Pakuti izi zinachitika, kuti lembo likwaniridwe, Fupa la Iye silidzathyoledwa." 
John19:37 Ndipo linenanso lembo lina, Adzayang'ana pa Iye amene anampyoza." 
John19:38 Chitatha ichi Yosefe wa ku Arimatea, ndiye wophunzira wa Yesu, koma mobisika, chifukwa cha kuopa Ayuda, anapempha Pilato kuti akachotse mtembo wa Yesu. Ndipo Pilato analola. Chifukwa chake anadza, nachotsa mtembo wake." 
John19:39 Koma anadzanso Nikodemo, amene anadza kwa Iye usiku poyamba paja, alikutenga chisanganizo cha mure ndi aloe, monga miyeso zana." 
John19:40 Pamenepo anatenga mtembo wa Yesu, nauzenenga ndi nsalu zabafuta pamodzi ndi zonunkhira, monga mwa maikidwe a maliro a Ayuda." 
John19:41 Koma kunali munda kumalo kumene anapachikidwako, ndi m'mundamo munali manda atsopano m'mene sanaikidwamo munthu aliyense nthawi zonse." 
John19:42 Pomwepo ndipo anaika Yesu, chifukwa cha tsiku lokonzera la Ayuda, pakuti mandawo anali pafupi." 
John20:1 Koma tsiku loyamba la Sabata anadza Maria wa Magadala mamawa, kusanayambe kucha, kumanda, napenya mwala wochotsedwa kumanda." 
John20:2 Pomwepo anathamanga nadza kwa Simoni Petro ndi kwa wophunzira wina amene Yesu anamkonda, nanena nao, Anachotsa Ambuye kumanda, ndipo sitidziwa kumene anamuika Iye." 
John20:3 Anatuluka tsono Petro ndi wophunzira winayo, nalinkupita kumanda." 
John20:4 Koma anathamanga onse awiri pamodzi; ndipo wophunzira winayo anathamanga naposa Petro, nayamba kufika kumanda;" 
John20:5 ndipo m'mene anawerama chosuzumira anaona nsalu zabafuta zitakhala, komatu sanalowamo." 
John20:6 Pamenepo anadzanso Simoni Petro alikumtsata iye, nalowa m'manda; ndipo anaona nsalu zabafuta zitakhala," 
John20:7 ndi mlezo, umene unali pamutu pake, wosakhala pamodzi ndi nsalu zabafuta, koma wopindika padera pamalo pena." 
John20:8 Pamenepo tsono analowanso wophunzira winayo, amene anayamba kufika kumanda, ndipo anaona, nakhulupirira." 
John20:9 Pakuti kufikira pomwepo sanadziwa lembo lakuti ayenera Iye kuuka kwa akufa. 
John20:10 Chifukwa chake ophunzirawo anachokanso, kunka kwao." 
John20:11 Koma Maria analikuima kumanda kunja, alikulira. Ndipo m'mene alikulira anawerama chisuzumirire kumanda;" 
John20:12 ndipo anaona angelo awiri atavala zoyera, alikukhala mmodzi kumutu, ndi wina kumiyendo, kumene mtembo wa Yesu udagona." 
John20:13 Ndipo iwowa ananena kwa iye, Mkazi, uliranji? Ananena nao, Chifukwa anachotsa Ambuye wanga, ndipo sindidziwa kumene anamuika Iye." 
John20:14 M'mene adanena izi, anacheuka m'mbuyo, naona Yesu ali chilili, ndipo sanadziwa kuti ndiye Yesu." 
John20:15 Yesu ananena naye, Mkazi, uliranji? Ufuna yani? Iyeyu poyesa kuti ndiye wakumunda, ananena ndi Iye, Mbuye ngati mwamnyamula Iye, ndiuzeni kumene mwamuika Iye, ndipo ndidzamchotsa." 
John20:16 Yesu ananena naye, Maria. Iyeyu m'mene anacheuka, ananena ndi Iye m'Chihebri, Raboni; chimene chinenedwa, Mphunzitsi." 
John20:17 Yesu ananena naye, Usandikhudze, pakuti sinditha kukwera kwa Atate; koma pita kwa abale anga, ukati kwa iwo, Ndikwera kunka kwa Atate wanga, ndi Mulungu wanu." 
John20:18 Maria wa Magadala anapita, nalalikira kwa ophunzirawo, kuti, Ndaona Ambuye; ndi kuti ananena izi kwa iye." 
John20:19 Pamenepo, pokhala madzulo, tsiku lomwelo, loyamba la Sabata, makomo ali chitsekere, kumene anakhala ophunzira, chifukwa cha kuopa Ayuda, Yesu anadza naimirira pakati pao, nanena nao, Mtendere ukhale ndi inu." 
John20:20 Ndipo pamene adanena ichi, anaonetsa iwo manja ake ndi nthiti zake. Pamenepo ophunzira anakondwera pakuona Ambuye." 
John20:21 Chifukwa chake Yesu anatinso kwa iwo, Mtendere ukhale ndi inu; monga Atate wandituma Ine, Inenso ndituma inu." 
John20:22 Ndipo pamene anati ichi anawapumira, nanena nao, Landirani Mzimu Woyera." 
John20:23 Zochimwa za anthu ali onse muwakhululukira, zikhululukidwa kwa iwo; za iwo amene muzigwiritsa, zagwiritsidwa." 
John20:24 Koma Tomasi, mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, wotchedwa Didimo, sanakhala nao pamodzi, pamene Yesu anadza." 
John20:25 Chifukwa chake ophunzira ena ananena naye, Tamuona Ambuye. Koma iye anati kwa iwo, Ndikapanda kuona m'manja ake chizindikiro cha misomaliyo, ndi kuika chala changa m'chizindikiro cha misomaliyo, ndi kuika dzanja langa kunthiti yake; sindidzakhulupirira." 
John20:26 Ndipo pakupita masiku asanu ndi atatu ophunzira ake analinso m'nyumbamo, ndi Tomasi pamodzi nao. Yesu anadza, makomo ali chitsekere, naimirira pakati, nati, Mtendere ukhale ndi inu." 
John20:27 Pomwepo ananena kwa Tomasi, Bwera nacho chala chako kuno, nuone manja anga, ndipo bwera nalo dzanja lako, nuliike kunthiti yanga, ndipo usakhale wosakhulupirira, koma wokhulupirira." 
John20:28 Tomasi anayankha nati kwa Iye, Ambuye wanga, ndi Mulungu wanga." 
John20:29 Yesu ananena kwa iye, Chifukwa wandiona Ine, wakhulupirira; odala iwo akukhulupirira, angakhale sanaona." 
John20:30 Ndipo zizindikiro zina zambiri Yesu anazichita pamaso pa ophunzira ake, zimene sizinalembedwa m'buku ili;" 
John20:31 koma zalembedwa izi kuti mukakhulupirire kuti Yesu ndiye Khristu Mwana wa Mulungu, ndi kuti pakukhulupirira mukhale nao moyo m'dzina lake." 
John21:1 Zitapita izi Yesu anadzionetseranso kwa ophunzira ake kunyanja ya Tiberiasi. Koma anadzionetsera chotere. 
John21:2 Anali pamodzi Simoni Petro, ndi Tomasi, wotchedwa Didimo, ndi Natanaele wa ku Kana wa ku Galileya, ndi ana a Zebedeo, ndi awiri ena a ophunzira ake." 
John21:3 Simoni Petro ananena nao, Ndinka kukasodza. Ananena naye, Ifenso tipita nawe. Anatuluka, nalowa m'ngalawa; ndipo m'usiku muja sanagwira kanthu." 
John21:4 Koma pakuyamba kucha, Yesu anaimirira pambali pa nyanja, komatu ophunzirawo sanadziwa kuti ndiye Yesu." 
John21:5 Yesu ananena nao, Ananu, muli nako kanthu kakudya kodi? Anamyankha Iye, Iai." 
John21:6 Koma anati kwa iwo, Ponyani khoka kumbali ya dzanja lamanja ya ngalawa, ndipo mudzapeza. Pamenepo anaponya, ndipo analibenso mphamvu yakulikoka chifukwa cha kuchuluka nsomba." 
John21:7 Pamenepo wophunzira uja amene Yesu anamkonda ananena kwa Petro, Ndiye Ambuye. Simoni Petro pakumva kuti ndiye Ambuye, anadziveka malaya a pathupi, pakuti anali wamaliseche, nadziponya yekha m'nyanja." 
John21:8 Koma ophunzira ena anadza m'kangalawa, pakuti sanali kutali ndi mtunda, koma monga mikono mazana awiri, nakoka khoka la nsombazo." 
John21:9 Ndipo pamene anatulukira pamtunda, anapenya moto wamakala pomwepo, ndi kansomba kosanjikikako, ndi mkate." 
John21:10 Yesu ananena nao, Tenganiko nsomba zimene mwazigwira tsopano." 
John21:11 Chifukwa chake Simoni Petro anakwera m'ngalawa nakokera khoka kumtunda lodzala ndi nsomba zazikulu, zana limodzi, ndi makumi asanu ndi zitatu; ndipo zingakhale zinachuluka kotere, kokha silinang'ambika." 
John21:12 Yesu ananena nao, Idzani mufisule. Koma palibe mmodzi wa ophunzira anatha kumfunsa Iye, Ndinu yani? Podziwa kuti ndiye Ambuye." 
John21:13 Yesu anadza natenga mkate napatsa iwo, momwemonso nsomba." 
John21:14 Imeneyo ndi nthawi yachitatu yakudzionetsera Yesu kwa ophunzira ake, m'mene atauka kwa akufa." 
John21:15 Ndipo pamene atafisula Yesu ananena kwa Simoni Petro, Simoni mwana wa Yona, kodi undikonda Ine koposa awa? Ananena ndi Iye, Inde, Ambuye; mudziwa kuti ndikukondani Inu. Ananena naye, Dyetsa anaankhosa anga." 
John21:16 Ananena nayenso kachiwiri, Simoni mwana wa Yona, ukonda Ine kodi? Ananena ndi Iye, Inde, Ambuye; mudziwa kuti ndikukondani Inu. Ananena naye, Weta nkhosa zanga." 
John21:17 Ananena naye kachitatu, Simoni mwana wa Yona, kodi undikonda Ine? Petro anamva chisoni kuti anati kwa iye kachitatu, Kodi undikonda Ine? Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ambuye, mudziwa Inu zonse; muzindikira kuti ndikukondani Inu. Yesu ananena naye, Dyetsa nkhosa zanga." 
John21:18 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi iwe, pamene unali mnyamata unadzimangira wekha m'chuuno, ndipo unayenda kumene unafuna; koma pamene udzakalamba udzatulutsa manja ako, ndipo adzakumanga wina, nadzakunyamula kumene sufuna." 
John21:19 Koma ichi ananena ndi kuzindikiritsa imfa imene adzalemekeza nayo Mulungu. Ndipo m'mene ananena ichi, anati kwa iye, Nditsate Ine." 
John21:20 Petro, m'mene anacheuka, anapenya wophunzira amene Yesu anamkonda alikutsata, amenenso anatsamira pachifuwa pake pamgonero, nati, Ambuye, ndani iye wakupereka Inu?" 
John21:21 Pamenepo Petro pakumuona, ananena kwa Yesu, Ambuye, koma nanga uyu?" 
John21:22 Yesu ananena naye, Ngati ndifuna uyu akhale kufikira ndidza Ine, kuli chiyani ndi iwe? Unditsate Ine iwe." 
John21:23 Chifukwa chake mau awa anatuluka kufikira kwa abale, kuti wophunzira uyu sadzafa. Koma Yesu sananena kwa iye kuti sadzafa; koma, Ngati ndifuna iye akhale kufikira ndidza, kuli chiyani ndi iwe?" 
John21:24 Yemweyu ndiye wophunzira wakuchita umboni za izi, ndipo analembera izi; ndipo tidziwa kuti umboni wake ndi woona." 
John21:25 Koma palinso zina zambiri zimene Yesu anazichita, zoti zikadalembedwa zonse phee, ndilingalira kuti dziko lapansi silikadakhala nao malo a mabuku amene akadalembedwa. Amen." 
Acts1:1 Taonani Teofilo inu, mau aja oyamba ndinakonza, za zonse Yesu anayamba kuzichita ndi kuziphunzitsa," 
Acts1:2 kufikira tsiku lija anatengedwa kunka Kumwamba, atatha kulamula mwa Mzimu Woyera atumwi amene adawasankha;" 
Acts1:3 kwa iwonso anadzionetsera yekha wamoyo ndi zitsimikizo zambiri, zitatha zowawa zake, naonekera kwa iwo masiku makumi anai, ndi kunena zinthu za Ufumu wa Mulungu;" 
Acts1:4 ndipo posonkhana nao pamodzi, anawalamulira asachoke ku Yerusalemu, komatu alindire lonjezano la Atate, limene, anati, munalimva kwa Ine;" 
Acts1:5 pakuti Yohane anabatizadi ndi madzi; koma inu mudzabatizidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, asanapite masiku ambiri." 
Acts1:6 Pamenepo iwowa, atasonkhana pamodzi, anamfunsa Iye, nanena, Ambuye, kodi nthawi yino mubwezera ufumu kwa Israele?" 
Acts1:7 Koma anati kwa iwo, Sikuli kwa inu kudziwa nthawi kapena nyengo, zimene Atate anaziika m'ulamuliro wake wa Iye yekha." 
Acts1:8 Komatu mudzalandira mphamvu, Mzimu Woyera atadza pa inu: ndipo mudzakhala mboni zanga m'Yerusalemu, ndi m'Yudeya lonse, ndi m'Samariya, ndi kufikira malekezero ake a dziko." 
Acts1:9 Ndipo m'mene adanena izi, ali chipenyerere iwo, ananyamulidwa; ndipo mtambo unamlandira Iye kumchotsa kumaso kwao." 
Acts1:10 Ndipo pakukhala iwo chipenyerere kumwamba pomuka Iye, taonani, amuna awiri ovala zoyera anaimirira pambali pao;" 
Acts1:11 amenenso anati, Amuna a ku Galileya, muimiranji ndi kuyang'ana kumwamba? Yesu amene walandiridwa kunka Kumwamba kuchokera kwa inu, adzadza momwemo monga munamuona alinkupita Kumwamba." 
Acts1:12 Pamenepo anabwera ku Yerusalemu kuchokera kuphiri lonenedwa la Azitona, limene liyandikana ndi Yerusalemu, loyendako tsiku la Sabata." 
Acts1:13 Ndipo pamene adalowa, anakwera kuchipinda chapamwamba, kumene analikukhalako; ndiwo Petro ndi Yohane ndi Yakobo ndi Andrea, Filipo ndi Tomasi, Bartolomeo ndi Mateyu, Yakobo mwana wa Alifeyo, ndi Simoni Zelote, ndi Yudasi mwana wa Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Iwo onse analikukangalika m'kupemphera, pamodzi ndi akazi, ndi Maria, amake wa Yesu, ndi abale ake omwe." 
Acts1:15 Ndipo m'masiku awa anaimirira Petro pakati pa abale, nati (gulu la anthu losonkhana pamalo pomwe ndilo ngati zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri)," 
Acts1:16 Amuna inu, abale, kunayenera kuti lemba likwanitsidwe, limene Mzimu Woyera anayamba kunena mwa m'kamwa mwa Davide za Yudasi, wokhala mtsogoleri wa iwo adagwira Yesu." 
Acts1:17 Chifukwa anali wowerengedwa mwa ife, ndipo analandira gawo lake la utumiki uwu." 
Acts1:18 (Uyutu tsono anadzitengera kadziko ndi mphotho ya chosalungama; ndipo anagwa chamutu, naphulika pakati, ndi matumbo ake onse anakhuthuka;" 
Acts1:19 ndipo chinadziwika ndi onse akukhala ku Yerusalemu; kotero kuti m'manenedwe ao kadzikoka kanatchedwa Akeledama, ndiko, kadziko ka mwazi.)" 
Acts1:20 Pakuti kwalembedwa m'buku la Masalmo, Pogonera pake pakhale bwinja, ndipo pasakhale munthu wogonapo; ndipo uyang'aniro wake autenge wina." 
Acts1:21 Potero kuyenera kuti wina wa amunawo anatsatana nafe nthawi yonseyi Ambuye Yesu analowa natuluka mwa ife," 
Acts1:22 kuyambira ubatizo wa Yohane, kufikira tsiku lija anatengedwa kunka Kumwamba kutisiya ife, mmodzi wa awa akhale mboni ya kuuka kwake pamodzi ndi ife." 
Acts1:23 Ndipo anaimikapo awiri, Yosefe wotchedwa Barsabasi, amene anatchedwanso Yusto, ndi Matiasi." 
Acts1:24 Ndipo anapemphera, nati, Inu, Ambuye, wozindikira mitima ya onse, sonyezani mwa awa awiri mmodziyo amene munamsankha," 
Acts1:25 alowe malo a utumiki uwu ndi utumwi, kuchokera komwe Yudasi anapatukira, kuti apite kumalo a iye yekha." 
Acts1:26 Ndipo anayesa maere pa iwo; ndipo anagwera Matiasi; ndipo anawerengedwa pamodzi ndi khumi ndi mmodziwo. 
Acts2:1 Ndipo pakufika tsiku la Pentekoste, anali onse pamodzi pa malo amodzi." 
Acts2:2 Ndipo mwadzidzidzi anamveka mau ochokera Kumwamba ngati mkokomo wa mphepo yolimba, nadzaza nyumba yonse imene analikukhalamo." 
Acts2:3 Ndipo anaonekera kwa iwo malilime ogawanikana, onga amoto; ndipo unakhala pa iwo onse wayekhawayekha." 
Acts2:4 Ndipo anadzazidwa onse ndi Mzimu Woyera, nayamba kulankhula ndi malilime ena, monga Mzimu anawalankhulitsa." 
Acts2:5 Koma anali m'Yerusalemu okhalako Ayuda, amuna opembedza, ochokera kumtundu uliwonse pansi pa thambo." 
Acts2:6 Koma pochitika mau awa, unyinji wa anthu unasonkhana, nusokonezedwa, popeza yense anawamva alikulankhula m'chilankhulidwe chake cha iye yekha." 
Acts2:7 Ndipo anadabwa onse, nazizwa, nanena, Taonani, awa onse alankhulawa sali Agalileya kodi?" 
Acts2:8 Ndipo nanga ife timva bwanji, yense m'chilankhulidwe chathu chimene tinabadwa nacho?" 
Acts2:9 Aparti ndi Amedi, ndi Aelamu, ndi iwo akukhala m'Mesopotamiya, m'Yudeya, ndiponso m'Kapadokiya, m'Ponto, ndi m'Asiya;" 
Acts2:10 m'Frijiya, ndiponso m'Pamfiliya, m'Ejipito, ndi mbali za Libiya wa ku Kirene, ndi alendo ochokera ku Roma," 
Acts2:11 ndiwo Ayuda, ndiponso opinduka, Akrete, ndi Aarabu, tiwamva iwo alikulankhula m'malilime athu zazikulu za Mulungu." 
Acts2:12 Ndipo anadabwa onse, nathedwa nzeru, nanena wina ndi mnzake, Kodi ichi nchiyani?" 
Acts2:13 Koma ena anawaseka, nanena kuti, Akhuta vinyo walero." 
Acts2:14 Koma Petro, anaimirira pamodzi ndi khumi ndi mmodziwo, nakweza mau ake, nanena kwa iwo, nati, Amuna inu Ayuda, ndi inu nonse akukhala kwanu m'Yerusalemu, ichi chizindikirike kwa inu, ndipo tcherani khutu mau anga." 
Acts2:15 Pakuti awa sanaledzera monga muyesa inu; pakuti ndi ora lachitatu lokha la tsiku; 
Acts2:16 komatu ichi ndi chimene chinanenedwa ndi mneneri Yowele," 
Acts2:17 Ndipo kudzali m'masiku otsiriza, anena Mulungu, ndidzathira cha Mzimu wanga pa thupi lililonse, ndipo ana anu amuna, ndi akazi adzanenera, ndipo anyamata anu adzaona masomphenya, ndi akulu anu adzalota maloto;" 
Acts2:18 ndiponso pa akapolo anga ndi pa adzakazi anga m'masiku awa ndidzathira cha Mzimu wanga; ndipo adzanenera. 
Acts2:19 Ndipo ndidzapatsa zodabwitsa m'thambo la kumwamba, ndi zizindikiro pa dziko lapansi; mwazi, ndi moto, ndi mpweya wa utsi;" 
Acts2:20 dzuwa lidzasanduka mdima, ndi mwezi udzasanduka mwazi, lisanadze tsiku la Ambuye, lalikulu ndi loonekera." 
Acts2:21 Ndipo kudzali, kuti yense amene akaitana pa dzina la Ambuye adzapulumutsidwa." 
Acts2:22 Amuna inu Aisraele, mverani mau awa: Yesu Mnazarayo, mwamuna wochokera kwa Mulungu, wosonyezedwa kwa inu ndi zimphamvu, ndi zozizwa, ndi zizindikiro, zimene Mulungu anazichita mwa Iye pakati pa inu monga mudziwa nokha;" 
Acts2:23 ameneyo, woperekedwa ndi uphungu woikidwa ndi kudziwiratu kwa Mulungu, inu mwampachika ndi kumupha ndi manja a anthu osaweruzika;" 
Acts2:24 yemweyo Mulungu anamuukitsa, atamasula zowawa za imfa, mwakuti sikunali kotheka kuti Iye agwidwe nayo." 
Acts2:25 Pakuti Davide anena za Iye, Ndinaona Mbuye pamaso panga nthawi zonse; chifukwa ali pa dzanja langa lamanja, kuti ndingasinthike;" 
Acts2:26 mwa ichi unakondwera mtima wanga, ndipo linasangalala lilime langa; ndipo thupi langanso lidzakhala m'chiyembekezo." 
Acts2:27 Pakuti simudzasiya moyo wanga ku dziko la akufa, kapena simudzapereka Woyera wanu aone chivunde," 
Acts2:28 munandidziwitsa ine njira za moyo; mudzandidzaza ndi kukondwera pamaso panu. 
Acts2:29 Amuna inu, abale, kuloleka kunena poyera posaopa kwa inu za kholo lija Davide, kuti adamwalira naikidwanso, ndipo manda ake ali ndi ife kufikira lero lino." 
Acts2:30 Potero, pokhala mneneri iye, ndi kudziwa kuti ndi lumbiro anamlumbirira Mulungu, kuti mwa chipatso cha m'chuuno mwake adzakhazika wina pa mpando wachifumu wake;" 
Acts2:31 iye pakuona ichi kale, analankhula za kuuka kwa Khristu, kuti sanasiyidwa m'dziko la akufa, ndipo thupi lake silinaona chivunde." 
Acts2:32 Yesu ameneyo, Mulungu anamuukitsa; za ichi tili mboni ife tonse." 
Acts2:33 Potero, popeza anakwezedwa ndi dzanja lamanja la Mulungu, nalandira kwa Atate lonjezano la Mzimu Woyera, anatsanulira ichi, chimene inu mupenya nimumva." 
Acts2:34 Pakuti Davide sanakwera Kumwamba ai; koma anena yekha, Ambuye anati kwa Mbuye wanga, khalani kudzanja lamanja langa," 
Acts2:35 kufikira ndikaike adani ako chopondapo mapazi ako. 
Acts2:36 Pamenepo lizindikiritse ndithu banja lililonse la Israele, kuti Mulungu anamuyesa Ambuye ndi Khristu, Yesu amene inu munampachika." 
Acts2:37 Koma pamene anamva ichi, analaswa mtima, natitu kwa Petro ndi atumwi enawo, Tidzachita chiyani, amuna inu, abale?" 
Acts2:38 Koma Petro anati kwa iwo, Lapani, batizidwani yense wa inu m'dzina la Yesu Khristu kuloza ku chikhululukiro cha machimo anu; ndipo mudzalandira mphatso ya Mzimu Woyera." 
Acts2:39 Pakuti lonjezano lili kwa inu, ndi kwa ana anu, ndi kwa onse akutali, onse amene Ambuye Mulungu wathu adzaitana." 
Acts2:40 Ndipo ndi mau ena ambiri anachita umboni, nawadandaulira iwo, nanena, Mudzipulumutse kwa mbadwo uno wokhotakhota." 
Acts2:41 Pamenepo iwo amene analandira mau ake anabatizidwa; ndipo anaonjezedwa tsiku lomwelo anthu ngati zikwi zitatu. 
Acts2:42 Ndipo anali chikhalire m'chiphunzitso cha atumwi ndi m'chiyanjano, m'kunyema mkate ndi mapemphero." 
Acts2:43 Koma panadza mantha pa anthu onse; ndipo zozizwa ndi zizindikiro zambiri zinachitika ndi atumwi. 
Acts2:44 Ndipo onse akukhulupirira anali pamodzi, nakhala nazo zonse zodyerana." 
Acts2:45 Ndipo zimene anali nazo, ndi chuma chao, anazigulitsa, nazigawira kwa onse, monga momwe yense anasowera." 
Acts2:46 Ndipo tsiku ndi tsiku anali chikhalire ndi mtima umodzi m'Kachisi, ndipo ananyema mkate kunyumba kwao, nalandira chakudya ndi msangalalo, ndi mtima woona;" 
Acts2:47 nalemekeza Mulungu, ndi kukhala nacho chisomo ndi anthu onse. Ndipo Ambuye anawaonjezera tsiku ndi tsiku amene akuti apulumutsidwe." 
Acts3:1 Koma Petro ndi Yohane analikukwera kunka ku Kachisi pa ora lakupembedza, ndilo lachisanu ndi chinai." 
Acts3:2 Ndipo munthu wina wopunduka miyendo chibadwire ananyamulidwa, amene akamuika masiku onse pa khomo la Kachisi lotchedwa Lokongola, kuti apemphe zaulere kwa iwo akulowa m'Kachisi;" 
Acts3:3 ameneyo, pakuona Petro ndi Yohane akuti alowe m'Kachisi, anapempha alandire chaulere." 
Acts3:4 Ndipo Petro, pompenyetsetsa iye pamodzi ndi Yohane, anati, Tiyang'ane ife." 
Acts3:5 Ndipo iye anavomereza iwo, nalingirira kuti adzalandira kanthu." 
Acts3:6 Koma Petro anati, Siliva ndi golide ndilibe; koma chimene ndili nacho, ichi ndikupatsa, M'dzina la Yesu Khristu Mnazarayo, yenda." 
Acts3:7 Ndipo anamgwira iye kudzanja lake lamanja, namnyamutsa; ndipo pomwepo mapazi ake ndi mfundo za kumapazi zinalimbikitsidwa." 
Acts3:8 Ndipo anazunzuka, naimirira, nayenda; ndipo analowa pamodzi nao m'Kachisi, nayenda, nalumpha, nayamika Mulungu." 
Acts3:9 Ndipo anthu onse anamuona iye, alikuyenda ndi kuyamika Mulungu;" 
Acts3:10 namzindikira iye, kuti ndiye amene anakhala pa Khomo Lokongola la Kachisi: ndipo anadzazidwa ndi kudabwa ndi kuzizwa pa ichi chidamgwera." 
Acts3:11 Koma m'mene anagwira Petro ndi Yohane, anawathamangira pamodzi anthu onse kukhonde lotchedwa la Solomoni, alikudabwa ndithu." 
Acts3:12 Koma m'mene Petro anachiona, anayankha kwa anthu, Amuna inu a Israele, muzizwa naye bwanji ameneyo? Kapena mutipenyetsetsa ife bwanji, monga ngati tamyendetsa iye ndi mphamvu ya ife eni, kapena ndi chipembedzo chathu?"
