Acts3:13 Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi Isaki, ndi Yakobo, Mulungu wa makolo athu, analemekeza Mwana wake Yesu; amene inu munampereka ndi kumkaniza pa Pilato, poweruza iyeyu kummasula." 
Acts3:14 Koma inu munakaniza Woyera ndi Wolungamayo, ndipo munapempha kuti munthu wambanda apatsidwe kwa inu," 
Acts3:15 ndipo munamupha Mkulu wa moyo; amene Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa; za ichi ife tili mboni. 
Acts3:16 Ndipo pa chikhulupiriro cha m'dzina lake dzina lakelo linalimbikitsa iye amene mumuona, nimumdziwa; ndipo chikhulupiriro chili mwa Iye chinampatsa kuchira konse kumeneku pamaso pa inu nonse." 
Acts3:17 Ndipo tsopano, abale, ndidziwa kuti munachichita mosadziwa, monganso akulu anu." 
Acts3:18 Koma zimene Mulungu analalikiratu m'kamwa mwa aneneri onse, kuti adzamva kuwawa Khristu, Iye anakwaniritsa chotero." 
Acts3:19 Chifukwa chake lapani, bwererani kuti afafanizidwe machimo anu, kotero kuti zidze nyengo zakutsitsimutsa zochokera kunkhope ya Ambuye;" 
Acts3:20 ndipo atume amene anaikidwa kwa inu, Khristu Yesu;" 
Acts3:21 amene thambo la kumwamba liyenera kumlandira kufikira nthawi zakukonzanso zinthu zonse, zimene Mulungu analankhula za izo m'kamwa mwa aneneri ake oyera chiyambire." 
Acts3:22 Mosetu anati, Mbuye Mulungu adzaukitsira inu mneneri mwa abale anu, ngati ine; mudzamvera iye m'zinthu zilizonse akalankhule nanu." 
Acts3:23 Ndipo kudzali, kuti wamoyo aliyense samvera mneneri ameneyu, adzasakazidwa konse mwa anthu." 
Acts3:24 Koma angakhale aneneri onse kuyambira Samuele ndi akumtsatira, onse amene analankhula analalikira za masiku awa." 
Acts3:25 Inu ndinu ana a aneneri, ndi a panganolo Mulungu anapangana ndi makolo anu ndi kunena kwa Abrahamu, Ndipo mu mbeu yako mafuko onse a dziko adzadalitsidwa." 
Acts3:26 Kuyambira ndi inu, Mulungu, ataukitsa Mwana wake, anamtuma kukudalitsani inu, ndi kukubwezani yense ku zoipa zake." 
Acts4:1 Koma m'mene analikulankhula ndi anthu, ansembe ndi mdindo wa ku Kachisi ndi Asaduki anadzako," 
Acts4:2 ovutika mtima chifukwa anaphunzitsa anthuwo, nalalikira mwa Yesu kuuka kwa akufa." 
Acts4:3 Ndipo anawathira manja, nawaika m'ndende kufikira m'mawa; pakuti mpa madzulo pamenepo." 
Acts4:4 Koma ambiri a iwo amene adamva mau anakhulupirira; ndipo chiwerengero cha amuna chinali ngati zikwi zisanu. 
Acts4:5 Koma panali m'mawa mwake, anasonkhana pamodzi m'Yerusalemu oweruza, ndi akulu, ndi alembi;" 
Acts4:6 ndi Anasi mkulu wa ansembe, ndi Kayafa, ndi Yohane, ndi Aleksandro, ndi onse amene anali a fuko la mkulu wa ansembe." 
Acts4:7 Ndipo m'mene anawaimika pakati, anafunsa kuti, Ndi mphamvu yanji, kapena m'dzina lanji, mwachita ichi inu?" 
Acts4:8 Pamenepo Petro, wodzala ndi Mzimu Woyera anati kwa iwo, Oweruza a anthu inu, ndi akulu," 
Acts4:9 ngati ife lero tiweruzidwa chifukwa cha ntchito yabwino ya pa munthu wodwala, ndi machiritsidwe ake," 
Acts4:10 zindikirani inu nonse, ndi anthu onse a Israele, kuti m'dzina la Yesu Khristu Mnazarayo, amene inu munampachika pamtanda, amene Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa, mwa Iyeyu munthuyu aimirirapo pamaso panu, wamoyo." 
Acts4:11 Iye ndiye mwalawo woyesedwa wopanda pake ndi inu omanga nyumba, umene unayesedwa mutu wa pangodya." 
Acts4:12 Ndipo palibe chipulumutso mwa wina yense, pakuti palibe dzina lina pansi pa thambo la kumwamba, lopatsidwa mwa anthu, limene tiyenera kupulumutsidwa nalo." 
Acts4:13 Koma pakuona kulimbika mtima kwa Petro ndi Yohane, ndipo pozindikira kuti ndiwo anthu osaphunzira ndi opulukira, anazizwa ndipo anawazindikira, kuti adakhala pamodzi ndi Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Ndipotu pakuona munthu wochiritsidwayo alikuimirira pamodzi nao, analibe kanthu kakunena kotsutsa." 
Acts4:15 Koma pamene anawalamulira iwo achoke m'bwalo la akulu, ananena wina ndi mnzake," 
Acts4:16 kuti, Tidzawachitira chiyani anthu awa? Pakutitu chaoneka kwa onse akukhala m'Yerusalemu kuti chizindikiro chozindikirika chachitidwa ndi iwo, ndipo sitingathe kukana." 
Acts4:17 Komatu tiwaopse asalankhulenso m'dzina ili kwa munthu aliyense, kuti chisabukenso kwa anthu." 
Acts4:18 Ndipo anawaitana, nawalamulira kuti asanene konse kapena kuphunzitsa m'dzina la Yesu." 
Acts4:19 Koma Petro ndi Yohane anayankha nati kwa iwo, Weruzani, ngati nkwabwino pamaso pa Mulungu kumvera inu koposa Mulungu;" 
Acts4:20 pakuti sitingathe ife kuleka kulankhula zimene tinaziona ndi kuzimva. 
Acts4:21 Koma m'mene anawaopsanso anawamasula, osapeza kanthu kakuwalanga, chifukwa cha anthu; pakuti onse analemekeza Mulungu chifukwa cha chomwe chidachitika." 
Acts4:22 Pakuti anali wa zaka zake zoposa makumi anai munthuyo, amene chizindikiro ichi chakumchiritsa chidachitidwa kwa iye." 
Acts4:23 Ndipo m'mene anamasulidwa, anadza kwa anzao a iwo okha, nawauza zilizonse ansembe aakulu ndi akulu adanena nao." 
Acts4:24 Ndipo m'mene adamva, anakweza mau kwa Mulungu ndi mtima umodzi, nati, Mfumu, Inu ndinu wolenga thambo la kumwamba ndi dziko, ndi nyanja, ndi zonse zili m'menemo;" 
Acts4:25 amene mwa Mzimu Woyera, pakamwa pa kholo lathu Davide mtumiki wanu, mudati, Amitundu anasokosera chifukwa chiyani? Nalingirira zopanda pake anthu?" 
Acts4:26 Anadzindandalitsa mafumu a dziko, ndipo oweruza anasonkhanidwa pamodzi, kutsutsana ndi Ambuye, ndi Khristu wake." 
Acts4:27 Pakuti zoonadi anasonkhanidwa m'mudzi muno Herode, ndi Pontio Pilato yemwe pamodzi ndi amitundu ndi anthu a Israele kumchitira choipa Mwana wanu wopatulika Yesu amene munamdzoza;" 
Acts4:28 kuti achite zilizonse dzanja lanu ndi uphungu wanu zidaweruziratu zichitike. 
Acts4:29 Ndipo tsopano Ambuye, penyani mau ao akuopsa, ndipo patsani kwa akapolo anu alankhule mau anu ndi kulimbika mtima konse," 
Acts4:30 m'mene mutambasula dzanja lanu kukachiritsa; ndi kuti zizindikiro ndi zozizwa zichitidwe mwa dzina la Mwana wanu wopatulika Yesu. 
Acts4:31 Ndipo m'mene adapemphera iwo, panagwedezeka pamalo pamene adasonkhanirapo; ndipo anadzazidwa onse ndi Mzimu Woyera, nalankhula mau a Mulungu molimbika mtima." 
Acts4:32 Ndipo unyinji wa iwo akukhulupirira anali wa mtima umodzi ndi moyo umodzi; ndipo sananena mmodzi kuti kanthu ka chuma anali nacho ndi kake ka iye yekha; koma anali nazo zonse zodyerana. 
Acts4:33 Ndipo atumwi anachita umboni ndi mphamvu yaikulu za kuuka kwa Ambuye Yesu; ndipo panali chisomo chachikulu pa iwo onse. 
Acts4:34 Pakuti mwa iwo munalibe wosowa; pakuti onse amene anali nayo minda, kapena nyumba, anazigulitsa nabwera nao malonda ake a izo adazigulitsa," 
Acts4:35 nawaika pa mapazi a atumwi; ndipo anagawira yense monga kusowa kwake. 
Acts4:36 Ndipo Yosefe, wotchedwa ndi atumwi Barnabasi (ndilo losandulika mwana wa chisangalalo), Mlevi, fuko lake la ku Kipro," 
Acts4:37 pokhala nao munda, anaugulitsa, nabwera nazo ndalama zake, naziika pa mapazi a atumwi." 
Acts5:1 Koma munthu wina dzina lake Ananiya pamodzi ndi Safira mkazi wake," 
Acts5:2 anagulitsa chao, napatula pa mtengo wake, mkazi yemwe anadziwa, natenga chotsala, nachiika pa mapazi a atumwi." 
Acts5:3 Koma Petro anati, Ananiya, Satana anadzaza mtima wako chifukwa ninji kudzanyenga Mzimu Woyera, ndi kupatula pa mtengo wake wa mundawo?" 
Acts5:4 Pamene unali nao, sunali wako kodi? Ndipo pamene unagulitsa sunali m'manja mwako kodi? Bwanji chinalowa ichi mumtima mwako? Sunanyenga anthu, komatu Mulungu." 
Acts5:5 Koma Ananiya pakumva mau awa anagwa pansi namwalira: ndipo mantha akulu anagwera onse akumvawo. 
Acts5:6 Ndipo ananyamuka anyamata, namkulunga, namnyamula, natuluka naye, namuika." 
Acts5:7 Koma atapita monga maora atatu, ndipo mkazi wake, wosadziwa chidachitikacho, analowa." 
Acts5:8 Ndipo Petro ananena naye, Undiuze, ngati munagulitsa mundawo pa mtengo wakuti. Ndipo ananena, Inde, wakuti." 
Acts5:9 Koma Petro anati kwa iye, Munapangana pamodzi bwanji kuyesa Mzimu wa Ambuye? Taona, mapazi ao a iwo amene anaika mwamuna wako ali pakhomo, ndipo adzakunyamula kutuluka nawe." 
Acts5:10 Ndipo anagwa pansi pomwepo pa mapazi ake, namwalira; ndipo analowa anyamatawo, nampeza iye wafa, ndipo anamnyamula kutuluka naye, namuika kwa mwamuna wake." 
Acts5:11 Ndipo anadza mantha akulu pa Mpingo wonse, ndi pa onse akumva izi." 
Acts5:12 Ndipo mwa manja a atumwi zizindikiro ndi zozizwa zambiri zinachitidwa pa anthu; ndipo anali onse ndi mtima umodzi m'khonde la Solomoni. 
Acts5:13 Koma palibe mmodzi wa otsalawo analimba mtima kuphatikana nao; komatu anthu anawakuzitsa; 
Acts5:14 ndipo makamaka anaonjezedwa kwa Ambuye okhulupirira ambiri, ndiwo amuna ndi akazi;" 
Acts5:15 kotero kuti ananyamulanso natuluka nao odwala kumakwalala, nawaika pamakama ndi pamphasa, kuti, popita Petro, ngakhale chithunzi chake chigwere wina wa iwo." 
Acts5:16 Komanso unasonkhana pamodzi unyinji wa anthu ochokera kumidzi yozungulira Yerusalemu, alikutenga odwala, ndi ovutika ndi mizimu yonyansa; ndipo anachiritsidwa onsewa." 
Acts5:17 Koma anauka mkulu wa ansembe ndi onse amene anali naye, ndiwo a chipatuko cha Asaduki, nadukidwa," 
Acts5:18 nathira manja atumwi, nawaika m'ndende ya anthu wamba." 
Acts5:19 Koma mngelo wa Ambuye anatsegula pakhomo pa ndende usiku, nawatulutsa, nati," 
Acts5:20 Pitani, ndipo imirirani, nimulankhule m'Kachisi kwa anthu onse mau a Moyo umene." 
Acts5:21 Ndipo atamva ichi, analowa m'Kachisi mbandakucha, naphunzitsa. Koma anadza mkulu wa ansembe ndi iwo amene anali naye, nasonkhanitsa a bwalo la akulu, ndi akulu onse a ana a Israele, natuma kundende atengedwe ajawo." 
Acts5:22 Koma anyamata amene adafikako sanawapeza m'ndende, ndipo pobwera anafotokoza," 
Acts5:23 nanena, Nyumba yandende tinapeza chitsekere, ndi alonda alikuimirira pamakomo; koma pamene tinatsegula sitinapezamo mmodzi yense." 
Acts5:24 Koma m'mene anamva mau awa mdindo wa Kachisi ndi ansembe aakulu anathedwa nzeru ndi iwo aja, kuti ichi chidzatani." 
Acts5:25 Ndipo anadza wina nawafotokozera, kuti, Taonani, amuna aja mudawaika m'ndende ali m'Kachisi, alikuimirira ndi kuphunzitsa anthu." 
Acts5:26 Pamenepo anachoka mdindo pamodzi ndi anyamata; anadza nao, koma osawagwiritsa, pakuti anaopa anthu, angaponyedwe miyala." 
Acts5:27 Ndipo m'mene adadza nao, anawaika pa bwalo la akulu. Ndipo anawafunsa mkulu wa ansembe," 
Acts5:28 nanena, Tidakulamulirani chilamulire, musaphunzitsa kutchula dzina ili; ndipo taonani, mwadzaza Yerusalemu ndi chiphunzitso chanu, ndipo mufuna kutidzetsera ife mwazi wa munthu uja." 
Acts5:29 Ndipo anayankha Petro ndi atumwi, nati, Tiyenera kumvera Mulungu koposa anthu." 
Acts5:30 Mulungu wa makolo athu anaukitsa Yesu, amene munamupha inu, ndi kumpachika pamtengo." 
Acts5:31 Ameneyo Mulungu anamkweza ndi dzanja lake lamanja, akhale Mtsogoleri ndi Mpulumutsi, kuti apatse kwa Israele kulapa, ndi chikhululukiro cha machimo." 
Acts5:32 Ndipo ife ndife mboni za zinthu izi; Mzimu Woyeranso, amene Mulungu anapatsa kwa iwo akumvera Iye." 
Acts5:33 Koma m'mene anamva iwo analaswa mtima, nafuna kuwapha." 
Acts5:34 Koma ananyamukapo wina pa bwalo la akulu, ndiye Mfarisi, dzina lake Gamaliele, mphunzitsi wa chilamulo, wochitidwa ulemu ndi anthu onse, nalamula kuti atumwiwo akhale kunja pang'ono." 
Acts5:35 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Amuna inu a Israele, kadzichenjerani nokha za anthu awa, chimene muti muwachitire." 
Acts5:36 Pakuti asanafike masiku ano anauka Teudasi, nanena kuti ali kanthu iye mwini; amene anthu anaphatikana naye, chiwerengero chao ngati mazana anai; ndiye anaphedwa; ndi onse amene anamvera iye anamwazika, napita pachabe." 
Acts5:37 Atapita ameneyo, anauka Yudasi wa ku Galileya, masiku a kulembedwa, nakopa anthu amtsate. Iyeyunso anaonongeka, ndi onse amene anamvera iye anabalalitsidwa." 
Acts5:38 Ndipo tsopano ndinena ndi inu, Lekani anthu amenewa, nimuwalole akhale; pakuti ngati uphungu umene kapena ntchito iyi ichokera kwa anthu, idzapasuka;" 
Acts5:39 koma ngati ichokera kwa Mulungu simungathe kuwapasula; kuti kapena mungapezeke otsutsana ndi Mulungu. 
Acts5:40 Ndipo anavomerezana ndi iye; ndipo m'mene adaitana atumwi, anawakwapula nawalamulira asalankhule kutchula dzina la Yesu, ndipo anawamasula." 
Acts5:41 Pamenepo ndipo anapita kuchokera kubwalo la akulu, nakondwera kuti anayesedwa oyenera kunyozedwa chifukwa cha dzinalo." 
Acts5:42 Ndipo masiku onse, m'Kachisi ndi m'nyumba, sanaleka kuphunzitsa ndi kulalikira Khristu Yesu." 
Acts6:1 Koma masiku awo, pakuchulukitsa ophunzira, kunauka chidandaulo, Agriki kudandaula pa Ahebri, popeza amasiye ao anaiwalika pa chitumikiro cha tsiku ndi tsiku." 
Acts6:2 Ndipo khumi ndi awiriwo anaitana unyinji wa ophunzira, nati, Sikuyenera kuti ife tisiye kulalikira mau a Mulungu ndi kutumikira podyerapo." 
Acts6:3 Chifukwa chake, abale, yang'anani mwa inu amuna asanu ndi awiri a mbiri yabwino, odzala ndi Mzimu ndi nzeru, amene tikawaike asunge ntchito iyi." 
Acts6:4 Koma ife tidzalimbika m'kupemphera, ndi kutumikira mau." 
Acts6:5 Ndipo mau amene anakonda unyinji wonse; ndipo anasankha Stefano, ndiye munthu wodzala ndi chikhulupiriro ndi Mzimu Woyera, ndi Filipo, ndi Prokoro, ndi Nikanore ndi Timoni, ndi Parmenasi, ndi Nikolasi, ndiye wopinduka wa ku Antiokeya:" 
Acts6:6 amenewo anawaika pamaso pa atumwi; ndipo m'mene adapemphera, anaika manja pa iwo." 
Acts6:7 Ndipo mau a Mulungu anakula; ndipo chiwerengero cha ophunzira chidachulukatu ku Yerusalemu; ndipo khamu lalikulu la ansembe linamvera chikhulupirirocho. 
Acts6:8 Ndipo Stefano, wodzala ndi chisomo ndi mphamvu, anachita zozizwa ndi zizindikiro zazikulu mwa anthu." 
Acts6:9 Koma anauka ena a iwo ochokera m'sunagoge wa Alibertino, ndi Akirene, ndi Aaleksandriya, ndi mwa iwo a ku Silisiya ndi ku Asiya, natsutsana ndi Stefano." 
Acts6:10 Ndipo sanathe kuilaka nzeru ndi Mzimu amene analankhula naye. 
Acts6:11 Pamenepo anafuna anthu akumpitira pansi, ndi kuti, Tidamumva iye alikunenera Mose ndi Mulungu mau amwano." 
Acts6:12 Ndipo anautsa anthu, ndi akulu, ndi alembi, namfikira, namgwira iye, nadza naye kubwalo la akulu," 
Acts6:13 naimika mboni zonama, zakunena, Munthu ameneyo saleka kunenera malo oyera amene, ndi chilamulo;" 
Acts6:14 pakuti tinamumva iye alikunena, kuti, Yesu Mnazarayo amene adzaononga malo ano, nadzasanduliza miyambo imene Mose anatipatsa." 
Acts6:15 Ndipo anampenyetsetsa onse akukhala m'bwalo la akulu, naona nkhope yake ngati nkhope ya mngelo." 
Acts7:1 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe anati, Zitero izi kodi?" 
Acts7:2 Ndipo Stefano anati, Amuna inu, abale, ndi atate, tamverani. Mulungu wa ulemerero anaonekera kwa kholo lathu Abrahamu, pokhala iye m'Mesopotamiya, asanayambe kukhala m'Harani;" 
Acts7:3 nati kwa iye, Tuluka kudziko lako ndi kwa abale ako, ndipo tiye kudziko limene ndidzakusonyeza iwe." 
Acts7:4 Pamenepo anatuluka m'dziko la Akaldeya namanga m'Harani: ndipo, kuchokera kumeneko, atamwalira atate wake, Mulungu anamsuntha alowe m'dziko lino, m'mene mukhalamo tsopano;" 
Acts7:5 ndipo sanampatsa cholowa chake m'menemo, ngakhale popondapo phazi lake iai; ndipo anamlonjezera iye kuti adzampatsa ili, likhale lake, ndi la mbeu yake yomtsatira, angakhale analibe mwana pamenepo." 
Acts7:6 Koma Mulungu analankhula chotero, kuti mbeu yake idzakhala alendo m'dziko la eni, ndipo adzawachititsa ukapolo, nadzawachitira choipa, zaka mazana anai." 
Acts7:7 Ndipo mtundu amene udzawayesa akapolo, ndidzauweruza Ine, anatero Mulungu; ndipo zitapita izi adzatuluka, nadzanditumikira Ine m'malo muno." 
Acts7:8 Ndipo anampatsa iye chipangano cha mdulidwe; ndipo kotero Abrahamu anabala Isaki, namdula tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu; ndi Isaki anabala Yakobo, ndi Yakobo anabala makolo akulu aja khumi ndi awiri." 
Acts7:9 Ndipo makolo akuluwa podukidwa naye Yosefe, anamgulitsa amuke naye ku Ejipito; ndipo Mulungu anali naye," 
Acts7:10 namlanditsa iye m'zisautso zake zonse, nampatsa chisomo ndi nzeru pamaso pa Farao mfumu ya ku Ejipito; ndipo anamuika iye kazembe wa pa Ejipito ndi pa nyumba yake yonse." 
Acts7:11 Koma inadza njala pa Ejipito ndi Kanani lonse, ndi chisautso chachikulu; ndipo sanapeza chakudya makolo athu." 
Acts7:12 Koma pakumva Yakobo kuti muli tirigu m'Ejipito, anatuma makolo athu ulendo woyamba." 
Acts7:13 Ndipo pa ulendo wachiwiri Yosefe anazindikirika ndi abale ake; ndipo fuko la Yosefe linaonekera kwa Farao. 
Acts7:14 Ndipo Yosefe anatumiza, naitana Yakobo atate wake, ndi a banja lake lonse, ndiwo anthu makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu asanu." 
Acts7:15 Ndipo Yakobo anatsikira ku Ejipito; ndipo anamwalira, iye ndi makolo athu;" 
Acts7:16 ndipo anawanyamula kupita nao ku Sekemu, nawaika m'manda amene Abrahamu adagula ndi mtengo wake wa ndalama kwa ana a Hamori m'Sekemu." 
Acts7:17 Koma m'mene inayandikira nthawi ya lonjezo limene Mulungu adalonjezana ndi Abrahamu, anthuwo anakula nachuluka m'Ejipito," 
Acts7:18 kufikira inauka mfumu ina pa Ejipito, imene siinamdziwa Yosefe." 
Acts7:19 Imeneyo inachenjerera fuko lathu, niwachitira choipa makolo athu, niwatayitsa tiana tao, kuti tingakhale ndi moyo." 
Acts7:20 Nyengo yomweyo anabadwa Mose, ndiye wokoma ndithu pamaso pa Mulungu; ndipo anamlera miyezi itatu m'nyumba ya atate wake:" 
Acts7:21 ndipo pakutayika iye, anamtola mwana wamkazi wa Farao, namlera akhale mwana wake." 
Acts7:22 Ndipo Mose anaphunzira nzeru zonse za Aejipito; nali wamphamvu m'mau ake ndi m'ntchito zake. 
Acts7:23 Koma pamene zaka zake zinafikira ngati makumi anai, kunalowa mumtima mwake kuzonda abale ake ana a Israele." 
Acts7:24 Ndipo pakuona wina woti alikumchitira choipa, iye anamtchinjiriza, nambwezera chilango wozunzayo, nakantha Mwejipito." 
Acts7:25 Ndipo anayesa kuti abale ake akazindikira kuti Mulungu alikuwapatsa chipulumutso mwa dzanja lake; koma sanazindikira. 
Acts7:26 Ndipo m'mawa mwake anawaonekera alikulimbana ndeu, ndipo anati awateteze, ayanjanenso, nati, Amuna inu, muli abale; muchitirana choipa bwanji?" 
Acts7:27 Koma iye wakumchitira mnzake choipa anamkankha, nati, Wakuika iwe ndani mkulu ndi wotiweruzira?" 
Acts7:28 Kodi ufuna kundipha ine, monga muja unapha Mwejipito dzulo?" 
Acts7:29 Ndipo Mose anathawa pa mau awa, nakhala mlendo m'dziko la Midiyani; kumeneko anabala ana amuna awiri." 
Acts7:30 Ndipo zitapita zaka makumi anai, anamuonekera mngelo m'chipululu cha Sinai, m'lawi la moto wa m'chitsamba." 
Acts7:31 Koma Mose pakuona, anazizwa pa choonekacho; ndipo pakuyandikira iye kukaona, kunadza mau a Ambuye," 
Acts7:32 akuti, Ine ndine Mulungu wa makolo anu, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi wa Isaki, ndi wa Yakobo. Ndipo Mose ananthunthumira, osalimbika mtima kupenyetsako." 
Acts7:33 Ndipo Ambuye anati kwa iye, Masula nsapato kumapazi ako; pakuti pa malo amene upondapo mpopatulika." 
Acts7:34 Kuona ndaona choipidwa nacho anthu anga ali m'Ejipito, ndipo amva kubuula kwao; ndipo ndatsika kuwalanditsa; ndipo tsopano, tiye kuno, ndikutume ku Ejipito." 
Acts7:35 Mose uyu amene anamkana, ndi kuti, Wakuika iwe ndani mkulu ndi woweruza? Ameneyo Mulungu anamtuma akhale mkulu, ndi mombolo, ndi dzanja la mngelo womuonekera pachitsamba." 
Acts7:36 Ameneyo anawatsogolera, natuluka nao atachita zozizwa ndi zizindikiro m'Ejipito, ndi m'Nyanja Yofiira, ndi m'chipululu zaka makumi anai." 
Acts7:37 Uyu ndi Mose uja adati kwa ana a Israele, Mulungu adzakuutsirani Mneneri wa mwa abale anu, monga ine." 
Acts7:38 Uyu ndiye amene anali mu Mpingo m'chipululu pamodzi ndi mngelo wakulankhula naye m'phiri la Sinai, ndi makolo athu: amene analandira maneno amoyo akutipatsa ife;" 
Acts7:39 amene makolo athu sanafuna kumvera iye, koma anamkankha achoke, nabwerera m'mbuyo mumtima mwao ku Ejipito," 
Acts7:40 nati ndi Aroni, Tipangireni milungu yotitsogolera ife; pakuti Mose uja, amene anatitulutsa m'Ejipito, sitidziwa chomwe chamgwera." 
Acts7:41 Ndipo anapanga mwanawang'ombe masiku omwewo, nabwera nayo nsembe kwa fanolo, nasekerera ndi ntchito za manja ao." 
Acts7:42 Koma Mulungu anatembenuka, nawapereka iwo atumikire gulu la kumwamba; monga kwalembedwa m'buku la aneneri, Kodi mwapereka kwa Ine nyama zophedwa ndi nsembe zaka makumi anai m'chipululu, nyumba ya Israele inu?" 
Acts7:43 Ndipo munatenga chihema cha Moleki, ndi nyenyezi ya mulungu Refani, zithunzizo mudazipanga kuzilambira; ndipo ndidzakutengani kunka nanu m'tsogolo mwake mwa Babiloni." 
Acts7:44 Chihema cha umboni chinali ndi makolo athu m'chipululu, monga adalamula Iye wakulankhula ndi Mose, achipange ichi monga mwa chithunzicho adachiona." 
Acts7:45 Chimenenso makolo athu akudza m'mbuyo, analowa nacho ndi Yoswa polandira iwo zao za amitundu, amene Mulungu anawaingitsa pamaso pa makolo athu, kufikira masiku a Davide;" 
Acts7:46 amene anapeza chisomo pamaso pa Mulungu, napempha kuti apeze mokhalamo Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Acts7:47 Koma Solomoni anammangira nyumba. 
Acts7:48 Komatu Wamwambamwambayo sakhala m'nyumba zomangidwa ndi manja; monga mneneri anena," 
Acts7:49 Thambo la kumwamba ndilo mpando wachifumu wanga, ndi dziko lapansi chopondapo mapazi anga. Mudzandimangira nyumba yotani, ati Ambuye, kapena malo a mpumulo wanga ndi otani?" 
Acts7:50 Silinapanga dzanja langa zinthu izi zonse kodi? 
Acts7:51 Ouma khosi ndi osadulidwa mtima ndi makutu inu, mukaniza Mzimu Woyera nthawi zonse; monga anachita makolo anu, momwemo inu." 
Acts7:52 Ndiye yani wa aneneri makolo anu sanamzunza? Ndipo anawapha iwo amene anaonetseratu za kudza kwake kwa Wolungamayo; wa Iye amene mwakhala tsopano akumpereka ndi akumupha; 
Acts7:53 inu amene munalandira chilamulo monga chidaikidwa ndi angelo, ndipo simunachisunga." 
Acts7:54 Koma pakumva izi analaswa mtima, namkukutira mano." 
Acts7:55 Koma iye, pokhala wodzala ndi Mzimu Woyera, anapenyetsetsa Kumwamba, naona ulemerero wa Mulungu, ndi Yesu alikuimirira pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu," 
Acts7:56 nati, Taonani, ndipenya m'Mwamba motseguka, ndi Mwana wa Munthu alikuimirira pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu." 
Acts7:57 Koma anafuula ndi mau akulu, natseka m'makutu mwao, namgumukira iye ndi mtima umodzi;" 
Acts7:58 ndipo anamtaya kunja kwa mudzi, namponya miyala; ndipo mbonizo zinaika zovala zao pa mapazi a mnyamata dzina lake Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Ndipo anamponya miyala Stefano, alikuitana Ambuye, ndi kunena, Ambuye Yesu, landirani mzimu wanga." 
Acts7:60 Ndipo m'mene anagwada pansi, anafuula ndi mau akulu, Ambuye, musawaikire iwo tchimo ili. Ndipo m'mene adanena ichi, anagona tulo." 
Acts8:1 Ndipo Saulo analikuvomerezana nao pa imfa yake. Ndipo tsikulo kunayamba kuzunza kwakukulu pa Mpingo unali m'Yerusalemu; ndipo anabalalitsidwa onse m'maiko a Yudeya ndi Samariya, koma osati atumwi ai." 
Acts8:2 Ndipo anamuika Stefano anthu opembedza, namlira maliro akulu." 
Acts8:3 Ndipo Saulo anapasula Mpingo, nalowa nyumba ndi nyumba, nakokamo amuna ndi akazi, nawaika m'ndende." 
Acts8:4 Pamenepo ndipo iwo akubalalitsidwa anapitapita nalalikira mauwo. 
Acts8:5 Ndipo Filipo anatsikira kumudzi wa ku Samariya, nawalalikira iwo Khristu." 
Acts8:6 Ndipo makamuwo ndi mtima umodzi anasamalira zonenedwa ndi Filipo, pamene anamva, napenya zizindikiro zimene anazichita." 
Acts8:7 Pakuti ambiri a iwo akukhala nayo mizimu yonyansa inawatulukira, yofuula ndi mau akulu; ndipo ambiri amanjenje, ndi opunduka, anachiritsidwa." 
Acts8:8 Ndipo panakhala chimwemwe chachikulu m'mudzimo. 
Acts8:9 Koma panali munthu dzina lake Simoni amene adachita matsenga m'mudzimo kale, nadabwitsa anthu a Samariya, ndi kunena kuti iye yekha ndiye munthu wamkulu;" 
Acts8:10 ameneyo anamsamalira onsewo, kuyambira wamng'ono kufikira wamkulu, ndi kunena, Uyu ndiye mphamvu ya Mulungu, yonenedwa Yaikulu." 
Acts8:11 Ndipo anamsamalira iye, popeza nthawi yaikulu adawadabwitsa iwo ndi matsenga ake." 
Acts8:12 Koma pamene anakhulupirira Filipo wakulalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa Ufumu wa Mulungu ndi dzina la Yesu Khristu, anabatizidwa, amuna ndi akazi." 
Acts8:13 Ndipo Simoni mwini wake anakhulupiriranso: ndipo m'mene anabatizidwa, anakhalira ndi Filipo; ndipo pakuona zizindikiro ndi mphamvu zazikulu zilikuchitika, anadabwa." 
Acts8:14 Koma pamene atumwi a ku Yerusalemu anamva kuti Samariya adalandira mau a Mulungu, anawatumizira Petro ndi Yohane;" 
Acts8:15 amenewo, m'mene adatsikirako, anawapempherera, kuti alandire Mzimu Woyera:" 
Acts8:16 pakuti kufikira pamenepo nkuti asanagwe pa wina mmodzi wa iwo; koma anangobatizidwa m'dzina la Ambuye Yesu. 
Acts8:17 Pamenepo anaika manja pa iwo, ndipo analandira Mzimu Woyera." 
Acts8:18 Koma pakuona Simoni kuti mwa kuika manja a atumwi anapatsidwa Mzimu Woyera, anawatengera ndalama," 
Acts8:19 nanena, Ndipatseni inenso ulamuliro umene, kuti amene aliyense ndikaika manja pa iye, alandire Mzimu Woyera." 
Acts8:20 Koma Petro anati kwa iye, Ndalama yako itayike nawe, chifukwa unalingirira kulandira mphatso ya Mulungu ndi ndalama." 
Acts8:21 Ulibe gawo kapena cholandira ndi mau awa; pakuti mtima wako suli wolunjika pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Acts8:22 Chifukwa chake lapa choipa chako ichi, pemphera Ambuye, kuti kapena akukhululukire iwe cholingirira cha mtima wako." 
Acts8:23 Pakuti ndiona kuti wagwidwa ndi ndulu yowawa ndi nsinga ya chosalungama. 
Acts8:24 Ndipo Simoni anayankha nati, Mundipempherere ine kwa Ambuye kuti zisandigwere izi mwanenazi." 
Acts8:25 Pamenepo iwo, atatha kuchita umboni ndi kulankhula mau a Ambuye, anabwera kunka ku Yerusalemu, nalalikira Uthenga Wabwino kumidzi yambiri ya Asamariya." 
Acts8:26 Koma mngelo wa Ambuye analankhula ndi Filipo, nanena, Nyamuka, nupite mbali ya kumwera, kutsata njira yotsika kuchokera ku Yerusalemu kunka ku Gaza; ndiyo ya chipululu." 
Acts8:27 Ndipo ananyamuka napita; ndipo taona munthu wa ku Etiopiya, mdindo wamphamvu wa Kandake, mfumu yaikazi ya Aetiopiya, ndiye wakusunga chuma chake chonse, amene anadza ku Yerusalemu kudzapemphera;" 
Acts8:28 ndipo analinkubwerera, nalikukhala pa galeta wake, nawerenga mneneri Yesaya." 
Acts8:29 Ndipo Mzimu anati kwa Filipo, Yandikira, nudziphatike kugaleta uyu." 
Acts8:30 Ndipo Filipo anamthamangira, namva iye alikuwerenga Yesaya mneneri, ndipo anati, Kodi muzindikira chimene muwerenga?" 
Acts8:31 Koma anati, Ndingathe bwanji, popanda munthu wonditsogolera ine? Ndipo anapempha Filipo akwere nakhale naye." 
Acts8:32 Koma palembo pamene analikuwerengapo ndipo: Ngati nkhosa anatengedwa kukaphedwa, ndi monga mwanawankhosa ali duu pamaso pa womsenga, kotero sanatsegula pakamwa pake." 
Acts8:33 M'kuchepetsedwa kwake chiweruzo chake chinachotsedwa; mbadwo wake adzaubukitsa ndani? Chifukwa wachotsedwa kudziko moyo wake. 
Acts8:34 Ndipo mdindoyo anayankha Filipo, nati, Ndikupempha, mneneri anena ichi za yani? Za yekha, kapena za wina?" 
Acts8:35 Ndipo Filipo anatsegula pakamwa pake, nayamba pa lembo ili, nalalikira kwa iye Yesu." 
Acts8:36 Ndipo monga anapita panjira pao, anadza kumadzi akuti; ndipo mdindoyo anati, Taonapo madzi; chindiletsa ine chiyani ndisabatizidwe?" 
Acts8:37  
Acts8:38 Ndipo anamuuza kuti aimitse galeta; ndipo anatsikira onse awiri kumadzi, Filipo ndi mdindoyo; ndipo anambatiza iye." 
Acts8:39 Ndipo pamene anakwera kutuluka m'madzi, Mzimu wa Ambuye anakwatula Filipo; ndipo mdindo sanamuonanso, pakuti anapita njira yake wokondwera." 
Acts8:40 Koma Filipo anapezedwa ku Azoto; ndipo popitapita analalikira Uthenga Wabwino m'midzi yonse, kufikira anadza iye ku Kesareya." 
Acts9:1 Koma Saulo, wosaleka kupumira pa ophunzira a Ambuye kuopsa ndi kupha, ananka kwa mkulu wa ansembe," 
Acts9:2 napempha kwa iye akalata akunka nao ku Damasiko ku masunagoge, kuti akapeza ena otsata Njirayo, amuna ndi akazi, akawatenge kudza nao omangidwa ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts9:3 Ndipo poyenda ulendo wake, kunali kuti iye anayandikira Damasiko: ndipo mwadzidzidzi kudawala momzingira kuunika kochokera kumwamba;" 
Acts9:4 ndipo anagwa pansi, namva mau akunena naye, Saulo, Saulo, Undilondalonderanji?" 
Acts9:5 Koma anati, Ndinu yani Mbuye? Ndipo anati, Ndine Yesu amene umlondalonda;" 
Acts9:6 komatu, uka, nulowe m'mudzi, ndipo kudzanenedwa kwa iwe chimene uyenera kuchita." 
Acts9:7 Ndipo amunawo akumperekeza iye anaima duu, atamvadi mau, koma osaona munthu." 
Acts9:8 Ndipo Saulo anauka; koma potseguka maso ake, sanapenya kanthu; ndipo anamgwira dzanja, namtenga nalowa naye m'Damasiko." 
Acts9:9 Ndipo anakhala masiku atatu wosaona, ndipo sanadya kapena kumwa." 
Acts9:10 Koma ku Damasiko kunali wophunzira wina dzina lake Ananiya; ndipo Ambuye anati kwa iye m'masomphenya, Ananiya. Ndipo anati, Ndili pano, Ambuye," 
Acts9:11 Ndipo Ambuye anati kwa iye, Tauka, pita ku khwalala lotchedwa Lolunjika, ndipo m'nyumba ya Yudasi ufunse za munthu dzina lake Saulo, wa ku Tariso: pakuti taona, alikupemphera" 
Acts9:12 ndipo anaona mwamuna dzina lake Ananiya, alikulowa, namuika manja, kuti apenyenso." 
Acts9:13 Ndipo Ananiya anayankha nati, Ambuye, ndamva ndi ambiri za munthu uyu, kuti anachitiradi choipa oyera mtima anu m'Yerusalemu;" 
Acts9:14 ndi kuti pano ali nao ulamuliro wa kwa ansembe aakulu wakumanga onse akuitana pa dzina lanu. 
Acts9:15 Koma Ambuye anati kwa iye, Pita; pakuti iye ndiye chotengera changa chosankhika, chakunyamula dzina langa pamaso pa amitundu ndi mafumu ndi ana a Israele;" 
Acts9:16 pakuti Ine ndidzamuonetsa iye zinthu zambiri ayenera iye kuzimva kuwawa chifukwa cha dzina langa. 
Acts9:17 Ndipo anachoka Ananiya, nalowa m'nyumbayo; ndipo anaika manja ake pa iye, nati, Saulo, mbale, Ambuye wandituma ine, ndiye Yesu amene anakuonekerani pa njira wadzerayo, kuti upenyenso, ndi kudzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera." 
Acts9:18 Ndipo pomwepo padagwa kuchoka m'maso mwake ngati mamba, ndipo anapenyanso; ndipo ananyamuka nabatizidwa;" 
Acts9:19 ndipo analandira chakudya, naona nacho mphamvu. Ndipo anakhala pamodzi ndi ophunzira a ku Damasiko masiku ena." 
Acts9:20 Ndipo pomwepo m'masunagoge analalikira Yesu, kuti Iye ndiye Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Acts9:21 Ndipo onse amene anamva anadabwa, nanena, Suyu iye amene anaononga m'Yerusalemu onse akuitana pa dzina ili? Ndipo wadza kuno kudzatero, kuti amuke nao omangidwa kwa ansembe aakulu." 
Acts9:22 Koma Saulo anakula makamaka mumphamvu, nadodometsa Ayuda akukhala m'Damasiko, nawatsimikizira kuti ameneyo ndi Khristu." 
Acts9:23 Ndipo atapita masiku ambiri, Ayuda anapangana kuti amuphe iye;" 
Acts9:24 koma chiwembu chao chinadziwika ndi Saulo. Ndipo anadikiranso pazipata usana ndi usiku kuti amuphe; 
Acts9:25 koma ophunzira ake anamtenga usiku, nampyoletsa palinga, namtsitsa mu dengu." 
Acts9:26 Koma m'mene anafika ku Yerusalemu, anayesa kudziphatika kwa ophunzira; ndipo anamuopa iye onse, osakhulupirira kuti ali wophunzira." 
Acts9:27 Koma Barnabasi anamtenga, napita naye kwa atumwi, nawafotokozera umo adaonera Ambuye m'njira, ndi kuti analankhula naye, ndi kuti m'Damasiko adanena molimbika mtima m'dzina la Yesu." 
Acts9:28 Ndipo anali pamodzi nao, nalowa natuluka ku Yerusalemu," 
Acts9:29 nanena molimbika mtima m'dzina la Ambuye; ndipotu analankhula natsutsana ndi Agriki; koma anayesayesa kumupha iye. 
Acts9:30 Koma m'mene abale anachidziwa, anapita naye ku Kesareya, namtumiza achokeko kunka ku Tariso." 
Acts9:31 Pamenepo ndipo Mpingo wa m'Yudeya lonse ndi Galileya ndi Samariya unali nao mtendere, nukhazikika; ndipo unayenda m'kuopa kwa Ambuye ndi m'chitonthozo cha Mzimu Woyera, nuchuluka." 
Acts9:32 Koma kunali, pakupita Petro ponseponse, anatsikiranso kwa oyera mtima akukhala ku Lida." 
Acts9:33 Ndipo anapeza kumeneko munthu dzina lake Eneya, amene anagonera pamphasa zaka zisanu ndi zitatu; amene anagwidwa manjenje." 
Acts9:34 Ndipo Petro anati kwa iye, Eneya, Yesu Khristu akuchiritsa iwe; uka, yalula mphasa yako. Ndipo anauka pomwepo." 
Acts9:35 Ndipo anamuona iye onse akukhala ku Lida ndi ku Saroni, natembenukira kwa Ambuye amenewa." 
Acts9:36 Koma m'Yopa munali wophunzira dzina lake Tabita, ndilo kunena Dorika; mkazi ameneyo anadzala ndi ntchito zabwino ndi zachifundo zimene anazichita." 
Acts9:37 Ndipo kunali m'masiku awa, kuti anadwala iye, namwalira; ndipo atamsambitsa iye anamgoneka m'chipinda chapamwamba." 
Acts9:38 Ndipo popeza Lida ndi pafupi pa Yopa, m'mene anamva ophunzirawo kuti Petro anali pomwepo, anamtumizira anthu awiri, namdandaulira, Musachedwa mudze kwa ife." 
Acts9:39 Ndipo Petro ananyamuka, napita nao. M'mene anafikako, anapita naye kuchipinda chapamwamba; ndipo amasiye onse anaimirirapo pali iye, nalira, namuonetsa malaya ndi zovala zimene Dorika adasoka, pamene anali nao pamodzi." 
Acts9:40 Koma Petro anawatulutsa onse, nagwada pansi, napemphera; ndipo potembenukira kumtembo anati, Tabita, uka. Ndipo anatsegula maso ake; ndipo pakuona Petro, anakhala tsonga." 
Acts9:41 Ndipo Petro anamgwira dzanja, namnyamutsa; ndipo m'mene adaitana oyera mtima ndi amasiye, anampereka iye wamoyo." 
Acts9:42 Ndipo kudadziwika ku Yopa konse: ndipo ambiri anakhulupirira Ambuye. 
Acts9:43 Ndipo kunali, kuti anakhala iye m'Yopa masiku ambiri ndi munthu Simoni wofufuta zikopa." 
Acts10:1 Ndipo kunali munthu ku Kesareya, dzina lake Kornelio, kenturiyo wa gulu lotchedwa la Italiya," 
Acts10:2 ndiye munthu wopembedza, ndi wakuopa Mulungu ndi banja lake lonse, amene anapatsa anthu zachifundo zambiri, napemphera Mulungu kosaleka." 
Acts10:3 Iye anapenya m'masomphenya poyera, mngelo wa Mulungu alinkudza kwa iye, ngati ora lachisanu ndi chinai la usana, nanena naye, Kornelio." 
Acts10:4 Ndipo pompenyetsetsa iye ndi kuopa, anati, Nchiyani, Mbuye? Ndipo anati kwa iye, Mapemphero ako ndi zachifundo zako zinakwera zikhala chikumbutso pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Acts10:5 Ndipo tsopano tumiza amuna ku Yopa, aitane munthu Simoni, wotchedwanso Petro;" 
Acts10:6 acherezedwa iye ndi wina Simoni wofufuta zikopa, nyumba yake ili m'mbali mwa nyanja." 
Acts10:7 Ndipo m'mene atachoka mngelo amene adalankhula naye, anaitana anyamata ake awiri, ndi msilikali wopembedza, wa iwo amene amtumikira kosaleka;" 
Acts10:8 ndipo m'mene adawafotokozera zonse, anawatuma ku Yopa." 
Acts10:9 Koma m'mawa mwake, pokhala paulendo pao iwowa, m'mene anayandikira mudzi, Petro anakwera pachindwi kukapemphera, ngati pa ora lachisanu ndi chimodzi; ndipo anagwidwa njala, nafuna kudya;" 
Acts10:10 koma m'mene analikumkonzera chakudya kudamgwera ngati kukomoka; 
Acts10:11 ndipo anaona pathambo padatseguka, ndi chotengera chilinkutsika, chonga ngati chinsalu chachikulu, chogwiridwa pangodya zake zinai, ndi kutsikira padziko pansi;" 
Acts10:12 m'menemo munali nyama za miyendo inai za mitundu yonse, ndi zokwawa za padziko ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga." 
Acts10:13 Ndipo anamdzera mau, Tauka, Petro; ipha, mudye." 
Acts10:14 Koma Petro anati, Iaitu, Mbuye; pakuti sindinadya ine ndi kale lonse kanthu wamba ndi konyansa." 
Acts10:15 Ndipo mau anamdzeranso nthawi yachiwiri, Chimene Mulungu anayeretsa, usachiyesa chinthu wamba." 
Acts10:16 Ndipo chinachitika katatu ichi; ndipo pomwepo chotengeracho chinatengedwa kunka kumwamba. 
Acts10:17 Ndipo pokayikakayika Petro mwa yekha ndi kuti masomphenya adawaona akuti chiyani, taonani, amuna aja otumidwa ndi Kornelio, atafunsira nyumba ya Simoni, anaima pachipata," 
Acts10:18 ndipo anaitana nafunsa ngati Simoni, wotchedwanso Petro, acherezedwako." 
Acts10:19 Ndipo m'mene Petro analingirira za masomphenya, Mzimu anenana naye, Taona, amuna atatu akufuna iwe." 
Acts10:20 Komatu tauka, nutsike, ndipo upite nao, wosakayikakayika; pakuti ndawatuma ndine." 
Acts10:21 Ndipo Petro anatsikira kwa anthuwo, nati, Taonani, ine ndine amene mumfuna; chifukwa chake mwadzera nchiyani?" 
Acts10:22 Ndipo anati, Kornelio kenturiyoyo, munthu wolungama ndi wakuopa Mulungu, amene mtundu wonse wa Ayuda umchitira umboni, anachenjezedwa ndi mngelo woyera kuti atumize nakuitaneni mumuke kunyumba yake, ndi kumvetsa mau anu." 
Acts10:23 Pamenepo anawalowetsa nawachereza. Ndipo m'mawa mwake ananyamuka natuluka nao, ndi ena a abale a ku Yopa anamperekeza iye." 
Acts10:24 Ndipo m'mawa mwake analowa m'Kesareya. Koma Kornelio analikudikira iwo, atasonkhanitsa abale ake ndi mabwenzi ake enieni." 
Acts10:25 Ndipo panali pakulowa Petro, Kornelio anakomana naye, nagwa pa mapazi ake, namlambira." 
Acts10:26 Koma Petro anamuutsa iye, nanena, Nyamuka; inenso ndine munthu." 
Acts10:27 Ndipo pakukamba naye, analowa, napeza ambiri atasonkhana;" 
Acts10:28 ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mudziwa inu nokha kuti sikuloledwa kwa munthu Myuda adziphatike kapena kudza kwa munthu wa mtundu wina; koma Mulungu anandionetsera ine ndisanenere aliyense ali munthu wamba kapena wonyansa;" 
Acts10:29 chifukwa chakenso ndinadza wosakana, m'mene munatuma kundiitana. Pamenepo ndifunsa, mwandiitaniranji?" 
Acts10:30 Ndipo Kornelio anati, Atapita masiku anai, kufikira monga ora ili, ndinalikupemphera m'nyumba yanga pa ora lachisanu ndi chinai; ndipo taonani, padaimirira pamaso panga munthu wovala chovala chonyezimira," 
Acts10:31 nati Kornelio, lamveka pemphero lako, ndi zopereka zachifundo zako zakumbukika pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Acts10:32 Chifukwa chake tumiza anthu ku Yopa, akaitane Simoni amene anenedwanso Petro; amene acherezedwa m'nyumba ya Simoni wofufuta zikopa, m'mbali mwa nyanja." 
Acts10:33 Pamenepo ndinatumiza kwa inu osachedwa; ndipo mwachita bwino mwadza kuno. Chifukwa chake taonani tilitonse pano pamaso pa Mulungu, kumva zonse Ambuye anakulamulirani." 
Acts10:34 Ndipo Petro anatsegula pakamwa pake, nati, Zoona ndizindikira kuti Mulungu alibe tsankho;" 
Acts10:35 koma m'mitundu yonse, wakumuopa Iye ndi wakuchita chilungamo alandiridwa naye." 
Acts10:36 Mau amene anatumiza kwa ana a Israele, akulalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa mtendere mwa Yesu Khristu (ndiye Ambuye wa onse)" 
Acts10:37 mauwo muwadziwa inu, adadzawo ku Yudeya lonse, akuyamba ku Galileya, ndi ubatizo umene Yohane anaulalikira;" 
Acts10:38 za Yesu wa ku Nazarete, kuti Mulungu anamdzoza Iye ndi Mzimu Woyera ndi mphamvu; amene anapitapita nachita zabwino, nachiritsa onse osautsidwa ndi mdierekezi, pakuti Mulungu anali pamodzi ndi Iye." 
Acts10:39 Ndipo ife ndife mboni za zonse adazichita m'dziko la Ayuda ndi m'Yerusalemu; amenenso anamupha, nampachika pamtengo." 
Acts10:40 Ameneyo, Mulungu anamuukitsa tsiku lachitatu, nalola kuti aonetsedwe," 
Acts10:41 si kwa anthu onse ai, koma kwa mboni zosankhidwiratu ndi Mulungu, ndiwo ife amene tinadya ndi kumwa naye pamodzi, atauka iye kwa akufa." 
Acts10:42 Ndipo anatilamulira ife tilalikire kwa anthu, ndipo tichite umboni kuti Uyu ndiye amene aikidwa ndi Mulungu akhale woweruza amoyo ndi akufa." 
Acts10:43 Ameneyu aneneri onse amchitira umboni, kuti onse akumkhulupirira Iye adzalandira chikhululukiro cha machimo ao, mwa dzina lake." 
Acts10:44 Petro ali chilankhulire, Mzimu Woyera anagwa pa onse akumva mauwo." 
Acts10:45 Ndipo anadabwa okhulupirirawo akumdulidwe onse amene anadza ndi Petro, chifukwa pa amitundunso panathiridwa mphatso ya Mzimu Woyera." 
Acts10:46 Pakuti anawamva iwo alikulankhula ndi malilime, ndi kumkuza Mulungu. Pamenepo Petro anayankha," 
Acts10:47 Kodi pali munthu akhoza kuletsa madzi, kuti asabatizidwe awa, amene alandira Mzimu Woyera ngatinso ife?" 
Acts10:48 Ndipo analamulira iwo abatizidwe m'dzina la Yesu Khristu. Pamenepo anampempha iye atsotse masiku. 
Acts11:1 Koma atumwi ndi abale akukhala m'Yudeya anamva kuti amitundunso adalandira mau a Mulungu. 
Acts11:2 Ndipo pamene Petro adakwera kudza ku Yerusalemu, iwo akumdulidwe anatsutsana naye," 
Acts11:3 nanena kuti, Munalowa kwa anthu osadulidwa, ndi kudya nao." 
Acts11:4 Koma Petro anayamba kuwafotokozera chilongosolere, nanena," 
Acts11:5 Ndinali ine m'mudzi wa Yopa ndi kupemphera; ndipo m'kukomoka ndinaona masomphenya, chotengera chilikutsika, ngati chinsalu chachikulu chogwiridwa pangodya zake zinai; ndi kutsika kumwamba, ndipo chinadza pali ine;" 
Acts11:6 chimenecho ndidachipenyetsetsa ndinachilingirira, ndipo ndinaona nyama za miyendo inai za padziko ndi zilombo, ndi zokwawa, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga." 
Acts11:7 Ndipo ndinamvanso mau akunena ndi ine, Tauka Petro; ipha, nudye." 
Acts11:8 Koma ndinati, Iaitu, Ambuye; pakuti kanthu wamba, kapena konyansa sikanalowe m'kamwa mwanga ndi kale lonse." 
Acts11:9 Koma mau anayankha nthawi yachiwiri otuluka m'mwamba, Chimene Mulungu anachiyeretsa, usachiyesera chinthu wamba." 
Acts11:10 Ndipo ichi chinachitika katatu; ndipo zinakwezekanso zonse kumwamba. 
Acts11:11 Ndipo taonani, pomwepo amuna atatu anaima pa khomo la nyumba m'mene munali ife, anatumidwa kwa ine ochokera ku Kesareya." 
Acts11:12 Ndipo Mzimu anandiuza ndinke nao, wosasiyanitsa konse. Ndipo abale awa asanu ndi mmodzi anandiperekezanso anamuka nane; ndipo tinalowa m'nyumba ya munthuyo;" 
Acts11:13 ndipo anatiuza ife kuti adaona mngelo wakuimirira m'nyumba yake, ndi kuti, Tumiza anthu ku Yopa, akaitane Simoni, wonenedwanso Petro;" 
Acts11:14 amene adzalankhula nawe mau, amene udzapulumutsidwa nao iwe ndi apabanja ako onse." 
Acts11:15 Ndipo m'mene ndinayamba kulankhula, Mzimu Woyera anawagwera, monga anatero ndi ife poyamba paja." 
Acts11:16 Ndipo ndinakumbuka mau a Ambuye, kuti ananena, Yohanetu anabatiza ndi madzi; koma inu mudzabatizidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera." 
Acts11:17 Ngati tsono Mulungu anawapatsa iwo mphatso yomweyi yonga ya kwa ife, pamene tinakhulupirira Ambuye Yesu Khristu, ndine yani kuti ndingathe kuletsa Mulungu?" 
Acts11:18 Ndipo pamene anamva izi, anakhala duu, nalemekeza Mulungu, ndi kunena, Potero Mulungu anapatsa kwa amitundunso kutembenukira mtima kumoyo." 
Acts11:19 Pamenepo iwotu, akubalalika chifukwa cha chisautsocho chidadza pa Stefano, anafikira ku Fenisiya, ndi Kipro, ndi Antiokeya, osalankhula mau kwa wina yense koma kwa Ayuda okha." 
Acts11:20 Koma panali ena mwa iwo, amuna a ku Kipro, ndi Kirene, amenewo, m'mene adafika ku Antiokeya, analankhula ndi Agriki, ndi kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa Ambuye Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Ndipo dzanja la Ambuye linali nao; ndi unyinji wakukhulupirira unatembenukira kwa Ambuye. 
Acts11:22 Ndipo mbiri yao inamveka m'makutu a Mpingo wakukhala m'Yerusalemu; ndipo anatuma Barnabasi apite kufikira ku Antiokeya; 
Acts11:23 ameneyo, m'mene anafika, naona chisomo cha Mulungu, anakondwa; ndipo anawadandaulira onse, kuti atsimikize mtima kukhalabe ndi Ambuye;" 
Acts11:24 chifukwa anali munthu wabwino, ndi wodzala ndi Mzimu Woyera ndi chikhulupiriro: ndipo khamu lalikulu lidaonjezeka kwa Ambuye." 
Acts11:25 Ndipo anatuluka kunka ku Tariso kufunafuna Saulo; 
Acts11:26 ndipo m'mene anampeza, anadza naye ku Antiokeya. Ndipo kunali, kuti chaka chonse anasonkhana pamodzi mu Mpingo, naphunzitsa anthu aunyinji; ndipo ophunzira anayamba kutchedwa Akhristu ku Antiokeya." 
Acts11:27 Koma masiku awa aneneri anatsika ku Yerusalemu kudza ku Antiokeya. 
Acts11:28 Ndipo ananyamuka mmodzi wa iwo, dzina lake Agabu, nalosa mwa Mzimu, kuti padzakhala njala yaikulu pa dziko lonse lokhalamo anthu; ndiyo idadza masiku a Klaudio." 
Acts11:29 Ndipo ophunzira, yense monga anakhoza, anatsimikiza mtima kutumiza zothandiza abale akukhala m'Yudeya;" 
Acts11:30 ichonso anachita, natumiza kwa akulu mwa dzanja la Barnabasi ndi Saulo." 
Acts12:1 Koma nyengo imeneyo Herode mfumu anathira manja ena a m'Mpingo kuwachitira zoipa. 
Acts12:2 Ndipo adapha ndi lupanga Yakobo mbale wa Yohane. 
Acts12:3 Ndipo pakuona kuti kudakondweretsa Ayuda, anaonjezapo nagwiranso Petro. Ndipo awo ndi masiku a mkate wopanda chotupitsa." 
Acts12:4 Ndipo m'mene adamgwira, anamuika m'ndende, nampereka kwa magulu anai a alonda, lonse anaianai, amdikire iye; ndipo anafuna kumtulutsa kudza naye kwa anthu atapita Paska." 
Acts12:5 Pamenepo ndipo Petro anasungika m'ndende; koma Mpingo anampempherera iye kwa Mulungu kosalekeza. 
Acts12:6 Ndipo pamene Herode anati amtulutse, usiku womwewo Petro analikugona pakati pa asilikali awiri, womangidwa ndi maunyolo awiri; ndipo alonda akukhala pakhomo anadikira ndende." 
Acts12:7 Ndipo taonani, mngelo wa Ambuye anaimirirapo, ndipo kuunika kunawala mokhalamo iye; ndipo anakhoma Petro m'nthiti, namuutsa iye, nanena, Tauka msanga. Ndipo maunyolo anagwa kuchoka m'manja mwake." 
Acts12:8 Ndipo mngelo anati kwa iye, Dzimangire m'chuuno, numange nsapato zako. Nachita chotero. Ndipo ananena naye, Funda chovala chako, nunditsate ine." 
Acts12:9 Ndipo anatuluka, namtsata; ndipo sanadziwa kuti nchoona chochitidwa ndi mngelo, koma anayesa kuti alikuona masomphenya." 
Acts12:10 Ndipo m'mene adapitirira podikira poyamba ndi pachiwiri, anadza kuchitseko chachitsulo chakuyang'ana kumudzi; chimene chidawatsegukira chokha; ndipo anatuluka, napitirira khwalala limodzi; ndipo pomwepo mngelo anamchokera." 
Acts12:11 Ndipo Petro atatsitsimuka, anati, Tsopano ndidziwa zoona, kuti Ambuye anatuma mngelo wake nandilanditsa ine m'dzanja la Herode, ndi ku chilingiriro chonse cha Ayuda." 
Acts12:12 Ndipo m'mene adalingirirapo, anadza kunyumba ya Maria amake wa Yohane wonenedwanso Marko; pamenepo ambiri adasonkhana pamodzi, ndipo analikupemphera." 
Acts12:12 Ndipo m'mene adalingirirapo, anadza kunyumba ya Maria amake wa Yohane wonenedwanso Marko; pamenepo ambiri adasonkhana pamodzi, ndipo analikupemphera." 
Acts12:13 Ndipo m'mene anagogoda pa chitseko cha pakhomo, anadza kudzavomera mdzakazi, dzina lake Roda." 
Acts12:14 Ndipo pozindikira mau ake a Petro, chifukwa cha kukondwera sanatsegula pakhomo, koma anathamanga nalowanso, nawauza kuti Petro alikuima pakhomo." 
Acts12:15 Koma anati kwa iye, Wamisala iwe. Ndipo analimbika ndi kunena kuti nkutero. Ndipo ananena, Ndiye mngelo wake." 
Acts12:16 Koma Petro anakhala chigogodere; ndipo m'mene adamtsegulira, anamuona iye, nadabwa." 
Acts12:17 Koma m'mene adawatambasulira dzanja akhale chete, anawafotokozera umo adamtulutsira Ambuye m'ndende. Ndipo anati, Muwauze Yakobo ndi abale izi. Ndipo anatuluka napita kwina." 
Acts12:18 Koma kutacha, panali phokoso lalikulu mwa asilikali, Petro wamuka kuti." 
Acts12:19 Ndipo pamene Herode adamfunafuna, wosampeza, anafunsitsa odikira nalamulira aphedwe. Ndipo anatsika ku Yudeya kunka ku Kesareya, nakhalabe kumeneko." 
Acts12:20 Koma Herode anaipidwa nao a ku Tiro ndi Sidoni; ndipo anamdzera iye ndi mtima umodzi, ndipo m'mene adakopa Blasito mdindo wa mfumu, anapempha mtendere, popeza dziko lao linapeza zakudya zochokera ku dziko la mfumu." 
Acts12:21 Ndipo tsiku lopangira Herode anavala zovala zachifumu, nakhala pa mpando wachifumu, nawafotokozera iwo mau a pabwalo." 
Acts12:22 Ndipo anthu osonkhanidwawo anafuula, Ndiwo mau a Mulungu, si a munthu ai." 
Acts12:23 Ndipo pomwepo mngelo wa Ambuye anamkantha, chifukwa sanampatsa Mulungu ulemerero; ndipo anadyedwa ndi mphutsi, natsirizika." 
Acts12:24 Koma mau a Mulungu anakula, nachulukitsa." 
Acts12:25 Ndipo Barnabasi ndi Saulo anabwera kuchokera ku Yerusalemu m'mene adatsiriza utumiki wao, natenga Yohane wonenedwanso Marko amuke nao." 
Acts12:25 Ndipo Barnabasi ndi Saulo anabwera kuchokera ku Yerusalemu m'mene adatsiriza utumiki wao, natenga Yohane wonenedwanso Marko amuke nao." 
Acts13:1 Ndipo kunali aneneri ndi aphunzitsi ku Antiokeya mu Mpingo wa komweko, ndiwo Barnabasi, ndi Simeoni, wonenedwa Wakuda, ndi Lusio wa ku Kirene, Manaene woleredwa pamodzi ndi Herode chiwangacho, ndi Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Ndipo pa kutumikira Ambuye iwowa, ndi kusala chakudya, Mzimu Woyera anati, Mundipatulire Ine Barnabasi ndi Saulo ku ntchito imene ndinawaitanirako." 
Acts13:3 Pamenepo, m'mene adasala chakudya ndi kupemphera ndi kuika manja pa iwo, anawatumiza amuke." 
Acts13:4 Pamenepo iwo, otumidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, anatsikira ku Seleukiya; ndipo pochokerapo anapita m'ngalawa ku Kipro." 
Acts13:5 Ndipo pokhala ku Salami, analalikira mau a Mulungu m'masunagoge a Ayuda; ndipo anali nayenso Yohane mnyamata wao." 
Acts13:6 Ndipo m'mene anapitirira chisumbu chonse kufikira Pafosi, anapezapo munthu watsenga, mneneri wonyenga, ndiye Myuda, dzina lake Barayesu;" 
Acts13:7 ameneyo anali ndi kazembe Sergio Paulo, ndiye munthu wanzeru. Yemweyo anaitana Barnabasi ndi Saulo, nafunitsa kumva mau a Mulungu." 
Acts13:8 Koma Elimasi watsengayo (pakuti dzina lake litero posandulika) anawakaniza, nayesa kupatutsa kazembe asakhulupirire." 
Acts13:9 Koma Saulo, ndiye Paulo, wodzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, anampenyetsetsa iye," 
Acts13:10 nati, Wodzala ndi chinyengo chonse ndi chenjerero lonse, iwe, mwana wa mdierekezi, mdani wa chilungamo chonse, kodi sudzaleka kuipsa njira zolunjika za Ambuye?" 
Acts13:11 Ndipo tsopano, taona, dzanja la Ambuye lili pa iwe, ndipo udzakhala wakhungu wosapenya dzuwa nthawi. Ndipo pomwepo lidamgwera khungu ndi mdima; ndipo anamukamuka nafuna wina womgwira dzanja." 
Acts13:12 Pamenepo kazembe, pakuona chochitikacho anakhulupirira, nadabwa nacho chiphunzitso cha Ambuye." 
Acts13:13 Ndipo atamasula kuchokera ku Pafosi a ulendo wake wa Paulo anadza ku Perga wa ku Pamfiliya; koma Yohane anapatukana nao nabwerera kunka ku Yerusalemu. 
Acts13:14 Koma iwowa, atapita pochokera ku Perga anafika ku Antiokeya wa m'Pisidiya; ndipo analowa m'sunagoge tsiku la Sabata, nakhala pansi." 
Acts13:15 Ndipo m'mene adatha kuwerenga chilamulo ndi aneneri akulu a sunagoge anatuma wina kwa iwo, ndi kunena, Amuna inu, abale, ngati muli nao mau akudandaulira anthu, nenani." 
Acts13:16 Ndipo Paulo ananyamuka, nakodola ndi dzanja, nati, Amuna a Israele, ndi inu akuopa Mulungu, mverani." 
Acts13:17 Mulungu wa anthu awa Israele anasankha makolo athu, nakweza anthuwo pakugonerera iwo m'dziko la Ejipito, ndipo ndi dzanja lokwezeka anawatulutsa iwo m'menemo." 
Acts13:18 Ndipo monga nthawi ya zaka makumi anai anawalekerera m'chipululu. 
Acts13:19 Ndipo m'mene adaononga mitundu ya anthu isanu ndi iwiri m'Kanani, anawapatsa cholowa dziko lao, monga zaka mazana anai kudza makumi asanu;" 
Acts13:20 ndipo zitatha izi anawapatsa oweruza kufikira Samuele mneneriyo. 
Acts13:21 Ndipo kuyambira pamenepo anapempha mfumu; ndipo Mulungu anawapatsa Saulo mwana wa Kisi, munthu wa fuko la Benjamini, zaka makumi anai." 
Acts13:22 Ndipo m'mene atamchotsa iye, anawautsira Davide akhale mfumu yao; amenenso anamchitira umboni, nati, Ndapeza Davide, mwana wa Yese, munthu wa pamtima panga, amene adzachita chifuniro changa chonse." 
Acts13:23 Wochokera mu mbeu yake Mulungu, monga mwa lonjezano, anautsira Israele Mpulumutsi, Yesu;" 
Acts13:24 Yohane atalalikiratu, asanafike Iye, ubatizo wa kulapa kwa anthu onse a Israele." 
Acts13:25 Ndipo pakukwaniritsa njira yake Yohane, ananena, Muyesa kuti ine ndine yani? Ine sindine Iye. Koma taonani, akudza wina wonditsata ine, amene sindiyenera kummasulira nsapato za pa mapazi ake." 
Acts13:26 Amuna, abale, ana a mbadwa ya Abrahamu, ndi iwo mwa inu akuopa Mulungu, kwa ife atumidwa mau a chipulumutso ichi." 
Acts13:27 Pakuti iwo akukhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi akulu ao, popeza sanamzindikira Iye, ngakhale mau a aneneri owerengedwa masabata onse, anawakwaniritsa pakumtsutsa." 
Acts13:28 Ndipo ngakhale sanapeza chifukwa cha kumphera, anapempha Pilato kuti aphedwe." 
Acts13:29 Ndipo atatsiriza zonse zolembedwa za Iye, anamtsitsa kumtengo, namuika m'manda." 
Acts13:30 Koma Mulungu anamuukitsa Iye kwa akufa; 
Acts13:31 ndipo anaonekera masiku ambiri ndi iwo amene anamperekeza Iye pokwera ku Yerusalemu kuchokera ku Galileya, amenewo ndiwo akumchitira umboni tsopano kwa anthu." 
Acts13:32 Ndipo ife tikulalikirani inu Uthenga Wabwino wa lonjezano lochitidwa kwa makolo; 
Acts13:33 kuti Mulungu analikwaniritsa ili kwa ana athu pakuukitsa Yesu; monganso mulembedwa m'Salimo lachiwiri, Iwe ndiwe Mwana wanga, lero ndakubala." 
Acts13:34 Ndipo kuti anamuukitsa Iye kwa akufa, wosabweranso kuchivundi, anateropo, Ndidzakupatsani inu madalitso oyera ndi okhulupirika a Davide." 
Acts13:35 Chifukwa anenanso m'Salimo lina, Simudzapereka Woyera wanu aone chivundi." 
Acts13:36 Pakutitu, Davide, m'mene adautumikira uphungu wa Mulungu m'mbadwo mwake mwa iye yekha, anagona tulo, naikidwa kwa makolo ake, naona chivundi;" 
Acts13:37 koma Iye amene Mulungu anamuukitsa sanaona chivundi. 
Acts13:38 Potero padziwike ndi inu amuna abale, kuti mwa Iye chilalikidwa kwa inu chikhululukiro cha machimo;" 
Acts13:39 ndipo mwa Iye yense wokhulupirira ayesedwa wolungama kumchotsera zonse zimene simunangathe kudzichotsera poyesedwa wolungama ndi chilamulo cha Mose. 
Acts13:40 Chifukwa chake penyerani, kuti chingadzere inu chonenedwa ndi aneneriwo:" 
Acts13:41 Taonani, opeputsa inu, zizwani, kanganukani; kuti ndigwiritsa ntchito Ine masiku anu, ntchito imene simudzaikhulupirira wina akakuuzani." 
Acts13:42 Ndipo pakutuluka iwo anapempha kuti alankhule naonso mau awa Sabata likudzalo. 
Acts13:43 Ndipo m'mene anthu a m'sunagoge anabalalika, Ayuda ambiri ndi akupinduka opembedza anatsata Paulo ndi Barnabasi; amene, polankhula nao, anawaumiriza akhale m'chisomo cha Mulungu." 
Acts13:44 Ndipo Sabata linalo udasonkhana pamodzi ngati mudzi wonse kumva mau a Mulungu. 
Acts13:45 Koma Ayuda, pakuona makamu a anthu, anadukidwa, natsutsana nazo zolankhulidwa ndi Paulo, nachita mwano." 
Acts13:46 Ndipo Paulo ndi Barnabasi analimbika mtima ponena, nati, Kunafunika kuti mau a Mulungu ayambe alankhulidwe kwa inu. Popeza muwakankha, nimudziyesera nokha osayenera moyo wosatha, taonani, titembenukira kwa amitundu." 
Acts13:47 Pakuti kotero anatilamula Ambuye ndi kuti, Ndakuika iwe kuunika kwa amitundu, kuti udzakhala iwe chipulumutso kufikira malekezero a dziko." 
Acts13:48 Ndipo pakumva ichi amitundu anakondwera, nalemekeza mau a Mulungu; ndipo anakhulupirira onse amene anaikidwiratu kumoyo wosatha." 
Acts13:49 Ndipo mau a Ambuye anabukitsidwa m'dziko lonse. 
Acts13:50 Koma Ayuda anakakamiza akazi opembedza ndi omveka, ndi akulu a mudziwo, nawautsira chizunzo Paulo ndi Barnabasi, ndipo anawapirikitsa iwo m'malire ao." 
Acts13:51 Koma iwo, m'mene adawasansira fumbi la ku mapazi ao anadza ku Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Ndipo ophunzira anadzazidwa ndi chimwemwe ndi Mzimu Woyera. 
Acts14:1 Ndipo kunali pa Ikonio kuti analowa pamodzi m'sunagoge wa Ayuda, nalankhula kotero, kuti khamu lalikulu la Ayuda ndi Agriki anakhulupirira." 
Acts14:2 Koma Ayuda osamvera anautsa mitima ya Agriki kuti aipse abale athu. 
Acts14:3 Chifukwa chake anakhala nthawi yaikulu nanenetsa zolimba mtima mwa Ambuye, amene anachitira umboni mau a chisomo chake, napatsa zizindikiro ndi zozizwa kuti zichitidwe ndi manja ao." 
Acts14:4 Ndipo khamu la mudziwo linagawikana; ena anali ndi Ayuda, koma ena anali ndi atumwi." 
Acts14:5 Ndipo pamene panakhala chigumukiro cha Agriki ndi cha Ayuda ndi akulu ao, cha kuwachitira chipongwe ndi kuwaponya miyala," 
Acts14:6 iwo anamva, nathawira kumidzi ya Likaoniya, Listara ndi Deribe, ndi dziko lozungulirapo:" 
Acts14:7 kumeneko ndiko Uthenga Wabwino. 
Acts14:8 Ndipo pa Listara panakhala munthu wina wopanda mphamvu ya m'mapazi mwake, wopunduka chibadwire, amene sanayenda nthawi zonse." 
Acts14:9 Ameneyo anamva Paulo alinkulankhula; ndipo Paulo pomyang'anitsa, ndi kuona kuti anali ndi chikhulupiriro cholandira nacho moyo," 
Acts14:10 anati ndi mau akulu, Taimirira. Ndipo iyeyu anazunzuka, nayenda." 
Acts14:11 Pamene makamu anaona chimene anachita Paulo, anakweza mau ao, nati m'chinenero cha Likaoniya, Milungu yatsikira kwa ife monga anthu." 
Acts14:12 Ndipo anamutcha Barnabasi, Zeusi; ndi Paulo, Heremesi, chifukwa anali wotsogola kunena." 
Acts14:13 Koma wansembe wa Zeusi wa kumaso kwa mudzi, anadza nazo ng'ombe ndi maluwa kuzipata, nafuna kupereka nsembe pamodzi ndi makamu." 
Acts14:14 Pamene anamva atumwi Paulo ndi Barnabasi, anang'amba zofunda zao, natumphira m'khamu," 
Acts14:15 nafuula nati, Anthuni, bwanji muchita zimenezi? Ifenso tili anthu a mkhalidwe wathu umodzimodzi ndi wanu, akulalikira kwa inu Uthenga Wabwino, wakuti musiye zinthu zachabe izi, nimutembenukire kwa Mulungu wamoyo, amene analenga zakumwamba ndi zapansi, ndi nyanja, ndi zonse zili momwemo:" 
Acts14:16 m'mibadwo yakale Iye adaleka mitundu yonse iyende m'njira mwao. 
Acts14:17 Koma sanadzisiyira Iye mwini wopanda umboni, popeza anachita zabwino, nakupatsani inu zochokera kumwamba mvula ndi nyengo za zipatso, ndi kudzaza mitima yanu ndi chakudya ndi chikondwero." 
Acts14:18 Pakunena izo, anavutika pakuletsa makamu kuti asapereke nsembe kwa iwo." 
Acts14:19 Ndipo anafika kumeneko Ayuda kuchokera ku Antiokeya ndi Ikonio; nakopa makamu, ndipo anamponya Paulo miyala, namguzira kunja kwa mudzi; namuyesa kuti wafa." 
Acts14:20 Koma pamene anamzinga ophunzirawo, anauka iye, nalowa m'mudzi; m'mawa mwake anatuluka ndi Barnabasi kunka ku Deribe." 
Acts14:21 Pamene analalikira Uthenga Wabwino pamudzipo, nayesa ambiri ophunzira, anabwera ku Listara ndi Ikonio ndi Antiokeya," 
Acts14:22 nalimbikitsa mitima ya ophunzira, nadandaulira iwo kuti akhalebe m'chikhulupiriro, ndi kuti tiyenera kulowa m'ufumu wa Mulungu ndi zisautso zambiri." 
Acts14:23 Ndipo pamene anawaikira akulu mosankha mu Mpingo uliwonse, ndi kupemphera pamodzi ndi kusala kudya, naikiza iwo kwa Ambuye amene anamkhulupirirayo." 
Acts14:24 Ndipo anapitirira pa Pisidiya, nafika ku Pamfiliya." 
Acts14:25 Ndipo atalankhula mau m'Perga, anatsikira ku Ataliya;" 
Acts14:26 komweko anachoka m'ngalawa kunka ku Antiokeya, kumene anaikizidwa ku chisomo cha Mulungu ku ntchito imene adaimalizayo." 
Acts14:27 Pamene anafika nasonkhanitsa Mpingo anabwerezanso zomwe Mulungu anachita nao, kuti anatsegulira amitundu pa khomo la chikhulupiriro." 
Acts14:28 Ndipo anakhala pamenepo ndi ophunzira nthawi yaikulu. 
Acts15:1 Ndipo anadza ena akutsika ku Yudeya, nawaphunzitsa abale, nati, Mukapanda kudulidwa monga mwambo wa Mose, simungathe kupulumuka." 
Acts15:2 Ndipo pamene Paulo ndi Barnabasi anachitana nao makani ndi mafunsano, abale anapatula Paulo ndi Barnabasi, ndi ena a iwo, kuti akwere kunka ku Yerusalemu kwa atumwi ndi akulu kukanena za funsolo." 
Acts15:3 Ndipo iwo anaperekezedwa ndi Mpingo, napita pa Fenisiya ndi Samariya, nafotokozera chisanduliko cha amitundu; nakondweretsa kwambiri abale onse." 
Acts15:4 Pamene anafika ku Yerusalemu, analandiridwa ndi Mpingo, ndi atumwi ndi akulu, ndipo anabwerezanso zonse zimene Mulungu anachita nao." 
Acts15:5 Koma anauka ena a mpatuko wa Afarisi okhulupirira, nati, Kuyenera kuwadula iwo, ndi kuwauza kuti asunge chilamulo cha Mose." 
Acts15:6 Ndipo anasonkhana atumwi ndi akulu kuti anene za mlanduwo. 
Acts15:7 Ndipo pamene panali mafunsano ambiri, Petro anaimirira, nati kwa iwo, Abale, mudziwa kuti poyamba Mulungu anasankha mwa inu, kuti m'kamwa mwanga amitundu amve mau a Uthenga Wabwino, nakhulupirire." 
Acts15:8 Ndipo Mulungu, amene adziwa mtima, anawachitira umboni; nawapatsa Mzimu Woyera, monga anatipatsa ife;" 
Acts15:9 ndipo sanalekanitsa ife ndi iwo, nayeretsa mitima yao m'chikhulupiriro." 
Acts15:10 Nanga bwanji tsopano mulikumuyesa Mulungu, kuti muike pa khosi la ophunzira goli, limene sanatha kunyamula kapena makolo athu kapena ife?" 
Acts15:11 Koma tikhulupirira tidzapulumuka mwa chisomo cha Ambuye Yesu Khristu, monga iwo omwe." 
Acts15:12 Ndipo khamu lonse linatonthola; ndipo anamvera Barnabasi ndi Paulo alikubwerezanso zizindikiro ndi zozizwitsa zimene Mulungu anachita nao pa amitundu. 
Acts15:13 Pamene iwo anatonthola Yakobo anayankha, nati, Abale, mverani ine:" 
Acts15:14 Simoni wabwereza kuti poyamba Mulungu anayang'anira amitundu, kuti atenge mwa iwo anthu a dzina lake." 
Acts15:15 Ndipo mau a aneneri avomereza pamenepo; monga kunalembedwa," 
Acts15:16 Zikatha izo ndidzabwera, ndidzamanganso chihema cha Davide, chimene chinagwa; ndidzamanganso zopasuka zake, ndipo ndidzachiimikanso:" 
Acts15:17 Kuti anthu otsalira afunefune Ambuye, ndi amitundu onse amene dzina langa linatchulidwa pa iwo," 
Acts15:18 ati Ambuye, amene azidziwitsa zinthu zonsezo chiyambire dziko lapansi." 
Acts15:19 Chifukwa chake ine ndiweruza, kuti tisavute a mwa amitundu amene anatembenukira kwa Mulungu," 
Acts15:20 koma kuti tilembere kwa iwo, kuti asale zonyansa za mafano, ndi dama, ndi zopotola, ndi mwazi." 
Acts15:21 Pakuti Mose, kuyambira pa mibadwo yakale ali nao m'midzi yonse amene amlalikira, akuwerenga mau ake m'masunagoge masabata onse." 
Acts15:22 Pamenepo chinakomera atumwi ndi akulu ndi Mpingo wonse kusankha anthu a m'gulu lao, ndi kuwatumiza ku Antiokeya ndi Paulo ndi Barnabasi; ndiwo Yudasi wotchedwa Barsabasi, ndi Silasi, akulu a mwa abale; ndipo analembera mau natumiza ndi iwo:" 
Acts15:23 Atumwi ndi abale akulu kwa abale a mwa amitundu a m'Antiokeya, ndi Siriya, ndi Silisiya, tikulankhulani:" 
Acts15:24 Popeza tamva kuti ena amene anatuluka mwa ife anakuvutani ndi mau, nasocheretsa mitima yanu; amenewo sitinawalamulira;" 
Acts15:25 chinatikomera ndi mtima umodzi, tisankhe anthu, ndi kuwatumiza kwa inu pamodzi ndi okondedwa anthu Barnabasi ndi Paulo," 
Acts15:26 anthu amene anapereka moyo wao chifukwa cha dzina la Yesu Khristu Ambuye wathu. 
Acts15:27 Tatumiza tsono Yudasi ndi Silasi, omwenso adzakuuzani ndi mau zinthu zomwezo." 
Acts15:28 Pakuti chinakomera Mzimu Woyera ndi ife, kuti tisasenzetse inu chothodwetsa chachikulu china choposa izi zoyenerazi;" 
Acts15:29 kuti musale nsembe za mafano, ndi mwazi, ndi zopotola, ndi dama; ngati mudzisungitsa pa zimenezi, kudzakhala bwino kwa inu. Tsalani bwino." 
Acts15:30 Tsono pamene iwo anamuka anatsikira ku Antiokeya; ndipo anasonkhanitsa khamu, napereka kalatayo." 
Acts15:31 Pamene anawerenga, anakondwera chifukwa cha chisangalatso chake." 
Acts15:32 Ndipo Yudasi ndi Silasi, okhala eni okha aneneri, anasangalatsa abale ndi mau ambiri, nawalimbikitsa." 
Acts15:33 Pamene anakhala nthawi, abale analawirana nao ndi mtendere amuke kwa iwo amene anawatumiza." 
Acts15:34  
Acts15:35 Koma Paulo ndi Barnabasi anakhalabe m'Antiokeya, nalinkuphunzitsa, ndi kulalikira mau a Ambuye pamodzi ndi ena ambiri." 
Acts15:36 Patapita masiku, Paulo anati kwa Barnabasi, Tibwerenso, tizonde abale m'midzi yonse m'mene tinalalikiramo mau a Ambuye, tione mkhalidwe wao." 
Acts15:37 Ndipo Barnabasi anafuna kumtenga Yohane uja, wotchedwa Marko" 
Acts15:37 Ndipo Barnabasi anafuna kumtenga Yohane uja, wotchedwa Marko" 
Acts15:38 Koma sikunamkomera Paulo kumtenga iye amene anawasiya nabwerera pa Pamfiliya paja osamuka nao kuntchito. 
Acts15:39 Ndipo panali kupsetsana mtima, kotero kuti analekana wina ndi mnzake; ndipo Barnabasi anatenga Marko, nalowa m'ngalawa, nanka ku Kipro." 
Acts15:39 Ndipo panali kupsetsana mtima, kotero kuti analekana wina ndi mnzake; ndipo Barnabasi anatenga Marko, nalowa m'ngalawa, nanka ku Kipro." 
Acts15:40 Koma Paulo anasankha Silasi, namuka, woikizidwa ndi abale ku chisomo cha Ambuye." 
Acts15:41 Ndipo iye anapita kupyola pa Siriya ndi Silisiya, nakhazikitsa Mipingo." 
Acts16:1 Ndipo anafikanso ku Deribe ndi Listara; ndipo taonani, panali wophunzira wina pamenepo, dzina lake Timoteo, amake ndiye Myuda wokhulupirira; koma atate wake ndiye Mgriki." 
Acts16:2 Ameneyo anamchitira umboni wabwino abale a ku Listara ndi Ikonio. 
Acts16:3 Iyeyo Paulo anafuna kuti amuke naye, ndipo anamtenga, namdula, chifukwa cha Ayuda amene anakhala m'maikomo; pakuti onse anadziwa kuti atate wake anali Mgriki." 
Acts16:4 Pamene anapita kupyola pamidzi, anapereka kwa iwo malamulo awasunge, amene analamulira atumwi ndi akulu a pa Yerusalemu." 
Acts16:5 Kotero Mipingoyo inalimbikitsidwa m'chikhulupiriro, nachuluka m'chiwerengo chao tsiku ndi tsiku." 
Acts16:6 Ndipo anapita pa dziko la Frijiya ndi Galatiya, atawaletsa Mzimu Woyera kuti asalalikire mau m'Asiya;" 
Acts16:7 pamene anafika kundunji kwa Misiya, anayesa kunka ku Bitiniya; ndipo Mzimu wa Yesu sanawaloleza;" 
Acts16:8 ndipo pamene anapita pambali pa Misiya, anatsikira ku Troasi." 
Acts16:9 Ndipo masomphenya anaonekera kwa Paulo usiku: Panali munthu wa ku Masedoniya alinkuimirira, namdandaulira kuti, Muolokere ku Masedoniya kuno, mudzatithangate ife." 
Acts16:10 Pamene anaona masomphenyawo, pomwepo tinayesa kutulukira kunka ku Masedoniya, poganizira kuti Mulungu anaitanira ife kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino kwa iwo." 
Acts16:11 Chotero tinachokera ku Troasi m'ngalawa, m'mene tinalunjikitsa ku Samotrase, ndipo m'mawa mwake ku Neapoli;" 
Acts16:12 pochokera kumeneko tinafika ku Filipi, mudzi wa ku Masedoniya, waukulu wa m'dzikomo, wa milaga ya Roma; ndipo tidagona momwemo masiku ena." 
Acts16:13 Tsiku la Sabata tinatuluka kumudzi kunka kumbali ya mtsinje, kumene tinaganizira kuti amapempherako; ndipo tinakhala pansi ndi kulankhula ndi akazi amene adasonkhana." 
Acts16:14 Ndipo anatimva mkazi wina dzina lake Lidia, wakugulitsa chibakuwa, wa kumudzi wa Tiatira, amene anapembedza Mulungu; mtima wake Ambuye anatsegula; kuti amvere zimene anazinena Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Pamene anabatizidwa iye ndi a pabanja pake anatidandaulira ife, kuti, Ngati mwandiyesera ine wokhulupirika kwa Ambuye, mulowe m'nyumba yanga, mugone m'menemo. Ndipo anatiumiriza ife." 
Acts16:16 Ndipo panali, pamene tinali kunka kukapemphera, anakomana ndi ife mdzakazi wina amene anali ndi mzimu wambwebwe, amene anapindulira ambuye ake zambiri pakubwebweta pake." 
Acts16:17 Ameneyo anatsata Paulo ndi ife, nafuula, kuti, Anthu awa ndi akapolo a Mulungu wa Kumwambamwamba, amene akulalikirani inu njira ya chipulumutso." 
Acts16:18 Ndipo anachita chotero masiku ambiri. Koma Paulo anavutika mtima ndithu, nacheuka, nati kwa mzimuwo, Ndikulamulira iwe m'dzina la Yesu Khristu, tuluka mwa iye. Ndipo unatuluka nthawi yomweyo." 
Acts16:19 Koma pamene ambuye ake anaona kuti kulingalira kwa kupindula kwao kwatha, anagwira Paulo ndi Silasi, nawakokera kunka nao kubwalo kwa akulu," 
Acts16:20 ndipo pamene adanka nao kwa oweruza, anati, Anthu awa avuta kwambiri mudzi wathu, ndiwo Ayuda," 
Acts16:21 ndipo alalikira miyambo imene siiloleka ife kuilandira, kapena kuichita, ndife Aroma." 
Acts16:22 Ndipo linagumukira iwo khamulo; ndipo oweruza anawang'ambira malaya ao; nalamulira kuti awakwapule. 
Acts16:23 Pamene anawaonetsa mikwingwirima yambiri, anawaika m'ndende, nauza mdindo kuti awasunge bwino." 
Acts16:24 Pakumva iye kulamulira kotero anawaika m'chipinda cha m'kati, namangitsa mapazi ao m'zigologolo." 
Acts16:25 Koma ngati pakati pa usiku, Paulo ndi Silasi analinkupemphera, naimbira Mulungu nyimbo, ndipo a m'ndendemo analinkuwamva;" 
Acts16:26 ndipo mwadzidzidzi panali chivomezi chachikulu, chotero kuti maziko a ndende anagwedezeka: pomwepo pamakomo ponse panatseguka; ndi maunyolo a onse anamasuka." 
Acts16:27 Pamene anautsidwa kutulo mdindoyo, anaona kuti pa makomo a ndende panatseguka, ndipo anasolola lupanga lake, nati adziphe yekha, poyesa kuti am'ndende adathawa." 
Acts16:28 Koma Paulo anafuula ndi mau akulu, nati, Usadzipweteka wekha; tonse tili muno." 
Acts16:29 Ndipo mdindo anaitanitsa nyali, natumphira m'kati, alinkunthunthumira ndi mantha, nagwa pamaso pa Paulo ndi Silasi," 
Acts16:30 nawatulutsira iwo kunja, nati, Ambuye, ndichitenji kuti ndipulumuke?" 
Acts16:31 Ndipo iwo anati, Ukhulupirire Ambuye Yesu, ndipo udzapulumuka, iwe ndi apabanja ako." 
Acts16:32 Ndipo anamuuza iye mau a Ambuye, pamodzi ndi onse a pabanja pake." 
Acts16:33 Ndipo anawatenga ora lomwelo la usiku, natsuka mikwingwirima yao; nabatizidwa pomwepo, iye ndi a pabanja pake." 
Acts16:34 Ndipo anakwera nao kunka kunyumba kwake, nawakhazikira chakudya, nasangalala kwambiri, pamodzi ndi a pabanja pake, atakhulupirira Mulungu." 
Acts16:35 Kutacha, oweruza anatumiza akapitao, kuti, Mukamasule anthu aja." 
Acts16:36 Ndipo mdindo anafotokozera mauwo kwa Paulo, nati, Oweruza atumiza mau kunena kuti mumuke; tsopanotu tulukani, mukani mumtendere." 
Acts16:37 Koma Paulo anati kwa iwo, Adatikwapula ife pamaso pa anthu, osamva mlandu wathu, ife amene tili Aroma, natiika m'ndende; ndipo tsopano kodi afuna kutitulutsira ife m'tseri? Iai, ndithu; koma adze okha atitulutse." 
Acts16:38 Ndipo akapitao anafotokozera mauwo kwa oweruza; ndipo iwowo anaopa, pakumva kuti anali Aroma." 
Acts16:39 Ndipo anadza nawapembedza; ndipo pamene anawatulutsa, anawapempha kuti achoke pamudzi." 
Acts16:40 Ndipo anatuluka m'ndendemo, nalowa m'nyumba ya Lidia: ndipo pamene anaona abale, anawasangalatsa, namuka." 
Acts17:1 Pamene anapitirira pa Amfipoli, ndi Apoloniya, anafika ku Tesalonika, kumene kunali sunagoge wa Ayuda." 
Acts17:2 Ndipo Paulo, monga amachita, analowa kwa iwo; ndipo masabata atatu ananena ndi iwo za m'malembo, natanthauzira," 
Acts17:3 natsimikiza, kuti kunayenera Khristu kumva zowawa, ndi kuuka kwa akufa; ndiponso kuti Yesu yemweyo, amene ndikulalikirani inu, ndiye Khristu." 
Acts17:4 Ndipo ena a iwo anakopedwa, nadziphatika kwa Paulo ndi Silasi; ndi Agriki akupembedza aunyinji ndithu, ndi akazi akulu osati owerengeka." 
Acts17:5 Koma Ayuda anadukidwa mtima, natenga anthu ena oipa achabe a pabwalo, nasonkhanitsa khamu la anthu, nachititsa phokoso m'mudzi; ndipo anagumukira kunyumba ya Yasoni, nafuna kuwatulutsira kwa anthu." 
Acts17:6 Pamene sanawapeza anakokera Yasoni ndi abale ena pamaso pa akulu a mudzi, nafuula kuti, Omwe aja asanduliza dziko lokhalamo anthu, afika kunonso;" 
Acts17:7 amene Yasoni walandira; ndipo onsewo achita zokana malamulo a Kaisara; nanena kuti pali mfumu ina, Yesu." 
Acts17:8 Ndipo anavuta anthu, ndi akulu a mudzi, pamene anamva zimenezi." 
Acts17:9 Ndipo pamene analandira chikole kwa Yasoni ndi enawo, anawamasula." 
Acts17:10 Pomwepo abale anatumiza Paulo ndi Silasi usiku kunka ku Berea; pamene iwo anafika komweko analowa m'sunagoge wa Ayuda. 
Acts17:11 Amenewa anali mfulu koposa a m'Tesalonika, popeza analandira mau ndi kufunitsa kwa mtima wonse, nasanthula m'malembo masiku onse, ngati zinthu zinali zotero." 
Acts17:12 Ndipo ambiri a iwo anakhulupirira; ndi akazi a Chigriki omveka, ndi amuna, osati owerengeka." 
Acts17:13 Koma pamene Ayuda a ku Tesalonika anazindikira kuti mau a Mulungu analalikidwa ndi Paulo ku Bereanso, anadza komwekonso, nautsa, navuta makamu." 
Acts17:14 Pomwepo abale anatulutsa Paulo amuke kufikira kunyanja; koma Silasi ndi Timoteo anakhalabe komweko. 
Acts17:15 Koma iwo amene anaperekeza Paulo anadza naye kufikira ku Atene; ndipo polandira iwo lamulo la kwa Silasi ndi Timoteo kuti afulumire kudza kwa iye ndi changu chonse, anachoka." 
Acts17:16 Pamene Paulo analandira iwo pa Atene, anavutidwa mtima pamene anaona mudzi wonse wadzala ndi mafano." 
Acts17:17 Chotero tsono anatsutsana ndi Ayuda ndi akupembedza m'sunagoge, ndi m'bwalo la malonda masiku onse ndi iwo amene anakomana nao." 
Acts17:18 Ndipo akukonda nzeru ena a Epikurea ndi a Stoiki anatengana naye. Ena anati, Ichi chiyani afuna kunena wobwetuka uyu? Ndipo ena, Anga wolalikira ziwanda zachilendo, chifukwa analalikira Yesu ndi kuuka kwa akufa." 
Acts17:19 Ndipo anamgwira, nanka naye ku Areopagi, nati, Kodi tingathe kudziwa chiphunzitso ichi chatsopano uchinena iwe?" 
Acts17:20 Pakuti ufika nazo kumakutu athu zachilendo: tifuna tsono kudziwa, izi zitani?" 
Acts17:21 (Koma Aatene onse ndi alendo akukhalamo anakhalitsa nthawi zao, osachita kanthu kena koma kunena kapena kumva cha tsopano.)" 
Acts17:22 Ndipo anaimirira Paulo pakati pa Areopagi nati, Amuna inu a Atene, m'zinthu zonse ndiona kuti muli akupembedzetsa." 
Acts17:23 Pakuti popita, ndi kuona zinthu zimene muzipembedza, ndipezanso guwa la nsembe lolembedwa potere, KWA MULUNGU WOSADZIWIKA. Chimene muchipembedza osachidziwa, chimenecho ndichilalikira kwa inu." 
Acts17:24 Mulungu amene analenga dziko lapansi ndi zonse zili momwemo, Iyeyo, ndiye mwini kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, sakhala m'nyumba za kachisi zomangidwa ndi manja;" 
Acts17:25 satumikiridwa ndi manja a anthu, monga wosowa kanthu, popeza Iye mwini apatsa zonse moyo ndi mpweya ndi zinthu zonse;" 
Acts17:26 ndipo ndi mmodzi analenga mitundu yonse ya anthu, kuti akhale ponse pa nkhope ya dziko lapansi, atapangiratu nyengo zao, ndi malekezero a pokhala pao;" 
Acts17:27 kuti afunefune Mulungu, kapena akamfufuze ndi kumpeza, ngakhale sakhala patali ndi yense wa ife;" 
Acts17:28 pakuti mwa Iye tikhala ndi moyo ndi kuyendayenda, ndi kupeza mkhalidwe wathu; monga enanso a akuimba anu ati, Pakuti ifenso tili mbadwa zake." 
Acts17:29 Popeza tsono tili mbadwa za Mulungu, sitiyenera kulingalira kuti umulungu uli wofanafana ndi golide, kapena siliva, kapena mwala, wolocha ndi luso ndi zolingalira za anthu." 
Acts17:30 Nthawi za kusadziwako tsono Mulungu analekerera; koma tsopanotu alinkulamulira anthu onse ponseponse atembenuke mtima; 
Acts17:31 chifukwa anapangira tsiku limene adzaweruza dziko lokhalamo anthu m'chilungamo, ndi munthu amene anamuikiratu; napatsa anthu onse chitsimikizo, pamene anamuukitsa Iye kwa akufa." 
Acts17:32 Ndipo pamene anamva za kuuka kwa akufa ena anaseka pwepwete; koma ena anati, Tidzakumvanso za chimenechi." 
Acts17:33 Choncho Paulo anatuluka pakati pao. 
Acts17:34 Koma ena anadziphatika kwa iye, nakhulupirira; mwa iwonso munali Dionizio Mwareopagi, ndi mkazi dzina lake Damarisi, ndi ena pamodzi nao." 
Acts18:1 Zitapita izi anachoka ku Atene, nadza ku Korinto." 
Acts18:2 Ndipo anapeza Myuda wina dzina lake Akwila, fuko lake la ku Ponto, atachoka chatsopano ku Italiya, pamodzi ndi mkazi wake Prisila, chifukwa Klaudio analamulira Ayuda onse achoke m'Roma; ndipo Paulo anadza kwa iwo:" 
Acts18:3 ndipo popeza anali wa ntchito imodzimodzi, anakhala nao, ndipo iwowa anagwira ntchito; pakuti ntchito yao inali yakusoka mahema." 
Acts18:4 Ndipo anafotokozera m'sunagoge masabata onse, nakopa Ayuda ndi Agriki." 
Acts18:5 Koma pamene Silasi ndi Timoteo anadza potsika ku Masedoniya, Paulo anapsinjidwa ndi mau, nachitira umboni kwa Ayuda kuti Yesu ndiye Khristu." 
Acts18:6 Koma pamene iwo, anamkana, nachita mwano, anakutumula malaya ake, nati kwa iwo, Mwazi wanu ukhale pa mitu yanu; ine ndilibe kanthu; kuyambira tsopano ndinka kwa amitundu." 
Acts18:7 Ndipo anachoka kumeneko, nalowa m'nyumba ya munthu, dzina lake Tito Yusto, amene anapembedza Mulungu, nyumba yake inayandikizana ndi sunagoge." 
Acts18:8 Ndipo Krispo, mkulu wa sunagoge, anakhulupirira Ambuye, ndi apabanja ake onse; ndipo Akorinto ambiri anamva, nakhulupirira, nabatizidwa." 
Acts18:9 Ndipo Ambuye anati kwa Paulo usiku m'masomphenya, Usaope, koma nena, usakhale chete;" 
Acts18:10 chifukwa Ine ndili pamodzi ndi iwe, ndipo palibe munthu adzautsana ndi iwe kuti akuipse; chifukwa ndili nao anthu ambiri m'mudzi muno." 
Acts18:11 Ndipo anakhala komwe chaka chimodzi kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi; naphunzitsa mau a Mulungu mwa iwo. 
Acts18:12 Tsono pamene Galio anali chiwanga cha Akaya, Ayuda ndi mtima umodzi anamuukira Paulo, nanka naye kumpando wachiweruziro," 
Acts18:13 kuti, Uyu akopa anthu apembedze Mulungu pokana chilamulo." 
Acts18:14 Koma pamene Paulo anati atsegule pakamwa pake, Galio anati kwa Ayuda, Ukadakhala mlandu wa chosalungama, kapena dumbo loipa, Ayuda inu, mwenzi nditakumverani inu;" 
Acts18:15 koma akakhala mafunso a mau ndi maina ndi chilamulo chanu; muyang'ane inu nokha; sindifuna kuweruza zimenezi. 
Acts18:16 Ndipo anawapirikitsa pa mpando wachiweruziro. 
Acts18:17 Ndipo anamgwira Sostene, mkulu wa sunagoge, nampanda kumpando wachiweruziro. Ndipo Galio sanasamalira zimenezi." 
Acts18:18 Paulo atakhala chikhalire masiku ambiri, anatsazika abale, nachoka pamenepo, napita m'ngalawa ku Siriya, pamodzi naye Prisila ndi Akwila; popeza anameta mutu wake m'Kenkrea; pakuti adawinda." 
Acts18:19 Ndipo iwo anafika ku Efeso, ndipo iye analekana nao pamenepo: koma iye yekha analowa m'sunagoge, natsutsana ndi Ayuda." 
Acts18:20 Pamene iwo anamfunsa iye kuti akhale nthawi ina yoenjezerapo, sanavomereza;" 
Acts18:21 koma anawatsanzika, nati, Akafuna Mulungu, ndidzabwera kwa inu; ndipo anachoka ku Efeso m'ngalawa." 
Acts18:22 Ndipo pamene anakocheza pa Kesareya, anakwera naulonjera Mpingo, natsikira ku Antiokeya." 
Acts18:23 Atakhala kumeneko nthawi, anachoka, napita ku madera osiyanasiyana a dziko la Galatiya ndi la Frijiya, nakhazikitsa ophunzira onse." 
Acts18:24 Ndipo anafika ku Efeso Myuda wina dzina lake Apolo, fuko lake la ku Aleksandriya, munthu wolankhula mwanzeru; ndipo anali wamphamvu m'malembo." 
Acts18:25 Iyeyo anaphunzitsidwa m'njira ya Ambuye; pokhala nao mzimu wachangu, ananena ndi kuphunzitsa mosamalira zinthu za Yesu, ndiye wodziwa ubatizo wa Yohane wokha;" 
Acts18:26 ndipo iye anayamba kulankhula molimba mtima m'sunagoge, koma pamene anamumva iye Prisila ndi Akwila, anamtenga, namfotokozera njira ya Mulungu mosamalitsa." 
Acts18:27 Ndipo pamene iye anafuna kuoloka kunka ku Akaya, abale anamfulumiza, ndi kulembera akalata kwa ophunzira kuti amlandire: ndipo pamene anafika, iye anathangata ndithu iwo akukhulupirira mwa chisomo;" 
Acts18:28 pakuti ndi mphamvu anatsutsa Ayuda, pamaso pa anthu, nasonyeza mwa malembo kuti Yesu ndiye Khristu." 
Acts19:1 Ndipo panali, pamene Apolo anali ku Korinto, Paulo anapita pa maiko a pamtunda, nafika ku Efeso, napeza ophunzira ena;" 
Acts19:2 ndipo anati kwa iwo, Kodi munalandira Mzimu Woyera pamene munakhulupirira? Ndipo anati, Iai, sitinamva konse kuti Mzimu Woyera waperekedwa." 
Acts19:3 Ndipo anati, Nanga mwabatizidwa m'chiyani? Ndipo anati, Mu ubatizo wa Yohane." 
Acts19:4 Ndipo anati Paulo, Yohane anabatiza ndi ubatizo wa kutembenuka mtima, nati kwa anthu, kuti amkhulupirire Iye amene adzadza pambuyo pake, ndiye Yesu." 
Acts19:5 Pamene anamva ichi, anabatizidwa m'dzina la Ambuye Yesu." 
Acts19:6 Ndipo pamene Paulo anaika manja ake pa iwo, Mzimu Woyera anadza pa iwo; ndipo analankhula ndi malilime, nanenera." 
Acts19:7 Onsewo anali ngati amuna khumi ndi awiri. 
Acts19:8 Ndipo iye analowa m'sunagoge, nanena molimba mtima, miyezi itatu, natsutsana ndi kukopa kunena za Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Acts19:9 Koma pamene ena anaumitsa mtima ndi kusamvera, nanenera zoipa Njirayo pamaso pa anthu, anawachokera, napatutsa ophunzira, nafotokozera masiku onse m'sukulu ya Tirano." 
Acts19:10 Ndipo anachita chomwecho zaka ziwiri; kotero kuti onse akukhala m'Asiya anamva mau a Ambuye, Ayuda ndi Agriki." 
Acts19:11 Ndipo Mulungu anachita zamphamvu za pa zokha ndi manja a Paulo; 
Acts19:12 kotero kuti anamuka nazo kwa odwala nsalu zopukutira ndi za pantchito, zochokera pathupi pake, ndipo nthenda zinawachokera, ndi ziwanda zinatuluka." 
Acts19:13 Koma Ayuda enanso oyendayenda, otulutsa ziwanda, anadziyesa kutchula pa iwo amene anali ndi ziwanda dzina la Ambuye Yesu, kuti, Ndikulumbirirani pa Yesu amene amlalika Paulo." 
Acts19:14 Ndipo panali ana amuna asanu ndi awiri a Skeva, Myuda, mkulu wa ansembe amene anachita ichi." 
Acts19:15 Ndipo unayankha mzimu woipa, nuti kwa iwo, Yesu ndimzindikira, ndi Paulo ndimdziwa, koma inu ndinu ayani?" 
Acts19:16 Ndipo munthu, mwa iye amene munali mzimu woipa, anawalumphira nawaposa, nawalaka onse awiriwo, kotero kuti anathawa m'nyumba amaliseche ndi olasidwa." 
Acts19:17 Zimenezo zidamveka kwa onse, Ayuda ndi Agriki, amene anakhala ku Efeso; ndipo mantha anagwera onsewo, ndipo dzina la Ambuye Yesu linakuzika." 
Acts19:18 Ndipo ambiri a iwo akukhulupirirawo anadza, navomereza, nafotokoza machitidwe ao." 
Acts19:19 Ndipo ambiri a iwo akuchita zamatsenga anasonkhanitsa mabuku ao, nawatentha pamaso pa onse; ndipo anawerenga mtengo wake, napeza ndalama zasiliva zikwi makumi asanu." 
Acts19:20 Chotero mau a Ambuye anachuluka mwamphamvu nalakika. 
Acts19:21 Ndipo zitatha izi, Paulo anatsimikiza mu mzimu wake, atapita pa Masedoniya ndi Akaya, kunka ku Yerusalemu, kuti, Nditamuka komweko ndiyenera kuonanso ku Roma." 
Acts19:22 Pamene anatuma ku Masedoniya awiri a iwo anamtumikira, Timoteo ndi Erasto, iye mwini anakhalabe nthawi m'Asiya." 
Acts19:23 Nthawi yomweyo kunali phokoso lambiri kunena za Njirayo. 
Acts19:24 Pakuti munthu wina dzina lake Demetrio wosula siliva, amene anapanga tiakachisi tasiliva, ta Aritemi, anaonetsera amisiri phindu lambiri;" 
Acts19:25 amenewo iye anawasonkhanitsa pamodzi ndi amisiri a ntchito yomweyo, nati, Amuna inu, mudziwa kuti ndi malonda awa ife tipeza chuma chathu." 
Acts19:26 Ndipo muona ndi kumva, kuti si pa Efeso pokha, koma monga pa Asiya ponse, Paulo uyu akopa ndi kutembenutsa anthu ambiri, ndi kuti, Si milungu iyi imene ipangidwa ndi manja:" 
Acts19:27 ndipo tiopa ife kuti ntchito yathuyi idzayamba kunyonyosoka; komanso kuti Kachisi wa mulungu wamkazi Aritemi adzayamba kuyesedwa wachabe; ndiponso kuti iye adzayamba kutsitsidwa ku ukulu wake, iye amene a m'Asiya onse, ndi onse a m'dziko lokhalamo anthu, ampembedza." 
Acts19:28 Ndipo pamene anamva, anadzala ndi mkwiyo, nafuula, nati, Wamkulu ndi Aritemi wa ku Efeso." 
Acts19:29 Ndipo m'mudzi monse munachita piringupiringu, nathamangira onse pamodzi ku bwalo losewera, atagwira Gayo ndi Aristariko, anthu a ku Masedoniya, alendo anzake a Paulo." 
Acts19:30 Ndipo pamene Paulo anafuna kulowa kwa anthu, ophunzira ake sanamloleza." 
Acts19:31 Ndipo akulu ena a Asiyanso, popeza anali abwenzi ake, anatumiza mau kwa iye, nampempha asadziponye kubwalo lakusewera." 
Acts19:32 Ndipo ena anafuula kanthu kena, ena kanthu kena; pakuti msonkhanowo unasokonezeka; ndipo unyinji sunadziwa chifukwa chake cha kusonkhana." 
Acts19:33 Ndipo anatulutsa Aleksandro m'khamumo, kumtulutsa iye Ayuda. Ndipo Alesandro anatambasula dzanja, nafuna kudzikanira kwa anthu adasonkhanawo." 
Acts19:34 Koma pozindikira kuti ali Myuda, kunali mau amodzi a kwa onse akufuula monga maora awiri, Wamkulu ndi Aritemi wa Aefeso."
