Acts19:35 Ndipo pamene mlembi adatontholetsa khamulo, anati, Amuna a Efeso inu, munthuyu ndani wosadziwa kuti mudzi wa Aefeso ndiwo wosungira Kachisi wa Aritemi wamkulu, ndi fano lidachokera kwa Zeusi?" 
Acts19:36 Popeza tsono izi sizikanika, muyenera inu kukhala chete, ndi kusachita kanthu kaliuma." 
Acts19:37 Pakuti mwatenga anthu awa, osakhala olanda za m'Kachisi, kapena ochitira mulungu wathu mwano." 
Acts19:38 Ngati tsono Demetrio ndi amisiri okhala naye, ali ndi mlandu ndi munthu, mabwalo a milandu alipo, ndi ziwanga zilipo; anenezane." 
Acts19:39 Koma ngati mufuna kanthu ka zinthu zina, kadzakonzeka m'msonkhano wolamulidwa." 
Acts19:40 Pakutinso palipo potiopsa kuti adzatineneza za chipolowe chalero; popeza palibe chifukwa cha kufotokozera za chipiringu chimene. 
Acts19:41 Ndipo pamene ananena izi, anamasula msonkhano." 
Acts20:1 Ndipo litaleka phokoso, Paulo anaitana ophunzirawo, ndipo m'mene anawachenjeza, analawirana nao, natuluka kunka ku Masedoniya." 
Acts20:2 Ndipo m'mene atapitapita m'mbali zijazo, nawachenjeza, anadza ku Grisi." 
Acts20:3 Ndipo m'mene adakhalako miyezi itatu, ndipo atampangira chiwembu Ayuda, poti iye apite ndi ngalawa ku Siriya, anatsimikiza mtima abwerere popyola Masedoniya." 
Acts20:4 Ndipo anamperekeza kufikira ku Asiya Sopatere mwana wa Piro, wa ku Berea; ndipo a Atesalonika, Aristariko ndi Sekundo; ndi Gayo wa ku Deribe, ndi Timoteo; ndi a ku Asiya, Tikiko ndi Trofimo." 
Acts20:5 Koma iwowa adatitsogolera, natilinda ku Troasi." 
Acts20:6 Ndipo tinapita m'ngalawa kuchokera ku Filipi, atapita masiku a mkate wopanda chotupitsa, ndipo popita masiku asanu tinawapeza ku Troasi; pamenepo tinatsotsa masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Acts20:7 Ndipo tsiku loyamba la sabata, posonkhana ife kunyema mkate, Paulo anawafotokozera mau, popeza anati achoke m'mawa mwake; ndipo ananena chinenere kufikira pakati pa usiku." 
Acts20:8 Ndipo munali nyali zambiri m'chipinda chapamwamba m'mene tinasonkhanamo. 
Acts20:9 Ndipo mnyamata dzina lake Yutiko anakhala pazenera, wogwidwa nato tulo tatikulu; ndipo pakukhala chifotokozere Paulo, ndipo pogwidwa nato tulo, anagwa posanja pachiwiri, ndipo anamtola wakufa." 
Acts20:10 Ndipo potsikirako Paulo, anamgwera namfungatira, nati, Musachite phokoso, pakuti moyo wake ulipo." 
Acts20:11 Ndipo m'mene adakwera, nanyema mkate, nadya, nakamba nao nthawi, kufikira kucha, anachokapo." 
Acts20:12 Ndipo anadza naye mnyamata ali wamoyo, natonthozedwa kwakukulu." 
Acts20:13 Koma ife tinatsogolera kunka kungalawa, ndipo tinapita ku Aso, pamenepo tinati timlandire Paulo; pakuti anatipangira chomwecho, koma anati ayenda pamtunda yekha." 
Acts20:14 Ndipo pamene anakomana ndi ife ku Aso, tinamlandira, ndipo tinafika ku Mitilene." 
Acts20:15 Ndipo m'mene tidachokerapo, m'mawa mwake tinafika pandunji pa Kiyo; ndi m'mawa mwake tinangokocheza ku Samo, ndi m'mawa mwake tinafika ku Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Pakuti Paulo adatsimikiza mtima apitirire pa Efeso, angataye nthawi m'Asiya; pakuti anafulumira, ngati kutheka, akhale ku Yerusalemu tsiku la Pentekoste." 
Acts20:17 Ndipo pokhala ku Mileto anatuma ku Efeso, naitana akulu a Mpingo." 
Acts20:18 Ndipo pamene anafika kuli iye, anati kwa iwo, Mudziwa inu kuyambira tsiku loyamba ndinafika ku Asiya, makhalidwe anga pamodzi ndi inu nthawi yonse," 
Acts20:19 wotumikira Ambuye ndi kudzichepetsa konse ndi misozi, ndi mayesero anandigwera ndi ziwembu za Ayuda;" 
Acts20:20 kuti sindinakubisirani zinthu zopindulira, osazilalikira kwa inu, ndi kukuphunzitsani inu pabwalo ndi m'nyumba zanu," 
Acts20:21 ndi kuchitira umboni Ayuda ndi Agriki wa kutembenuka mtima kulinga kwa Mulungu, ndi chikhulupiriro cholinga kwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu." 
Acts20:22 Ndipo, taonani, ndipita ku Yerusalemu womangidwa mumzimu, wosadziwa zimene zidzandigwera ine kumeneko;" 
Acts20:23 koma kuti Mzimu Woyera andichitira umboni m'midzi yonse, ndi kunena kuti nsinga ndi zisautso zindilindira." 
Acts20:24 Komatu sindiuyesa kanthu moyo wanga, kuti uli wa mtengo wake kwa ine ndekha; kotero kuti ndikatsirize njira yanga, ndi utumiki ndinaulandira kwa Ambuye Yesu, kuchitira umboni Uthenga Wabwino wa chisomo cha Mulungu." 
Acts20:25 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, ndidziwa ine kuti inu nonse amene ndinapitapita mwa inu kulalikira ufumuwo, simudzaonanso nkhope yanga." 
Acts20:26 Chifukwa chake ndikuchitirani umboni lero lomwe, kuti ndilibe kanthu ndi mwazi wa anthu onse." 
Acts20:27 Pakuti sindinakubisirani pakukulalikirani uphungu wonse wa Mulungu. 
Acts20:28 Tadzichenjerani nokha, ndi gulu lonse, pamenepo Mzimu Woyera anakuikani oyang'anira, kuti muwete Mpingo wa Mulungu, umene anaugula ndi mwazi wa Iye yekha." 
Acts20:29 Ndidziwa ine kuti, nditachoka ine, adzalowa mimbulu yosautsa, yosalekerera gululo;" 
Acts20:30 ndipo mwa inu nokha adzauka anthu, olankhula zokhotakhota, kupatutsa ophunzira awatsate." 
Acts20:31 Chifukwa chake dikirani, nimukumbukire kuti zaka zitatu sindinaleka usiku ndi usana kuchenjeza yense wa inu ndi misozi." 
Acts20:32 Ndipo tsopano ndikuikizani kwa Mulungu, ndi kwa mau a chisomo chake, chimene chili ndi mphamvu yakumangirira ndi kupatsa inu cholowa mwa onse oyeretsedwa." 
Acts20:33 Sindinasirira siliva, kapena golide, kapena chovala cha munthu aliyense." 
Acts20:34 Mudziwa inu nokha kuti manja anga awa anatumikira zosowa zanga, ndi za iwo akukhala ndi ine." 
Acts20:35 M'zinthu zonse ndinakupatsani chitsanzo, chakuti pogwiritsa ntchito, kotero muyenera kuthandiza ofooka ndi kukumbuka mau a Ambuye Yesu, kuti anati yekha, Kupatsa kutidalitsa koposa kulandira." 
Acts20:36 Ndipo m'mene ananena izi, anagwada pansi, napemphera ndi iwo onse." 
Acts20:37 Ndipo onsewa analira kwambiri, namkupatira Paulo pakhosi pake, nampsompsona," 
Acts20:38 nalira makamaka chifukwa cha mau adanenawa, kuti sadzaonanso nkhope yake. Ndipo anamperekeza iye kungalawa." 
Acts21:1 Ndipo kunali, titalekana nao ndi kukankha ngalawa, tinadza molunjika ku Kosi, ndi m'mawa mwake ku Rode, ndipo pochokerapo ku Patara;" 
Acts21:2 ndipo m'mene tinapeza ngalawa yakuoloka kunka ku Fenisiya, tinalowamo, ndi kupita nayo." 
Acts21:3 Ndipo pamene tinafika popenyana ndi Kipro, tinachisiya kulamanzere, nkupita ku Siriya; ndipo tinakocheza ku Tiro; pakuti pamenepo ngalawa inafuna kutula akatundu ake." 
Acts21:4 Ndipo m'mene tinapeza ophunzira, tinakhalako masiku asanu ndi awiri; ndipo iwowa ananena ndi Paulo mwa Mzimu, kuti asakwere ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:5 Ndipo kunali pamene tidatsiriza masikuwa, tidachoka ndi kunka ulendo wathu; ndipo iwo onse, akazi ndi ana, anatiperekeza kufikira kutuluka m'mudzi; ndipo pogwadira pa mchenga wa kunyanja, tinapemphera," 
Acts21:6 ndi kulawirana; ndipo tinalowa m'ngalawa, koma iwo anabwera kwao." 
Acts21:7 Ndipo ife titatsiriza ulendo wathu wochokera ku Tiro, tinafika ku Ptolemaisi; ndipo m'mene tidalonjera abale, tinakhala nao tsiku limodzi." 
Acts21:8 Ndipo m'mawa mwake tinachoka, ndipo tinafika ku Kesareya, ndipo m'mene tinalowa m'nyumba ya Filipo mlaliki, mmodzi wa asanu ndi awiri aja, tinakhala naye." 
Acts21:9 Ndipo munthuyu anali nao ana akazi anai, anamwali, amene ananenera." 
Acts21:10 Ndipo pokhalapo masiku ambiri, anatsika ku Yudeya mneneri, dzina lake Agabu." 
Acts21:11 Ndipo anadza kwa ife natenga lamba la Paulo, nadzimanga yekha manja ndi mapazi, nati, Atero Mzimu Woyera, Munthu mwini lamba ili, adzammanga kotero Ayuda a m'Yerusalemu, nadzampereka m'manja a amitundu." 
Acts21:12 Koma pamene tinamva izi tinamdandaulira ife ndi iwo a komweko, asakwere iye kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:13 Pamenepo Paulo anayankha, Muchitanji, polira ndi kundiswera mtima? Pakuti ndakonzeka ine si kumangidwa kokha, komatunso kufera ku Yerusalemu chifukwa cha dzina la Ambuye Yesu." 
Acts21:14 Ndipo pokana iye kukopeka, tinaleka, ndi kuti, Kufuna kwa Ambuye kuchitidwe." 
Acts21:15 Ndipo atapita masiku awa tinakonza akatundu athu, ntikwera ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:16 Ndipo anamuka nafenso ena a ophunzira a ku Kesareya, natenganso wina Mnasoni wa ku Kipro, wophunzira wakale, amene adzatichereza." 
Acts21:17 Ndipo pofika ife ku Yerusalemu, abale anatilandira mokondwera." 
Acts21:18 Ndipo m'mawa mwake Paulo analowa nafe kwa Yakobo; ndi akulu onse anali pomwepo. 
Acts21:19 Ndipo atawalonjera iwo, anawafotokozera chimodzichimodzi zimene Mulungu anachita kwa amitundu mwa utumiki wake." 
Acts21:20 Ndipo pamene anazimva, analemekeza Mulungu; nati kwa iye, Uona, mbale, kuti ambirimbiri mwa Ayuda akhulupirira; ndipo ali nacho changu onsewa, cha pa chilamulo;" 
Acts21:21 ndipo anamva za iwe, kuti uphunzitsa Ayuda onse a kwa amitundu apatukane naye Mose, ndi kuti asadule ana ao, kapena asayende monga mwa miyambo." 
Acts21:22 Nchiyani tsono? Adzamva ndithu kuti wafika. 
Acts21:23 Chifukwa chake uchite ichi tikuuza iwe; tili nao amuna anai amene anawinda; 
Acts21:24 amenewa uwatenge nudziyeretse nao pamodzi, nuwalipirire, kuti amete mutu; ndipo adzadziwa onse kuti zomveka za iwe nzachabe, koma kuti iwe wekhanso uyenda molunjika, nusunga chilamulo." 
Acts21:25 Koma kunena za amitundu adakhulupirirawo, tinalembera ndi kulamulira kuti asale zoperekedwa kwa mafano, ndi mwazi, ndi zopotola, ndi dama." 
Acts21:26 Pamenepo Paulo anatenga anthuwo, ndipo m'mawa mwake m'mene anadziyeretsa nao pamodzi, analowa m'Kachisi, nauza chimalizidwe cha masiku a kuyeretsa, kufikira adawaperekera iwo onse mtulo." 
Acts21:27 Ndipo pamene masiku asanu ndi awiri anati amalizidwe, Ayuda a ku Asiya pomuona iye m'Kachisi, anautsa khamu lonse la anthu, namgwira," 
Acts21:28 nafuula, Amuna a Israele, tithandizeni; ameneyu ndi munthu uja anaphunzitsa onse ponsepo ponenera anthu, ndi chilamulo, ndi malo ano; ndiponso anatenga Agriki nalowa nao m'Kachisi, nadetsa malo ano oyera." 
Acts21:29 Pakuti adaona Trofimo wa ku Efeso kale pamodzi ndi iye mumzinda; ameneyo anayesa kuti Paulo anamtenga nalowa naye ku Kachisi. 
Acts21:30 Ndipo mudzi wonse unasokonezeka, ndipo anthu anathamangira pamodzi; nagwira Paulo namkoka kumtulutsa m'Kachisi; ndipo pomwepo pamakomo panatsekedwa." 
Acts21:31 Ndipo m'mene anafuna kumupha iye, wina anamuuza kapitao wamkulu wa gululo kuti m'Yerusalemu monse muli piringupiringu." 
Acts21:32 Ndipo posachedwa iye anatenga asilikali ndi akenturiyo, nathamanga, nawatsikira; ndipo iwowa, pakuona kapitao wamkulu ndi asilikali, analeka kumpanda Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Pamenepo poyandikira kapitao wamkulu anamgwira iye, nalamulira ammange ndi maunyolo awiri; ndipo anafunsira, ndiye yani, ndipo anachita chiyani?" 
Acts21:34 Koma wina anafuula kena, wina kena, m'khamumo; ndipo m'mene sanathe kudziwa zoona chifukwa cha phokosolo analamulira amuke naye kulinga." 
Acts21:35 Ndipo pamene anafika pamakwerero, kudatero kuti anamsenza asilikali chifukwa cha kulimbalimba kwa khamulo;" 
Acts21:36 pakuti unyinji wa anthu unatsata, nufuula, Mchotse iye." 
Acts21:37 Ndipo poti alowe naye m'linga, Paulo ananena kwa kapitao wamkulu, Mundilole ndikuuzeni kanthu? Ndipo anati, Kodi udziwa Chigriki?" 
Acts21:38 Si ndiwe Mwejipito uja kodi, unachita mipanduko kale lija, ndi kutsogolera ambanda aja zikwi zinai kuchipululu?" 
Acts21:39 Koma Paulo anati, Ine ndine munthu Myuda, wa ku Tariso wa m'Silisiya, mfulu ya mudzi womveka; ndipo ndikupemphani mundilole ndilankhule ndi anthu." 
Acts21:40 Ndipo m'mene adamlola, Paulo anaimirira pamakwerero, natambalitsira anthu dzanja; ndipo pokhala chete onse, analankhula nao m'chinenedwe cha Chihebri, nanena:" 
Acts22:1 Amuna, abale, ndi atate, mverani chodzikanira changa tsopano, cha kwa inu." 
Acts22:2 Ndipo pakumva kuti analankhula nao m'chinenedwe cha Chihebri, anaposa kukhala chete; ndipo anati:" 
Acts22:3 Ine ndine munthu Myuda, wobadwa m'Tariso wa Silisiya, koma ndaleredwa m'mzinda muno, pa mapazi a Gamaliele, wolangizidwa monga mwa chitsatidwe chenicheni cha chilamulo cha makolo athu, ndipo ndinali wachangu, cholinga kwa Mulungu, monga muli inu nonse lero;" 
Acts22:4 ndipo ndinalondalonda Njira iyi kufikira imfa, ndi kumanga ndi kupereka kundende amuna ndi akazi." 
Acts22:5 Monganso mkulu wa ansembe andichitira umboni, ndi bwalo lonse la akulu; kwa iwo amenenso ndinalandira akalata kunka nao kwa abale, ndipo ndinapita ku Damasiko, kuti ndikatenge iwonso akukhala kumeneko kudza nao omangidwa ku Yerusalemu, kuti alangidwe." 
Acts22:6 Ndipo kunali, pakupita ine ndi kuyandikira ku Damasiko, monga usana, mwadzidzidzi kunandiwalira pondizungulira ine kuunika kwakukulu kochokera kumwamba." 
Acts22:7 Ndipo ndinagwa pansitu, ndipo ndinamva mau akunena nane, Saulo, Saulo, undilondalonderanji Ine?" 
Acts22:8 Ndipo ndinayankha, Ndinu yani Mbuye? Ndipo anati kwa ine, Ndine Yesu wa ku Nazarete, amene umlondalonda." 
Acts22:9 Ndipo iwo akukhala nane anaonadi kuunika, koma sanamva mau akulankhula nane." 
Acts22:10 Ndipo ndinati, Ndidzachita chiyani, Ambuye? Ndipo Ambuye anati kwa ine, Tauka, pita ku Damasiko; kumeneko adzakufotokozera zonse zoikika kwa iwe uzichite." 
Acts22:11 Ndipo popeza sindinapenya, chifukwa cha ulemerero wa kuunikako, anandigwira dzanja iwo amene anali ndi ine, ndipo ndinafika ku Damasiko." 
Acts22:12 Ndipo munthu dzina lake Ananiya, ndiye munthu wopembedza monga mwa chilamulo, amene amchitira umboni wabwino Ayuda onse akukhalako," 
Acts22:13 anadza kwa ine, ndipo poimirirapo anati kwa ine, Saulo, mbale, penyanso. Ndipo ine, ora lomweli ndinampenya." 
Acts22:14 Ndipo anati, Mulungu wa makolo athu anakusankhiratu udziwe chifuniro chake, nuone Wolungamayo, numve mau otuluka m'kamwa mwake." 
Acts22:15 Ndipo udzamkhalira Iye mboni kwa anthu onse, za izo udaziona ndi kuzimva." 
Acts22:16 Ndipo tsopano uchedweranji? Tauka, nubatizidwe ndi kusamba kuchotsa machimo ako, nuitane pa dzina lake." 
Acts22:17 Ndipo kunali, nditabwera ku Yerusalemu ndinalikupemphera m'Kachisi, ndinachita ngati kukomoka," 
Acts22:18 ndipo ndinamuona Iye, nanena nane, Fulumira, tuluka msanga m'Yerusalemu; popeza sadzalandira umboni wako wakunena za Ine." 
Acts22:19 Ndipo ndinati ine, Ambuye, adziwa iwo okha kuti ndinali kuika m'ndende ndi kuwapanda m'masunagoge onse iwo akukhulupirira Inu;" 
Acts22:20 ndipo pamene anakhetsa mwazi wa Stefano mboni yanu, ine ndemwe ndinalikuimirirako, ndi kuvomerezana nao, ndi kusunga zovala za iwo amene anamupha iye." 
Acts22:21 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Pita; chifukwa Ine ndidzakutuma iwe kunka kutali kwa amitundu." 
Acts22:22 Ndipo adamumva kufikira mau awa; ndipo anakweza mau ao nanena, Achoke pa dziko lapansi munthu wotere; pakuti sayenera iye kukhala ndi moyo." 
Acts22:23 Ndipo pakufuula iwo, ndi kutaya zovala zao, ndi kuwaza fumbi mumlengalenga," 
Acts22:24 kapitao wamkulu analamulira kuti amtenge iye kulowa naye kulinga, nati amfunsefunse ndi kumkwapula, kuti adziwe chifukwa chake nchiyani kuti amfuulira chomwecho." 
Acts22:25 Ndipo m'mene anammanga iye ndi nsingazo, Paulo anati kwa kenturiyo wakuimirirako, Kodi nkuloleka kwa inu kukwapula munthu Mroma, mlandu wake wosamveka?" 
Acts22:26 Ndipo pakumva ichi kenturiyoyo, ananka kwa kapitao wamkulu, namuuza, nanena, Nchiyani ichi uti uchite? Pakuti munthuyo ndiye Mroma." 
Acts22:27 Ndipo kapitao wamkuluyo anadza, nati kwa iye, Ndiuze, iwe ndiwe Mroma kodi? Ndipo anati, Inde." 
Acts22:28 Ndipo kapitao wamkulu anayankha, Ine ndalandira ufulu umene ndi kuperekapo mtengo wake waukulu. Ndipo Paulo anati, Koma ine ndabadwa Mroma." 
Acts22:29 Pamenepo ndipo iwo amene anati amfunsefunse, anamsiya; ndipo kapitao wamkulunso anaopa, pozindikira kuti ndiye Mroma, ndiponso popeza adammanga iye." 
Acts22:30 Koma m'mawa mwake pofuna kuzindikira chifukwa chake chenicheni chakuti anamnenera Ayuda, anammasula iye, nalamulira asonkhane ansembe aakulu, ndi bwalo lonse la akulu, ndipo anatsika naye Paulo, namuika pamaso pao." 
Acts23:1 Ndipo Paulo, popenyetsetsa a m'bwalo la akulu anati, Amuna, abale, ndakhala ine pamaso pa Mulungu ndi chikumbu mtima chokoma chonse kufikira lero lomwe." 
Acts23:2 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe Ananiya analamulira akuimirirako ampande pakamwa pake. 
Acts23:3 Pamenepo Paulo anati kwa iye, Mulungu adzakupanda iwe, khoma loyeretsedwa iwe; ndipo kodi ukhala iwe wakundiweruza mlandu monga mwa chilamulo, ndipo ulamulira andipande ine posanga chilamulo?" 
Acts23:4 Ndipo iwo akuimirirako anati, Ulalatira kodi mkulu wa ansembe wa Mulungu?" 
Acts23:5 Ndipo Paulo anati, Sindinadziwa, abale, kuti ndiye mkulu wa ansembe; pakuti kwalembedwa, Usamnenera choipa mkulu wa anthu ako." 
Acts23:6 Koma pozindikira Paulo kuti ena ndi Asaduki, ndi ena Afarisi, anafuula m'bwalomo, Amuna, abale, ine ndine Mfarisi, mwana wa Afarisi: andinenera mlandu wa chiyembekezo ndi kuuka kwa akufa." 
Acts23:7 Ndipo pamene adatero, kunakhala chilekano pakati pa Afarisi ndi Asaduki; ndipo osonkhanawo anagawikana." 
Acts23:8 Pakutitu Asaduki anena kuti kulibe kuuka kwa akufa, kapena mngelo, kapena mzimu; koma Afarisi avomereza ponse pawiri." 
Acts23:9 Ndipo chidauka chipolowe chachikulu, ndipo alembi ena a kwa Afarisi anaimirira, natsutsana, nanena, Sitipeza choipa chilichonse mwa munthuyu; ndipo nanga bwanji ngati mzimu kapena mngelo walankhula naye?" 
Acts23:10 Ndipo pamene padauka chipolowe chachikulu, kapitao wamkulu anaopa kuti angamkadzule Paulo, ndipo analamulira asilikali atsike, namkwatule pakati pao, nadze naye kulowa naye m'linga." 
Acts23:11 Ndipo usiku wake Ambuye anaimirira pa iye, nati, Limbika mtima; pakuti monga wandichitira umboni ku Yerusalemu, koteronso uyenera kundichitira umboni ku Roma." 
Acts23:12 Ndipo kutacha, Ayuda anapangana chiwembu, nadzitemberera, ndi kunena kuti sadzadya kapena kumwa kanthu, kufikira atamupha Paulo;" 
Acts23:13 ndipo iwo amene adachita chilumbiro ichi anali oposa makumi anai. 
Acts23:14 Amenewo anadza kwa ansembe aakulu ndi akulu, nati, Tadzitemberera nalo temberero kuti sitidzalawa kanthu kufikira titamupha Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Potero tsopano inu ndi bwalo la akulu muzindikiritse kapitao wamkulu kuti atsike naye kwa inu, monga ngati mufuna kudziwitsitsa bwino za iye; koma tadzikonzeratu timuphe asanayandikire iye." 
Acts23:16 Koma mwana wa mlongo wake wa Paulo anamva za chifwamba chao, ndipo anadza nalowa m'linga, namfotokozera Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Ndipo Paulo anadziitanira kenturiyo wina, nati, Pita naye mnyamata uyu kwa kapitao wamkulu; pakuti ali nako kanthu kakumfotokozera iye." 
Acts23:18 Pamenepo ndipo anamtenga, napita naye kwa kapitao wamkulu, nati, Wam'nsingayo Paulo anandiitana, nandipempha ndidze naye mnyamata uyu kwa inu, ali nako kanthu kakulankhula ndi inu." 
Acts23:19 Ndipo kapitao wamkulu anamgwira dzanja, napita naye padera, namfunsa m'tseri, Chiyani ichi uli nacho kundifotokozera?" 
Acts23:20 Ndipo anati, Ayuda anapangana kuti akufunseni mutsike naye Paulo mawa kubwalo la milandu, monga ngati mufuna kufunsitsa za iye." 
Acts23:21 Pamenepo musakopedwe nao; pakuti amlalira iye oposa makumi anai a iwo amene anadzitemberera okha kuti sadzadya kapena kumwa kufikira atamupha iye; ndipo akonzekeratu tsopano nayang'anira lonjezano lanu. 
Acts23:22 Pamenepo ndipo kapitao wamkulu anauza mnyamatayo apite, namlamulira kuti, Usauze munthu yense kuti wandizindikiritsa izi." 
Acts23:23 Ndipo anaitana akenturiyo awiri, nati, Mukonzeretu asilikali mazana awiri, apite kufikira Kesareya, ndi apakavalo makumi asanu ndi awiri, ndi anthungo mazana awiri, achoke ora lachitatu la usiku;" 
Acts23:24 ndiponso mukonzeretu nyama zobereka amkwezepo Paulo, nampereke wosungika kwa Felikisi kazembeyo." 
Acts23:25 Ndipo analembera kalata wakuti: 
Acts23:26 Klaudio Lisiasi kwa kazembe womveketsa Felikisi, ndikupatsani moni." 
Acts23:27 Munthu uyu anagwiridwa ndi Ayuda, ndipo akadaphedwa ndi iwo; pamenepo ndinafikako ine ndi asilikali, ndipo ndinamlanditsa pakumva kuti ndiye Mroma." 
Acts23:28 Ndipo pofuna kuzindikira chifukwa chakuti anamnenera iye, ndinatsikira naye ku bwalo la akulu ao." 
Acts23:29 Ndipo ndinapeza kuti adamnenera za mafunso a chilamulo chao; koma analibe kumnenera kanthu kakuyenera imfa kapena nsinga. 
Acts23:30 Ndipo m'mene anandidziwitsa kuti pali chiwembu cha pa munthuyu, pomwepo ndinamtumiza kwa inu; ndipo ndalamulira akumnenera akamnenere kwa inu." 
Acts23:31 Pamenepo ndipo asilikali, monga adawalamulira, anatenga Paulo, napita naye usiku ku Antipatri." 
Acts23:32 Koma m'mawa mwake anasiya apakavalo amperekeze, nabwera kulinga;" 
Acts23:33 iwowo, m'mene anafika ku Kesareya, anapereka kalata kwa kazembe, naperekanso Paulo kwa iye." 
Acts23:34 Ndipo m'mene adawerenga anafunsa achokera m'dziko liti; ndipo pozindikira kuti anali wa ku Silisiya," 
Acts23:35 anati, Ndidzamva mlandu wako, pamene akukunenera afika. Ndipo analamulira kuti amdikire iye m'nyumba ya milandu ya Herode." 
Acts24:1 Ndipo atapita masiku asanu anatsika mkulu wa ansembe Ananiya pamodzi ndi akulu ena, ndi wogwira moyo dzina lake Tertulo; ndipo anafotokozera kazembeyo za kunenera Paulo." 
Acts24:2 Ndipo pamene adamuitana, Tertulo anayamba kumnenera ndi kunena, Popeza tili nao mtendere wambiri mwa inu, ndipo mwa kuganiziratu kwanu muukonzera mtundu wathu zotiipsa," 
Acts24:3 tizilandira ndi chiyamiko chonse, monsemo ndi ponsepo, Felikisi womveka inu." 
Acts24:4 Koma kuti ndingaonjeze kukulemetsani ndikupemphani mutimvere mwachidule ndi chifatso chanu. 
Acts24:5 Pakuti tapeza munthuyu ali ngati mliri, ndi woutsa mapanduko kwa Ayuda onse m'dziko lonse lokhalamo anthu, ndi mtsogoleri wa mpanduko wa Anazarene;" 
Acts24:6 amenenso anayesa kuipsa Kachisi; amene tamgwira. 
Acts24:7  
Acts24:8 Ndipo kwa iye mudzakhoza kuzindikira pomfunsa nokha, za izi zonse timnenerazi." 
Acts24:9 Ndipo Ayudanso anavomerezana naye, natsimikiza kuti izi zitero." 
Acts24:10 Ndipo pamene kazembe anamkodola kuti anene, Paulo anayankha, Podziwa ine kuti mwakhala woweruza wa mtundu uwu zaka zambiri, ndidzikanira mokondwera;" 
Acts24:11 popeza mukhoza kuzindikira kuti apita masiku khumi ndi awiri okha chikwerere ine ku Yerusalemu kukalambira; 
Acts24:12 ndipo sanandipeza m'Kachisi wotsutsana ndi munthu, kapena kuutsa khamu la anthu, kapena m'sunagoge kapena m'mzinda." 
Acts24:13 Ndipo sangathe kukutsimikizirani zimene andinenera ine tsopano. 
Acts24:14 Koma ichi ndivomera kwa inu, kuti monga mwa Njira yonenedwa mpatuko, momwemo nditumikira Mulungu wa makolo athu, ndi kukhulupirira zonse zili monga mwa chilamulo, ndi zolembedwa mwa aneneri;" 
Acts24:15 ndi kukhala nacho chiyembekezo cha kwa Mulungu chimene iwo okhanso achilandira, kuti kudzakhala kuuka kwa olungama ndi osalungama." 
Acts24:16 M'menemonso ndidziyesera ndekha ndikhale nacho nthawi zonse chikumbu mtima chosanditsutsa cha kwa Mulungu ndi kwa anthu. 
Acts24:17 Ndipo zitapita zaka zambiri ndinadza kutengera mtundu wanga zachifundo, ndi zopereka;" 
Acts24:18 popereka izi anandipeza woyeretsedwa m'Kachisi, wopanda khamu la anthu, kapena phokoso;" 
Acts24:19 koma panali Ayuda ena a ku Asiya, ndiwo mwenzi atakhala pano pamaso panu ndi kundinenera, ngati ali nako kanthu kotsutsa ine." 
Acts24:20 Kapena iwo amene ali kunowa anene anapeza chosalungama chotani, poimirira ine pamaso pa bwalo la akulu," 
Acts24:21 koma mau awa amodzi okha, amene ndinafuula poimirira pakati pao, Kunena za kuuka kwa akufa ndiweruzidwa ndi inu lero lino." 
Acts24:22 Koma Felikisi anawalinditsa, popeza anadziwitsadi Njirayo, nati, Pamene Lisiasi kapitao wamkulu akatsika ndidzazindikiritsa konse za kwa inu." 
Acts24:23 Ndipo analamulira kenturiyo amsunge iye, koma akhale nao ufulu, ndipo asaletse anthu ake kumtumikira." 
Acts24:24 Koma atapita masiku ena, anadza Felikisi ndi Durusila mkazi wake, ndiye Myuda, naitana Paulo, ndipo anamva iye za chikhulupiriro cha Khristu Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Ndipo m'mene anamfotokozera za chilungamo, ndi chidziletso, ndi chiweruziro chilinkudza, Felikisi anagwidwa ndi mantha, nayankha, Pita tsopano; ndipo ndikaona nthawi, ndidzakuitana iwe." 
Acts24:26 Anayembekezanso kuti Paulo adzampatsa ndalama; chifukwa chakenso anamuitana iye kawirikawiri, nakamba naye." 
Acts24:27 Koma zitapita zaka ziwiri Porkio Fesito analowa m'malo a Felikisi; ndipo Felikisi pofuna kukonda Ayuda anamsiya Paulo m'nsinga. 
Acts25:1 Pamenepo Fesito m'mene analowa dziko lake, ndipo atapita masiku atatu, anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu kuchokera ku Kesareya." 
Acts25:2 Ndipo ansembe aakulu ndi akulu a Ayuda ananenera Paulo kwa iye; ndipo iwo anamdandaulira," 
Acts25:3 nampempha kuti mlandu wake wa Paulo uipe, kuti amuitane iye adze ku Yerusalemu; iwo amchitira chifwamba kuti amuphe panjira." 
Acts25:4 Pamenepo Fesito anayankha, kuti Paulo asungike ku Kesareya, ndi kuti iye mwini adzapitako posachedwa." 
Acts25:5 Chifukwa chake, ati, iwo amene akhoza mwa inu amuke nane potsikirako, ndipo ngati kuli kanthu kosayenera mwa munthuyo amnenere iye." 
Acts25:6 Ndipo m'mene adatsotsa mwa iwo masiku asanu ndi atatu kapena khumi okha anatsikira ku Kesareya; ndipo m'mawa mwake anakhala pa mpando wachiweruziro, nalamulira kuti atenge Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Ndipo m'mene anafika iye, Ayuda adatsikawo ku Yerusalemu anaimirira pomzinga iye, namnenera zifukwa zambiri ndi zazikulu, zimene sanakhoza kuzitsimikiza;" 
Acts25:8 koma Paulo podzikanira ananena, Sindinachimwa kanthu kapena pachilamulo cha Chiyuda, kapena pa Kachisi, kapena pa Kaisara." 
Acts25:9 Koma Fesito pofuna kuyesedwa wachisomo ndi Ayuda, anayankha kwa Paulo, nati, Kodi ufuna kukwera kunka ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuweruzidwa ndi ine pomwepo kunena za zinthu izi?" 
Acts25:10 Koma Paulo anati, Ndilikuimirira pa mpando wachiweruziro wa Kaisara, pompano ndiyenera kuweruzidwa ine; Ayuda sindinawachitira kanthu koipa, monga mudziwanso nokha bwino." 
Acts25:11 Pamenepo ngati ndili wochita zoipa, ngati ndachita kanthu kakuyenera imfa, sindikana kufa; koma ngati zinthuzi awa andinenera nazo zili zachabe, palibe mmodzi akhoza kundipereka kwa iwo. Nditulukira kwa Kaisara." 
Acts25:12 Pamenepo Fesito, atakamba ndi aphungu ake, anayankha, Wanena, Nditulukira kwa Kaisara; kwa Kaisara udzapita." 
Acts25:13 Ndipo atapita masiku ena, Agripa mfumuyo, ndi Berenise anafika ku Kesareya, nalankhula Fesito." 
Acts25:14 Ndipo atatsotsako masiku ambiri, Fesito anafotokozera mfumuyo mlandu wake wa Paulo, nanena, Pali munthu adamsiya m'ndende Felikisi," 
Acts25:15 amene ansembe aakulu ndi akulu a Ayuda anamnenera kwa ine, ndili ku Yerusalemu, nandipempha ndiipitse mlandu wake." 
Acts25:16 Koma ndinawayankha, kuti machitidwe a Aroma satero, kupereka munthu asanayambe woneneredwayo kupenyana nao omnenera ndi kukhala napo podzikanira pa chomneneracho." 
Acts25:17 Potero, pamene adasonkhana pano, sindinachedwa, koma m'mawa mwake ndinakhala pa mpando wachiweruziro, ndipo ndinalamulira adze naye munthuyo." 
Acts25:18 Ndipo pamene anaimirira omneneza, sanamtchulira konse chifukwa cha zoipa zonga ndinazilingirira ine;" 
Acts25:19 koma anali nao mafunso ena otsutsana naye a chipembedzero cha iwo okha, ndi mafunso a wina Yesu, amene adafa, amene Paulo anati kuti ali ndi moyo." 
Acts25:20 Ndipo ine posinkhasinkha za mafunso awa ndinamfunsa ngati afuna kupita ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuweruzidwa komweko za izi." 
Acts25:21 Koma pakunena Paulo ndi kuti, asungidwe, akatulukire kwa Augusto, ndinaweruza asungidwe iye kufikira ndikamtumiza kwa Kaisara." 
Acts25:22 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Fesito, Ndifuna nanenso ndimve munthuyo. Anati, Mawa mudzamva iye." 
Acts25:23 M'mawa mwake tsono, atafika Agripa ndi Berenise ndi chifumu chachikulu, ndipo atalowa momvera milandu, pamodzi ndi akapitao akulu, ndi amuna omveka a mudziwo, ndipo pakulamulira Fesito, anadza naye Paulo." 
Acts25:24 Ndipo Fesito anati, Mfumu Agripa, ndi amuna inu nonse muli nafe pano pamodzi, muona uyu, amene unyinji wonse wa Ayuda anandiuza za iye, ku Yerusalemu ndi kunonso, ndi kufuula kuti sayeneranso kukhala ndi moyo." 
Acts25:25 Koma ndinapeza ine kuti sanachita kanthu koyenera imfa iye; ndipo popeza iye yekha anati akatulukire kwa Augusto, ndatsimikiza mtima kumtumizako." 
Acts25:26 Koma ndilibe ine kanthu koti ndinenetse za iye kakulembera kwa mbuye wanga. Chifukwa chake ndamtulutsira kwa inu, ndipo makamaka kwa inu, Mfumu Agripa, kuti, ndikatha kumfunsafunsa, ndikhale nako kanthu kakulembera." 
Acts25:27 Pakuti chindionekera chopanda nzeru, potumiza wam'nsinga, wosatchulanso zifukwa zoti amneneze." 
Acts26:1 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Paulo, Kwaloleka udzinenere wekha. Pamenepo Paulo, anatambasula dzanja nadzikanira:" 
Acts26:2 Ndidziyesera wamwai, Mfumu Agripa, popeza nditi ndidzikanira lero pamaso panu, za zonse zimene Ayuda andinenera nazo;" 
Acts26:3 makamaka popeza mudziwitsa miyambo yonse ndi mafunso onse a mwa Ayuda; chifukwa chake ndikupemphani mundimvere ine moleza mtima. 
Acts26:4 Mayendedwe a moyo wanga tsono, kuyambira pa chibwana changa, amene anakhala chiyambire mwa mtundu wanga m'Yerusalemu, awadziwa Ayuda onse;" 
Acts26:5 andidziwa ine chiyambire, ngati afuna kuchitapo umboni, kuti ndinakhala Mfarisi monga mwa mpatuko wolunjikitsitsa wa chipembedzero chathu." 
Acts26:6 Ndipo tsopano ndiimirira pano ndiweruzidwe pa chiyembekezo cha lonjezano limene Mulungu analichita kwa makolo athu; 
Acts26:7 kufikira komweko mafuko athu khumi ndi awiri, potumikira Mulungu kosapumula usiku ndi usana, ayembekeza kufikirako. Chifukwa cha chiyembekezo ichi, Mfumu, andinenera Ayuda." 
Acts26:8 Muchiyesa chinthu chosakhulupirika, chakuti Mulungu aukitsa akufa?" 
Acts26:9 Inedi ndinayesa ndekha, kuti kundiyenera kuchita zinthu zambiri zotsutsana nalo dzina la Yesu Mnazarayo." 
Acts26:10 Chimenenso ndinachita m'Yerusalemu: ndipo ndinatsekera ine oyera mtima ambiri m'ndende, popeza ndidalandira ulamuliro wa kwa ansembe aakulu; ndiponso pophedwa iwo, ndinavomerezapo." 
Acts26:11 Ndipo ndinawalanga kawirikawiri m'masunagoge onse, ndi kuwakakamiza anene zamwano; ndipo pakupsa mtima kwakukulu pa iwo ndinawalondalonda ndi kuwatsata ngakhale kufikira kumidzi yakunja." 
Acts26:12 M'menemo popita ine ku Damasiko ndi ulamuliro ndi ukumu wa kwa ansembe aakulu," 
Acts26:13 dzuwa lamsana, ndinaona panjira, Mfumu, kuunika kochokera kumwamba kowalitsa koposa dzuwa kunawala pondizinga ine ndi iwo akundiperekeza." 
Acts26:14 Ndipo pamene tidagwa pansi tonse, ndinamva mau akunena kwa ine m'chinenedwe cha Chihebri, Saulo, Saulo, undilondalonderanji Ine? Nkukuvuta kutsalima pachotwikira." 
Acts26:15 Ndipo ndinati, Ndinu yani Mbuye? Ndipo Ambuye anati, Ine ndine Yesu amene iwe umlondalonda." 
Acts26:16 Komatu uka, imirira pa mapazi ako; pakuti chifukwa cha ichi ndinaonekera kwa iwe, kukuika iwe ukhale mtumiki ndi mboni ya izi wandionamo Ine, ndiponso ya izi ndidzakuonekeramo iwe;" 
Acts26:17 ndi kukulanditsa kwa anthu, ndi kwa amitundu, amene Ine ndikutuma kwa iwo," 
Acts26:18 kukawatsegulira maso ao, kuti atembenuke kuchokera kumdima, kulinga kukuunika, ndi kuchokera ulamuliro wa Satana kulinga kwa Mulungu, kuti alandire iwo chikhululukiro cha machimo, ndi cholowa mwa iwo akuyeretsedwa ndi chikhulupiriro cha mwa Ine." 
Acts26:19 Potero, Mfumu Agripa, sindinakhala ine wosamvera masomphenya a Kumwamba;" 
Acts26:20 komatu kuyambira kwa iwo a m'Damasiko, ndi a m'Yerusalemu, ndi m'dziko lonse la Yudeya, ndi kwa amitundunso ndinalalikira kuti alape, natembenukire kwa Mulungu, ndi kuchita ntchito zoyenera kutembenuka mtima." 
Acts26:21 Chifukwa cha izi Ayuda anandigwira m'Kachisi, nayesa kundipha." 
Acts26:22 Pamenepo pothandizidwa ndi Mulungu, ndiimirira kufikira lero lino, ndi kuwachitira umboni ang'ono ndi akulu, osanena kanthu kena koma zimene aneneri ndi Mose ananena zidzafika;" 
Acts26:23 kuti Khristu akamve zowawa, kuti Iye, woyamba mwa kuuka kwa akufa, adzalalikira kuunika kwa anthu ndi kwa amitundu." 
Acts26:24 Koma pakudzikanira momwemo, Fesito anati ndi mau akulu, Uli wamisala Paulo; kuwerengetsa kwako kwakuchititsa misala." 
Acts26:25 Koma Paulo anati, Ndilibe misala, Fesito womvekatu; koma nditulutsa mau a choonadi ndi odziletsa." 
Acts26:26 Pakuti mfumuyo idziwa izi, kwa iye imene ndilankhula nayonso mosaopa: pakuti ndidziwadi kuti kulibe kanthu ka izi kadambisikira; pakuti ichi sichinachitika m'tseri." 
Acts26:27 Mfumu Agripa, mukhulupirira aneneri kodi? Ndidziwa kuti muwakhulupirira." 
Acts26:28 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Paulo, Ndi kundikopa pang'ono ufuna kundiyesera mkhristu." 
Acts26:29 Ndipo Paulo anati, Mwenzi atalola Mulungu, kuti ndi kukopa pang'ono, kapena ndi kukopa kwambiri, si inu nokha, komatunso onse akundimva ine lero, akadakhala otero onga ndili ine, osanena nsinga izi." 
Acts26:30 Ndipo ananyamuka mfumu, ndi kazembe, ndi Berenise, ndi iwo akukhala nao;" 
Acts26:31 ndipo atapita padera analankhula wina ndi mnzake, nanena, Munthu uyu sanachita kanthu koyenera imfa, kapena nsinga." 
Acts26:32 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Fesito, Tikadakhoza kumasula munthuyu, akadapanda kunena, Ndikatulukire kwa Kaisara." 
Acts27:1 Ndipo pamene padatsimikizika kuti tipite m'ngalawa kunka ku Italiya, anapereka Paulo ndi andende ena kwa kenturiyo dzina lake Julio, wa gulu la Augusto." 
Acts27:2 Ndipo m'mene tidalowa m'ngalawa ya ku Adramitio ikati ipite kunka ku malo a ku mbali ya Asiya, tinakankha, ndipo Aristariko Mmasedoniya wa ku Tesalonika, anali nafe." 
Acts27:3 Ndipo m'mawa mwake tinangokocheza ku Sidoni; ndipo Julio anachitira Paulo mwachikondi, namlola apite kwa abwenzi ake amchereze." 
Acts27:4 Ndipo pokankhanso pamenepo, tinapita kuseri kwa Kipro, popeza mphepo inaomba mokomana nafe." 
Acts27:5 Ndipo pamene tidapyola nyanja ya kunsi kwake kwa Silisiya ndi Pamfiliya, tinafika ku Mira wa Likiya." 
Acts27:6 Ndipo kenturiyo anapezako ngalawa ya ku Aleksandriya, ilikupita ku Italiya, ndipo anatilongamo." 
Acts27:7 Ndipo m'mene tidapita pang'onopang'ono masiku ambiri, ndi kufika movutika pandunji pa Kinido, ndipo popeza siinatilolanso mphepo, tinapita m'tseri mwa Krete, pandunji pa Salimone;" 
Acts27:8 ndipo popazapazapo movutika, tinafika kumalo ena dzina lake Pokocheza Pokoma; pafupi pamenepo panali mudzi wa Lasea." 
Acts27:9 Ndipo itapita nthawi yambiri, ndipo unayambokhala woopsa ulendowo, popezanso nyengo ya kusala chakudya idapita kale, Paulo anawachenjeza," 
Acts27:10 nanena nao, Amuna inu, ndiona ine kuti ulendo udzatitengera kuonongeka ndi kutayika kwambiri, si kwa akatundu okha kapena ngalawa yokha, komatunso kwa moyo wathu." 
Acts27:11 Koma kenturiyo anakhulupirira watsigiro ndi mwini ngalawa makamaka, wosasamala mau a Paulo." 
Acts27:12 Ndipo popeza dooko silinakoma kugonapo nyengo yachisanu, unyinji unachita uphungu ndi kuti amasule nachokepo, ngati kapena nkutheka afikire ku Fenikisi, ndi kugonako, ndilo dooko la ku Krete, loloza kumpoto ndi kumwera." 
Acts27:13 Ndipo poomba pang'ono mwera, poyesa kuti anaona chofunirako, anakoka nangula, napita m'mbali mwa Krete." 
Acts27:14 Koma patapita pang'ono idaombetsa kuchokerako mphepo ya namondwe, yonenedwa Yurakulo;" 
Acts27:15 ndipo pogwidwa nayo ngalawa, yosakhoza kupitanso mokomana nayo mphepo, tidangoleka, ndipo tinangotengedwa." 
Acts27:16 Ndipo popita kuseri kwa chisumbu chaching'ono dzina lake Kauda, tinakhoza kumangitsa bwato koma movutika;" 
Acts27:17 ndipo m'mene adaukweza, anachita nazo zothandizira, nakulunga ngalawa; ndipo pakuopa kuti angatayike pa Siriti, anatsitsa matanga, natengedwa motero." 
Acts27:18 Ndipo povutika kwakukulu ndi namondweyo, m'mawa mwake anayamba kutaya akatundu;" 
Acts27:19 ndipo tsiku lachitatu anataya ndi manja ao a iwo eni zipangizo za ngalawa. 
Acts27:20 Ndipo m'mene dzuwa kapena nyenyezi sizinatiwalira masiku ambiri, ndipo namondwe wosati wamng'ono anatigwera, chiyembekezo chonse chakuti tipulumuke chidatichokera pomwepo." 
Acts27:21 Ndipo pamene atakhala nthawi yaikulu osadya kanthu, Paulo anaimirira pakati pao, nati, Amuna inu, mukadamvera ine, osachoka ku Krete, osadzitengera kuonongeka ndi kutayika kumene." 
Acts27:22 Koma tsopano ndikuchenjezani mulimbike mtima; pakuti sadzatayika wamoyo mmodzi mwa inu, koma ngalawa ndiyo." 
Acts27:23 Pakuti anaimirira kwa ine usiku walero mngelo wa Mulungu amene ndili wake, amenenso ndimtumikira," 
Acts27:24 nanena, Usaope Paulo; ukaimirira pamaso pa Kaisara; ndipo, taona, Mulungu anakupatsa onse amene akuyenda nawe pamodzi." 
Acts27:25 Chifukwa chake, limbikani mtima, amuna inu; pakuti ndikhulupirira Mulungu, kuti kudzatero monga momwe ananena ndi ine." 
Acts27:26 Koma tiyenera kutayika pa chisumbu chakuti. 
Acts27:27 Koma pofika usiku wakhumi ndi chinai, potengedwa ife kwina ndi kwina m'nyanja ya Adriya, pakati pa usiku amalinyero anazindikira kuti analikuyandikira kumtunda;" 
Acts27:28 ndipo anayesa madzi, napeza mikwamba makumi awiri; ndipo katapita kanthawi, anayesanso, napeza mikwamba khumi ndi isanu." 
Acts27:29 Ndipo pakuopa tingatayike pamiyala, anaponya anangula anai kumakaliro, nakhumba kuti kuche." 
Acts27:30 Ndipo m'mene amalinyero anafuna kuthawa m'ngalawa, natsitsira bwato m'nyanja, monga ngati anati aponye anangula kulikulu," 
Acts27:31 Paulo anati kwa kenturiyo ndi kwa asilikali, Ngati awa sakhala m'ngalawa inu simukhoza kupulumuka." 
Acts27:32 Pamenepo asilikali anadula zingwe za bwato, naligwetsa." 
Acts27:33 Ndipo popeza kulinkucha, Paulo anawachenjeza onse adye kanthu, nati, Lero ndilo tsiku lakhumi ndi chinai limene munalindira, ndi kusala chakudya, osalawa kanthu." 
Acts27:34 Momwemo ndikuchenjezani mutenge kanthu kakudya; pakuti kumeneku ndi kwa chipulumutso chanu; pakuti silidzatayika tsitsi la pa mutu wa mmodzi wa inu. 
Acts27:35 Ndipo atanena izi, ndi kutenga mkate, anayamika Mulungu pamaso pa onse; ndipo m'mene adaunyema anayamba kudya." 
Acts27:36 Ndipo anakhala olimbika mtima onse, natenga chakudya iwo omwe." 
Acts27:37 Ndipo ife tonse tili m'ngalawa ndife anthu mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza asanu ndi mmodzi. 
Acts27:38 Ndipo m'mene anakhuta, anapepuza ngalawa, nataya tirigu m'nyanja." 
Acts27:39 Ndipo kutacha sanazindikira dzikolo; koma anaona pali bondo la mchenga; kumeneko anafuna, ngati nkutheka, kuyendetsako ngalawa." 
Acts27:40 Ndipo m'mene anataya anangula anawasiya m'nyanja, namasulanso zingwe zomanga tsigiro; ndipo pokweza thanga la kulikulu, analunjikitsa kumchenga." 
Acts27:41 Koma pofika pamalo pokomana mafunde awiri, anatsamitsapo ngalawa; ndipo kulikulu kunatsama, ndi kukhala kosasunthika, koma kumakaliro kunasweka ndi mphamvu ya mafunde." 
Acts27:42 Ndipo uphungu wa asilikali udati awaphe andende, angasambire, ndi kuthawa." 
Acts27:43 Koma kenturiyo, pofuna kupulumutsa Paulo, anawaletsa angachite cha uphungu wao; nalamula kuti iwo akukhoza kusambira ayambe kudziponya m'nyanja, nafike pamtunda," 
Acts27:44 ndipo otsalawo, ena pamatabwa, ndi ena pa zina za m'ngalawa. Ndipo kudatero kuti onse adapulumukira pamtunda." 
Acts28:1 Ndipo titapulumuka, pamenepo tinadziwa kuti chisumbucho chinatchedwa Melita." 
Acts28:2 Ndipo akunja anatichitira zokoma zosachitika pena ponsepo; pakuti anasonkha moto, natilandira ife tonse, chifukwa cha mvula inalinkugwa, ndi chifukwa cha chisanu." 
Acts28:3 Koma pamene Paulo adaola chisakata cha nkhuni, nachiika pamoto, inatulukamo njoka, chifukwa cha kutenthaku, niluma dzanja lake." 
Acts28:4 Koma pamene akunjawo anaona chilombocho chili lende pa dzanja lake, ananena wina ndi mnzake, Zoona munthuyu ndiye wambanda. Angakhale anapulumuka m'nyanja, chilungamo sichimlola akhale ndi moyo." 
Acts28:5 Koma anakutumulira chilombocho kumoto, osamva kupweteka." 
Acts28:6 Koma anayesa kuti adzatupa, kapena mwini wake kugwa kufa pomwepo; koma m'mene adalindira nthawitu, naona kuti sikunampweteka, anapindula, nati, Ndiye Mulungu." 
Acts28:7 Koma pafupi pamenepo panali minda, mwini wake ndiye mkulu chisumbucho, dzina lake Publio; amene anatilandira ife, natichereza okoma masiku atatu." 
Acts28:8 Ndipo kunatero kuti atate wake wa Publioyo anagona wodwala nthenda ya malungo ndi kamwazi. Kwa iyeyu Paulo analowa, napemphera, naika manja pa iye, namchiritsa." 
Acts28:9 Ndipo patachitika ichi, enanso a m'chisumbu, okhala nazo nthenda, anadza, nachiritsidwa;" 
Acts28:10 amenenso anatichitira ulemu wambiri; ndipo pochoka ife anatiikira zotisowa. 
Acts28:11 Ndipo itapita miyezi itatu tinayenda m'ngalawa ya ku Aleksandriya, idagonera nyengo ya chisanu kuchisumbuko, chizindikiro chake, Ana Amapasa." 
Acts28:12 Ndipo pamene tinakocheza ku Sirakusa, tinatsotsako masiku atatu." 
Acts28:13 Ndipo pochokapo tinapaza ntifika ku Regio; ndipo litapita tsiku limodzi unayamba mwera, ndipo m'mawa mwake tinafika ku Puteoli:" 
Acts28:14 pamenepo tinakomana ndi abale, amene anatiumirira tikhale nao masiku asanu ndi awiri; ndipo potero tinafika ku Roma." 
Acts28:15 Kuchokera kumeneko abalewo, pakumva za ife, anadza kukomana nafe ku Bwalo la Apio, ndi ku Nyumba za Alendo Zitatu; ndipo pamene Paulo anawaona, anayamika Mulungu, nalimbika mtima." 
Acts28:16 Ndipo pamene tinalowa m'Roma, analola Paulo akhale pa yekha ndi msilikali womdikira iye." 
Acts28:17 Ndipo kunali, atapita masiku atatu, anaitana akulu a Ayuda asonkhane; ndipo atasonkhana, ananena nao, Ine, amuna, abale, ndingakhale sindinachita kanthu kakuipsa anthu, kapena miyambo ya makolo, anandipereka wam'nsinga kuchokera ku Yerusalemu ku manja a Aroma;" 
Acts28:18 ndiwo, atandifunsafunsa ine anafuna kundimasula, popeza panalibe chifukwa cha kundiphera." 
Acts28:19 Koma pakukanapo Ayuda, ndinafulumidwa mtima kutulukira kwa Kaisara; si kunena kuti ndinali nako kanthu kakunenera mtundu wanga." 
Acts28:20 Chifukwa cha ichi tsono ndinakupemphani inu mundione ndi kulankhula nane; pakuti chifukwa cha chiyembekezo cha Israele ndamangidwa ndi unyolo uwu. 
Acts28:21 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ife sitinalandira akalata onena za inu ochokera ku Yudeya, kapena sanadza kuno wina wa abale ndi kutiuza kapena kulankhula kanthu koipa ka inu." 
Acts28:22 Koma tifuna kumva mutiuze muganiza chiyani; pakuti za mpatuko uwu, tidziwa kuti aunenera ponseponse." 
Acts28:23 Ndipo pamene adampangira tsiku, anadza kunyumba yake anthu ambiri; amenewo anawafotokozera, ndi kuchitira umboni Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndi kuwakopa za Yesu, zochokera m'chilamulo cha Mose ndi mwa aneneri, kuyambira mamawa kufikira madzulo." 
Acts28:24 Ndipo ena anamvera zonenedwazo, koma ena sanamvere." 
Acts28:25 Koma popeza sanavomerezana, anachoka atanena Paulo mau amodzi, kuti, Mzimu Woyera analankhula kokoma mwa Yesaya Mneneri kwa makolo anu," 
Acts28:26 ndi kuti, Pita kwa anthu awa, nuti, Ndi kumva mudzamva, ndipo simudzazindikira konse; ndipo pakupenya mudzapenya, koma osaona konse;" 
Acts28:27 pakuti mtima wa anthu awa watupatu, ndipo m'makutu mwao mmolema kumva, ndipo maso ao anawatseka; kuti angaone ndi maso, nangamve ndi makutu, nangazindikire ndi mtima, nangatembenuke, ndipo Ine ndingawachiritse." 
Acts28:28 Potero, dziwani inu, kuti chipulumutso ichi cha Mulungu chitumidwa kwa amitundu; iwonso adzamva." 
Acts28:29  
Acts28:30 Ndipo anakhala zaka ziwiri zamphumphu m'nyumba yake yobwereka, nalandira onse akufika kwa iye," 
Acts28:31 ndi kulalikira Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndi kuphunzitsa za Ambuye Yesu Khristu ndi kulimbika konse, wosamletsa munthu." 
Romans1:1 Paulo, kapolo wa Yesu Khristu, mtumwi woitanidwa, wopatulidwa kukanena Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu," 
Romans1:2 umene Iye analonjeza kale ndi mau a aneneri ake m'malembo oyera," 
Romans1:3 wakunena za Mwana wake, amene anabadwa, wa mbeu ya Davide, monga mwa thupi," 
Romans1:4 amene anatsimikizidwa ndi mphamvu kuti ndiye Mwana wa Mulungu monga mwa Mzimu wa chiyero, ndi kuuka kwa akufa; ndiye Yesu Khristu Ambuye wathu;" 
Romans1:5 amene ife tinalandira naye chisomo ndi utumwi, kuti amvere chikhulupiriro anthu a mitundu yonse chifukwa cha dzina lake;" 
Romans1:6 mwa amenewo muli inunso, oitanidwa a Yesu Khristu;" 
Romans1:7 kwa onse a ku Roma, okondedwa a Mulungu, oitanidwa kuti akhale oyera mtima: Chisomo chikhale ndinu ndi mtendere wa kwa Mulungu Atate wathu, ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu." 
Romans1:8 Poyamba, ndiyamika Mulungu wanga mwa Yesu Khristu chifukwa cha inu nonse, chifukwa kuti mbiri ya chikhulupiriro chanu idamveka pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Romans1:9 Pakuti Mulungu ali mboni yanga, amene ndimtumikira mu mzimu wanga, m'Uthenga Wabwino wa Mwana wake, kuti kosalekeza ndikumbukira inu," 
Romans1:10 ndi kupempha masiku onse m'mapemphero anga, ngati nkutheka tsopano mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu, ndione ulendo wabwino, wakudza kwa inu." 
Romans1:11 Pakuti ndilakalaka kuonana ndinu, kuti ndikagawire kwa inu mtulo wina wauzimu, kuti inu mukhazikike;" 
Romans1:12 ndiko, kuti ine ndikatonthozedwe pamodzi ndi inu, mwa chikhulupiriro cha ife tonse awiri, chanu ndi changa." 
Romans1:13 Ndipo sindifuna kuti inu, abale, mudzakhala osadziwa, kuti kawirikawiri ndikanena mumtima kuti ndikafike kwa inu, koma ndaletsedwa kufikira lero, kuti ndikaone zobala zina mwa inunso, monga mwa anthu amitundu ena." 
Romans1:14 Ine ndili wamangawa wa Agriki ndi wa akunja, wa anzeru ndi wa opusa." 
Romans1:15 Chotero, momwe ndingakhoze ine, ndilikufuna kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino kwa inunso a ku Roma." 
Romans1:16 Pakuti Uthenga Wabwino sundichititsa manyazi; pakuti uli mphamvu ya Mulungu yakupulumutsa munthu aliyense wakukhulupirira; kuyambira Myuda, ndiponso Mgriki." 
Romans1:17 Pakuti m'menemo chaonetsedwa chilungamo cha Mulungu chakuchokera kuchikhulupiriro kuloza kuchikhulupiriro: monga kwalembedwa, Koma munthu wolungama adzakhala ndi moyo ndi chikhulupiriro." 
Romans1:18 Pakuti mkwiyo wa Mulungu, wochokera Kumwamba, uonekera pa chisapembedzo chonse ndi chosalungama cha anthu, amene akanikiza pansi choonadi m'chosalungama chao;" 
Romans1:19 chifukwa chodziwika cha Mulungu chaonekera m'kati mwao; pakuti Mulungu anachionetsera kwa iwo. 
Romans1:20 Pakuti chilengedwere dziko lapansi zaoneka bwino zosaoneka zake ndizo mphamvu yake yosatha ndi umulungu wake; popeza zazindikirika ndi zinthu zolengedwa, kuti iwo adzakhale opanda mau akuwiringula;" 
Romans1:21 chifukwa kuti, ngakhale anadziwa Mulungu, sanamchitira ulemu wakuyenera Mulungu, ndipo sanamyamika; koma anakhala opanda pake m'maganizo ao, ndipo unada mtima wao wopulukira." 
Romans1:22 Pakunena kuti ali anzeru, anapusa;" 
Romans1:23 nasandutsa ulemerero wa Mulungu wosaonongeka, naufanizitsa ndi chifaniziro cha munthu woonongeka ndi cha mbalame, ndi cha nyama zoyendayenda, ndi cha zokwawa." 
Romans1:24 Chifukwa chake Mulungu anawapereka iwo m'zilakolako za mitima yao, kuzonyansa, kuchititsana matupi ao wina ndi mnzake zamanyazi;" 
Romans1:25 amenewo anasandutsa choonadi cha Mulungu chabodza napembedza, natumikira cholengedwa, ndi kusiya Wolengayo, ndiye wolemekezeka nthawi yosatha. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Chifukwa cha ichi Mulungu anawapereka iwo ku zilakolako za manyazi: pakuti angakhale akazi ao anasandutsa machitidwe ao a chibadwidwe akhale machitidwe osalingana ndi chibadwidwe: 
Romans1:27 ndipo chimodzimodzinso amuna anasiya machitidwe a chibadwidwe cha akazi, natenthetsana ndi cholakalaka chao wina ndi mnzake, amuna okhaokha anachitirana chamanyazi, ndipo analandira mwa iwo okha mphotho yakuyenera kulakwa kwao." 
Romans1:28 Ndipo monga iwo anakana kukhala naye Mulungu m'chidziwitso chao, anawapereka Mulungu kumtima wokanika, kukachita zinthu zosayenera;" 
Romans1:29 anadzala ndi zosalungama zonse, kuipa, kusirira, dumbo; odzala ndi kaduka, mbanda, ndeu, chinyengo, udani;" 
Romans1:30 akazitape, osinjirira, akumuda Mulungu, achipongwe, odzitama, amatukutuku, oyamba zoipa, osamvera akulu ao," 
Romans1:31 opanda nzeru, osasunga mapangano, opanda chikondi cha chibadwidwe, opanda chifundo;" 
Romans1:32 amene ngakhale adziwa kuweruza kwake kwa Mulungu, kuti iwo amene achita zotere ayenera imfa, azichita iwo okha, ndiponso avomerezana ndi iwo akuzichita." 
Romans2:1 Chifukwa chake uli wopanda mau owiringula, munthu iwe, amene uli yense wakuweruza; pakuti m'mene uweruza wina, momwemo udzitsutsa iwe wekha, pakuti iwe wakuweruza, umachita zomwezo." 
Romans2:2 Ndipo tidziwa kuti kuweruza kwa Mulungu kuli koona pa iwo akuchita zotere. 
Romans2:3 Ndipo uganiza kodi, munthu iwe, amene umaweruza iwo akuchita zotere, ndipo uzichitanso iwe mwini, kuti udzapulumuka pa mlandu wa Mulungu?" 
Romans2:4 Kapena upeputsa kodi kulemera kwa ubwino wake, ndi chilekerero ndi chipiriro chake, wosadziwa kuti ubwino wa Mulungu ukubwezera kuti ulape?" 
Romans2:5 Koma kolingana ndi kuuma kwako, ndi mtima wako wosalapa, ulikudziunjikira wekha mkwiyo pa tsiku la mkwiyo ndi la kuvumbulutsa kuweruza kolungama kwa Mulungu;" 
Romans2:6 amene adzabwezera munthu aliyense kolingana ndi ntchito zake; 
Romans2:7 kwa iwo amene afunafuna ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi chisaonongeko, mwa kupirira pa ntchito zabwino, adzabwezera moyo wosatha;" 
Romans2:8 koma kwa iwo andeu, ndi osamvera choonadi, koma amvera chosalungama, adzabwezera mkwiyo ndi kuzaza," 
Romans2:9 nsautso ndi kuwawa mtima, kwa moyo wa munthu aliyense wakuchita zoipa, kuyambira Myuda, komanso Mgriki;" 
Romans2:10 koma ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi mtendere kwa munthu aliyense wakuchita zabwino, kuyambira Myuda, ndiponso Mgriki;" 
Romans2:11 pakuti Mulungu alibe tsankho. 
Romans2:12 Pakuti onse amene anachimwa opanda lamulo adzaonongeka opanda lamulo; ndi onse amene anachimwa podziwa lamulo adzaweruzidwa ndi lamulo; 
Romans2:13 pakuti akumvaimva lamulo sakhala olungama pamaso pa Mulungu, koma akuchita lamulo adzayesedwa olungama." 
Romans2:14 Pakuti pamene anthu a mitundu akukhala opanda lamulo, amachita mwa okha za lamulo, omwewo angakhale alibe lamulo, adzikhalira okha ngati lamulo;" 
Romans2:15 popeza iwo aonetsa ntchito ya lamulolo yolembedwa m'mitima yao, ndipo chikumbu mtima chao chichitiranso umboni pamodzi nao, ndipo maganizo ao wina ndi mnzake anenezana kapena akanirana;" 
Romans2:16 tsiku limene Mulungu adzaweruza ndi Khristu Yesu zinsinsi za anthu, monga mwa Uthenga wanga Wabwino." 
Romans2:17 Koma ngati iwe unenedwa Myuda, nukhazikika palamulo, nudzitamandira pa Mulungu," 
Romans2:18 nudziwa chifuniro chake, nuvomereza zinthu zoposa, utaphunzitsidwa m'chilamulo," 
Romans2:19 nulimbika mumtima kuti iwe wekha uli wotsogolera wa akhungu, nyali ya amene akhala mumdima," 
Romans2:20 wolangiza wa opanda nzeru, mphunzitsi wa tiana, wakukhala m'chilamulo ndi chionekedwe cha nzeru ndi cha choonadi;" 
Romans2:21 ndiwe tsono wakuphunzitsa wina, kodi ulibe kudziphunzitsa mwini? Iwe wakulalikira kuti munthu asabe, kodi ulikuba mwini wekha?" 
Romans2:22 Iwe wakunena kuti munthu asachite chigololo, kodi umachita chigololo mwini wekha? Iwe wakudana nao mafano, umafunkha za m'Kachisi kodi?" 
Romans2:23 Iwe wakudzitamandira pachilamulo, kodi uchitira Mulungu mwano ndi kulakwa kwako m'chilamulo?" 
Romans2:24 Pakuti dzina la Mulungu lichitidwa mwano chifukwa cha inu, pakati pa anthu a mitundu, monga mwalembedwa." 
Romans2:25 Pakuti inde mdulidwe uli wabwino, ngati iwe umachita lamulo; koma ngati uli wolakwira lamulo, mdulidwe wako wasanduka kusadulidwa." 
Romans2:26 Chifukwa chake ngati wosadulidwa asunga zoikika za chilamulo, kodi kusadulidwa kwake sikudzayesedwa ngati mdulidwe?" 
Romans2:27 Ndipo kusadulidwa, kumene kuli kwa chibadwidwe, ngati kukwanira chilamulo, kodi sikudzatsutsa iwe, amene uli nao malembo ndi mdulidwe womwe, ndiwe wolakwira lamulo?" 
Romans2:28 Pakuti siali Myuda amene akhala wotere pamaso, kapena suli mdulidwe umene uli wotere pamaso, m'thupimo;" 
Romans2:29 koma Myuda ndiye amene akhala wotere mumtima; ndipo mdulidwe uli wa mtima, mumzimu, si m'malembo ai; kuyamika kwake sikuchokera kwa anthu, koma kwa Mulungu." 
Romans3:1 Ndipo potero Myuda aposa ninji? Kapena mdulidwe upindulanji? 
Romans3:2 Zambiri monsemonse: choyamba, kuti mau a Mulungu anaperekedwa kwa iwo." 
Romans3:3 Nanga bwanji ngati ena sanakhulupirira? Kodi kusakhulupirira kwao kuyesa chabe chikhulupiriko cha Mulungu? 
Romans3:4 Msatero ai. Koma Mulungu akhale woona, ndimo anthu onse akhale onama; monga kwalembedwa, Kuti Inu mukayesedwe wolungama m'maneno anu, ndi kuti mukalakike m'mene muweruzidwa." 
Romans3:5 Koma ngati chosalungama chathu chitsimikiza chilungamo cha Mulungu, tidzatani ife? Kodi ali wosalungama Mulungu, amene afikitsa mkwiyo? (Ndilankhula umo anenera munthu)." 
Romans3:6 Msatero ai. Ngati kotero, Mulungu adzaweruza bwanji mlandu wa dziko lapansi?" 
Romans3:7 Pakuti ngati choonadi cha Mulungu chichulukitsa ulemerero wake chifukwa cha bodza langa, nanga inenso ndiweruzidwa bwanji monga wochimwa?" 
Romans3:8 Ndipo tilekerenji kunena, Tichite zoipa kuti zabwino zikadze (monganso ena atinamiza ndi kuti timanena)? Kulanga kwa amenewo kuli kolungama." 
Romans3:9 Ndipo chiyani tsono? Kodi tiposa ife? Iai ndithu; pakuti tidawaneneza kale Ayuda ndi Agriki omwe, kuti onsewa agwidwa ndi uchimo;" 
Romans3:10 monga kwalembedwa, Palibe mmodzi wolungama, inde palibe mmodzi;" 
Romans3:11 palibe mmodzi wakudziwitsa, palibe mmodzi wakulondola Mulungu;" 
Romans3:12 onsewa apatuka, pamodzi akhala opanda pake; palibe mmodzi wakuchita zabwino, inde, palibe mmodzi ndithu." 
Romans3:13 M'mero mwao muli manda apululu; ndi lilime lao amanyenga; ululu wa mamba uli pansi pa milomo yao; 
Romans3:14 m'kamwa mwao mudzala ndi zotemberera ndi zowawa; 
Romans3:15 miyendo yao ichita liwiro kukhetsa mwazi; 
Romans3:16 kusakaza ndi kusauka kuli m'njira zao; 
Romans3:17 ndipo njira ya mtendere sanaidziwa; 
Romans3:18 kumuopa Mulungu kulibe pamaso pao. 
Romans3:19 Ndipo tidziwa kuti zinthu zilizonse chizinena chilamulo chizilankhulira iwo ali nacho chilamulo; kuti pakamwa ponse patsekedwe, ndi dziko lonse lapansi litsutsidwe ndi Mulungu;" 
Romans3:20 chifukwa kuti pamaso pake palibe munthu adzayesedwa wolungama ndi ntchito za lamulo; pakuti uchimo udziwika ndi lamulo. 
Romans3:21 Koma tsopano chilungamo cha Mulungu chaoneka chopanda lamulo, chilamulo ndi aneneri achitira ichi umboni;" 
Romans3:22 ndicho chilungamo cha Mulungu chimene chichokera mwa chikhulupiriro cha pa Yesu Khristu kwa onse amene akhulupirira; pakuti palibe kusiyana; 
Romans3:23 pakuti onse anachimwa, naperewera pa ulemerero wa Mulungu;" 
Romans3:24 ndipo ayesedwa olungama kwaulere, ndi chisomo chake, mwa chiombolo cha mwa Khristu Yesu;" 
Romans3:25 amene Mulungu anamuika poyera akhale chotetezera mwa chikhulupiriro cha m'mwazi wake, kuti aonetse chilungamo chake, popeza Mulungu m'kulekerera kwake analekerera machimo ochitidwa kale lomwe;" 
Romans3:26 kuti aonetse chilungamo chake m'nyengo yatsopano; kuti Iye akhale wolungama, ndi wakumuyesa wolungama iye amene akhulupirira Yesu." 
Romans3:27 Pamenepo kudzitama kuli kuti? Kwaletsedwa. Ndi lamulo lotani? La ntchito kodi? Iai; koma ndi lamulo la chikhulupiriro. 
Romans3:28 Pakuti timuyesa munthu wolungama chifukwa cha chikhulupiriro, wopanda ntchito za lamulo." 
Romans3:29 Kapena Mulungu ndiye wa Ayuda okhaokha kodi? Si wao wa amitundunso kodi? Eya, wa amitundunso:" 
Romans3:30 ngatitu ndiye Mulungu mmodzi, amene adzawayesa amdulidwe olungama ndi chikhulupiriro, ndi akusadulidwa mwa chikhulupiriro." 
Romans3:31 Potero kodi lamulo tiyesa chabe mwa chikhulupiriro? Msatero ai; koma tikhazikitsa lamulo. 
Romans4:1 Ndipo tsono tidzanena kuti Abrahamu, kholo lathu monga mwa thupi, analandira chiyani?" 
Romans4:2 Pakuti ngati Abrahamu anayesedwa wolungama chifukwa cha ntchito, iye akhala nacho chodzitamandira; koma kulinga kwa Mulungu ai." 
Romans4:3 Pakuti lembo litani? Ndipo Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu, ndipo chinawerengedwa kwa iye chilungamo." 
Romans4:4 Ndipo kwa iye amene agwira ntchito, mphotho siiwerengedwa ya chisomo koma ya mangawa." 
Romans4:5 Koma kwa iye amene sachita, koma akhulupirira Iye amene ayesa osapembedza ngati olungama, chikhulupiriro chake chiwerengedwa chilungamo." 
Romans4:6 Monganso Davide anena za mdalitso wake wa munthu, amene Mulungu amwerengera chilungamo chopanda ntchito," 
Romans4:7 ndi kuti, Odala iwo amene akhululukidwa kusaweruzika kwao, nakwiriridwa machimo ao." 
Romans4:8 Wodala munthu amene Mulungu samwerengera uchimo. 
Romans4:9 Mdalitso umenewu tsono uli kwa odulidwa kodi, kapena kwa osadulidwa omwe? Pakuti timati, Chikhulupiriro chake chinawerengedwa kwa Abrahamu chilungamo." 
Romans4:10 Tsono chinawerengedwa bwanji? M'mene iye anali wodulidwa kapena wosadulidwa? Si wodulidwa ai, koma wosadulidwa;" 
Romans4:11 iye ndipo analandira chizindikiro cha mdulidwe, ndicho chosindikiza chilungamo cha chikhulupiriro, chomwe iye anali nacho asanadulidwe; kuti kotero iye akhale kholo la onse akukhulupirira, angakhale iwo sanadulidwa, kuti chilungamo chiwerengedwe kwa iwonso;" 
Romans4:12 ndiponso kholo la mdulidwe wa iwo amene siali a mdulidwe okha, koma wa iwo amene atsata mayendedwe a chikhulupiriro chija cha kholo lathu Abrahamu, chimene iye anali nacho asanadulidwe." 
Romans4:13 Pakuti lonjezo lakuti iye adzakhala wolowa nyumba wa dziko lapansi silinapatsidwa kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbeu yake mwa lamulo, koma mwa chilungamo cha chikhulupiriro." 
Romans4:14 Pakuti ngati iwo a lamulo akhala olowa nyumba, pamenepo chikhulupiriro chayesedwa chabe, ndimo lonjezo layesedwa lopanda pake;" 
Romans4:15 pakuti chilamulo chichitira mkwiyo; koma pamene palibe lamulo, pamenepo palibe kulakwa." 
Romans4:16 Chifukwa chake chilungamo chichokera m'chikhulupiriro, kuti chikhale monga mwa chisomo; kuti lonjezo likhale lokhazikika kwa mbeu zonse; si kwa iwo a chilamulo okhaokha, koma kwa iwonso a chikhulupiriro cha Abrahamu; ndiye kholo la ife tonse;" 
Romans4:17 monga kwalembedwa: Ndinakukhazika iwe kholo la mitundu yambiri ya anthu pamaso pa Mulungu amene iye anamkhulupirira, amene apatsa akufa moyo, ndi kuitana zinthu zoti palibe, monga ngati zilipo." 
Romans4:18 Amene anakhulupirira nayembekeza zosayembekezeka, kuti iye akakhale kholo la mitundu yambiri ya anthu, monga mwa chonenedwachi, Mbeu yako idzakhala yotere." 
Romans4:19 Ndipo iye osafooka m'chikhulupiriro sanalabadira thupi lake, ndilo longa ngati lakufa pamenepo, (pokhala iye ngati zaka makumi khumi), ndi mimba ya Sara idaumanso;" 
Romans4:20 ndipo poyang'anira lonjezo la Mulungu sanagwedezeka chifukwa cha kusakhulupirira, koma analimbika m'chikhulupiriro, napatsa Mulungu ulemu," 
Romans4:21 nakhazikikanso mumtima kuti, chimene Iye analonjeza, anali nayonso mphamvu yakuchichita." 
Romans4:22 Chifukwa chake ichi chinawerengedwa kwa iye chilungamo. 
Romans4:23 Ndipo ichi sichinalembedwa chifukwa cha iye yekhayekha, kuti chidawerengedwa kwa iye;" 
Romans4:24 koma chifukwa cha ifenso, kwa ife amene chidzawerengedwa kwa ife amene tikhulupirira Iye amene anaukitsa kwa akufa Yesu Ambuye wathu," 
Romans4:25 amene anaperekedwa chifukwa cha zolakwa zathu, naukitsidwa chifukwa cha kutiyesa ife olungama." 
Romans5:1 Popeza tsono tayesedwa olungama ndi chikhulupiriro, tikhala ndi mtendere ndi Mulungu mwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu;" 
Romans5:2 amene ife tikhoza kulowa naye ndi chikhulupiriro m'chisomo ichi m'mene tilikuimamo; ndipo tikondwera m'chiyembekezo cha ulemerero wa Mulungu. 
Romans5:3 Ndipo si chotero chokha, komanso tikondwera m'zisautso; podziwa ife kuti chisautso chichita chipiriro; ndi chipiriro chichita chizolowezi;" 
Romans5:4 ndi chizolowezi chichita chiyembekezo: 
Romans5:5 ndipo chiyembekezo sichichititsa manyazi; chifukwa chikondi cha Mulungu chinatsanulidwa m'mitima mwathu mwa Mzimu Woyera, amene wapatsidwa kwa ife." 
Romans5:6 Pakuti pamene tinali chikhalire ofooka, pa nyengo yake Khristu anawafera osapembedza." 
Romans5:7 Pakuti ndi chivuto munthu adzafera wina wolungama; pakuti kapena wina adzalimbika mtima kufera munthu wabwino. 
Romans5:8 Koma Mulungu atsimikiza kwa ife chikondi chake cha mwini yekha m'menemo, kuti pokhala ife chikhalire ochimwa, Khristu adatifera ife." 
Romans5:9 Ndipo tsono popeza tinayesedwa olungama ndi mwazi wake, makamaka ndithu tidzapulumuka mkwiyo wa Mulungu mwa Iyeyo." 
Romans5:10 Pakuti ngati, pokhala ife adani ake, tinayanjanitsidwa ndi Mulungu mwa imfa ya Mwana wake, makamaka ndithu, popeza ife tayanjanitsidwa, tidzapulumuka ndi moyo wake." 
Romans5:11 Ndipo si chotero chokha, koma ife tikondwera ndi Mulungu mwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, amene talandira naye tsopano chiyanjanitso." 
Romans5:12 Chifukwa chake, monga uchimo unalowa m'dziko lapansi mwa munthu mmodzi, ndi imfa mwa uchimo; chotero imfa inafikira anthu onse, chifukwa kuti onse anachimwa." 
Romans5:13 Pakuti kufikira nthawi ya lamulo uchimo unali m'dziko lapansi; koma uchimo suwerengedwa popanda lamulo. 
Romans5:14 Komatu imfa inachita ufumu kuyambira kwa Adamu kufikira kwa Mose, ngakhale pa iwonso amene sanachimwa monga machimwidwe ake a Adamu, ndiye fanizo la wakudzayo." 
Romans5:15 Koma mphatso yaulere siilingana ndi kulakwa. Pakuti ngati ambiriwo anafa chifukwa cha kulakwa kwa mmodziyo, makamaka ndithu chisomo cha Mulungu, ndi mphatso yaulere zakuchokera ndi munthu mmodziyo Yesu Khristu, zinachulukira anthu ambiri." 
Romans5:16 Ndipo mphatso siinadza monga mwa mmodzi wakuchimwa, pakuti mlandu ndithu unachokera kwa munthu mmodzi kufikira kutitsutsa, koma mphatso yaulere ichokera ku zolakwa zambiri kufikira kutiyesa olungama." 
Romans5:17 Pakuti ngati, ndi kulakwa kwa mmodzi, imfa inachita ufumu mwa mmodziyo; makamaka ndithu amene akulandira kuchuluka kwake kwa chisomo ndi kwa mphatso ya chilungamo, adzachita ufumu m'moyo mwa mmodzi, ndiye Yesu Khristu." 
Romans5:18 Chifukwa chake, monga mwa kulakwa kumodzi kutsutsa kunafikira anthu onse; chomwechonso mwa chilungamitso chimodzi chilungamo cha moyo chinafikira anthu onse." 
Romans5:19 Pakuti monga ndi kusamvera kwa munthu mmodzi ambiri anayesedwa ochimwa, chomwecho ndi kumvera kwa mmodzi ambiri adzayesedwa olungama." 
Romans5:20 Ndipo lamulo linalowa moonjezera, kuti kulakwa kukachuluke; koma pamene uchimo unachuluka, pomwepo chisomo chinachuluka koposa;" 
Romans5:21 kuti, monga uchimo unachita ufumu muimfa, chomwechonso chisomo chikachite ufumu mwa chilungamo, kufikira moyo wosatha mwa Yesu Khristu Ambuye wathu." 
Romans6:1 Chifukwa chake tidzatani? Tidzakhalabe m'uchimo kodi, kuti chisomo chichuluke?" 
Romans6:2 Msatero ai. Ife amene tili akufa ku uchimo, tidzakhala bwanji chikhalire m'menemo?" 
Romans6:3 Kapena kodi simudziwa kuti ife tonse amene tinabatizidwa mwa Khristu Yesu; tinabatizidwa mu imfa yake? 
Romans6:4 Chifukwa chake tinaikidwa m'manda pamodzi ndi Iye mwa ubatizo kulowa muimfa; kuti monga Khristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa mwa ulemerero wa Atate, chotero ifenso tikayende m'moyo watsopano." 
Romans6:5 Pakuti ngati ife tinakhala olumikizidwa ndi Iye m'chifanizidwe cha imfa yake, koteronso tidzakhala m'chifanizidwe cha kuuka kwake;" 
Romans6:6 podziwa ichi, kuti umunthu wathu wakale unapachikidwa pamodzi ndi Iye, kuti thupilo la uchimo likaonongedwe, kuti ife tisakhalenso akapolo a uchimo;" 
Romans6:7 pakuti iye amene anafa anamasulidwa kuuchimo. 
Romans6:8 Koma ngati ife tinafa ndi Khristu, tikhulupirira kuti tidzakhalanso amoyo ndi Iye;" 
Romans6:9 podziwa kuti Khristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa, sadzafanso; imfa siichitanso ufumu pa Iye." 
Romans6:10 Pakuti pakufa Iye, atafa ku uchimo kamodzi; ndipo pakukhala Iye wamoyo, akhala wamoyo kwa Mulungu." 
Romans6:11 Chotero inunso mudziwerengere inu nokha ofafa ku uchimo, koma amoyo kwa Mulungu mwa Khristu Yesu." 
Romans6:12 Chifukwa chake musamalola uchimo uchite ufumu m'thupi lanu la imfa kumvera zofuna zake: 
Romans6:13 ndipo musapereke ziwalo zanu kuuchimo, zikhale zida za chosalungama; koma mudzipereke inu nokha kwa Mulungu, monga amoyo atatuluka mwa akufa, ndi ziwalo zanu kwa Mulungu zikhale zida za chilungamo." 
Romans6:14 Pakuti uchimo sudzachita ufumu pa inu; popeza simuli a lamulo koma a chisomo. 
Romans6:15 Ndipo chiyani tsono? Tidzachimwa kodi chifukwa sitili a lamulo, koma a chisomo? Msatero ai." 
Romans6:16 Kodi simudziwa kuti kwa iye amene mudzipereka eni nokha kukhala akapolo ake akumvera iye, mukhalatu akapolo ake a yemweyo mulikumvera iye; kapena a uchimo kulinga kuimfa, kapena a umvero kulinga kuchilungamo?" 
Romans6:17 Koma ayamikidwe Mulungu, kuti ngakhale mudakhala akapolo a uchimo, tsopano mwamvera ndi mtima makhalidwe aja a chiphunzitso chimene munaperekedweracho;" 
Romans6:18 ndipo pamene munamasulidwa kuuchimo, munakhala akapolo a chilungamo." 
Romans6:19 Ndilankhula manenedwe a anthu, chifukwa cha kufooka kwa thupi lanu; pakuti monga inu munapereka ziwalo zanu zikhale akapolo a chonyansa ndi a kusaweruzika kuti zichite kusaweruzika, inde kotero tsopano perekani ziwalo zanu zikhale akapolo a chilungamo kuti zichite chiyeretso." 
Romans6:20 Pakuti pamene inu munali akapolo a uchimo, munali osatumikira chilungamo." 
Romans6:21 Ndipo munali nazo zobala zanji nthawi ija, m'zinthu zimene muchita nazo manyazi tsopano? Pakuti chimaliziro cha zinthu izi chili imfa." 
Romans6:22 Koma tsopano, pamene munamasulidwa kuuchimo, ndi kukhala akapolo a Mulungu, muli nacho chobala chanu chakufikira chiyeretso, ndi chimaliziro chake moyo wosatha." 
Romans6:23 Pakuti mphotho yake ya uchimo ndi imfa; koma mphatso yaulere ya Mulungu ndiyo moyo wosatha wa mwa Khristu Yesu Ambuye wathu. 
Romans7:1 Nanga kodi simudziwa, abale, pakuti ndilankhula ndi anthu akudziwa lamulo, kuti lamulolo lichita ufumu pa munthu nthawi zonse iye ali wamoyo?" 
Romans7:2 Pakuti mkazi wokwatidwa amangidwa ndi lamulo kwa mwamuna wake wamoyo; koma mwamunayo akafa, iye amasulidwa ku lamulo la mwamunayo." 
Romans7:3 Ndipo chifukwa chake, ngati iye akwatiwa ndi mwamuna wina, pokhala mwamuna wake wamoyo, adzanenedwa mkazi wachigololo; koma mwamunayo akafa, iye amasulidwa ku lamuloli; chotero sakhala wachigololo ngati akwatiwa ndi mwamuna wina." 
Romans7:4 Chotero, abale anga, inunso munayesedwa akufa ku chilamulo ndi thupi la Khristu; kuti mukakhale ake a wina, ndiye amene anaukitsidwa kwa akufa, kuti ife timbalire Mulungu zipatso." 
Romans7:5 Pakuti pamene tinali m'thupi, zilakolako za machimo, zimene zinali mwa chilamulo, zinalikuchita m'ziwalo zathu, kuti zibalire imfa zipatso." 
Romans7:6 Koma tsopano tinamasulidwa kuchilamulo, popeza tinafa kwa ichi chimene tinagwidwa nacho kale; chotero kuti titumikire mu mzimu watsopano, si m'chilembo chakale ai." 
Romans7:7 Pamenepo tidzatani? Kodi chilamulo chili uchimo? Msatero ai. Koma ine sindikadazindikira uchimo, koma mwa lamulo ndimo; pakuti sindikadazindikira chilakolako sichikadati chilamulo, Usasirire;" 
Romans7:8 koma uchimo, pamene unapeza chifukwa, unachita m'kati mwanga zilakolako zonse mwa lamulo; pakuti popanda lamulo uchimo uli wakufa." 
Romans7:9 Ndipo kale ine ndinali wamoyo popanda lamulo; koma pamene lamulo linadza, uchimo unatsitsimuka, ndipo ine ndinafa." 
Romans7:10 Ndipo lamulo, limene linali lakupatsa moyo, ndinalipeza lakupatsa imfa." 
Romans7:11 Pakuti uchimo, pamene unapeza chifukwa mwa lamulo, unandinyenga ine, ndi kundipha nalo." 
Romans7:12 Chotero chilamulo chili choyera, ndi chilangizo chake nchoyera, ndi cholungama, ndi chabwino." 
Romans7:13 Ndipo tsopano chabwino chija chinandikhalira imfa kodi? Msatero ai. Koma uchimo, kuti uoneke kuti uli uchimo, wandichitira imfa mwa chabwino chija; kuti uchimo ukakhale wochimwitsa ndithu mwa lamulo." 
Romans7:14 Pakuti tidziwa kuti chilamulo chili chauzimu; koma ine ndili wathupi, wogulitsidwa kapolo wa uchimo." 
Romans7:15 Pakuti chimene ndichita sindichidziwa; pakuti sindichita chimene ndifuna, koma chimene ndidana nacho, ndichita ichi." 
Romans7:16 Koma ngati ndichita chimene sindichifuna, ndivomerezana nacho chilamulo kuti chili chabwino." 
Romans7:17 Ndipo tsopano si ine ndichichita, koma uchimo wakukhalabe m'kati mwanga ndiwo." 
Romans7:18 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti m'kati mwanga, ndiko m'thupi langa, simukhala chinthu chabwino; pakuti kufuna ndili nako, koma kuchita chabwino sindikupeza." 
Romans7:19 Pakuti chabwino chimene ndichifuna, sindichichita; koma choipa chimene sindichifuna, chimenecho ndichichita." 
Romans7:20 Koma ngati ndichita chimene sindichifuna, si ndinenso amene ndichichita, koma uchimo wakukhalabe m'kati mwanga ndiwo." 
Romans7:21 Ndipo chotero ndipeza lamulo ili, kuti, pamene ndifuna chabwino, choipa chiliko." 
Romans7:22 Pakuti monga mwa munthu wa m'kati mwanga, ine ndikondwera ndi chilamulo cha Mulungu:" 
Romans7:23 koma ndiona lamulo lina m'ziwalo zanga, lilikulimbana ndi lamulo la mtima wanga, ndi kundigonjetsa kapolo wa lamulo la uchimo m'ziwalo zanga." 
Romans7:24 Munthu wosauka ine; adzandilanditsa ndani m'thupi la imfa iyi? 
Romans7:25 Ndiyamika Mulungu, mwa Yesu Khristu Ambuye wathu. Ndipo chotero ine ndekha ndi mtimatu nditumikira chilamulo cha Mulungu; koma ndi thupi nditumikira lamulo la uchimo." 
Romans8:1 Chifukwa chake tsopano iwo akukhala mwa Khristu Yesu alibe kutsutsidwa. 
Romans8:2 Pakuti chilamulo cha mzimu wa moyo mwa Khristu Yesu chandimasula ine ku lamulo la uchimo ndi la imfa. 
Romans8:3 Pakuti chimene chilamulo sichinathe kuchita, popeza chinafooka mwa thupi, Mulungu anatumiza Mwana wake wa Iye yekha m'chifanizo cha thupi la uchimo, ndi chifukwa cha uchimo, natsutsa uchimo m'thupi;" 
Romans8:4 kuti choikika chake cha chilamulo chikakwaniridwe mwa ife, amene sitiyendayenda monga mwa thupi, koma monga mwa mzimu." 
Romans8:5 Pakuti iwo amene ali monga mwa thupi asamalira zinthu za thupi; koma iwo amene ali monga mwa mzimu, asamalira zinthu za mzimu:" 
Romans8:6 pakuti chisamaliro cha thupi chili imfa; koma chisamaliro cha mzimu chili moyo ndi mtendere. 
Romans8:7 Chifukwa chisamaliro cha thupi chidana ndi Mulungu; pakuti sichigonja ku chilamulo cha Mulungu, pakuti sichikhoza kutero." 
Romans8:8 Ndipo iwo amene ali m'thupi sangathe kukondweretsa Mulungu. 
Romans8:9 Koma inu simuli m'thupi ai, koma mumzimu, ngatitu Mzimu wa Mulungu akhalabe mwa inu. Koma ngati munthu alibe Mzimu wa Khristu, siali wake wa Khristu." 
Romans8:10 Ndipo ngati Khristu akhala mwa inu, thupilo ndithu lili lakufa chifukwa cha uchimo; koma mzimu uli wamoyo chifukwa cha chilungamo." 
Romans8:11 Koma ngati Mzimu wa Iye amene adaukitsa Yesu kwa akufa akhalabe mwa inu, Iye amene adaukitsa Khristu Yesu kwa akufa adzapatsanso moyo matupi anu akufa, mwa Mzimu wake wakukhala mwa inu." 
Romans8:12 Chifukwa chake, abale, ife tili amangawa si ake a thupi ai, kukhala ndi moyo monga mwa thupi;" 
Romans8:13 pakuti ngati mukhala ndi moyo monga mwa thupi, mudzafa; koma ngati ndi mzimu mufetsa zochita zake za thupi, mudzakhala ndi moyo." 
Romans8:14 Pakuti onse amene atsogozedwa ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu, amenewo ali ana a Mulungu." 
Romans8:15 Pakuti inu simunalandira mzimu wa ukapolo kuchitanso mantha; koma munalandira mzimu wa umwana, umene tifuula nao, kuti, Abba! Atate!" 
Romans8:16 Mzimu yekha achita umboni pamodzi ndi mzimu wathu, kuti tili ana a Mulungu;" 
Romans8:17 ndipo ngati ana, pomweponso olowa nyumba; inde olowa nyumba ake a Mulungu, ndi olowa anzake a Khristu; ngatitu ife timva zowawa pamodzi naye, kuti tikalandirenso ulemerero pamodzi ndi Iye." 
Romans8:18 Pakuti ndiyesa kuti masauko a nyengo yatsopano sayenera kulinganizidwa ndi ulemerero umene udzaonetsedwa kwa ife. 
Romans8:19 Pakuti chiyembekezetso cha cholengedwa chilindira vumbulutso la ana a Mulungu. 
Romans8:20 Pakuti cholengedwacho chagonjetsedwa kuutsiru, chosafuna mwini, koma chifukwa cha Iye amene anachigonjetsa, ndi chiyembekezo" 
Romans8:21 kuti cholengedwa chomwe chidzamasulidwa ku ukapolo wa chivundi, ndi kulowa ufulu wa ulemerero wa ana a Mulungu." 
Romans8:22 Pakuti tidziwa kuti cholengedwa chonse chibuula, ndi kugwidwa m'zowawa pamodzi kufikira tsopano." 
Romans8:23 Ndipo si chotero chokha, koma ife tomwe, tili nazo zoundukula za Mzimu, inde ifenso tibuula m'kati mwathu, ndi kulindirira umwana wathu, ndiwo chiomboledwe cha thupi lathu." 
Romans8:24 Pakuti ife tinapulumutsidwa ndi chiyembekezo; koma chiyembekezo chimene chioneka si chili chiyembekezo ai; pakuti ayembekezera ndani chimene achipenya? 
Romans8:25 Koma ngati tiyembekezera chimene sitichipenya, pomwepo tichilindirira ndi chipiriro." 
Romans8:26 Ndipo momwemonso Mzimu athandiza kufooka kwathu; pakuti chimene tizipempha monga chiyenera, sitidziwa; koma Mzimu mwini atipempherera ndi zobuula zosatheka kuneneka;" 
Romans8:27 ndipo Iye amene asanthula m'mitima adziwa chimene achisamalira Mzimu, chifukwa apempherera oyera mtima monga mwa chifuno cha Mulungu." 
Romans8:28 Ndipo tidziwa kuti amene akonda Mulungu zinthu zonse zithandizana kuwachitira ubwino, ndiwo amene aitanidwa monga mwa kutsimikiza kwa mtima wake." 
Romans8:29 Chifukwa kuti iwo amene Iye anawadziwiratu, iwowa anawalamuliratu afanizidwe ndi chifaniziro cha Mwana wake, kuti Iye akakhale mwana woyamba wa abale ambiri;" 
Romans8:30 ndipo amene Iye anawalamuliratu, iwo anawaitananso; ndimo iwo amene Iye anawaitana, iwowa anawayesanso olungama; ndi iwo amene Iye anawayesa olungama, iwowa anawapatsanso ulemerero." 
Romans8:31 Ndipo tidzatani ndi zinthu izi? Ngati Mulungu ali ndi ife, adzatikaniza ndani?" 
Romans8:32 Iye amene sanatimana Mwana wake wa Iye yekha, koma anampereka chifukwa cha ife tonse, adzalekeranji kutipatsanso ife zinthu zonse kwaulere pamodzi ndi Iye?" 
Romans8:33 Ndani adzaneneza osankhidwa a Mulungu? Mulungu ndiye amene awayesa olungama; 
Romans8:34 ndani adzawatsutsa? Khristu Yesu ndiye amene adafera, inde makamaka, ndiye amene adauka kwa akufa, amene akhalanso pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu, amenenso atipempherera ife." 
Romans8:35 Adzatisiyanitsa ndani ndi chikondi cha Khristu? Nsautso kodi, kapena kupsinjika mtima, kapena kuzunza, kapena njala, kapena usiwa, kapena zoopsa kapena lupanga kodi?" 
Romans8:36 Monganso kwalembedwa, Chifukwa cha Inu tilikuphedwa dzuwa lonse; tinayesedwa monga nkhosa zakupha." 
Romans8:37 Koma m'zonsezi, ife tilakatu, mwa Iye amene anatikonda." 
Romans8:38 Pakuti ndakopeka mtima kuti ngakhale imfa, ngakhale moyo, ngakhale angelo, ngakhale maufumu, ngakhale zinthu zilipo, ngakhale zinthu zilinkudza, ngakhale zimphamvu," 
Romans8:39 ngakhale utali, ngakhale kuya, ngakhale cholengedwa china chilichonse, sichingadzakhoze kutisiyanitsa ife ndi chikondi cha Mulungu, chimene chili mwa Khristu Yesu Ambuye wathu." 
Romans9:1 Ndinena zoona mwa Khristu, sindinama ai, chikumbu mtima changa chichita umboni pamodzi ndine mwa Mzimu Woyera," 
Romans9:2 kuti ndagwidwa ndi chisoni chachikulu ndi kuphwetekwa mtima kosaleka. 
Romans9:3 Pakuti ndikadafuna kuti ine ndekha nditembereredwe kundichotsa kwa Khristu chifukwa cha abale anga, ndiwo a mtundu wanga monga mwa thupi;" 
Romans9:4 ndiwo Aisraele; ali nao umwana, ndi ulemerero, ndi mapangano, ndi kupatsa kwa malamulo, ndi kutumikira m'Kachisi wa Mulungu, ndi malonjezo;" 
Romans9:5 a iwo ali makolo, ndi kwa iwo anachokera Khristu, monga mwa thupi, ndiye Mulungu wa pamwamba pa zonse wolemekezeka kunthawi zonse. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Koma sikuli ngati mau a Mulungu anakhala chabe ai. Pakuti onse akuchokera kwa Israele siali Israele; 
Romans9:7 kapena chifukwa ali mbeu ya Abrahamu, siali onse ana; koma anati, Mwa Isaki, mbeu yako idzaitanidwa." 
Romans9:8 Ndiko kuti, ana a thupi sakhala iwo ana a Mulungu ai; koma ana a lonjezo awerengedwa mbeu yake." 
Romans9:9 Pakuti mau a lonjezo ndi amenewa, Pa nyengo iyi ndidzadza, ndipo Sara adzakhala ndi mwana." 
Romans9:10 Ndipo si chotero chokha, koma Rebekanso, pamene anali ndi pakati pa mmodzi, ndiye kholo lathu Isaki;" 
Romans9:11 pakuti anawo asanabadwe, kapena asanachite kanthu kabwino kapena koipa, kuti kutsimikiza mtima kwa Mulungu monga mwa kusankha kukhale, si chifukwa cha ntchito ai, koma chifukwa cha wakuitanayo," 
Romans9:12 chotero kunanenedwa kwa uyo, Wamkulu adzakhala kapolo wa wamng'ono." 
Romans9:13 Inde monga kunalembedwa, Ndinakonda Yakobo, koma ndinamuda Esau." 
Romans9:14 Ndipo tsono tidzatani? Kodi chilipo chosalungama ndi Mulungu? Msatero ai. 
Romans9:15 Pakuti anati ndi Mose, Ndidzachitira chifundo amene ndimchitira chifundo, ndipo ndidzakhala ndi chisoni kwa iye amene ndikhala naye chisoni." 
Romans9:16 Chotero sichifuma kwa munthu amene afuna, kapena kwa iye amene athamanga, koma kwa Mulungu amene achitira chifundo." 
Romans9:17 Pakuti lembo linena kwa Farao, Chifukwa cha ichi, ndinakuutsa iwe, kuti ndikaonetse mwa iwe mphamvu yanga, ndi kuti dzina langa likabukitsidwe pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Romans9:18 Chotero Iye achitira chifundo amene Iye afuna, ndipo amene Iye afuna amuumitsa mtima." 
Romans9:19 Pamenepo udzanena ndine kodi, Adandaulabe bwanji? Pakuti ndani anakaniza chifuno chake?" 
Romans9:20 Koma munthu iwe, ndiwe yani wakubwezera Mulungu mau? Kodi chinthu chopangidwa chidzanena ndi amene anachipanga, Undipangiranji ine chotero?" 
Romans9:21 Kodi kapena woumba mbiya sakutha kuchita zake padothi, kuumba ndi nchinchi yomweyo chotengera chimodzi chaulemu ndi china chamanyazi?" 
Romans9:22 Ndipo titani ngati Mulungu, pofuna Iye kuonetsa mkwiyo wake, ndi kudziwitsa mphamvu yake, analekerera ndi chilekerero chambiri zotengera za mkwiyo zokonzekera chionongeko?" 
Romans9:23 Ndi kuti Iye akadziwitse ulemerero wake waukulu pa zotengera zachifundo, zimene Iye anazikonzeratu kuulemerero," 
Romans9:24 ndi ife amenenso Iye anatiitana, si a mwa Ayuda okhaokha, komanso a mwa anthu amitundu?" 
Romans9:25 Monga atinso mwa Hoseya, Amene sanakhala anthu anga, ndidzawatcha anthu anga; ndi iye amene sanali wokondedwa, wokondedwa." 
Romans9:26 Ndipo kudzali, kuti pamalo pamenepo kunanenedwa kwa iwo, Simuli anthu anga ai, pomwepo iwo adzatchedwa ana a Mulungu wamoyo." 
Romans9:27 Ndipo Yesaya afuula za Israele, kuti, Ungakhale unyinji wa ana a Israele ukhala monga mchenga wa kunyanja, chotsalira ndicho chidzapulumuka." 
Romans9:28 Pakuti Ambuye adzachita mau ake pa dziko lapansi, kuwatsiriza mwachidule." 
Romans9:29 Ndipo monga Yesaya anati kale, Ngati Ambuye wa makamu a kumwamba sanatisiyira ife mbeu, tikadakhala monga Sodomu, ndipo tikadafanana ndi Gomora." 
Romans9:30 Chifukwa chake tidzatani? Kuti amitundu amene sanatsata chilungamo, anafikira chilungamo, ndicho chilungamo cha chikhulupiriro;" 
Romans9:31 koma Israele, potsata lamulo la chilungamo, sanafikila lamulolo." 
Romans9:32 Chifukwa chanji? Chifukwa kuti sanachitsata ndi chikhulupiriro, koma monga ngati ndi ntchito. Anakhumudwa pa mwala wokhumudwitsa;" 
Romans9:33 monganso kwalembedwa, kuti, Onani, ndikhazika m'Ziyoni mwala wakukhumudwa nao, ndi thanthwe lophunthwitsa; ndipo wakukhulupirira Iye sadzachita manyazi." 
Romans10:1 Abale, kufunitsa kwa mtima wanga ndi pemphero langa limene ndiwapempherera kwa Mulungu, ndilo, kuti apulumuke." 
Romans10:2 Pakuti ndiwachitira iwo umboni kuti ali ndi changu cha kwa Mulungu, koma si monga mwa chidziwitso." 
Romans10:3 Pakuti pakusadziwa chilungamo cha Mulungu, ndipo pofuna kukhazikitsa chilungamo cha iwo okha, iwo sanagonja ku chilungamo cha Mulungu." 
Romans10:4 Pakuti Khristu ali chimaliziro cha lamulo kulinga kuchilungamo kwa amene aliyense akhulupirira. 
Romans10:5 Pakuti Mose walemba kuti munthu amene achita chilungamo cha m'lamulo, adzakhala nacho ndi moyo." 
Romans10:6 Koma chilungamo cha chikhulupiriro chitero, Usamanena mumtima mwako, Adzakwera ndani Kumwambako? Ndiko, kutsitsako Khristu;" 
Romans10:7 kapena, Adzatsikira ndani ku chiphompho chakuya? Ndiko, kukweza Khristu kwa akufa," 
Romans10:8 Koma chitani? Mau ali pafupi ndiwe, m'kamwa mwako, ndi mumtima mwako; ndiwo mau a chikhulupiriro, amene ife tiwalalikira:" 
Romans10:9 kuti ngati udzavomereza m'kamwa mwako Yesu ndiye Ambuye, ndi kukhulupirira mumtima mwako kuti Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa, udzapulumuka:" 
Romans10:10 pakuti ndi mtima munthu akhulupirira kutengapo chilungamo; ndi m'kamwa avomereza kutengapo chipulumutso. 
Romans10:11 Pakuti lembo litere, Amene aliyense akhulupirira Iye, sadzachita manyazi." 
Romans10:12 Pakuti kulibe kusiyana Myuda ndi Mgriki; pakuti Yemweyo ali Ambuye wa onse, nawachitira zolemera onse amene aitana pa Iye;" 
Romans10:13 pakuti, amene aliyense adzaitana pa dzina la Ambuye adzapulumuka." 
Romans10:14 Ndipo iwo adzaitana bwanji pa Iye amene sanamkhulupirira? Ndipo adzakhulupirira bwanji Iye amene sanamva za Iye? Ndipo adzamva bwanji wopanda wolalikira? 
Romans10:15 Ndipo adzalalikira bwanji, ngati satumidwa? Monganso kwalembedwa, Okometsetsa ndithu ali mapazi a iwo akulalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa zinthu zabwino." 
Romans10:16 Koma sanamvera Uthenga Wabwino onsewo. Pakuti Yesaya anena, Ambuye, anakhulupirira ndani zonena ife?" 
Romans10:17 Chomwecho chikhulupiriro chidza ndi mbiri, ndi mbiri idza mwa mau a Khristu." 
Romans10:18 Koma ine nditi, Sanamva iwo kodi! Indetu, Liu lao linatulukira kudziko lonse lapansi, ndi maneno ao ku malekezero a dziko lokhalamo anthu." 
Romans10:19 Koma nditi, Kodi Israele alibe kudziwa? Poyamba Mose anena, Ine ndidzachititsa inu nsanje ndi iwo amene sakhala mtundu wa anthu, ndidzakwiyitsa inu ndi mtundu wopulukira." 
Romans10:20 Ndipo Yesaya alimbika mtima ndithu, nati, Ndinapezedwa ndi iwo amene sanandifuna; ndinaonekera kwa iwo amene sanandifunsa."
