Romans10:21 Koma kwa Israele anena, Dzuwa lonse ndinatambalitsira manja anga kwa anthu osamvera ndi okanakana." 
Romans11:1 Chifukwa chake ndinena, Mulungu anataya anthu ake kodi? Msatero ai. Pakuti inenso ndili Mwisraele, wa mbeu ya Abrahamu, wa fuko la Benjamini." 
Romans11:2 Mulungu sanataya anthu ake amene Iye anawadziwiratu. Kapena simudziwa kodi chimene lembo linena za Eliya? Kuti anaumirira Mulungu poneneza Israele, kuti," 
Romans11:3 Ambuye, anawapha aneneri anu, nagwetsa maguwa anu a nsembe; ndipo ine ndatsala ndekha, ndipo alikufuna moyo wanga." 
Romans11:4 Koma kuyankha kwa Mulungu kudatani kwa iye? Ndinadzisiyira ndekha anthu amuna zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, amene sanagwadira Baala." 
Romans11:5 Choteronso nthawi yatsopano chilipo chotsalira monga mwa kusankha kwa chisomo. 
Romans11:6 Koma ngati kuli ndi chisomo, sikulinso ndi ntchito ai; ndipo pakapanda kutero, chisomo sichikhalanso chisomo." 
Romans11:7 Ndipo chiyani tsono? Ichi chimene Israele afunafuna sanachipeza; koma osankhidwawo anachipeza, ndipo otsalawo anaumitsidwa mtima;" 
Romans11:8 monga kunalembedwa kuti, Mulungu anawapatsa mzimu watulo, maso kuti asapenye, ndi makutu kuti asamve, kufikira lero lino." 
Romans11:9 Ndipo Davide akuti, Gome lao likhale kwa iwo, ngati msampha, ndi ngati diwa, ndi monga chokhumudwitsa, ndi chowabwezera chilango;" 
Romans11:10 maso ao adetsedwe, kuti asapenye, ndipo muweramitse msana wao masiku onse." 
Romans11:11 Chifukwa chake ndinena, Anakhumudwa kodi kuti agwe? Msatero ai; koma ndi kulakwa kwao chipulumutso chinadza kwa anthu akunja, kudzachititsa iwo nsanje." 
Romans11:12 Ndipo ngati kulakwa kwao, kwatengera dziko lapansi zolemera, ndipo kuchepa kwao kutengera anthu amitundu zolemera; koposa kotani nanga kudzaza kwao?" 
Romans11:13 Koma ndilankhula ndi inu anthu amitundu. Popeza ine ndili mtumwi wa anthu amitundu, ndilemekeza utumiki wanga;" 
Romans11:14 kuti ngati nkutheka ndikachititse nsanje anthu a mtundu wanga, ndi kupulumutsa ena a iwo." 
Romans11:15 Pakuti ngati kuwataya kwao kuli kuyanjanitsa kwa dziko lapansi, nanga kulandiridwa kwao kudzatani, koma ndithu ngati moyo wakuchokera kwa akufa?" 
Romans11:16 Ndipo ngati zoundukula zili zopatulika, choteronso mtanda; ndipo ngati muzu uli wopatulika, choteronso nthambi." 
Romans11:17 Koma ngati nthambi zina zinathyoledwa, ndipo iwe, ndiwe mtengo wa azitona wa kuthengo, unalumikizidwa mwa izo, nugawana nazo za muzu za mafuta ake a mtengowo," 
Romans11:18 usadzitama iwe wekha pa nthambizo: koma ngati udzitama wekha, suli iwe amene unyamula muzu, ai, koma muzu ukunyamula iwetu." 
Romans11:19 Ndipo kapena udzanena, Nthambizo zathyoledwa kuti ine ndikalumikizidwe nao." 
Romans11:20 Chabwino; iwo anathyoledwa ndi kusakhulupirira kwao, ndipo iwe umaima ndi chikhulupiriro chako. Usamadzikuza mumtima, koma opatu:" 
Romans11:21 pakuti ngati Mulungu sanaleka nthambi za mtundu wake, inde sadzakuleka iwe." 
Romans11:22 Chifukwa chake onani kukoma mtima ndi kuuma mtima kwake kwa Mulungu: kwa iwo adagwa, kuuma kwake; koma kwa iwe kukoma mtima kwake kwa Mulungu, ngati ukhala chikhalire m'kukoma mtimamo; koma ngati sutero, adzakusadza iwe." 
Romans11:23 Ndipo iwonso, ngati sakhala chikhalire mu kusakhulupirira, adzawalumikizanso, pakuti Mulungu ali wamphamvu yakutha kuwalumikizanso." 
Romans11:24 Pakuti ngati iwe unasadzidwa kumtengo wa azitona wa mtundu wa kuthengo, ndipo unalumikizidwa ndi mtengo wa azitona wabwino, mokaniza makhalidwe ako; koposa kotani nanga iwo, ndiwo nthambi za mtundu wake, adzalumikizidwa ndi mtengo wao womwewo wa azitona?" 
Romans11:25 Pakuti sindifuna, abale, kuti mukhale osadziwa chinsinsi ichi, kuti mungadziyese anzeru mwa inu nokha, kuti kuuma mtima kunadza pang'ono pa Israele, kufikira kudzaza kwa anthu amitundu kunalowa;" 
Romans11:26 ndipo chotero Israele yense adzapulumuka; monganso kunalembedwa, kuti, Adzatuluka ku Ziyoni Mpulumutsi; Iye adzachotsa zamwano kwa Yakobo:" 
Romans11:27 Ndipo ichi ndi chipangano changa ndi iwo, pamene ndidzachotsa machimo ao." 
Romans11:28 Kunena za Uthenga Wabwino, iwo ali ngati adani, chifukwa cha inu; koma kunena za chisankhidwe, ali okondedwa, chifukwa cha makolo." 
Romans11:29 Pakuti mphatso zake ndi kuitana kwake kwa Mulungu sizilapika. 
Romans11:30 Pakuti monga inunso kale simunamvera Mulungu, koma tsopano mwalandira chifundo mwa kusamvera kwao," 
Romans11:31 choteronso iwo sanamvera tsopano, kuti iwonso akalandire chifundo, chifukwa cha chifundo cha kwa inu." 
Romans11:32 Pakuti Mulungu anatsekera pamodzi onse m'kusamvera, kuti akachitire onse chifundo." 
Romans11:33 Ha! Kuya kwake kwa kulemera ndi kwa nzeru ndi kwa kudziwa kwake kwa Mulungu! Osasanthulikadi maweruzo ake, ndi njira zake nzosalondoleka!" 
Romans11:34 Pakuti anadziwitsa ndani mtima wake wa Ambuye? Kapena anakhala mphungu wake ndani? 
Romans11:35 Ndipo anayamba ndani kumpatsa Iye, ndipo adzambwezeranso?" 
Romans11:36 Chifukwa zinthu zonse zichokera kwa Iye, zichitika mwa Iye, ndi kufikira kwa Iye. Kwa Iyeyo ukhale ulemerero kunthawi zonse. Amen." 
Romans12:1 Chifukwa chake ndikupemphani inu, abale, mwa zifundo za Mulungu, kuti mupereke matupi anu nsembe yamoyo, yopatulika, yokondweretsa Mulungu, ndiko kupembedza kwanu koyenera." 
Romans12:2 Ndipo musafanizidwe ndi makhalidwe a pansi pano: koma mukhale osandulika, mwa kukonzanso kwa mtima wanu, kuti mukazindikire chimene chili chifuno cha Mulungu, chabwino, ndi chokondweretsa, ndi changwiro." 
Romans12:3 Pakuti ndi chisomo chapatsidwa kwa ine, ndiuza munthu aliyense wa inu, kuti asadziyese koposa kumene ayenera kudziyesa; koma aganize modziletsa yekha, monga Mulungu anagawira kwa munthu aliyense muyeso wa chikhulupiriro." 
Romans12:4 Pakuti monga m'thupi limodzi tili nazo ziwalo zambiri, ndipo ziwalo zonsezo sizili nayo ntchito imodzimodzi;" 
Romans12:5 chomwecho ife, ndife ambiri, tili thupi limodzi mwa Khristu, ndi ziwalo zinzake, wina ndi wina." 
Romans12:6 Ndipo pokhala ife ndi mphatso zosiyana, monga mwa chisomo chipatsidwa kwa ife, kapena mphatso yakunenera, tinenere monga mwa muyeso wa chikhulupiriro;" 
Romans12:7 kapena yakutumikira, tidzipereke ku utumiki uwu; kapena iye wakuphunzitsa, kukuphunzitsako;" 
Romans12:8 kapena iye wakudandaulira, kukudandaulirako; wakugawira achite ndi mtima woona; iye wakuweruza, aweruze ndi changu; iye wakuchita chifundo, achite ndi kukondwa mtima." 
Romans12:9 Chikondano chikhale chopanda chinyengo. Dana nacho choipa; gwirizana nacho chabwino. 
Romans12:10 M'chikondano cha anzanu wina ndi mnzake mukondane ndi chikondi chenicheni; mutsogolerane ndi kuchitira wina mnzake ulemu; 
Romans12:11 musakhale aulesi m'machitidwe anu; khalani achangu mumzimu, tumikirani Ambuye;" 
Romans12:12 kondwerani m'chiyembekezo, pirirani m'masautso; limbikani chilimbikire m'kupemphera." 
Romans12:13 Patsani zosowa oyera mtima; cherezani aulendo. 
Romans12:14 Dalitsani iwo akuzunza inu; dalitsani, musawatemberere." 
Romans12:15 Kondwani nao iwo akukondwera; lirani nao akulira. 
Romans12:16 Mukhale ndi mtima umodzi wina ndi mnzake. Musasamalire zinthu zazikulu, koma phatikanani nao odzichepetsa. Musadziyesere anzeru mwa inu nokha." 
Romans12:17 Musabwezere munthu aliyense choipa chosinthana ndi choipa. Ganiziranitu zinthu za ulemu pamaso pa anthu onse. 
Romans12:18 Ngati nkutheka, monga momwe mukhoza, khalani ndi mtendere ndi anthu onse." 
Romans12:19 Musabwezere choipa, okondedwa, koma patukani pamkwiyo; pakuti kwalembedwa, Kubwezera kuli kwanga, Ine ndidzabwezera, ati Ambuye." 
Romans12:20 Koma ngati mdani wako akumva njala, umdyetse, ngati akumva ludzu, ummwetse; pakuti pakutero udzaunjika makala a moto pamutu pake." 
Romans12:21 Musagonje kwa choipa, koma ndi chabwino gonjetsani choipa." 
Romans13:1 Anthu onse amvere maulamuliro a akulu; pakuti palibe ulamuliro wina koma wochokera kwa Mulungu; ndipo iwo amene alipo aikidwa ndi Mulungu. 
Romans13:2 Kotero kuti iye amene atsutsana nao ulamuliro, akaniza choikika ndi Mulungu; ndipo iwo akukaniza, adzadzitengera kulanga." 
Romans13:3 Pakuti mafumu sakhala oopsa ntchito zabwino koma zoipa. Ndipo ufuna kodi kusaopa ulamuliro? Chita chabwino, ndipo udzalandira kutama m'menemo:" 
Romans13:4 pakuti ndiye mtumiki wa Mulungu, kuchitira iwe zabwino. Koma ngati uchita choipa, opatu, pakuti iye sagwira lupanga kwachabe; pakuti ndiye mtumiki wa Mulungu wakukwiyira ndi kubwezera chilango wochita zoipa." 
Romans13:5 Chifukwa chake, kuyenera kuti mukhale omvera, si chifukwa cha mkwiyo wokha, komanso chifukwa cha chikumbu mtima." 
Romans13:6 Pakuti chifukwa cha ichi mupatsanso msonkho; pakuti iwo ndiwo atumiki a Mulungu akulabadirabe chinthu chimenechi. 
Romans13:7 Perekani kwa anthu onse mangawa ao; msonkho kwa eni ake a msonkho; kulipira kwa eni ake a kulipidwa; kuopa kwa eni ake a kuwaopa; ulemu kwa eni ake a ulemu. 
Romans13:8 Musakhale ndi mangawa kwa munthu aliyense, koma kukondana ndiko; pakuti iye amene akondana ndi mnzake wakwanitsa lamulo." 
Romans13:9 Pakuti ili, Usachite chigololo, Usaphe, Usabe, Usasirire, ndipo lingakhale lamulo lina lililonse, limangika pamodzi m'mau amenewa, kuti, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda iwe wekha." 
Romans13:10 Chikondano sichichitira mnzake choipa; chotero chikondanocho chili chokwanitsa lamulo. 
Romans13:11 Ndipo chitani ichi, podziwa inu nyengo, kuti tsopano ndiyo nthawi yabwino yakuuka kutulo; pakuti tsopano chipulumutso chathu chili pafupi koposa pamene tinayamba kukhulupirira." 
Romans13:12 Usiku wapita, ndi mbandakucha wayandikira; chifukwa chake tivule ntchito za mdima, ndipo tivale zida za kuunika." 
Romans13:13 Tiyendeyende koyenera, monga usana; si m'madyerero ndi kuledzera ai, si m'chigololo ndi chonyansa ai, si mu ndeu ndi nkhwidzi ai." 
Romans13:14 Koma valani inu Ambuye Yesu Khristu, ndipo musaganizire za thupi kuchita zofuna zake." 
Romans14:1 Ndipo iye amene ali wofooka m'chikhulupiriro, mumlandire, koma si kuchita naye makani otsutsana ai." 
Romans14:2 Munthu mmodzi akhulupirira kuti adye zinthu zonse, koma wina wofooka angodya zitsamba." 
Romans14:3 Wakudyayo asapeputse wosadyayo; ndipo wosadyayo asaweruze wakudyayo; pakuti Mulungu wamlandira. 
Romans14:4 Ndani iwe wakuweruza mnyamata wa mwini wake? Iye aimirira kapena kugwa kwa mbuye wake wa mwini yekha. Ndipo adzaimiritsidwa; pakuti Ambuye ali wamphamvu kumuimiritsa. 
Romans14:5 Munthu wina aganizira kuti tsiku lina liposa linzake; wina aganizira kuti masiku onse alingana. Munthu aliyense akhazikike konse mumtima mwake. 
Romans14:6 Iye wakusamalira tsiku, alisamalira kwa Ambuye: ndipo iye wakudya, adya mwa Ambuye, pakuti ayamika Mulungu; ndipo iye wosadya, mwa Ambuye sakudya, nayamikanso Mulungu." 
Romans14:7 Pakuti palibe mmodzi wa ife adzikhalira ndi moyo yekha, ndipo palibe mmodzi adzifera yekha." 
Romans14:8 Pakuti tingakhale tili ndi moyo, tikhalira Ambuye moyo; kapena tikafa, tifera Ambuye; chifukwa chake tingakhale tili ndi moyo, kapena tikafa, tikhala ake a Ambuye." 
Romans14:9 Pakuti, chifukwa cha ichi Khristu adafera, nakhalanso ndi moyo, kuti Iye akakhale Ambuye wa akufa ndi wa amoyo." 
Romans14:10 Koma iwe uweruziranji mbale wako? Kapena iwenso upeputsiranji mbale wako? Pakuti ife tonse tidzaimirira kumpando wakuweruza wa Mulungu. 
Romans14:11 Pakuti kwalembedwa, Pali moyo wanga, ati Ambuye, mabondo onse adzagwadira Ine, ndipo malilime onse adzavomereza Mulungu." 
Romans14:12 Chotero munthu aliyense wa ife adzadziwerengera mlandu wake kwa Mulungu. 
Romans14:13 Chifukwa chake tisaweruzanenso wina mnzake; koma weruzani ichi makamaka, kuti munthu asaike chokhumudwitsa pa njira ya mbale wake, kapena chomphunthwitsa." 
Romans14:14 Ndidziwa, ndipo ndakhazikika mtima mwa Ambuye Yesu, kuti palibe chinthu chonyansa pa chokha; koma kwa ameneyo achiyesa chonyansa, kwa iye chikhala chonyansa." 
Romans14:15 Koma ngati iwe wachititsa mbale wako chisoni ndi chakudya, pamenepo ulibe kuyendayendanso ndi chikondano. Usamuononga ndi chakudya chako, iye amene Khristu adamfera." 
Romans14:16 Chifukwa chake musalole chabwino chanu achisinjirire. 
Romans14:17 Pakuti ufumu wa Mulungu sukhala chakudya ndi chakumwa, koma chilungamo, ndi mtendere, ndi chimwemwe mwa Mzimu Woyera." 
Romans14:18 Pakuti iye amene atumikira Khristu mu izi akondweretsa Mulungu, navomerezeka ndi anthu." 
Romans14:19 Chifukwa chake tilondole zinthu za mtendere, ndi zinthu zakulimbikitsana wina ndi mnzake." 
Romans14:20 Usapasule ntchito ya Mulungu chifukwa cha chakudya. Zinthu zonse zili zoyera; koma kuli koipa kwa munthu amene akudya ndi kukhumudwa. 
Romans14:21 Kuli kwabwino kusadya nyama, kapena kusamwa vinyo, kapena kusachita chinthu chilichonse chakukhumudwitsa mbale wako." 
Romans14:22 Chikhulupiriro chimene uli nacho, ukhale nacho kwa iwe wekha pamaso pa Mulungu. Wodala ndiye amene sadziweruza mwini yekha m'zinthu zomwe iye wazivomereza." 
Romans14:23 Koma iye amene akayikakayika pakudya, atsutsika, chifukwa akudya wopanda chikhulupiriro; ndipo chinthu chilichonse chosatuluka m'chikhulupiriro, ndicho uchimo." 
Romans15:1 Ndipo ife amene tili olimba tiyenera kunyamula zofooka za opanda mphamvu, ndi kusadzikondweretsa tokha." 
Romans15:2 Yense wa ife akondweretse mnzake, kumchitira zabwino, zakumlimbikitsa." 
Romans15:3 Pakuti Khristunso sanadzikondweretsa yekha; koma monga kwalembedwa, Minyozo ya iwo amene anakunyoza iwe inagwa pa Ine." 
Romans15:4 Pakuti zonse zinalembedwa kale zinalembedwa kutilangiza, kuti mwa chipiriro ndi chitonthozo cha malembo, tikhale ndi chiyembekezo." 
Romans15:5 Ndipo Mulungu wa chipiriro ndi wa chitonthozo apatse inu kuti mukhale ndi mtima umodzi wina ndi mnzake, monga mwa Khristu Yesu;" 
Romans15:6 kuti nonse pamodzi, m'kamwa mmodzi, mukalemekeze Mulungu ndi Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu." 
Romans15:7 Chifukwa chake mulandirane wina ndi mnzake, monganso Khristu anakulandirani inu, kukachitira Mulungu ulemerero." 
Romans15:8 Ndipo ndinena kuti Khristu anakhala mtumiki wa mdulidwe, chifukwa cha choonadi cha Mulungu, kuti alimbikitse malonjezo opatsidwa kwa makolo," 
Romans15:9 ndi kuti anthu a mitundu ina akalemekeze Mulungu, chifukwa cha chifundo; monga kwalembedwa, Chifukwa cha ichi ndidzakuvomerezani Inu pakati pa anthu amitundu, ndidzaimbira dzina lanu." 
Romans15:10 Ndiponso anena, Kondwani, amitundu inu, pamodzi ndi anthu ake." 
Romans15:11 Ndiponso, Tamandani Ambuye, inu a mitundu yonse; ndipo anthu onse amtamande." 
Romans15:12 Ndiponso, Yesaya ati, Padzali muzu wa Yese, ndi Iye amene aukira kuchita ufumu pa anthu amitundu; Iyeyo anthu amitundu adzamuyembekezera." 
Romans15:13 Ndipo Mulungu wa chiyembekezo adzaze inu ndi chimwemwe chonse ndi mtendere m'kukhulupirira, kuti mukachuluke ndi chiyembekezo, mu mphamvu ya Mzimu Woyera." 
Romans15:14 Koma ine ndekhanso, abale anga, nditsimikiza mtima za inu, kuti inu nokhanso muli odzala ndi ubwino, odzazidwa ndi kudziwitsa konse, ndi kukhoza kudandaulirana wina ndi mnzake." 
Romans15:15 Koma mwina ndaposa kukulemberani molimba mtima monga kukukumbutsaninso, chifukwa cha chisomo chapatsidwa kwa ine ndi Mulungu," 
Romans15:16 kuti ndikhale mtumiki wa Khristu Yesu kwa anthu amitundu, wakutumikira Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu, kuti kupereka kwake kwa anthu amitundu kulandirike, koyeretsedwa ndi Mzimu Woyera." 
Romans15:17 Chifukwa chake ndili nacho chodzitamandira cha m'Khristu Yesu ndi zinthu za kwa Mulungu. 
Romans15:18 Pakuti sindingathe kulimba mtima kulankhula zinthu zimene Khristu sanazichita mwa ine zakumveretsa anthu amitundu, ndi mau ndi ntchito," 
Romans15:19 mu mphamvu ya zizindikiro ndi zozizwitsa, mu mphamvu ya Mzimu Woyera; kotero kuti ine kuyambira ku Yerusalemu ndi kuzungulirako kufikira ku Iliriko, ndinakwanitsa Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu;" 
Romans15:20 ndipo chotero ndinachiyesa chinthu chaulemu kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino, pa malopo Khristu asanatchulidwe kale, kuti ndisamange nyumba pa maziko a munthu wina." 
Romans15:21 Koma monga kwalembedwa, Iwo amene uthenga wake sunawafikire, adzaona, ndipo iwo amene sanamve, adzadziwitsa." 
Romans15:22 Chifukwa chakenso ndinaletsedwa kawirikawiri kudza kwa inu; 
Romans15:23 koma tsopano, pamene ndilibe malo m'maiko akuno, ndipo pokhala ndi kulakalaka zaka zambiri kudza kwa inu, ndidzatero," 
Romans15:24 pamene paliponse ndidzapita ku Spaniya. Pakuti ndiyembekeza kuonana ndi inu pa ulendo wanga, ndi kuperekezedwa ndi inu panjira panga kumeneko, ngati nditayamba kukhuta pang'ono ndi kukhala ndi inu." 
Romans15:25 Koma tsopano ndipita ku Yerusalemu, ndilikutumikira oyera mtima." 
Romans15:26 Pakuti kunakondweretsa a ku Masedoniya ndi Akaya kuchereza osauka a kwa oyera mtima a ku Yerusalemu. 
Romans15:27 Pakuti kunakondweretsa iwo; ndiponso iwo ali amangawa ao. Pakuti ngati amitundu anagawana zinthu zao zauzimu, alinso amangawa akutumikira iwo ndi zinthu zathupi." 
Romans15:28 Koma pamene ndikatsiriza ichi, ndi kuwasindikizira iwo chipatso ichi, ndidzapyola kwanu kupita ku Spaniya." 
Romans15:29 Ndipo ndidziwa kuti pamene ndikadza kwanu, ndidzafika m'kudzaza kwake kwa chidalitso cha Khristu." 
Romans15:30 Ndipo ndikudandaulirani, abale, ndi Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, ndi chikondi cha Mzimu, kuti mudzalimbike pamodzi ndi ine m'mapemphero anu kwa Mulungu chifukwa cha ine;" 
Romans15:31 kuti ndikapulumutsidwe kwa osamvera aja a ku Yudeya; ndi kuti utumiki wanga wa ku Yerusalemu ukhale wolandiridwa bwino ndi oyera mtima; 
Romans15:32 kuti ndi chimwemwe ndikadze kwa inu mwa chifuno cha Mulungu, ndi kupumula pamodzi ndi inu." 
Romans15:33 Ndipo Mulungu wa mtendere akhale ndi inu nonse. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Ndipereka kwa inu Febe, mlongo wathu, ndiye mtumiki wamkazi wa Mpingo wa Ambuye wa ku Kenkrea;" 
Romans16:2 kuti mumlandire iye mwa Ambuye, monga kuyenera oyera mtima, ndi kuti mumthandize m'zinthu zilizonse adzazifuna kwa inu; pakuti iye yekha anali wosungira ambiri, ndi ine ndemwe." 
Romans16:3 Mupereke moni kwa Prisika ndi Akwila, antchito anzanga mwa Khristu Yesu," 
Romans16:4 amene anapereka khosi lao chifukwa cha moyo wanga; amene ndiwayamika, si ine ndekha, komanso Mipingo yonse ya Ambuye ya kwa anthu amitundu;" 
Romans16:5 ndipo mupereke moni kwa Mpingo wa Ambuye wa m'nyumba mwao. Moni kwa Epeneto wokondedwa wanga, ndiye chipatso choundukula cha Asiya cha kwa Khristu." 
Romans16:6 Moni kwa Maria amene anadzilemetsa ndi ntchito zambiri zothandiza inu. 
Romans16:7 Moni kwa Androniko ndi Yunia, anansi anga, ndi andende anzanga, amene ali omveka mwa atumwi, amenenso ananditsogolera ine mwa Khristu." 
Romans16:8 Moni kwa Ampiliato wokondedwa wanga mwa Ambuye. 
Romans16:9 Moni kwa Urbano wantchito mnzathu mwa Khristu, ndi Stakisi wokondedwa wanga." 
Romans16:10 Moni kwa Apelesi, wovomerezedwayo mwa Khristu. Moni iwo a kwa Aristobulo." 
Romans16:11 Moni kwa Herodiono, mbale wanga. Moni iwo a kwa Narkiso, amene ali mwa Ambuye." 
Romans16:12 Moni kwa Trifena, ndi Trifosa amene agwiritsa ntchito mwa Ambuye. Moni kwa Perisi, wokondedwayo amene anagwiritsa ntchito zambiri mwa Ambuye." 
Romans16:13 Moni kwa Rufu, wosankhidwayo mwa Ambuye, ndi amai wake ndi wanga." 
Romans16:14 Moni kwa Asinkrito, Filegoni, Heremesi, Patrobasi, Herimasi ndi abale amene ali nao." 
Romans16:15 Moni Filologo ndi Juliya, Nereo ndi mlongo wake, ndi Olimpasi, ndi oyera mtima onse ali pamodzi nao." 
Romans16:16 Mupatsane moni wina ndi mnzake ndi kupsompsona kupatulika. Mipingo yonse ya Khristu ikupatsani moni. 
Romans16:17 Ndipo ndikudandaulirani, abale, yang'anirani iwo akuchita zopatutsana ndi zophunthwitsa, kosalingana ndi chiphunzitsocho munachiphunzira inu; ndipo potolokani pa iwo." 
Romans16:18 Pakuti otere satumikira Ambuye wathu Khristu, koma mimba yao; ndipo ndi mau osalaza ndi osyasyalika asocheretsa mitima ya osalakwa." 
Romans16:19 Pakuti kumvera kwanu kunabuka kwa anthu onse. Chifukwa chake ndikondwera ndi inu; koma ndifuna kuti mukakhale anzeru pa zabwino, koma ozungulidwa pa zoipa." 
Romans16:20 Ndipo Mulungu wa mtendere adzaphwanya Satana pansi pa mapazi anu tsopano lino. Chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi inu nonse. 
Romans16:21 Timoteo wantchito mnzanga akupatsani moni; ndi Lusio ndi Yasoni ndi Sosipatere, abale anga." 
Romans16:22 Ine Tersio, ndilikulemba kalata ameneyu, ndikupereka moni mwa Ambuye." 
Romans16:23 Gayo, mwini nyumba wolandira ine, ndi Mpingo wonse wa Ambuye, akupereka moni. Erasto, ndiye woyang'anira mudzi, akupereka moni, ndiponso Kwarto mbaleyo." 
Romans16:24  
Romans16:25 Ndipo kwa Iye amene ali wamphamvu yakukhazikitsa inu monga mwa Uthenga wanga Wabwino, ndi kulalikira kwa Yesu Khristu, monga mwa vumbulutso la chinsinsi chimene chinabisika mwa nthawi zonse zosayamba," 
Romans16:26 koma chaonetsedwa tsopano, ndi kudziwidwa kwa anthu a mitundu yonse mwa malembo a aneneriwo, monga mwa lamulo la Mulungu wosatha, kuti amvere chikhulupiriro;" 
Romans16:27 kwa Mulungu wanzeru yekhayo, mwa Yesu Khristu, kwa yemweyo ukhale ulemerero kunthawi zonse. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Paulo, woitanidwa akhale mtumwi wa Khristu Yesu mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu, ndi Sostene mbaleyo," 
1Corinthians1:2 kwa Mpingo wa Mulungu wakukhala m'Korinto, ndiwo oyeretsedwa mwa Khristu Yesu, oitanidwa akhale oyera mtima, pamodzi ndi onse akuitana pa dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, m'malo monse, ndiye wao, ndi wathu:" 
1Corinthians1:3 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere zochokera kwa Mulungu Atate wathu, ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu." 
1Corinthians1:4 Ndiyamika Mulungu wanga nthawi yonse kaamba ka inu, chifukwa cha chisomo cha Mulungu chinapatsidwa kwa inu mwa Khristu Yesu;" 
1Corinthians1:5 kuti m'zonse munalemezedwa mwa Iye, m'mau onse, ndi chidziwitso chonse;" 
1Corinthians1:6 monga umboni wa Khristu unakhazikika mwa inu; 
1Corinthians1:7 kotero kuti sichikusowani inu chaufulu chilichonse; pakulindira inu vumbulutso la Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu; 
1Corinthians1:8 amenenso adzakukhazikitsani inu kufikira chimaliziro, kuti mukhale opanda chifukwa m'tsiku la Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Mulungu ali wokhulupirika amene munaitanidwa mwa Iye, ku chiyanjano cha Mwana wake Yesu Khristu, Ambuye wathu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Koma ndikudandaulirani inu, abale, mwa dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, kuti munene chimodzimodzi inu nonse, ndi kuti pasakhale malekano pakati pa inu; koma mumangike mu mtima womwewo ndi m'chiweruziro chomwecho." 
1Corinthians1:11 Pakuti zinamveka kwa ine za inu, abale anga, ndi iwo a kwa Koloe, kuti pali makani pakati pa inu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Koma ichi ndinena, kuti yense wa inu anena, Ine ndine wa Paulo; koma ine wa Apolo; koma ine wa Kefa; koma ine wa Khristu." 
1Corinthians1:13 Kodi Khristu wagawika? Kodi Paulo anapachikidwa chifukwa cha inu? Kapena kodi munabatizidwa m'dzina la Paulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndiyamika Mulungu kuti sindinabatiza mmodzi yense wa inu, koma Krispo ndi Gayo;" 
1Corinthians1:15 kuti anganene mmodzi kuti mwabatizidwa m'dzina langa. 
1Corinthians1:16 Koma ndinabatizanso a pa banja la Stefanasi; za ena, sindidziwa ngati ndinabatiza wina yense." 
1Corinthians1:17 Pakuti Khristu sanandituma ine kubatiza, koma kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino, si mu nzeru ya mau, kuti mtanda wa Khristu ungayesedwe wopanda pake." 
1Corinthians1:18 Pakuti mau a mtanda ali ndithu chinthu chopusa kwa iwo akutayika, koma kwa ife amene tilikupulumutsidwa ali mphamvu ya Mulungu." 
1Corinthians1:19 Pakuti kulembedwa, Ndidzaononga nzeru za anzeru, ndi kuchenjera kwa ochenjera ndidzakutha." 
1Corinthians1:20 Ali kuti wanzeru? Mlembi ali kuti? Ali kuti wotsutsana wa nthawi ya pansi pano? Kodi Mulungu sanaipusitsa nzeru ya dziko lapansi? 
1Corinthians1:21 Pakuti popeza m'nzeru ya Mulungu dziko lapansi, mwa nzeru yake, silinadziwa Mulungu, chidamkonda Mulungu kupulumutsa okhulupirirawo mwa chopusa cha kulalikira." 
1Corinthians1:22 Ndipo popeza Ayuda afunsa zizindikiro, ndi Agriki atsata nzeru:" 
1Corinthians1:23 koma ife tilalikira Khristu wopachikidwa, kwa Ayudatu chokhumudwitsa, ndi kwa amitundu chinthu chopusa;" 
1Corinthians1:24 koma kwa iwo oitanidwa, ndiwo Ayuda ndi Agriki, Khristu mphamvu ya Mulungu, ndi nzeru ya Mulungu." 
1Corinthians1:25 Chifukwa kuti chipusa cha Mulungu chiposa anthu ndi nzeru zao; ndipo chofooka cha Mulungu chiposa anthu ndi mphamvu yao. 
1Corinthians1:26 Pakuti penyani maitanidwe anu, abale, kuti saitanidwa ambiri anzeru, monga mwa thupi; ambiri amphamvu, mfulu zambiri, iai;" 
1Corinthians1:27 koma Mulungu anasankhula zopusa za dziko lapansi, kuti akachititse manyazi anzeru; ndipo zofooka za dziko lapansi Mulungu anazisankhula, kuti akachititse manyazi zamphamvu;" 
1Corinthians1:28 ndipo zopanda pake za dziko lapansi, ndi zonyozeka, anazisankhula Mulungu, ndi zinthu zoti kulibe; kuti akathere zinthu zoti ziliko;" 
1Corinthians1:29 kuti thupi lililonse lisadzitamande pamaso pa Mulungu. 
1Corinthians1:30 Koma kwa Iye muli inu mwa Khristu Yesu, amene anayesedwa kwa ife nzeru ya kwa Mulungu, ndi chilungamo ndi chiyeretso ndi chiombolo;" 
1Corinthians1:31 kuti monga mwalembedwa, Iye amene adzitamanda, adzitamande mwa Ambuye." 
1Corinthians2:1 Ndipo ine, abale, m'mene ndinadza kwa inu, sindinadza ndi kuposa kwa mau, kapena kwa nzeru, polalikira kwa inu chinsinsi cha Mulungu." 
1Corinthians2:2 Pakuti ndinatsimikiza mtima kuti ndisadziwe kanthu mwa inu, koma Yesu Khristu, ndi Iye wopachikidwa." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ndipo ine ndinakhala nanu mofooka ndi m'mantha, ndi monthunthumira mwambiri." 
1Corinthians2:4 Ndipo mau anga ndi kulalikira kwanga sanakhala ndi mau okopa a nzeru, koma m'chionetso cha Mzimu ndi cha mphamvu;" 
1Corinthians2:5 kuti chikhulupiriro chanu chisakhale m'nzeru ya anthu, koma mu mphamvu ya Mulungu." 
1Corinthians2:6 Koma tilankhula nzeru mwa angwiro; koma si nzeru ya nthawi yino ya pansi pano, kapena ya akulu a nthawi yino ya pansi pano, amene alinkuthedwa;" 
1Corinthians2:7 koma tilankhula nzeru ya Mulungu m'chinsinsi, yobisikayo, imene Mulungu anaikiratu, pasanakhale nyengo za pansi pano, ku ulemerero wathu," 
1Corinthians2:8 imene saidziwa mmodzi wa akulu a nthawi ya pansi pano: pakuti akadadziwa sakadapachika Mbuye wa ulemerero; 
1Corinthians2:9 koma monga kulembedwa, Zimene diso silinaziona, ndi khutu silinazimva, nisizinalowa mu mtima wa munthu, zimene zilizonse Mulungu anakonzereratu iwo akumkonda Iye." 
1Corinthians2:10 Koma kwa ife Mulungu anationetsera izi mwa Mzimu; pakuti Mzimu asanthula zonse, zakuya za Mulungu zomwe." 
1Corinthians2:11 Pakuti ndani wa anthu adziwa za munthu, koma mzimu wa munthuyu uli mwa iye? Momwemonso za Mulungu palibe wina azidziwa, koma Mzimu wa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians2:12 Koma sitinalandira ife mzimu wa dziko lapansi, koma Mzimu wa kwa Mulungu, kuti tikadziwe zimene zipatsidwa kwa ife ndi Mulungu kwaufulu." 
1Corinthians2:13 Zimenenso tilankhula, si ndi mau ophunzitsidwa ndi nzeru za munthu, koma ophunzitsidwa ndi Mzimu; ndi kulinganiza zamzimu ndi zamzimu." 
1Corinthians2:14 Koma munthu wa chibadwidwe cha umunthu salandira za Mzimu wa Mulungu: pakuti aziyesa zopusa; ndipo sakhoza kuzizindikira, chifukwa ziyesedwa mwauzimu." 
1Corinthians2:15 Koma iye amene ali wauzimu ayesa zonse, koma iye yekha sayesedwa ndi mmodzi yense." 
1Corinthians2:16 Pakuti wadziwa ndani mtima wa Ambuye, kuti akamlangize Iye? Koma ife tili nao mtima wa Khristu." 
1Corinthians3:1 Ndipo ine, abale, sindinakhoza kulankhula ndi inu monga ndi auzimu, koma monga athupi, monga makanda mwa Khristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ndinadyetsa inu mkaka, si chakudya cholimba ai; pakuti simunachikhoza; ngakhale tsopano lino simuchikhoza; pakuti mulinso athupi;" 
1Corinthians3:3 pakuti, pokhala pali nkhwidzi ndi ndeu pakati pa inu simuli athupi kodi, ndi kuyendayenda monga mwa munthu?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Pakuti pamene wina anena, Ine ndine wa Paulo; koma mnzake, Ndine wa Apolo; simuli anthu kodi?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Ndipo Apolo nchiyani, ndi Paulo nchiyani? Atumiki amene munakhulupirira mwa iwo, yense monga Ambuye anampatsa." 
1Corinthians3:6 Ndinaoka ine, anathirira Apolo; koma Mulungu anakulitsa." 
1Corinthians3:7 Chotero sali kanthu kapena wookayo, kapena wothirirayo; koma Mulungu amene akulitsa." 
1Corinthians3:8 Koma wookayo ndi wothirirayo ali amodzi; koma yense adzalandira mphotho yake ya iye yekha, monga mwa kuchititsa kwake kwa iye yekha." 
1Corinthians3:9 Pakuti ife ndife antchito anzake a Mulungu; chilimo cha Mulungu, chimango cha Mulungu ndi inu." 
1Corinthians3:10 Monga mwa chisomo cha Mulungu chidapatsidwa kwa ine, ngati mwini mamangidwe waluso, ndinaika maziko, koma wina amangapo. Koma yense ayang'anire umo amangira pamenepo." 
1Corinthians3:11 Pakuti palibe munthu akhoza kuika maziko ena, koma amene aikidwako, ndiwo Yesu Khristu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Koma ngati wina amanga pa mazikowo, golide, siliva, miyala ya mtengo wake, mtengo, udzu, dziputu," 
1Corinthians3:13 ntchito ya yense idzaonetsedwa; pakuti tsikulo lidzaisonyeza, chifukwa kuti yavumbululuka m'moto; ndipo moto wokha udzayesera ntchito ya yense ikhala yotani." 
1Corinthians3:14 Ngati ntchito ya munthu aliyense ikhala imene anaimangako, adzalandira mphotho." 
1Corinthians3:15 Ngati ntchito ya wina itenthedwa, zidzaonongeka zake; koma iye yekha adzapulumutsidwa; koma monga momwe mwa moto." 
1Corinthians3:16 Kodi simudziwa kuti muli Kachisi wa Mulungu, ndi kuti Mzimu wa Mulungu agonera mwa inu?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Ngati wina aononga Kachisi wa Mulungu, ameneyo Mulungu adzamuononga; pakuti Kachisi wa Mulungu ali wopatulika, ameneyo ndi inu." 
1Corinthians3:18 Munthu asadzinyenge yekha; ngati wina ayesa kuti ali wanzeru mwa inu m'nthawi yino ya pansi pano, akhale wopusa, kuti akakhale wanzeru." 
1Corinthians3:19 Pakuti nzeru ya dziko lino lapansi ili yopusa kwa Mulungu. Pakuti kwalembedwa, Iye agwira anzeru m'chenjerero lao;" 
1Corinthians3:20 ndiponso Ambuye azindikira zolingirira za anzeru, kuti zili zopanda pake." 
1Corinthians3:21 Chifukwa chake palibe mmodzi adzitamande mwa anthu. Pakuti zinthu zonse nzanu; 
1Corinthians3:22 ngati Paulo, kapena Apolo, kapena Kefa, kapena dziko lapansi, kapena moyo, kapena imfa, kapena za makono ano, kapena zilinkudza; zonse ndi zanu;" 
1Corinthians3:23 koma inu ndinu a Khristu; ndi Khristu ndiye wa Mulungu. 
1Corinthians4:1 Chotero munthu atiyese ife, monga atumiki a Khristu, ndi adindo a zinsinsi za Mulungu." 
1Corinthians4:2 Komatu pano pafunika za adindo, kuti munthu akhale wokhulupirika." 
1Corinthians4:3 Koma kwa ine kuli kanthu kakang'ono ndithu kuti ndiweruzidwe ndi inu, kapena pa bwalo la munthu; koma sindiweruza ngakhale ndekha." 
1Corinthians4:4 Pakuti sindidziwa kanthu kakundipalamulitsa; koma m'menemo sindiyesedwa wolungama; koma wondiweruza ine ndiye Ambuye. 
1Corinthians4:5 Chifukwa chake musaweruze kanthu isanadze nthawi yake, kufikira akadze Ambuye, amenenso adzaonetsera zobisika za mdima, nadzasonyeza zitsimikizo za mtima; ndipo pamenepo yense adzakhala nao uyamiko wake wa kwa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians4:6 Koma izi, abale, ndadziphiphiritsira ndekha ndi Apolo, chifukwa cha inu, kuti mwa ife mukaphunzire kusapitirira zimene zilembedwa; kuti pasakhale mmodzi wodzitukumulira mnzake ndi kukana wina." 
1Corinthians4:7 Pakuti akusiyanitsa iwe ndani? Ndipo uli nacho chiyani chosati wachilandira? Koma ngati wachilandira udzitamanda bwanji, monga ngati sunachilandira?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Mwadzala kale, mwalemerera kale, mwachita ufumu opanda ife; ndipo mwenzi muchitadi ufumu, kuti ifenso tikachite ufumu pamodzi ndi inu." 
1Corinthians4:9 Pakuti ndiyesa, kuti Mulungu anaoneketsa ife atumwi otsiriza, monga titi tife; pakuti takhala ife choonetsedwa kudziko lapansi, ndi kwa angelo, ndi kwa anthu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tili opusa ife chifukwa cha Khristu, koma muli ochenjera inu mwa Khristu; tili ife ofooka, koma inu amphamvu; inu ndinu olemekezeka, koma ife ndife onyozeka." 
1Corinthians4:11 Kufikira nthawi yomwe yino timva njala, timva ludzu, tili amaliseche, tikhomedwa, tilibe pokhazikika;" 
1Corinthians4:12 ndipo tigwiritsa ntchito, ndi kuchita ndi manja athu a ife tokha; polalatidwa tidalitsa; pozunzidwa, tipirira;" 
1Corinthians4:13 ponamizidwa, tipempha; takhala monga zonyansa za dziko lapansi, litsiro la zinthu zonse, kufikira tsopano." 
1Corinthians4:14 Sindilembera izi kukuchititsani manyazi, koma kuchenjeza inu monga ana anga okondedwa." 
1Corinthians4:15 Pakuti mungakhale muli nao aphunzitsi zikwi khumi mwa Khristu, mulibe atate ambiri; pakuti mwa Khristu Yesu ine ndinabala inu mwa Uthenga Wabwino." 
1Corinthians4:16 Chifukwa chake ndikupemphani, khalani akutsanza ine." 
1Corinthians4:17 Chifukwa cha ichi ndatuma kwa inu Timoteo, ndiye mwana wanga wokondedwa ndi wokhulupirika mwa Ambuye, amene adzakumbutsa inu njira zanga za mwa Khristu, monga ndiphunzitsa ponsepo m'Mipingo yonse." 
1Corinthians4:18 Koma ena adzitukumula, monga ngati sindinalinkudza kwa inu." 
1Corinthians4:19 Koma ndidzafika kwa inu msanga, akandilola Ambuye; ndipo ndidzazindikira si mau a iwo odzitukumula, koma mphamvuyi." 
1Corinthians4:20 Pakuti ufumu wa Mulungu suli m'mau, koma mumphamvu. Mufuna chiyani?" 
1Corinthians4:21 Kodi ndifike kwa inu ndi ndodo, kapena mwachikondi, ndi mzimu wakufatsa?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Kwamveka ndithu kuti kuli chigololo pakati pa inu, ndipo chigololo chotere chonga sichimveka mwa amitundu, kuti wina ali naye mkazi wa atate wake." 
1Corinthians5:2 Ndipo mukhala odzitukumula, kosati makamaka mwachita chisoni, kuti achotsedwe pakati pa inu iye amene anachita ntchito iyi." 
1Corinthians5:3 Pakuti inedi, thupi langa kulibe, koma mzimu wanga ulipo, ndaweruza kale, monga ngati ndilipo," 
1Corinthians5:4 m'dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu, posonkhana pamodzi inu ndi mzimu wanga, ndi mphamvu ya Ambuye wathu Yesu," 
1Corinthians5:5 kumpereka iye wochita chotere kwa Satana, kuti lionongeke thupi, kuti mzimu upulumutsidwe m'tsiku la Ambuye Yesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Kudzitamanda kwanu sikuli bwino. Kodi simudziwa kuti chotupitsa pang'ono chitupitsa mtanda wonse? 
1Corinthians5:7 Tsukani chotupitsa chakale, kuti mukakhale mtanda watsopano, monga muli osatupa. Pakutinso Paska wathu waphedwa, ndiye Khristu;" 
1Corinthians5:8 chifukwa chake tichita phwando, si ndi chotupitsa chakale, kapena ndi chotupitsa cha dumbo, ndi kuipa mtima, koma ndi mkate wosatupa wa kuona mtima, ndi choonadi." 
1Corinthians5:9 Ndinalembera inu m'kalata uja, kuti musayanjane ndi achigololo;" 
1Corinthians5:10 si konsekonse ndi achigololo a dziko lino lapansi, kapena ndi osirira, ndi okwatula, kapena ndi opembedza mafano; pakuti nkutero mukatuluke m'dziko lapansi;" 
1Corinthians5:11 koma tsopano ndalembera inu kuti musayanjane naye, ngati wina wotchedwa mbale ali wachigololo, kapena wosirira, kapena wopembedza mafano, kapena wolalatira, kapena woledzera, kapena wolanda, kungakhale kukadya naye wotere, iai." 
1Corinthians5:12 Pakuti nditani nao akunja kukaweruza iwo? Kodi amene ali m'katimo simuwaweruza ndi inu," 
1Corinthians5:13 koma akunja awaweruza Mulungu? Chotsani woipayo pakati pa inu nokha. 
1Corinthians6:1 Kodi akhoza wina wa inu, pamene ali nao mlandu pa mnzake, kupita kukaweruzidwa kwa osalungama, osati kwa oyera mtima?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Kapena kodi simudziwa kuti oyera mtima adzaweruza dziko lapansi? Ndipo ngati dziko lapansi liweruzidwa ndi inu, muli osayenera kodi kuweruza timilandu tochepachepa?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Kodi simudziwa kuti tidzaweruza angelo? Koposa kotani nanga zinthu za moyo uno? 
1Corinthians6:4 Chifukwa chake, ngati muli nayo milandu ya zinthu za moyo uno, kodi muweruzitsa iwo amene ayesedwa achabe mu Mpingo?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Ndinena ichi kukuchititsani inu manyazi. Kodi nkutero kuti mwa inu palibe mmodzi wanzeru, amene adzakhoza kuweruza pa abale," 
1Corinthians6:6 koma mbale anena mlandu ndi mbale, ndikotu kwa osakhulupirira?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Koma pamenepo pali chosowa konsekonse mwa inu, kuti muli nayo milandu wina ndi mnzake. Chifukwa ninji simusankhula kulola kuipsidwa? Simusankhula chifukwa ninji kulola kunyengedwa?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Koma muipsa, nimunyenga, ndipo mutero nao abale anu." 
1Corinthians6:9 Kapena simudziwa kuti osalungama sadzalandira ufumu wa Mulungu? Musasocheretsedwe; adama, kapena opembedza mafano, kapena achigololo, kapena olobodoka ndi zoipa, kapena akudziipsa ndi amuna," 
1Corinthians6:10 kapena ambala, kapena osirira, kapena oledzera, kapena olalatira, kapena olanda, sadzalowa Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians6:11 Ndipo ena a inu munali otere; koma munasambitsidwa, koma munayeretsedwa, koma munayesedwa olungama, m'dzina la Ambuye Yesu Khristu, ndi mwa Mzimu wa Mulungu wathu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Zinthu zonse ziloledwa kwa ine; koma si zonse zipindula. Zinthu zonse ziloledwa kwa ine, koma sindidzalamulidwa nacho chimodzi." 
1Corinthians6:13 Zakudya ndizo za mimba, ndi mimba ndiyo ya zakudya; koma Mulungu adzathera iyi ndi izi. Koma thupi silili la chigololo, koma la Ambuye, ndi Ambuye wa thupi;" 
1Corinthians6:14 koma Mulungu anaukitsa Ambuye, ndiponso adzaukitsa ife mwa mphamvu yake." 
1Corinthians6:15 Kodi simudziwa kuti matupi anu ali ziwalo za Khristu? Chifukwa chake ndidzatenga ziwalo za Khristu kodi, ndi kuziyesa ziwalo za mkazi wachiwerewere? Msatero iai." 
1Corinthians6:16 Kapena simudziwa kuti iye wophatikidwa ndi mkazi wachiwerewere ali thupi limodzi? Pakuti awiriwo, ati, adzakhala thupi limodzi." 
1Corinthians6:17 Koma iye wophatikidwa ndi Ambuye ali mzimu umodzi. 
1Corinthians6:18 Thawani dama. Tchimo lililonse munthu akalichita lili kunja kwa thupi; koma wachiwerewere achimwira thupi lake la iye yekha. 
1Corinthians6:19 Kapena simudziwa kuti thupi lanu lili Kachisi wa Mzimu Woyera, amene ali mwa inu, amene muli naye kwa Mulungu? Ndipo simukhala a inu nokha." 
1Corinthians6:20 Pakuti munagulidwa ndi mtengo wake wapatali; chifukwa chake lemekezani Mulungu m'thupi lanu. 
1Corinthians7:1 Koma za izi munalembazi; kuli bwino kwa munthu kusakhudza mkazi. 
1Corinthians7:2 Koma chifukwa cha madama munthu yense akhale naye mkazi wa iye yekha, ndi mkazi yense akhale naye mwamuna wa iye yekha." 
1Corinthians7:3 Mwamunayo apereke kwa mkazi mangawa ake; koma modzimodzinso mkazi kwa mwamuna. 
1Corinthians7:4 Mkazi alibe ulamuliro wa pa thupi lake la iye yekha, koma mwamuna ndiye; koma momwemonso mwamuna alibe ulamuliro wa pa thupi la iye yekha, koma mkazi ndiye." 
1Corinthians7:5 Musakanizana, koma ndi kuvomerezana kwanu ndiko, kwa nthawi, kuti mukadzipereke kwa kupemphera, nimukakhalenso pamodzi, kuti Satana angakuyeseni, chifukwa cha kusadziletsa kwanu." 
1Corinthians7:6 Koma ichi ndinena monga mwa kulola, si monga mwa kulamulira." 
1Corinthians7:7 Koma mwenzi anthu onse akadakhala monga momwe ndili ine ndekha. Koma munthu yense ali nayo mphatso yake ya iye yekha kwa Mulungu, wina chakuti, wina chakuti." 
1Corinthians7:8 Koma ndinena kwa osakwatira, ndi kwa akazi amasiye, kuti kuli bwino kwa iwo ngati akhala monganso ine." 
1Corinthians7:9 Koma ngati sadziwa kudziletsa, akwatitsidwe; pakuti nkwabwino kukwatira koposa kutentha mtima." 
1Corinthians7:10 Koma okwatitsidwawo ndiwalamulira, si ine ai, koma Ambuye, kuti mkazi asasiye mwamuna," 
1Corinthians7:11 komanso ngati amsiya akhale osakwatiwa, kapena ayanjanitsidwenso ndi mwamunayo, ndipo mwamuna asalekane naye mkazi." 
1Corinthians7:12 Koma kwa otsalawo ndinena ine, si Ambuye, Ngati mbale wina ali naye mkazi wosakhulupirira, ndipo iye avomera mtima kukhala naye pamodzi, asalekane naye." 
1Corinthians7:13 Ndipo mkazi amene ali naye mwamuna wosakhulupirira, navomera mtima iye kukhala naye pamodzi, asalekane naye mwamunayo." 
1Corinthians7:14 Pakuti mwamuna wosakhulupirirayo ayeretsedwa mwa mkaziyo, ndi mkazi wosakhulupirira ayeretsedwa mwa mbaleyo; ngati sikukadatero, ana anu akadakhala osakonzeka, koma tsopano akhala oyera." 
1Corinthians7:15 Koma ngati wosakhulupirirayo achoka, achoke. M'milandu yotere samangidwa ukapolo mbaleyo, kapena mlongoyo. Koma Mulungu watiitana ife mumtendere." 
1Corinthians7:16 Pakuti udziwa bwanji mkazi iwe, ngati udzapulumutsa mwamunayo? Kapena udziwa bwanji, mwamuna iwe, ngati udzapulumutsa mkazi?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Koma, monga Ambuye wagawira kwa yense, monga Mulungu waitana yense, momwemo ayende. Ndipo kotero ndiika m'Mipingo yonse." 
1Corinthians7:18 Kodi waitanidwa wina wodulidwa? Asakhale wosadulidwa. Kodi waitanidwa wina wosadulidwa? Asadulidwe. 
1Corinthians7:19 Mdulidwe ulibe kanthu, ndi kusadulidwa kulibe kanthu, koma kusunga kwa malamulo a Mulungu." 
1Corinthians7:20 Yense akhale m'maitanidwe m'mene anaitanidwamo. 
1Corinthians7:21 Kodi unaitanidwa uli kapolo? Usasamalako; koma ngati ukhozanso kukhala mfulu, chita nako ndiko." 
1Corinthians7:22 Pakuti iye amene anaitanidwa mwa Ambuye, pokhala ali kapolo, ali mfulu ya Ambuye: momwemonso woitanidwayo, pokhala ali mfulu, ali kapolo wa Khristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Munagulidwa ndi mtengo wake; musakhale akapolo a anthu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Yense, m'mene anaitanidwamo, abale, akhale momwemo ndi Mulungu." 
1Corinthians7:25 Koma kunena za anamwali, ndilibe lamulo la Ambuye; koma ndikuuzani choyesa iye, monga wolandira chifundo kwa Ambuye kukhala wokhulupirika." 
1Corinthians7:26 Chifukwa chake ndiyesa kuti ichi ndi chokoma chifukwa cha chivuto cha nyengo yino, kuti nkwabwino kwa munthu kukhala monga ali." 
1Corinthians7:27 Kodi wamangika kwa mkazi? Usafune kumasuka. Kodi wamasuka kwa mkazi? Usafune mkazi. 
1Corinthians7:28 Koma ungakhale ukwatira, sunachimwa; ndipo ngati namwali akwatiwa, sanachimwa. Koma otere adzakhala nacho chisautso m'thupi, ndipo ndikulekani." 
1Corinthians7:29 Koma ichi nditi, abale, yafupika nthawi, kuti tsopano iwo akukhala nao akazi akhalebe monga ngati alibe;" 
1Corinthians7:30 ndi iwo akulira, monga ngati salira, ndi iwo akukondwera, monga ngati sakondwera; ndi iwo akugula monga ngati alibe kanthu;" 
1Corinthians7:31 ndi iwo akuchita nalo dziko lapansi, monga ngati osachititsa; pakuti maonekedwe a dziko ili apita." 
1Corinthians7:32 Koma ndifuna kuti mukhale osalabadira. Iye amene wosakwatira alabadira zinthu za Ambuye, kuti akondweretse Ambuye;" 
1Corinthians7:33 koma iye wokwatira alabadira zinthu za dziko lapansi, kuti akondweretse mkazi wake." 
1Corinthians7:34 Ndi mkazi wokwatiwa ndi namwali asiyananso. Iye wosakwatiwa alabadira za Ambuye, kuti akhale woyera m'thupi ndi mumzimu; koma wokwatiwayo, alabadira za dziko lapansi, kuti akondweretse mwamunayo." 
1Corinthians7:35 Koma ichi ndinena mwa kupindula kwanu kwa inu nokha; sikuti ndikakutchereni msampha, koma kukuthandizani kuchita chimene chiyenera, ndi kutsata chitsatire Ambuye, opanda chocheukitsa." 
1Corinthians7:36 Koma wina akayesa kuti achitira mwana wake wamkazi chosamuyenera, ngati palikupitirira pa unamwali wake, ndipo kukafunika kutero, achite chimene afuna, sachimwa; akwatitsidwe." 
1Corinthians7:37 Koma iye amene aima wokhazikika mumtima mwake, wopanda chikakamizo, koma ali nao ulamuliro wa pa chifuniro cha iye yekha, natsimikiza ichi mumtima mwa iye yekha, kusunga mwana wake wamkazi, adzachita bwino." 
1Corinthians7:38 Chotero iye amene akwatitsa mwana wake wamkazi achita bwino, ndipo iye wosamkwatitsa achita koposa." 
1Corinthians7:39 Mkazi amangika pokhala mwamuna wake ali ndi moyo; koma atamwalira mwamuna ali womasuka, kuti akwatiwe naye amene afuna, koma mwa Ambuye." 
1Corinthians7:40 Koma akhala wokondwera koposa ngati akhala monga momwe ali, monga mwa kuyesa kwanga; ndipo ndinagiza kuti inenso ndili naye Mzimu wa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians8:1 Koma za zoperekedwa nsembe kwa mafano: Tidziwa kuti tili nacho chidziwitso tonse. Chidziwitso chitukumula, koma chikondi chimangirira." 
1Corinthians8:2 Ngati wina ayesa kuti adziwa kanthu sanayambe kudziwa monga ayenera kudziwa. 
1Corinthians8:3 Koma ngati wina akonda Mulungu, yemweyu adziwika ndi Iye." 
1Corinthians8:4 Tsono kunena za kudya zoperekedwa nsembe kwa mafano, tidziwa kuti fano silili kanthu pa dziko lapansi, ndi kuti palibe Mulungu koma mmodzi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Pakuti ngakhalenso iliko yoti yonenedwa milungu, kapena m'mwamba, kapena pa dziko lapansi, monga iliko milungu yambiri, ndi ambuye ambiri;" 
1Corinthians8:6 koma kwa ife kuli Mulungu mmodzi, Atate amene zinthu zonse zichokera kwa Iye, ndi ife kufikira kwa Iye; ndi Ambuye mmodzi Yesu Khristu, amene zinthu zonse zili mwa Iye, ndi ife mwa Iye." 
1Corinthians8:7 Komatu chidziwitso sichili mwa onse; koma ena, ozolowera fano kufikira tsopano, adyako monga yoperekedwa nsembe kwa fano; ndipo chikumbu mtima chao, popeza nchofooka, chidetsedwa." 
1Corinthians8:8 Koma chakudya sichitivomerezetsa kwa Mulungu; kapena ngati sitidya sitisowa; kapena ngati tidya tilibe kupindulako. 
1Corinthians8:9 Koma yang'anirani kuti ulamuliro wanu umene ungakhale chokhumudwitsa ofookawo. 
1Corinthians8:10 Pakuti wina akaona iwe amene uli nacho chidziwitso, ulikukhala pachakudya m'Kachisi wa fano, kodi chikumbu mtima chake, popeza ali wofooka, sichidzalimbika kudya zoperekedwa nsembe kwa mafano?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Pakuti mwa chidziwitso chako wofookayo atayika, ndiye mbale amene Khristu anamfera." 
1Corinthians8:12 Koma pakuchimwira abale, ndi kulasa chikumbu mtima chao chofooka, muchimwira kotero Khristu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Chifukwa chake, ngati chakudya chikhumudwitsa mbale wanga, sindidzadya nyama kunthawi yonse, kuti ndingakhumudwitse mbale wanga." 
1Corinthians9:1 Kodi sindine mfulu? Kodi sindine mtumwi? Kodi sindinaona Yesu Ambuye wathu? Kodi simuli inu ntchito yanga mwa Ambuye? 
1Corinthians9:2 Ngati sindili mtumwi kwa ena, komatu ndili kwa inu; pakuti chizindikiro cha utumwi wanga ndi inu mwa Ambuye." 
1Corinthians9:3 Chodzikanira changa kwa iwo amene andifunsa ine ndi ichi: 
1Corinthians9:4 Kodi tilibe ulamuliro wa kudya ndi kumwa? 
1Corinthians9:5 Kodi tilibe ulamuliro wakuyendayenda naye mkazi, ndiye mbale, monganso atumwi ena, ndi abale a Ambuye, ndi Kefa?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Kapena kodi ife tokha, Barnabasi ndi ine tilibe ulamuliro wakusagwira ntchito?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Msilikali ndani achita nkhondo, nthawi iliyonse, nadzifunira zake yekha? Aoka mipesa ndani, osadya chipatso chake? Kapena aweta gulu ndani, osadya mkaka wake wa gululo? Kodi ndilankhula izi monga mwa anthu?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Kapena chilamulo sichinenanso zomwezo? 
1Corinthians9:9 Pakuti m'chilamulo cha Mose mwalembedwa, Usapunamitsa ng'ombe pakupuntha iyo dzinthu. Kodi Mulungu asamalira ng'ombe?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Kapena achinena ichi konsekonse chifukwa cha ife? Pakuti, chifukwa cha ife kwalembedwa: popeza wolima ayenera kulima mwa chiyembekezo, ndi wopunthayo achita mwa chiyembekezo cha kugawana nao." 
1Corinthians9:11 Ngati takufeserani inu zauzimu, kodi nchachikulu ngati ife tituta za thupi lanu?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Ngati ena ali nao ulamuliro umene pa inu, si ife nanga koposa? Koma sitinachita nao ulamuliro umene; koma timalola zonse, kuti tingachite chochedwetsa kwa Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu." 
1Corinthians9:13 Kodi simudziwa kuti iwo akutumikira za Kachisi amadya za m'Kachisi, ndi iwo akuimirira guwa la nsembe, agawana nalo guwa la nsembe?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Chomwechonso Ambuye analamulira kuti iwo amene alalikira Uthenga Wabwino akhale ndi moyo ndi Uthenga Wabwino. 
1Corinthians9:15 Koma ine sindinachita nako kanthu ka izi; ndipo sindilemba izi kuti chikakhale chotero ndi ine; pakuti kundikomera ine kufa, koma wina asayese kwachabe kudzitamanda kwanga." 
1Corinthians9:16 Pakuti ngati ndilalikira Uthenga Wabwino ndilibe kanthu kakudzitamandira; pakuti chondikakamiza ndigwidwa nacho; pakuti tsoka ine ngati sindilalikira Uthenga Wabwino. 
1Corinthians9:17 Pakuti ngati ndichita ichi chivomerere, mphotho ndili nayo; koma ngati si chivomerere, anandikhulupirira m'udindo." 
1Corinthians9:18 Mphotho yanga nchiyani tsono? Kuti pakulalikira Uthenga Wabwino ndiyese Uthenga Wabwino ukhale waulere, kuti ndisaipse ulamuliro wanga wa mu Uthenga Wabwino." 
1Corinthians9:19 Pakuti pokhala ndinali mfulu kwa onse, ndinadzilowetsa ndekha ukapolo kwa onse, kuti ndipindule ochuluka." 
1Corinthians9:20 Ndipo kwa Ayuda ndinakhala monga Myuda, kuti ndipindule Ayuda; kwa iwo omvera lamulo monga womvera lamulo, ngakhale sindinakhala ndekha womvera lamulo, kuti ndipindule iwo omvera malamulo;" 
1Corinthians9:21 kwa iwo opanda lamulo monga wopanda lamulo, wosati wakukhala ine wopanda lamulo kwa Mulungu, koma womvera lamulo kwa Khristu kuti ndipindule iwo opanda lamulo." 
1Corinthians9:22 Kwa ofooka ndinakhala ngati wofooka, kuti ndipindule ofooka. Ndakhala zonse kwa anthu onse, kuti paliponse ndikapulumutse ena." 
1Corinthians9:23 Koma ndichita zonse chifukwa cha Uthenga Wabwino, kuti ndikakhale woyanjana nao." 
1Corinthians9:24 Kodi simudziwa kuti iwo akuchita makani a liwiro, athamangadi onse, koma mmodzi alandira mfupo? Motero thamangani, kuti mukalandire." 
1Corinthians9:25 Koma yense wakuyesetsana adzikanizira zonse. Ndipo iwowa atero kuti alandire korona wakuvunda; koma ife wosavunda. 
1Corinthians9:26 Chifukwa chake ine ndithamanga chotero, si monga chosinkhasinkha. Ndilimbana chotero, si monga ngati kupanda mlengalenga;" 
1Corinthians9:27 koma ndipumpuntha thupi langa, ndipo ndiliyesa kapolo; kuti, kapena ngakhale ndalalikira kwa ena, ndingakhale wotayika ndekha." 
1Corinthians10:1 Pakuti sindifuna, kuti mukhale osadziwa, abale, kuti makolo athu onse anali pansi pa mtambo, naoloka nyanja onse;" 
1Corinthians10:2 nabatizidwa onse kwa Mose, mumtambo, ndi m'nyanja," 
1Corinthians10:3 nadya onse chakudya chauzimu chimodzimodzi; 
1Corinthians10:4 namwa onse chakumwa chauzimu chimodzimodzi; pakuti anamwa mwa thanthwe lauzimu lakuwatsata; koma thanthwelo ndiye Khristu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Koma ochuluka a iwo Mulungu sanakondwera nao; pakuti anamwazika m'chipululu. 
1Corinthians10:6 Koma zinthu izi zinachitika, zikhale zotichenjeza ife, kuti tisalakalake zoipa ife, monganso iwowo analakalaka." 
1Corinthians10:7 Kapena musakhale opembedza mafano, monga ena a iwo, monga kwalembedwa, Anthu anakhala pansi kudya ndi kumwa, nanyamuka kusewera." 
1Corinthians10:8 Kapena tisachite dama monga ena a iwo anachita dama, nagwa tsiku limodzi zikwi makumi awiri ndi zitatu." 
1Corinthians10:9 Kapena tisayese Ambuye, monga ena a iwo anayesa, naonongeka ndi njoka zija." 
1Corinthians10:10 Kapena musadandaula, monga ena a iwo anadandaula, naonongeka ndi woonongayo." 
1Corinthians10:11 Koma izi zinachitika kwa iwowa monga zotichenjeza, ndipo zinalembedwa kutichenjeza ife, amene matsirizidwe a nthawi ya pansi pano adafika pa ife." 
1Corinthians10:12 Chifukwa chake iye wakuyesa kuti ali chilili, ayang'anire kuti angagwe." 
1Corinthians10:13 Sichinakugwerani inu chiyeso koma cha umunthu; koma Mulungu ali wokhulupirika, amene sadzalola inu kuyesedwa koposa kumene mukhoza; koma pamodzi ndi chiyeso adzaikanso populumukirapo, kuti mudzakhoze kupirirako." 
1Corinthians10:14 Chifukwa chake, okondedwa anga, thawani kupembedza mafano." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ndinena monga kwa anzeru; lingirirani inu chimene ndinena. 
1Corinthians10:16 Chikho cha dalitso chimene tidalitsa, sichili chiyanjano cha mwazi wa Khristu kodi? Mkate umene tinyema suli chiyanjano cha thupi la Khristu kodi?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Pakuti mkate ndiwo umodzi, chotero ife ambiri ndife thupi limodzi; pakuti ife tonse titengako kumkate umodzi." 
1Corinthians10:18 Tapenyani Israele monga mwa thupi; kodi iwo akudya nsembezo alibe chiyanjano ndi guwa la nsembe? 
1Corinthians10:19 Ndinena chiyani tsono? Kuti choperekedwa nsembe kwa mafano chili kanthu? Kapena kuti fano lili kanthu kodi? 
1Corinthians10:20 Koma nditi kuti zimene amitundu apereka nsembe azipereka kwa ziwanda osati kwa Mulungu; ndipo sindifuna kuti inu muyanjane ndi ziwanda. 
1Corinthians10:21 Simungathe kumwera chikho cha Ambuye, ndi chikho cha ziwanda; simungathe kulandirako kugome la Ambuye, ndi kugome la ziwanda." 
1Corinthians10:22 Kapena kodi tichititsa nsanje Ambuye? Kodi mphamvu zathu ziposa Iye? 
1Corinthians10:23 Zinthu zonse ziloleka; koma sizipindula zonse. Zinthu zonse ziloleka; koma sizimanga zonse. 
1Corinthians10:24 Munthu asafune zake za iye yekha, koma za mnzake." 
1Corinthians10:25 Chonse chogulitsidwa pa msika wa nyama, mudye, osafunsa kanthu chifukwa cha chikumbu mtima;" 
1Corinthians10:26 pakuti dziko lapansi lili la Ambuye, ndi kudzala kwake." 
1Corinthians10:27 Ngati wina wa osakhulupirira akuitanani, ndipo mufuna kupita; mudye chomwe chiikidwa kwa inu, osafunsa kanthu, chifukwa cha chikumbu mtima." 
1Corinthians10:28 Koma ngati wina akati kwa inu, Yoperekedwa nsembe iyi, musadye, chifukwa cha iyeyo wakuuza, ndi chifukwa cha chikumbu mtima." 
1Corinthians10:29 Ndinena chikumbu mtima, si cha iwe mwini, koma cha winayo; pakuti ufulu wanga uyesedwa ninji ndi chikumbu mtima cha wina?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Ngati ine ndilandirako mwachisomo, ndinenezedwa bwanji chifukwa cha ichi chimene ndiyamikapo?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Chifukwa chake mungakhale mudya, mungakhale mumwa, mungakhale muchita kanthu kena, chitani zonse ku ulemerero wa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians10:32 Khalani osakhumudwitsa, kapena Ayuda, kapena Agriki, kapena Mpingo wa Mulungu;" 
1Corinthians10:33 monga inenso ndikondweretsa onse m'zinthu zonse, wosafuna chipindulo changa, koma cha unyunjiwo, kuti apulumutsidwe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Khalani onditsanza ine, monga inenso nditsanza Khristu." 
1Corinthians11:2 Ndipo ndikutamandani kuti m'zinthu zonse mukumbukira ine, ndi kuti musunga miyambo monga ndinapereka kwa inu." 
1Corinthians11:3 Koma ndifuna kuti mudziwe, kuti mutu wa munthu yense ndiye Khristu; ndi mutu wa mkazi ndiye mwamuna; ndipo mutu wa Khristu ndiye Mulungu." 
1Corinthians11:4 Mwamuna yense woveka mutu, popemphera kapena ponenera, anyoza mutu wake." 
1Corinthians11:5 Koma mkazi yense wakupemphera, kapena kunenera, wovula mutu, anyoza mutu wake; pakuti kuli chimodzimodzi kumetedwa." 
1Corinthians11:6 Pakuti ngati mkazi safunda, asengedwenso; koma ngati kusengedwa kapena kumetedwa kuchititsa manyazi, afunde." 
1Corinthians11:7 Pakuti mwamuna sayenera kuvala pamutu, popeza akhala fanizo ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu: koma mkazi ali ulemerero wa mwamuna." 
1Corinthians11:8 Pakuti mwamuna sakhala wa kwa mkazi; koma mkazi wa kwa mwamuna; 
1Corinthians11:9 pakutinso mwamuna sanalengedwa chifukwa cha mkazi; 
1Corinthians11:10 koma mkazi chifukwa cha mwamuna; chifukwa cha ichi mkazi ayenera kukhala nao ulamuliro pamutu pake, chifukwa cha angelo." 
1Corinthians11:11 Komanso mkazi sakhala wopanda mwamuna, kapena mwamuna wopanda mkazi, mwa Ambuye." 
1Corinthians11:12 Pakuti monga mkazi ali wa kwa mwamuna, chomwechonso mwamuna ali mwa mkazi; koma zinthu zonse zili za kwa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians11:13 Lingirirani mwa inu nokha: Kodi nkuyenera kuti apemphere kwa Mulungu, wosafunda mutu?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Kodi ubadwidwe womwe sutiphunzitsa kuti ngati mwamuna aweta tsitsi chinyozetsa iye? 
1Corinthians11:15 Koma ngati mkazi aweta tsitsi, kuli ulemerero kwa iye; pakuti tsitsi lake lapatsidwa kwa iye ngati chophimba." 
1Corinthians11:16 Koma akaoneka wina ngati wotetana, tilibe makhalidwe otere, kapena ife, kapena Mpingo wa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians11:17 Koma pakulalikira ichi sinditama inu, popeza simusonkhanira chokoma, koma choipa." 
1Corinthians11:18 Pakutitu poyamba posonkhana inu mu Mpingo, ndimva kuti pakhala malekano mwa inu; ndipo ndivomereza penapo." 
1Corinthians11:19 Pakuti kuyenera kuti pakhale mipatuko mwa inu, kuti iwo ovomerezedwa aonetsedwe mwa inu." 
1Corinthians11:20 Chifukwa chake, pakusonkhana inu pamodzi sikutheka kudya mgonero wa Ambuye;" 
1Corinthians11:21 pakuti pakudyaku yense athanga watenga mgonero wake wa yekha, ndipo wina ali ndi njala, ndi wina aledzera." 
1Corinthians11:22 Nanga mulibe nyumba za kudyeramo ndi kumweramo? Kapena kodi munyoza Mpingo wa Mulungu, ndi kunyoza iwo amene alibe kanthu? Ndidzanena chiyani kwa inu? Kodi ndidzatama inu m'menemo? Sindikutamani." 
1Corinthians11:23 Pakuti ine ndinalandira kwa Ambuye, chimenenso ndinapereka kwa inu, kuti Ambuye Yesu usiku uja anaperekedwa, anatenga mkate;" 
1Corinthians11:24 ndipo m'mene adayamika, ananyema, nati, Ichi ndi thupi langa la kwa inu; chitani ichi chikhale chikumbukiro changa." 
1Corinthians11:25 Koteronso chikho, chitatha chakudya, ndi kuti, Chikho ichi ndi pangano latsopano m'mwazi wanga; chitani ichi, nthawi zonse mukamwa, chikhale chikumbukiro changa." 
1Corinthians11:26 Pakuti nthawi zonse mukadya mkate uwu ndi kumwera chikho, mulalikira imfa ya Ambuye kufikira akadza Iye." 
1Corinthians11:27 Chifukwa chake yense amene akadya mkate, kapena akamwera chikho cha Ambuye kosayenera, adzakhala wochimwira thupi ndi mwazi wa Ambuye." 
1Corinthians11:28 Koma munthu adziyese yekha, ndi kotero adye mkate, ndi kumwera chikho." 
1Corinthians11:29 Pakuti iye wakudya ndi wakumwa, adya namwa chiweruziro kwa iye yekha, ngati sazindikira thupilo." 
1Corinthians11:30 Chifukwa chake ambiri mwa inu afooka, nadwala, ndipo ambiri agona." 
1Corinthians11:31 Koma ngati tikadadzizindikira tokha sitikadaweruzidwa. 
1Corinthians11:32 Koma poweruzidwa, tilangidwa ndi Ambuye, kuti tingatsutsidwe pamodzi ndi dziko lapansi." 
1Corinthians11:33 Chifukwa chake, abale anga, posonkhanira kudya, lindanani." 
1Corinthians11:34 Ngati wina ali ndi njala adye kwao; kuti mungasonkhanire kwa chiweruziro. Koma zotsalazo ndidzafotokoza pakudza ine. 
1Corinthians12:1 Koma za mphatso zauzimu, abale, sindifuna kuti mukhale osadziwa." 
1Corinthians12:2 Mudziwa kuti pamene munali amitundu, munatengedwa kunka kwa mafano aja osalankhula, monga munatsogozedwa." 
1Corinthians12:3 Chifukwa chake ndikuuzani inu, kuti palibe munthu wakulankhula mwa Mzimu wa Mulungu, anena, Yesu ngwotembereredwa; ndipo palibe wina akhoza kunena, Yesu ali Ambuye, koma mwa Mzimu Woyera." 
1Corinthians12:4 Ndipo pali mphatso zosiyana, koma Mzimu yemweyo." 
1Corinthians12:5 Ndipo pali mautumiki osiyana, koma Ambuye yemweyo." 
1Corinthians12:6 Ndipo pali machitidwe osiyana, koma Mulungu yemweyo, wakuchita zinthu zonse mwa onse." 
1Corinthians12:7 Koma kwa yense kwapatsidwa maonekedwe a Mzimu kuti apindule nao. 
1Corinthians12:8 Pakuti kwa mmodzi kwapatsidwa mwa Mzimu mau a nzeru; koma kwa mnzake mau a chidziwitso, monga mwa Mzimu yemweyo:" 
1Corinthians12:9 kwa wina chikhulupiriro, mwa Mzimu yemweyo; ndi kwa wina mphatso za machiritso, mwa Mzimu mmodziyo;" 
1Corinthians12:10 ndi kwa wina machitidwe a mphamvu; ndi kwa wina chinenero; ndi kwa wina chizindikiro cha mizimu; kwa wina malilime a mitundumitundu; ndi kwa wina mamasulidwe a malilime. 
1Corinthians12:11 Koma zonse izi achita Mzimu mmodzi yemweyo, nagawira yense pa yekha monga afuna." 
1Corinthians12:12 Pakuti monga thupi lili limodzi, nilikhala nazo ziwalo zambiri; koma ziwalo zonse za thupilo, pokhala zambiri, zili thupi limodzi; momwemonso Khristu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Pakutinso mwa Mzimu mmodzi ife tonse tinabatizidwa kulowa m'thupi limodzi, ngakhale Ayuda, ngakhale Agriki, ngakhale akapolo, ngakhale mfulu; ndipo tonse tinamwetsedwa Mzimu mmodzi." 
1Corinthians12:14 Pakutinso thupi silikhala chiwalo chimodzi, koma zambiri." 
1Corinthians12:15 Ngati phazi likati, Popeza sindili dzanja, sindili wa thupi; kodi silili la thupi chifukwa cha ichi?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Ndipo ngati khutu likati, Popeza sindili diso, sindili wa thupi; kodi silili la thupi chifukwa cha ichi?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Ngati thupi lonse likadakhala diso, kukadakhala kuti kununkhiza?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Koma tsopano, Mulungu anaika ziwalo zonsezo m'thupi, monga anafuna." 
1Corinthians12:19 Koma ngati zonse zikadakhala chiwalo chimodzi, likadakhala kuti thupi?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Koma tsopano pali ziwalo zambiri, koma thupi limodzi." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ndipo diso silingathe kunena kwa dzanja, Sindikufuna iwe, kapenanso mutu kwa mapazi, Sindikufunani inu." 
1Corinthians12:22 Koma makamakatu ziwalozo zoyesedwa zofooka m'thupi, zifunika;" 
1Corinthians12:23 ndipo zimene tiziyesa zochepa ulemu m'thupi, pa izi tiika ulemu wochuluka woposa; ndi zinthu zosakoma zikhala nacho chokometsera choposa." 
1Corinthians12:24 Koma zokoma zathu zilibe kusowa; koma Mulungu analumikizitsa thupi, napatsa ulemu wochuluka kwa chosowacho;" 
1Corinthians12:25 kuti kusakhale chisiyano m'thupi; koma kuti ziwalo zifanane ndi kusamalana china ndi chinzake. 
1Corinthians12:26 Ndipo chingakhale chiwalo chimodzi chimva chowawa, ziwalo zonse zimva pamodzi; chingakhale chimodzi chilemekezedwa, ziwalo zonse zikondwera nacho pamodzi." 
1Corinthians12:27 Koma inu ndinu thupi la Khristu, ndi ziwalo, yense pa yekha." 
1Corinthians12:28 Ndipotu Mulungu anaika ena mu Mpingo, poyamba atumwi, achiwiri aneneri, achitatu aphunzitsi, pamenepo zozizwa, pomwepo mphatso za machiritso, mathandizo, maweruziro, malilime a mitundumitundu." 
1Corinthians12:29 Kodi ali onse atumwi? Ali aneneri onse kodi? Ali aphunzitsi onse? Ali onse ochita zozizwa? 
1Corinthians12:30 Ali nazo mphatso za machiritso onse kodi? Kodi onse alankhula ndi malilime? Kodi onse amasulira mau? 
1Corinthians12:31 Koma funitsitsani mphatso zoposa. Ndipo ndikuonetsani njira yokoma yoposatu. 
1Corinthians13:1 Ndingakhale ndilankhula malilime a anthu, ndi a angelo, koma ndilibe chikondi, ndikhala mkuwa woomba, kapena nguli yolira." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ndipo ndingakhale ndikhoza kunenera, ndipo ndingadziwe zinsinsi zonse, ndi nzeru zonse, ndipo ndingakhale ndili nacho chikhulupiriro chonse, kuti ndikasendeza mapiri, koma ndilibe chikondi, ndili chabe." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ndipo ndingakhale ndipereka chuma changa chonse kudyetsa osauka, ndipo ndingakhale ndipereka thupi langa alitenthe m'moto, koma ndilibe chikondi, sindipindula kanthu ai." 
1Corinthians13:4 Chikondi chikhala chilezere, chili chokoma mtima; chikondi sichidukidwa; chikondi sichidziwa kudzitamanda, sichidzikuza," 
1Corinthians13:5 sichichita zosayenera, sichitsata za mwini yekha, sichipsa mtima, sichilingirira zoipa;" 
1Corinthians13:6 sichikondwera ndi chinyengo, koma chikondwera ndi choonadi;" 
1Corinthians13:7 chikwirira zinthu zonse, chikhulupirira zinthu zonse, chiyembekeza zinthu zonse, chipirira zinthu zonse." 
1Corinthians13:8 Chikondi sichitha nthawi zonse, koma kapena zonenera zidzakhala chabe, kapena malilime adzaleka, kapena nzeru idzakhala chabe." 
1Corinthians13:9 Pakuti ife tidziwa mderamdera, ndimo tinenera mderamdera." 
1Corinthians13:10 Koma pamene changwiro chafika, tsono chamderamdera chidzakhala chabe." 
1Corinthians13:11 Pamene ndinali mwana, ndinalankhula ngati mwana, ndinalingirira ngati mwana, ndinawerenga ngati mwana; tsopano ndakhala munthu, ndayesa chabe zachibwana." 
1Corinthians13:12 Pakuti tsopano tipenya m'kalirole, ngati chimbuuzi; koma pomwepo maso ndi maso. Tsopano ndizindikira mderamdera; koma pomwepo ndidzazindikiratu, monganso ndazindikiridwa." 
1Corinthians13:13 Ndipo tsopano zitsala chikhulupiriro, chiyembekezo, chikondi, zitatu izi; koma chachikulu cha izi ndicho chikondi." 
1Corinthians14:1 Tsatani chikondi; koma funitsitsani mphatso zauzimu, koma koposa kuti mukanenere." 
1Corinthians14:2 Pakuti iye wakulankhula lilime salankhula ndi anthu, koma ndi Mulungu; pakuti palibe munthu akumva; koma mumzimu alankhula zinsinsi." 
1Corinthians14:3 Koma iye wakunenera alankhula ndi anthu chomangirira ndi cholimbikitsa, ndi chosangalatsa." 
1Corinthians14:4 Iye wakulankhula lilime, adzimangirira yekha, koma iye wakunenera amangirira Mpingo." 
1Corinthians14:5 Ndipo ndifuna inu nonse mulankhule malilime, koma makamaka kuti mukanenere; ndipo wakunenera aposa wakulankhula malilime, akapanda kumasulira, kuti Mpingo ukalandire chomangirira." 
1Corinthians14:6 Koma tsopano, abale, ngati ndidza kwa inu ndi kulankhula malilime, ndikakupindulitsani chiyani, ngati sindilankhula ndi inu kapena m'vumbulutso, kapena m'chidziwitso, kapena m'chinenero, kapena m'chiphunzitso?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Ngakhale zinthu zopanda moyo, zopereka mau, ngati chitoliro, kapena ngoli, ngati sizisiyanitsa maliridwe, chidzazindikirika bwanji chimene chiombedwa kapena kuimbidwa?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Pakuti ngati lipenga lipereka mau osazindikirika, adzadzikonzera ndani kunkhondo?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Momwemonso inu ngati mwa lilime simupereka mau omveka bwino, kudzazindikirika bwanji chimene chilankhulidwa? Pakuti mudzakhala olankhula kumlengalenga." 
1Corinthians14:10 Ilipo, kaya, mitundu yambiri yotere ya mau pa dziko lapansi, ndipo palibe kanthu kasowa mau." 
1Corinthians14:11 Chifukwa chake, ngati sindidziwa mphamvu ya mauwo ndidzakhala kwa iye wolankhulayo wakunja, ndipo wolankhulayo adzakhala wakunja kwa ine." 
1Corinthians14:12 Momwemo inunso, popeza muli ofunitsitsa mphatso za Mzimu, funani kuti mukachuluke kukumangirira kwa Mpingo." 
1Corinthians14:13 Chifukwa chake wolankhula lilime, apemphere kuti amasule." 
1Corinthians14:14 Pakuti ngati ndipemphera m'lilime, mzimu wanga upemphera, koma chidziwitso changa chikhala chosabala kanthu." 
1Corinthians14:15 Kuli chiyani tsono? Ndidzapemphera ndi mzimu, koma ndidzapempheranso ndi chidziwitso changa; ndidzaimba ndi mzimu, koma ndidzaimbanso ndi chidziwitso." 
1Corinthians14:16 Chifukwa ngati udalitsa ndi mzimu, nanga iye wakukhala wosaphunzira adzati Amen bwanji, pa kuyamika kwako, popeza sadziwa chimene unena?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Pakutitu iwe uyamika bwino, koma winayo samangiriridwa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndiyamika Mulungu kuti ndilankhula malilime koposa inu nonse; 
1Corinthians14:19 koma mu Mpingo ndifuna kulankhula mau asanu ndi zidziwitso changa, kutinso ndikalangize ena, koposa kulankhula mau zikwi m'lilime." 
1Corinthians14:20 Abale, musakhale ana m'chidziwitso, koma m'choipa khalani makanda, koma m'chidziwitso akulu misinkhu." 
1Corinthians14:21 Kwalembedwa m'chilamulo, Ndi anthu a malilime ena ndipo ndi milomo ina ndidzalankhula nao anthu awa; ndipo kungakhale kutero sadzamva Ine, anena Ambuye." 
1Corinthians14:22 Chotero malilime akhala ngati chizindikiro, si kwa iwo akukhulupirira, koma kwa iwo osakhulupirira; koma kunenera sikuli kwa iwo osakhulupirira, koma kwa iwo amene akhulupirira." 
1Corinthians14:23 Chifukwa chake, ngati Mpingo wonse akasonkhane pamodzi, ndi onse akalankhule malilime, ndipo akalowemo anthu osaphunzira kapena osakhulupirira, kodi sadzanena kuti mwayaluka?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Koma ngati onse anenera, ndipo alowamo wina wosakhulupirira kapena wosaphunzira, atsutsidwa ndi onse; aweruzidwa ndi onse;" 
1Corinthians14:25 zobisika za mtima wake zionetsedwa; ndipo chotero adzagwa nkhope yake pansi, nadzagwadira Mulungu, nadzalalikira kuti Mulungu ali ndithu mwa inu." 
1Corinthians14:26 Nanga chiyani tsono, abale? Pamene musonkhana, yense ali nalo salimo, ali nacho chiphunzitso, ali nalo vumbulutso, ali nalo lilime, ali nacho chimasuliro. Muchite zonse kukumangirira." 
1Corinthians14:27 Ngati wina alankhula lilime, achite ndi awiri, koma oposa atatu iai, ndipo motsatana; ndipo mmodzi amasulire." 
1Corinthians14:28 Koma ngati palibe womasulira, akhale chete mu Mpingo, koma alankhule ndi iye yekha, ndi Mulungu." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ndipo aneneri alankhule awiri kapena atatu, ndi ena azindikire." 
1Corinthians14:30 Koma ngati kanthu kuvumbulutsidwa kwa wina wakukhalapo, akhale chete woyambayo." 
1Corinthians14:31 Pakuti mukhoza nonse kunenera mmodzimmodzi, kuti onse aphunzire, ndi onse afulumidwe;" 
1Corinthians14:32 ndipo mizimu ya aneneri imvera aneneri; 
1Corinthians14:33 pakuti Mulungu sali Mulungu wa chisokonezo koma wa mtendere; monga mwa Mipingo yonse ya oyera mtima. 
1Corinthians14:34 Akazi akhale chete m'Mipingo. Pakuti sikuloledwa kwa iwo kulankhula. Koma akhale omvera, monganso chilamulo chinena." 
1Corinthians14:35 Koma ngati afuna kuphunzira kanthu afunse amuna ao a iwo okha kwao; pakuti kunyazitsa mkazi kulankhula mu Mpingo. 
1Corinthians14:36 Kodi mau a Mulungu anatuluka kwa inu? Kapena anafika kwa inu nokha? 
1Corinthians14:37 Ngati wina ayesa kuti ali mneneri, kapena wauzimu, azindikire kuti zimene ndilemba kwa inu zili lamulo la Ambuye." 
1Corinthians14:38 Koma ngati wina akhale wosadziwa, akhale wosadziwa." 
1Corinthians14:39 Chifukwa chake, abale anga, funitsitsani kunenera, ndipo musaletse kulankhula malilime." 
1Corinthians14:40 Koma zonse zichitike koyenera ndi kolongosoka. 
1Corinthians15:1 Ndipo ndikudziwitsani, abale, Uthenga Wabwino umene ndinakulalikirani inu, umenenso munalandira, umenenso muimamo," 
1Corinthians15:2 umenenso mupulumutsidwa nao ngati muugwiritsa monga momwe ndinalalikira kwa inu; ngati simunakhulupirira chabe. 
1Corinthians15:3 Pakuti ndinapereka kwa inu poyamba, chimenenso ndinalandira, kuti Khristu anafera zoipa zathu, monga mwa malembo;" 
1Corinthians15:4 ndi kuti anaikidwa; ndi kuti anaukitsidwa tsiku lachitatu, monga mwa malembo;" 
1Corinthians15:5 ndi kuti anaonekera kwa Kefa; pamenepo kwa khumi ndi awiriwo; 
1Corinthians15:6 pomwepo anaoneka pa nthawi imodzi kwa abale oposa mazana asanu, amene ochuluka a iwo akhala kufikira tsopano, koma ena agona;" 
1Corinthians15:7 pomwepo anaonekera kwa Yakobo; pamenepo kwa atumwi onse; 
1Corinthians15:8 ndipo potsiriza pake pa onse, anaoneka kwa inenso monga mtayo." 
1Corinthians15:9 Pakuti ine ndili wamng'ono wa atumwi, ndine wosayenera kutchedwa mtumwi, popeza ndinalondalonda Mpingo wa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians15:10 Koma ndi chisomo cha Mulungu ndili ine amene ndili; ndipo chisomo chake cha kwa ine sichinakhala chopanda pake, koma ndinagwirira ntchito yochuluka ya iwo onse; koma si ine, koma chisomo cha Mulungu chakukhala ndi ine." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ngati ine tsono, kapena iwowa, kotero tilalikira, ndi kotero munakhulupirira." 
1Corinthians15:12 Koma ngati Khristu alalikidwa kuti waukitsidwa kwa akufa, nanga ena mwa inu anena bwanji kuti kulibe kuuka kwa akufa?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Koma ngati kulibe kuuka kwa akufa, Khristunso sanaukitsidwa;" 
1Corinthians15:14 ndipo ngati Khristu sanaukitsidwa kulalikira kwathu kuli chabe, chikhulupiriro chanunso chili chabe." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ndiponso ife tipezedwa mboni zonama za Mulungu; chifukwa tinachita umboni kunena za Mulungu kuti anaukitsa Khristu; amene sanamuukitsa, ngati kuli tero kuti akufa saukitsidwa." 
1Corinthians15:16 Pakuti ngati akufa saukitsidwa, Khristunso sanaukitsidwa;" 
1Corinthians15:17 ndipo ngati Khristu sanaukitsidwa, chikhulupiriro chanu chili chopanda pake; muli chikhalire m'machimo anu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Chifukwa chake iwonso akugona mwa Khristu anatayika. 
1Corinthians15:19 Ngati tiyembekezera Khristu m'moyo uno wokha, tili ife aumphawi oposa a anthu onse." 
1Corinthians15:20 Koma tsopano Khristu waukitsidwa kwa akufa, chipatso choundukula cha iwo akugona." 
1Corinthians15:21 Pakuti monga imfa inadza mwa munthu, kuuka kwa akufa kunadzanso mwa munthu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Pakuti monga mwa Adamu onse amwalira, choteronso mwa Khristu onse akhalitsidwa ndi moyo." 
1Corinthians15:23 Koma yense m'dongosolo lake la iye yekha, chipatso choundukula Khristu; pomwepo iwo a Khristu, pakubwera kwake." 
1Corinthians15:24 Pomwepo pali chimaliziro, pamene adzapereka ufumu kwa Mulungu, ndiye Atate, atatha kuthera chiweruzo chonse, ndi ulamuliro wonse, ndi mphamvu yomwe." 
1Corinthians15:25 Pakuti ayenera kuchita ufumu kufikira ataika adani onse pansi pa mapazi ake. 
1Corinthians15:26 Mdani wotsiriza amene adzathedwa ndiye imfa. 
1Corinthians15:27 Pakuti Iye anagonjetsa zonse pansi pa mapazi ake. Koma pamene anena kuti zonse zagonjetsedwa, kuzindikirika kuti sawerengapo Iye amene anagonjetsa zonsezo kwa Iye." 
1Corinthians15:28 Ndipo pamene zonsezo zagonjetsedwa kwa Iye, pomwepo Mwana yemwe adzagonjetsedwa kwa Iye amene anamgonjetsera zinthu zonse, kuti Mulungu akhale zonse mu zonse." 
1Corinthians15:29 Ngati si kutero, adzachita chiyani iwo amene abatizidwa chifukwa cha akufa? Ngati akufa saukitsidwa konse, abatizidwa chifukwa ninji chifukwa cha iwo?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Nanga ifenso tili m'moopsa bwanji nthawi zonse? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ndifa tsiku ndi tsiku, ndilumbira pa kudzitamandira kwa inu, abale, kumene ndili nako mwa Khristu Yesu, Ambuye wathu." 
1Corinthians15:32 Ngati ndinalimbana ndi zilombo ku Efeso monga mwa munthu, ndipindulanji? Ngati akufa saukitsidwa, tidye timwe pakuti mawa timwalira." 
1Corinthians15:33 Musanyengedwe; mayanjano oipa aipsa makhalidwe okoma. 
1Corinthians15:34 Ukani molungama, ndipo musachimwe; pakuti ena alibe chidziwitso cha Mulungu. Ndilankhula kunyaza inu." 
1Corinthians15:35 Koma wina adzati, Akufa aukitsidwa bwanji? Ndipo adza nalo thupi lotani?" 
1Corinthians15:36 Wopusa iwe, chimene uchifesa wekha sichikhalitsidwanso chamoyo, ngati sichifa;" 
1Corinthians15:37 ndipo chimene ufesa, sufesa thupi limene lidzakhala, koma mbeu yokha kapena ya tirigu kapena ya mtundu wina;" 
1Corinthians15:38 koma Mulungu aipatsa thupi monga afuna; ndi kwa mbeu yonse thupi lakelake. 
1Corinthians15:39 Nyama yonse siili imodzimodzi; koma ina ndi ya anthu, ndi ina ndiyo nyama ya zoweta, ndi ina ndiyo nyama ya mbalame, ndi ina ya nsomba." 
1Corinthians15:40 Palinso matupi am'mwamba, ndi matupi apadziko: koma ulemerero wa lam'mwamba ndi wina, ndi ulemerero wa lapadziko ndi winanso." 
1Corinthians15:41 Kuli ulemerero wa dzuwa, ndi ulemerero wina wa mwezi, ndi ulemerero wina wa nyenyezi; pakuti nyenyezi isiyana ndi nyenyezi m'ulemerero." 
1Corinthians15:42 Chomwechonso kudzakhala kuuka kwa akufa. Lifesedwa m'chivundi, liukitsidwa m'chisavundi;" 
1Corinthians15:43 lifesedwa m'mnyozo, liukitsidwa m'ulemerero; lifesedwa m'chifooko, liukitsidwa mumphamvu;" 
1Corinthians15:44 lifesedwa thupi lachibadwidwe, liukitsidwa thupi lauzimu. Ngati pali thupi lachibadwidwe, palinso lauzimu." 
1Corinthians15:45 Koteronso kwalembedwa, Munthu woyamba, Adamu, anakhala mzimu wamoyo. Adamu wotsirizayo anakhala mzimu wakulenga moyo." 
1Corinthians15:46 Koma chauzimu sichili choyamba, koma chachibadwidwe; pamenepo chauzimu." 
1Corinthians15:47 Munthu woyambayo ali wapansi, wanthaka. Munthu wachiwiri ali wakumwamba." 
1Corinthians15:48 Monga wanthakayo, ateronso anthaka; ndi monga wakumwamba, ateronso akumwamba." 
1Corinthians15:49 Ndipo monga tavala fanizo la wanthakayo, tidzavalanso fanizo la wakumwambayo." 
1Corinthians15:50 Koma ndinena ichi, abale, kuti thupi ndi mwazi sizingathe kulowa Ufumu wa Mulungu; kapena chivundi sichilowa chisavundi." 
1Corinthians15:51 Taonani, ndikuuzani chinsinsi; sitidzagona tonse, koma tonse tidzasandulika," 
1Corinthians15:52 m'kamphindi, m'kuthwanima kwa diso, pa lipenga lotsiriza; pakuti lipenga lidzalira, ndipo akufa adzaukitsidwa osavunda, ndipo ife tidzasandulika." 
1Corinthians15:53 Pakuti chovunda ichi chiyenera kuvala chisavundi, ndi chaimfa ichi kuvala chosafa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Ndipo pamene chovunda ichi chikadzavala chisavundi ndi chaimfa ichi chikadzavala chosafa, pamenepo padzachitika mau olembedwa, Imfayo yamezedwa m'chigonjetso." 
1Corinthians15:55 Imfawe, chigonjetso chako chili kuti? Imfawe, mbola yako ili kuti?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Koma mbola ya imfa ndiyo uchimo; koma mphamvu ya uchimo ndiyo chilamulo: 
1Corinthians15:57 koma ayamikike Mulungu, amene atipatsa ife chigonjetso mwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu." 
1Corinthians15:58 Chifukwa chake, abale anga okondedwa, khalani okhazikika, osasunthika, akuchuluka mu ntchito ya Ambuye, nthawi zonse, podziwa kuti kuchititsa kwanu sikuli chabe mwa Ambuye." 
1Corinthians16:1 Koma za chopereka cha kwa oyera mtima, monga ndinalangiza Mipingo ya ku Galatiya, motero chitani inunso." 
1Corinthians16:2 Tsiku loyamba la sabata yense wa inu asunge yekha, monga momwe anapindula, kuti zopereka zisachitike pakudza ine." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ndipo pamene ndifika, ndidzatuma iwo amene mudzawayesa oyenera, ndi akalata, apite nayo mphatso yanu ku Yerusalemu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Ndipo ngati kuyenera kwa ine kupitanso, adzapita nane." 
1Corinthians16:5 Koma ndidzadza kwa inu, nditapyola Masedoniya; pakuti ndidzapyola Masedoniya;" 
1Corinthians16:6 ndipo kapena ndidzakhalitsa ndi inu, kapenanso kugonera nyengo yachisanu kuti mukandiperekeze ine kumene kulikonse ndipitako." 
1Corinthians16:7 Pakuti sindifuna kukuonani tsopano popitirira; pakuti ndiyembekeza kukhala ndi inu nthawi, ngati alola Ambuye." 
1Corinthians16:8 Koma ndidzakhala ku Efeso kufikira Pentekoste. 
1Corinthians16:9 Pakuti panditsegukira pa khomo lalikulu ndi lochititsa, ndipo oletsana nafe ndi ambiri." 
1Corinthians16:10 Koma akadza Timoteo, penyani kuti akhale ndi inu wopanda mantha; pakuti agwira ntchito ya Ambuye, monganso ine;" 
1Corinthians16:11 chifukwa chake munthu asampeputse. Koma mumperekeze mumtendere, kuti akadze kwa ine; pakuti ndimuyembekezera pamodzi ndi abale." 
1Corinthians16:12 Koma za Apolo, mbaleyo, ndamuumiriza iye, adze kwa inu pamodzi ndi abale; ndipo sichinali chifuniro chake kuti adze tsopano, koma adzafika pamene aona nthawi." 
1Corinthians16:13 Dikirani, chilimikani m'chikhulupiriro, dzikhalitseni amuna, limbikani." 
1Corinthians16:14 Zanu zonse zichitike m'chikondi. 
1Corinthians16:15 Koma ndikupemphani inu, abale, (mudziwa banja la Stefanasi, kuti ali chipatso choundukula cha Akaya, ndi kuti anadziika okha kutumikira oyera mtima)," 
1Corinthians16:16 kuti inunso muvomere otere, ndi yense wakuchita nao, ndi kugwiritsa ntchito." 
1Corinthians16:17 Koma ndikondwera pa kudza kwao kwa Stefanasi, ndi Fortunato, ndi Akaiko; chifukwa iwo anandikwaniritsa chotsalira chanu." 
1Corinthians16:18 Pakuti anatsitsimutsa mzimu wanga ndi wanu; chifukwa chake muzindikire otere. 
1Corinthians16:19 Mipingo ya ku Asiya ikupatsani moni. Akupatsani moni ndithu inu mwa Ambuye, Akwila ndi Prisika, pamodzi ndi Mpingo wa m'nyumba yao." 
1Corinthians16:20 Akupatsani moni abale onse. Mupatsane moni ndi kupsompsona kopatulika. 
1Corinthians16:21 Ndikupereka moni ine Paulo ndi dzanja langa. 
1Corinthians16:22 Ngati wina sakonda Ambuye, akhale wotembereredwa. Akudza Ambuye." 
1Corinthians16:23 Chisomo cha Ambuye Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi inu. 
1Corinthians16:24 Chikondi changa chikhale ndi inu nonse mwa Khristu Yesu. Amen. 
2Corinthians1:1 Paulo, mtumwi wa Khristu Yesu, mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu, ndi Timoteo mbaleyo, kwa Mpingo wa Mulungu umene uli ku Korinto, pamodzi ndi oyera mtima onse amene ali m'Akaya monse:" 
2Corinthians1:2 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere zochokera kwa Mulungu Atate wathu, ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu." 
2Corinthians1:3 Wolemekezeka Mulungu ndi Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, Atate wa zifundo ndi Mulungu wa chitonthozo chonse," 
2Corinthians1:4 wotitonthoza ife m'nsautso yathu yonse, kuti tidzathe ife kutonthoza iwo okhala m'nsautso iliyonse, mwa chitonthozo chimene titonthozedwa nacho tokha ndi Mulungu." 
2Corinthians1:5 Pakuti monga masautso a Khristu atichulukira ife, choteronso chitonthozo chathu chichuluka mwa Khristu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Koma ngati tisautsidwa, kuli chifukwa cha chitonthozo ndi chipulumutso chanu; ngati titonthozedwa, kuli kwa chitonthozo chanu chimene chichititsa mwa kupirira kwa masautso omwewo amene ifenso timva." 
2Corinthians1:7 Ndipo chiyembekezo chathu cha kwa inu nchokhazikika; podziwa kuti monga muli oyanjana ndi masautsowo, koteronso ndi chitonthozo." 
2Corinthians1:8 Pakuti sitifuna abale, kuti mukhale osadziwa za chisautso chathu tinakomana nacho m'Asiya, kuti tinathodwa kwakukulu, koposa mphamvu yathu, kotero kuti tinada nkhawa ngakhale za moyo wathu;" 
2Corinthians1:9 koma tokha tinakhala nacho chitsutso cha imfa mwa ife tokha, kuti tisalimbike pa ife tokha, koma pa Mulungu wakuukitsa akufa;" 
2Corinthians1:10 amene anatilanditsa mu imfa yaikulu yotere, nadzalanditsa; amene timyembekezera kuti adzalanditsanso;" 
2Corinthians1:11 pothandizana inunso ndi pemphero lanu la kwa ife; kuti pa mphatso ya kwa ife yodzera kwa anthu ambiri, payamikike ndi anthu ambiri chifukwa cha ife." 
2Corinthians1:12 Pakuti kudzitamandira kwathu ndiko umboni wa chikumbu mtima chathu, kuti m'chiyero ndi kuona mtima kwa Mulungu, si m'nzeru ya thupi, koma m'chisomo cha Mulungu tinadzisunga m'dziko lapansi, koma koposa kwa inu." 
2Corinthians1:13 Pakuti sitilemba kwa inu zina, koma zimene muwerenga, kapenanso muvomereza; ndipo ndiyembekeza kuti mudzavomereza kufikira chimaliziro;" 
2Corinthians1:14 monganso munativomerezera ife pena, kuti ife ndife kudzitamandira kwanu, monga momwe inunso muli kudzitamandira kwathu m'tsiku la Ambuye wathu Yesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Ndipo m'kulimbika kumene ndinafuna kudza kwa inu kale, kuti mukakhale nacho chisomo chachiwiri;" 
2Corinthians1:16 ndipo popyola kwanu kupita ku Masedoniya, ndi kudzanso kwa inu pobwera kufuma ku Masedoniya; ndi kuperekezedwa ndi inu ku Yudeya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Pamenepo, pakufuna chimene, kodi ndinachitapo kosinthasintha? Kapena zimene nditsimikiza mtima kodi ndizitsimikiza mtima monga mwa thupi? Kuti pa ine pakhale eya, eya, ndi iai, iai?"
