2Corinthians1:18 Koma Mulungu ali wokhulupirika, kuti mau athu a kwa inu sanakhala eya ndi iai." 
2Corinthians1:19 Pakuti Mwana wa Mulungu, Yesu Khristu, amene analalikidwa mwa inu ndi ife, (ine ndi Silivano ndi Timoteo) sanakhala eya ndi iai, koma anakhala eya mwa Iye." 
2Corinthians1:20 Pakuti monga mawerengedwe a malonjezano a Mulungu ali mwa Iye eya; chifukwa chakenso ali mwa Iye Amen, kwa ulemerero wa Mulungu mwa ife." 
2Corinthians1:21 Koma Iye wakutikhazika pamodzi ndi inu kwa Khristu, natidzoza ife, ndiye Mulungu;" 
2Corinthians1:22 amenenso anatisindikiza chizindikiro, natipatsa chikole cha Mzimu mu mitima yathu." 
2Corinthians1:23 Koma ine ndiitana Mulungu akhale mboni pa moyo wanga, kuti kulekera inu ndinaleka kudza ku Korinto." 
2Corinthians1:24 Si kuti tichita ufumu pa chikhulupiriro chanu, koma tikhala othandizana nacho chimwemwe chanu; pakuti ndi chikhulupiriro muimadi." 
2Corinthians2:1 Koma ndinatsimikiza mtima mwa ine ndekha, ndisadzenso kwa inu ndi chisoni." 
2Corinthians2:2 Pakuti ngati ine ndimvetsa inu chisoni, ndaninso amene adzandikondweretsa ine, koma iye amene ndammvetsa chisoni?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ndipo ndinalemba ichi chomwe, kuti pakudza ndisakhale nacho chisoni kwa iwo amene ayenera kukondweretsa ine; ndi kukhulupirira mwa inu nonse, kuti chimwemwe changa ndi chanu cha inu nonse." 
2Corinthians2:4 Pakuti m'chisautso chambiri ndi kuwawa mtima ndinalembera inu ndi misozi yambiri; si kuti ndikumvetseni chisoni, koma kuti mukadziwe chikondi cha kwa inu, chimene ndili nacho koposa." 
2Corinthians2:5 Koma ngati wina wachititsa chisoni, sanachititsa chisoni ine, koma pena (kuti ndisasenzetse) inu nonse." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kwa wotereyo chilango ichi chidachitika ndi ambiri chikwanira; 
2Corinthians2:7 kotero kwina kuti inu mumkhululukire ndi kumtonthoza, kuti wotereyo akakamizidwe ndi chisoni chochulukacho." 
2Corinthians2:8 Chifukwa chake ndikupemphani inu kuti mumtsimikizire ameneyo chikondi chanu. 
2Corinthians2:9 Pakuti chifukwa cha ichi ndalembanso, kuti ndidziwe mayesedwe anu, ngati muli omvera m'zonse." 
2Corinthians2:10 Koma amene mumkhululukira kanthu, inenso nditero naye; pakuti chimene ndakhululukira inenso, ngati ndakhululukira kanthu, ndachichita chifukwa cha inu, pamaso pa Khristu;" 
2Corinthians2:11 kuti asatichenjerere Satana; pakuti sitikhala osadziwa machenjerero ake. 
2Corinthians2:12 Koma pamene ndinadza ku Troasi kudzalalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu, ndipo pamene padanditsegukira kwa ine pakhomo, mwa Ambuye," 
2Corinthians2:13 ndinalibe mpumulo mu mzimu wanga, posapeza ine Tito mbale wanga; koma polawirana nao ndinanka ku Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Koma ayamikike Mulungu, amene atitsogolera m'chigonjetso mwa Khristu, namveketsa fungo la chidziwitso chake mwa ife pamalo ponse." 
2Corinthians2:15 Pakuti ife ndife fungo labwino la Khristu, kwa Mulungu, mwa iwo akupulumutsidwa, ndi mwa iwo akuonongeka; kwa ena fungo la imfa kuimfa;" 
2Corinthians2:16 koma kwa ena fungo la moyo kumoyo. Ndipo azikwanira ndani izi? 
2Corinthians2:17 Pakuti sitikhala monga ambiriwo, akuchita malonda nao mau a Mulungu; koma monga mwa choona mtima, koma monga mwa Mulungu pamaso pa Mulungu, tilankhula mwa Khristu." 
2Corinthians3:1 Kodi tilikuyambanso kudzivomereza tokha? Kapena kodi tisowa, monga ena, akalata otivomerezetsa kwa inu, kapena ochokera kwa inu?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Inu ndinu kalata wathu, wolembedwa mu mitima yathu, wodziwika ndi wowerengedwa ndi anthu onse;" 
2Corinthians3:3 popeza mwaonetsedwa kuti muli kalata wa Khristu, wakumtumikira ndi ife, wosalembedwa ndi kapezi iai, koma ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu wamoyo; wosati m'magome amiyala, koma m'magome a mitima yathupi." 
2Corinthians3:4 Ndipo kulimbika kotere kwa Mulungu tili nako mwa Khristu: 
2Corinthians3:5 si kuti tili okwanira pa ife tokha, kuyesera kanthu monga mochokera mwa ife tokha; kukwanira kwathu kuchokera kwa Mulungu;" 
2Corinthians3:6 amenenso anatikwaniritsa ife tikhale atumiki a pangano latsopano; si la chilembo, koma la mzimu; pakuti chilembo chipha, koma mzimu uchititsa moyo." 
2Corinthians3:7 Koma ngati utumiki wa imfa wolembedwa ndi wolochedwa m'miyala, unakhala m'ulemerero, kotero kuti ana a Israele sanathe kuyang'anitsa pa nkhope yake ya Mose, chifukwa cha ulemerero wa nkhope yake, umene unalikuchotsedwa:" 
2Corinthians3:8 koposa kotani nanga utumiki wa Mzimu udzakhala m'ulemerero? 
2Corinthians3:9 Pakuti ngati utumiki wa chitsutso unali wa ulemerero, makamaka utumiki wa chilungamo uchulukira muulemerero kwambiri." 
2Corinthians3:10 Pakutinso chimene chinachitidwa cha ulemerero sichinachitidwa cha ulemerero m'menemo, chifukwa cha ulemerero woposawo." 
2Corinthians3:11 Pakuti ngati chimene chilikuchotsedwa chinakhala m'ulemerero, makamaka kwambiri chotsalacho chili m'ulemerero." 
2Corinthians3:12 Pokhala nacho tsono chiyembekezo chotere, tilankhula ndi kukhazikika mtima kwakukulu," 
2Corinthians3:13 ndipo si monga Mose, amene anaika chophimba pa nkhope yake, kuti ana a Israele asayang'anitse pa chimaliziro cha chimene chinalikuchotsedwa;" 
2Corinthians3:14 koma mitima yao inaumitsidwa; pakuti kufikira lero lomwe lino, pa kuwerenga kwa pangano lakale chophimba chomwechi chikhalabe chosavundukuka, chimene chilikuchotsedwa mwa Khristu." 
2Corinthians3:15 Koma kufikira lero, pamene awerengedwa Mose, chophimba chigona pamtima pao." 
2Corinthians3:16 Koma pamene akatembenukira kwa Mulungu, chophimbacho chichotsedwa." 
2Corinthians3:17 Koma Ambuye ndiye Mzimuyo; ndipo pamene pali Mzimu wa Ambuye pali ufulu. 
2Corinthians3:18 Koma ife tonse ndi nkhope yosaphimbika popenyerera monga mwa kalirole ulemerero wa Ambuye, tisandulika m'chithunzithunzi chomwechi kuchokera kuulemerero kunka kuulemerero, monga ngati kuchokera kwa Ambuye Mzimu." 
2Corinthians4:1 Chifukwa chake popeza tili nao utumiki umene, monga talandira chifundo, sitifooka;" 
2Corinthians4:2 koma takaniza zobisika za manyazi, osayendayenda mochenjerera, kapena kuchita nao mau a Mulungu konyenga; koma ndi maonekedwe a choonadi; tidzivomeretsa tokha ku chikumbu mtima cha anthu onse pamaso pa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians4:3 Koma ngatinso Uthenga Wabwino wathu uphimbika, uphimbika mwa iwo akutayika;" 
2Corinthians4:4 mwa amene mulungu wa nthawi yino ya pansi pano unachititsa khungu maganizo ao a osakhulupirira, kuti chiwalitsiro cha Uthenga Wabwino wa ulemerero wa Khristu, amene ali chithunzithunzi cha Mulungu, chisawawalire." 
2Corinthians4:5 Pakuti tilalikira si za ife tokha, koma Yesu Khristu Ambuye, ndi ife tokha akapolo anu, chifukwa cha Khristu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Pakuti Mulungu amene anati, Kuunika kudzawala kutuluka mumdima, ndiye amene anawala m'mitima yathu kutipatsa chiwalitsiro cha chidziwitso cha ulemerero wa Mulungu pankhope pa Yesu Khristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Koma tili nacho chuma ichi m'zotengera zadothi, kuti ukulu woposa wamphamvu ukhale wa Mulungu, wosachokera kwa ife;" 
2Corinthians4:8 ndife osautsika monsemo, koma osapsinjika; osinkhasinkha, koma osakhala kakasi;" 
2Corinthians4:9 olondoleka, koma osatayika; ogwetsedwa, koma osaonongeka;" 
2Corinthians4:10 nthawi zonse tilikusenzasenza m'thupi kufa kwake kwa Yesu, kuti moyonso wa Yesu uoneke m'thupi mwathu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Pakuti ife amene tili ndi moyo tiperekeka kuimfa nthawi zonse, chifukwa cha Yesu, kuti moyonso wa Yesu uoneke m'thupi lathu lakufa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Chotero imfa ichita mwa ife, koma moyo mwa inu." 
2Corinthians4:13 Koma pokhala nao mzimu womwewo wa chikhulupiriro, monga mwa cholembedwacho, ndinakhulupirira, chifukwa chake ndinalankhula; ifenso tikhulupirira, chifukwa chake tilankhula;" 
2Corinthians4:14 podziwa kuti Iye amene anaukitsa Ambuye Yesu adzaukitsa ifenso pamodzi ndi Yesu, nadzatiikapo pamodzi ndi inu." 
2Corinthians4:15 Pakuti zonsezi nza kwa inu, kuti chisomocho, chochulukitsidwa mwa unyinjiwo, chichulukitsire chiyamiko ku ulemerero wa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians4:16 Chifukwa chake sitifooka; koma ungakhale umunthu wathu wakunja uvunda, wa m'kati mwathu ukonzedwa kwatsopano tsiku ndi tsiku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Pakuti chisautso chathu chopepuka cha kanthawi chitichitira ife kulemera koposa kwakukulu ndi kosatha kwa ulemerero; 
2Corinthians4:18 popeza sitipenyerera zinthu zooneka, koma zinthu zosaoneka; pakuti zinthu zooneka zili za nthawi, koma zinthu zosaoneka zili zosatha." 
2Corinthians5:1 Pakuti tidziwa kuti ngati nyumba ya pansi pano ya msasa wathu ipasuka, tili nacho chimango cha kwa Mulungu, ndiyo nyumba yosamangidwa ndi manja, yosatha, m'Mwamba." 
2Corinthians5:2 Pakutinso m'menemo tibuula, ndi kukhumbitsa kuvekedwa ndi chokhalamo chathu chochokera Kumwamba;" 
2Corinthians5:3 ngatitu povekedwa sitidzapezedwa amaliseche. 
2Corinthians5:4 Pakutinso ife okhala mu msasawu tibuula, pothodwa; si kunena kuti tifuna kuvulidwa, koma kuvekedwa, kuti chaimfacho chimezedwe ndi moyo." 
2Corinthians5:5 Ndipo wotikonzera ife ichi chimene, ndiye Mulungu, amene anatipatsa ife chikole cha Mzimu." 
2Corinthians5:6 Pokhala nako kulimbika mtima nthawi zonse tsono, ndipo podziwa kuti pamene tili kwathu m'thupi, sitili kwa Ambuye." 
2Corinthians5:7 (Pakuti tiyendayenda mwa chikhulupiriro si mwa chionekedwe); 
2Corinthians5:8 koma tilimbika mtima, ndipo tikondwera makamaka kusakhala m'thupi, ndi kukhala kwathu kwa Ambuye." 
2Corinthians5:9 Chifukwa chakenso tifunitsitsa, kapena kwathu kapena kwina, kukhala akumkondweretsa Iye." 
2Corinthians5:10 Pakuti ife tonse tiyenera kuonetsedwa kumpando wakuweruza wa Khristu, kuti yense alandire zochitika m'thupi, monga momwe anachita, kapena chabwino kapena choipa." 
2Corinthians5:11 Podziwa tsono kuopsa kwa Ambuye, tikopa anthu, koma tionetsedwa kwa Mulungu; ndipo ndiyembekezanso kuti tionetsedwa m'zikumbu mtima zanu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Sitidzivomeretsanso ife tokha kwa inu, koma tikupatsani inu chifukwa cha kudzitamandira pa ife, kuti mukakhale nako kanthu kakutsutsana nao iwo akudzitamandira pooneka pokha, osati mumtima." 
2Corinthians5:13 Pakuti ngati tili oyaluka, titero kwa Mulungu; ngati tili a nzeru zathu, titero kwa inu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Pakuti chikondi cha Khristu chitikakamiza; popeza taweruza chotero, kuti mmodzi adafera onse, chifukwa chake onse adafa;" 
2Corinthians5:15 ndipo adafera onse kuti iwo akukhala ndi moyo asakhalenso ndi moyo kwa iwo okha, koma mwa Iye amene adawafera iwo, nauka." 
2Corinthians5:16 Kotero kuti ife sitidziwanso munthu tsopano monga mwa thupi; ndipo ngati tazindikira Khristu monga mwa thupi, koma tsopano sitimzindikiranso motero." 
2Corinthians5:17 Chifukwa chake ngati munthu aliyense ali mwa Khristu ali wolengedwa watsopano; zinthu zakale zapita, taonani, zakhala zatsopano." 
2Corinthians5:18 Koma zinthu zonse zichokera kwa Mulungu amene anatiyanjanitsa kwa Iye yekha mwa Khristu, natipatsa utumiki wa chiyanjanitso;" 
2Corinthians5:19 ndiko kunena kuti Mulungu anali mwa Khristu, alinkuyanjanitsa dziko lapansi kwa Iye yekha, osawawerengera zolakwa zao; ndipo anaikiza kwa ife mau a chiyanjanitso." 
2Corinthians5:20 Chifukwa chake tili atumiki m'malo mwa Khristu, monga ngati Mulungu alikudandaulira mwa ife; tiumiriza inu m'malo mwa Khristu, yanjanitsidwani ndi Mulungu." 
2Corinthians5:21 Ameneyo sanadziwa uchimo anamyesera uchimo m'malo mwathu; kuti ife tikhale chilungamo cha Mulungu mwa Iye. 
2Corinthians6:1 Ndipo ochita naye pamodzi tidandauliranso kuti musalandire chisomo cha Mulungu kwachabe inu," 
2Corinthians6:2 (pakuti anena, M'nyengo yolandiridwa ndinamva iwe, ndipo m'tsiku la chipulumutso ndinakuthandiza. Taonani, tsopano ndiyo nyengo yabwino yolandiridwa, taonani, tsopano ndilo tsiku la chipulumutso);" 
2Corinthians6:3 osapatsa chokhumudwitsa konse m'chinthu chilichonse, kuti utumikiwo usanenezedwe;" 
2Corinthians6:4 koma m'zonse tidzitsimikizira ife tokha monga atumiki a Mulungu, m'kupirira kwambiri, m'zisautso, m'zikakamizo, m'zopsinja," 
2Corinthians6:5 m'mikwingwirima, m'ndende, m'maphokoso, m'mavutitso, m'madikiro, m'masalo a chakudya;" 
2Corinthians6:6 m'mayeredwe, m'chidziwitso, m'chilekerero, m'kukoma mtima, mwa Mzimu Woyera, m'chikondi chosanyenga;" 
2Corinthians6:7 m'mau a choonadi, mu mphamvu ya Mulungu; mwa zida za chilungamo kulamanja ndi kulamanzere," 
2Corinthians6:8 mwa ulemerero, mwa mnyozo, mwa mbiri yoipa ndi mbiri yabwino; monga osocheretsa, angakhale ali oona;" 
2Corinthians6:9 monga osadziwika, angakhale adziwika bwino; monga alinkufa, ndipo taonani tili ndi moyo; monga olangika, ndipo osaphedwa;" 
2Corinthians6:10 monga akumva chisoni, koma akukondwera nthawi zonse; monga aumphawi, koma akulemeretsa ambiri; monga okhala opanda kanthu, ndipo akhala nazo zinthu zonse." 
2Corinthians6:11 M'kamwa mwathu mmotseguka kwa inu Akorinto, mtima wathu wakulitsidwa." 
2Corinthians6:12 Simupsinjika mwa ife, koma mupsinjika mumtima mwanu." 
2Corinthians6:13 Ndipo kukhale chibwezero chomwechi (ndinena monga ndi ana anga) mukulitsidwe inunso. 
2Corinthians6:14 Musakhale omangidwa m'goli ndi osakhulupirira osiyana; pakuti chilungamo chigawana bwanji ndi chosalungama? Kapena kuunika kuyanjana bwanji ndi mdima? 
2Corinthians6:15 Ndipo Khristu avomerezana bwanji ndi Beliyali? Kapena wokhulupirira ali nalo gawo lanji pamodzi ndi wosakhulupirira? 
2Corinthians6:16 Ndipo chiphatikizo chake nchanji ndi Kachisi wa Mulungu ndi wa mafano? Pakuti ife ndife Kachisi wa Mulungu wamoyo; monga Mulungu anati, Ndidzakhalitsa mwa iwo, ndipo ndidzayendayenda mwa iwo; ndipo ndidzakhala Mulungu wao, ndi iwo adzakhala anthu anga." 
2Corinthians6:17 Chifukwa chake, Tulukani pakati pao, ndipo patukani, ati Ambuye, Ndipo musakhudza kanthu kosakonzeka; ndipo Ine ndidzalandira inu," 
2Corinthians6:18 ndipo ndidzakhala kwa inu Atate, ndi inu mudzakhala kwa Ine ana aamuna ndi aakazi, anena Ambuye Wamphamvuyonse." 
2Corinthians7:1 Pokhala nao tsono malonjezano amenewa, okondedwa, tidzikonzere tokha kuleka chodetsa chonse cha thupi ndi cha mzimu, ndi kutsiriza chiyero m'kuopa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians7:2 Tipatseni malo; sitinamchitira munthu chosalungama, sitinaipsa munthu, sitinachenjerera munthu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Sindinena ichi kuti ndikutsutseni: pakuti ndanena kale kuti muli mu mitima yathu, kuti tife limodzi ndi kukhala ndi moyo limodzi." 
2Corinthians7:4 Ndilimbika mtima kwambiri pakunena nanu, kudzitamandira kwanga chifukwa cha inu nkwakukulu; ndidzazidwa nacho chitonthozo, ndisefukira nacho chimwemwe m'chisautso chathu chonse." 
2Corinthians7:5 Pakutinso pakudza ife Masedoniya thupi lathu linalibe mpumulo, koma tinasautsidwa ife monsemo; kunjako zolimbana, m'katimo mantha." 
2Corinthians7:6 Koma Iye amene atonthoza odzichepetsa, ndiye Mulungu, anatitonthoza ife ndi kufika kwake kwa Tito;" 
2Corinthians7:7 koma si ndi kufika kwake kokha, komanso ndi chitonthozo chimene anatonthozedwa nacho mwa inu, pamene anatiuza ife kukhumbitsa kwanu, kulira kwanu, changu chanu cha kwa ine; kotero kuti ndinakondwera koposa." 
2Corinthians7:8 Kuti ngakhale ndakumvetsani chisoni ndi kalata uja, sindiwawapo mtima, ndingakhale ndinawawa mtima; pakuti ndiona kuti kalata uja anakumvetsani chisoni, ngakhale kwa nthawi yokha." 
2Corinthians7:9 Tsopano ndikondwera, si kuti mwangomvedwa chisoni, koma kuti mwamvetsedwa chisoni ku kutembenuka mtima; pakuti munamvetsedwa chisoni cha kwa Mulungu, kuti tisakusowetseni m'kanthu kalikonse." 
2Corinthians7:10 Pakuti chisoni cha kwa Mulungu titembenuzira mtima kuchipulumutso, chosamvetsanso chisoni; koma chisoni cha dziko lapansi chichita imfa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Pakuti, taonani, ichi chomwe, chakuti mudamvetsedwa chisoni cha kwa Mulungu, khama lalikulu lanji chidalichita mwa inu, komanso chodzikonza, komanso mkwiyo, komanso mantha, komanso kukhumbitsa komanso changu, komanso kubwezera chilango! M'zonse munadzitsimikizira nokha kuti muli oyera mtima m'menemo." 
2Corinthians7:12 Chifukwa chake ndingakhale ndalembera kwa inu, sindinachita chifukwa cha iye amene anachita choipa, kapena chifukwa cha iye amene anachitidwa choipa, koma kuti khama lanu la kwa ife lionetsedwe kwa inu pamaso pa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians7:13 Chifukwa cha ichi tatonthozedwa; ndipo m'chitonthozo chathu tinakondwera koposa ndithu pa chimwemwe cha Tito, kuti mzimu wake unatsitsimutsidwa ndi inu nonse." 
2Corinthians7:14 Pakuti ngati ndadzitamandira nako kanthu kwa iye chifukwa cha inu, sindinamvetsedwa manyazi; koma monga tinalankhula zonse ndi inu m'choonadi, koteronso kudzitamandira kwathu kumene kwa Tito, kunakhala choonadi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Ndipo chikondi chenicheni chake chichulukira koposa kwa inu, pokumbukira kumvera kwanu kwa inu nonse, kuti munamlandira iye ndi mantha ndi kunthunthumira." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndikondwera kuti m'zonse ndilimbika mtima za inu. 
2Corinthians8:1 Ndipo tikudziwitsani, abale, chisomo cha Mulungu chopatsika mwa Mipingo ya ku Masedoniya," 
2Corinthians8:2 kuti m'chitsimikizo chachikulu cha chisautso, kuchulukitsa kwa chimwemwe chao, ndi kusauka kwao, kwenikweni zidachulukira ku cholemera cha kuolowa mtima kwao." 
2Corinthians8:3 Pakuti monga mwa mphamvu yao, ndichitapo umboni, inde koposa mphamvu yao," 
2Corinthians8:4 anachita eni ake, natiumiriza ndi kutidandaulira za chisomocho, ndi za chiyanjano cha utumiki wa kwa oyera mtima;" 
2Corinthians8:5 ndipo, si monga tidayembekeza; koma anayamba kudzipereka okha kwa Ambuye, ndi kwa ife mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu." 
2Corinthians8:6 Kotero kuti tinadandaulira Tito, kuti monga anayamba kale, chomwechonso atsirize kwa inu chisomo ichinso." 
2Corinthians8:7 Koma monga muchulukira m'zonse, m'chikhulupiriro, ndi m'mau, ndi m'chidziwitso, ndi m'khama lonse, ndi m'chikondi chanu cha kwa ife, chulukaninso m'chisomo ichi." 
2Corinthians8:8 Sindinena ichi monga kulamulira, koma kuyesa mwa khama la ena choonadi cha chikondi chanunso." 
2Corinthians8:9 Pakuti mudziwa chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, kuti, chifukwa cha inu anakhala wosauka, angakhale anali wolemera, kuti inu ndi kusauka kwake mukakhale olemera." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ndipo m'menemo nditchula choyesa ine; pakuti chimene chipindulira inu, amene munayamba kale chaka chapitachi si kuchita kokha, komanso kufunira." 
2Corinthians8:11 Koma tsopano tsirizani kuchitaku; kuti monga kunali chivomerezo cha kufunira, koteronso kukhale kutsiriza kwake m'chimene muli nacho." 
2Corinthians8:12 Pakuti ngati chivomerezocho chili pomwepo, munthu alandiridwa monga momwe ali nacho, si monga chimsowa." 
2Corinthians8:13 Pakuti sinditero kuti ena akamasuke, ndi inu musautsidwe;" 
2Corinthians8:14 koma mwa kulingana kuchuluka kwanu kukwanire kusowa kwao nthawi ya makono ano, kutinso kuchuluka kwao kukwanire kusowa kwanu." 
2Corinthians8:15 Kuti pakhale chilingano; monga kwalembedwa, Wosonkhetsa chambiri sichinamtsalira; ndi iye wosonkhetsa pang'ono sichinamsowa." 
2Corinthians8:16 Koma ayamikike Mulungu, wakupatsa khama lomweli la kwa inu mu mtima wa Tito." 
2Corinthians8:17 Pakutitu analandira kudandaulira kwathu; koma pokhala nalo khama loposa, anatulukira kunka kwa inu mwini wake." 
2Corinthians8:18 Ndipo tatuma pamodzi naye mbaleyo, amene kusimba kwake m'Uthenga Wabwino kuli m'Mipingo yonse;" 
2Corinthians8:19 ndipo si ichi chokha, komanso anasankhika ndi Mipingo, apite limodzi ndi ife m'chisomo ichi, chimene tichitumikira ife, kwa ulemerero wa Ambuye, ndi kuonetsa chivomerezo chathu;" 
2Corinthians8:20 ndi kupewa ichi kuti wina angatitchule za kuchulukira kumene tikutumikira; 
2Corinthians8:21 pakuti tikonzeratu zinthu zokoma, si pamaso pa Ambuye pokha, komanso pamaso pa anthu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Ndipo tinatumiza mbale wathu awaperekeze iwo, amene tamtsimikizira kawirikawiri ali wakhama m'zinthu zambiri, koma tsopano wa khama loposatu ndi kulimbika kwakukulu kumene ali nako kwa inu." 
2Corinthians8:23 Nanga za Tito, ali woyanjana wanga ndi wochita nane wa kwa inu; nanga abale athu, ali atumwi a Mipingo, ali ulemerero wa Khristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Chifukwa chake muwatsimikizire iwo chitsimikizo cha chikondi chanu, ndi cha kudzitamandira kwathu pa inu pamaso pa Mipingo." 
2Corinthians9:1 Pakutitu za utumiki wa kwa oyera mtima sikufunika kwa ine kulembera inu; 
2Corinthians9:2 pakuti ndidziwa chivomerezo chanu chimene ndidzitamandira nacho chifukwa cha inu ndi Amasedoniya, kuti Akaya anakonzekeratu chitapita chaka; ndi changu chanu chinautsa ochulukawo." 
2Corinthians9:3 Koma ndatuma abale kuti kudzitamandira kwathu kwa pa inu kusakhale kopanda pake m'menemo; kuti, monga ndinanena, mukakhale okonzekeratu;" 
2Corinthians9:4 kuti kapena akandiperekeze a ku Masedoniya nadzakupezani inu osakonzeka, ife (kuti tisanene inu) tingachititsidwe manyazi m'kulimbika kumene." 
2Corinthians9:5 Chifukwa chake ndinayesa kuti kufunika kupempha abale kuti atsogole afike kwa inu, nakonzeretu dalitso lanu lolonjezeka kale, kuti chikhale chokonzeka chomwechi, monga ngati mdalitso, ndipo si monga mwa kuumiriza." 
2Corinthians9:6 Koma nditi ichi, kuti iye wakufesa mouma manja, mouma manjanso adzatuta. Ndipo iye wakufesa moolowa manja, moolowa manjanso adzatuta." 
2Corinthians9:7 Yense achite monga anatsimikiza mtima, si mwa chisoni kapena mokakamiza, pakuti Mulungu akonda wopereka mokondwerera." 
2Corinthians9:8 Ndipo Mulungu akhoza kuchulukitsira chisomo chonse kwa inu; kuti inu, pokhala nacho chikwaniro chonse m'zinthu zonse, nthawi zonse, mukachulukire kuntchito yonse yabwino;" 
2Corinthians9:9 monga kwalembedwa, Anabalalitsa, anapatsa kwa osauka; chilungamo chake chikhale kunthawi yonse." 
2Corinthians9:10 Ndipo iye wopatsa mbeu kwa wofesa, ndi mkate ukhale chakudya, adzapatsa ndi kuchulukitsa mbeu yanu yofesa, nadzaonjezapo pa zipatso za chilungamo chanu;" 
2Corinthians9:11 polemeretsedwa inu m'zonse kukuolowa manja konse, kumene kuchita mwa ife chiyamiko cha kwa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians9:12 Pakuti utumiki wa kutumikira kumene sudzaza zosowa za oyera mtima zokha, koma uchulukiranso kwa Mulungu mwa mayamiko ambiri;" 
2Corinthians9:13 popeza kuti mwa kuyesa kwa utumiki umene alemekeza Mulungu pa kugonja kwa chivomerezo chanu ku Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu, ndi kwa kuolowa manja kwa chigawano chanu kwa iwo ndi kwa onse;" 
2Corinthians9:14 ndipo iwo, ndi pempherero lao la kwa inu, akhumbitsa inu, chifukwa cha chisomo choposa cha Mulungu pa inu." 
2Corinthians9:15 Ayamikike Mulungu chifukwa cha mphatso yakeyake yosatheka kuneneka. 
2Corinthians10:1 Koma ine ndekha Paulo, ndidandaulira inu mwa kufatsa ndi ulere wa Khristu, ine amene pamaso panu ndikhala wodzichepetsa pakati pa inu, koma pokhala kwina ine ndilimbika mtima kwa inu;" 
2Corinthians10:2 koma ndipempha kuti pokhala ndili pomwepo, ndisalimbike mtima ndi kulimbika kumene ndiyesa kulimbika nako pa ena, amene atiyesera ife monga ngati tilikuyendayenda monga mwa thupi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Pakuti pakuyendayenda m'thupi, sitichita nkhondo monga mwa thupi," 
2Corinthians10:4 (pakuti zida za nkhondo yathu sizili za thupi, koma zamphamvu mwa Mulungu zakupasula malinga);" 
2Corinthians10:5 ndi kugwetsa matsutsano, ndi chokwezeka chonse chimene chidzikweza pokana chidziwitso cha Mulungu, ndi kugonjetsa ganizo lonse kukumvera kwa Khristu;" 
2Corinthians10:6 ndi kukhala okonzeka kubwezera chilango kusamvera konse, pamene kumvera kwanu kudzakwaniridwa." 
2Corinthians10:7 Kodi mupenyera zopenyeka pamaso? Ngati wina alimbika mwa yekha kuti ali wa Khristu, ayesere ichinso mwa iye yekha, kuti monga iye ali wa Khristu, koteronso ife." 
2Corinthians10:8 Pakuti ndingakhale ndikadzitamandira kanthu kochulukira za ulamuliro (umene anatipatsa Ambuye kukumangirira, ndipo si kukugwetsera kwanu), sindidzanyazitsidwa;" 
2Corinthians10:9 kuti ndisaoneke monga ngati kukuopsani mwa akalatawo. 
2Corinthians10:10 Pakuti, akalatatu, ati, ndiwo olemera, ndi amphamvu; koma maonekedwe a thupi lake ngofooka, ndi mau ake ngachabe." 
2Corinthians10:11 Woteroyo ayese ichi kuti monga tili ife ndi mau mwa akalata, pokhala palibe ife, tili oterenso m'machitidwe pokhala tili pomwepo." 
2Corinthians10:12 Pakuti sitilimba mtima kudziwerenga, kapena kudzilinganiza tokha ndi ena a iwo amene adzivomeretsa okha; koma iwowa, podziyesera okha ndi iwo okha, ndi kudzilinganiza okha ndi iwo okha, alibe nzeru." 
2Corinthians10:13 Koma ife sitidzadzitamandira popitirira muyeso, koma monga mwa muyeso wa chilekezero chimene Mulungu anatigawira muyeso, kufikira ngakhale kwa inunso." 
2Corinthians10:14 Pakuti sitinyanyampiradi tokha, monga ngati sitinafikira kwa inu; pakuti tinadza kufikira inunso, mu Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu:" 
2Corinthians10:15 osadzitamandira popitirira muyeso mwa machititso a ena; koma tili nacho chiyembekezo kuti pakukula chikhulupiriro chanu, tidzakulitsidwa mwa inu monga mwa chilekezero chathu kwa kuchulukira," 
2Corinthians10:16 kukalalikira Uthenga Wabwino m'tsogolo mwake mwa inu, sikudzitamandira mwa chilekezero cha wina, ndi zinthu zokonzeka kale." 
2Corinthians10:17 Koma iye wodzitamandira adzitamandire mwa Ambuye; 
2Corinthians10:18 pakuti si iye amene adzitama yekha, koma iye amene Ambuye amtama ali wovomerezeka." 
2Corinthians11:1 Bwenzi mutandilola pang'ono ndi chopusacho! Komanso mundilole. 
2Corinthians11:2 Pakuti ndichita nsanje pa inu ndi nsanje ya Mulungu; pakuti ndinakupalitsani ubwenzi mwamuna mmodzi, kuti ndikalangize inu ngati namwali woyera mtima kwa Khristu." 
2Corinthians11:3 Koma ndiopa, kuti pena, monga njoka inanyenga Heva ndi kuchenjerera kwake, maganizo anu angaipsidwe kusiyana nako kuona mtima ndi kuyera mtima zili kwa Khristu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Pakutitu ngati iye wakudza alalikira Yesu wina, amene ife sitinalalikira, kapena ngati mulandira mzimu wa mtundu wina, umene simunalandira, kapena Uthenga Wabwino wa mtundu wina umene simunalandira, mulolana naye bwino lomwe." 
2Corinthians11:5 Pakuti ndiyesa kuti sindinaperewera konse ndi atumwi oposatu. 
2Corinthians11:6 Ndipo ndingakhale ndili wosaphunzira m'manenedwe, koma sinditero m'chidziwitso, koma m'zonse tachionetsa kwa inu mwa anthu onse." 
2Corinthians11:7 Kodi ndachimwa podzichepetsa ndekha, kuti inu mukakwezedwe, popeza ndinalalikira kwa inu Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu mwaufulu?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Ndinalanda za Mipingo ina, ndi kulandira kwa iwo kulipira kuti ndikatumikire inu;" 
2Corinthians11:9 ndipo pakukhala nanu, ndi kusowa, sindinasaukitsa munthu aliyense; pakuti abale akuchokera ku Masedoniya, anakwaniritsa kusowa kwanga; ndipo m'zonse ndinachenjera ndekha, ndisalemetse inu, ndipo ndidzachenjerapo." 
2Corinthians11:10 Choonadi cha Khristu chili mwa ine, kuti kudzitamandira kumene sikudzaletsedwa kwa ine mu mbali za Akaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Chifukwa ninji? Chifukwa sindikonda inu kodi? Adziwa Mulungu. 
2Corinthians11:12 Koma chimene ndichita, ndidzachitanso, kuti ndikawadulire chifukwa iwo akufuna chifukwa; kuti m'mene adzitamandiramo, apezedwe monganso ife." 
2Corinthians11:13 Pakuti otere ali atumwi onyenga, ochita ochenjerera, odzionetsa ngati atumwi a Khristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ndipo kulibe kudabwa; pakuti Satana yemwe adzionetsa ngati mngelo wa kuunika. 
2Corinthians11:15 Chifukwa chake sikuli kanthu kwakukulu ngatinso atumiki ake adzionetsa monga atumiki a chilungamo; amene chimaliziro chao chidzakhala monga ntchito zao. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndinenanso, Munthu asandiyese wopanda nzeru; koma ngati mutero, mundilandirenso ine monga wopanda nzeru, kuti inenso ndidzitamandire pang'ono." 
2Corinthians11:17 Chimene ndilankhula sindilankhula monga mwa Ambuye, koma monga wopanda nzeru, m'kulimbika kumene kwa kudzitamandira." 
2Corinthians11:18 Popeza ambiri adzitamandira monga mwa thupi, inenso ndidzadzitamandira." 
2Corinthians11:19 Pakuti mulolana nao opanda nzeru mokondwera, pokhala anzeru inu nokha." 
2Corinthians11:20 Pakuti mulola ngati wina akuyesani inu akapolo, ngati wina alikwira inu, ngati wina alanda zanu, ngati wina adzikuza, ngati wina akupandani pankhope." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ndinena monga mwa kunyoza, monga ngati tinakhala ofooka. Koma m'mene wina alimbika mtimamo (ndinena mopanda nzeru) momwemo ndilimbika mtima inenso." 
2Corinthians11:22 Kodi ali Ahebri? Inenso. Kodi ali Aisraele? Inenso. Kodi ali mbeu ya Abrahamu? Inenso. 
2Corinthians11:23 Kodi ali atumiki a Khristu? (Ndilankhula monga moyaluka), makamaka ine; m'zivutinso mochulukira, m'ndende mochulukira, m'mikwingwirima mosawerengeka, muimfa kawirikawiri." 
2Corinthians11:24 Kwa Ayuda ndinalandira kasanu mikwingwirima makumi anai kuperewera umodzi. 
2Corinthians11:25 Katatu ndinamenyedwa ndi ndodo, kamodzi ndinaponyedwa miyala, katatu ndinatayika posweka chombo, ndinakhala m'kuya tsiku limodzi usana ndi usiku;" 
2Corinthians11:26 paulendo kawirikawiri, moopsa mwake mwa mitsinje, moopsa mwake mwa olanda, moopsa modzera kwa mtundu wanga, moopsa modzera kwa amitundu, moopsa m'mudzi, moopsa m'chipululu, moopsa m'nyanja, moopsa mwa abale onyenga;" 
2Corinthians11:27 m'chivutitso ndi m'cholemetsa, m'madikiro kawirikawiri, m'njala ndi ludzu, m'masalo a chakudya kawirikawiri, m'chisanu ndi umaliseche." 
2Corinthians11:28 Popanda zakunjazo pali chondisindikiza tsiku ndi tsiku, chalabadiro cha Mipingo yonse." 
2Corinthians11:29 Afooka ndani wosafooka inenso? Akhumudwitsidwa ndani, wosatenthanso ine?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Ngati ndiyenera kudzitamandira, ndidzadzitamandira ndi za kufooka kwanga." 
2Corinthians11:31 Mulungu Atate wa Ambuye Yesu, Iye amene alemekezeka kunthawi yonse, adziwa kuti sindinama." 
2Corinthians11:32 M'Damasiko kazembe wa mfumu Areta analindizitsa mudzi wa Adamasiko kuti andigwire ine; 
2Corinthians11:33 ndipo mwa zenera, mudengu, ananditsitsa pakhoma, ndipo ndinapulumuka m'manja mwake." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ndiyenera kudzitamandira, kungakhale sikupindulika; koma ndidzadza kumasomphenya ndi mavumbulutso a Ambuye." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndidziwa munthu wa mwa Khristu, zitapita zaka khumi ndi zinai (ngati m'thupi, sindidziwa; ngati kunja kwa thupi, sindidziwa; adziwa Mulungu), anakwatulidwa wotereyo kunka naye Kumwamba kwachitatu." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ndipo ndidziwa munthu wotereyo (ngati m'thupi, ngati wopanda thupi, sindidziwa; adziwa Mulungu)," 
2Corinthians12:4 kuti anakwatulidwa kunka ku Paradaiso, namva maneno osatheka kuneneka, amene saloleka kwa munthu kulankhula." 
2Corinthians12:5 Chifukwa cha wotereyo ndidzadzitamandira; koma chifukwa cha ine ndekha sindidzadzitamandira, koma m'zofooka zanga." 
2Corinthians12:6 Pakuti ngati ndikafuna kudzitamandira, sindidzakhala wopanda nzeru; pakuti ndidzanena choonadi; koma ndileka, kuti wina angandiwerengere ine koposa kumene andiona ine, kapena amva za ine." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ndipo kuti ndingakwezeke koposa, chifukwa cha ukulu woposa wa mavumbulutso, kunapatsidwa kwa ine munga m'thupi, ndiye mngelo wa Satana kuti anditundudze, kuti ndingakwezeke koposa." 
2Corinthians12:8 Za ichi ndinapemphera Ambuye katatu kuti chichoke kwa ine. 
2Corinthians12:9 Ndipo ananena kwa ine, Chisomo changa chikukwanira; pakuti mphamvu yanga ithedwa m'ufooko. Chifukwa chake makamaka ndidzadzitamandira mokondweratu m'mafooko anga, kuti mphamvu ya Khristu ikhale pa ine." 
2Corinthians12:10 Chifukwa chake ndisangalala m'mafooko, m'ziwawa, m'zikakamizo, m'mazunzo, m'zipsinjiko, chifukwa cha Khristu; pakuti pamene ndifooka, pamenepo ndili wamphamvu." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ndakhala wopanda nzeru, mwandichititsa kutero; pakuti inu munayenera kundivomereza; pakuti sindiperewera ndi atumwi oposatu m'kanthu konse, ndingakhale ndili chabe." 
2Corinthians12:12 Zizindikirotu za mtumwi zinachitika pakati pa inu, m'chipiriro chonse, ndi zizindikiro, ndi zozizwa, ndi zamphamvu." 
2Corinthians12:13 Pakuti kuli chiyani chimene munachepetsedwa nacho ndi Mipingo yotsala ina, ngati si ichi kuti ine ndekha sindinasaukitsa inu? Ndikhululukireni choipa ichi." 
2Corinthians12:14 Taonani, nthawi yachitatu iyi ndapukwa ine kudza kwa inu, ndipo sindidzakusaukitsani; pakuti sindifuna zanu, koma inu; pakuti ana sayenera kuunjikira atate ndi amai, koma atate ndi amai kuunjikira ana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ndipo ndidzapereka ndi kuperekedwa konse chifukwa cha miyoyo yanu mokondweratu. Ngati ndikonda inu kochuluka koposa, kodi ndikondedwa kochepa?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Koma kukhale kotero; ine sindinalemetsa inu; koma pokhala wochenjera ine, ndinakugwirani ndi chinyengo." 
2Corinthians12:17 Kodi wina wa iwo ndinawatuma kwa inu, ndinakuchenjererani naye kodi?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Ndinadandaulira Tito, ndipo ndinatuma mbaleyo naye. Kodi Tito anakuchenjererani kanthu? Sitinayendayenda naye Mzimu yemweyo kodi? Sitinatsata mapazi omwewo kodi?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Mumayesa tsopano lino kuti tilikuwiringula kwa inu. Tilankhula pamaso pa Mulungu mwa Khristu. Koma zonse, okondedwa, zili za kumangirira kwanu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Pakuti ndiopa, kuti kaya, pakudza ine, sindidzakupezani inu otere onga ndifuna, ndipo ine ndidzapezedwa ndi inu wotere wonga simufuna; kuti kaya pangakhale chotetana, kaduka, mikwiyo, zilekanitso, maugogodi, ukazitape, zodzikuza, mapokoso;" 
2Corinthians12:21 kuti pakudzanso ine, Mulungu wanga angandichepse pa inu, ndipo ndingalirire ambiri a iwo amene adachimwa kale, osalapa pa chodetsa, ndi chigololo, ndi kukhumba zonyansa zimene anachita." 
2Corinthians13:1 Nthawi yachitatu iyi ndilinkudza kwa inu. Pakamwa pa mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu maneno onse adzakhazikika. 
2Corinthians13:2 Ndinanena kale, ndipo ndinena ndisanafikeko, monga pamene ndinali pomwepo kachiwiri kaja, pokhala ine palibe, kwa iwo adachimwa kale ndi kwa onse otsala, kuti, ngati ndidzanso sindidzawaleka;" 
2Corinthians13:3 popeza mufuna chitsimikizo, cha Khristu wakulankhula mwa ine; amene safooka kwa inu, koma ali wamphamvu mwa inu;" 
2Corinthians13:4 pakuti anapachikidwa m'ufooko, koma ali ndi moyo mu mphamvu ya Mulungu. Pakuti ifenso tili ofooka mwa Iye, koma tidzakhala ndi moyo pamodzi ndi Iye, mu mphamvu ya Mulungu, ya kwa inu." 
2Corinthians13:5 Dziyeseni nokha, ngati muli m'chikhulupiriro, dzitsimikizeni nokha. Kapena simuzindikira kodi za inu nokha kuti Yesu Khristu ali mwa inu? Mukapanda kukhala osatsimikizidwa." 
2Corinthians13:6 Koma ndiyembekeza kuti mudzazindikira kuti sitili osatsimikizidwa. 
2Corinthians13:7 Ndipo tipemphera Mulungu kuti musachite kanthu koipa; sikuti ife tikaoneke ovomerezeka, koma kuti inu mukachite chabwino, tingakhale ife tikhala monga osatsimikizidwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Pakuti sitikhoza kanthu pokana choonadi, koma povomereza choonadi." 
2Corinthians13:9 Pakuti tikondwera, pamene ife tifooka ndi inu muli amphamvu; ichinso tipempherera, ndicho ungwiro wanu." 
2Corinthians13:10 Chifukwa cha ichi ndilembera izi pokhala palibe ine, kuti pokhala ndili pomwepo ndingachite mowawitsa, monga mwa ulamuliro umene Ambuye anandipatsa ine wakumangirira, ndipo si wakugwetsa." 
2Corinthians13:11 Chotsalira, abale, kondwerani. Muchitidwe angwiro; mutonthozedwe; khalani a mtima umodzi, khalani mumtendere; ndipo Mulungu wa chikondi ndi mtendere akhale pamodzi ndi inu." 
2Corinthians13:12 Mupatsane moni ndi chipsompsono chopatulika. 
2Corinthians13:13 Oyera mtima onse akupatsani moni. 
2Corinthians13:14 Chisomo cha Ambuye Yesu Khristu, ndi chikondi cha Mulungu, ndi chiyanjano cha Mzimu Woyera zikhale ndi inu nonse." 
Galatians1:1 Paulo, mtumwi (wosachokera kwa anthu, kapena mwa munthu, koma mwa Yesu Khristu, ndi Mulungu Atate, amene anamuukitsa Iye kwa akufa)," 
Galatians1:2 ndi abale onse amene ali pamodzi ndi ine, kwa Mipingo ya ku Galatiya:" 
Galatians1:3 Chisomo kwa inu, ndi mtendere wa kwa Mulungu Atate, ndi Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu," 
Galatians1:4 amene anadzipereka yekha chifukwa cha machimo athu, kuti akatilanditse ife m'nyengo ya pansi pano yino yoipa, monga mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu ndi Atate wathu;" 
Galatians1:5 yemweyo akhale nao ulemerero kunthawi za nthawi. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Ndizizwa kuti msanga motere mulikupatuka kwa iye amene anakuitanani m'chisomo cha Khristu, kutsata Uthenga Wabwino wina;" 
Galatians1:7 umene suli wina; koma pali ena akuvuta inu, nafuna kuipsa Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu." 
Galatians1:8 Koma ngakhale ife, kapena mngelo wochokera Kumwamba, ngati akakulalikireni Uthenga Wabwino wosati umene tidakulalikirani ife, akhale wotembereredwa." 
Galatians1:9 Monga tinanena kale, ndipo ndinenanso tsopano apa, ngati wina akulalikirani Uthenga Wabwino wosati umene mudaulandira, akhale wotembereredwa." 
Galatians1:10 Pakuti kodi ndikopa anthu tsopano, kapena Mulungu? Kapena kodi ndifuna kukondweretsa anthu? Ndikadakhala wokondweretsabe anthu, sindikadakhala kapolo wa Khristu." 
Galatians1:11 Pakuti ndikudziwitsani inu, abale, za Uthenga Wabwinowo wolalikidwa ndi ine, kuti suli monga mwa anthu." 
Galatians1:12 Pakutitu sindinaulandira kwa munthu, kapena sindinauphunzira, komatu unadza mwa vumbulutso la Yesu Khristu." 
Galatians1:13 Pakuti mudamva za makhalidwe anga kale mwa Chiyuda, kuti ndinalondalonda Mpingo wa Mulungu koposa, ndi kuupasula," 
Galatians1:14 ndipo ndinawaposa ndi kutsogola mwa Chiyuda ambiri a msinkhu wanga mwa mtundu wanga, ndipo ndinakhala wachangu koposa pa miyambo ya makolo anga." 
Galatians1:15 Koma pamene padakondweretsa Mulungu, amene anandipatula, ndisanabadwe, nandiitana ine mwa chisomo chake," 
Galatians1:16 kuti avumbulutse Mwana wake mwa ine, kuti ndimlalikire Iye mwa amitundu; pomwepo sindinafunsana ndi thupi ndi mwazi:" 
Galatians1:17 kapena kukwera kunka ku Yerusalemu sindinankako kwa iwo amene anakhala atumwi ndisanakhale mtumwi ine, komatu ndinamuka ku Arabiya, ndipo ndinabweranso ku Damasiko." 
Galatians1:18 Pamenepo patapita zaka zitatu, ndinakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu kukazindikirana naye Kefa, ndipo ndinakhala kwa iye masiku khumi ndi asanu." 
Galatians1:19 Koma wina wa atumwi sindinamuona, koma Yakobo mbale wa Ambuye." 
Galatians1:20 Ndipo izi ndikulemberani inu, taonani, pamaso pa Mulungu sindinama ine." 
Galatians1:21 Pamene ndinadza kumbali za Siriya ndi Silisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Koma ndinali wosadziwika nkhope yanga kwa Mipingo ya ku Yudeya ya mwa Khristu; 
Galatians1:23 koma analinkumva kokha, kuti, Iye wakutilondalonda ife kale, tsopano alalikira chikhulupirirocho adachipasula kale;" 
Galatians1:24 ndipo analemekeza Mulungu mwa ine. 
Galatians2:1 Pamenepo popita zaka khumi ndi zinai ndinakweranso kunka ku Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi Barnabasi, ndinamtenganso Tito andiperekeze." 
Galatians2:2 Koma ndinakwera kunkako movumbulutsa; ndipo ndinawauza Uthenga Wabwino umene ndiulalikira kwa amitundu; koma m'tseri kwa iwo omveka, kuti kapena ndingathamange, kapena ndikadathamanga chabe." 
Galatians2:3 Komatu ngakhale Tito, amene anali ndi ine, ndiye Mgriki, sanamkakamiza adulidwe;" 
Galatians2:4 ndicho chifukwa cha abale onyenga olowezedwa m'tseri, amene analowa m'tseri kudzazonda ufulu wathu umene tili nao mwa Khristu Yesu, kuti akatichititse ukapolo." 
Galatians2:5 Koma sitidawafumukira mowagonjera ngakhale ora limodzi; kuti choonadi cha Uthenga Wabwino chikhalebe ndi inu. 
Galatians2:6 Koma iwo akuyesedwa ali kanthu (ngati anali otani kale, kulibe kanthu kwa ine; Mulungu salandira nkhope ya munthu) iwo omvekawo sanandionjezera ine kanthu;" 
Galatians2:7 koma pena, pakuona kuti anaikiza kwa ine Uthenga Wabwino wa kusadulidwa, monga kwa Petro Uthenga Wabwino wa mdulidwe" 
Galatians2:8 (pakuti Iye wakuchita mwa Petro kumtuma kwa odulidwa anachitanso mwa ine kundituma kwa amitundu); 
Galatians2:9 ndipo pakuzindikira chisomocho chinapatsidwa kwa ine, Yakobo ndi Kefa ndi Yohane, amene anayesedwa mizati, anapatsa ine ndi Barnabasi dzanja lamanja la chiyanjano, kuti ife tipite kwa amitundu, ndi iwo kwa mdulidwe;" 
Galatians2:10 pokhapo kuti tikumbukire aumphawi; ndicho chomwe ndinafulumira kuchichita. 
Galatians2:11 Koma pamene Kefa anadza ku Antiokeya ndinatsutsana naye pamaso pake, pakuti anatsutsika wolakwa." 
Galatians2:12 Pakuti asanafike ena ochokera kwa Yakobo, anadya pamodzi ndi amitundu; koma atadza iwo, anadzibweza, ndi kudzipatula yekha, pakuopa iwo a ku mdulidwe." 
Galatians2:13 Ndipo Ayuda otsala anawagwiranso m'maso pamodzi naye; kotero kuti Barnabasinso anatengedwa ndi kugwira m'maso kwao. 
Galatians2:14 Komatu pamene ndinaona kuti sanalikuyenda koongoka, monga mwa choonadi cha Uthenga Wabwino, ndinati kwa Kefa pamaso pa onse, Ngati inu muli Myuda mutsata makhalidwe a amitundu, ndipo si a Ayuda, mukakamiza bwanji amitundu atsate makhalidwe a Ayuda?" 
Galatians2:15 Ife ndife Ayuda pachibadwidwe, ndipo sitili ochimwa a kwa amitundu;" 
Galatians2:16 koma podziwa kuti munthu sayesedwa wolungama pa ntchito ya lamulo, koma mwa chikhulupiriro cha Yesu Khristu, ifedi tinakhulupirira kwa Khristu Yesu, kuti tikayesedwe olungama ndi chikhulupiriro cha Khristu, ndipo si ndi ntchito za lamulo; pakuti palibe munthu adzayesedwa wolungama ndi ntchito za lamulo." 
Galatians2:17 Koma ngati ife, pofuna kuyesedwa olungama mwa Khristu, tipezedwanso tili ochimwa tokha, kodi Khristu ali mtumiki wa uchimo chifukwa chake? Msatero ai." 
Galatians2:18 Pakuti ngati izi zomwezi ndazigumula ndidzimanganso, ndidzitsimikizira ndekha ndili wolakwa." 
Galatians2:19 Pakuti ine mwa lamulo ndafa kulamulo, kuti ndikhale ndi moyo kwa Mulungu." 
Galatians2:20 Ndinapachikidwa ndi Khristu; koma ndili ndi moyo; wosatinso ine ai, koma Khristu ali ndi moyo mwa ine; koma moyo umene ndili nao tsopano m'thupi, ndili nao m'chikhulupiriro cha Mwana wa Mulungu, amene anandikonda, nadzipereka yekha chifukwa cha ine." 
Galatians2:21 Sindichiyesa chopanda pake chisomo cha Mulungu; pakuti ngati chilungamo chili mwa lamulo, Khristu adafa chabe." 
Galatians3:1 Agalatiya opusa inu, anakulodzani ndani, inu amene Yesu Khristu anaonetsedwa pa maso panu, wopachikidwa?" 
Galatians3:2 Ichi chokha ndifuna kuphunzira kwa inu, Kodi munalandira Mzimuyo ndi ntchito za lamulo, kapena ndi kumva kwa chikhulupiriro?" 
Galatians3:3 Kodi muli opusa otere? Popeza mudayamba ndi Mzimu, kodi tsopano mutsiriza ndi thupi?" 
Galatians3:4 Kodi mudamva zowawa zambiri zotere kwachabe? Ngatitu kwachabe. 
Galatians3:5 Ndipo iye amene akuonjezerani inu Mzimuyo, nachita zimphamvu mwa inu, atero kodi ndi ntchito za lamulo, kapena ndi kumva kwa chikhulupiriro?" 
Galatians3:6 Monga Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu, ndipo kunawerengedwa kwa iye chilungamo," 
Galatians3:7 chotero zindikirani kuti iwo a chikhulupiriro ndiwo ana a Abrahamu. 
Galatians3:8 Ndipo malembo, pakuoneratu kuti Mulungu adzayesa olungama amitundu ndi chikhulupiriro, anayamba kale kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino kwa Abrahamu, kuti, Idzadalitsidwa mwa iwe mitundu yonse." 
Galatians3:9 Kotero kuti iwo a chikhulupiriro adalitsidwa pamodzi ndi Abrahamu wokhulupirikayo. 
Galatians3:10 Pakuti onse amene atama ntchito za lamulo liwakhalira temberero; pakuti kwalembedwa, Wotembereredwa aliyense wosakhala m'zonse zolembedwa m'buku la chilamulo, kuzichita izi." 
Galatians3:11 Ndipo chidziwikatu kuti palibe munthu ayesedwa wolungama ndi lamulo pamaso pa Mulungu; pakuti, Wolungama adzakhala ndi moyo ndi chikhulupiriro;" 
Galatians3:12 koma chilamulo sichichokera kuchikhulupiriro; koma, Wakuzichita izi adzakhala ndi moyo ndi izi." 
Galatians3:13 Khristu anatiombola ku temberero la chilamulo, atakhala temberero m'malo mwathu; pakuti kwalembedwa, Wotembereredwa aliyense wopachikidwa pamtengo." 
Galatians3:14 Kuti dalitso la Abrahamu mwa Khristu Yesu, lichitike kwa amitundu; kuti tikalandire lonjezano la Mzimuyo, mwa chikhulupiriro." 
Galatians3:15 Abale, ndinena monga munthu. Pangano, lingakhale la munthu, litalunzika, palibe munthu aliyesa chabe, kapena kuonjezapo." 
Galatians3:16 Ndipo malonjezano ananenedwa kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbeu yake. Sanena, Ndipo kwa zimbeu, ngati kunena zambiri; komatu ngati kunena imodzi, Ndipo kwa mbeu yako, ndiye Khristu." 
Galatians3:17 Ndipo ichi ndinena: Lamulo, limene linafika zitapita zaka mazana anai mphambu makumi atatu, silifafaniza pangano lolunzika kale ndi Mulungu, kuliyesa lonjezanolo lachabe." 
Galatians3:18 Pakuti ngati kulowa nyumba kuchokera kulamulo, sikuchokeranso kulonjezano; koma kumeneku Mulungu anampatsa Abrahamu kwaufulu mwa lonjezano." 
Galatians3:19 Nanga chilamulo tsono? Chinaonjezeka chifukwa cha zolakwa, kufikira ikadza mbeu imene adailonjezera; ndipo chinakonzeka ndi angelo m'dzanja la nkhoswe." 
Galatians3:20 Koma nkhoswe siili ya mmodzi; koma Mulungu ali mmodzi. 
Galatians3:21 Pamenepo kodi chilamulo chitsutsana nao malonjezano a Mulungu? Msatero ai. Pakuti chikadapatsidwa chilamulo chakukhoza kuchitira moyo, chilungamo chikadachokera ndithu kulamulo." 
Galatians3:22 Komatu lembo linatsekereza zonse pansi pa uchimo, kuti lonjezano la kwa chikhulupiriro cha Yesu Khristu likapatsidwe kwa okhulupirirawo." 
Galatians3:23 Koma chisanadze chikhulupiriro tinasungidwa pomvera lamulo otsekedwa kufikira chikhulupiriro chimene chikavumbulutsidwa bwinobwino. 
Galatians3:24 Momwemo chilamulo chidakhala namkungwi wathu wakutifikitsa kwa Khristu, kuti tikayesedwe olungama ndi chikhulupiriro." 
Galatians3:25 Koma popeza chadza chikhulupiriro, sitikhalanso omvera namkungwi." 
Galatians3:26 Pakuti inu nonse muli ana a Mulungu, mwa chikhulupiriro cha mwa Khristu Yesu." 
Galatians3:27 Pakuti nonse amene munabatizidwa kwa Khristu mudavala Khristu. 
Galatians3:28 Muno mulibe Myuda, kapena Mgriki, muno mulibe kapolo, kapena mfulu, muno mulibe mwamuna ndi mkazi; pakuti muli nonse mmodzi mwa Khristu Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 Koma ngati muli a Khristu, muli mbeu ya Abrahamu, nyumba monga mwa lonjezano." 
Galatians4:1 Koma ndinena kuti, pokhala wolowa nyumba ali wakhanda, sasiyana ndi kapolo, angakhale ali mwini zonse;" 
Galatians4:2 komatu ali wakumvera omsungira ndi adindo, kufikira nthawi yoikika kale ndi atate wake." 
Galatians4:3 Koteronso ife, pamene tinali akhanda, tinali akapolo akumvera miyambo ya dziko lapansi;" 
Galatians4:4 koma pokwaniridwa nthawi, Mulungu anatuma Mwana wake, wobadwa ndi mkazi, wobadwa wakumvera lamulo," 
Galatians4:5 kuti akaombole iwo akumvera lamulo, kuti ife tikalandire umwana." 
Galatians4:6 Ndipo popeza muli ana, Mulungu anatumiza Mzimu wa Mwana wake alowe m'mitima yathu, wofuula Abba! Atate!" 
Galatians4:7 Kotero kuti sulinso kapolo, koma mwana; koma ngati mwana, wolowa nyumbanso mwa Mulungu." 
Galatians4:8 Komatu pajapo, posadziwa Mulungu inu, munachitira ukapolo iyo yosakhala milungu m'chibadwidwe chao;" 
Galatians4:9 koma tsopano, podziwa Mulungu inu, koma makamaka podziwika ndi Mulungu, mubwereranso bwanji kutsata miyambo yofooka ndi yaumphawi, imene mufuna kubwerezanso kuichitira ukapolo?" 
Galatians4:10 Musunga masiku, ndi miyezi, ndi nyengo, ndi zaka." 
Galatians4:11 Ndiopera inu, kuti kapena ndadzivutitsa ndi inu chabe." 
Galatians4:12 Abale, ndikupemphani, khalani monga ine, pakuti inenso ndili monga inu. Simunandichitira choipa ine;" 
Galatians4:13 koma mudziwa kuti m'kufooka kwa thupi ndinakulalikirani Uthenga Wabwino poyamba: 
Galatians4:14 ndipo chija cha m'thupi langa chakukuyesani inu simunachipeputsa, kapena sichinakunyansirani, komatu munandilandira ine monga mngelo wa Mulungu, monga Khristu Yesu mwini." 
Galatians4:15 Pamenepo thamo lanu lili kuti? Pakuti ndikuchitirani inu umboni, kuti, kukadatheka, mukadakolowola maso anu ndi kundipatsa ine." 
Galatians4:16 Kotero kodi ndasanduka mdani wanu, pakukunenerani zoona?" 
Galatians4:17 Achita changu pa inu koma si kokoma ai, komatu afuna kukutsekerezani inu kunja, kuti mukawachitire iwowa changu." 
Galatians4:18 Koma nkwabwino kuchita changu m'zabwino nthawi zonse, si pokhapokha pokhala nanu pamodzi ine." 
Galatians4:19 Tiana tanga, amene ndilikumvanso zowawa za kubala inu, kufikira Khristu aumbika mwa inu," 
Galatians4:20 koma mwenzi nditakhala nanu tsopano, ndi kusintha mau anga; chifukwa ndisinkhasinkha nanu." 
Galatians4:21 Ndiuzeni, inu akufuna kukhala omvera lamulo, kodi simukumva chilamulo?" 
Galatians4:22 Pakuti palembedwa, kuti Abrahamu anali nao ana amuna awiri, mmodzi wobadwa mwa mdzakazi, ndi mmodzi wobadwa mwa mfulu." 
Galatians4:23 Komatu uyo wa mdzakazi anabadwa monga mwa thupi; koma iye wa mfuluyo, anabadwa monga mwa lonjezano. Izo ndizo zophiphiritsa;" 
Galatians4:24 pakuti akaziwa ali mapangano awiri, mmodzi wa kuphiri la Sinai, akubalira ukapolo, ndiye Hagara." 
Galatians4:25 Koma Hagara ndiye phiri la Sinai, m'Arabiya, nafanana ndi Yerusalemu wa tsopano; pakuti ali muukapolo pamodzi ndi ana ake." 
Galatians4:26 Koma Yerusalemu wa kumwamba uli waufulu, ndiwo amai wathu." 
Galatians4:27 Pakuti kwalembedwa, Kondwera, chumba iwe wosabala; imba nthungululu, nufuule iwe wosamva kuwawa kwa kubala; pakuti ana ake a iye ali mbeta achuluka koposa ana a iye ali naye mwamuna." 
Galatians4:28 Koma ife, abale, monga Isaki, tili ana a lonjezano." 
Galatians4:29 Komatu monga pompaja iye wobadwa monga mwa thupi anazunza wobadwa monga mwa Mzimu, momwemonso tsopano." 
Galatians4:30 Koma lembo linena chiyani? Taya kubwalo mdzakazi ndi mwana wake, pakuti sadzalowa nyumba mwana wa mdzakazi pamodzi ndi mwana wa mfulu." 
Galatians4:31 Chifukwa chake, abale, sitili ana a mdzakazi, komatu a mfulu." 
Galatians5:1 Khristu anatisandutsa mfulu, kuti tikhale mfulu; chifukwa chake chilimikani, musakodwenso ndi goli la ukapolo." 
Galatians5:2 Taonani, ine Paulo ndinena ndi inu, kuti, ngati mulola akuduleni, Khristu simudzapindula naye kanthu." 
Galatians5:3 Ndichitanso umboni kwa munthu yense wolola amdule, kuti ali wamangawa kuchita chilamulo chonse." 
Galatians5:4 Mulibe kanthu ndi Khristu, inu amene muyesedwa olungama ndi lamulo; mudagwa posiyana nacho chisomo." 
Galatians5:5 Pakuti ife mwa Mzimu, kuchokera m'chikhulupiriro, tilindira chiyembekezo cha chilungamo." 
Galatians5:6 Pakuti mwa Khristu Yesu kapena mdulidwe kapena kusadulidwa kulibe mphamvu; komatu chikhulupiriro, chakuchititsa mwa chikondi." 
Galatians5:7 Munathamanga bwino; anakuletsani ndani kuti musamvere choonadi? 
Galatians5:8 Kukopa kumene sikuchokera kwa Iye anakuitanani. 
Galatians5:9 Chotupitsa pang'ono chitupitsa mtanda wonse. 
Galatians5:10 Ine ndikhulupirira inu mwa Ambuye, kuti simudzakhala nao mtima wina; koma iye wakuvuta inu, angakhale ali yani, adzasenza chitsutso chake." 
Galatians5:11 Koma ine, abale, ngati ndilalikiranso mdulidwe, ndizunzikanso bwanji? Pamenepo chikhumudwitso cha mtanda chidatha." 
Galatians5:12 Mwenzi atadzidula, iwo akugwedezetsani inu." 
Galatians5:13 Pakuti adakuitanani inu, abale, mukhale mfulu; chokhacho musachite nao ufulu wanu chothandizira thupi, komatu mwachikondi chitiranani ukapolo." 
Galatians5:14 Pakuti mau amodzi akwaniritsa chilamulo chonse ndiwo; Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda iwe mwini. 
Galatians5:15 Koma ngati mulumana ndi kudyana, chenjerani mungaonongane." 
Galatians5:16 Koma ndinena, Muyendeyende ndi Mzimu, ndipo musafitse chilakolako cha thupi." 
Galatians5:17 Pakuti thupi lilakalaka potsutsana naye Mzimu, ndi Mzimu potsutsana nalo thupi; pakuti izi sizilingana; kuti zimene muzifuna musazichite." 
Galatians5:18 Ngati Mzimu akutsogolerani, simuli omvera lamulo." 
Galatians5:19 Ndipo ntchito za thupi zionekera, ndizo dama, chodetsa, kukhumba zonyansa," 
Galatians5:20 kupembedza mafano, nyanga, madano, ndeu, kaduka, zopsa mtima, zotetana, magawano, mipatuko," 
Galatians5:21 njiru, kuledzera, mchezo, ndi zina zotere; zimene ndikuchenjezani nazo, monga ndachita, kuti iwo akuchitachita zotere sadzalowa Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Galatians5:22 Koma chipatso cha Mzimu ndicho chikondi, chimwemwe, mtendere, kuleza mtima, chifundo, kukoma mtima, chikhulupiriro," 
Galatians5:23 chifatso, chiletso; pokana zimenezi palibe lamulo." 
Galatians5:24 Koma iwo a Khristu Yesu adapachika thupi, ndi zokhumba zake, ndi zilakolako zake." 
Galatians5:25 Ngati tili ndi moyo ndi Mzimu, ndi Mzimunso tiyende." 
Galatians5:26 Tisakhale odzikuza, outsana, akuchitirana njiru." 
Galatians6:1 Abale, ngatinso munthu agwidwa nako kulakwa kwakuti, inu auzimu, mubweze wotereyo mu mzimu wa chifatso; ndi kudzipenyerera wekha, ungayesedwe nawenso." 
Galatians6:2 Nyamuliranani zothodwetsa, ndipo kotero mufitse chilamulo cha Khristu." 
Galatians6:3 Pakuti ngati wina ayesa ali kanthu pokhala ali chabe, adzinyenga yekha." 
Galatians6:4 Koma yense ayesere ntchito yake ya iye yekha, ndipo pamenepo adzakhala nako kudzitamandira chifukwa cha iye yekha, si chifukwa cha wina." 
Galatians6:5 Pakuti yense adzasenza katundu wake wa iye mwini. 
Galatians6:6 Koma iye amene aphunzira mau, ayenera kuchereza womphunzitsayo m'zonse zabwino." 
Galatians6:7 Musanyengedwe; Mulungu sanyozeka; pakuti chimene munthu achifesa, chimenenso adzachituta." 
Galatians6:8 Pakuti wakufesera kwa thupi la iye yekha, chochokera m'thupi adzatuta chivundi; koma wakufesera kwa Mzimu, chochokera mu Mzimu adzatuta moyo wosatha." 
Galatians6:9 Koma tisaleme pakuchita zabwino; pakuti pa nyengo yake tidzatuta tikapanda kufooka. 
Galatians6:10 Chifukwa chake, monga tili nayo nyengo, tichitire onse chokoma, koma makamaka iwo a pa banja la chikhulupiriro." 
Galatians6:11 Taonani, malembedwe akuluwo ndakulemberani inu ndi dzanja langa la ine mwini." 
Galatians6:12 Onse amene afuna kuonekera okoma m'thupi, iwowa akukakamizani inu mudulidwe; chokhacho, chakuti angazunzike chifukwa cha mtanda wa Khristu." 
Galatians6:13 Pakuti angakhale iwo omwe odulidwa sasunga lamulo; komatu afuna inu mudulidwe, kuti akadzitamandire m'thupi lanu." 
Galatians6:14 Koma kudzitamandira ine konsekonse, iai, koma mu mtanda wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, amene mwa Iye dziko lapansi lapachikidwira ine, ndi ine ndapachikidwira dziko lapansi." 
Galatians6:15 Pakuti mdulidwe ulibe kanthu, kusadulidwa kulibe kanthunso, komatu wolengedwa watsopano." 
Galatians6:16 Ndipo onse amene atsatsa chilangizo ichi, mtendere ndi chifundo zikhale pa iwo, ndi pa Israele wa Mulungu." 
Galatians6:17 Kuyambira tsopano palibe munthu andivute, pakuti ndili nayo ine m'thupi mwanga mikwingwirima ya Yesu." 
Galatians6:18 Chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi mzimu wanu, abale. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Paulo, mtumwi wa Khristu Yesu, mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu, kwa oyera mtima amene ali m'Efeso, ndi kwa iwo okhulupirika mwa Khristu Yesu:" 
Ephesians1:2 Chisomo kwa inu, ndi mtendere wochokera kwa Mulungu Atate wathu, ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu." 
Ephesians1:3 Wolemekezeka Mulungu ndi Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, amene anatidalitsa ife ndi dalitso lonse la mzimu m'zakumwamba mwa Khristu;" 
Ephesians1:4 monga anatisankha ife mwa Iye, lisanakhazikike dziko lapansi, tikhale ife oyera mtima, ndi opanda chilema pamaso pake m'chikondi." 
Ephesians1:5 Anatikonzeratu tilandiridwe ngati ana a Iye yekha mwa Yesu Khristu, monga umo kunakomera chifuniro chake," 
Ephesians1:6 kuti uyamikidwe ulemerero wa chisomo chake, chimene anatichitira ife kwaufulu mwa Wokondedwayo." 
Ephesians1:7 Tili ndi maomboledwe mwa mwazi wake, chikhululukiro cha zochimwa, monga mwa kulemera kwa chisomo chake," 
Ephesians1:8 chimene anatichulukitsira ife m'nzeru zonse, ndi chisamaliro." 
Ephesians1:9 Anatizindikiritsa ife chinsinsi cha chifuniro chake, monga kunamkomera ndi monga anatsimikiza mtima kale mwa Iye," 
Ephesians1:10 kuti pa makonzedwe a makwaniridwe a nyengozo, akasonkhanitse pamodzi zonse mwa Khristu, za kumwamba, ndi za padziko." 
Ephesians1:11 Mwa Iye tinayesedwa cholowa chake, popeza tinakonzekeratu monga mwa chitsimikizo mtima cha Iye wakuchita zonse monga mwa uphungu wa chifuniro chake;" 
Ephesians1:12 kuti ife amene tinakhulupirira Khristu kale tikayamikitse ulemerero wake. 
Ephesians1:13 Mwa Iyeyo inunso, mutamva mau a choonadi, Uthenga Wabwino wa chipulumutso chanu, ndi kumkhulupirira Iye, munasindikizidwa chizindikiro ndi Mzimu Woyera wa lonjezano," 
Ephesians1:14 ndiye chikole cha cholowa chathu, kuti akeake akaomboledwe, ndi kuti ulemerero wake uyamikike." 
Ephesians1:15 Mwa ichi inenso, m'mene ndamva za chikhulupiriro cha mwa Ambuye Yesu chili mwa inu ndi chikondi chanu, chimenenso mufikitsira oyera mtima onse," 
Ephesians1:16 sindileka kuyamika chifukwa cha inu, ndi kukumbukira inu m'mapemphero anga;" 
Ephesians1:17 kuti Mulungu wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, Atate wa ulemerero, akupatseni inu mzimu wa nzeru, ndi wa vumbulutso kuti mukamzindikire Iye;" 
Ephesians1:18 ndiko kunena kuti maso a mitima yanu awalitsike, kuti mukadziwe inu chiyembekezo cha kuitana kwake nchiyani; chiyaninso chuma cha ulemerero wa cholowa chake mwa oyera mtima," 
Ephesians1:19 ndi chiyani ukulu woposa wa mphamvu yake ya kwa ife okhulupirira, monga mwa machitidwe a mphamvu yake yolimba," 
Ephesians1:20 imene anachititsa mwa Khristu, m'mene anamuukitsa kwa akufa, namkhazikitsa pa dzanja lake lamanja m'zakumwamba," 
Ephesians1:21 pamwamba pa ukulu wonse, ndi ulamuliro, ndi mphamvu, ndi ufumu, ndi dzina lililonse lotchedwa, si m'nyengo yino ya pansi pano yokha, komanso mwa iyo ikudza;" 
Ephesians1:22 ndipo anakonza zonse pansi pa mapazi ake, nampatsa Iye akhale mutu pamtu pa zonse, kwa Mpingo" 
Ephesians1:23 amene ali thupi lake, mdzazidwe wa Iye amene adzaza zonse m'zonse." 
Ephesians2:1 Ndipo inu, anakupatsani moyo, pokhala munali akufa ndi zolakwa, ndi zochimwa zanu," 
Ephesians2:2 zimene munayendamo kale, monga mwa mayendedwe a dziko lapansi lino, monga mwa mkulu wa ulamuliro wa mlengalenga, wa mzimu wakuchita tsopano mwa ana a kusamvera;" 
Ephesians2:3 amene ife tonsenso tinagonera pakati pao kale, m'zilakolako za thupi lathu, ndi kuchita zifuniro za thupi, ndi za maganizo, ndipo tinali ana a mkwiyo chibadwire, monganso otsalawo;" 
Ephesians2:4 koma Mulungu, wolemera chifundo, chifukwa cha chikondi chake chachikulu chimene anatikonda nacho," 
Ephesians2:5 tingakhale tinali akufa m'zolakwa zathu, anatipatsa moyo pamodzi ndi Khristu (muli opulumutsidwa ndi chisomo)," 
Ephesians2:6 ndipo anatiukitsa pamodzi, natikhazikitsa pamodzi m'zakumwamba mwa Khristu Yesu;" 
Ephesians2:7 kuti akaonetsere m'nthawi zilinkudza chuma choposa cha chisomo chake, m'kukoma mtima kwa pa ife mwa Khristu Yesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Pakuti muli opulumutsidwa ndi chisomo chakuchita mwa chikhulupiriro, ndipo ichi chosachokera kwa inu: chili mphatso ya Mulungu;" 
Ephesians2:9 chosachokera kuntchito, kuti asadzitamandire munthu aliyense." 
Ephesians2:10 Pakuti ife ndife chipango chake, olengedwa mwa Khristu Yesu, kuchita ntchito zabwino, zimene Mulungu anazipangiratu, kuti tikayende m'menemo." 
Ephesians2:11 Momwemo kumbukirani, kuti kale inu amitundu m'thupi, otchedwa kusadulidwa ndi iwo otchedwa mdulidwe m'thupi, umene udachitika ndi manja;" 
Ephesians2:12 kuti nthawi ija munali opanda Khristu, alendo a padera ndi mbumba ya Israele, ndi alendo alibe kanthu ndi mapangano a malonjezano, opanda chiyembekezo, ndi opanda Mulungu m'dziko lapansi." 
Ephesians2:13 Koma tsopano mwa Khristu Yesu inu amene munali kutali kale, anakusendezani mukhale pafupi m'mwazi wa Khristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Pakuti Iye ndiye mtendere wathu, amene anachita kuti onse awiri akhale mmodzi, nagumula khoma lakudulitsa pakati," 
Ephesians2:15 atachotsa udani m'thupi lake, ndiwo mau a chilamulo cha kutchulako malangizo; kuti alenge awiriwa mwa Iye yekha, akhale munthu mmodzi watsopano, ndi kuchitapo mtendere;" 
Ephesians2:16 ndi kuti akayanjanitse awiriwa ndi Mulungu, m'thupi limodzi mwa mtandawo, atapha nao udaniwo;" 
Ephesians2:17 ndipo m'mene anadza, analalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa mtendere kwa inu akutali, ndi mtendere kwa iwo apafupi;" 
Ephesians2:18 kuti mwa Iye ife tonse awiri tili nao malowedwe athu kwa Atate, mwa Mzimu mmodzi." 
Ephesians2:19 Pamenepo ndipo simulinso alendo ndi ogonera, komatu muli a mudzi womwewo wa oyera mtima ndi a banja la Mulungu;" 
Ephesians2:20 omangika pa maziko a atumwi ndi aneneri, pali Khristu Yesu mwini, mwala wa pangodya;" 
Ephesians2:21 mwa Iye chimango chonse cholumikizika pamodzi bwino, chikula, chikhale Kachisi wopatulika mwa Ambuye;" 
Ephesians2:22 chimene inunso mumangidwamo pamodzi, mukhale chokhalamo Mulungu mwa Mzimu." 
Ephesians3:1 Chifukwa cha ichi ine Paulo, ndine wandende wa Khristu Yesu chifukwa cha inu amitundu," 
Ephesians3:2 ngatitu munamva za udindo wa chisomo cha Mulungu chimene anandipatsa ine cha kwa inu; 
Ephesians3:3 ndi umo anandizindikiritsa chinsinsicho mwa vumbulutso, monga ndinalemba kale mwachidule," 
Ephesians3:4 chimene mukhoza kuzindikira nacho, pakuchiwerenga, chidziwitso changa m'chinsinsi cha Khristu," 
Ephesians3:5 chimene sanachizindikiritsa ana a anthu m'mibadwo ina, monga anachivumbulutsa tsopano kwa atumwi ndi aneneri ake oyera mwa Mzimu," 
Ephesians3:6 kuti amitundu ali olowa nyumba pamodzi ndi ife, ndi ziwalo zinzathu za thupilo, ndi olandira nafe pamodzi palonjezano mwa Khristu Yesu, mwa Uthenga Wabwino," 
Ephesians3:7 umene anandikhalitsa mtumiki wake monga mwa mphatso ya chisomo cha Mulungu, chimene anandipatsa ine, monga mwa machitidwe a mphamvu yake." 
Ephesians3:8 Kwa ine wochepa ndi wochepetsa wa onse oyera mtima anandipatsa chisomo ichi ndilalikire kwa amitundu chuma chosalondoleka cha Khristu; 
Ephesians3:9 ndi kuwalitsira onse adziwe makonzedwe a chinsinsicho, chimene chinabisika kuyambira kalekale mwa Mulungu wolenga zonse;" 
Ephesians3:10 kuti mu Mpingo azindikiritse tsopano kwa akulu ndi maulamuliro m'zakumwamba nzeru ya mitundumitundu ya Mulungu," 
Ephesians3:11 monga mwa chitsimikizo mtima cha nthawi za nthawi, chimene anachita mwa Khristu Yesu Ambuye wathu:" 
Ephesians3:12 amene tili naye chokhazikika mtima ndi chiyandiko cholimbika, mwa chikhulupiriro cha pa Iye." 
Ephesians3:13 Mwa ichi ndipempha kuti musade mtima m'zisautso zanga chifukwa cha inu, ndiwo ulemerero wanu." 
Ephesians3:14 Chifukwa cha ichi ndipinda maondo anga kwa Atate," 
Ephesians3:15 amene kuchokera kwa Iye fuko lonse la m'mwamba ndi la padziko alitcha dzina," 
Ephesians3:16 kuti monga mwa chuma cha ulemerero wake akulimbikitseni inu ndi mphamvu mwa Mzimu wake, m'kati mwanu," 
Ephesians3:17 kuti Khristu akhale chikhalire mwa chikhulupiriro m'mitima yanu; kuti, ozika mizu ndi otsendereka m'chikondi," 
Ephesians3:18 mukakhozetu kuzindikira pamodzi ndi oyera mtima onse, kupingasa, ndi utali, ndi kukwera," 
Ephesians3:19 ndi kuzama nchiyani; ndi kuzindikira chikondi cha Khristu, chakuposa mazindikiridwe, kuti mukadzazidwe kufikira chidzalo chonse cha Mulungu." 
Ephesians3:20 Ndipo kwa Iye amene angathe kuchita koposaposatu zonse zimene tizipempha, kapena tiziganiza, monga mwa mphamvu ya kuchita mwa ife," 
Ephesians3:21 kwa Iye ukhale ulemerero mu Mpingo ndi mwa Khristu Yesu, kufikira mibadwo yonse ya nthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Ndikudandaulirani inu tsono, ine wandende mwa Ambuye, muyende koyenera maitanidwe amene munaitanidwa nao," 
Ephesians4:2 ndi kuonetsera kudzichepetsa konse, ndi chifatso, ndi kuonetsera chipiriro, ndi kulolerana wina ndi mnzake, mwa chikondi;" 
Ephesians4:3 ndi kusamalitsa kusunga umodzi wa Mzimu mwa chimangiriro cha mtendere. 
Ephesians4:4 Thupi limodzi ndi Mzimu mmodzi, monganso anakuitanani m'chiyembekezo chimodzi cha maitanidwe anu;" 
Ephesians4:5 Ambuye mmodzi, chikhulupiriro chimodzi, ubatizo umodzi," 
Ephesians4:6 Mulungu mmodzi ndi Atate wa onse amene ali pamwamba pa onse, ndi mwa onse, ndi m'kati mwa zonse." 
Ephesians4:7 Ndipo kwa yense wa ife chapatsika chisomo, monga mwa muyeso wa mphatso ya Khristu." 
Ephesians4:8 Chifukwa chake anena, M'mene anakwera kumwamba, anamanga ndende undende, naninkha zaufulu kwa anthu." 
Ephesians4:9 Koma ichi, chakuti, Anakwera, nchiyani nanga koma kuti anatsikiranso ku madera a kunsi kwa dziko?" 
Ephesians4:10 Iye wotsikayo ndiye yemweyonso anakwera, popitiriratu miyamba yonse, kuti akadzaze zinthu zonse." 
Ephesians4:11 Ndipo Iye anapatsa ena akhale atumwi; ndi ena aneneri; ndi ena alaliki; ndi ena abusa, ndi ena aphunzitsi;" 
Ephesians4:12 kuti akonzere oyera mtima kuntchito ya utumiki, kumangirira thupi la Khristu;" 
Ephesians4:13 kufikira ife tonse tikafikira ku umodzi wa chikhulupiriro, ndi wa chizindikiritso cha Mwana wa Mulungu, kwa munthu wangwiro, ku muyeso wa msinkhu wa chidzalo cha Khristu." 
Ephesians4:14 Kuti tisakhalenso makanda, ogwedezekagwedezeka, natengekatengeka ndi mphepo yonse ya chiphunzitso, ndi tsenga la anthu, ndi kuchenjerera kukatsata chinyengo cha kusocheretsa;" 
Ephesians4:15 koma ndi kuchita zoona mwa chikondi tikakule m'zinthu zonse, kufikira Iye amene ali mutu ndiye Khristu;" 
Ephesians4:16 kuchokera mwa Iye thupi lonse, lolukidwa ndi lolumikizidwa pamodzi, pothandizanapo mfundo yonse, monga mwa kuchititsa kwa chiwalo chonse pa muyeso wake, lichita makulidwe a thupi, kufikira chimango chake mwa chikondi." 
Ephesians4:17 Pamenepo ndinena ichi, ndipo ndichita umboni mwa Ambuye, kuti simuyendanso inu monganso amitundu angoyenda, m'chitsiru cha mtima wao," 
Ephesians4:18 odetsedwa m'nzeru zao, oyesedwa alendo pa moyo wa Mulungu, chifukwa cha chipulukiro chili mwa iwo, chifukwa cha kuumitsa kwa mitima yao;" 
Ephesians4:19 amenewo popeza sazindikiranso kanthu konse, anadzipereka okha kuti akhumbe zonyansa, kuti achite chidetso chonse mu umbombo." 
Ephesians4:20 Koma inu simunaphunzira Khristu chotero," 
Ephesians4:21 ngatitu mudamva Iye, ndipo munaphunzitsidwa mwa Iye, monga choonadi chili mwa Yesu;" 
Ephesians4:22 kuti muvule, kunena za makhalidwe anu oyamba, munthu wakale, wovunda potsata zilakolako za chinyengo;" 
Ephesians4:23 koma kuti mukonzeke, mukhale atsopano mu mzimu wa mtima wanu," 
Ephesians4:24 nimuvale munthu watsopano, amene analengedwa monga mwa Mulungu, m'chilungamo, ndi m'chiyero cha choonadi." 
Ephesians4:25 Mwa ichi, mutataya zonama, lankhulani zoona yense ndi mnzake; pakuti tili ziwalo wina ndi mnzake." 
Ephesians4:26 Kwiyani, koma musachimwe; dzuwa lisalowe muli chikwiyire," 
Ephesians4:27 ndiponso musampatse malo mdierekezi. 
Ephesians4:28 Wakubayo asabenso; koma makamaka agwiritse ntchito, nagwire ntchito yokoma ndi manja ake, kuti akhale nacho chakuchereza wosowa." 
Ephesians4:29 Nkhani yonse yovunda isatuluke m'kamwa mwanu, koma ngati pali ina yabwino kukumangirira monga mofunika ndiyo, kuti ipatse chisomo kwa iwo akumva." 
Ephesians4:30 Ndipo musamvetse chisoni Mzimu Woyera wa Mulungu, amene munasindikizidwa chizindikiro mwa Iye, kufikira tsiku la maomboledwe." 
Ephesians4:31 Chiwawo chonse, ndi kupsa mtima, ndi mkwiyo, ndi chiwawa, ndi mwano zichotsedwe kwa inu, ndiponso choipa chonse." 
Ephesians4:32 Koma mukhalirane okoma wina ndi mnzake, a mtima wachifundo, akukhululukirana nokha, monganso Mulungu mwa Khristu anakhululukira inu." 
Ephesians5:1 Chifukwa chake khalani akutsanza a Mulungu, monga ana okondedwa;" 
Ephesians5:2 ndipo yendani m'chikondi monganso Khristu anakukondani inu, nadzipereka yekha m'malo mwathu, chopereka ndi nsembe kwa Mulungu, ikhale fungo lonunkhira bwino." 
Ephesians5:3 Koma dama ndi chidetso chonse, kapena chisiriro, zisatchulidwe ndi kutchulidwa komwe mwa inu, monga kuyenera oyera mtima;" 
Ephesians5:4 kapena chinyanso, ndi kulankhula zopanda pake, kapena zopusa zimene siziyenera; koma makamaka chiyamiko." 
Ephesians5:5 Pakuti ichi muchidziwe kuti wadama yense, kapena wachidetso, kapena wosirira, amene apembedza mafano, alibe cholowa m'ufumu wa Khristu ndi Mulungu." 
Ephesians5:6 Asakunyengeni inu munthu ndi mau opanda pake, pakuti chifukwa cha izi umadza mkwiyo wa Mulungu pa ana a kusamvera." 
Ephesians5:7 Chifukwa chake musakhale olandirana nao; 
Ephesians5:8 pakuti kale munali mdima, koma tsopano muli kuunika mwa Ambuye; yendani monga ana a kuunika," 
Ephesians5:9 pakuti chipatso cha kuunika tichipeza m'ubwino wonse, ndi chilungamo, ndi choonadi," 
Ephesians5:10 kuyesera chokondweretsa Ambuye nchiyani; 
Ephesians5:11 ndipo musayanjane nazo ntchito za mdima zosabala kanthu, koma makamakanso muzitsutse;" 
Ephesians5:12 pakuti zochitidwa nao m'tseri, kungakhale kuzinena kuchititsa manyazi." 
Ephesians5:13 Koma zinthu zonse potsutsika ndi kuunika, zionekera; pakuti chonse chakuonetsa chili kuunika." 
Ephesians5:14 Mwa ichi anena, Khala maso wogona iwe, nuuke kwa akufa, ndipo Khristu adzawala pa iwe." 
Ephesians5:15 Potero, penyani bwino umo muyendera, si monga opanda nzeru, koma monga anzeru;" 
Ephesians5:16 akuchita machawi, popeza masiku ali oipa." 
Ephesians5:17 Chifukwa chake musakhale opusa, koma dziwitsani chifuniro cha Ambuye nchiyani." 
Ephesians5:18 Ndipo musaledzere naye vinyo, m'mene muli chitayiko; komatu mudzale naye Mzimu," 
Ephesians5:19 ndi kudzilankhulira nokha ndi masalmo, ndi mayamiko, ndi nyimbo zauzimu, kuimbira ndi kuimba m'malimba Ambuye mumtima mwanu;" 
Ephesians5:20 ndi kuyamika Mulungu Atate masiku onse, chifukwa cha zonse, m'dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu;" 
Ephesians5:21 ndi kumverana wina ndi mnzake m'kuopa Khristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Akazi inu, mverani amuna anu a inu eni, monga kumvera Ambuye." 
Ephesians5:23 Pakuti mwamuna ndiye mutu wa mkazi, monganso Khristu ndiye mutu wa Mpingo, ali yekha Mpulumutsi wa thupilo." 
Ephesians5:24 Komatu monga Mpingo amvera Khristu, koteronso akazi amvere amuna ao m'zinthu zonse." 
Ephesians5:25 Amuna inu, kondani akazi anu, monganso Khristu anakonda Mpingo, nadzipereka yekha m'malo mwake;" 
Ephesians5:26 kuti akampatule, atamyeretsa ndi kumsambitsa madzi ndi mau;" 
Ephesians5:27 kuti Iye akadziikire yekha Mpingo wa ulemerero, wopanda banga, kapena khwinya, kapena kanthu kotere; komatu kuti akhale woyera, ndi wopanda chilema." 
Ephesians5:28 Koteronso amuna azikonda akazi ao a iwo okha monga ngati matupi a iwo okha. Wokonda mkazi wa iye yekha, adzikonda yekha;" 
Ephesians5:29 pakuti munthu sanadana nalo thupi lake ndi kale lonse; komatu alilera nalisunga, monganso Khristu Mpingo;" 
Ephesians5:30 pakuti tili ziwalo za thupi lake. 
Ephesians5:31 Chifukwa cha ichi munthu azisiya atate ndi amai, nadzaphatikizana ndi mkazi wake; ndipo iwo awiri adzakhala thupi limodzi." 
Ephesians5:32 Chinsinsi ichi nchachikulu; koma ndinena ine za Khristu ndi Mpingo. 
Ephesians5:33 Komanso inu, yense pa yekha, yense akonde mkazi wake wa iye yekha, monga adzikonda yekha; ndipo mkaziyo akumbukire kuti aziopa mwamuna." 
Ephesians6:1 Ananu, mverani akukubalani mwa Ambuye, pakuti ichi nchabwino." 
Ephesians6:2 Lemekeza atate wako ndi amai ako (ndilo lamulo loyamba lokhala nalo lonjezano)," 
Ephesians6:3 kuti kukhale bwino ndi iwe, ndi kuti ukhale wa nthawi yaikulu padziko." 
Ephesians6:4 Ndipo atate inu, musakwiyitse ana anu; komatu muwalere iwo m'maleredwe ndi chilangizo cha Ambuye." 
Ephesians6:5 Akapolo inu, mverani iwo amene ali ambuye anu monga mwa thupi, ndi kuwaopa ndi kunthunthumira nao, ndi mtima wanu wosakumbukira kanthu kena, monga kwa Khristu;" 
Ephesians6:6 si monga mwa ukapolo wa pamaso, monga okondweretsa anthu, komatu monga akapolo a Khristu, akuchita chifuniro cha Mulungu chochokera kumtima;" 
Ephesians6:7 akuchita ukapolo ndi kuvomereza mtima, monga kutumikira Ambuye Yesu Khristu, si anthu ai;" 
Ephesians6:8 podziwa kuti chinthu chokoma chilichonse yense achichita, adzambwezera chomwechi Ambuye, angakhale ali kapolo kapena mfulu." 
Ephesians6:9 Ndipo, ambuye, inu, muwachitire zomwezo iwowa, nimuleke kuwaopsa; podziwa kuti Ambuye wao ndi wanu ali m'Mwamba, ndipo palibe tsankho kwa Iye." 
Ephesians6:10 Chotsalira, tadzilimbikani mwa Ambuye, ndi m'kulimba kwa mphamvu yake." 
Ephesians6:11 Tavalani zida zonse za Mulungu, kuti mudzakhoze kuchilimika pokana machenjerero a mdierekezi." 
Ephesians6:12 Chifukwa kuti kulimbana kwathu sitilimbana nao mwazi ndi thupi, komatu nao maukulu, ndi maulamuliro, ndi akuchita zolimbika a dziko lapansi a mdima uno, ndi auzimu a choipa m'zakumwamba." 
Ephesians6:13 Mwa ichi mudzitengere zida zonse za Mulungu, kuti mudzakhoza kuima chitsutsire pofika tsiku loipa, ndipo, mutachita zonse, mudzachilimika." 
Ephesians6:14 Chifukwa chake chilimikani, mutadzimangira m'chuuno mwanu ndi choonadi, mutavalanso chapachifuwa cha chilungamo;" 
Ephesians6:15 ndipo mutadziveka mapazi anu ndi makonzedwe a Uthenga Wabwino wa mtendere; 
Ephesians6:16 koposa zonse mutadzitengeranso chikopa cha chikhulupiriro, chimene mudzakhoza kuzima nacho mivi yonse yoyaka moto ya woipayo." 
Ephesians6:17 Mutengenso chisoti cha chipulumutso, ndi lupanga la Mzimu, ndilo Mau a Mulungu;" 
Ephesians6:18 mwa pemphero lonse ndi pembedzero mupemphere nthawi yonse mwa Mzimu, ndipo pochezera pamenepo chichezerere ndi kupembedzera oyera mtima onse," 
Ephesians6:19 ndi ine ndemwe, kuti andipatse mau m'kunditsegulira m'kamwa molimbika, kuti ndizindikiritse anthu chinsinsicho cha Uthenga Wabwino," 
Ephesians6:20 chifukwa cha umene ndili mtumiki wa m'unyolo, kuti m'menemo ndikalankhule molimbika, monga ndiyenera kulankhula." 
Ephesians6:21 Koma kuti mukadziwe inunso za kwa ine, zimene ndichita, zinthu zonse adzakuzindikiritsani Tikiko mbale wokondedwayo, ndi mtumiki wokhulupirika mwa Ambuye;" 
Ephesians6:22 amene ndamtuma kwa inu chifukwa cha ichicho, kuti mukazindikire za kwa ife, ndi kuti akatonthoze mitima yanu." 
Ephesians6:23 Mtendere ukhale kwa abale, ndi chikondi, pamodzi ndi chikhulupiriro, zochokera kwa Mulungu Atate, ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Akhale nacho chisomo onse akukonda Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu m'chosaonongeka. 
Philippians1:1 Paulo ndi Timoteo, akapolo a Yesu Khristu, kwa oyera mtima onse mwa Khristu Yesu, akukhala ku Filipi, pamodzi ndi oyang'anira ndi atumiki:" 
Philippians1:2 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu. 
Philippians1:3 Ndiyamika Mulungu wanga pokumbukira inu ponse; 
Philippians1:4 nthawi zonse m'pembedzero langa lonse la kwa inu nonse ndichita pembedzerolo ndi kukondwera," 
Philippians1:5 chifukwa cha chiyanjano chanu chakuthandizira Uthenga Wabwino, kuyambira tsiku loyambalo, kufikira tsopano lino;" 
Philippians1:6 pokhulupirira pamenepo, kuti Iye amene anayamba mwa inu ntchito yabwino, adzaitsiriza kufikira tsiku la Yesu Khristu;" 
Philippians1:7 monga kundiyenera ine kuyesa za inu nonse, popeza ndili nako m'mtima mwanga, kuti inu m'zomangira zanga, ndipo m'chodzikanira, ndi matsimikizidwe a Uthenga Wabwino, inu nonse muli oyanjana nane m'chisomo." 
Philippians1:8 Pakuti Mulungu ali mboni yanga, kuti ndilakalaka inu nonse m'phamphu la mwa Khristu Yesu." 
Philippians1:9 Ndipo ichi ndipempha, kuti chikondi chanu chisefukire chionjezere, m'chidziwitso, ndi kuzindikira konse;" 
Philippians1:10 kuti mukayese inu zinthu zosiyana; kuti mukakhale a mtima woona ndi wosalakwa, kufikira tsiku la Khristu;" 
Philippians1:11 odzala nacho chipatso cha chilungamo, chimene chili mwa Yesu Khristu, kuchitira Mulungu ulemerero ndi chiyamiko." 
Philippians1:12 Koma abale, ndifuna kuti muzindikire kuti zija za kwa ine zidachita makamaka kuthandizira Uthenga Wabwino;" 
Philippians1:13 kotero kuti zomangira zanga zinaonekera mwa Khristu m'bwalo lonse la alonda, ndi kwa onse ena;" 
Philippians1:14 ndi kuti unyinji wa abale mwa Ambuye, pokhulupirira m'zomangira zanga, alimbika mtima koposa kulankhula mau a Mulungu opanda mantha." 
Philippians1:15 Enatu alalikiranso Khristu chifukwa cha kaduka ndi ndeu; koma enanso chifukwa cha kukoma mtima; 
Philippians1:16 ena atero ndi chikondi, podziwa kuti anandiika ndichite chokanira cha Uthenga Wabwino;" 
Philippians1:17 koma ena alalikira Khristu mochokera m'chotetana, kosati koona, akuyesa kuti adzandibukitsira chisautso m'zomangira zanga." 
Philippians1:18 Potero nchiyani? Chokhacho kuti monsemo, ngati pamaso pokha, ngati m'choonadi, Khristu alalikidwa; ndipo m'menemo ndikondwera, komanso ndidzakondwera." 
Philippians1:19 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti ichi chidzandichitira ine chipulumutso, mwa pembedzero lanu ndi mwa kundipatsako kwa Mzimu wa Yesu Khristu;" 
Philippians1:20 monga mwa kulingiriritsa ndi chiyembekezo changa, kuti palibe chinthu chidzandichititsa manyazi, komatu mwa kulimbika mtima konse, monga nthawi yonse, tsopanonso Khristu adzakuzidwa m'thupi langa, kapena mwa moyo, kapena mwa imfa." 
Philippians1:21 Pakuti kwa ine kukhala ndi moyo ndiko Khristu, ndi kufa kuli kupindula." 
Philippians1:22 Koma ngati kukhala ndi moyo m'thupi ndiko chipatso cha ntchito yanga, sindizindikiranso chimene ndidzasankha." 
Philippians1:23 Koma ndipanidwa nazo ziwirizi, pokhala nacho cholakalaka cha kuchoka kukhala ndi Khristu, ndiko kwabwino koposaposatu;" 
Philippians1:24 koma kukhalabe m'thupi ndiko kufunika koposa, chifukwa cha inu." 
Philippians1:25 Ndipo pokhulupirira pamenepo ndidziwa kuti ndidzakhala, ndi kukhalitsa ndi inu nonse, kuonjezera chimwemwe cha chikhulupiriro chanu;" 
Philippians1:26 kuti kudzitamandira kwanu kuchuluke m'Khristu Yesu mwa ine, mwa kukhalanso ine kwa inu." 
Philippians1:27 Chokhachi, mayendedwe anu ayenere Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu: kuti, ndingakhale nditi ndilinkudza ndi kuona inu, ndingakhale nditi ndili kwina, ndikamva za kwa inu, kuti muchilimika mu mzimu umodzi, ndi kugwirira pamodzi ndi moyo umodzi chikhulupiriro cha Uthenga Wabwino;" 
Philippians1:28 osaopa adani m'kanthu konse, chimene chili kwa iwowa chisonyezo cha chionongeko, koma kwa inu cha chipulumutso, ndicho cha kwa Mulungu;" 
Philippians1:29 kuti kwapatsidwa kwa inu kwaufulu chifukwa cha Khristu, si kukhulupirira kwa Iye kokha, komatunso kumva zowawa chifukwa cha Iye," 
Philippians1:30 ndi kukhala nacho inu chilimbano chomwechi mudachiona mwa ine, nimukumva tsopano chili mwa ine." 
Philippians2:1 Ngati tsono muli chitonthozo mwa Khristu, ngati chikhazikitso cha chikondi, ngati chiyanjano cha Mzimu, ngati phamphu, ndi zisoni," 
Philippians2:2 kwaniritsani chimwemwe changa, kuti mukalingalire mtima zomwezo, akukhala nacho chikondi chomwe, a moyo umodzi, olingalira mtima umodzi;" 
Philippians2:3 musachite kanthu monga mwa chotetana, kapena monga mwa ulemerero wopanda pake, komatu ndi kudzichepetsa mtima, yense ayese anzake omposa iye mwini;" 
Philippians2:4 munthu yense asapenyerere zake za iye yekha, koma yense apenyererenso za mnzake." 
Philippians2:5 Mukhale nao mtima m'kati mwanu umene unalinso mwa Khristu Yesu," 
Philippians2:6 ameneyo, pokhala nao maonekedwe a Mulungu, sanachiyesa cholanda kukhala wofana ndi Mulungu," 
Philippians2:7 koma anadzikhuthula yekha, natenga maonekedwe a kapolo, nakhala m'mafanizidwe a anthu;" 
Philippians2:8 ndipo popezedwa m'maonekedwe ngati munthu, anadzichepetsa yekha, nakhala womvera kufikira imfa, ndiyo imfa ya pamtanda." 
Philippians2:9 Mwa ichinso Mulungu anamkwezetsa Iye, nampatsa dzina limene liposa maina onse," 
Philippians2:10 kuti m'dzina la Yesu bondo lililonse lipinde, la za m'mwamba ndi za padziko, ndi za pansi pa dziko," 
Philippians2:11 ndi malilime onse avomere kuti Yesu Khristu ali Ambuye, kuchitira ulemu Mulungu Atate." 
Philippians2:12 Potero, okondedwa anga, monga momwe mumvera nthawi zonse, posati pokhapokha pokhala ine ndilipo, komatu makamaka tsopano pokhala ine palibe, gwirani ntchito yake ya chipulumutso chanu ndi mantha, ndi kunthunthumira;" 
Philippians2:13 pakuti wakuchita mwa inu kufuna ndi kuchita komwe, chifukwa cha kukoma mtima kwake, ndiye Mulungu." 
Philippians2:14 Chitani zonse kopanda madandaulo ndi makani," 
Philippians2:15 kuti mukakhale osalakwa ndi oona, ana a Mulungu opanda chilema pakati pa mbadwo wokhotakhota ndi wopotoka, mwa iwo amene muonekera monga mauniko m'dziko lapansi," 
Philippians2:16 akuonetsera mau a moyo; kuti ine ndikakhale wakudzitamandira nao m'tsiku la Khristu, kuti sindinathamanga chabe, kapena kugwiritsa ntchito chabe." 
Philippians2:17 Komatu ngatinso ndithiridwa pa nsembe ndi kutumikira kwa chikhulupiriro chanu, ndikondwera, ndipo ndikondwera pamodzi ndi inu nonse;" 
Philippians2:18 momwemonso kondwerani inu, nimukondwere pamodzi ndi ine." 
Philippians2:19 Koma ndiyembekeza mwa Ambuye Yesu kuti ndidzatumiza Timoteo kwa inu msanga, kuti inenso nditonthozeke bwino pozindikira za kwa inu." 
Philippians2:20 Pakuti ndilibe wina wa mtima womwewo, amene adzasamalira za kwa inu ndi mtima woona." 
Philippians2:21 Pakuti onsewa atsata za iwo okha, si za Yesu Khristu." 
Philippians2:22 Koma muzindikira matsimikizidwe ake, kuti, monga mwana achitira atate wake, anatumikira pamodzi ndi ine Uthenga Wabwino." 
Philippians2:23 Ameneyo ndithu tsono ndiyembekeza kumtuma posachedwa m'mene ndikapenyerera za kwa ine zidzatani; 
Philippians2:24 koma ndikhulupirira mwa Ambuye kuti ine ndekhanso ndidzadza msanga. 
Philippians2:25 Koma ndinayesa nkufunika kutuma kwa inu Epafrodito mbaleyo, ndiye wantchito mnzanga ndi msilikali mnzanga, ndiye mtumwi wanu, ndi wonditumikira pa chosowa changa;" 
Philippians2:26 popeza anali wolakalaka inu nonse, navutika mtima chifukwa mudamva kuti anadwala." 
Philippians2:27 Pakutinso anadwaladi pafupi imfa; komatu Mulungu anamchitira chifundo; koma si iye yekha, komatu inenso, kuti ndisakhale nacho chisoni chionjezereonjezere." 
Philippians2:28 Chifukwa chake ndamtuma iye chifulumizire, kuti pakumuona mukakondwerenso, ndi inenso chindichepere chisoni."
