Philippians2:29 Chifukwa chake mumlandire mwa Ambuye, ndi chimwemwe chonse; nimuchitire ulemu oterewa;" 
Philippians2:30 pakuti chifukwa cha ntchito ya Khristu anafikira pafupi imfa, wosasamalira moyo wake, kuti akakwaniritse chiperewero cha utumiki wanu wa kwa ine." 
Philippians3:1 Chotsalira, abale anga, kondwerani mwa Ambuye. Kulembera zomwezo kwa inu, sikundivuta ine, koma kwa inu kuli kukhazikitsa." 
Philippians3:2 Penyererani agalu, penyererani ochita zoipa, penyererani choduladula;" 
Philippians3:3 pakuti ife ndife mdulidwe, akutumikira popembedza ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu, nadzitamandira mwa Khristu Yesu, osakhulupirira m'thupi;" 
Philippians3:4 ndingakhale inenso ndili nako kakukhulupirira m'thupi; ngati wina yense ayesa kukhulupirira m'thupi, makamaka ineyu;" 
Philippians3:5 wodulidwa tsiku lachisanu ndi chitatu, wa mbadwo wa Israele, wa fuko la Benjamini, Muhebri wa mwa Ahebri; monga mwa lamulo, Mfarisi;" 
Philippians3:6 monga mwa changu, wolondalonda Mpingo; monga mwa chilungamo cha m'lamulo wokhala wosalakwa ine." 
Philippians3:7 Komatu zonse zimene zinandipindulira, zomwezo ndinaziyesa chitayiko chifukwa cha Khristu." 
Philippians3:8 Komatu zenizeninso ndiyesa zonse zikhale chitayiko chifukwa cha mapambanidwe a chizindikiritso cha Khristu Yesu Ambuye wanga, chifukwa cha Iyeyu ndinatayikitsa zinthu zonse, ndipo ndiziyesa zapadzala, kuti ndikadzionjezere Khristu," 
Philippians3:9 ndi kupezedwa mwa Iye, wosati wakukhala nacho chilungamo changa cha m'lamulo, koma chimene cha mwa chikhulupiriro cha Khristu, chilungamocho chochokera mwa Mulungu ndi chikhulupiriro;" 
Philippians3:10 kuti ndimzindikire Iye, ndi mphamvu ya kuuka kwake, ndi chiyanjano cha zowawa zake, pofanizidwa ndi imfa yake;" 
Philippians3:11 ngati nkotheka ndikafikire kuuka kwa akufa. 
Philippians3:12 Si kunena kuti ndinalandira kale, kapena kuti ndatha kukonzeka wamphumphu; koma ndilondetsa, ngatinso ndikachigwire ichi chimene anandigwirira Khristu Yesu." 
Philippians3:13 Abale, ine sindiwerengera ndekha kuti ndatha kuchigwira: koma chinthu chimodzi ndichichita; poiwaladi zam'mbuyo, ndi kutambalitsira zam'tsogolo," 
Philippians3:14 ndilondetsa polekezerapo, kutsatira mfupo wa maitanidwe akumwamba a Mulungu a mwa Khristu Yesu." 
Philippians3:15 Tonsefe amene tsono tidakonzeka amphumphu, tilingirire ichi mumtima; ndipo ngati kuli kanthu mulingirira nako kwina mumtima, akanso Mulungu adzavumbulutsira inu;" 
Philippians3:16 chokhachi, kumene tidafikirako, mayendedwe athu alinganeko." 
Philippians3:17 Abale, khalani pamodzi akutsanza anga, ndipo yang'anirani iwo akuyenda kotero monga muli ndi ife chitsanzo chanu." 
Philippians3:18 Pakuti ambiri amayenda, za amene ndinakuuzani kawirikawiri, ndipo tsopanonso ndikuuzani ndi kulira, ali adani a mtanda wa Khristu;" 
Philippians3:19 chitsiriziro chao ndicho kuonongeka, mulungu wao ndiyo mimba yao, ulemerero wao uli m'manyazi ao, amene alingirira za padziko." 
Philippians3:20 Pakuti ufulu wathu uli Kumwamba; kuchokera komwenso tilindirira Mpulumutsi, Ambuye Yesu Khristu;" 
Philippians3:21 amene adzasanduliza thupi lathu lopepulidwa, lifanane nalo thupi lake la ulemerero, monga mwa machitidwe amene akhoza kudzigonjetsera nao zinthu zonse." 
Philippians4:1 Potero, abale anga okondedwa, olakalakidwa, ndinu chimwemwe changa ndi korona wanga, chilimikani motere mwa Ambuye, okondedwa." 
Philippians4:2 Ndidandaulira Yuwodiya, ndidandaulira Sintike, alingirire ndi mtima umodzi mwa Ambuye." 
Philippians4:3 Inde, ndikupemphaninso, mnzanga wa m'goli woona, muthandize akazi awa amene anakangalika nane pamodzi mu Uthenga Wabwino, pamodzi ndi Klemensinso, ndi otsala aja antchito anzanga, amene maina ao ali m'buku la Moyo." 
Philippians4:4 Kondwerani mwa Ambuye nthawi zonse: ndibwerezanso kutero, kondwerani." 
Philippians4:5 Kufatsa kwanu kuzindikirike ndi anthu onse. Ambuye ali pafupi. 
Philippians4:6 Musadere nkhawa konse; komatu m'zonse ndi pemphero, ndi pembedzero, pamodzi ndi chiyamiko, zopempha zanu zidziwike kwa Mulungu." 
Philippians4:7 Ndipo mtendere wa Mulungu wakupambana chidziwitso chonse, udzasunga mitima yanu ndi maganizo anu mwa Khristu Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Chotsalira, abale, zinthu zilizonse zoona, zilizonse zolemekezeka, zilizonse zolungama, zilizonse zoyera, zilizonse zokongola, zilizonse zimveka zokoma; ngati kuli chokoma mtima china, kapena chitamando china, zilingirireni izi." 
Philippians4:9 Zimenenso mudaziphunzira, ndi kuzilandira, ndi kuzimva, ndi kuziona mwa ine, zomwezo chitani; ndipo Mulungu wa mtendere adzakhala pamodzi ndi inu." 
Philippians4:10 Koma ndinakondwera mwa Ambuye kwakukulu, kuti tsopano munatsitsimukanso kulingirira mtima za kwa ine, kumenekonso munalingirirako, koma munasowa pochitapo." 
Philippians4:11 Si kuti ndinena monga mwa chiperewero, pakuti ndaphunzira ine, kuti zindikwanire zilizonse ndili nazo." 
Philippians4:12 Ndadziwa ngakhale kupeputsidwa, ndadziwanso kusefukira; konseko ndi m'zinthu zonse ndalowa mwambo wakukhuta, ndiponso wakumva njala; wakusefukira, ndiponso wakusowa." 
Philippians4:13 Ndikhoza zonse mwa Iye wondipatsa mphamvuyo. 
Philippians4:14 Koma munachita bwino kuti munayanjana nane m'chisautso changa. 
Philippians4:15 Koma mudziwanso inu nokha, inu Afilipi, kuti m'chiyambi cha Uthenga Wabwino, pamene ndinachoka kutuluka m'Masedoniya, sunayanjana nane Mpingo umodzi wonse m'makhalidwe a chopereka ndi cholandira, koma inu nokha;" 
Philippians4:16 pakuti m'Tesalonikanso munanditumizira pa chosowa changa kamodzi kapena kawiri. 
Philippians4:17 Sikunena kuti nditsata choperekacho, komatu nditsata chipatso chakuchulukira ku chiwerengero chanu." 
Philippians4:18 Koma ndili nazo zonse, ndipo ndisefukira; ndadzazidwa, popeza ndalandira kwa Epafrodito zija zidachokera kwanu, mnunkho wa fundo labwino, nsembe yolandirika, yokondweretsa Mulungu." 
Philippians4:19 Koma Mulungu wanga adzakwaniritsa chosowa chanu chilichonse monga mwa chuma chake m'ulemerero mwa Khristu Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Ndipo kwa Mulungu ndi Atate wathu kukhale ulemerero kunthawi za nthawi, Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Lankhulani woyera mtima aliyense mwa Khristu Yesu. Abalewo akukhala ndi ine alankhula inu. 
Philippians4:22 Oyera mtima onse alankhula inu, koma makamaka iwo a banja la Kaisara." 
Philippians4:23 Chisomo cha Ambuye Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi mzimu wanu. 
Colossians1:1 Paulo, mtumwi wa Khristu Yesu mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu, ndi Timoteo mbaleyo," 
Colossians1:2 kwa oyera mtima ndi abale okhulupirika mwa Khristu a m'Kolose: Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere wochokera kwa Mulungu Atate wathu. 
Colossians1:3 Tiyamika Mulungu Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu ndi kupempherera inu nthawi zonse," 
Colossians1:4 popeza tidamva za chikhulupiriro chanu cha mwa Khristu Yesu, ndi chikondi muli nacho kwa oyera mtima onse;" 
Colossians1:5 chifukwa cha chiyembekezo chosungikira kwa inu m'Mwamba, chimene mudachimva kale m'mau a choonadi cha Uthenga Wabwino," 
Colossians1:6 umene udafikira kwa inu; monganso m'dziko lonse lapansi umabala zipatso, numakula, monganso mwa inu, kuyambira tsikulo mudamva nimunazindikira chisomo cha Mulungu m'choonadi;" 
Colossians1:7 monga momwe munaphunzira kwa Epafra kapolo mnzathu wokondedwa, ndiye mtumiki wokhulupirika wa Khristu chifukwa cha ife;" 
Colossians1:8 amenenso anatifotokozera chikondi chanu mwa Mzimu. 
Colossians1:9 Mwa ichi ifenso, kuyambira tsiku limene tidamva, sitileka kupembedzera ndi kupempherera inu, kuti mukadzazidwe ndi chizindikiritso cha chifuniro chake mu nzeru zonse ndi chidziwitso cha mzimu," 
Colossians1:10 kuti mukayenda koyenera Ambuye kukamkondweretsa monsemo, ndi kubala zipatso mu ntchito yonse yabwino, ndi kukula m'chizindikiritso cha Mulungu;" 
Colossians1:11 olimbikitsidwa m'chilimbiko chonse, monga mwa mphamvu ya ulemerero wake, kuchitira chipiriro chonse ndi kuleza mtima konse pamodzi ndi chimwemwe," 
Colossians1:12 ndi kuyamika Atate, amene anatiyeneretsa ife kulandirana nao cholowa cha oyera mtima m'kuunika;" 
Colossians1:13 amene anatilanditsa ife kuulamuliro wa mdima, natisunthitsa kutilowetsa m'ufumu wa Mwana wa chikondi chake;" 
Colossians1:14 amene tili nao maomboledwe mwa Iye, m'kukhululukidwa kwa zochimwa zathu;" 
Colossians1:15 amene ali fanizo la Mulungu wosaonekayo, wobadwa woyamba wa chilengedwe chonse;" 
Colossians1:16 pakuti mwa Iye, zinalengedwa zonse za m'mwamba, ndi za padziko, zooneka ndi zosaonekazo, kapena mipando yachifumu, kapena maufumu, kapena maukulu, kapena maulamuliro; zinthu zonse zinalengedwa mwa Iye ndi kwa Iye." 
Colossians1:17 Ndipo Iye ali woyamba wa zonse, ndipo zonse zigwirizana pamodzi mwa Iye." 
Colossians1:18 Ndipo Iye ali mutu wa thupi, Mpingowo; ndiye chiyambi, wobadwa woyamba wotuluka mwa akufa; kuti akakhale Iye mwa zonse woyambayamba." 
Colossians1:19 Pakuti kunamkomera Atate kuti mwa Iye chidzalo chonse chikhalire," 
Colossians1:20 mwa Iyenso kuyanjanitsa zinthu zonse kwa Iye mwini, atachita mtendere mwa mwazi wa mtanda wake; mwa Iyetu, kapena za padziko, kapena za m'Mwamba." 
Colossians1:21 Ndipo inu, okhala alendo kale ndi adani m'chifuwa chanu m'ntchito zoipazo," 
Colossians1:22 koma tsopano anakuyanjanitsani m'thupi lake mwa imfayo, kukaimika inu oyera, ndi opanda chilema ndi osatsutsika pamaso pake;" 
Colossians1:23 ngatitu, mukhalabe m'chikhulupiriro, ochilimika ndi okhazikika ndi osasunthika kulekana nacho chiyembekezo cha Uthenga Wabwino umene mudaumva, wolalikidwa cholengedwa chonse cha pansi pa thambo; umene ine Paulo ndakhala mtumiki wake." 
Colossians1:24 Tsopano ndikondwera nazo zowawazo chifukwa cha inu, ndipo ndikwaniritsa zoperewera za chisautso cha Khristu m'thupi langa chifukwa cha thupi lake, ndilo Mpingowo;" 
Colossians1:25 amene ndinakhala mtumiki wake, monga mwa udindo wa Mulungu umene anandipatsa ine wakuchitira inu, wakukwaniritsa mau a Mulungu," 
Colossians1:26 ndiwo chinsinsicho chinabisika kuyambira pa nthawizo, ndi kuyambira pa mibadwoyo; koma anachionetsa tsopano kwa oyera mtima ake," 
Colossians1:27 kwa iwo amene Mulungu anafuna kuwazindikiritsa ichi chimene chili chuma cha ulemerero wa chinsinsi pakati pa amitundu, ndiye Khristu mwa inu, chiyembekezo cha ulemerero;" 
Colossians1:28 amene timlalikira ife, ndi kuchenjeza munthu aliyense ndi kuphunzitsa munthu aliyense mu nzeru zonse, kuti tionetsere munthu aliyense wamphumphu mwa Khristu;" 
Colossians1:29 kuchita ichi ndidzivutitsa ndi kuyesetsa monga mwa machitidwe ake akuchita mwa ine ndi mphamvu. 
Colossians2:1 Pakuti ndifuna kuti inu mudziwe nkhawa imene ndili nayo chifukwa cha inu, ndi iwowa a m'Laodikea, ndi onse amene sanaone nkhope yanga m'thupi;" 
Colossians2:2 kuti itonthozeke mitima yao, nalumikizike pamodzi iwo m'chikondi, kufikira chuma chonse cha chidzalo cha chidziwitso, kuti akazindikire iwo chinsinsi cha Mulungu, ndiye Khristu," 
Colossians2:3 amene zolemera zonse za nzeru ndi chidziwitso zibisika mwa Iye. 
Colossians2:4 Ichi ndinena, kuti munthu asakusokeretseni inu ndi mau okopakopa." 
Colossians2:5 Pakuti ndingakhale ndili kwina m'thupi, komatu mumzimu ndili pamodzi ndi inu, wokondwera pakupenya makonzedwe anu, ndi chilimbiko cha chikhulupiriro chanu cha kwa Khristu." 
Colossians2:6 Chifukwa chake monga momwe munalandira Khristu Yesu Ambuye, muyende mwa Iye," 
Colossians2:7 ozika mizu ndi omangirika mwa Iye, ndi okhazikika m'chikhulupiriro, monga munaphunzitsidwa, ndi kuchulukitsa chiyamiko." 
Colossians2:8 Penyani kuti pasakhale wina wakulanda inu ngati chuma, mwa kukonda nzeru kwake, ndi chinyengo chopanda pake, potsata mwambo wa anthu, potsata zoyamba za dziko lapansi, osati potsata Khristu;" 
Colossians2:9 pakuti mwa Iye chikhalira chidzalo cha Umulungu m'thupi," 
Colossians2:10 ndipo muli odzazidwa mwa Iye, ndiye mutu wa ukulu wonse ndi ulamuliro;" 
Colossians2:11 amenenso munadulidwa mwa Iye ndi mdulidwe wosachitika ndi manja, m'mavulidwe a thupi, mu mdulidwe wa Khristu;" 
Colossians2:12 popeza munaikidwa m'manda pamodzi ndi Iye muubatizo, momwemonso munaukitsidwa pamodzi ndi Iye m'chikhulupiriro cha machitidwe a Mulungu, amene anamuukitsa Iye kwa akufa." 
Colossians2:13 Ndipo inu, pokhala akufa m'zolakwa ndi kusadulidwa kwa thupi lanu, anakupatsani moyo pamodzi ndi Iye, m'mene adatikhululukira ife zolakwa zonse;" 
Colossians2:14 adatha kutifafanizira cha pa ifecho cholembedwa m'zoikikazo, chimene chinali chotsutsana nafe: ndipo anachichotsera pakatipo, ndi kuchikhomera ichi pamtanda;" 
Colossians2:15 atavula maukulu ndi maulamuliro, anawaonetsera poyera, nawagonjetsera nako." 
Colossians2:16 Chifukwa chake munthu aliyense asakuweruzeni inu m'chakudya, kapena chakumwa, kapena m'kunena tsiku la chikondwerero, kapena tsiku lokhala mwezi, kapena la Sabata;" 
Colossians2:17 ndizo mthunzi wa zilinkudzazo; koma thupi ndi la Khristu. 
Colossians2:18 Munthu aliyense asakunyengeni ndi kulanda mphotho yanu ndi kudzichepetsa mwini wake, ndi kugwadira kwa angelo, ndi kukhalira mu izi adaziona, wodzitukumula chabe ndi zolingalira za thupi lake, wosagwiritsa mutuwo," 
Colossians2:19 kuchokera kwa Iye amene thupi lonse, lothandizidwa ndi kulumikizidwa pamodzi mwa mfundo ndi mitsempha, likula ndi makulidwe a Mulungu." 
Colossians2:20 Ngati munafa pamodzi ndi Khristu kusiyana nazo zoyamba za dziko lapansi, mugonjeranji kuzoikikazo, monga ngati moyo wanu mukhala nao m'dziko lapansi," 
Colossians2:21 usaikapo dzanja, usalawa, usakhudza," 
Colossians2:22 (ndizo zonse zakuonongedwa pochita nazo), monga mwa malangizo ndi maphunziro a anthu?" 
Colossians2:23 Zimene zili naotu manenedwe a nzeru m'kutumikira kwa chifuniro cha mwini wake, ndi kudzichepetsa, ndi kusalabadira thupi; koma zilibe mphamvu konse yakuletsa chikhutitso cha thupi." 
Colossians3:1 Chifukwa chake ngati munaukitsidwa pamodzi ndi Khristu, funani zakumwamba, kumene kuli Khristu wokhala pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu." 
Colossians3:2 Lingalirani zakumwamba osati za padziko ai. 
Colossians3:3 Pakuti munafa, ndipo moyo wanu wabisika pamodzi ndi Khristu mwa Mulungu." 
Colossians3:4 Pamene Khristu adzaoneka, ndiye moyo wathu, pamenepo inunso mudzaonekera pamodzi ndi Iye m'ulemerero." 
Colossians3:5 Chifukwa chake fetsani ziwalozo zili padziko; dama, chidetso, chifunitso chamanyazi, chilakolako choipa, ndi chisiriro, chimene chili kupembedza mafano;" 
Colossians3:6 chifukwa cha izi zomwe ukudza mkwiyo wa Mulungu pa ana a kusamvera; 
Colossians3:7 zimene munayendamo inunso kale, pamene munakhala ndi moyo wanu m'menemo." 
Colossians3:8 Koma tsopano tayani inunso zonsezi: mkwiyo, kupsa mtima, dumbo, mwano, zonyansa zotuluka m'kamwa mwanu:" 
Colossians3:9 musamanamizana wina ndi mnzake; popeza mudavula munthu wakale pamodzi ndi ntchito zake," 
Colossians3:10 ndipo munavala watsopano, amene alikukonzeka watsopano, kuti akhale nacho chizindikiritso, monga mwa chifaniziro cha Iye amene anamlenga iye;" 
Colossians3:11 pamene palibe Mgriki ndi Ayuda, mdulidwe ndi kusadulidwa, watchedwa wakunja, Mskuti, kapolo, mfulu, komatu Khristu ndiye zonse, ndi m'zonse." 
Colossians3:12 Chifukwa chake valani, monga osankhika a Mulungu, oyera mtima ndi okondedwa, mtima wachifundo, kukoma mtima, kudzichepetsa, chifatso, kuleza mtima;" 
Colossians3:13 kulolerana wina ndi mnzake, ndi kukhululukirana eni okha, ngati wina ali nacho chifukwa pa mnzake; monganso Ambuye anakhululukira inu, teroni inunso;" 
Colossians3:14 koma koposa izi zonse khalani nacho chikondano, ndicho chomangira cha mtima wamphumphu." 
Colossians3:15 Ndipo mtendere wa Khristu uchite ufumu m'mitima yanu, kulingakonso munaitanidwa m'thupi limodzi; ndipo khalani akuyamika." 
Colossians3:16 Mau a Khristu akhalitse mwa inu chichulukire mu nzeru yonse, ndi kuphunzitsa ndi kuyambirirana eni okha ndi masalmo, ndi mayamiko ndi nyimbo zauzimu, ndi kuimbira Mulungu ndi chisomo mumtima mwanu." 
Colossians3:17 Ndipo chilichonse mukachichita m'mau kapena muntchito, chitani zonse m'dzina la Ambuye Yesu, ndi kuyamika Mulungu Atate mwa Iye." 
Colossians3:18 Akazi inu, muzimvera amuna anu, monga kuyenera mwa Ambuye." 
Colossians3:19 Amuna inu, kondani akazi anu, ndipo musawawire mtima iwo." 
Colossians3:20 Ana inu, mverani akubala inu m'zonse, pakuti ichi Ambuye akondwera nacho." 
Colossians3:21 Atate inu, musaputa ana anu, kuti angataye mtima." 
Colossians3:22 Akapolo inu, mverani m'zonse iwo amene ali ambuye monga mwa thupi, wosati ukapolo wa pamaso, monga okondweretsa anthu, komatu ndi mtima wakulinga kumodzi, akuopa Ambuye;" 
Colossians3:23 chilichonse mukachichita, gwirani ntchito mochokera mumtima, monga kwa Ambuye, osati kwa anthu ai;" 
Colossians3:24 podziwa kuti mudzalandira kwa Ambuye mphotho ya cholowa; mutumikira Ambuye Khristu mwaukapolo. 
Colossians3:25 Pakuti iye wakuchita chosalungama adzalandiranso chosalungama anachitacho; ndipo palibe tsankho. 
Colossians4:1 Ambuye inu, chitirani akapolo anu cholungama ndi cholingana; podziwa kuti inunso muli naye Mbuye m'Mwamba." 
Colossians4:2 Chitani khama m'kupemphera, nimudikire momwemo ndi chiyamiko;" 
Colossians4:3 ndi kutipempherera ifenso pomwepo, kuti Mulungu atitsegulire ife pakhomo pa mau, kuti tilankhule chinsinsi cha Khristu; chimenenso ndikhalira m'ndende," 
Colossians4:4 kuti ndichionetse ichi monga ndiyenera kulankhula. 
Colossians4:5 Muyendere munzeru ndi iwo akunja, kuchita machawi nthawi ingatayike." 
Colossians4:6 Mau anu akhale m'chisomo, okoleretsa, kuti mukadziwe inu mayankhidwe anu a kwa yense akatani." 
Colossians4:7 Zonse za kwa ine adzakuzindikiritsani Tikiko, mbale wokondedwa ndi mtumiki wokhulupirika ndi kapolo mnzanga mwa Ambuye:" 
Colossians4:8 amene ndamtuma kwa inu chifukwa cha ichi chomwe, kuti mukazindikire za kwa ife, ndi kuti atonthoze mitima yanu;" 
Colossians4:9 pamodzi ndi Onesimo, mbale wokhulupirika ndi wokondedwa, amene ali wa kwa inu. Zonse za kuno adzakuzindikiritsani inu." 
Colossians4:10 Aristariko wam'ndende mnzanga akupatsani moni, ndi Marko, msuweni wa Barnabasi (amene munalandira zolamulira za kwa iye; akafika kwanu, mumlandire iye)," 
Colossians4:10 Aristariko wam'ndende mnzanga akupatsani moni, ndi Marko, msuweni wa Barnabasi (amene munalandira zolamulira za kwa iye; akafika kwanu, mumlandire iye)," 
Colossians4:11 ndi Yesu, wotchedwa Yusto, ndiwo a mdulidwe; iwo okha ndiwo antchito anzanga a mu Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndiwo akundikhalira ine chonditonthoza mtima." 
Colossians4:12 Akupatsani moni Epafra ndiye wa kwa inu, ndiye kapolo wa Khristu Yesu, wakulimbira chifukwa cha inu m'mapemphero ake masiku onse, kuti mukaime amphumphu ndi odzazidwa m'chifuniro chonse cha Mulungu." 
Colossians4:13 Pakuti ndimchitira iye umboni kuti adziwawitsa nayo ntchito chifukwa cha inu, ndi iwo a m'Laodikea, ndi iwo a m'Hierapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Akupatsani moni Luka sing'anga wokondedwa, ndi Dema." 
Colossians4:15 Akupatsani moni abalewo a m'Laodikea, ndi Nimfa, ndi Mpingowo wa m'nyumba yao." 
Colossians4:16 Ndipo pamene mudamwerenga kalata uyu, amwerengenso mu Mpingo wa ku Laodikea, ndi inunso muwerenge wa ku Laodikea." 
Colossians4:17 Ndipo nenani kwa Arkipo, Samaliratu utumiki umene udaulandira mwa Ambuye, kuti uukwanitse." 
Colossians4:18 Ndipereka moni ndi dzanja langa, kwa ine Paulo. Kumbukirani zomangira zanga. Chisomo chikhale nanu." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo, ndi Silivano, ndi Timoteo, kwa Mpingo wa Atesalonika mwa Mulungu Atate ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu: Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Tiyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse chifukwa cha inu nonse, ndi kukumbukira inu m'mapemphero athu;" 
1Thessalonians1:3 ndi kukumbukira kosalekeza ntchito yanu ya chikhulupiriro, ndi chikondi chochitachita, ndi chipiriro cha chiyembekezo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, pamaso pa Mulungu Atate wathu;" 
1Thessalonians1:4 podziwa, abale okondedwa ndi Mulungu, chisankhidwe chanu," 
1Thessalonians1:5 kuti Uthenga Wabwino wathu sunadza kwa inu m'mau mokha, komatunso mumphamvu, ndi mwa Mzimu Woyera, ndi m'kuchuluka kwakukulu; monga mudziwa tinakhala onga otani mwa inu chifukwa cha inu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Ndipo munayamba kukhala akutsanza athu, ndi a Ambuye, m'mene mudalandira mauwo m'chisautso chambiri, ndi chimwemwe cha Mzimu Woyera;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 kotero kuti munayamba kukhala inu chitsanzo kwa onse akukhulupirira m'Masedoniya ndi m'Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Pakuti kutuluka kwa inu kudamveka mau a Ambuye, osati m'Masedoniya ndi Akaya mokha, komatu m'malo monse chikhulupiriro chanu cha kwa Mulungu chidatuluka; kotero kuti sikufunika kwa ife kulankhula kanthu." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Pakuti iwo okha alalikira za ife, malowedwe athu a kwa inu anali otani; ndi kuti munatembenukira kwa Mulungu posiyana nao mafano, kutumikira Mulungu weniweni wamoyo," 
1Thessalonians1:10 ndi kulindirira Mwana wake achokere Kumwamba, amene anamuukitsa kwa akufa, Yesu, wotipulumutsa ife kumkwiyo ulinkudza." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Pakuti, abale, mudziwa nokha malowedwe athu a kwa inu, kuti sanakhala opanda pake;" 
1Thessalonians2:2 koma tingakhale tidamva zowawa kale, ndipo anatichitira chipongwe, monga mudziwa, ku Filipi, tinalimbika pakamwa mwa Mulungu wathu kulankhula ndi inu Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu m'kutsutsana kwambiri." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Pakuti kudandaulira kwathu sikuchokera kukusochera, kapena kuchidetso, kapena m'chinyengo;" 
1Thessalonians2:4 komatu monga Mulungu anativomereza kutiikiza Uthenga Wabwino, kotero tilankhula; osati monga okondweretsa anthu, koma Mulungu; amene ayesa mitima yathu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Pakuti sitinayenda nao mau osyasyalika nthawi iliyonse monga mudziwa, kapena kupsinjika msiriro, mboni ndi Mulungu;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 kapena sitinakhala ofuna ulemerero wa kwa anthu, kapena kwa inu, kapena kwa ena, tingakhale tinali nayo mphamvu yakukulemetsani monga atumwi a Khristu." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Komatu tinakhala ofatsa pakati pa inu, monga m'mene mlezi afukata ana ake a iye yekha;" 
1Thessalonians2:8 kotero ife poliralira inu, tinavomera mokondwera kupereka kwa inu si Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu wokha, komanso moyo wathu, popeza mudakhala okondedwa kwa ife." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Pakuti mukumbukira, abale, chigwiritso chathu ndi chivuto chathu; pochita usiku ndi usana, kuti tingalemetse wina wa inu, tinalalikira kwa inu Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Inu ndinu mboni, Mulungunso, kuti tinakhala oyera mtima ndi olungama ndi osalakwa kwa inu akukhulupirira;" 
1Thessalonians2:11 monga mudziwa kuti tinachitira yense wa inu pa yekha, monga atate achitira ana ake a iye yekha," 
1Thessalonians2:12 ndi kukudandaulirani, ndi kukusangalatsani ndi kuchita umboni, kuti muyende koyenera Mulungu, amene akuitanani inu mulowe ufumu wake wa Iye yekha, ndi ulemerero." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ndipo mwa ichinso ife tiyamika Mulungu kosalekeza, kuti, pakulandira mau a Uthenga wa Mulungu, simunawalandira monga mau a anthu, komatu monga momwe ali ndithu, mau a Mulungu, amenenso achita mwa inu okhulupirira." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Pakuti inu, abale, munayamba kukhala akutsanza a Mipingo ya Mulungu yokhala m'Yudeya mwa Khristu Yesu; popeza zomwezi mudazimva kowawa ndinunso pamanja pa a mtundu wanu wa inu nokha, monganso iwowa pa manja a Ayuda;" 
1Thessalonians2:15 amene adaphanso Ambuye Yesu, ndi aneneri, natilondalonda ife, ndipo sakondweretsa Mulungu, natsutsana nao anthu onse;" 
1Thessalonians2:16 natiletsa ife kuti tisalankhule ndi akunja kuti apulumutsidwe; kudzaza machimo ao nthawi zonse; koma mkwiyo wafika pa iwo kufikira chimaliziro. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Koma ife, abale, angakhale adatichotsa kusiyana nanu kanthawi, osapenyana maso, koma kusiyana mtima ai, tinayesetsa koposa kuona nkhope yanu ndi chilakolako chachikulu;" 
1Thessalonians2:18 chifukwa tinafuna kudza kwa inu, inedi Paulo ndatero kamodzi kapena kawiri; koma Satana anatiletsa." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Pakuti chiyembekezo chathu, kapena chimwemwe, kapena korona wakudzitamandira naye nchiyani? Si ndinu nanga, pamaso pa Ambuye wathu Yesu m'kufika kwake?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Pakuti inu ndinu ulemerero wathu ndi chimwemwe chathu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Chifukwa chake, posakhoza kulekereranso, tidavomereza mtima atisiye tokha ku Atene;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 ndipo tinatuma Timoteo, mbale wathuyo ndi mtumiki wa Mulungu m'Uthenga Wabwino wa Khristu, kuti akhazikitse inu, ndi kutonthoza inu za chikhulupiriro chanu;" 
1Thessalonians3:3 kuti asasunthike wina ndi zisautso izi, pakuti mudziwa nokha kuti adatiika ife tichite izi." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Pakutinso, pamene tinali ndi inu tinakuuziranitu kuti tidzamva zisautso; monga kudachitika, monganso mudziwa." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Mwa ichi inenso, posalekereranso, ndinatuma kukazindikira chikhulupiriro chanu, kuti kapena woyesa akadakuyesani, ndipo chivuto chathu chikadakhala chopanda pake." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Koma tsopano pofika Timoteo kwathu kuchokera kwa inu, ndi kutifotokozera mbiri yokoma ya chikhulupiriro ndi chikondano chanu, ndi kuti mutikumbukira bwino masiku onse, pokhumba kutiona ife, monganso ife kukuonani inu;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 chifukwa cha ichi tasangalala pa inu, abale, m'kupsinjika kwathu konse ndi chisautso chathu chonse, mwa chikhulupiriro chanu;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 pakuti tsopano tili ndi moyo, ngati inu muchilimika mwa Ambuye." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Pakuti tikhoza kubwezera kwa Mulungu chiyamiko chanji chifukwa cha inu, pa chimwemwe chonse tikondwera nacho mwa inu pamaso pa Mulungu wathu;" 
1Thessalonians3:10 ndi kuchulukitsa mapemphero athu usiku ndi usana kuti tikaone nkhope yanu, ndi kukwaniritsa zoperewera pa chikhulupiriro chanu?" 
1Thessalonians3:11 Koma Mulungu Atate wathu mwini yekha, ndi Ambuye wathu Yesu atitsogolere m'njira yakufika kwa inu;" 
1Thessalonians3:12 koma Ambuye akukulitseni inu, nakuchulukitseni m'chikondano wina kwa mnzake ndi kwa anthu onse, monganso ife titero kwa inu;" 
1Thessalonians3:13 kuti akakhazikitse mitima yanu yopanda chifukwa m'chiyero pamaso pa Mulungu Atate wathu, pakufika Ambuye wathu Yesu pamodzi ndi oyera mtima ake onse." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Chotsalira tsono, abale, tikupemphani ndi kukudandaulirani mwa Ambuye Yesu, kuti, monga munalandira kwa ife mayendedwe okoma, muyenera kuyendanso ndi kukondweretsa Mulungu, monganso mumayenda, chulukani koposa momwemo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Pakuti mudziwa malangizo amene tinakupatsani mwa Ambuye Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Pakuti ichi ndi chifuniro cha Mulungu, chiyeretso chanu, kuti mudzipatule kudama;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 yense wa inu adziwe kukhala nacho chotengera chake m'chiyeretso ndi ulemu," 
1Thessalonians4:5 kosati m'chiliro cha chilakolako chonyansa, monganso amitundu osadziwa Mulungu;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 asapitirireko munthu, nanyenge mbale wake m'menemo, chifukwa Ambuye ndiye wobwezera wa izi zonse, monganso tinakuuziranitu, ndipo tinachitapo umboni." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Pakuti Mulungu sanaitana ife titsate chidetso, koma chiyeretso." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Chifukwa chake iye wotaya ichi, sataya munthu, komatu Mulungu, wakupatsa Mzimu wake Woyera kwa inu." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Koma kunena za chikondano cha pa abale sikufunika kuti akulembereni; pakuti wakukuphunzitsani ndi Mulungu, kuti mukondane wina ndi mnzake;" 
1Thessalonians4:10 pakutinso munawachitira ichi abale onse a m'Masedoniya lonse. Koma tikudandaulirani, abale, muchulukireko koposa," 
1Thessalonians4:11 ndi kuti muyesetse kukhala chete ndi kuchita za inu eni ndi kugwira ntchito ndi manja anu, monga tinakuuzani;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 kuti mukayende oona mtima pa iwo a kunja, ndi kukhala osasowa kanthu." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Koma sitifuna, abale, kuti mukhale osadziwa za iwo akugona; kuti mungalire monganso otsalawo, amene alibe chiyembekezo." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Pakuti ngati tikhulupirira kuti Yesu adamwalira, nauka, koteronso Mulungu adzatenga pamodzi ndi Iye iwo akugona mwa Yesu." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Pakuti ichi tinena kwa inu m'mau a Ambuye, kuti ife okhala ndi moyo, otsalira kufikira kufikanso kwa Ambuye, sitidzatsogolera ogonawo." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Pakuti Ambuye adzatsika Kumwamba mwini yekha ndi mfuu, ndi mau a mngelo wamkulu, ndi lipenga la Mulungu; ndipo akufa mwa Khristu adzayamba kuuka;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 pamenepo ife okhala ndi moyo, otsalafe, tidzakwatulidwa nao pamodzi m'mitambo, kukakomana ndi Ambuye mumlengalenga, ndipo potero tidzakhala ndi Ambuye nthawi zonse." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Chomwecho, tonthozanani ndi mau awa." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Koma za nthawizo ndi nyengozo, abale, sikufunika kuti tidzakulemberani." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Pakuti inu nokha mudziwa bwino kuti tsiku la Ambuye lidzadza monga mbala usiku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Pamene angonena, Mtendere ndi mosatekeseka, pamenepo chionongeko chobukapo chidzawagwera, monga zowawa mkazi wa pakati; ndipo sadzapulumuka konse." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Koma inu, abale, simuli mumdima, kuti tsikulo likakugwereni monga mbala;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 pakuti inu nonse muli ana a kuunika, ndi ana a usana; sitili a usiku, kapena a mdima;" 
1Thessalonians5:6 chifukwa chake tsono tisagone monga otsalawo, komatu tidikire, ndipo tisaledzere." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Pakuti iwo akugona agona usiku; ndi iwo akuledzera aledzera usiku. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Koma ife popeza tili a usana tisaledzere, titavala chapachifuwa cha chikhulupiriro ndi chikondi; ndi chisoti chili chiyembekezo cha chipulumutso." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Pakuti Mulungu sanatiika ife tilawe mkwiyo, komatu kuti tilandire chipulumutso mwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 amene anafa m'malo mwathu, kuti, tingakhale tidikira, tingakhale tigona, tikakhale ndi moyo pamodzi ndi Iye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Mwa ichi chenjezanani, ndipo mangiriranani wina ndi mnzake, monganso mumachita." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Koma, abale, tikupemphani, dziwani iwo akugwiritsa ntchito mwa inu, nakhala akulu anu mwa Ambuye, nakuyambirirani inu;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 ndipo muwachitire ulemu woposatu mwa chikondi, chifukwa cha ntchito yao. Khalani mumtendere mwa inu nokha." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Koma tidandaulira inu abale, yambirirani amphwayi, limbikitsani amantha mtima? Chirikizani ofooka, mukhale oleza mtima pa onse." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Penyani kuti wina asabwezere choipa womchitira choipa; komatu nthawi zonse mutsatire chokoma, kwa anzanu, ndi kwa onse." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Kondwerani nthawi zonse; 
1Thessalonians5:17 Pempherani kosaleka; 
1Thessalonians5:18 M'zonse yamikani; pakuti ichi ndi chifuniro cha Mulungu cha kwa inu, mwa Khristu Yesu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Musazime Mzimuyo; 
1Thessalonians5:20 Musanyoze manenero; 
1Thessalonians5:21 Yesani zonse; sungani chokomacho," 
1Thessalonians5:22 Mupewe maonekedwe onse a choipa. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Ndipo Mulungu wa mtendere yekha ayeretse inu konsekonse; ndipo mzimu wanu ndi moyo wanu ndi thupi lanu zisungidwe zamphumphu, zopanda chilema pa kudza kwake kwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Wakuitana inu ali wokhulupirika, amenenso adzachichita." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Abale, tipempherereni ife." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Perekani moni kwa abale onse ndi chipsompsono chopatulika. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndikulumbirirani pa Ambuye kuti kalatayu awerengedwe kwa abale onse. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu chikhale nanu. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo, ndi Silivano, ndi Timoteo, kwa Mpingo wa Atesalonika mwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere wa kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Tiziyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse chifukwa cha inu, abale, monga kuyenera; pakuti chikhulupiriro chanu chikula chikulire, ndipo chichulukira chikondano cha inu nonse, yense pa mnzake;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 kotero kuti ife tokha tidzitamandira za inu m'Mipingo ya Mulungu, chifukwa cha chipiriro chanu, ndi chikhulupiriro chanu, m'mazunzo anu onse ndi zisautsozo muzimva;" 
2Thessalonians1:5 ndicho chitsimikizo cha chiweruziro cholungama cha Mulungu; kuti mukawerengedwe oyenera ufumu wa Mulungu, umenenso mumvera zowawa;" 
2Thessalonians1:6 popeza nkolungama kwa Mulungu kubwezera chisautso kwa iwo akuchitira inu chisautso," 
2Thessalonians1:7 ndi kwa inu akumva chisautso mpumulo pamodzi ndi ife, pa vumbulutso la Ambuye Yesu wochokera Kumwamba pamodzi ndi angelo a mphamvu yake," 
2Thessalonians1:8 m'lawi lamoto, ndi kubwezera chilango kwa iwo osamdziwa Mulungu, ndi iwo osamvera Uthenga Wabwino wa Ambuye wathu Yesu;" 
2Thessalonians1:9 amene adzamva chilango, ndicho chionongeko chosatha chowasiyanitsa kunkhope ya Ambuye, ndi kuulemerero wa mphamvu yake," 
2Thessalonians1:10 pamene adzadza kudzalemekezedwa mwa oyera mtima ake, ndi kukhala wodabwizitsa mwa onse akukhulupirira (popeza munakhulupirira umboni wathu wa kwa inu) m'tsiku lija." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Kukatero tikupemphereraninso nthawi zonse, kuti Mulungu wathu akakuyeseni inu oyenera kuitanidwa kwanu, nakakwaniritse chomkomera chonse, ndi ntchito ya chikhulupiriro mumphamvu;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 kuti dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu lilemekezedwe mwa inu, ndi inu mwa Iye, monga mwa chisomo cha Mulungu wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Ndipo tikupemphani, abale, chifukwa cha kudza kwake kwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, ndi kusonkhana pamodzi kwathu kwa Iye;" 
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti musamagwedezeka mtima msanga ndi kutaya maganizo anu, kapena kuopsedwa, mwa mzimu kapena mwa mau; kapena mwa kalata, monga wolembedwa ndi ife, monga ngati tsiku la Ambuye lafika;" 
2Thessalonians2:3 munthu asakunyengeni konseko; kuti silifika, koma chiyambe chifike chipatukocho, navumbulutsike munthu wosaweruzika, mwana wa chionongeko," 
2Thessalonians2:4 amene atsutsana nazo, nadzikuza pa zonse zotchedwa Mulungu, kapena zopembedzeka; kotero kuti iye wakhala pansi ku Kachisi wa Mulungu, nadzionetsera yekha kuti ali Mulungu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Simukumbukira kodi, kuti pokhala nanu, ndisanachoke ine, ndinakuuzani izi?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ndipo tsopano chomletsa muchidziwa, kuti akavumbulitsidwe iye m'nyengo yake ya iye yekha." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Pakuti chinsinsi cha kusaweruzika chayambadi kuchita; chokhachi pali womletsa tsopano, kufikira akamchotsa pakati." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ndipo pamenepo adzavumbulutsidwa wosaweruzikayo, amene Ambuye Yesu adzamthera ndi mzimu wa pakamwa pake, nadzamuononga ndi maonekedwe a kudza kwake;" 
2Thessalonians2:9 ndiye amene kudza kwake kuli monga mwa machitidwe a Satana, mu mphamvu yonse, ndi zizindikiro ndi zozizwa zonama;" 
2Thessalonians2:10 ndi m'chinyengo chonse cha chosalungama kwa iwo akuonongeka, popeza chikondi cha choonadi sanachilandira, kuti akapulumutsidwe iwo." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ndipo chifukwa chake Mulungu atumiza kwa iwo machitidwe a kusocheretsa, kuti akhulupirire bodza;" 
2Thessalonians2:12 kuti aweruzidwe onse amene sanakhulupirira choonadi, komatu anakondwera ndi chosalungama." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Koma tiyenera ife tiziyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse chifukwa cha inu, abale okondedwa ndi Ambuye, kuti Mulungu anakusankhani inu kuyambira pachiyambi, mulandire chipulumutso mwa chiyeretso cha Mzimu ndi chikhulupiriro cha choonadi;" 
2Thessalonians2:14 kumene anaitanako inu mwa Uthenga Wabwino wathu, kuti mulandire ulemerero wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Chifukwa chake tsono, abale, chilimikani, gwiritsani miyambo imene tinakuphunzitsani, kapena mwa mau, kapena mwa kalata wathu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ndipo Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, ndi Mulungu Atate wathu amene anatikonda natipatsa chisangalatso chosatha ndi chiyembekezo chokoma mwa chisomo," 
2Thessalonians2:17 asangalatse mitima yanu, nakhazikitse inu mu ntchito yonse ndi mau onse abwino." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Chotsalira, abale, mutipempherere, kuti mau a Ambuye athamange, nalemekezedwe, monganso kwanu;" 
2Thessalonians3:2 ndi kuti tilanditsidwe m'manja a anthu osayenera ndi oipa; pakuti si onse ali nacho chikhulupiriro. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Koma Ambuye ali wokhulupirika amene adzakukhazikitsani inu, nadzakudikirirani kuletsa woipayo;" 
2Thessalonians3:4 koma tikhulupirira mwa Ambuye za inu, kuti mumachita, ndiponso mudzachita zimene tikulamulirani." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ndipo Ambuye atsogolere bwino mitima yanu ilowe m'chikondi cha mulungu ndi m'chipiriro cha Khristu. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Ndipo tikulamulirani, abale, m'dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, kuti mubwevuke kwa mbale yense wakuyenda dwakedwake, wosatsata mwambo umene anaulandira kwa ife." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Pakuti mudziwa nokha m'mene muyenera kutitsanza ifemo; pakuti sitinakhala dwakedwake mwa inu; 
2Thessalonians3:8 kapena sitinadya mkate chabe pa dzanja la munthu aliyense, komatu m'chivuto ndi chipsinjo, tinagwira ntchito usiku ndi usana, kuti tingalemetse wina wa inu;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 si chifukwa tilibe ulamuliro, komatu kuti tidzipereke tokha tikhale kwa inu chitsanzo chanu, kuti mukatitsanze ife." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Pakutinso pamene tinali nanu tidakulamulirani ichi, Ngati munthu safuna kugwira ntchito, asadyenso." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Pakuti tikumva za ena mwa inu kuti ayenda dwakedwake, osagwira ntchito konse, koma ali ochita mwina ndi mwina." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Koma oterewa tiwalamulira ndi kuwadandaulira mwa Ambuye Yesu Khristu, kuti agwire ntchito pokhala chete, nadye chakudya cha iwo okha." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Koma inu, abale, musaleme pakuchita zabwino." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Koma ngati wina samvera mau athu m'kalata uyu, yang'anirani ameneyo, kuti musayanjane naye, kuti achite manyazi." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Koma musamuyese mdani, koma mumuyambirire ngati mbale." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Ndipo Ambuye wa mtendere yekha atipatse ife mtendere nthawi zonse, monsemo. Ambuye akhale ndi inu nonse." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ndipereka moni ndi dzanja langa Paulo; ndicho chizindikiro m'kalata aliyense; ndiko kulemba kwanga. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu chikhale ndi inu nonse. 
1Timothy1:1 Paulo, mtumwi wa Khristu Yesu monga mwa chilamuliro cha Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu, ndi cha Khristu Yesu, chiyembekezo chathu:" 
1Timothy1:2 kwa Timoteo mwana wanga weniweni m'chikhulupiriro: Chisomo, chifundo, mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate ndi kwa Khristu Yesu Ambuye wathu." 
1Timothy1:3 Monga ndinakudandaulira iwe utsalire m'Efeso, popita ine ku Masedoniya, nditeronso, kuti ukalamulire ena ajawa asaphunzitse kanthu kena," 
1Timothy1:4 kapena asasamale nkhani zachabe, ndi mawerengedwe osalekeza a mafuko a makolo, ndiwo akuutsa mafunso, osati za udindo wa Mulungu umene uli m'chikhulupiriro;" 
1Timothy1:5 koma chitsirizo cha chilamuliro ndicho chikondi chochokera mu mtima woyera ndi m'chikumbu mtima chokoma ndi chikhulupiriro chosanyenga; 
1Timothy1:6 zimenezo, ena pozilambalala anapatukira kutsata mau opanda pake;" 
1Timothy1:7 pofuna kukhala aphunzitsi a malamulo ngakhale sadziwitsa zimene azinena, kapena azilimbikirazi." 
1Timothy1:8 Koma mudziwa kuti lamulo ndi labwino, ngati munthu achita nalo monga mwa lamulo," 
1Timothy1:9 podziwa ichi, kuti lamulo siliikika kwa munthu wolungama, koma kwa osaweruzika ndi osamvera lamulo, osapembedza, ndi ochimwa, osalemekeza ndi amnyozo, akupha atate ndi akupha amai, akupha anzao," 
1Timothy1:10 achigololo, akuchita zoipa ndi amuna, akuba anthu, amabodza, olumbira zonama, ndipo ngati kuli kena kakutsutsana nacho chiphunzitso cholamitsa;" 
1Timothy1:11 monga mwa Uthenga Wabwino wa ulemerero wa Mulungu wolemekezeka, umene anandisungitsa ine." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndimyamika Iye wondipatsa ine mphamvu, ndiye Khristu Yesu, Ambuye wathu, kuti anandiyesa wokhulupirika, nandiika kuutumiki," 
1Timothy1:13 ndingakhale kale ndinali wamwano, ndi wolondalonda, ndi wachipongwe; komatu anandichitira chifundo, popeza ndinazichita wosazindikira, wosakhulupirira;" 
1Timothy1:14 koma chisomo cha Ambuye wathu chidachulukatu pamodzi ndi chikhulupiriro ndi chikondi chili mwa Khristu Yesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Mauwa ali okhulupirika ndi oyenera konse kuti awalandire, kuti Khristu Yesu anadza kudziko lapansi kupulumutsa ochimwa; wa iwowa ine ndine woposa;" 
1Timothy1:16 komatu mwa ichi anandichitira chifundo, kuti mwa ine, woyamba, Yesu Khristu akaonetsere kuleza mtima kwake konse kukhale chitsanzo cha kwa iwo adzakhulupirira pa Iye m'tsogolo kufikira moyo wosatha." 
1Timothy1:17 Ndipo kwa Mfumu yosatha, yosavunda, yosaoneka, Mulungu wa yekha, ukhale ulemu ndi ulemerero, kufikira nthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Lamulo ili ndipereka kwa iwe, mwana wanga Timoteo, kuti, monga mwa zonenera zidakutsogolera iwe kale, ulimbane nayo nkhondo yabwino;" 
1Timothy1:19 ndi kukhala nacho chikhulupiriro ndi chikumbu mtima chokoma, chimene ena adachikankha, chikhulupiriro chao chidatayika;" 
1Timothy1:20 a iwo ali Himeneo ndi Aleksandro, amene ndawapereka kwa Satana, kuti aphunzire kusalankhula zamwano." 
1Timothy2:1 Ndidandaulira tsono, poyambayamba, kuti achitike mapembedzo, mapemphero, mapembedzero, mayamiko, chifukwa cha anthu onse;" 
1Timothy2:2 chifukwa cha mafumu ndi onse akuchita ulamuliro; kuti m'moyo mwathu tikakhale odika mtima ndi achete m'kulemekeza Mulungu, ndi m'kulemekezeka monse." 
1Timothy2:3 Pakuti ichi nchokoma ndi cholandirika pamaso pa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu; 
1Timothy2:4 amene afuna anthu onse apulumuke, nafike pozindikira choonadi." 
1Timothy2:5 Pakuti pali Mulungu mmodzi, ndi Mtetezi mmodzi pakati pa Mulungu ndi anthu, ndiye munthu, Khristu Yesu," 
1Timothy2:6 amene anadzipereka yekha chiombolo m'malo mwa onse; umboni m'nyengo zake; 
1Timothy2:7 umene anandiika ine mlaliki wake ndi mtumwi (ndinena zoona, wosanama ine), mphunzitsi wa amitundu m'chikhulupiriro ndi choonadi." 
1Timothy2:8 Chifukwa chake ndifuna kuti amunawo apemphere pamalo ponse, ndi kukweza manja oyera, opanda mkwiyo ndi makani." 
1Timothy2:9 Momwemonso, akazi adziveke okha ndi chovala choyenera, ndi manyazi, ndi chidziletso; osati ndi tsitsi lake loluka, ndi golide kapena ngale, kapena malaya a mtengo wake wapatali;" 
1Timothy2:10 komatu (umo mokomera akazi akuvomereza kulemekeza Mulungu), mwa ntchito zabwino." 
1Timothy2:11 Mkazi aphunzire akhale wachete m'kumvera konse. 
1Timothy2:12 Koma sindilola ine kuti mkazi aphunzitse, kapena kulamulira mwamuna; komatu akhale chete." 
1Timothy2:13 Pakuti Adamu anayamba kulengedwa, pamenepo Heva;" 
1Timothy2:14 ndipo Adamu sananyengedwa, koma mkaziyo ponyengedwa analowa m'kulakwa;" 
1Timothy2:15 koma adzapulumutsidwa mwa kubala mwana, ngati akhala m'chikhulupiriro ndi chikondi ndi chiyeretso pamodzi ndi chidziletso." 
1Timothy3:1 Mauwa ali okhulupirika, ngati munthu akhumba udindo wa woyang'anira, aifuna ntchito yabwino." 
1Timothy3:2 Ndipo kuyenera woyang'anira akhale wopanda chilema, mwamuna wa mkazi mmodzi, wodzisunga, wodziletsa, wolongosoka, wokonda kuchereza alendo, wokhoza kuphunzitsa;" 
1Timothy3:3 wosati woledzera, kapena womenyana ndeu; komatu wofatsa, wopanda ndeu, wosakhumba chuma;" 
1Timothy3:4 woweruza bwino nyumba yake ya iye yekha, wakukhala nao ana ake omvera iye ndi kulemekezeka konse." 
1Timothy3:5 Koma ngati munthu sadziwa kuweruza nyumba ya iye yekha, adzasunga bwanji Mpingo wa Mulungu?" 
1Timothy3:6 Asakhale wophunza, kuti podzitukumula ungamgwere mlandu wa mdierekezi." 
1Timothy3:7 Kuyeneranso kuti iwo akunja adzakhoza kumchitira umboni wabwino; kuti ungamgwere mtonzo, ndi msampha wa mdierekezi." 
1Timothy3:8 Momwemonso atumiki akhale olemekezeka, osanena pawiri, osamwetsa vinyo, osati a chisiriro chonyansa;" 
1Timothy3:9 okhala nacho chinsinsi cha chikhulupiriro m'chikumbu mtima choona. 
1Timothy3:10 Koma iwonso ayamba ayesedwe; pamenepo atumikire, akakhala opanda chifukwa." 
1Timothy3:11 Momwemonso akazi akhale olemekezeka, osadierekeza, odzisunga, okhulupirika m'zonse." 
1Timothy3:12 Atumiki akhale mwamuna wa mkazi mmodzi, akuweruza bwino ana ao, ndi iwo a m'nyumba yao ya iwo okha." 
1Timothy3:13 Pakuti iwo akutumikira bwino adzitengera okha mbiri yabwino, ndi kulimbika kwakukulu m'chikhulupiriro cha mwa Khristu Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Izi ndikulembera ndi kuyembekeza kudza kwa iwe posachedwa, koma ngati ndichedwa," 
1Timothy3:15 kuti udziwe kuyenedwa kwake pokhala m'nyumba ya Mulungu, ndiye Mpingo wa Mulungu wamoyo, mzati ndi mchirikizo wa choonadi." 
1Timothy3:16 Ndipo povomerezeka, chinsinsi cha kuchitira Mulungu ulemu nchachikulu: Iye amene anaonekera m'thupi, anayesedwa wolungama mumzimu, anapenyeka ndi angelo, analalikidwa mwa amitundu, wokhulupiridwa m'dziko lapansi, wolandiridwa m'ulemerero." 
1Timothy4:1 Koma Mzimu anena monenetsa, kuti m'masiku otsiriza ena adzataya chikhulupiriro, ndi kusamala mizimu yosocheretsa ndi maphunziro a ziwanda," 
1Timothy4:2 m'maonekedwe onyenga a iwo onena mabodza, olochedwa m'chikumbu mtima mwao monga ndi chitsulo chamoto;" 
1Timothy4:3 a kuletsa ukwati, osiyitsa zakudya zakuti, zimene Mulungu anazilenga kuti achikhulupiriro ndi ozindikira choonadi azilandire ndi chiyamiko." 
1Timothy4:4 Pakuti cholengedwa chonse cha Mulungu nchabwino, ndipo palibe kanthu kayenera kutayika, ngati kalandiridwa ndi chiyamiko;" 
1Timothy4:5 pakuti kayeretsedwa ndi Mau a Mulungu ndi kupemphera. 
1Timothy4:6 Ngati ukumbutsa abale zinthu izi, udzakhala mtumiki wabwino wa Khristu Yesu, woleredwa m'mauwo a chikhulupiriro, ndi malangizo abwino amene udawatsata;" 
1Timothy4:7 koma nkhani zachabe ndi za akazi okalamba ukane. Ndipo udzizoloweretse kuchita chipembedzo; 
1Timothy4:8 pakuti chizolowezi cha thupi chipindula pang'ono, koma chipembedzo chipindula zonse, popeza chikhala nalo lonjezano la kumoyo uno, ndi la moyo ulinkudza." 
1Timothy4:9 Okhulupirika mauwa ndi oyenera kulandiridwa konse. 
1Timothy4:10 Pakuti kukalingako tigwiritsa ntchito ndi kuyesetsa, chifukwa chiyembekezo chathu tili nacho pa Mulungu wamoyo, amene ali Mpulumutsi wa anthu onse, makamaka wa okhulupirira." 
1Timothy4:11 Lamulira izi, nuziphunzitse." 
1Timothy4:12 Munthu asapeputse ubwana wako; komatu khala chitsanzo kwa iwo okhulupirira, m'mau, m'mayendedwe, m'chikondi, m'chikhulupiriro, m'kuyera mtima." 
1Timothy4:13 Kufikira ndidza ine, usamalire kuwerenga, kuchenjeza, kulangiza." 
1Timothy4:14 Usanyalapse mphatsoyo ili mwa iwe, yopatsidwa kwa iwe mwa chinenero, pamodzi ndi kuika kwa manja a akulu." 
1Timothy4:15 Izi uzisamalitse; mu izi ukhale; kuti kukula mtima kwako kuonekere kwa onse. 
1Timothy4:16 Udzipenyerere wekha, ndi chiphunzitsocho. Uzikhala mu izi; pakuti pochita ichi udzadzipulumutsa iwe wekha ndi iwo akumva iwe." 
1Timothy5:1 Mkulu usamdzudzule, komatu umdandaulire ngati atate; anyamata ngati abale;" 
1Timothy5:2 akazi akulu ngati amai; akazi aang'ono ngati alongo, m'kuyera mtima konse." 
1Timothy5:3 Chitira ulemu amasiye amene ali amasiye ndithu. 
1Timothy5:4 Koma ngati wamasiye wina ali nao ana kapena adzukulu, ayambe aphunzire iwo kuchitira ulemu a m'banja lao, ndi kubwezera akuwabala; pakuti ichi ncholandirika pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Timothy5:5 Koma iye amene ali wamasiye ndithu, nasiyidwa yekha, ayembekezera Mulungu, nakhalabe m'mapembedzo ndi mapemphero usiku ndi usana." 
1Timothy5:6 Koma iye wakutsata zomkondweretsa, adafa pokhala ali ndi moyo." 
1Timothy5:7 Ndipo izi ulamulire, kuti akhale opanda chilema." 
1Timothy5:8 Koma ngati wina sadzisungiratu mbumba yake ya iye yekha, makamaka iwo a m'banja lake, wakana chikhulupiriro iye, ndipo aipa koposa wosakhulupirira." 
1Timothy5:9 Asawerengedwe wamasiye ngati sanafikire zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi, atakhala mkazi wa mwamuna mmodzi," 
1Timothy5:10 wa mbiri ya ntchito zabwino; ngati walera ana, ngati wachereza alendo, ngati adasambitsa mapazi a oyera mtima, ngati wathandiza osautsidwa, ngati anatsatadi ntchito zonse zabwino." 
1Timothy5:11 Koma amasiye ang'ono uwakane; pakuti pamene ayamba kumchitira Khristu chipongwe afuna kukwatiwa; 
1Timothy5:12 pokhala nacho chitsutso, popeza adataya chikhulupiriro chao choyamba." 
1Timothy5:13 Ndipo aphunziraponso kuchita ulesi, aderuderu; koma osati ulesi wokha, komatunso alankhula zopanda pake, nachita mwina ndi mwina, olankhula zosayenera." 
1Timothy5:14 Chifukwa chake nditi akwatiwe amasiye ang'ono, nabale ana, naweruzire nyumba, osapatsa chifukwa kwa mdaniyo chakulalatira;" 
1Timothy5:15 pakuti adayamba ena kupatuka ndi kutsata Satana. 
1Timothy5:16 Ngati mkazi wina wokhulupirira ali nao amasiye, iye awathandize, ndipo Mpingowo usalemedwe; kuti uthandize iwo amene ali amasiye ndithu." 
1Timothy5:17 Akulu akuweruza bwino ayesedwe oyenera ulemu wowirikiza, makamaka iwo akuchititsa m'mau ndi m'chiphunzitso." 
1Timothy5:18 Pakuti malembo ati, Usapunamiza ng'ombe yopuntha tirigu. Ndipo Wogwira ntchito ayenera kulipira kwake." 
1Timothy5:19 Pa mkulu usalandire chomnenera, koma pakhale mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Iwo akuchimwa uwadzudzule pamaso pa onse, kuti otsalawo achite mantha." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndikuchitira umboni pamaso pa Mulungu, ndi Khristu Yesu, ndi angelo osankhika, kuti usunge izi kopanda kusankhiratu, wosachita kanthu monga mwa tsankho." 
1Timothy5:22 Usafulumira kuika manja pa munthu aliyense, kapena usayanjana nazo zoipa za eni; udzisunge wekha woyera mtima." 
1Timothy5:23 Usakhalenso wakumwa madzi okha, komatu uchite naye vinyo pang'ono, chifukwa cha mimba yako ndi zofooka zako zobwera kawirikawiri." 
1Timothy5:24 Zochimwa za anthu ena zili zooneka kale, zitsogola kunka kumlandu; koma enanso ziwatsata." 
1Timothy5:25 Momwemonso pali ntchito zokoma zinaonekera kale; ndipo zina zosati zotere sizikhoza kubisika. 
1Timothy6:1 Onse amene ali akapolo a m'goli, ayesere ambuye a iwo okha oyenera ulemu wonse, kuti dzina la Mulungu ndi chiphunzitso zisachitidwe mwano." 
1Timothy6:2 Ndipo iwo akukhala nao ambuye okhulupirira, asawapeputse popeza ali abale; koma makamaka awatumikire popeza ali okhulupirira ndi okondedwa, oyanjana nao pa chokomacho. Izi uphunzitse, nuchenjeze." 
1Timothy6:3 Ngati munthu aphunzitsa zina, wosavomerezana nao mau a moyowo a Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, ndi chiphunzitsocho chili monga mwa chipembedzo:" 
1Timothy6:4 iyeyo watukumuka, wosadziwa kanthu, koma ayalukira pa mafunso ndi makani a mau, kumene zichokerako njiru, ndeu, zamwano, mayerekezo oipa;" 
1Timothy6:5 makani opanda pake a anthu oipsika nzeru ndi ochotseka choonadi, akuyesa kuti chipembedzo chipindulitsa." 
1Timothy6:6 Koma chipembedzo pamodzi ndi kudekha chipindulitsa kwakukulu; 
1Timothy6:7 pakuti sitinatenga kanthu polowa m'dziko lapansi, ndiponso sitikhoza kupita nako kanthu pochoka pano;" 
1Timothy6:8 koma pokhala nazo zakudya ndi zofunda, zimene zitikwanire." 
1Timothy6:9 Koma iwo akufuna kukhala achuma amagwa m'chiyesero ndi m'msampha, ndi m'zilakolako zambiri zopusa ndi zopweteka, zotere zonga zimiza anthu m'chionongeko ndi chitayiko." 
1Timothy6:10 Pakuti muzu wa zoipa zonse ndiwo chikondi cha pa ndalama; chimene ena pochikhumba, anasochera, nataya chikhulupiriro, nadzipyoza ndi zowawa zambiri." 
1Timothy6:11 Koma iwe, munthu wa Mulungu iwe, thawa izi; nutsate chilungamo, chipembedzo, chikhulupiriro, chikondi, chipiriro, chifatso." 
1Timothy6:12 Limba nayo nkhondo yabwino ya chikhulupiriro, gwira moyo wosatha, umene adakuitanira, ndipo wavomereza chivomerezo chabwino pamaso pa mboni zambiri." 
1Timothy6:13 Ndikulamulira pamaso pa Mulungu, wozipatsa zinthu zonse moyo, ndi Khristu Yesu, amene anachitira umboni chivomerezo chabwino kwa Pontio Pilato;" 
1Timothy6:14 kuti usunge lamulolo, lopanda banga, lopanda chilema, kufikira maonekedwe a Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu;" 
1Timothy6:15 limene adzalionetsa m'nyengo za Iye yekha, amene ali Mwini Mphamvu wodala ndi wayekha, ndiye Mfumu ya mafumu ndi Mbuye wa ambuye;" 
1Timothy6:16 amene Iye yekha ali nao moyo wosatha, wakukhala m'kuunika kosakhozeka kufikako; amene munthu sanamuona, kapena sakhoza kumuona; kwa Iye kukhale ulemu ndi mphamvu yosatha. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Lamulira iwo achuma m'nthawi yino ya pansi pano, kuti asadzikuze, kapena asayembekezere chuma chosadziwika kukhala kwake, koma Mulungu, amene atipatsa ife zonse kochulukira, kuti tikondwere nazo;" 
1Timothy6:18 kuti achite zabwino, nachuluke ndi ntchito zabwino, nakondwere kugawira ena, nayanjane;" 
1Timothy6:19 nadzikundikire okha maziko okoma ku nyengo ikudzayi, kuti akagwire moyo weniweniwo." 
1Timothy6:20 Timoteo iwe, dikira chokusungitsa, ndi kulewa zokamba zopanda pake ndi zotsutsana za ichi chitchedwa chizindikiritso konama;" 
1Timothy6:21 chimene ena pochivomereza adalakwa ndi kutaya chikhulupiriro. Chisomo chikhale nanu. 
2Timothy1:1 Paulo mtumwi wa Khristu Yesu mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu, monga mwa lonjezano la moyo wa m'Khristu Yesu," 
2Timothy1:2 kwa Timoteo, mwana wanga wokondedwa: Chisomo, chifundo, mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Khristu Yesu Ambuye wathu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndiyamika Mulungu, amene ndimtumikira kuyambira makolo anga ndi chikumbu mtima choyera, kuti ndikumbukira iwe kosalekeza m'mapemphero anga," 
2Timothy1:4 pokhumba usiku ndi usana kukuona iwe, ndi kukumbukira misozi yako, kuti ndidzazidwe nacho chimwemwe;" 
2Timothy1:5 pokumbukira chikhulupiriro chosanyenga chili mwa iwe, chimene chinayamba kukhala mwa mbuye wako Loisi, ndi mwa mai wako Yunisi, ndipo, ndakopeka mtima, mwa iwenso." 
2Timothy1:6 Chifukwa chake ndikukumbutsa iwe ukoleze mphatso ya Mulungu, ili mwa iwe mwa kuika kwa manja anga." 
2Timothy1:7 Pakuti Mulungu sanatipatsa mzimu wa mantha; komatu wa mphamvu ndi chikondi ndi chidziletso. 
2Timothy1:8 Potero usachite manyazi pa umboni wa Ambuye wathu, kapena pa ine wandende wake; komatu umve masautso ndi Uthenga Wabwino, monga mwa mphamvu ya Mulungu;" 
2Timothy1:9 amene anatipulumutsa ife, natiitana ife ndi maitanidwe oyera, si monga mwa ntchito zathu, komatu monga mwa chitsimikizo mtima cha Iye yekha, ndi chisomo, chopatsika kwa ife mwa Khristu Yesu nthawi zisanayambe," 
2Timothy1:10 koma chaonetsedwa tsopano m'maonekedwe a Mpulumutsi wathu Khristu Yesu, amenedi anatha imfa, naonetsera poyera moyo ndi chosavunda mwa Uthenga Wabwino," 
2Timothy1:11 umene ndaikikapo mlaliki, ndi mtumwi ndi mphunzitsi wake." 
2Timothy1:12 Chifukwa cha ichicho ndinamva zowawa izi; komatu sindichita manyazi; pakuti ndimdziwa Iye amene ndamkhulupirira, ndipo ndikopeka mtima kuti ali wa mphamvu ya kudikira chosungitsa changacho kufikira tsiku lijalo." 
2Timothy1:13 Gwira chitsanzo cha mau a moyo, amene udawamva kwa ine, mwa chikhulupiriro ndi chikondi chili mwa Khristu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Chosungitsa chokomacho udikire mwa Mzimu Woyera amene akhalitsa mwa ife. 
2Timothy1:15 Ichi uchidziwa, kuti onse a m'Asiya adabwerera kusiyana nane; a iwo ali Figelo ndi Heremogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Ambuye achitire banja la Onesifore chifundo; pakuti anatsitsimutsa ine kawirikawiri, ndipo sanachita manyazi ndi unyolo wanga;" 
2Timothy1:17 komatu pokhala m'Roma iye anandifunafuna ine ndi khama, nandipeza." 
2Timothy1:18 (Ambuye ampatse iye apeze chifundo ndi Ambuye tsiku lijalo); ndi muja ananditumikira m'zinthu zambiri m'Efeso, uzindikira iwe bwino." 
2Timothy2:1 Ndipo iwe, mwana wanga, limbika m'chisomo cha m'Khristu Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Ndipo zimene wazimva kwa ine mwa mboni zambiri, zomwezi uikize kwa anthu okhulupirika, amene adzadziwa kuphunzitsa enanso." 
2Timothy2:3 Umve zowawa pamodzi nane monga msilikali wabwino wa Khristu Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Msilikali sakodwa nazo ntchito wamba, kuti akakondweretse iye amene adamlemba usilikali." 
2Timothy2:5 Koma ngatinso wina ayesana nao m'makani amasewero, samveka korona ngati sanayesana monga adapangana." 
2Timothy2:6 Wam'munda wogwiritsitsa ntchitoyo ayenera akhale woyamba kulandira zipatsozo. 
2Timothy2:7 Lingirira chimene ndinena; pakuti Ambuye adzakupatsa chidziwitso m'zonse. 
2Timothy2:8 Kumbukira Yesu Khristu, wouka kwa akufa, wochokera m'mbeu ya Davide, monga mwa Uthenga Wabwino wanga;" 
2Timothy2:9 m'menemo ndimva zowawa kufikira zomangira, monga wochita zoipa; koma mau a Mulungu samangika." 
2Timothy2:10 Mwa ichi ndipirira zonse, chifukwa cha osankhika, kuti iwonso akapeze chipulumutsocho cha mwa Khristu Yesu, pamodzi ndi ulemerero wosatha." 
2Timothy2:11 Okhulupirika mauwa: Pakuti ngati tidamwalira ndi Iye, tidzakhalanso moyo ndi Iye:" 
2Timothy2:12 ngati tipirira, tidzachitanso ufumu ndi Iye: ngati timkana Iye, Iyeyunso adzatikana ife:" 
2Timothy2:13 ngati tikhala osakhulupirika, Iyeyu akhala wokhulupirika; pakuti sakhoza kudzikana yekha." 
2Timothy2:14 Uwakumbutse izi, ndi kuwachitira umboni pamaso pa Ambuye, kuti asachite makani ndi mau osapindulitsa kanthu, koma ogwetsa iwo akumva." 
2Timothy2:15 Uchite changu kudzionetsera kwa Mulungu wovomerezeka, wantchito wopanda chifukwa cha kuchita manyazi, wolunjika nao bwino mau a choonadi." 
2Timothy2:16 Koma pewa nkhani zopanda pake; pakuti adzapitirira kutsata chisapembedzo," 
2Timothy2:17 ndipo mau ao adzanyeka chilonda; a iwo ali Himeneo ndi Fileto; 
2Timothy2:18 ndiwo amene adasokera kunena za choonadi, ponena kuti kuuka kwa akufa kwachitika kale, napasula chikhulupiriro cha ena." 
2Timothy2:19 Koma ndithu maziko a Mulungu aimika pokhazikika, ndi kukhala nacho chizindikiro ichi, Ambuye azindikira iwo amene ali ake; ndipo, Adzipatule kwa chosalungama yense wakutchula dzina la Ambuye." 
2Timothy2:20 Koma m'nyumba yaikulu simuli zotengera za golide ndi siliva zokha, komatunso za mtengo ndi dothi; ndipo zina zaulemu, koma zina zopanda ulemu." 
2Timothy2:21 Ngati tsono munthu adziyeretsa yekha pa izi, adzakhala chotengera cha kuulemu, chipatulidwa, choyenera kuchita nacho Mbuye, chokonzera ntchito yonse yabwino." 
2Timothy2:22 Koma thawa zilakolako za unyamata, nutsate chilungamo, chikhulupiriro, chikondi, mtendere, pamodzi ndi iwo akuitana pa Ambuye ndi mitima yoyera." 
2Timothy2:23 Koma mafunso opusa ndi opanda malango upewe, podziwa kuti abala ndeu." 
2Timothy2:24 Ndipo kapolo wa Ambuye sayenera kuchita ndeu, komatu akhale woyenera, waulere pa onse, wodziwa kuphunzitsa, woleza," 
2Timothy2:25 wolangiza iwo akutsutsana mofatsa; ngati kapena Mulungu awapatse iwo chitembenuziro, kukazindikira choonadi," 
2Timothy2:26 ndipo akadzipulumutse kumsampha wa mdierekezi, m'mene anagwidwa naye, kuchifuniro chake." 
2Timothy3:1 Koma zindikira ichi, kuti masiku otsiriza zidzafika nthawi zowawitsa." 
2Timothy3:2 Pakuti anthu adzakhala odzikonda okha, okonda ndalama, odzitamandira, odzikuza, amwano, osamvera akuwabala, osayamika," 
2Timothy3:3 osayera mtima, opanda chikondi chachibadwidwe, osayanjanitsika, akudierekeza, osakhoza kudziletsa, aukali, osakonda abwino," 
2Timothy3:4 achiwembu, aliuma olimbirira, otukumuka mtima, okonda zokondweretsa munthu, osati okonda Mulungu;" 
2Timothy3:5 akukhala nao maonekedwe a chipembedzo, koma mphamvu yake adaikana; kwa iwonso udzipatule." 
2Timothy3:6 Pakuti mwa iwo akhala akukwawira m'nyumba, nagwira akazi opusa, osenza akatundu a zoipa zao, otengedwa nazo zilakolako za mitundumitundu:" 
2Timothy3:7 ophunzira nthawi zonse, koma sakhoza konse kufikira kuchizindikiritso cha choonadi." 
2Timothy3:8 Ndipo monga momwe Yane ndi Yambere anatsutsana naye Mose, kotero iwonso atsutsana nacho choonadi; ndiwo anthu ovunditsitsa mtima, osatsimikizidwa pachikhulupiriro." 
2Timothy3:9 Koma sadzapitirirapo; pakuti kupusa kwao kudzaonekeratu kwa onse, monganso kupusa kwa iwo aja." 
2Timothy3:10 Koma iwe watsatatsata chiphunzitso changa, mayendedwe, chitsimikizo mtima, chikhulupiriro, kuleza mtima, chikondi, chipiriro," 
2Timothy3:11 mazunzo, kumva zowawa; zotere zonga anandichitira m'Antiokeya, m'Ikonio, m'Listara, mazunzo otere onga ndawamva; ndipo m'zonsezi Ambuye anandilanditsa." 
2Timothy3:12 Ndipo onse akufuna kukhala opembedza m'moyo mwa Khristu Yesu, adzamva mazunzo." 
2Timothy3:13 Koma anthu oipa ndi onyenga, adzaipa chiipire, kusokeretsa ndi kusokeretsedwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Koma ukhalebe iwe mu izi zimene waziphunzira, nutsimikizika mtima nazo, podziwa amene adakuphunzitsa;" 
2Timothy3:15 ndi kuti kuyambira ukhanda wako wadziwa malembo opatulika, okhoza kukupatsa nzeru kufikira chipulumutso, mwa chikhulupiriro cha mwa Khristu Yesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Lemba lililonse adaliuzira Mulungu, ndipo lipindulitsa pa chiphunzitso, chitsutsano, chikonzero, chilangizo cha m'chilungamo:" 
2Timothy3:17 kuti munthu wa Mulungu akhale woyenera, wokonzeka kuchita ntchito iliyonse yabwino." 
2Timothy4:1 Ndikuchitira umboni pamaso pa Mulungu ndi Khristu Yesu, amene adzaweruza amoyo ndi akufa, ndi pa maonekedwe ake ndi ufumu wake;" 
2Timothy4:2 lalikira mau; chita nao pa nthawi yake, popanda nthawi yake; tsutsa, dzudzula, chenjeza, ndi kuleza mtima konse ndi chiphunzitso." 
2Timothy4:3 Pakuti idzafika nthawi imene sadzalola chiphunzitso cholamitsa; komatu poyabwa m'khutu adzadziunjikitsa aphunzitsi monga mwa zilakolako za iwo okha: 
2Timothy4:4 ndipo adzalubza dala pachoonadi, nadzapatukira kutsata nthano zachabe." 
2Timothy4:5 Koma iwe, khala maso m'zonse, imva zowawa, chita ntchito ya mlaliki wa Uthenga Wabwino, kwaniritsa utumiki wako." 
2Timothy4:6 Pakuti ndilimkuthiridwa nsembe tsopano, ndipo nthawi ya kumasuka kwanga yafika." 
2Timothy4:7 Ndalimbana nako kulimbana kwabwino, ndatsiriza njirayo, ndasunga chikhulupiriro:" 
2Timothy4:8 chotsalira wandiikira ine korona wa chilungamo, amene Ambuye, woweruza wolungama, adzandipatsa ine tsiku lijalo: ndipo si kwa ine ndekha, komatunso kwa onse amene anakonda maonekedwe ake." 
2Timothy4:9 Tayesetsa kudza kwa ine msanga: 
2Timothy4:10 pakuti Dema wandisiya ine, atakonda dziko lino lapansi, napita ku Tesalonika; Kresike ku Galatiya, Tito ku Dalamatiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka yekha ali pamodzi ndi ine. Umtenge Marko, adze pamodzi ndi iwe; pakuti ayenera kunditumikira." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka yekha ali pamodzi ndi ine. Umtenge Marko, adze pamodzi ndi iwe; pakuti ayenera kunditumikira." 
2Timothy4:12 Koma Tikiko ndamtuma ku Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Chofunda chija ndinachisiya ku Troasi kwa Karpo, udze nacho pakudza iwe, ndi mabuku, makamaka zikopa zija zolembedwa." 
2Timothy4:14 Aleksandro wosula mkuwa anandichitira zoipa zambiri: adzambwezera iye Ambuye monga mwa ntchito zake; 
2Timothy4:15 ameneyo iwenso uchenjere naye; pakuti anatsutsana nao mau athu. 
2Timothy4:16 Pa chodzikanira changa choyamba panalibe mmodzi anandithangata, koma onse anandisiya; chimenecho chisawerengedwe chowatsutsa." 
2Timothy4:17 Koma Ambuye anaima nane nandipatsa mphamvu; kuti mwa ine chilalikiro chimveke konsekonse, ndi amitundu onse amve; ndipo ndinalanditsidwa m'kamwa mwa mkango." 
2Timothy4:18 Ambuye adzandilanditsa ku ntchito yonse yoipa, nadzandipulumutsa ine kulowa Ufumu wake wa Kumwamba; kwa Iye ukhale ulemerero kunthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Pereka moni kwa Prisika ndi Akwila, ndi banja la Onesifore." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto anakhalira m'Korinto; koma Trofimo ndamsiya wodwala ku Mileto. 
2Timothy4:21 Tayesetsa kudza isanadze nyengo yachisanu. Akukupatsa moni Yubulo, ndi Pude, ndi Lino, ndi Klaudia, ndi abale onse." 
2Timothy4:22 Ambuye akhale ndi mzimu wako. Chisomo chikhale nanu. 
Titus1:1 Paulo, kapolo wa Mulungu, ndi mtumwi wa Yesu Khristu, monga mwa chikhulupiriro cha osankhika a Mulungu, ndi chizindikiritso cha choonadi chili monga mwa chipembedzo," 
Titus1:2 m'chiyembekezo cha moyo wosatha, umene Mulungu, wosanamayo, analonjeza zisanayambe nthawi zosayamba;" 
Titus1:3 koma pa nyengo za Iye yekha anaonetsa mau ake muulalikiro, umene anandisungitsa ine, monga mwa lamulo la Mpulumutsi wathu Mulungu:" 
Titus1:4 kwa Tito, mwana wanga weniweni monga mwa chikhulupiriro cha ife tonse: Chisomo ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Khristu Yesu Mpulumutsi wathu." 
Titus1:5 Chifukwa cha ichi ndinakusiya iwe m'Krete, kuti ukalongosole zosowa, nukaike akulu m'midzi yonse, monga ndinakulamulira;" 
Titus1:6 ngati wina ali wopanda chilema, mwamuna wa mkazi mmodzi, wokhala nao ana okhulupirira, wosasakaza zake, kapena wosakana kumvera mau." 
Titus1:7 Pakuti woyang'anira ayenera kukhala wopanda chilema, ngati mdindo wa Mulungu; wosati waliuma, wosapsa mtima msanga, wosati wachiwawa, wopanda ndeu, wosati wa chisiriro chonyansa;" 
Titus1:8 komatu wokonda kuchereza alendo, wokonda zokoma, wodziweruza, wolungama, woyera mtima, wodziletsa;" 
Titus1:9 wogwira mau okhulupirika monga mwa chiphunzitso, kuti akakhoze kuchenjeza m'chiphunzitso cholamitsa, ndi kutsutsa otsutsana naye." 
Titus1:10 Pakuti alipo ambiri osamvera mau, olankhula zopanda pake, ndi onyenga, makamaka iwo akumdulidwe," 
Titus1:11 amene ayenera kutsekedwa pakamwa; ndiwo amene apasula mabanja banja lonse, ndi kuphunzitsa zosayenera chifukwa cha chisiriro chonyansa." 
Titus1:12 Wina wa mwa iwo, ndiye mneneri wa iwo okha, anati, Akrete ndiwo amabodza masiku onse, zilombo zoipa, aumbombo, aulesi." 
Titus1:13 Umboni uwu uli woona. Mwa ichi uwadzudzule mokalipa, kuti akakhale olama m'chikhulupiriro," 
Titus1:14 osasamala nthano zachabe za Chiyuda, ndi malamulo a anthu opatuka kusiyana nacho choonadi." 
Titus1:15 Zonse ziyera kwa iwo amene ayera mtima; koma kwa iwo odetsedwa ndi osakhulupirira kulibe kanthu koyera; komatu zadetsedwa nzeru zao ndi chikumbu mtima chao. 
Titus1:16 Avomereza kuti adziwa Mulungu, koma ndi ntchito zao amkana Iye, popeza ali onyansitsa, ndi osamvera, ndi pa ntchito zonse zabwino osatsimikizidwa." 
Titus2:1 Koma iwe, lankhula zimene ziyenera chiphunzitso cholamitsa:" 
Titus2:2 okalamba akhale odzisunga, olemekezeka, odziletsa, olama m'chikhulupiriro, m'chikondi, m'chipiriro." 
Titus2:3 Momwemonso akazi okalamba akhale nao makhalidwe oyenera anthu oyera, osadierekeza, osakodwa nacho chikondi cha pavinyo, akuphunzitsa zokoma;" 
Titus2:4 kuti akalangize akazi aang'ono akonde amuna ao, akonde ana ao," 
Titus2:5 akhale odziletsa, odekha, ochita m'nyumba mwao, okoma, akumvera amuna a iwo okha, kuti mau a Mulungu angachitidwe mwano." 
Titus2:6 Momwemonso anyamata uwadandaulire akhale odziletsa; 
Titus2:7 m'zonse udzionetsere wekha chitsanzo cha ntchito zabwino; m'chiphunzitso chako uonetsere chosavunda, ulemekezeko," 
Titus2:8 mau olama osatsutsika; kuti iye wakutsutsana achite manyazi, posakhala nako kanthu koipa kakutinenera ife." 
Titus2:9 Akapolo amvere ambuye ao a iwo okha, nawakondweretse m'zonse; osakana mau ao;" 
Titus2:10 osatapa pa zao, komatu aonetsere chikhulupiriko chonse chabwino; kuti akakometsere chiphunzitso cha Mpulumutsi wathu Mulungu m'zinthu zonse." 
Titus2:11 Pakuti chaonekera chisomo cha Mulungu chakupulumutsa anthu onse," 
Titus2:12 ndi kutiphunzitsa ife kuti, pokana chisapembedzo ndi zilakolako za dziko lapansi, tikhale ndi moyo m'dziko lino odziletsa, ndi olungama, ndi opembedza;" 
Titus2:13 akulindira chiyembekezo chodala, ndi maonekedwe a ulemerero wa Mulungu wamkulu ndi Mpulumutsi wathu Yesu Khristu;" 
Titus2:14 amene anadzipereka yekha m'malo mwa ife, kuti akatiombole ife kuzoipa zonse, nakadziyeretsere yekha anthu akhale ake enieni, achangu pa ntchito zokoma." 
Titus2:15 Izi lankhula, ndipo uchenjeze, nudzudzule ndi ulamuliro wonse. Munthu asakupeputse." 
Titus3:1 Uwakumbutse iwo agonje kwa akulu, ndi aulamuliro, akhale omvera, okonzeka pa ntchito iliyonse yabwino;" 
Titus3:2 asachitire mwano munthu aliyense, asakhale andeu, akhale aulere, naonetsere chifatso chonse pa anthu onse." 
Titus3:3 Pakuti kale ifenso tinali opusa, osamvera, onyengeka, akuchitira ukapolo zilakolako ndi zokondweretsa za mitundumitundu, okhala m'dumbo ndi njiru, odanidwa, odana wina ndi mnzake." 
Titus3:4 Koma pamene kukoma mtima, ndi chikondi cha pa anthu, cha Mpulumutsi wathu Mulungu zidanoneka," 
Titus3:5 zosati zochokera m'ntchito za m'chilungamo, zimene tidazichita ife, komatu monga mwa chifundo chake anatipulumutsa ife, mwa kutsuka kwa kubadwanso ndi makonzedwe a Mzimu Woyera," 
Titus3:6 amene anatsanulira pa ife mochulukira, mwa Yesu Khristu Mpulumutsi wathu;" 
Titus3:7 kuti poyesedwa olungama ndi chisomo cha Iyetu, tikayesedwe olowa nyumba monga mwa chiyembekezo cha moyo wosatha." 
Titus3:8 Okhulupirika mauwa, ndipo za izi ndifuna kuti ulimbitse mau, kuti iwo akukhulupirira Mulungu asamalire akhalebe atsogoleri a ntchito zabwino. Izi nzokoma ndi zopindulitsa anthu;" 
Titus3:9 koma pewa mafunso opusa, ndi mawerengedwe a mibadwo, ndi ndeu, ndi makani a pamalamulo; pakuti sizipindulitsa, ndipo zili zachabe." 
Titus3:10 Munthu wopatukira chikhulupiriro, utamchenjeza kamodzi ndi kawiri, umkanize," 
Titus3:11 podziwa kuti wotereyo wasandulika konse, nachimwa, nakhala wodzitsutsa yekha." 
Titus3:12 Pamene ndikatuma Aritema kwa iwe, kapena Tikiko, chita changu kudza kwa ine ku Nikopoli: pakuti ndatsimikiza mtima kugonerako nyengo yachisanu." 
Titus3:13 Zena nkhoswe ya milandu, ndi Apolo ufulumire kuwakonzera zaulendo, kuti asasowe kanthu," 
Titus3:14 Ndipo anthu athu aphunzirenso asunge ntchito zabwino zofunika, kuti asakhale osabala zipatso." 
Titus3:15 Akukupatsa moni onse akukhala pamodzi ndi ine. Pereka moni kwa otikondawo m'chikhulupiriro. Chisomo chikhale ndi inu nonse. 
Philemon1:1 Paulo, wandende wa Khristu Yesu, ndi Timoteo mbaleyo, kwa Filemoni wokondedwayo ndi wantchito mnzathu," 
Philemon1:2 ndi kwa Afiya mlongoyo, ndi Arkipo msilikali mnzathu, ndi kwa Mpingo uli m'nyumba yako:" 
Philemon1:3 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Khristu. 
Philemon1:4 Ndiyamika Mulungu wanga nthawi zonse, ndi kukumbukira iwe m'mapemphero anga," 
Philemon1:5 pakumva za chikondi chako ndi chikhulupiriro uli nacho chakulinga kwa Ambuye Yesu, ndi kwa oyera mtima onse;" 
Philemon1:6 kuti chiyanjano cha chikhulupiriro chako chikakhale champhamvu podziwa chabwino chilichonse chili mwa inu, cha kwa Khristu." 
Philemon1:7 Pakuti ndinali nacho chimwemwe chambiri ndi chisangalatso pa chikondi chako, popeza mitima ya oyera mtima yatsitsimuka mwa iwe, mbale." 
Philemon1:8 Momwemo, ndingakhale ndili nako kulimbika mtima kwakukulu m'Khristu kukulamulira chimene chiyenera," 
Philemon1:9 koma makamaka ndidandaulira mwa chikondi, pokhala wotere, Paulo nkhalamba, ndipo tsopano wandendenso wa Khristu Yesu;" 
Philemon1:10 ndikudandaulira chifukwa cha mwana wanga, amene ndambala m'ndende, Onesimo," 
Philemon1:11 amene kale sanakupindulira, koma tsopano watipindulira bwino iwe ndi ine;" 
Philemon1:12 amene ndi yemweyo ndakubwezera iwe, ndiye mtima weniweni wa ine." 
Philemon1:13 Ameneyo ndikadafuna ine kumsunga akhale nane, kuti m'malo mwako akadanditumikira ine m'ndende za Uthenga Wabwino:" 
Philemon1:14 koma wopanda kudziwa mtima wako sindinafuna kuchita kanthu; kuti ubwino wako usakhale monga mokakamiza, komatu mwaufulu." 
Philemon1:15 Pakuti kapena anasiyanitsidwa ndi iwe kanthawi chifukwa cha ichi, ndi kuti udzakhala naye nthawi zonse;" 
Philemon1:16 osatinso monga kapolo, koma woposa kapolo, mbale wokondedwa, makamaka ndi ine, koma koposa nanga ndi iwe, m'thupi, ndiponso mwa Ambuye." 
Philemon1:17 Ngati tsono undiyesa woyanjana nawe, umlandire iye monga ine mwini." 
Philemon1:18 Koma ngati anakulakwira kanthu, kapena wokongola kanthu, kanthu, kapena wakongola kanthu, undiwerengere ine kameneko;" 
Philemon1:19 ine Paulo ndichilemba ndi dzanja langa, ndidzachibwezera ine; kuti ndisanene nawe kuti iwe ndiwe mangawa anga." 
Philemon1:20 Inde, mbale, ndikondwere nawe mwa Ambuye: utsitsimutse mtima wanga mwa Khristu." 
Philemon1:21 Pokhulupirira kumvera kwako ndikulembera iwe, podziwa kuti udzachitanso koposa chimene ndinena." 
Philemon1:22 Koma undikonzerenso pogona; pakuti ndiyembekeza kuti mwa mapemphero anu ndidzapatsidwa kwa inu. 
Philemon1:23 Epafra wandende mnzanga mwa Khristu Yesu akukupatsa moni; 
Philemon1:24 ateronso, Marko, Aristariko, Dema, Luka, antchito anzanga." 
Philemon1:24 ateronso, Marko, Aristariko, Dema, Luka, antchito anzanga." 
Philemon1:25 Chisomo cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu chikhale pamodzi ndi mzimu wanu. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 Kale Mulungu analankhula ndi makolo mwa aneneri m'manenedwe ambiri ndi mosiyanasiyana," 
Hebrews1:2 koma pakutha pake pa masiku ano analankhula ndi ife ndi Mwana amene anamuika wolowa nyumba wa zonse, mwa Iyenso analenga maiko ndi am'mwamba omwe;" 
Hebrews1:3 ameneyo, pokhala ali chinyezimiro cha ulemerero wake, ndi chizindikiro chenicheni cha chikhalidwe chake, nanyamula zonse ndi mau a mphamvu yake, m'mene adachita chiyeretso cha zoipa, anakhala pa dzanja lamanja la Ukulu m'Mwamba," 
Hebrews1:4 atakhala wakuposa angelo, monga momwe adalowa dzina lakuposa iwo." 
Hebrews1:5 Pakuti kwa mngelo uti anati nthawi iliyonse, Iwe ndiwe Mwana wanga, lero Ine ndakubala Iwe? Ndiponso, Ine ndidzakhala kwa Iye Atate, ndipo Iye adzakhala kwa Ine Mwana?" 
Hebrews1:6 Ndipo pamene atenganso wobadwa woyamba kulowa naye m'dziko, anena, Ndipo amgwadire Iye angelo onse a Mulungu." 
Hebrews1:7 Ndipo za angelo anenadi, Amene ayesa angelo ake mizimu, ndi omtumikira Iye akhale malawi amoto." 
Hebrews1:8 Koma ponena za Mwana, ati, Mpando wachifumu wanu, Mulungu, ufikira nthawi za nthawi; ndipo ndodo yachifumu yoongoka ndiyo ndodo ya ufumu wanu." 
Hebrews1:9 Mwakonda chilungamo, ndi kudana nacho choipa; mwa ichi Mulungu, ndiye Mulungu wanu, wakudzozani ndi mafuta a chikondwerero chenicheni koposa anzanu." 
Hebrews1:10 Ndipo, Inu, Ambuye, pachiyambipo munaika maziko ake a dziko, ndipo miyamba ili ntchito ya manja anu." 
Hebrews1:11 Iyo idzataika; komatu mukhalitsa; ndipo iyo yonse idzasuka monga malaya; 
Hebrews1:12 ndi monga chofunda mudzaipinda monga malaya, ndipo idzasanduka; koma Inu ndinu yemweyo, ndipo zaka zanu sizidzatha." 
Hebrews1:13 Koma za mngelo uti anati nthawi iliyonse, Khala pa dzanja lamanja langa, Kufikira ndikaika adani ako mpando wa kumapazi ako?" 
Hebrews1:14 Kodi siili yonse mizimu yotumikira, yotumidwa kuti itumikire iwo amene adzalowa chipulumutso?" 
Hebrews2:1 Mwa ichi tiyenera kusamaliradi zimene tidazimvazi kuti kapena tingatengedwe ndi kusiyana nazo. 
Hebrews2:2 Pakuti ngati mau adalankhulidwa ndi angelo adakhala okhazikika, ndipo cholakwira chilichonse ndi chosamvera chalandira mphotho yobwezera yolungama," 
Hebrews2:3 tidzapulumuka bwanji ife, tikapanda kusamala chipulumutso chachikulu chotero? Chimene Ambuye adayamba kuchilankhula, ndipo iwo adachimva anatilimbikitsira ife;" 
Hebrews2:4 pochita umboni pamodzi nao Mulungunso ndi zizindikiro, ndi zozizwitsa ndi mphamvu za mitundumitundu ndi zogawira za Mzimu Woyera, monga mwa chifuniro chake." 
Hebrews2:5 Pakuti sanagonjetsera angelo dziko lilinkudza limene tinenali. 
Hebrews2:6 Koma wina anachita umboni pena, nati, Munthu nchiyani kuti mumkumbukira iye? Kapena mwana wa munthu kuti mucheza naye?" 
Hebrews2:7 Munamchepsa pang'ono ndi angelo, mudamveka iye korona wa ulemerero ndi ulemu, ndipo mudamuika iye woyang'anira ntchito za manja anu;" 
Hebrews2:8 mudagonjetsa zonse pansi pa mapazi ake. Pakuti muja adagonjetsa zonse kwa iye, sanasiyapo kanthu kosamgonjera iye. Koma sitinayamba tsopano apa kuona zonse zimgonjera." 
Hebrews2:9 Koma timpenya Iye amene adamchepsa pang'ono ndi angelo, ndiye Yesu, chifukwa cha zowawa za imfa, wovala korona wa ulemerero ndi ulemu, kuti ndi chisomo cha Mulungu alawe imfa m'malo mwa munthu aliyense." 
Hebrews2:10 Pakuti kunamuyenera Iye amene zonse zili chifukwa cha Iye, ndi zonse mwa Iye, pakutenga ana ambiri alowe ulemerero, kumkonza wamphumphu mtsogoleri woyamba wa chipulumutso chao mwa zowawa." 
Hebrews2:11 Pakuti Iye wakuyeretsa ndi iwo akuyeretsedwa achokera onse mwa mmodzi; chifukwa cha ichi alibe manyazi kuwatcha iwo abale. 
Hebrews2:12 Ndi kuti, Ndidzalalikira dzina lanu kwa abale anga, pakati pa Mpingo ndidzakuimbirani." 
Hebrews2:13 Ndiponso, Ndidzamtama Iye. Ndiponso, Taonani, Ine ndi ana amene Mulungu anandipatsa." 
Hebrews2:14 Popeza tsono ana ndiwo a mwazi ndi nyama, Iyenso momwemo adalawa nao makhalidwe omwewo kuti mwa imfa akamuononge iye amene anali nayo mphamvu ya imfa, ndiye mdierekezi;" 
Hebrews2:15 nakamasule iwo onse amene, chifukwa cha kuopa imfa, m'moyo wao wonse adamangidwa ukapolo." 
Hebrews2:16 Pakuti ndithu salandira angelo, koma alandira mbeu ya Abrahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Potero kudamuyenera kufanizidwa ndi abale m'zonse, kuti akadzakhala mkulu wa ansembe wachifundo ndi wokhulupirika m'zinthu za kwa Mulungu, kuti apereke dipo la zoipa za anthu." 
Hebrews2:18 Pakuti popeza adamva zowawa, poyesedwa yekha, akhoza kuthandiza iwo amene ayesedwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Potero, abale oyera mtima, olandirana nao maitanidwe akumwamba, lingirirani za Mtumwi ndi Mkulu wa ansembe wa chivomerezo chathu, Yesu;" 
Hebrews3:2 amene anakhala wokhulupirika kwa Iye adamuikayo, monganso Mose m'nyumba yake yonse." 
Hebrews3:3 Pakuti ameneyo wayesedwa woyenera ulemerero woposa Mose, monga momwe iye amene anaimanga nyumba ali nao ulemerero woposa nyumbayi." 
Hebrews3:4 Pakuti nyumba iliyonse ili naye wina woimanga; koma wozimanga zonse ndiye Mulungu. 
Hebrews3:5 Ndipo Mosetu anali wokhulupirika m'nyumba yake yonse, monga mnyamata, achitire umboni izi zidzalankhulidwazi;" 
Hebrews3:6 koma Khristu monga mwana, wosunga nyumba yake; ndife nyumba yake, ngati tigwiritsa kulimbika mtima ndi kudzitamandira kwa chiyembekezocho, kuchigwira kufikira chitsiriziro." 
Hebrews3:7 Momwemo, monga anena Mzimu Woyera, Lero ngati mudzamva mau ake," 
Hebrews3:8 musaumitse mitima yanu, monga m'kupsetsa mtimamo, monga muja tsiku la chiyesero m'chipululu," 
Hebrews3:9 chimene makolo anu anandiyesa nacho, ndi kundivomereza, naona ntchito zanga zaka makumi anai." 
Hebrews3:10 Momwemo ndinakwiya nao mbadwo uwu, ndipo ndinati, Nthawi zonse amasochera mumtima; koma sanazindikira njira zanga iwowa;" 
Hebrews3:11 Monga ndinalumbira m'ukali wanga: Ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga! 
Hebrews3:12 Tapenyani, abale, kuti kapena ukakhale mwa wina wa inu mtima woipa wosakhulupirira, wakulekana ndi Mulungu wamoyo;" 
Hebrews3:13 komatu dandaulirananani nokha tsiku ndi tsiku, pamene patchedwa, Lero; kuti angaumitsidwe wina wa inu ndi chenjerero la uchimo;" 
Hebrews3:14 pakuti takhala ife olandirana ndi Khristu, ngatitu tigwiritsa chiyambi cha kutama kwathu kuchigwira kufikira chitsiriziro;" 
Hebrews3:15 umo anenamo, Lero ngati mudzamva mau ake, musaumitse mitima yanu, monga pa kupsetsa mtima." 
Hebrews3:16 Pakuti ndi ayani, pakumva, anapsetsa mtima? Kodi si onse aja adatuluka m'Ejipito ndi Mose?" 
Hebrews3:17 Koma anakwiya ndi ayani zaka makumi anai? Kodi si ndi awo adachimwawo, amene matupi ao adagwa m'chipululu?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ndipo adawalumbirira ayani kuti asalowe mpumulo wake? 
Hebrews3:19 Si awo kodi osamverawo? Ndipo tiona kuti sanakhoza kulowa chifukwa cha kusakhulupirira. 
Hebrews4:1 Chifukwa chake tiope kuti kapena likatsala lonjezano lakulowa mpumulo wake, wina wa inu angaoneke ngati adaliperewera." 
Hebrews4:2 Pakuti kwa ifenso walalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino, monganso kwa iwo; koma iwowa sanapindula nao mau omvekawo, popeza sanasanganizika ndi chikhulupiriro mwa iwo amene adawamva." 
Hebrews4:3 Popeza ife amene takhulupirira tilowa mpumulowo, monga momwe ananena, Monga ndalumbira mu mkwiyo wanga, ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga. Zingakhale ntchitozo zidatsirizika kuyambira kuzika kwa dziko lapansi." 
Hebrews4:4 Pakuti wanena pena za tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri, natero, Ndipo Mulungu anapumula tsiku lachisanu ndi chiwiri, kuleka ntchito zake zonse." 
Hebrews4:5 Ndipo m'menemonso, Ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga." 
Hebrews4:6 Popeza tsono patsala kuti ena akalowa momwemo, ndi iwo amene Uthenga Wabwino unalalikidwa kwa iwo kale sanalowamo chifukwa cha kusamvera," 
Hebrews4:7 alangizanso tsiku lina, ndi kunena m'Davide, itapita nthawi yaikulu yakuti, Lero, monga kwanenedwa kale, Lero ngati mudzamva mau ake, musaumitse mitima yanu." 
Hebrews4:8 Pakuti ngati Yoswa akadawapumitsa iwo, sakadalankhula m'tsogolomo za tsiku lina." 
Hebrews4:9 Momwemo utsalira mpumulo wa Sabata wa kwa anthu a Mulungu. 
Hebrews4:10 Pakuti iye amene adalowa mpumulo wake, adapumulanso mwini wake kuntchito zake, monganso Mulungu kuzake za Iye." 
Hebrews4:11 Chifukwa chake tichite changu cha kulowa mpumulowo, kuti wina angagwe m'chitsanzo chomwe cha kusamvera." 
Hebrews4:12 Pakuti mau a Mulungu ali amoyo, ndi ochitachita, ndi akuthwa koposa lupanga lakuthwa konsekonse, napyoza kufikira kugawira moyo ndi mzimu, ndi zimfundo ndi mafuta a m'mafupa, nazindikiritsa zolingirira ndi zitsimikizo za mtima." 
Hebrews4:13 Ndipo palibe cholembedwa chosaonekera pamaso pake, koma zonse zikhala za pambalambanda ndi zovundukuka pamaso pake pa Iye amene tichita naye." 
Hebrews4:14 Popeza tsono tili naye Mkulu wa ansembe wamkulu, wopyoza miyamba, Yesu mwana wa Mulungu, tigwiritsitse chivomerezo chathu." 
Hebrews4:15 Pakuti sitili naye mkulu wa ansembe wosatha kumva chifundo ndi zofooka zathu; koma wayesedwa m'zonse monga momwe ife, koma wopanda uchimo." 
Hebrews4:16 Potero tilimbike mtima poyandikira mpando wachifumu wachisomo, kuti tilandire chifundo ndi kupeza chisomo cha kutithandiza nthawi yakusowa."
