Hebrews5:1 Pakuti mkulu wa ansembe aliyense, wotengedwa mwa anthu, amaikika chifukwa cha anthu m'zinthu za kwa Mulungu, kuti apereke mitulo, ndiponso nsembe chifukwa cha machimo:" 
Hebrews5:2 akhale wokhoza kumva chifundo ndi osadziwa ndi olakwa, popeza iye yekhanso amazingwa ndi chifooko;" 
Hebrews5:3 ndipo chifukwa chakecho ayenera, monga m'malo a anthuwo, moteronso m'malo a iye yekha, kupereka nsembe chifukwa cha machimo." 
Hebrews5:4 Ndipo palibe munthu adzitengera ulemuwo mwini wake, komatu iye amene aitanidwa ndi Mulungu, monga momwenso Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Koteronso Khristu sanadzilemekeza yekha ayesedwe Mkulu wa ansembe, komatu Iye amene analankhula kwa Iye, Mwana wanga ndi Iwe, lero Ine ndakubala Iwe." 
Hebrews5:6 Monga anenanso mwina, Iwe ndiwe wansembe wa nthawi zonse monga mwa dongosolo la Melkizedeki." 
Hebrews5:7 Ameneyo, m'masiku a thupi lake anapereka mapemphero ndi mapembedzero pamodzi ndi kulira kwakukulu ndi misozi kwa Iye amene anakhoza kumpulumutsa Iye muimfa, ndipo anamveka popeza anaopa Mulungu," 
Hebrews5:8 angakhale anali Mwana, anaphunzira kumvera ndi izi adamva kuwawa nazo;" 
Hebrews5:9 ndipo pamene anakonzeka wamphumphu anakhala kwa onse akumvera Iye chifukwa cha chipulumutso chosatha; 
Hebrews5:10 wotchedwa ndi Mulungu mkulu wa ansembe monga mwa dongosolo la Melkizedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Za iye tili nao mau ambiri kuwanena, ndi otilaka powatanthauzira, popeza mwagontha m'makutu." 
Hebrews5:12 Pakuti mungakhale mwayenera kukhala aphunzitsi chifukwa cha nyengoyi, muli nako kusowanso kuti wina aphunzitse inu zoyamba za chiyambidwe cha maneno a Mulungu; ndipo mukhala onga ofuna mkaka, osati chakudya chotafuna." 
Hebrews5:13 Pakuti yense wakudya mkaka alibe chizolowezi cha mau a chilungamo; pakuti ali khanda. 
Hebrews5:14 Koma chakudya chotafuna chili cha anthu akulu misinkhu, amene mwa kuchita nazo anazoloweretsa zizindikiritso zao kusiyanitsa chabwino ndi choipa." 
Hebrews6:1 Mwa ichi, polekana nao mau a chiyambidwe cha Khristu, tipitirire kutsata ukulu msinkhu; osaikanso maziko a kutembenuka mtima kusiyana nazo ntchito zakufa, ndi a chikhulupiriro cha pa Mulungu," 
Hebrews6:2 a chiphunzitso cha ubatizo, a kuika manja, a kuuka kwa akufa, ndi a chiweruziro chosatha." 
Hebrews6:3 Ndipo ichi tidzachita, akatilola Mulungu." 
Hebrews6:4 Pakuti sikutheka kuwakonzanso, atembenuke mtima, iwo amene anaunikidwa pa nthawi yake, nalawa mphatso ya Kumwamba, nakhala olandirana naye Mzimu Woyera," 
Hebrews6:5 nalawa mau okoma a Mulungu, ndi mphamvu ya nthawi ilinkudza," 
Hebrews6:6 koma anagwa m'chisokero; popeza adzipachikiranso okha Mwana wa Mulungu, namchititsa manyazi poyera." 
Hebrews6:7 Pakuti nthaka imene idamwa mvula iigwera kawirikawiri, nipatsa therere loyenera iwo amene adailimira, ilandira dalitso lochokera kwa Mulungu:" 
Hebrews6:8 koma ikabala minga ndi mitungwi, itayika; nitsala pang'ono ikadatembereredwa; chitsiriziro chake ndicho kutenthedwa." 
Hebrews6:9 Koma, okondedwa, takopeka mtima kuti za inu zili zoposa ndi zophatikana chipulumutso, tingakhale titero pakulankhula;" 
Hebrews6:10 pakuti Mulungu sali wosalungama kuti adzaiwala ntchito yanu, ndi chikondicho mudachionetsera kudzina lake, umo mudatumikira oyera mtima ndi kuwatumikirabe." 
Hebrews6:11 Koma tikhumba kuti yense wa inu aonetsere changu chomwechi cholinga kuchiyembekezo chokwanira kufikira chitsiriziro; 
Hebrews6:12 kuti musakhale aulesi, koma akuwatsanza iwo amene alikulowa malonjezano mwa chikhulupiriro ndi kuleza mtima." 
Hebrews6:13 Pakuti pamene Mulungu analonjezana naye Abrahamu, popeza analibe wamkulu woposa kumlumbira, analumbira pa Iye yekha," 
Hebrews6:14 nati, Kudalitsatu ndidzakudalitsa iwe, ndipo kuchulukitsa ndidzakuchulukitsa iwe." 
Hebrews6:15 Ndipo potero atapirira analandira lonjezanolo. 
Hebrews6:16 Pakuti anthu amalumbira pa wamkulu; ndipo m'chitsutsano chao chilichonse lumbiro litsiriza kutsimikiza. 
Hebrews6:17 Momwemo Mulungu, pofuna kuonetsera mochulukira kwa olowa a lonjezano kuti chifuniro chake sichisinthika, analowa pakati ndi lumbiro;" 
Hebrews6:18 kuti mwa zinthu ziwiri zosasinthika, m'mene Mulungu sakhoza kunama, tikakhale nacho chotichenjeza cholimba, ife amene tidathawira kuchigwira chiyembekezo choikika pamaso pathu;" 
Hebrews6:19 chimene tili nacho ngati nangula wa moyo, chokhazikika ndi cholimbanso, ndi chakulowa m'katikati mwa chophimba;" 
Hebrews6:20 m'mene Yesu mtsogoleri analowamo chifukwa cha ife, atakhala mkulu wa ansembe nthawi yosatha monga mwa dongosolo la Melkizedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Pakuti Melkizedeki uyu, mfumu ya Salemu, wansembe wa Mulungu Wamkulukulu, amene anakomana ndi Abrahamu, pobwera iye adawapha mafumu aja, namdalitsa," 
Hebrews7:2 amenenso Abrahamu anamgawira limodzi la magawo khumi la zonse (ndiye posandulika, poyamba ali mfumu ya chilungamo, pameneponso mfumu ya Salemu, ndiko, mfumu ya mtendere;" 
Hebrews7:3 wopanda atate wake, wopanda amake, wopanda mawerengedwe a chibadwidwe chake, alibe chiyambi cha masiku ake kapena chitsiriziro cha moyo wake, wofanizidwa ndi Mwana wa Mulungu), iyeyu wakhala wansembe kosalekeza." 
Hebrews7:4 Koma tapenyani ukulu wake wa iyeyu, amene Abrahamu, kholo lalikulu, anampatsa limodzi la magawo khumi la zosankhika za kunkhondo." 
Hebrews7:5 Ndipo iwotu mwa ana a Levi akulandira ntchito yakupereka nsembe, ali nalo lamulo lakuti atenge limodzi la magawo khumi kwa anthu monga mwa chilamulo, ndiko kwa abale ao, angakhale adatuluka m'chuuno cha Abrahamu;" 
Hebrews7:6 koma iye amene mawerengedwe a chibadwidwe chake sachokera mwa iwo, anatenga limodzi la magawo khumi kwa Abrahamu, namdalitsa iye amene ali nao malonjezano." 
Hebrews7:7 Ndipo popanda chitsutsano konse wamng'ono adalitsidwa ndi wamkulu. 
Hebrews7:8 Ndipo pano anthu ofeka alandira limodzi la magawo khumi; koma apo iye, woti adamchitira umboni kuti ali ndi moyo." 
Hebrews7:9 Ndipo kuli ngati kunena, mwa Abrahamu Levinso wakulandira limodzilimodzi la magawo khumi adapereka limodzi la magawo khumi;" 
Hebrews7:10 pakuti pajapo anali m'chuuno cha atate wake, pamene Melkizedeki anakomana naye." 
Hebrews7:11 Ndipo pakadakhala ungwiro mwa unsembe wa Chilevi (pakuti momwemo anthu analandira chilamulo), pakadatsala kusowa kotani kuti auke wansembe wina monga mwa dongosolo la Melkizedeki, wosayesedwa monga mwa dongosolo la Aroni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Pakuti posandulika unsembe, kufunikanso kuti lamulo lisandulike." 
Hebrews7:13 Pakuti Iye amene izi zineneka za Iye, akhala wa fuko lina, wa ili palibe munthu watumikira guwa la nsembe." 
Hebrews7:14 Pakuti kwadziwikadi kuti Ambuye wathu anatuluka mwa Yuda; za fuko ili Mose sanalankhula kanthu ka ansembe. 
Hebrews7:15 Ndipo kwadziwikatu koposa ndithu, ngati auka wansembe wina monga mwa mafanidwe a Melkizedeki," 
Hebrews7:16 amene wakhala si monga mwa lamulo la lamuliro la kwa thupi, komatu monga mwa mphamvu ya moyo wosaonongeka;" 
Hebrews7:17 pakuti amchitira umboni, Iwe ndiwe wansembe nthawi yosatha monga mwa dongosolo la Melkizedeki." 
Hebrews7:18 Pakutitu kuli kutaya kwake kwa lamulo lidadza kalelo, chifukwa cha kufooka kwake, ndi kusapindulitsa kwake," 
Hebrews7:19 (pakuti chilamulo sichinachitira kanthu kakhale kopanda chilema), ndipo kulinso kulowa nacho chiyembekezo choposa, chimene tiyandikira nacho kwa Mulungu." 
Hebrews7:20 Ndipo monga momwe sikudachitika kopanda lumbiro; (pakuti iwotu anayesedwa ansembe kopanda lumbiro; 
Hebrews7:21 koma Iye ndi lumbiro mwa Iye amene anenana kwa Iye, Walumbira Ambuye ndipo sadzalapa, iwe ndiwe wansembe nthawi yosatha)." 
Hebrews7:22 Momwemonso Yesu wakhala Nkhoswe ya pangano loposa. 
Hebrews7:23 Ndipo iwo ndiwo ambiri anakhala ansembe, popeza imfa idawaletsa asakhalebe;" 
Hebrews7:24 koma Iye chifukwa kuti akhala Iye nthawi yosatha ali nao unsembe wosasinthika," 
Hebrews7:25 kuchokera komweko akhoza kupulumutsa konsekonse iwo akuyandikira kwa Mulungu mwa Iye, popeza ali nao moyo wake chikhalire wa kuwapembedzera iwo." 
Hebrews7:26 Pakuti mkulu wa ansembe wotere anatiyenera ife, woyera mtima, wopanda choipa, wosadetsedwa, wosiyana ndi ochimwa, wakukhala wopitirira miyamba;" 
Hebrews7:27 amene alibe chifukwa cha kupereka nsembe tsiku ndi tsiku monga akulu a ansembe, yoyambira chifukwa cha zoipa za iwo eni, yinayi chifukwa cha zoipa za anthu; pakuti ichi anachita kamodzi, kwatha, podzipereka yekha." 
Hebrews7:28 Pakuti chilamulo chimaika akulu a ansembe anthu, okhala nacho chifooko; koma mau a lumbirolo, amene anafika chitapita chilamulo, aika Mwana, woyesedwa wopanda chilema kunthawi zonse." 
Hebrews8:1 Koma mutu wa izi tanenazi ndi uwu: Tili naye Mkulu wa ansembe wotere, amene anakhala pa dzanja lamanja la mpando wachifumu wa Ukulu m'Kumwamba," 
Hebrews8:2 Mtumiki wa malo opatulika, ndi wa chihema choona, chimene Ambuye anachimanga, si munthu ai." 
Hebrews8:3 Pakuti mkulu wa ansembe aliyense aikidwa kupereka mitulo, ndiponso nsembe; potero nkufunika kuti ameneyo akhale nako kanthunso kakupereka." 
Hebrews8:4 Ndipo Iye akadakhala padziko, sakadakhala konse wansembe, popeza pali iwo akupereka mitulo monga mwa lamulo;" 
Hebrews8:5 amene atumikira chifaniziro ndi mthunzi wa zakumwambazo monga Mose achenjezedwa m'mene anafuna kupanga chihema: pakuti, Chenjera, ati, uchite zonse monga mwa chitsanzocho chaonetsedwa kwa iwe m'phiri." 
Hebrews8:6 Koma tsopano Iye walandira chitumikiro chomveka koposa, umonso ali Nkhoswe ya pangano labwino loposa, limene likhazikika pa malonjezano oposa." 
Hebrews8:7 Pakuti loyamba lija likadakhala lopanda chilema sakadafuna malo a lachiwirilo. 
Hebrews8:8 Pakuti powatchulira iwo chifukwa, anena, Taonani, akudza masiku, anena Ambuye, Ndipo ndidzapangana pangano latsopano ndi nyumba ya Israele, ndi nyumba ya Yuda," 
Hebrews8:9 losati longa pangano ndinalichita ndi makolo ao, tsikuli ndinawagwira kudzanja iwo kuwatsogolera atuluke m'dziko la Ejipito; kuti iwo sanakhalabe m'pangano langa, ndipo Ine sindinawasamalira iwo, anena Ambuye." 
Hebrews8:10 Pakuti ili ndi pangano ndidzalipangana ndi nyumba ya Israele, atapita masiku ajawa, anena Ambuye: Ndidzapatsa malamulo anga kuwalonga m'nzeru zao, ndipo pamtima pao ndidzawalemba iwo; ndipo ndidzawakhalira iwo Mulungu, ndipo iwo adzandikhalira Ine anthu:" 
Hebrews8:11 Ndipo sadzaphunzitsa yense mfulu mnzake, ndipo yense mbale wake, ndi kuti, Zindikira Ambuye: Pakuti onse adzadziwa Ine, kuyambira wamng'ono kufikira wamkulu wa iwo." 
Hebrews8:12 Kuti ndidzachitira chifundo zosalungama zao, ndipo zoipa zao sindidzazikumbukanso." 
Hebrews8:13 Pakunena Iye, Latsopano, anagugitsa loyambali. Koma chimene chilinkuguga ndi kusukuluka, chayandikira kukanganuka." 
Hebrews9:1 Ndipo chingakhale chipangano choyambachi chinali nazo zoikika za kulambira, ndi malo opatulika a pa dziko lapansi." 
Hebrews9:2 Pakuti chihema chidakonzeka, choyamba chija, m'menemo munali choikapo nyali, ndi gome, ndi mkate woonekera; paja paitanidwa Malo Opatulika." 
Hebrews9:3 Koma m'kati mwa chophimba chachiwiri, chihema chonenedwa Malo Opatulika kwambiri;" 
Hebrews9:4 okhala nayo mbale ya zofukiza yagolide ndi likasa la chipangano, lokuta ponsepo ndi golide, momwemo munali mbiya yagolide yosungamo mana, ndi ndodo ya Aroni idaphukayo, ndi magome a chipangano;" 
Hebrews9:5 ndi pamwamba pake akerubi a ulemerero akuchititsa mthunzi pachotetezerapo; za izi sitikhoza kunena tsopano paderapadera. 
Hebrews9:6 Ndipo izi zitakonzeka kotero, ansembe amalowa m'chihema choyamba kosalekeza, ndi kutsiriza kulambirako;" 
Hebrews9:7 koma kulowa m'chachiwiri, mkulu wa ansembe yekha kamodzi pachaka, wosati wopanda mwazi, umene apereka chifukwa cha iye yekha, ndi zolakwa za anthu;" 
Hebrews9:8 Mzimu Woyera wodziwitsa nako, kuti njira yolowa nayo kumalo opatulika siinaonetsedwe, pokhala chihema choyamba chili chilili;" 
Hebrews9:9 ndicho chiphiphiritso cha kunthawi yomweyi, m'mene mitulo ndi nsembenso zinaperekedwa zosakhoza, ponena za chikumbu mtima, kuyesa wangwiro wolambirayo." 
Hebrews9:10 Popeza akhala zoikika za thupi zokha (ndi zakudya, ndi zakumwa, ndi masambidwe osiyanasiyana), oikidwa kufikira nthawi yakukonzanso." 
Hebrews9:11 Koma atafika Khristu, Mkulu wa ansembe wa zokoma zilinkudza mwa, chihema chachikulu ndi changwiro choposa, chosamangika ndi manja, ndiko kunena kuti, chosati cha chilengedwe ichi," 
Hebrews9:12 kapena mwa mwazi wa mbuzi ndi anaang'ombe, koma mwa mwazi wa Iye yekha, analowa kamodzi kumalo opatulika, atalandirapo chiombolo chosatha." 
Hebrews9:13 Pakuti ngati mwazi wa mbuzi ndi ng'ombe zamphongo, ndi makala a ng'ombe yamthandi owazawaza pa iwo odetsedwa, upatutsa kufikira chiyeretso cha thupi;" 
Hebrews9:14 koposa kotani nanga mwazi wa Khristu amene anadzipereka yekha wopanda chilema kwa Mulungu mwa Mzimu wosatha, udzayeretsa chikumbu mtima chanu kuchisiyanitsa ndi ntchito zakufa, kukatumikira Mulungu wamoyo?" 
Hebrews9:15 Ndipo mwa ichi ali Nkhoswe ya chipangano chatsopano, kotero kuti, popeza kudachitika imfa yakuombola zolakwa za pa chipangano choyamba, oitanidwawo akalandire lonjezano la zolowa zosatha." 
Hebrews9:16 Pakuti pamene pali chopangiratu pafunika pafike imfa ya wolemberayo. 
Hebrews9:17 Pakuti chopangiratu chiona mphamvu atafa mwini wake; popeza chilibe mphamvu konse pokhala wolemberayo ali ndi moyo; 
Hebrews9:18 momwemo choyambachonso sichinakonzeka chopanda mwazi. 
Hebrews9:19 Pakuti pamene Mose adalankhulira anthu onse lamulo lililonse monga mwa chilamulo, anatenga mwazi wa anaang'ombe ndi mbuzi, pamodzi ndi madzi ndi ubweya wofiira ndi hisope, nawaza buku lomwe, ndi anthu onse," 
Hebrews9:20 nati, Uwu ndi mwazi wa chipangano Mulungu adakulamulani." 
Hebrews9:21 Ndiponso chihema ndi zotengera zonse za utumikiro anaziwaza momwemo ndi mwaziwo. 
Hebrews9:22 Ndipo monga mwa chilamulo zitsala zinthu pang'ono zosayeretsedwa ndi mwazi, ndipo wopanda kukhetsa mwazi palibe kukhululukidwa kwa machimo." 
Hebrews9:23 Pomwepo padafunika kuti zifaniziro za zinthu za m'Mwamba ziyeretsedwe ndi izi; koma zam'mwamba zenizeni ziyeretsedwe ndi nsembe zoposa izi. 
Hebrews9:24 Pakuti Khristu sanalowa m'malo opatulika omangika ndi manja, akutsanza oonawo; komatu m'Mwamba momwe, kuonekera tsopano pamaso pa Mulungu chifukwa cha ife;" 
Hebrews9:25 kosati kuti adzipereke yekha kawirikawiri; monga mkulu wa ansembe alowa m'malo opatulika chaka ndi chaka ndi mwazi wosati wake; 
Hebrews9:26 chikadatero, kukadamuyenera kumva zowawa kawirikawiri kuyambira kuzika kwa dziko lapansi; koma tsopano kamodzi pa chitsirizo cha nthawizo waonekera kuchotsa uchimo mwa nsembe ya Iye yekha." 
Hebrews9:27 Ndipo popeza kwaikikatu kwa anthu kufa kamodzi, ndipo atafa, chiweruziro;" 
Hebrews9:28 kotero Khristunso ataperekedwa nsembe kamodzi kukasenza machimo a ambiri, adzaonekera pa nthawi yachiwiri, wopanda uchimo, kwa iwo amene amlindirira, kufikira chipulumutso." 
Hebrews10:1 Pakuti chilamulo, pokhala nao mthunzi wa zokoma zilinkudza, osati chifaniziro chenicheni cha zinthuzo, sichikhozatu, ndi nsembe zomwezi chaka ndi chaka, zimene azipereka kosalekeza, kuwayesera angwiro iwo akuyandikira." 
Hebrews10:2 Pakadapanda kutero, kodi sakadaleka kuzipereka, chifukwa otumikirawo sakadakhala nacho chikumbu mtima cha machimo, popeza adayeretsedwa kamodzi?" 
Hebrews10:3 Komatu mu izizo muli chikumbukiro cha machimo chaka ndi chaka. 
Hebrews10:4 Pakuti sikutheka kuti mwazi wa ng'ombe zamphongo, ndi mbuzi ukachotsera machimo." 
Hebrews10:5 Mwa ichi polowa m'dziko lapansi, anena, Nsembe ndi chopereka simunazifuna, koma thupi munandikonzera Ine." 
Hebrews10:6 Nsembe zopsereza zamphumphu ndi za kwa machimo simunakondwera nazo; 
Hebrews10:7 pamenepo ndinati, Taonani, ndafika, (Pamutu pake pa buku palembedwa za Ine) kudzachita chifuniro chanu, Mulungu." 
Hebrews10:8 Pakunena pamwamba apa, kuti, Nsembe ndi zopereka ndi nsembe zopsereza zamphumphu ndi za kwa machimo simunazifuna, kapena kukondwera nazo (zimene ziperekedwa monga mwa lamulo)," 
Hebrews10:9 pamenepo anati, Taonani, ndafika kudzachita chifuniro chanu. Achotsa choyambacho, kuti akaike chachiwiricho." 
Hebrews10:10 Ndi chifuniro chimenecho tayeretsedwa mwa chopereka cha thupi la Yesu Khristu, kamodzi, kwatha." 
Hebrews10:11 Ndipotu wansembe aliyense amaima tsiku ndi tsiku, natumikira, napereka nsembe zomwezi kawirikawiri, zimene sizikhoza konse kuchotsa machimo;" 
Hebrews10:12 koma Iye, m'mene adapereka nsembe imodzi chifukwa cha machimo, anakhala pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu chikhalire;" 
Hebrews10:13 kuyambira pomwepo alindirira, kufikira adani ake aikidwa akhale mpando kumapazi ake." 
Hebrews10:14 Pakuti ndi chipereko chimodzi anawayesera angwiro chikhalire iwo oyeretsedwa. 
Hebrews10:15 Koma Mzimu Woyeranso atichitira umboni; pakuti adatha kunena," 
Hebrews10:16 Ichi ndi chipangano ndidzapangana nao, atapita masiku ajawo, anena Ambuye: Ndidzapereka malamulo anga akhale pamtima pao; ndipo pa nzeru zao ndidzawalemba;" 
Hebrews10:17 ndipo machimo ao ndi masaweruziko ao sindidzawakumbukiranso. 
Hebrews10:18 Koma pomwe pali chikhululukiro cha machimo palibenso chopereka cha kwa uchimo. 
Hebrews10:19 Ndipo pokhala nacho, abale, chilimbikitso chakulowa m'malo opatulika, ndi mwazi wa Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 pa njira yatsopano ndi yamoyo, imene adatikonzera, mwa chotchinga, ndicho thupi lake;" 
Hebrews10:21 ndipo popeza tili naye wansembe wamkulu wosunga nyumba ya Mulungu; 
Hebrews10:22 tiyandikire ndi mtima woona, m'chikhulupiriro chokwanira, ndi mitima yathu yowazidwa kuichotsera chikumbu mtima choipa, ndi matupi athu osambitsidwa ndi madzi oyera;" 
Hebrews10:23 tigwiritse chivomerezo chosagwedera cha chiyembekezo chathu, pakuti wolonjezayo ali wokhulupirika;" 
Hebrews10:24 ndipo tiganizirane wina ndi mnzake kuti tifulumizane ku chikondano ndi ntchito zabwino," 
Hebrews10:25 osaleka kusonkhana kwathu pamodzi, monga amachita ena, komatu tidandaulirane, ndiko koposa monga momwe muona tsiku lilikuyandika." 
Hebrews10:26 Pakuti tikachimwa ife eni ake, titatha kulandira chidziwitso cha choonadi, siitsalanso nsembe ya kwa machimo," 
Hebrews10:27 koma kulindira kwina koopsa kwa chiweruziro, ndi kutentha kwake kwa moto wakuononga otsutsana nao." 
Hebrews10:28 Munthu wopeputsa chilamulo cha Mose angofa opanda chifundo pa mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu: 
Hebrews10:29 ndipo mutani, kulanga koposa kotani nanga adzayesedwa woyenera iye amene anapondereza Mwana wa Mulungu, nayesa mwazi wa chipangano umene anayeretsedwa nao chinthu wamba, nachitira chipongwe Mzimu wa chisomo;" 
Hebrews10:30 pakuti timdziwa Iye amene anati, Kubwezera chilango nkwanga, Ine ndidzabwezera. Ndiponso, Ambuye adzaweruza anthu ake." 
Hebrews10:31 Kugwa m'manja a Mulungu wamoyo nkoopsa. 
Hebrews10:32 Koma tadzikumbutsani masiku akale, m'menemo mutaunikidwa mudapirira chitsutsano chachikulu cha zowawa;" 
Hebrews10:33 pena pochitidwa chinthu chooneredwa mwa matonzo ndi zisautso; penanso polawana nao iwo ochitidwa zotere. 
Hebrews10:34 Pakuti munamva chifundo ndi iwo a m'ndende, ndiponso mudalola mokondwera kulandidwa kwa chuma chanu, pozindikira kuti muli nacho nokha chuma choposa chachikhalire." 
Hebrews10:35 Potero musataye kulimbika kwanu, kumene kuli nacho chobwezera mphotho chachikulu." 
Hebrews10:36 Pakuti chikusowani chipiriro, kuti pamene mwachita chifuniro cha Mulungu, mukalandire lonjezano." 
Hebrews10:37 Pakuti katsala kanthawi kakang'onong'ono, ndipo wakudzayo adzafika, wosachedwa." 
Hebrews10:38 Koma wolungama wangayo adzakhala ndi moyo wochokera m'chikhulupiriro: Ndipo ngati abwerera, moyo wanga ulibe kukondwera mwa iye." 
Hebrews10:39 Koma ife si ndife a iwo akubwerera kulowa chitayiko; koma a iwo a chikhulupiriro cha ku chipulumutso cha moyo. 
Hebrews11:1 Koma chikhulupiriro ndicho chikhazikitso cha zinthu zoyembekezeka, chiyesero cha zinthu zosapenyeka." 
Hebrews11:2 Pakuti momwemo akulu anachitidwa umboni. 
Hebrews11:3 Ndi chikhulupiriro tizindikira kuti maiko ndi a m'mwamba omwe anakonzedwa ndi mau a Mulungu, kotero kuti zinthu zopenyeka sizinapangidwa zochokera mwa zoonekazo." 
Hebrews11:4 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abele anapereka kwa Mulungu nsembe yoposa ija ya Kaini, imene anachitidwa umboni nayo kuti anali wolungama; nachitapo umboni Mulungu pa mitulo yake; ndipo momwemo iye, angakhale adafa alankhulabe." 
Hebrews11:5 Ndi chikhulupiriro Enoki anatengedwa kuti angaone imfa; ndipo sanapezeka, popeza Mulungu adamtenga: pakuti asanamtenge, anachitidwa umboni kuti anakondweretsa Mulungu;" 
Hebrews11:6 koma wopanda chikhulupiriro sikutheka kumkondweretsa; pakuti iye wakudza kwa Mulungu ayenera kukhulupirira kuti alipo, ndi kuti ali wobwezera mphotho iwo akumfuna Iye." 
Hebrews11:7 Ndi chikhulupiriro Nowa, pochenjezedwa ndi Mulungu za zinthu zisanapenyeke, ndi pochita mantha, anamanga chingalawa cha kupulumutsiramo iwo a m'nyumba yake; kumene anatsutsa nako dziko lapansi, nakhala wolowa nyumba wa chilungamo chili monga mwa chikhulupiriro." 
Hebrews11:8 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abrahamu, poitanidwa, anamvera kutuluka kunka kumalo amene adzalandira ngati cholowa; ndipo anatuluka wosadziwa kumene akamukako." 
Hebrews11:9 Ndi chikhulupiriro anakhala mlendo kudziko la lonjezano, losati lake, nakhalira m'mahema pamodzi ndi Isaki ndi Yakobo, olowa nyumba pamodzi ndi iye a lonjezano lomwelo;" 
Hebrews11:10 pakuti analindirira mudzi wokhala nao maziko, mmisiri wake ndi womanga wake ndiye Mulungu." 
Hebrews11:11 Ndi chikhulupiriro Sara yemwe analandira mphamvu yakukhala ndi pakati, patapita nthawi yake, popeza anamwerengera wokhulupirika Iye amene adalonjeza;" 
Hebrews11:12 mwa ichinso kudachokera kwa mmodzi, ndiye ngati wakufa, aunyinji ngati nyenyezi za m'mwamba, ndi ngati mchenga, uli m'mphepete mwa nyanja, osawerengeka." 
Hebrews11:13 Iwo onse adamwalira m'chikhulupiriro, osalandira malonjezano, komatu adawaona ndi kuwalankhula kutali, navomereza kuti ali alendo ndi ogonera padziko." 
Hebrews11:14 Pakuti iwo akunena zotere aonetserapo kuti alikufuna dziko likhale lao. 
Hebrews11:15 Ndipotu akadakumbukira lijalo adatulukamo akadaona njira yakubwera nayo. 
Hebrews11:16 Koma tsopano akhumba lina loposa, ndilo la m'Mwamba; mwa ichi Mulungu sachita manyazi nao poitanidwa Mulungu wao; pakuti adawakonzera mudzi." 
Hebrews11:17 Ndi chikhulupiriro Abrahamu, poyesedwa, anapereka nsembe Isaki, ndipo iye mene adalandira malonjezano anapereka mwana wake wayekha;" 
Hebrews11:18 amene kudanenedwa za iye, kuti, Mwa Isaki mbeu yako idzaitanidwa:" 
Hebrews11:19 poyesera iye kuti Mulungu ngwokhoza kuukitsa, ngakhale kwa akufa; kuchokera komwe, pachiphiphiritso, anamlandiranso." 
Hebrews11:20 Ndi chikhulupiriro Isaki anadalitsa Yakobo ndi Esau, zingakhale za zinthu zilinkudza." 
Hebrews11:21 Ndi chikhulupiriro Yakobo, poti alinkufa, anadalitsa yense wa ana a Yosefe; napembedza potsamira pa mutu wa ndodo yake." 
Hebrews11:22 Ndi chikhulupiriro, Yosefe, pakumwalira, anatchula za matulukidwe a ana a Israele; nalamula za mafupa ake." 
Hebrews11:23 Ndi chikhulupiriro Mose, pobadwa, anabisidwa miyezi itatu ndi akum'bala, popeza anaona kuti ali mwana wokongola; ndipo sanaopa chilamuliro cha mfumu." 
Hebrews11:24 Ndi chikhulupiriro Mose, atakula msinkhu, anakana kutchedwa mwana wake wa mwana wamkazi wa Farao;" 
Hebrews11:25 nasankhula kuchitidwa zoipa pamodzi ndi anthu a Mulungu, kosati kukhala nazo zokondweretsa za zoipa nthawi;" 
Hebrews11:26 nawerenga tonzo la Khristu chuma choposa zolemera za Aejipito; pakuti anapenyerera chobwezera cha mphotho. 
Hebrews11:27 Ndi chikhulupiriro anasiya Ejipito, wosaopa mkwiyo wa mfumu; pakuti anapirira molimbika, monga ngati kuona wosaonekayo." 
Hebrews11:28 Ndi chikhulupiriro anachita Paska, ndi kuwaza kwa mwazi, kuti wakuononga ana oyamba angawakhudze iwo." 
Hebrews11:29 Ndi chikhulupiriro anaoloka Nyanja Yofiira kupita ngati pamtunda: ndiko Aejipito poyesanso anamizidwa. 
Hebrews11:30 Ndi chikhulupiriro malinga a Yeriko adagwa atazunguliridwa masiku asanu ndi awiri. 
Hebrews11:31 Ndi chikhulupiriro Rahabu wadama uja sanaonongeka pamodzi ndi osamverawo, popeza analandira ozonda ndi mtendere." 
Hebrews11:32 Ndipo ndinene chiyaninso? Pakuti idzandiperewera nthawi ndifotokozere za Gideoni, Baraki, Samisoni, Yefita; za Davide, ndi Samuele ndi aneneri;" 
Hebrews11:33 mene mwa chikhulupiriro anagonjetsa maufumu, anachita chilungamo, analandira malonjezano, anatseka pakamwa mikango," 
Hebrews11:34 nazima mphamvu ya moto, napulumuka lupanga lakuthwa, analimbikitsidwa pokhala ofooka, anakula mphamvu kunkhondo, anapirikitsa magulu a nkhondo yachilendo." 
Hebrews11:35 Akazi analandira akufa ao mwa kuuka kwa akufa; ndipo ena anakwapulidwa, osalola kuomboledwa," 
Hebrews11:36 kuti akalandire kuuka koposa; koma ena anayesedwa ndi matonzo ndi zokwapulira, ndiponso nsinga, ndi kuwatsekera m'ndende;" 
Hebrews11:37 anaponyedwa miyala, anachekedwa pakati, anayesedwa, anaphedwa ndi lupanga, anayendayenda ovala zikopa zankhosa, ndi zikopa zambuzi, nakhala osowa, osautsidwa, ochitidwa zoipa," 
Hebrews11:38 (amenewo dziko lapansi silinayenera iwo), osokerera m'mapululu, ndi m'mapiri, ndi m'mapanga, ndi m'mauna a dziko." 
Hebrews11:39 Ndipo iwo onse adachitidwa umboni mwa chikhulupiriro, sanalandira lonjezanolo," 
Hebrews11:40 popeza Mulungu adatikonzera ife kanthu koposa, kuti iwo asayesedwe amphumphu opanda ife." 
Hebrews12:1 Chifukwa chake ifenso, popeza tizingidwa nao mtambo waukulu wotere wa mboni, titaye cholemetsa chilichonse, ndi tchimoli limangotizinga, ndipo tithamange mwachipiriro makaniwo adatiikira, ndi kupenyerera woyambira ndi womaliza wa chikhulupiriro chathu," 
Hebrews12:2 Yesu, ameneyo, chifukwa cha chimwemwe choikidwacho pamaso pake, anapirira mtanda, nanyoza manyazi, nakhala pa dzanja lamanja la mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu." 
Hebrews12:3 Pakuti talingirirani Iye amene adapirira ndi ochimwa otsutsana naye kotere, kuti mungaleme ndi kukomoka m'moyo mwanu." 
Hebrews12:4 Simunakana kufikira mwazi pogwirana nalo tchimo; 
Hebrews12:5 ndipo mwaiwala dandauliro limene linena nanu monga ndi ana, Mwana wanga, usayese chopepuka kulanga kwa Ambuye, kapena usakomoke podzudzulidwa ndi Iye;" 
Hebrews12:6 pakuti iye amene Ambuye amkonda amlanga, nakwapula mwana aliyense amlandira." 
Hebrews12:7 Mukapirira kufikira kulangidwa Mulungu achitira inu monga ngati ana; pakuti mwana wanji amene atate wake wosamlanga? 
Hebrews12:8 Koma ngati mukhala opanda chilango, chimene onse adalawako, pamenepo muli am'thengo, si ana ai." 
Hebrews12:9 Komanso, tinali nao atate a thupi lathu akutilanga, ndipo tinawalemekeza; kodi sitidzagonjera Atate wa mizimu koposa nanga, ndi kukhala ndi moyo?" 
Hebrews12:10 Pakutitu iwo anatilanga masiku owerengeka monga kudawakomera; koma Iye atero, kukatipindulitsa, kuti tikalandirane nao pa chiyero chake." 
Hebrews12:11 Chilango chilichonse, pakuchitika, sichimveka chokondwetsa, komatu chowawa; koma chitatha, chipereka chipatso cha mtendere, kwa iwo ozoloweretsedwa nacho, ndicho cha chilungamo." 
Hebrews12:12 Mwa ichi limbitsani manja ogooka, ndi maondo olobodoka;" 
Hebrews12:13 ndipo lambulani miseu yolunjika yoyendamo mapazi anu, kuti chotsimphinacho chisapatulidwe m'njira, koma chichiritsidwe." 
Hebrews12:14 Londolani mtendere ndi anthu onse, ndi chiyeretso chimene, akapanda ichi, palibe mmodzi adzaona Ambuye:" 
Hebrews12:15 ndi kuyang'anira kuti pangakhale wina wakuperewera chisomo cha Mulungu, kuti ungapuke muzu wina wa kuwawa mtima ungavute inu, ndipo aunyinji angadetsedwe nao;" 
Hebrews12:16 kuti pangakhale wachigololo, kapena wamnyozo, ngati Esau, amene anagulitsa ukulu wake wobadwa nao mtanda umodzi wa chakudya." 
Hebrews12:17 Pakuti mudziwa kutinso pamene anafuna kulowa dalitsolo, anakanidwa (pakuti sanapeza malo akulapa), angakhale analifunafuna ndi misozi." 
Hebrews12:18 Pakuti simunayandikira phiri lokhudzika, ndi lakupsa moto, ndi pakuda bii, ndi mdima, ndi namondwe," 
Hebrews12:19 ndi mau a lipenga, ndi manenedwe a mau, manenedwe amene iwo adamvawo anapempha kuti asawaonjezerepo mau;" 
Hebrews12:20 pakuti sanakhoza kulola cholamulidwacho. Ingakhale nyama ikakhudza phirilo, idzaponyedwa miyala;" 
Hebrews12:21 ndipo maonekedwewo anali oopsa otere, kuti Mose anati, Ndiopatu ndi kunthunthumira." 
Hebrews12:22 Komatu mwayandikira kuphiri la Ziyoni, ndi mudzi wa Mulungu wamoyo, Yerusalemu wa Kumwamba, ndi kwa unyinji wochuluka wa angelo," 
Hebrews12:23 ndi kwa msonkhano wa onse ndi Mpingo wa obadwa oyamba olembedwa m'Mwamba, ndi kwa Mulungu Woweruza wa onse, ndi kwa mizimu ya olungama oyesedwa angwiro," 
Hebrews12:24 ndi kwa Yesu Nkhoswe ya chipangano chatsopano, ndi kwa mwazi wa kuwaza wakulankhula chokoma choposa mwazi wa Abele." 
Hebrews12:25 Penyani musakane wolankhulayo. Pakuti ngati iwowa sanapulumuka, pomkana Iye amene anawachenjeza padziko, koposatu sitidzapulumuka ife, odzipatulira kwa Iye wa Kumwamba;" 
Hebrews12:26 amene mau ake anagwedeza dziko pamenepo; koma tsopano adalonjeza, ndi kuti, Kamodzinso ndidzagwedeza, si dziko lokha, komanso m'mwamba." 
Hebrews12:27 Ndipo ichi, chakuti kamodzinso, chilozera kusuntha kwake kwa zinthu zogwedezeka, monga kwa zinthu zolengedwa, kuti zinthu zosagwedezeka zikhale." 
Hebrews12:28 Mwa ichi polandira ufumu wosagwedezeka, tikhale nacho chisomo, chimene tikatumikire nacho Mulungu momkondweretsa, ndi kumchitira ulemu ndi mantha." 
Hebrews12:29 Pakuti Mulungu wathu ndiye moto wonyeketsa. 
Hebrews13:1 Chikondi cha pa abale chikhalebe. 
Hebrews13:2 Musaiwale kuchereza alendo; pakuti mwa ichi ena anachereza angelo osachidziwa. 
Hebrews13:3 Kumbukirani am'nsinga, monga am'nsinga anzao; ochitidwa zoipa, monga ngati inunso adatero nanu m'thupi." 
Hebrews13:4 Ukwati uchitidwe ulemu ndi onse, ndi pogona pakhale posadetsedwa; pakuti adama ndi achigololo adzawaweruza Mulungu." 
Hebrews13:5 Mtima wanu ukhale wosakonda chuma; zimene muli nazo zikukwanireni; pakuti Iye anati, Sindidzakusiya konse, kungakhale kukutaya, sindidzakutaya ndithu." 
Hebrews13:6 Kotero kuti tinena molimbika mtima, Mthandizi wanga ndiye Ambuye; sindidzaopa; adzandichitira chiyani munthu?" 
Hebrews13:7 Kumbukirani atsogoleri anu, amene analankhula nanu Mau a Mulungu; ndipo poyang'anira chitsiriziro cha mayendedwe ao mutsanze chikhulupiriro chao." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Khristu ali yemweyo dzulo, ndi lero, ndi kunthawi zonse." 
Hebrews13:9 Musatengedwe ndi maphunzitso a mitundumitundu, ndi achilendo; pakuti nkokoma kuti mtima ukhazikike ndi chisomo; kosati ndi zakudya, zimene iwo adazitsata sanapindula nazo." 
Hebrews13:10 Tili nalo guwa la nsembe, limene iwo akutumikira chihema alibe ulamuliro wa kudyako." 
Hebrews13:11 Pakuti matupi a nyama zija, mwazi wa izo umatengedwa, ndi mkulu wa ansembe kulowa m'malo opatulidwa, chifukwa cha zoipa, amatenthedwa kunja kwa tsasa." 
Hebrews13:12 Mwa ichi Yesunso, kuti akayeretse anthuwo mwa mwazi wa Iye yekha, adamva chowawa kunja kwa chipata." 
Hebrews13:13 Chifukwa chake titulukire kwa Iye kunja kwa tsasa osenza tonzo lake. 
Hebrews13:14 Pakuti pano tilibe mudzi wokhalitsa, komatu tifunafuna ulinkudzawo." 
Hebrews13:15 Potero mwa Iye tipereke chiperekere nsembe yakuyamika Mulungu, ndiyo chipatso cha milomo yovomereza dzina lake." 
Hebrews13:16 Koma musaiwale kuchitira chokoma ndi kugawira ena; pakuti nsembe zotere Mulungu akondwera nazo. 
Hebrews13:17 Mverani atsogoleri anu, nimuwagonjere; pakuti alindirira moyo wanu, monga akuwerengera; kuti akachite ndi chimwemwe, osati mwachisoni: pakuti ichi sichikupindulitsani inu." 
Hebrews13:18 Mutipempherere ife; pakuti takopeka mtima kuti tili nacho chikumbu mtima chokoma m'zonse, pofuna kukhala nao makhalidwe abwino." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndipo ndikudandaulirani koposa kuchita ichi, kuti kubwera kwanga kwa inu kufulumidwe." 
Hebrews13:20 Koma Mulungu wa mtendere amene anabwera naye wotuluka mwa akufa Mbusa wamkulu wa nkhosa ndi mwazi wa chipangano chosatha, ndiye Ambuye wathu Yesu," 
Hebrews13:21 akuyeseni inu opanda chilema m'chinthu chilichonse chabwino, kuti muchite chifuniro chake; ndi kuchita mwa ife chomkondweretsa pamaso pake, mwa Yesu Khristu; kwa Iyeyu ukhale ulemerero kunthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Koma ndidandaulira inu, abale, lolani mau a chidandauliro; pakutinso ndalembera inu mwachidule." 
Hebrews13:23 Zindikirani kuti mbale wathu Timoteo wamasulidwa; pamodzi ndi iye, ngati akudza msanga, ndidzakuonani inu." 
Hebrews13:24 Perekani moni kwa atsogoleri anu onse, ndi oyera mtima onse. Akupatsani moni iwo a ku Italiya." 
Hebrews13:25 Chisomo chikhale ndi inu nonse, Amen." 
James1:1 Yakobo, kapolo wa Mulungu ndi wa Ambuye Yesu Khristu, kwa mafuko khumi ndi awiri a m'chibalaliko: ndikupatsani moni." 
James1:2 Muchiyese chimwemwe chokha, abale anga, m'mene mukugwa m'mayesero a mitundumitundu;" 
James1:3 pozindikira kuti chiyesedwe cha chikhulupiriro chanu chichita chipiriro. 
James1:4 Koma chipiriro chikhale nayo ntchito yake yangwiro, kuti mukakhale angwiro ndi opanda chilema, osasowa kanthu konse." 
James1:5 Koma wina wa inu ikamsowa nzeru, apemphe kwa Mulungu, amene apatsa kwa onse modzala manja, niwosatonza; ndipo adzampatsa iye." 
James1:6 Koma apemphe ndi chikhulupiriro, wosakayika konse; pakuti wokayikayo afanana ndi funde la nyanja lotengeka ndi mphepo ndi kuwinduka nayo." 
James1:7 Pakuti asayese munthu uyu kuti adzalandira kanthu kwa Ambuye; 
James1:8 munthu wa mitima iwiri akhala wosinkhasinkha pa njira zake zonse. 
James1:9 Koma mbale woluluka adzitamandire pa ukulu wake; 
James1:10 pakuti adzapita monga duwa la udzu. 
James1:11 Pakuti latuluka dzuwa ndi kutentha kwake, ndipo laumitsa udzu; ndipo lathothoka duwa lake, ndi ukoma wa maonekedwe ake waonongeka; koteronso wachuma adzafota m'mayendedwe ake." 
James1:12 Wodala munthu wakupirira poyesedwa; pakuti pamene wavomerezeka, adzalandira korona wa moyo, amene Ambuye adalonjezera iwo akumkonda Iye." 
James1:13 Munthu poyesedwa, asanena, Ndiyesedwa ndi Mulungu; pakuti Mulungu sakhoza kuyesedwa ndi zoipa, ndipo Iye mwini sayesa munthu:" 
James1:14 koma munthu aliyense ayesedwa pamene chilakolako chake cha iye mwini chimkokera, nichimnyenga." 
James1:15 Pamenepo chilakolakocho chitaima, chibala uchimo; ndipo uchimo, utakula msinkhu, ubala imfa." 
James1:16 Musanyengedwe, abale anga okondedwa." 
James1:17 Mphatso iliyonse yabwino, ndi chininkho chilichonse changwiro zichokera Kumwamba, zotsika kwa Atate wa mauniko, amene alibe chisanduliko, kapena mthunzi wa chitembenukiro." 
James1:18 Mwa chifuniro chake mwini anatibala ife ndi mau a choonadi, kuti tikhale ife ngati zipatso zoundukula za zolengedwa zake." 
James1:19 Mudziwa, abale anga okondedwa, kuti munthu aliyense akhale wotchera khutu, wodekha polankhula, wodekha pakupsa mtima." 
James1:20 Pakuti mkwiyo wa munthu suchita chilungamo cha Mulungu. 
James1:21 Mwa ichi, mutavula chinyanso chonse ndi chisefukiro cha choipa, landirani ndi chifatso mau ookedwa mwa inu, okhoza kupulumutsa moyo wanu." 
James1:22 Khalani akuchita mau, osati akumva okha, ndi kudzinyenga nokha." 
James1:23 Pakuti ngati munthu ali wakumva mau, wosati wakuchita, iyeyu afanana ndi munthu wakuyang'anira nkhope yake ya chibadwidwe chake m'kalirole;" 
James1:24 pakuti wadziyang'anira yekha, nachoka, naiwala pompaja nali wotani." 
James1:25 Koma iye wakupenyerera m'lamulo langwiro, ndilo laufulu, natero chipenyerere, ameneyo, posakhala wakumva wakuiwala, komatu wakuchita ntchito, adzakhala wodala m'kuchita kwake." 
James1:26 Ngati wina adziyesera ali wopembedza Mulungu, ndiye wosamanga lilime lake, koma adzinyenga mtima wake, kupembedza kwake kwa munthuyu nkopanda pake." 
James1:27 Mapembedzedwe oyera ndi osadetsa pamaso pa Mulungu ndi Atate ndiwo: kucheza ndi ana amasiye ndi akazi amasiye m'chisautso chao, ndi kudzisungira mwini wosachitidwa mawanga ndi dziko lapansi." 
James2:1 Abale anga, pakuti muli nacho chikhulupiriro cha Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, Ambuye wa ulemerero, musakhale okondera ndi kusamala maonekedwe." 
James2:2 Pakuti akalowa m'sunagoge mwanu munthu wovala mphete yagolide, ndi chovala chokometsetsa, ndipo akalowanso munthu wosauka ndi chovala chodetsa;" 
James2:3 ndipo mukapenyerera iye wovala chokometsetsa, nimukati naye, Inu mukhale apa pabwino; ndipo mukati kwa wosaukayo, Iwe, imauko, kapena, khala pansi pa mpando wa mapazi anga;" 
James2:4 kodi simunasiyanitsa mwa inu nokha, ndi kukhala oweruza oganizira zoipa?" 
James2:5 Mverani, abale anga okondedwa; kodi Mulungu sanasankha osauka a dziko lapansi akhale olemera ndi chikhulupiriro, ndi olowa nyumba a ufumu umene adaulonjeza kwa iwo akumkonda Iye?" 
James2:6 Koma inu mumanyoza munthu wosauka. Kodi sakusautsani inu achuma, nakukokerani iwowa kumabwalo a milandu?" 
James2:7 Kodi sachitira mwano iwowa dzina lokomali muitanidwa nalo? 
James2:8 Koma ngati muchita chikwanirire lamulolo lachifumu, monga mwa malembo, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda wekha, muchita bwino:" 
James2:9 koma ngati musamala maonekedwe, muchita uchimo, ndipo mutsutsidwa ndi chilamulo monga olakwa." 
James2:10 Pakuti amene aliyense angasunge malamulo onse, koma akakhumudwa pa limodzi, iyeyu wachimwira onse." 
James2:11 Pakuti Iye wakuti, Usachite chigololo, anatinso, Usaphe. Ndipo ukapanda kuchita chigololo, koma ukapha, wakhala wolakwira lamulo." 
James2:12 Lankhulani motero, ndipo chitani motero, monga anthu amene adzaweruzidwa ndi lamulo la ufulu." 
James2:13 Pakuti chiweruziro chilibe chifundo kwa iye amene sanachita chifundo; chifundo chidzitamandira kutsutsana nacho chiweruziro. 
James2:14 Chipindulo chake nchiyani, abale anga, munthu akanena, Ndili nacho chikhulupiriro, koma alibe ntchito? Kodi chikhulupirirocho chikhoza kumpulumutsa?" 
James2:15 Mbale kapena mlongo akakhala wausiwa, nichikamsowa chakudya cha tsiku lake," 
James2:16 ndipo wina wa inu akanena nao, Mukani ndi mtendere, mukafunde ndi kukhuta; osawapatsa iwo zosowa za pathupi; kupindula kwake nchiyani?" 
James2:17 Momwemonso chikhulupiriro, chikapanda kukhala nacho ntchito, chikhala chakufa m'kati mwakemo." 
James2:18 Koma wina akati, Iwe uli nacho chikhulupiriro, ndipo ine ndili nazo ntchito; undionetse ine chikhulupiriro chako chopanda ntchito zako, ndipo ine ndidzakuonetsa iwe chikhulupiriro changa chotuluka m'ntchito zanga." 
James2:19 Ukhulupirira iwe kuti Mulungu ali mmodzi; uchita bwino; ziwanda zikhulupiriranso, ndipo zinthunthumira." 
James2:20 Koma ufuna kuzindikira kodi, munthu wopanda pake iwe, kuti chikhulupiriro chopanda ntchito chili chabe?" 
James2:21 Abrahamu kholo lathu, sanayesedwa wolungama ndi ntchito kodi, paja adapereka mwana wake Isaki nsembe pa guwa la nsembe?" 
James2:22 Upenya kuti chikhulupiriro chidachita pamodzi ndi ntchito zake, ndipo motuluka mwa ntchito chikhulupiriro chidayesedwa changwiro;" 
James2:23 ndipo anakwaniridwa malembo onenawa, Ndipo Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu, ndipo kudawerengedwa kwa iye chilungamo; ndipo anatchedwa bwenzi la Mulungu." 
James2:24 Mupenya kuti munthu ayesedwa wolungama ndi ntchito yake, osati ndi chikhulupiriro chokha." 
James2:25 Ndipo momwemonso sanayesedwa wolungama Rahabu mkazi wa damayo ndi ntchito kodi, popeza adalandira amithenga, nawatulutsa adzere njira ina?" 
James2:26 Pakuti monga thupi lopanda mzimu lili lakufa, koteronso chikhulupiriro chopanda ntchito chili chakufa." 
James3:1 Musakhale aphunzitsi ambiri, abale anga, podziwa kuti tidzalangika koposa." 
James3:2 Pakuti timakhumudwa tonse pa zinthu zambiri. Munthu akapanda kukhumudwa pa mau, iye ndiye munthu wangwiro, wokhoza kumanganso thupi lonse." 
James3:3 Koma ngati tiikira akavalo zogwirira m'kamwa mwao atimvere, tipotolozanso thupi lao lonse." 
James3:4 Taonani, zombonso, zingakhale zazikulu zotere, nizitengedwa ndi mphepo zolimba, zipotozeka ndi tsigiro laling'ono ndithu kumene kulikonse afuna wogwira tsigiro." 
James3:5 Kotero lilimenso lili chiwalo chaching'ono, ndipo lidzikuzira zazikulu. Taonani, kamoto kakang'ono kayatsa nkhuni zambiri!" 
James3:6 Ndipo lilime ndilo moto; ngati dziko la chosalungama mwa ziwalo zathu laikika lilime, ndili lodetsa thupi lonse, niliyatsa mayendedwe a chibadwidwe, ndipo liyatsidwa ndi Gehena." 
James3:7 Pakuti mtundu uliwonse wa nyama ndi wa mbalamenso, wa zokwawa, ndi wa zam'nyanja, zimazoloweretsedwa, ndipo zazoloweretsedwa ndi anthu;" 
James3:8 koma lilime palibe munthu akhoza kulizoloweretsa; lili choipa chotakataka, lodzala ndi ululu wakupha." 
James3:9 Timayamika Ambuye ndi Atate nalo; nalonso timatemberera anthu, okhala monga mwa mafanizidwe a Mulungu;" 
James3:10 Mochokera m'kamwa momwemo mutuluka chiyamiko ndi temberero. Abale anga, izi siziyenera kutero." 
James3:11 Kodi kasupe atulutsira pa uno womwewo madzi okoma ndi owawa? 
James3:12 Kodi mkuyu ukhoza kubala azitona, abale anga, kapena mpesa kubala nkhuyu? Kotero madzi amchere sakhoza kutulutsa okoma." 
James3:13 Ndani ali wanzeru, ndi waluso mwa inu? Aonetsere ndi mayendedwe ake abwino ntchito zake mu nzeru yofatsa." 
James3:14 Koma mukakhala nako kaduka kowawa, ndi chotetana m'mtima mwanu, musadzitamandira, ndipo musamanama potsutsana nacho choonadi." 
James3:15 Nzeru iyi, sindiyo yotsika kumwamba, komatu ili ya padziko, ya chifuniro cha chibadwidwe, ya ziwanda." 
James3:16 Pakuti pomwe pali kaduka ndi zotetana, pamenepo pali chisokonekero ndi chochita choipa chilichonse." 
James3:17 Koma nzeru yochokera kumwamba iyamba kukhala yoyera, nikhalanso yamtendere, yaulere, yomvera bwino, yodzala chifundo ndi zipatso zabwino, yopanda tsankho, yosadzikometsera pamaso." 
James3:18 Ndipo chipatso cha chilungamo chifesedwa mumtendere kwa iwo akuchita mtendere. 
James4:1 Zichokera kuti nkhondo, zichokera kuti zolimbana mwa inu? Kodi sizichokera kuzikhumbitso zanu zochita nkhondo m'ziwalo zanu?" 
James4:2 Mulakalaka, ndipo zikusowani; mukupha, nimuchita kaduka, ndipo simukhoza kupeza; mulimbana, nimuchita nkhondo; mulibe kanthu, chifukwa simupempha." 
James4:3 Mupempha, ndipo simulandira, popeza mupempha koipa, kuti mukachimwaze pochita zikhumbitso zanu." 
James4:4 Akazi achigololo inu, kodi simudziwa kuti ubwenzi wa dziko lapansi uli udani ndi Mulungu? Potero, iye amene afuna kukhala bwenzi la dziko lapansi adziika mdani wa Mulungu." 
James4:5 Kodi muyesa kapena kuti malembo angonena chabe? Kodi Mzimuyo adamkhalitsa mwa ife akhumbitsa kuchita nsanje? 
James4:6 Koma apatsa chisomo choposa. Potero anena malembo, Mulungu akaniza odzikuza, koma apatsa chisomo odzichepetsa." 
James4:7 Potero mverani Mulungu; koma kanizani mdierekezi, ndipo adzakuthawani inu." 
James4:8 Yandikirani kwa Mulungu, ndipo adzayandikira kwa inu. Sambani m'manja, ochimwa inu; yeretsani mitima, a mitima iwiri inu." 
James4:9 Khalani osautsidwa, lirani, lirani misozi; kuseka kwanu kusanduke kulira, ndi chimwemwe chanu chisanduke chisoni." 
James4:10 Dzichepetseni pamaso pa Ambuye, ndipo adzakukwezani." 
James4:11 Musamanenerana, abale. Wonenera mbale, kapena woweruza mbale wake, anenera lamulo, naweruza lamulo: koma ngati uweruza lamulo, suli wochita lamulo, komatu woweruza." 
James4:12 Woika lamulo ndi woweruza ndiye mmodzi, ndiye amene akhoza kupulumutsa ndi kuononga; koma iwe woweruza mnzako ndiwe yani?" 
James4:13 Nanga tsono, inu akunena, Lero kapena mawa tidzapita kulowa kumudzi wakutiwakuti, ndipo tidzagonerako ndi kutsatsa malonda, ndi kupindula nao;" 
James4:14 inu amene simudziwa chimene chidzagwa mawa. Moyo wanu uli wotani? Pakuti muli utsi, wakuonekera kanthawi, ndi pamenepo ukanganuka." 
James4:15 Mukadanena inu, Akalola Mulungu, ndipo tikakhala ndi moyo, tidzachita kakutikakuti." 
James4:16 Koma tsopano mudzitamandira m'kudzikuza kwanu; kudzitamandira kulikonse kotero nkoipa. 
James4:17 Potero kwa iye amene adziwa kuchita bwino, ndipo sachita, kwa iye kuli tchimo." 
James5:1 Nanga tsono achuma inu, lirani ndi kuchema chifukwa cha masautso anu akudza pa inu." 
James5:2 Chuma chanu chaola ndi zovala zanu zajiwa ndi njenjete. 
James5:3 Golide wanu ndi siliva wanu zachita dzimbiri, ndipo dzimbiri lake lidzachita mboni zoneneza inu, ndipo zidzadya nyama yanu ngati moto. Mwadzikundikira chuma masiku otsiriza." 
James5:4 Taonani, mphotho ya antchitowo anasenga m'minda yanu, yosungidwa ndi inu powanyenga, ifuula; ndipo mafuulo a osengawo adalowa m'makutu a Ambuye wa makamu." 
James5:5 Mwadyerera padziko, ndipo mwachita zokukondweretsani; mwadyetsa mitima yanu m'tsiku lakupha." 
James5:6 Munamtsutsa, munapha wolungamayo, iye sakaniza inu." 
James5:7 Potero, lezani mtima, abale, kufikira kudza kwake kwa Ambuye. Taonani, wolima munda alindira chipatso chofunikatu cha dziko, ndi kuleza mtima nacho kufikira chikalandira mvula ya chizimalupsa ndi masika." 
James5:8 Lezani mtima inunso, limbitsani mitima yanu; pakuti kudza kwake kwa Ambuye kuyandikira." 
James5:9 Musaipidwe wina ndi mnzake, abale, kuti mungaweruzidwe. Taonani, woweruza aima pakhomo." 
James5:10 Tengani, abale, chitsanzo cha kumva zowawa ndi kuleza mtima, aneneri amene analankhula m'dzina la Ambuye." 
James5:11 Taonani tiwayesera odala opirirawo; mudamva za chipiriro cha Yobu, ndipo mwaona chitsiriziro cha Ambuye, kuti Ambuye ali wodzala chikondi, ndi wachifundo." 
James5:12 Koma makamaka, abale anga, musalumbire, kungakhale kutchula kumwamba kapena dziko, kapena lumbiro lina lililonse; koma inde wanu akhale inde, ndi iai wanu akhale iai; kuti mungagwe m'chiweruziro." 
James5:13 Kodi wina wa inu akumva zowawa? Apemphere. Kodi wina asekera? Aimbire. 
James5:14 Pali wina kodi adwala mwa inu? Adziitanire akulu a Mpingo, ndipo apemphere pa iye, atamdzoza ndi mafuta m'dzina la Ambuye:" 
James5:15 ndipo pemphero la chikhulupiriro lidzapulumutsa wodwalayo, ndipo Ambuye adzamuukitsa; ndipo ngati adachita machimo adzakhululukidwa kwa iye." 
James5:16 Chifukwa chake muvomerezane wina ndi mnzake machimo anu, ndipo mupempherere wina kwa mnzake kuti muchiritsidwe. Pemphero la munthu wolungama likhoza kwakukulu m'machitidwe ake." 
James5:17 Eliya anali munthu wakumva zomwezi tizimva ife, ndipo anapemphera chipempherere kuti isavumbe mvula; ndipo siinagwa mvula pa dziko zaka zitatu kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi." 
James5:18 Ndipo anapempheranso; ndipo m'mwamba munatsika mvula, ndi dziko lidabala zipatso zake." 
James5:19 Abale anga, ngati wina wa inu asochera posiyana ndi choonadi, ndipo ambweza iye mnzake;" 
James5:20 azindikire, kuti iye amene abweza wochimwa kunjira yake yosochera adzapulumutsa munthu kwa imfa, ndipo adzavundikira machimo aunyinji." 
1Peter1:1 Petro, mtumwi wa Yesu Khristu, kwa osankhidwa akukhala alendo a chibalaliko a ku Ponto, Galatiya, Kapadokiya, Asiya, ndi Bitiniya," 
1Peter1:2 monga mwa kudziwiratu kwa Mulungu Atate, m'chiyeretso cha Mzimu, chochitira chimvero, ndi kuwaza kwa mwazi wa Yesu Khristu: Chisomo, ndi mtendere zichulukire inu." 
1Peter1:3 Wodalitsika Mulungu ndiye Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, Iye amene, monga mwa chifundo chake chachikulu, anatibalanso ku chiyembekezo cha moyo, mwa kuuka kwa akufa kwa Yesu Khristu;" 
1Peter1:4 kuti tilandire cholowa chosavunda ndi chosadetsa ndi chosafota, chosungikira m'Mwamba inu," 
1Peter1:5 amene musungidwa ndi mphamvu ya Mulungu mwa chikhulupiriro, kufikira chipulumutso chokonzeka kukavumbulutsidwa nthawi yotsiriza." 
1Peter1:6 M'menemo mukondwera, kungakhale tsopano kanthawi, ngati kuyenera, mukachitidwe chisoni ndi mayesero a mitundumitundu," 
1Peter1:7 kuti mayesedwe a chikhulupiriro chanu, ndiwo a mtengo wake woposa wa golide amene angotayika, ngakhale ayesedwa ndi moto, akapezedwe ochitira chiyamiko ndi ulemerero ndi ulemu pa vumbulutso la Yesu Khristu;" 
1Peter1:8 amene mungakhale simunamuona mumkonda; amene mungakhale simumpenya tsopano, pokhulupirira, mukondwera naye ndi chimwemwe chosaneneka, ndi cha ulemerero:" 
1Peter1:9 ndi kulandira chitsiriziro cha chikhulupiriro chanu, ndicho chipulumutso cha moyo wanu." 
1Peter1:10 Kunena za chipulumutso ichi anafunafuna nasanthula aneneri, pakunenera za chisomo chikudzerani;" 
1Peter1:11 ndi kusanthula nthawi yiti, kapena nthawi yanji Mzimu wa Khristu wokhala mwa iwo analozera, pakuchitiratu umboni wa masautso a Khristu, ndi ulemerero wotsatana nao." 
1Peter1:12 Kwa iwo amene kudavumbulutsidwa, kuti sanadzitumikira iwo okha, koma inu, ndi zinthu izi, zimene zauzidwa kwa inu tsopano, mwa iwo amene anakulalikirani Uthenga Wabwino mwa Mzimu Woyera, wotumidwa kuchokera Kumwamba; zinthu izi angelo alakalaka kusuzumiramo." 
1Peter1:13 Mwa ichi, podzimanga m'chuuno, kunena za mtima wanu, mukhale odzisunga, nimuyembekeze konsekonse chisomo chilikutengedwa kudza nacho kwa inu m'vumbulutso la Yesu Khristu;" 
1Peter1:14 monga ana omvera osadzifanizitsanso ndi zilakolako zakale, pokhala osadziwa inu;" 
1Peter1:15 komatu monga Iye wakuitana inu ali woyera mtima, khalani inunso oyera mtima m'makhalidwe anu onse;" 
1Peter1:16 popeza kwalembedwa, Muzikhala oyera mtima, pakuti Ine ndine woyera mtima." 
1Peter1:17 Ndipo mukamuitana ngati Atate, Iye amene aweruza monga mwa ntchito ya yense, wopanda tsankho, khalani ndi mantha nthawi ya chilendo chanu;" 
1Peter1:18 podziwa kuti simunaomboledwa ndi zovunda, golide ndi siliva, kusiyana nao makhalidwe anu achabe ochokera kwa makolo anu:" 
1Peter1:19 koma ndi mwazi wa mtengo wake wapatali monga wa mwanawankhosa wopanda chilema, ndi wopanda banga, ndiwo mwazi wa Khristu:" 
1Peter1:20 amene anazindikirikatu lisanakhazikike dziko lapansi, koma anaonetsedwa pa chitsiriziro cha nthawi," 
1Peter1:21 chifukwa cha inu amene mwa Iye mukhulupirira Mulungu wakumuukitsa Iye kwa akufa, ndi kumpatsa Iye ulemerero; kotero kuti chikhulupiriro chanu ndi chiyembekezo chanu chikhale pa Mulungu." 
1Peter1:22 Popeza mwayeretsa moyo wanu pakumvera choonadi kuti mukakonde abale ndi chikondi chosanyenga, mukondane kwenikweni kuchokera kumtima;" 
1Peter1:23 inu amene mudabadwanso, osati ndi mbeu yofeka, komatu yosaola, mwa mau a Mulungu amoyo ndi okhalitsa." 
1Peter1:24 Popeza, Anthu onse akunga udzu, ndi ulemerero wao wonse ngati duwa la udzu. Udzuwo ungofota, ndi duwa lake lingogwa;" 
1Peter1:25 koma Mau a Mulungu akhala chikhalire. Ndipo mau olalikidwa kwa inu ndi awo. 
1Peter2:1 Momwemo pakutaya choipa chonse, ndi chinyengo chonse, ndi maonekedwe onyenga, ndi kaduka, ndi masinjiriro onse," 
1Peter2:2 lirani monga makanda alero mkaka woyenera, wopanda chinyengo, kuti mukakule nao kufikira chipulumutso;" 
1Peter2:3 ngati mwalawa kuti Ambuye ali wokoma mtima; 
1Peter2:4 amene pakudza kwa Iye, mwala wamoyo, wokanidwatu ndi anthu, koma ndi Mulungu wosankhika, waulemu," 
1Peter2:5 inunso ngati miyala yamoyo mumangidwa nyumba ya uzimu, kuti mukhale ansembe oyera mtima, akupereka nsembe zauzimu, zolandiridwa ndi Mulungu mwa Yesu Khristu." 
1Peter2:6 Chifukwa kwalembedwa m'lembo, Taona, ndiika m'Ziyoni mwala wotsiriza wa pangodya, wosankhika, wa mtengo wake; ndipo wokhulupirira Iye sadzanyazitsidwa." 
1Peter2:7 Kwa inu tsono akukhulupirira, ali wa mtengo wake; koma kwa iwo osakhulupirira, Mwala umene omangawo anaukana, womwewo unayesedwa mutu wa pangodya." 
1Peter2:8 Ndipo, Mwala wakukhumudwa nao, ndi thanthwe lophunthwitsa. Kwa iwo akukhumudwa ndi mau, pokhala osamvera, kumenekonso adaikidwako." 
1Peter2:9 Koma inu ndinu mbadwa yosankhika, ansembe achifumu, mtundu woyera mtima, anthu a mwini wake, kotero kuti mukalalikire zoposazo za Iye amene anakuitanani mutuluke mumdima, mulowe kuunika kwake kodabwitsa;" 
1Peter2:10 inu amene kale simunali anthu, koma tsopano muli anthu a Mulungu; amene kale simunalandira chifundo, koma tsopano mwalandira chifundo." 
1Peter2:11 Okondedwa, ndikudandaulirani ngati alendo ndi ogonera mudzikanize zilakolako za thupi zimene zichita nkhondo pa moyo;" 
1Peter2:12 ndipo mayendedwe anu mwa amitundu akhale okoma, kuti, m'mene akamba za inu ngati ochita zoipa, akalemekeze Mulungu pakuona ntchito zanu zabwino, m'tsiku la kuyang'anira." 
1Peter2:13 Tadzigonjani kwa zoikika zonse za anthu, chifukwa cha Ambuye; ngakhale kwa mfumu, monga mutu wa onse;" 
1Peter2:14 kapena kwa akazembe, monga otumidwa ndi iye kukalanga ochita zoipa, koma kusimba ochita zabwino." 
1Peter2:15 Pakuti chifuniro cha Mulungu chitere, kuti ndi kuchita zabwino mukatontholetse chipulukiro cha anthu opusa;" 
1Peter2:16 monga mfulu, koma osakhala nao ufulu monga chobisira choipa, koma ngati akapolo a Mulungu." 
1Peter2:17 Chitirani ulemu anthu onse. Kondani abale. Opani Mulungu, Chitirani mfumu ulemu." 
1Peter2:18 Anyamata inu, gonjerani ambuye anu ndi kuopa konse, osati abwino ndi aulere okha, komanso aukali." 
1Peter2:19 Pakuti ichi ndi chisomo ngati munthu, chifukwa cha chikumbumtima pa Mulungu alola zachisoni, pakumva zowawa wosaziyenera." 
1Peter2:20 Pakuti mbiri yokoma yanji, mukapirira pochimwa ndi kubwanyulidwapo? Komatu, ngati pochita zabwino, ndi kumvako ndiko chisomo pa Mulungu." 
1Peter2:21 Pakuti kudzachita ichi mwaitanidwa; pakutinso Khristu anamva zowawa m'malo mwanu, nakusiyirani chitsanzo kuti mukalondole mapazi ake;" 
1Peter2:22 amene sanachita tchimo, ndipo m'kamwa mwake sichinapezedwa chinyengo;" 
1Peter2:23 amene pochitidwa chipongwe sanabwezera chipongwe, pakumva zowawa, sanaopsa, koma anapereka mlandu kwa Iye woweruza kolungama;" 
1Peter2:24 amene anasenza machimo athu mwini yekha m'thupi mwake pamtanda, kuti ife, titafa kumachimo, tikakhale ndi moyo kutsata chilungamo; ameneyo mikwingwirima yake munachiritsidwa nayo." 
1Peter2:25 Pakuti munalikusochera ngati nkhosa; koma tsopano mwabwera kwa Mbusa ndi Woyang'anira wa moyo wanu. 
1Peter3:1 Momwemonso, akazi inu, mverani amuna anu a inu nokha; kuti, ngatinso ena samvera mau, akakodwe opanda mau mwa mayendedwe a akazi;" 
1Peter3:2 pakuona mayendedwe anu oyera ndi kuopa kwanu. 
1Peter3:3 Amene kukometsera kwanu kusakhale kwa kunja, kuluka tsitsi ndi kuvala za golide, kapena kuvala chovala;" 
1Peter3:4 koma kukhale munthu wobisika wamtima, m'chovala chosaola cha mzimu wofatsa ndi wachete, ndiwo wa mtengo wake wapatali pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Peter3:5 Pakuti koteronso kale akazi oyera mtima, akuyembekezera Mulungu, anadzikometsera okha, namvera amuna ao a iwo okha;" 
1Peter3:6 monga Sara anamvera Abrahamu, namutcha iye mbuye; ameneyo mukhala ana ake ngati muchita bwino, osaopa choopsa chilichonse." 
1Peter3:7 Momwemonso amuna inu, khalani nao monga mwa chidziwitso, ndi kuchitira mkazi ulemu, monga chotengera chochepa mphamvu, monganso wolowa nyumba pamodzi wa chisomo cha moyo, kuti mapemphero anu angaletsedwe." 
1Peter3:8 Chotsalira, khalani nonse a mtima umodzi, ochitirana chifundo, okondana ndi abale, achisoni, odzichepetsa;" 
1Peter3:9 osabwezera choipa ndi choipa, kapena chipongwe ndi chipongwe, koma penatu madalitso; pakuti kudzatsata ichi mwaitanidwa, kuti mukalandire dalitso." 
1Peter3:10 Pakuti, Iye wofuna kukonda moyo, ndi kuona masiku abwino, aletse lilime lake lisanene choipa, ndi milomo yake isalankhule chinyengo;" 
1Peter3:11 ndipo apatuke pachoipa, nachite chabwino; afunefune mtendere ndi kuulondola." 
1Peter3:12 Pakuti maso a Ambuye ali pa olungama, ndi makutu ake akumva pembedzo lao; koma nkhope ya Ambuye ili pa ochita zoipa." 
1Peter3:13 Ndipo ndani iye amene adzakuchitirani choipa, ngati muchita nacho changu chinthu chabwino?" 
1Peter3:14 Komatu ngatinso mukumva zowawa chifukwa cha chilungamo, odala inu; ndipo musaope pakuwaopa iwo, kapena musadere nkhawa;" 
1Peter3:15 koma mumpatulikitse Ambuye Khristu m'mitima yanu; okonzeka nthawi zonse kuchita chodzikanira pa yense wakukufunsani chifukwa cha chiyembekezo chili mwa inu, komatu ndi chifatso ndi mantha;" 
1Peter3:16 ndi kukhala nacho chikumbu mtima chabwino, kuti umo akunenerani, iwo akunenera konama mayendedwe anu abwino m'Khristu akachitidwe manyazi." 
1Peter3:17 Pakuti, kumva zowawa chifukwa cha kuchita zabwino, ndi kumva zowawa chifukwa cha kuchita zoipa, nkwabwino kumva zowawa chifukwa cha kuchita zabwino, ngati chitero chifuniro cha Mulungu." 
1Peter3:18 Pakuti Khristunso adamva zowawa kamodzi, chifukwa cha machimo, wolungama m'malo mwa osalungama, kuti akatifikitse kwa Mulungu; wophedwatu m'thupi, koma wopatsidwa moyo mumzimu;" 
1Peter3:19 m'menemonso anapita, nalalikira mizimu inali m'ndende," 
1Peter3:20 imene inakhala yosamvera kale, pamene kuleza mtima kwa Mulungu kunalindira, m'masiku a Nowa, pokhala m'kukonzeka chingalawa, m'menemo owerengeka, ndiwo amoyo asanu ndi atatu, anapulumutsidwa mwa madzi;" 
1Peter3:21 chimenenso chifaniziro chake chikupulumutsani tsopano, ndicho ubatizo, kosati kutaya kwa litsiro lake la thupi, komatu funso lake la chikumbu mtima chokoma kwa Mulungu, mwa kuuka kwa Yesu Khristu;" 
1Peter3:22 amene akhala pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu, atalowa m'Mwamba; pali angelo, ndi maulamuliro, ndi zimphamvu, zonse zimgonjera." 
1Peter4:1 Popeza Khristu adamva zowawa m'thupi, mudzikonzere mtima womwewo; pakuti iye amene adamva zowawa m'thupi walekana nalo tchimo;" 
1Peter4:2 kuti nthawi yotsalira simukakhalenso ndi moyo m'thupi kutsata zilakolako za anthu, koma chifuniro cha Mulungu." 
1Peter4:3 Pakuti nthawi yapitayi idatifikira kuchita chifuno cha amitundu, poyendayenda ife m'kukhumba zonyansa, zilakolako, maledzero, madyerero, maimwaimwa, ndi kupembedza mafano kosaloleka;" 
1Peter4:4 m'menemo ayesa nchachilendo kuti simuthamanga nao kufikira kusefukira komwe kwa chitayiko, nakuchitirani mwano;" 
1Peter4:5 amenewo adzamwerengera Iye wokhala wokonzeka kuweruza amoyo ndi akufa. 
1Peter4:6 Pakuti chifukwa cha ichi walalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino kwa iwonso adafawo, kuti akaweruzidwe monga mwa anthu m'thupi, koma akakhale ndi moyo monga mwa Mulungu mumzimu." 
1Peter4:7 Koma chitsiriziro cha zinthu zonse chili pafupi; chifukwa chake khalani anzeru, ndipo dikirani m'mapemphero;" 
1Peter4:8 koposa zonse mukhale nacho chikondano chenicheni mwa inu nokha; pakuti chikondano chikwiriritsa unyinji wa machimo; 
1Peter4:9 mucherezane wina ndi mnzake, osadandaula:" 
1Peter4:10 monga yense walandira mphatso, mutumikirane nayo, ngati adindo okoma a chisomo cha mitundumitundu cha Mulungu;" 
1Peter4:11 akalankhula wina, alankhule ngati manenedwe a Mulungu; wina akatumikira, achite ngati mu mphamvu imene Mulungu ampatsa, kuti m'zonse Mulungu alemekezedwe mwa Yesu Khristu, amene ali nao ulemerero ndi mphamvu kunthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Okondedwa, musazizwe ndi mayesedwe amoto adakugwerani inu akhale chakukuyesani, ngati chinthu chachilendo chachitika nanu:" 
1Peter4:13 koma popeza mulawana ndi Khristu zowawa zake, kondwerani: kutinso pa vumbulutso la ulemerero wake mukakondwere kwakukulukulu." 
1Peter4:14 Mukatonzedwa pa dzina la Khristu, odala inu; pakuti Mzimu wa ulemerero, ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu apuma pa inu." 
1Peter4:15 Pakuti asamve zowawa wina wa inu ngati wambanda, kapena mbala, kapena wochita zoipa, kapena ngati wodudukira;" 
1Peter4:16 koma akamva zowawa ngati mkhristu asachite manyazi; koma alemekeze Mulungu m'dzina ili. 
1Peter4:17 Chifukwa yafika nthawi kuti chiweruziro chiyambe pa nyumba ya Mulungu; koma ngati chiyamba ndi ife, chitsiriziro cha iwo osamvera Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu chidzakhala chiyani?" 
1Peter4:18 Ndipo ngati munthu wolungama apulumuka ndi kuyesetsa kokhakokha, munthu wosapembedza ndi wochimwa adzaoneka kuti?" 
1Peter4:19 Koteronso iwo akumva zowawa monga mwa chifuniro cha Mulungu aike moyo wao ndi kuchita zokoma m'manja a Wolenga wokhulupirika. 
1Peter5:1 Akulu tsono mwa inu ndiwadandaulira, ine mkulu mnzanu ndi mboni ya zowawa za Khristu, ndinenso wolawana nao ulemerero udzavumbulutsikawo:" 
1Peter5:2 Wetani gulu la Mulungu lili mwa inu, ndi kuliyang'anira, osati mokakamiza, koma mwaufulu, kwa Mulungu; osatsata phindu lonyansa, koma mwachangu;" 
1Peter5:3 osati monga ochita ufumu pa iwo a udindo wanu, koma okhala zitsanzo za gululo." 
1Peter5:4 Ndipo pakuonekera Mbusa wamkulu, mudzalandira korona wa ulemerero, wosafota." 
1Peter5:5 Momwemonso, anyamata inu, mverani akulu. Koma nonsenu muvale kudzichepetsa kuti mutumikirane; pakuti Mulungu akaniza odzikuza, koma apatsa chisomo kwa odzichepetsa." 
1Peter5:6 Potero dzichepetseni pansi pa dzanja la mphamvu la Mulungu, kuti panthawi yake akakukwezeni;" 
1Peter5:7 ndi kutaya pa Iye nkhawa yanu yonse, pakuti Iye asamalira inu." 
1Peter5:8 Khalani odzisungira, dikirani; mdani wanu mdierekezi, monga mkango wobuma, ayendayenda ndi kufunafuna wina akamlikwire:" 
1Peter5:9 ameneyo mumkanize okhazikika m'chikhulupiriro, podziwa kuti zowawa zomwezo zilimkukwaniridwa pa abale anu ali m'dziko." 
1Peter5:10 Ndipo Mulungu wa chisomo chonse, amene adakuitanani kulowa ulemerero wake wosatha mwa Khristu, mutamva zowawa kanthawi, adzafikitsa inu opanda chilema mwini wake, adzakhazikitsa, adzalimbikitsa inu." 
1Peter5:11 Kwa Iye kukhale mphamvu kunthawi za nthawi. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Mwa Silivano, mbale wathu wokhulupirika monga ndimayesa, ndalembera kwa inu mwachidule, ndi kudandaulira, ndi kuchita umboni, kuti chisomo choona cha Mulungu ndi ichi; m'chimenechi muimemo." 
1Peter5:13 Iye wa ku Babiloni wosankhidwa pamodzi nanu akulankhulani; ateronso Marko mwana wanga. 
1Peter5:13 Iye wa ku Babiloni wosankhidwa pamodzi nanu akulankhulani; ateronso Marko mwana wanga. 
1Peter5:14 Mupatsane moni ndi chipsompsono cha chikondi. Mtendere ukhale ndi inu nonse muli mwa Khristu. 
2Peter1:1 Simoni Petro, kapolo ndi mtumwi wa Yesu Khristu kwa iwo amene adalandira chikhulupiriro cha mtengo wake womwewo ndi ife, m'chilungamo cha Mulungu wathu ndi Mpulumutsi Yesu Khristu:" 
2Peter1:2 Chisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere zichulukitsidwe m'chidziwitso cha Mulungu ndi Yesu Ambuye wathu. 
2Peter1:3 Popeza mphamvu ya umulungu wake idatipatsa ife zonse za pamoyo ndi chipembedzo, mwa chidziwitso cha Iye amene adatiitana ife ndi ulemerero ndi ukoma wake wa Iye yekha;" 
2Peter1:4 mwa izi adatipatsa malonjezano a mtengo wake ndi akulu ndithu; kuti mwa izi mukakhale oyanjana nao umulungu wake, mutapulumuka kuchivundi chili pa dziko lapansi m'chilakolako." 
2Peter1:5 Ndipo mwa ichi chomwe, pakutengeraponso changu chonse, muonjezerapo ukoma pa chikhulupiriro chanu, ndi paukoma chizindikiritso; ndi pachizindikiritso chodziletsa;" 
2Peter1:6 ndi pachodziletsa chipiriro; 
2Peter1:7 ndi pachipiriro chipembedzo; ndi pachipembedzo chikondi cha pa abale; ndi pachikondi cha pa abale chikondi. 
2Peter1:8 Pakuti izi zikakhala ndi inu, ndipo zikachuluka, zidzachita kuti musakhale aulesi kapena opanda zipatso pa chizindikiritso cha Ambuye Yesu Khristu." 
2Peter1:9 Pakuti iye wakusowa izi ali wakhungu, wa chimbuuzi, woiwala matsukidwe ake potaya zoipa zake zakale." 
2Peter1:10 Momwemo abale, onjezani kuchita changu kukhazikitsa maitanidwe ndi masankhulidwe anu; pakuti mukachita izi, simudzakhumudwa nthawi zonse;" 
2Peter1:11 pakuti kotero kudzaonjezedwa kwa inu kolemerera khomo lakulowa ufumu wosatha wa Ambuye wathu ndi Mpulumutsi Yesu Khristu. 
2Peter1:12 Mwa ichi sindidzaleka kukukumbutsani inu nthawi zonse za izi, mungakhale muzidziwa nimukhazikika m'choonadi chili ndi inu." 
2Peter1:13 Ndipo ndichiyesa chokoma, pokhala ine m'msasa uwu, kukutsitsimutsani ndi kukukumbutsani;" 
2Peter1:14 podziwa kuti kuleka kwa msasa wanga kuli pafupi, monganso Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu anandilangiza." 
2Peter1:15 Koma ndidzachitanso changu kosalekeza kuti nditachoka ine, mudzakhoza kukumbukira izi." 
2Peter1:16 Pakuti sitinatsata miyambi yachabe, pamene tinakudziwitsani mphamvu ndi maonekedwe a Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, koma tinapenya m'maso ukulu wake." 
2Peter1:17 Pakuti analandira kwa Mulungu Atate ulemu ndi ulemerero, pakumdzera Iye mau otere ochokera ku ulemerero waukulu, Uyu ndi Mwana wanga wokondedwa, amene Ine ndikondwera naye;" 
2Peter1:18 ndipo mau awa ochokera Kumwamba tidawamva ife, pokhala pamodzi ndi Iye m'phiri lopatulika lija." 
2Peter1:19 Ndipo tili nao mau a chinenero okhazikika koposa; amene muchita bwino powasamalira, monga nyali younikira m'malo a mdima, kufikira kukacha, nikauka nthanda pa mtima yanu;" 
2Peter1:20 ndi kudziwa ichi poyamba, kuti palibe chinenero cha lembo chitanthauzidwa pa chokha," 
2Peter1:21 pakuti kale lonse chinenero sichinadza ndi chifuniro cha munthu; koma anthu a Mulungu, ogwidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, analankhula." 
2Peter2:1 Koma padakhalanso pakati pa anthuwo aneneri onama, monganso padzakhala aphunzitsi onama pakati pa inu, amene adzalowa nayo m'tseri mipatuko yotayikitsa, nadzakana Ambuye amene adawagula, nadzadzitengera iwo okha chitayiko chakudza msanga." 
2Peter2:2 Ndipo ambiri adzatsata zonyansa zao; chifukwa cha iwo njira ya choonadi idzanenedwa zamwano. 
2Peter2:3 Ndipo m'chisiriro adzakuyesani malonda ndi mau onyenga; amene chiweruzo chao sichinachedwa ndi kale lomwe, ndipo chitayiko chao sichiodzera." 
2Peter2:4 Pakuti ngati Mulungu sanalekerera angelo adachimwawo, koma anawaponya kundende nawaika kumaenje a mdima, asungike akaweruzidwe;" 
2Peter2:5 ndipo sanalekerera dziko lapansi lakale, koma anasunga Nowa mlaliki wa chilungamo, ndi anzake asanu ndi awiri, pakulitengera dziko la osapembedza chigumula;" 
2Peter2:6 ndipo pakuisandutsa makala midzi ya Sodomu ndi Gomora anaitsutsa poigwetsa, ataiika chitsanzo cha kwa iwo akakhala osapembedza;" 
2Peter2:7 ndipo anapulumutsa Loti wolungamayo, wolema mtima ndi mayendedwe onyansa a oipa aja" 
2Peter2:8 (pakuti wolungamayo pokhala pakati pao. Ndi kuona ndi kumva zao, anadzizunzira moyo wake wolungama tsiku ndi tsiku ndi ntchito zao zosaweruzika)." 
2Peter2:9 Ambuye adziwa kupulumutsa opembedza poyesedwa iwo, ndi kusunga osalungama kufikira tsiku loweruza akalangidwe;" 
2Peter2:10 koma makamaka iwo akutsata za thupi, m'chilakolako cha zodetsa, napeputsa chilamuliro; osaopa kanthu, otsata chifuniro cha iwo eni, santhunthumira kuchitira mwano akulu aulemerero;" 
2Peter2:11 popeza angelo, angakhale awaposa polimbitsa mphamvu, sawaneneza kwa Ambuye mlandu wakuchita mwano." 
2Peter2:12 Koma awo, ngati zamoyo zopanda nzeru, nyama zobadwa kuti zikodwe ndi kuonongedwa, akuchitira mwano pa zinthu osazidziwa, adzaonongeka m'kuononga kwao," 
2Peter2:13 ochitidwa zoipa kulipira kwa chosalungama; anthu akuyesera chowakondweretsa kudyerera usana; ndiwo mawanga ndi zilema, akudyerera m'madyerero achikondi ao, pamene akudya nanu;" 
2Peter2:14 okhala nao maso odzala ndi chigololo, osakhoza kuleka uchimo, kunyengerera iwo a moyo wosakhazikika; okhala nao mtima wozolowera kusirira; ana a temberero;" 
2Peter2:15 posiya njira yolunjika, anasokera, atatsata njira ya Balamu mwana wa Beori, amene anakonda mphotho ya chosalungama;" 
2Peter2:16 koma anadzudzulidwa pa kulakwa kwake mwini; bulu wopanda mau, wolankhula ndi mau a munthu, analetsa kuyaluka kwa mneneriyo." 
2Peter2:17 Iwo ndiwo akasupe opanda madzi, nkhungu yokankhika ndi mkuntho; amene mdima wakuda bii uwasungikira." 
2Peter2:18 Pakuti polankhula mau otukumuka opanda pake, anyengerera pa zilakolako za thupi, ndi zonyansa, iwo amene adayamba kupulumukira a mayendedwe olakwawo;" 
2Peter2:19 ndi kuwalonjezera iwo ufulu, pokhala iwo okha ali akapolo a chivundi; pakuti iye amene munthu agonjedwa naye, ameneyonso adzakhala kapolo wake." 
2Peter2:20 Pakuti ngati, adatha kuthawa zodetsa za dziko lapansi mwa chizindikiritso cha Ambuye ndi Mpulumutsi Yesu Khristu, akondwanso nazo, nagonjetsedwa, zotsiriza zao zidzaipa koposa zoyambazo." 
2Peter2:21 Pakuti pakadakhala bwino kwa iwo akadakhala osazindikira njira ya chilungamo, ndi poizindikira, kubwerera kutaya lamulo lopatulika lopatsidwa kwa iwo."

2Peter3:2 kuti mukumbukire mau onenedwa kale ndi aneneri oyera, ndi lamulo la Ambuye ndi Mpulumutsi, mwa atumwi anu;"

2Peter3:4 ndi kunena, Lili kuti lonjezano la kudza kwake? Pakuti kuyambira kuja makolo adamwalira zonse zikhala monga chiyambire chilengedwe."

2Peter3:6 mwa izi dziko lapansi la masiku aja, pomizika ndi madzi, lidaonongeka;" 
2Peter3:7 koma miyamba ndi dziko la masiku ano, ndi mau omwewo zaikika kumoto, zosungika kufikira tsiku la chiweruzo ndi chionongeko cha anthu osapembedza." 
2Peter3:8 Koma ichi chimodzi musaiwale, okondedwa inu, kuti tsiku limodzi likhala kwa Ambuye ngati zaka chikwi, ndi zaka chikwi ngati tsiku limodzi." 
2Peter3:9 Ambuye sazengereza nalo lonjezano, monga ena achiyesa chizengerezo; komatu aleza mtima kwa inu, wosafuna kuti ena aonongeke, koma kuti onse afike kukulapa." 
2Peter3:10 Koma tsiku la Ambuye lidzadza ngati mbala; m'mene miyamba idzapita ndi chibumo chachikulu, ndi zam'mwamba zidzakanganuka ndi kutentha kwakukulu, ndipo dziko ndi ntchito zili momwemo zidzatenthedwa." 
2Peter3:11 Popeza izi zonse zidzakanganuka kotero, muyenera inu kukhala anthu otani nanga, m'mayendedwe opatulika ndi m'chipembedzo," 
2Peter3:12 akuyembekezera ndi kufulumira kwa kudza kwake kwa tsiku la Mulungu, m'menemo miyamba potentha moto idzakanganuka, ndi zam'mwamba zidzasungunuka ndi kutentha kwakukulu." 
2Peter3:13 Koma monga mwa lonjezano lake tiyembekezera miyamba yatsopano, ndi dziko latsopano m'menemo mukhalitsa chilungamo." 
2Peter3:14 Momwemo, okondedwa, popeza muyembekeza izi, chitani changu kuti mupezedwe ndi Iye mumtendere, opanda banga ndi opanda chilema." 
2Peter3:15 Ndipo yesani kulekerera kwa Ambuye wathu chipulumutso; monganso mbale wathu wokondedwa Paulo, monga mwa nzeru zopatsidwa kwa iye, anakulemberani;" 
2Peter3:16 monganso m'akalata ake onse pokamba momwemo za izi; m'menemo muli zina zovuta kuzizindikira, zimene anthu osaphunzira ndi osakhazikika apotoza, monganso atero nao malembo ena, ndi kudziononga nao eni." 
2Peter3:17 Inu, tsono, okondedwa, pozizindikiratu izi, chenjerani, kuti potengedwa ndi kulakwa kwa iwo osaweruzika, mungagwe kusiya chikhazikiko chanu." 
2Peter3:18 Koma kulani m'chisomo ndi chizindikiritso cha Ambuye wathu ndi Mpulumutsi Yesu Khristu; kwa Iye kukhale ulemerero, tsopano ndi nthawi zonse. Amen."
